1173189497.text_en: This Bosch dishwasher is perfect. Quiet, efficient and has many programs. You will definitely find the one you need. whether you are alone or with family, it can schedule a zn wash depending on what you have in it. Power consumption is very correct even with the 2h function. If you need a quick wash, it can be done in 2 hours or less. The application allows you to remotely manage your device and even start it. Although this could be improved. Maid it is very nice to choose different functions like temperature, drying and many others.

1144930796.text_en: The dishwasher does its job cleanly and reliably. Integrating it into the Home Connect app is also as easy as usual. The noise level of the rinsing process is whisper quiet compared to our previous dishwasher.    Suggestions for improvement: - The flap should open on its own after the washing program has ended.  - The signal light that indicates the completion of a flushing process should be projected on the floor, not on the side (top left).    Conclusion: Apart from small things, a dishwasher that can be recommended

1151422823.text_en: The best thing about this model is that it is a few centimeters larger than the "normal" ones, which provides more interior space. Especially useful when fully loaded and there are large pots. Also, since it fits right into the hole, I avoid having to use the legs of the dishwasher, which would lower over time and I would have to readjust.  What I liked the least is the cutlery tray. The previous one was a basket one and you didn't have to place the cutlery in position, just put it in the basket.   The build quality seems worse than the one it replaces that is 20 years old. Let's see if this lasts the same.

1125434042.text_en: This dishwasher does not wash well despite cleaning the filter after each wash.  It leaves marks on all the cutlery (Guy Degrenne) and glasses and I have to empty it with a cloth to dry the plates, cutlery and glasses which are not always dry.  It's less than a year old and I already regret my purchase.  I can't wait to change it

1111260036.text_en: Dishes, pots, glasses and cutlery are kept perfectly clean.   We particularly like the cutlery drawer, the height adjustment of the upper basket and the folding plate holders in the lower basket. This means there is space for the baking tray in addition to the pizza plates. It would be even better if the plate holders on the right and left could be folded down separately. I would also like to see foldable holders in the upper basket and a solution for roulade needles or other mini parts. We really like the subtle white lighting that shows that the dishwasher is in use.

1157660029.text_en: Simply everything is great, I am a loyal customer of the brand and I did not expect anything less, quiet, fast, modern.

1153430711.text_en: Very quiet dishwasher with perfect connectivity and optimal washing results.

1150032535.title_en: So far everything is very good
1150032535.text_en: They just installed it, it looks very good, we will see results

1143541565.text_en: A very practical dishwasher thanks to the dynamic layout of the baskets. The cutlery drawer is fine, but less useful for thicker cutlery.  The settings are very easy via the app, a little less easy via the control buttons. But setting a favorite is a great solution for starting the dishwasher quickly. Even our children aged 2.5 and 4 can set up the dishwasher.  The downside is that it does not open automatically at the end of the program and that the LED indication is on the side instead of shining on the floor.

1145879929.title_en: Good cleaning, very quiet, great app control
1145879929.text_en: Good layout, height-adjustable upper basket - so even tall glasses fit well - very quiet during the washing program, great app control, very good cleaning results.

1159529419.text_en: I am more than satisfied with the device! Operating the dishwasher is child's play and the gadgets via the app are very helpful; adjusting the water hardness and the controlled addition of salt and rinse aid clean the dishes perfectly!  The device has many programs, but I haven't tested them all myself.  The machine is significantly quieter compared to my old one and has better washing results.    I am completely satisfied!

1128987210.title_en: Device with good and bad sides.
1128987210.text_en: The general cleaning performance is good, the device is also very quiet. Two stars for that... but, 1. the device is not HomeKit compatible (it's annoying when you need a separate app for every thing), has a VarioFront (which wasn't in the description) and the dishes come out of the dishwasher dripping wet. Our old man was better, he dried everything. With this one I'm lucky that a bucket of water doesn't come my way when I open the door.

1131038402.title_en: Great kitchen helper with good room layout
1131038402.text_en: I actually only decided on the dishwasher because I didn't have much choice for my IKEA kitchen and one from IKEA itself wasn't good enough for me. At first I was skeptical about the cutlery drawer. I now think the solution is better than a basket. Lots of ways I want my dishes washed. With Smart Home I can see at any time how long my device still needs or make changes. Great luxury.

1141169828.title_en: Good device with one small flaw
1141169828.text_en: I am completely satisfied with the device. The dishes get clean, the installation was easy and the smart home connectivity is very practical.  There is enough space inside and the additional drawer for dishes is brilliant.    The only small flaw: the dishes don't dry properly, but I open the machine door after the wash cycle is finished, which dries the dishes and there are no traces of water left.

1151925748.text_en: I looked for a model with a Vario hinge for a long time and decided on this model. I'm very satisfied, but I would have imagined the silence function to be a little more silent. Otherwise it does everything perfectly and I love the automatic door opening. It can be integrated into the smart home via Home Connect and started if necessary. His name is Holger and I think he feels comfortable here too.

1161362210.text_en: Good dishwasher that cleans thoroughly and is easy to use. The lower basket is very spacious so that even large pizza plates can fit in it. We just took out the top cutlery drawer and bought a cutlery basket because we find it more convenient.    Unfortunately, the control panel recently malfunctioned and was no longer responsive; even after the power plug has been plugged in and unplugged. It was no longer possible to select a program and start. Only one program flashed, and after a short time everything suddenly worked again. This happened to us twice. The machine is less than a year old and has almost 100 wash cycles behind it. I hope that an update via the HomeConnect app fixed the error, because it hasn't reappeared since then. Unfortunately, I was unable to view any further information about the updated update. Wait and see. Otherwise a decent device at a good price.

1136114667.text_en: Perfect integration into the furniture thanks to the XXL size (no additional pieces needed to fill the gap left in conventional size dishwashers) and the sliding doors.  Good loading capacity, the third tray is very practical. Sufficient variety of washing programs. Silent operation.

1161639185.text_en: We moved into our new house last year and equipped our kitchen with Bosch appliances. The dishwasher offers enough space, is relatively quiet and washes very cleanly without leaving any residue. I hope it stays that way even after many years of use. So everything is great so far, I can only recommend it! :)

1152374530.text_en: The dishwasher itself is a nice device, but gets a negative point.  The drying is not particularly good.  If coffee pots/large cups are in the middle level (where they belong), water always remains.   I also selected the "increased" temperature, with no change

1111055501.text_en: I can highly recommend this dishwasher.  Dishes are always clean and never had any problems. The machine isn't too loud either. Cell phone operation and notifications work excellently.  The dishwasher is installed in an Ikea Metod kitchen where it fits perfectly.

1168291146.text_en: The dishwasher has done its job perfectly so far, the noise level is pleasant (open kitchen, which is an important criterion) and the dishes have always been clean. The dishwasher is also easy to maintain, the sieves are easy to remove and clean.

1114823618.text_en: I am satisfied with this new dishwasher from Bosch. Good washing results, dishes are dry. I find the cutlery drawer useful, which also gives more space in the lower basket. I think I can now fit a lot more dishes [pans, lids and plates] in the bottom drawer.  Happy with this dishwasher!

1124969434.text_en: With the same size as the one I had before I can wash more dishes, but what I like the most is that it is very quiet. The dishes are nice and dry. What I like least is that if you don't wash it as soon as you put the dishes in, it smells quite a bit (that didn't happen to me with the previous one).

1147506479.title_en: Spacious and does its thing, home connect could be better
1147506479.text_en: The device is spacious and contains an extra drawer for cutlery. This means there is plenty of room at the bottom to place plates, pots and pans.  The device is easy to use. The downside is that the dishwasher often has problems connecting to Home Connect.

1105812148.text_en: Nice dishwasher. But this one dries much worse than my previous one. I understand that plastic comes out wet. But the cups are so upright that they are really soaking wet. I wasn't used to that. A very nice short program and it also works without salt.

1149658803.text_en: The dishwasher washes very reliably! There have been no problems so far and we have had it for about a year.   We would recommend him again and again! The silent function is also very practical when you need some peace and quiet! All in all a great device!

1155543431.text_en: The product arrived on time. The carrier made the connections of the device. The next day, another technician came to install the panel door and start up the dishwasher. He explained the functions to me. Very kind.

1129162188.text_en: I chose it because it is 5 cm taller and it is significant for the capacity, there are many of us at home and it is a feature that not many dishwashers have, I have also always had Bosch dishwashers and they have always been very reliable and durable.

1127170476.text_en: So far we are very satisfied. Almost always use the automatic program and the colorful mix of kitchen items will be clean. I would choose again. It's also great that the device is fully integrated, so my kitchen has a uniform look.

1126913494.text_en: Perfect washing machine!!! It washes everything flawlessly, the dishes are perfectly dry and shiny after washing. The extra accessory drawer at the very top is a great thing. The accessories should be thoroughly washed. Along with the best washing machine, I use only the best Finish tablets.

1111053084.text_en: The dishwasher is an excellent model. It has various programs, has the perfect speed function and cleans the dishes perfectly.   You can start it at any time by controlling it with the app. Overall a top model.

1155359368.text_en: I am a customer of the brand, I needed to change the dishwasher and I was right.  The finishes, the operation, the sound level, the capacity with three heights.  A success and even more so the Eco program to leave it running at night.

1159866949.text_en: We have always had Bosch products. This new device is another step up and improvement. Due to the size and many different programs, every application is catered for. Tit and effective...

1115720460.text_en: I didn't think it would be so useful: receiving a message on your mobile when the program is ready or starting the dishwasher with your mobile.   In the future I would like to connect multiple devices to my Home Connect

1136457857.text_en: Very happy with the purchase of this dishwasher, especially for the total capacity since it has the third tray for cutlery and is very comfortable, the total extraction of the drawers also helps a lot for loading.

1151742956.text_en: Great dishwasher. The cutlery drawer is extremely practical and so is the adjustable basket. The machine is quiet and super easy to use, including via the app. It is perfect for a family household.

1111087172.text_en: The device was super easy to install and did a great job in March. I would rate the cleaning effect as 5 stars, and due to the height, even pizza plates fit in.

1151782591.text_en: Very good washing and drying, they offered me other brands but since it came from another Bosch, for now everything is perfect, I'm still waiting for a refund from a promotion when I buy it for €75 and there are 4 stars

1152359593.text_en: The dishwasher works perfectly, is super quiet and does what it promises. The app control works without any problems, and it can even be operated with Alexa. Absolute purchase recommendation!

1152695401.text_en: We are very happy with the purchase of the dishwasher. It's quiet, the top cutlery tray is very convenient and space-saving, and so far it's everything we expected

1198632701.text_en: It is a solid, good dishwasher that serves its purpose.  Dishes get clean, it's just a little loud every now and then in a kitchen-living room.  Nevertheless, we are completely satisfied.

1137507097.text_en: Top machine. Nice and quiet and easy to use. Plenty of space to store the dishes. With the Home Connect you can switch on the Bosch remotely at a good 'energy moment'.

1155155969.text_en: I have been using it for 1 year and it is wonderful, it barely makes any noise, the consumption of both water and electricity is minimal and everything comes out very clean and dry even in the shortest program.,.

1141711401.text_en: We are very satisfied with the dishwasher. The cutlery drawer is super practical, so you can fit more in the bottom compartment. Can only recommend the dishwasher!

1147172478.text_en: I think it's great how clean, quiet and easy the dishwasher works.  It was quick to install/connect and working with the app is also super easy.

1168304916.text_en: Perfectly sufficient for a family celebration with 12 guests. The fastest program is enough to have the machine free again after lunch until coffee.

1151033717.text_en: I have used it a little but my experience couldn't be better. I have always had Bosch appliances and with experiences like this, I will never change.

1129057002.text_en: The dishwasher works great and leaves everything quite clean. The instructions for installation and integration are perfectly detailed.

1158162617.text_en: The device is great. With the Home Connect function and the various individual programs you are fully equipped.   Very satisfied 👍🏽

1151341940.text_en: I am a long-time user of the Bosch brand (dishwasher, washing machine, dryer, refrigerator, extractor hood, meat grinder) and I am very satisfied with these appliances.

1117914389.text_en: I am very surprised by the great app and how easy it is to use.  The fact that you can adjust the baskets is a great thing.

1169859933.text_en: The dishwasher fits perfectly into the Ikea Metod kitchen and is also very quiet to use thanks to its silence function.

1127345700.text_en: I was surprised by its great capacity. And the cleaning result is very good, including the pots and glassware.

1174784454.text_en: The device has an exceptionally good cleaning performance and has impressed so far with its cleanliness without pre-rinsing

1129858086.text_en: Although it has to be tested for a longer time, based on experience I expect a lot from this device

1135094044.text_en: Quick and perfect cleaning of the dishes, very practical cutlery tray, very easy to use.

1168306201.text_en: It's very good that the door opens automatically after you've finished rinsing and that you can set it to be quiet.

1130958781.text_en: I've never had one before, it's something new for me.  I hope it is long-lasting and has good results.

1169853537.title_en: Expensive, loses the WiFi connection, but ok
1169853537.text_en: Constantly losing connection. Apart from the overpriced, it does what it's supposed to do

1136156561.text_en: I am satisfied with this dishwasher. It has great capacity and integrates perfectly

1093674020.text_en: The dishwasher disappears into the kitchenette, washes perfectly and is pleasantly quiet.

1161234763.text_en: I REALLY LIKE THE DISHWASHER VERY QUIET A LITTLE EXPENSIVE BUT IN GENERAL VERY GOOD

1147639287.text_en: It's just what I was looking for. Very quiet, intuitive and very good results.

1150825060.title_en: Washes well and everything is sparkling clean
1150825060.text_en: Overall good device, also suitable for Ikea method system, price-performance ratio is right

1155425496.text_en: 5 weeks is too short for a well-founded assessment. Very satisfied so far.

1138953314.text_en: I am very satisfied with this product, it fully meets my expectations.

1137425156.text_en: I am very satisfied with this product, it fully meets my expectations.

1147496796.text_en: I have been using the dishwasher for two years now and am very satisfied.

1163952006.text_en: I don't know him enough. At first it works very well

1150365032.text_en: Always a guarantee of success, my mother has it and not a single mistake.

1142624663.text_en: Easy to use, great washing and rinsing!!!

1188231782.text_en: Lots of space in the dishwasher, top product.

1172547841.text_en: At first glance it looks good

1171674045.text_en: Large, lots of space and well distributed.

1106580609.text_en: XXL Dishwasher for XXL washing pleasure.

1172593003.text_en: Washes clean and does not make much noise

1097937361.text_en: Leaves dishes very dry and shiny

1207242108.title_en: The best girl in the kitchen 🤗
1207242108.text_en: I bought this resealed product, not knowing what problems I would face until the first use, but I did it! I trusted this dishwasher from the beginning and now I am very proud of it 🤗! I had to dismantle the access door, and straighten it, including the stainless steel tank so that it wouldn't seal and lose water, as they were damaged during transport. It didn't turn out perfectly, but now it works without any problem, and the dishes wash perfectly 🤗🩵🩵🩵! Now she also has a name: Angela! And Angela is now loved by the whole family! We are grateful to you Angela for the way you restore the beauty of the dishes you cleaned and for giving us more free time, in exchange for minimal consumption of energy, water and detergents! We promise to take care of you and stay with us for many years to come 🤗🕊️🕊️🕊️🍀❤️ Thank you too Mother Bosch 🤗🍀🍀🍀🫶🏻

1184954373.text_en: I have been using this Bosch dishwasher for a long time and I am very satisfied. It washes very well, is silent and seems built to last over time. The cutlery drawer is a big plus – it allows for better organization and frees up space in the lower basket. Another aspect that I liked is the Home Connect application. Through it, I can check the status of the program at any time and receive notifications when the machine finishes the washing cycle. It's a detail that may seem small, but it adds real comfort. All in all, a very good choice for those who want a modern, reliable and easy-to-use product.

1217008817.title_en: A big change from the original dishwasher
1217008817.text_en: The dishwasher will pleasantly surprise you especially with its speed - short programs can wash normally dirty dishes really quickly, without the quality of the result suffering. The washing performance is at a high level, the dishes are perfectly clean after the cycle and without dried residues, even with more demanding dirt. A big plus is also the mobile application, which enables convenient remote control, monitoring of the washing progress and selection of programs according to current needs. Overall, it is an excellent appliance that saves time and energy.

1221493882.text_en: Our first experiences with the dishwasher have been very positive. It works well, it is silent and the connectivity with the application is complete. We are satisfied with the purchase we have made.

1206456586.text_en: It's very quiet, in my case it's more than enough, we are 2 people, but it's better that it's on top than that it's missing. Very good product, a 10 from me

1185346832.text_en: Practical, comfortable and simple dishwasher. It adapts perfectly to the space. With great energy efficiency.

1204467552.text_en: Washes very well and is quiet

1184098634.text_en: Exceptional dishwasher, it doesn't make any noise, it works very well, and it leaves everything perfectly clean.    The remote functionality is VERY useful and makes using the dishwasher incredibly easier than with the physical buttons.    There is plenty of space and it is easy to install.    Improvements: perhaps more granular control over programs would be more appreciated

1222289713.text_en: I have been using the product for a few weeks and am very satisfied so far. The Home Connect connection is also practical and easy. The only thing I'm missing: The LED in the door that the device is running is ultra bright. Not a problem in itself, but it also stays on when the door opens to dry and then it's quite blinding. I've now turned it off in the app, although I would like to use the feature. But only with the door closed. Maybe you can provide this with an update

1209155641.title_en: BOSCH Series 4 Fully integrated dishwasher S
1209155641.text_en: Very quiet and efficient dishwasher, ideal for daily use. Cleans perfectly even with full loads and very dirty utensils. The interior layout is practical and flexible, allowing you to make good use of the space. Drying is effective and water and energy consumption is reduced, which is noticeable in the long term. The integration with the furniture is perfect and maintains a clean aesthetic in the kitchen. Very satisfied with the quality and reliability that Bosch offers.

1213799130.text_en: Very satisfied with our new dishwasher.  I was a bit skeptical about a cutlery drawer instead of a cutlery basket that we were used to. But it is really an added value. If you immediately put the cutlery together in a neatly organized manner, tidying up will be much easier!   The app is also useful. This is how I set the dishwasher and the app takes our dynamic electricity rate into account and starts when the electricity price is low.

1220145387.text_en: We have it for a short time, approx. month, but compared to the approx. 13-year-old original Bosch dishwasher, a big change for the better! Beautifully quiet, almost inoperable compared to the original dishwasher. The dishes are factory washed, all without problems! We appreciate the larger XXL sizes, which we really use! The variable height of the door is good, thanks to which it was easy to install in an IKEA kitchen. Overall I recommend!

1203499430.text_en: I have been using the Bosch dishwasher for several months now and I am extremely satisfied. The build quality is excellent, it feels solid and well thought out. It washes impeccably, even very dirty dishes, without the need for pre-rinsing. The programs are varied and easy to use, and the results are consistent. The noise level is very low, I can hardly hear it when it is working, which makes it perfect for night time use. The interior is well organized and the drawers slide easily. I like the full drying function, because all the dishes come out perfectly clean and without traces of water. Water and energy consumption is reduced and the Bosch Home Connect app is a useful bonus, allowing me to start or check the wash cycle directly from my phone. I confidently recommend this dishwasher to anyone who wants a reliable, quiet and efficient appliance. Fully deserves five stars!

1220030047.text_en: We bought the BOSCH SBH4ECX28E dishwasher for a short time, but we are very satisfied with it. It is very quiet, spacious and the dishes are well washed. The overall workmanship of the product is excellent.     We also had a previous dishwasher from BOSCH, where I appreciate the many years of trouble-free use, which made it easier for us to stay with the same proven manufacturer when choosing a new dishwasher.

1207408475.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is an excellent option for those looking for quality, efficiency and convenience in their kitchen. From the first moment it stands out for its silent operation and its ability to leave dishes impeccable even in short cycles. One of its biggest plus points is how easy it is to adapt it to the furniture: its integrated design and standard dimensions allow for quick and uncomplicated installation, even for those who do not have much experience in assembling household appliances. In addition, its interface is very intuitive, with clearly identified programs and simple options that facilitate daily use. The combination of energy efficiency, good load capacity and impeccable results make it an ideal ally for any home. After using it, I can say that it delivers what it promises and offers excellent value for money. Without a doubt, I recommend it for those looking for a reliable and practical dishwasher.

1221321450.text_en: The XXL height fits perfectly into our higher kitchen unit and allows you to easily stack even larger pots.  I appreciate the side LED that clearly indicates operation.  The EcoSilence Drive motor is quiet, so we run the dishwasher even at night.  The basic Eco program lasts 4.5 hours, which is long, but the washing results are perfect.

1220914840.text_en: Dishes are often not completely clean. The machine wobbles after 1/2 a year and was probably not installed professionally by the company commissioned (fastening screws on the left and right).  Overall disappointing considering the price and the Bosch name. Are very dissatisfied.

1216773800.text_en: The dishwasher works excellently and cleans the dishes well, even without pre-rinsing. It is quiet, energy efficient and easy to operate. Only the programs sometimes take a bit long, but the result is always good. Definitely recommended for daily use.

1203910641.text_en: Dishwasher purchased directly on the official website, taking advantage of the €100 refund promotion. Super fast in everything, delivery of the product and in the refund process.  Delighted with the purchase of the dishwasher, super quiet, washes wonderfully.

1182641547.text_en: Great dishwasher! Easy to install with the help of manual and instructional videos. Ingestion was automatic. Also very clear in the app to set and operate everything. But most importantly, the washing result is perfect! Everything clean and dry!

1197913131.text_en: Good product quality in general, we bought it to integrate into a 92cm high kitchen, and it has been perfect. Also very spacious and silent in operation. So far we are very happy with the purchase, totally recommended.

1183563105.text_en: An excellent dishwasher, large and consumes very little. Perfect price quality. And with the Bosch guarantee that it is almost better than its first Siemens brand.            I used to have a Siemens and this one works better and is bigger with greater capacity

1204966448.text_en: Variable door height thanks to which it could be fitted into a non-standard line. The connection with the application works well, you can set things and have an overview of the program. It also washes sushi dishes very well.

1216077475.text_en: Although my old Bosch dishwasher was still working fine after more than 15 years, I still bought an XXL. I could not have imagined that this step towards more energy efficiency would also provide great ease of use.

1207156475.text_en: This is our first washing machine. But for us it is excellent in every way.  The only surprise was that it is higher than the usual ones, but I solved the problem easily

1221016512.text_en: Good size, with a varied selection of functions, with considerable capacity for dishes.  It is silent and programmable, with selection of water type and drying. Integradle, size XXl

1177492528.text_en: I consider it a great improvement over the previous model with the same characteristics, especially in light consumption and water consumption. All the washing options it offers are also appreciated...

1198740862.text_en: Replacing the dishwasher for a newer model as part of the kitchen renovation. Great to use, enough space to wash everything, including flexible washing drawers for glasses, etc.

1216124785.title_en: Washes up great and takes up a lot of space
1216124785.text_en: Our old machine no longer washed dishes properly, swapped it for this xxl machine and now there is space for everything a family of 5 needs during the day. We are happy!

1211749005.text_en: An excellent built-in dishwasher — quiet, economical and very reliable. Flexible baskets and simple management make it practical for everyday use. I highly recommend!

1212459186.text_en: A large, quiet washing machine. I would never take a smaller one. With tall kitchens, 97 cm is the only choice, and I didn't know that, and it's great that we took this large one. Aqua stop, everything else is there, very quiet.

1206733421.title_en: This is what I was looking for
1206733421.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I really like Bosch equipment and I use many devices. This is my next Bosch dishwasher - the current one has been working for 14 years and still works, but for a different family. After renovating the kitchen, it was time for changes. And I liked this model - it was what I was looking for.   In my opinion, it is very well made, the control panel is intuitive and clear, the third drawer, automatic door opening, not to mention the ability to control a smartphone, timeLight - these are the options I was looking for when choosing a dishwasher.   This equipment will soon be joined by an oven and induction.  I think it will be a worthy replacement for my long-serving predecessor.  The equipment is worth recommending, like many other devices manufactured by Bosch.

1217465702.text_en: The BOSCH SMD6ECX12E dishwasher is an absolute hit. First of all, it is extremely quiet - an ideal option for an open kitchen or evening washing up. Additionally, it washes dishes very well. No streaks, no unwashed plates. The programs are sensibly selected and easy to use. A big plus is the baskets and a lot of space, which can easily accommodate pots, pans and everything else needed for major cooking. And the app control function is a luxury - you can turn on the washing even while lying on the sofa. To sum up: solid, modern, very comfortable in everyday use. If someone is looking for equipment without fussing and nerves, it's really worth it. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1208057137.title_en: Quiet and compatible with Home Assistant
1208057137.text_en: I was looking for a quiet dishwasher that could work in a semi-open kitchen without disturbing the household. I was not disappointed - the device works very quietly, and even very quietly after turning on the silent mode.    The big advantage is remote control via the application and - what I particularly appreciate - perfect integration with Home Assistant (open API and platinum integration status). The only thing I miss is local reporting of current power consumption and energy consumed, but this is easily solved by connecting the dishwasher via a smart socket or relay.      #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207068805.text_en: I consider the Bosch dishwasher to be one of the best choices of household appliances I have ever purchased. The previous dishwasher I had, also from Bosch, served me for 20 years and I replaced it only because it was technologically different from current standards. I mark it NOT BREAKED. The dishwasher I purchased 100% meets my expectations in terms of economic considerations, technology and the quality of the 'service' it provides. I believe that I can fully recommend the Bosch dishwasher because I have not been disappointed with this product so far. I highly recommend it.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1204962799.text_en: High-quality dishwasher. Just open it to see that we are dealing with a premium device. The control panel is very readable and intuitive, the ability to control your phone is a dream, a time and mode projector on the floor - wow! All dish baskets are solidly made. The cutlery basket is very deep and holds the cutlery firmly. The dishwasher is quiet and, most importantly, it washes perfectly, even on short programs. If anyone is wondering - it makes no sense. Oh, and the dishwasher opens itself after washing! And if you want to open them, you don't have to struggle with the front. Just lightly tap the front :) #opinionmotivated by promotion

1206792676.title_en: A great, quiet and functional dishwasher
1206792676.text_en: The dishwasher definitely meets the highest expectations. First of all, it is very quiet, so you can use it at any time of the day. It copes perfectly with all types of dirt - both from everyday dishes and from pots and pans.    A big advantage is the well-thought-out organization of baskets. Projecting information onto the floor is a small but very practical convenience that makes using the dishwasher extremely convenient. Additionally, opening the door by touch - gamutanger.    To sum up: a great, quiet and functional dishwasher that makes everyday duties much easier. Definitely worth the price!  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1206357335.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion After 6 weeks of using and testing various programs, I am very satisfied with this dishwasher. Very simple operation, all programs can be adapted to your needs. Very good communication with the mobile application which displays information, e.g. about low salt levels. The clock displayed on the floor is very helpful. Replacing the dishwasher is a huge plus. It is rare for any of the dishes to be unwashed, most of them are dried, which is also a huge plus. I definitely recommend this model.

1202638927.text_en: The dishwasher works very quietly, which is what I wanted, it has a lot of space inside, and it can cope with even the heaviest dirt. An additional advantage that convinced me to choose this model is the display showing how much time is left until the end of the program. No more accidentally opening the door while washing. The dishwasher is solidly made and has a nice control panel, none of the household members will have any problems with its operation. This is not the first Bosch equipment, and certainly not the last! I recommend it :) #opinionmotivated by promotion

1205288038.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion* This dishwasher is a hit! Quiet, roomy and very convenient to use. What I like most is the clear, modern display - you can see everything at your fingertips, without having to guess what program is running and how long it will last. It's a small thing, but it really makes life easier. Washing and drying are at the highest level, and the automatic door opening at the end of the program works perfectly. You can see that Bosch has refined every detail - even the interior is well-thought-out and very practical.

1207593944.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The Bosch SMD6ECX12E dishwasher is a really great piece of equipment that is quickly becoming an indispensable element of the kitchen. It works so quietly that sometimes it is difficult to notice that it is even turned on. The dishes look like new after each cycle, even if they were heavily dirty before. It's nice that there are a lot of programs, because you can choose the settings for what you are currently loading. The interior is well thought out and everything has its place, so arranging the dishes is not a puzzle. Energy efficiency is also impressive, especially in everyday use. Operation is simple and the app adds convenience. It's simply a dishwasher that does its job perfectly and without any stress.

1209075079.text_en: I bought this dishwasher because it is the best dishwasher I have ever used! I checked and really paid attention to many things when using family/friends' dishwashers. I used this one and fell in love, I knew I had to have the same one at home. It cleans great, has a lot of space, even large pots can fit, it's quiet, the cutlery is easy to arrange, all great things! The control panel is also wonderful, unfortunately I made one mistake - I trusted the interior designer and she made the fronts too long for me, so the control panel is not flush with the upper edge of the front. A small drawback, unfortunately, it's my fault - please pay attention to it :) #opinionmotivated by promotion

1185687566.text_en: I recently purchased, confident in this brand.   Even though, I received the dishwasher inside very wet, even in the packaging there was moisture, I was afraid that it might be a defective product, but I talked to the call center and it seems that it is something normal, having been tested in the factory before being shipped for sale. I haven't installed it yet, but I hope it will be ok technically.

1207355485.title_en: A great and reliable dishwasher for everyday use
1207355485.text_en: I am very satisfied with the Bosch SMD6ECX12E dishwasher - it works quietly, cleans thoroughly and is economical. Well-thought-out baskets make it easier to arrange dishes, and smart functions increase convenience. It's great for everyday use and definitely meets my expectations.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1185196562.text_en: We have had this dishwasher for 15 days, and we appreciate its qualities, it is efficient and quiet. The special covered drawer requires a little getting used to, but saves space. Programming is simple and there are enough programs

1213866596.text_en: Easy installation, fantastically quiet dishwasher with all kinds of possible settings. Lots of space, easy to use and the protection on the ground means we know what this dishwasher is doing. Also convenient via the Home Connect app. Highly recommended.

1197443365.text_en: I recommend this product because it is very quiet, robust, it has lots of storage and programming is simple. I already had a similar model that I kept for almost 14 years, so Bosh dishwashers are reliable.

1214158986.text_en: We are satisfied with the dishwasher. It washes and dries very well. It is very useful that it displays the time remaining on the ground. It is also useful that you can set and start the desired program via your phone.

1207601192.text_en: This is our second Bosch dishwasher. The dishwasher has a number of useful functions, the only drawback is the lack of chamber lighting. I recommend Bosch products, they are solidly made and last a long time. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1201211679.text_en: Series 8 is a top range of electric appliances

1200486762.text_en: It washes effectively, after washing it opens the door, clearly displays the remaining time on the floor, and in the application it shows water and electricity consumption. I recommend

1219545440.text_en: Purchasing this model turned out to be the right choice. I was convinced by the positive opinions of other users and the promotional price. The dishwasher has all the functions I was looking for. It is energy-efficient (class A), uses little water (9l), and is quiet (42dB), which is very important in my open kitchen. Thanks to the Extra Dry function, the dishes are perfectly clean and dry. The display on the floor is also great, as it informs about the current phase and operating time of the device. The device looks great and I hope you will feel the same after prolonged use.

1219429485.text_en: I highly recommend this dishwasher, it has: - great washing and drying efficiency - automatic door opening after the cycle - copes with even heavily soiled dishes - quiet operation, irreplaceable in an open kitchen - very flexible interior - MaxFlex baskets, third level (Vario3 drawer) and RackMatic adjustment make it easier to arrange dishes - comfort of use - opening without a handle, time on the floor - these functions really improve comfort - remote control via Home Connect, SpeedPerfect Plus for shortening programs. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1216789271.title_en: The BOSCH SMD6ECX12E dishwasher is a good choice
1216789271.text_en: The BOSCH SMD6ECX12E dishwasher is a good choice. It works quietly and the dishes are washed after each cycle.  I appreciate the EfficientDry function (automatic door opening), thanks to which the dishes dry naturally and without streaks.    It is worth noting that this model does not have zeolite drying, but thanks to the hinged door, the drying efficiency is still very high. A cutlery drawer and basket adjustments make everyday use of the equipment even easier.    A solid product worth the price. I recommend! #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207657735.text_en: The previous SRV55T03EU is still in use today and despite reaching the age of majority, it has never experienced an "adolescence rebellion".  As proven solutions are not changed and "old trees are not transplanted", we purchased SMD6ECX12E for the new house.  I will not write about what everyone knows, that BOSCH dishwashers are exceptionally quiet and meet expectations, because it is known.  I was very happy that I no longer had to open the dishwasher to see how much time was left until the program finished.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1202377013.text_en: The dishwasher is very easy to use. The light showing the progress and progress mode is really very nice and clear. I like the third drawer and the special zone for particularly difficult dishes. In one word, I RECOMMEND #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207312075.title_en: Large dishwasher with great ease of use
1207312075.text_en: A dishwasher among thousands!  A nice large cutlery drawer at the top.  The first basket is large for all glasses, cups and containers. The red edges to prevent glasses from sliding and the folding racks for if you have larger glasses are also nice. This rack can also be adjusted in height.   Because you no longer have a cutlery tray in the downstairs rack, you have so much space for pans, plates and larger containers. As a result, our dishwasher only needs to be turned on once a day instead of twice for a family with 2 children. This is better for energy and the environment.  With the Bosch app you can also switch on the dishwasher, switch it on with a delay and see how long a program will last. You can also see the latter on the ground. This ensures that the dishwasher is never opened in between.

1221992782.text_en: The ordered dishwasher arrived on time without any damage or scratches. Dimensionally, everything is correct. The metal bottom inside, made in Germany, looks neat and functional. The option of displaying the time on the floor is very nice. We used this brand of dishwasher in our previous apartment and were very satisfied, no other brand was an option. The equipment arrived on time, I hope it will serve us for many years, just like its predecessor.   #opinionmotivated by promotion

1206207228.text_en: #rewardmotivatedopinion.  A very nice dishwasher, it has everything you need, but above all something extra - a door opening assistant, which works very nicely, you don't have to pull the door, it makes it easier to use, especially for children who had problems with opening the old dishwasher with one hand, holding e.g. a cup in the other.   The time remaining projector also works very well, even in a bright room.   The downside is that the dishwasher does not have interior lighting.

1216284949.text_en: We are very satisfied with the new Bosch dishwasher. What strikes us is how solid and quiet it works, and how neatly it gets the dishes clean and dry. In particular, the simple use, the spacious layout and the feeling that this is a high-quality device give a lot of confidence. We consciously opted for a sustainable model and good service from Bosch. In short: a well-thought-out purchase from which I expect a lot in the long term. And the kids love the time indication on the floor! :-)

1206180366.title_en: The dishwasher opens itself when pressed
1206180366.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher is very solidly built, has all the basic functions, but above all it has something that other dishwashers do not have, i.e. a door opening assistant, just push the door slightly and it opens by itself, you don't have to pull it, it is very useful for younger children who had problems with opening the old dishwasher.   The projector that displays the time also works very nicely, you can see it even when the room is exposed to sunlight.

1196637200.text_en: This dishwasher is very quiet, it washes and dries perfectly. It meets all my needs. It is easy to use with or without a phone. I recommend its purchase

1204222754.text_en: I have several devices from the company and I am very pleased. The dishwasher after a very short period of use of about a month started leaking water. The technician found some wall corrosion and the company did a complete replacement of the washer. The service is impeccable, they respond immediately, they are typical and they do not create any problems. Really well done. New washing machine so far works perfectly and washes perfectly

1209926571.title_en: A reliable dishwasher for demanding customers
1209926571.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion I was looking for a reliable dishwasher, so I didn't think twice about purchasing it and once again Bosch did not disappoint me. The dishwasher is quiet, its operation is intuitive and it has many useful functions, such as smartphone control. What I like the most is the door that opens automatically after the end of the washing cycle and timeLight, i.e. the remaining program duration illuminated on the floor. Simply a great dishwasher.

1204484052.text_en: Hello. The BOSCH SMD6ECX12E dishwasher is a solid and successful solution in your kitchen. It offers comfort, functionality and a range of programs and amenities. The TimeLight function is really great, we know how much time we have left until the end of the program. The dishwasher operates quietly and, most importantly, is energy-saving and consumes little water per cycle. Finishes and workmanship are at a high level. This is my second BOSCH dishwasher. I definitely recommend it.

1209887772.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion When I bought the dishwasher, I didn't think twice, I knew it had to be Bosch and once again I was not disappointed. Connecting the dishwasher was as easy as its operation, which is also very intuitive. What I like the most is the door that opens automatically after the end of the washing cycle and the remaining program duration illuminated on the floor. Nothing to add, nothing to take away - all that remains is to use ;)

1209937086.text_en: I have been using Bosch dishwashers for years, but this time I chose a higher model and I absolutely do not regret this decision. The dishwasher works very quietly and the washing efficiency is at the highest level. It copes perfectly with dirt that previous models had problems with. A big advantage is also the possibility of full remote management, which significantly increases the comfort of use. I am very pleased with the purchase and I definitely recommend it.

1202915850.text_en: The dishwasher is very quiet. You can barely hear the water being drawn in.  Clear information about the device's operating status displayed on the floor. A nice function of opening the door without having to pull the cabinet handle, just by pressing a single or double front, with the option of changing this function in the smart application on the phone. To sum up, it's quiet, cleans thoroughly and talks! I recommend!  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1206349749.title_en: Bosch SMD6ECX12E – quiet, solid and smart
1206349749.text_en: The Bosch SMD6ECX12E dishwasher is a very well-made, quiet and spacious device, designed for families and intensive use. Integration with the Home Connect application works efficiently and significantly increases the convenience of use. Thanks to the OpenAssist function, the door opens when you press the front.  If you care about quality, flexible loading and modern control - this is definitely a model worth considering.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1209021294.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I am very pleased with the dishwasher. A big advantage is the display of the remaining time on the floor - a very convenient and clear solution. Also noteworthy is the solid metal bottom, which gives a sense of durability. Automatic door opening at the end of the program helps dry the dishes. Additionally, the Bosch brand inspires trust and gives hope for long, trouble-free operation.

1206860809.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion. The dishwasher meets all my expectations. Automatic opening of the door when gently pressed makes it easier to operate the dishwasher. A big plus is the adjustable shelves and the ergonomic arrangement of the basket surfaces. Thanks to the projector, the dishwasher displays the working time on the floor, so I always know what stage the washing is at. The device works very quietly. I highly recommend the purchase.

1216683361.text_en: The dishwasher delivers very good results and can be expanded at any time with regard to the possible programs after being integrated into the home network via the app. Such a program can also be saved to the favorites button on the device and thus selected without an app. We are very satisfied so far and hope that the device will last longer than previous models from other brands.

1205275902.text_en: A very good automatic dishwashing device that works by spraying hot water under pressure. In a typical work cycle, it pre-rinses the dishes, then washes them in hot water with detergent, and finally rinses them with clean water and dries them. Many washing programs available (e.g. intensive, eco, fast) that can be adapted to your needs.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207669083.text_en: I have just purchased the Bosch SMD6ECX12E dishwasher and I am absolutely delighted with it. I chose it to replace my old dishwasher which was showing serious signs of weakness, and the difference is truly impressive.    This model is both quiet, efficient and very practical on a daily basis. The washing quality is impeccable, even for delicate pans or glasses, and the different programs are easy to use. I particularly appreciate its interior flexibility: the baskets are well thought out, the storage is modular and everything is easily optimized depending on the dishes.    The drying is also very efficient, and the overall operation is very discreet – real comfort.    In summary, I am completely satisfied with this dishwasher: reliable, intelligent, efficient... exactly what I expected from a Bosch appliance. I can only recommend it!

1221342440.text_en: A modern and very functional built-in dishwasher. It is distinguished by quiet operation, low water and energy consumption and large capacity. The advantages include a third cutlery drawer, automatic door opening at the end of the program and the possibility of control via the Home Connect application. This is solid equipment that effectively washes and dries, really worth recommending. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1204085170.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion This model is an excellent choice for people looking for a really quiet dishwasher, which we greatly appreciate in an open kitchen with a kitchenette. The metal bottom of the dishwasher and the TimeLight function showing the exact time until the work is completed additionally convinced us to purchase it. Automatic opening of the door after washing is a convenient function that facilitates natural drying of dishes.

1207182035.text_en: The dishwasher is a game changer in the kitchen! You can't hear it at all, it's really ultra quiet. It washes perfectly, even very dirty pots, without any streaks. These cutlery drawers are nice, they don't take up space in the basket. Water and electricity consumption are also low. No more hand washing! I recommend it to anyone who values ​​peace and cleanliness.   #opinionmotivated by promotion

1216976773.title_en: A solid and very quiet dishwasher
1216976773.text_en: The dishwasher works flawlessly. It washes very thoroughly and is almost inaudible, which is a big plus for me. The additional cutlery drawer and the automatic door opening function after work is very useful, thanks to which the dishes are completely dry. The equipment is easy to use and solidly made. I recommend.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1205910656.text_en: Since purchasing the Bosch dishwasher (SMD6ECX12E), we have been pleasantly surprised by its quiet operation, ease of use and thorough cleaning.  The automatic door opening at the end of the program is a useful extra.   In short: top quality as we have come to expect from Bosch.  highly recommended for those looking for reliability and comfort.

1206774229.text_en: The Bosch SMD6ECX12E dishwasher is a great choice for your home - it operates very quietly, so it is practically inaudible during operation. Very practical is the height adjustment of the basket, which makes it easier to arrange larger dishes. A big plus is also a separate cutlery drawer, which allows you to better use the space in the lower baskets.    The automatic opening function after the end of the cycle is very helpful, which speeds up the drying of dishes. Opening by touching it with your foot is another convenience that is great for everyday use. Another big advantage is the display of the remaining working time on the floor - so you always know how much time is left until the end of washing.    An additional advantage is the glass washing program, which takes great care of delicate glasses and glasses, leaving them perfectly clean and streak-free.    I am very pleased with the purchase and I definitely recommend this model.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1205258735.text_en: The Bosch SMD6ECX12E dishwasher is a great choice - it works quietly, washes very thoroughly, and functions such as TimeLight and OpenAssist are really convenient for everyday use. MaxFlex baskets allow you to easily fit even larger dishes, and control via the Home Connect app is a nice addition. I am very pleased with the purchase! #opinionmotivated by promotion

1208065335.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is my second Bosch dishwasher, due to renovation I sold the first one and now I bought one with a time display until the end of the cycle, it makes planning very easy - I know with one glance when it will be ready. It is quiet, economical and washes thoroughly. Very good equipment that makes everyday duties easier, I recommend it.

1209935195.text_en: This is another BOSCH dishwasher in my house. The front row worked flawlessly for 11 years of use, while neighbors even replaced their dishwashers twice. Quiet, efficient and this time projection displayed on the floor :))) Purchase caused by moving to a new house.   I recommend it to everyone!   #opinionmotivated by promotion

1186120688.text_en: Particularly efficient and impressively economical! I've never owned a dishwasher before but compared to what I've heard of others, I've been very pleased. I expected the plastics to come out a little drier, but I'm learning that it's a common issue, and it doesn't bother me much. Maybe I'll try the extra dry program.

1216458651.text_en: The biggest advantages of the dishwasher are its silence and its management application. I also really like the displayed time until completion and the self-opening door. The dishwasher has a lot of cool features, but I haven't had a chance to test them yet. I count on the legendary quality of Bosch and hope for many years of trouble-free service.

1208567113.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion* Great dishwasher! Quiet, roomy and very convenient to use, power consumption A, I like Open Assist the most, i.e. opening the door with a gentle press. Washing and drying at the highest level. 10 years warranty. Bosch has refined every detail - the interior is well-thought-out and very practical.

1219840896.text_en: So far I have run the eco program and the 50 and 60 degree programs with the additional drying. Even most of the art pieces became dry. I deactivated the automatic door opening after cleaning was completed to protect the worktop. The cleaning results were consistently good to very good.

1206766893.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I chose Bosch because my previous dishwasher served me for 15 years. I hope it will be similar with this one. 1209285802.text_en: I am very pleased with this dishwasher. Bosch SMD6ECX12E works very quietly, and at the same time is spacious and easy to load. After washing, the dishes are clean and well dried. I also like the time display on the floor and the ability to control it via the app. Solid equipment and worth the price - I recommend it

1215445248.title_en: Very satisfied with modern and smart dishwasher

1205108186.title_en: A great choice - quiet and functional
1205108186.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion After purchasing the Bosch SMD6ECX12E dishwasher, I can confidently say that it is a great choice - both in terms of functionality and comfort of use.     First of all – capacity: the device can accommodate up to 14 sets of dishes, which makes life much easier in a home where washing up has to be done frequently.   The noise level is only 42 dB - virtually inaudible operation, which, combined with a modern engine and good insulation, allows you to use the dishwasher even in an open living room without disturbing you.   Water and energy consumption is very reasonable: only 9 liters of water per cycle in the Eco program and energy class A - which translates into lower bills and a better impact on the environment.   Interior and equipment: removable third basket, adjustable upper basket (RackMatic system) allow you to adjust the loading of even large pots or glasses. Additionally, systems such as ExtraDry or a heat exchanger significantly improve drying.   Modern conveniences: the dishwasher is equipped with the Home Connect application - you can control it remotely and check the cycle status. For people who like intelligent solutions, this is a big plus.

What is challenging is the weight of the dishwasher door, which closes deadly fast, so be careful if you have children.  Overall, we are very satisfied with the dishwasher.

1208944153.title_en: Another reliable friend in the kitchen from Bosch
1208944153.text_en: I have been using Bosch appliances in my apartment for a long time, and their reliability was the main reason why I stayed with this brand even when choosing a new dishwasher. I chose an economical and quiet model and after the first weeks of operation I am extremely satisfied. The dishwasher washes perfectly even with a full load, and thanks to Zeolith drying, I can take out the dishes dry, including plastics, without the need to wipe them. The processing looks very solid, the baskets are well thought out and variable, so that even larger dishes can fit in without problems. The control is clear and I consider the connection with the Home Connect application to be a practical bonus. Overall, I feel very good about the appliance and believe that, as with my previous Bosch products, it will be a reliable helper for many years of trouble-free operation.

1204945617.text_en: Very quiet operation (approx. 42 dB) - almost inaudible even in an open kitchen Excellent washing results even without pre-rinsing Efficient drying thanks to Zeolith / EfficientDry technology - dry and plastic dishes Economical - energy class A, water consumption of around 9.5 l per cycle High-quality workmanship and robust baskets with adjustable height Convenient cutlery drawer and smart interior arrangement Possibility of control via the Home Connect app Automatic programs work reliably and adapt to the amount of dishes Cons: Higher purchase price Sensitive touch control Dense division of the cutlery drawer (less suitable for larger pieces) Summary: Premium, very quiet and economical dishwasher with perfect washing and drying results. The ideal choice for those who want quality, comfort and modern functions.

1214732797.text_en: This Series 8 dishwasher is highly recommended. Installation went very smoothly and during use you hardly notice that it is on because it is so very quiet. The washing quality is simply superb and everything comes out perfectly clean.    What we find really ideal is the projection on the floor. You can see at a glance exactly how long the program will last and what phase the dishwasher is in. The cutlery drawer is also a relief compared to a traditional basket.

Dishwasher that has not drained since day 1, from Bosch they say that this is "normal" since those who install the dishwasher are not technicians but transporters, I do not worry because a technician will come to our home in a week.    I have no doubt that if the product works, people will be delighted, now when things go wrong, good luck.

1203502631.text_en: Fantastic dishwasher, you can see its quality in everything, good finishes, precise touch control, easy operation from the App with new downloadable programs, it washes and dries wonderfully, even the plastic containers, very advanced, it has everything, a highlight that it projects on the floor the expected completion time and the process in which it is at all times. Quite quiet. Highly recommended.

1206545157.text_en: The Bosch SMD8TCX04E/73 dishwasher pleasantly surprised me with its quietness and overall quality of workmanship. It also dries plastic containers perfectly thanks to the Zeolith technology, which was previously a big weakness. The interior arrangement of the baskets is practical and flexible, so everything fits comfortably. I also appreciate the low water and energy consumption, ideal for everyday use. Overall, it is a modern and reliable dishwasher that I can recommend with a clear conscience.

1209056590.title_en: Great choice, meets everything I need and more
1209056590.text_en: Although I only use the dishwasher for a short time, I am really satisfied with it. It washes very well, the dishes are always clean and dry.  A big plus is the silent operation, since we often run it in the evening and we don't know about it at all. Control is simple and fast, everything is clear. Plus, there is also a fast program when I need to have the dishes ready in a shorter time.  Overall, it looks high-quality, reliable and exactly what I expect from a washing machine. Definitely a good buy for me.

1222249287.text_en: The Bosch Series 8 dishwasher is an extremely economical household appliance.  Using a power measuring socket, I have now been able to measure several times that the dishwasher in Eco mode only uses a little more than 500W of power for the entire cleaning program.  In the Auto Program it is around 750W. The running time is significantly shortened here.  Drying dishes with the new, energy-saving zeolite variant is very good in terms of power consumption, as the heat and thus drying requires almost no electricity. The drying result is also very good in most cases. Only occasionally some of the dishes are still wet when using the Eco program.  Unfortunately, the Bosch Series 8 only hums uncomfortably loudly when it is heating up and during the drying phase. Our previous dishwasher, Bosch Series 6, was a little quieter. But you can hardly hear it during the cleaning program.  The automatic opening of the dishwasher after the cleaning program has finished is particularly helpful. This means that the dishes air out as if by themselves.  With the Bosch cell phone app, you can immediately receive a notification on your cell phone as soon as cleaning is finished.  The middle cutlery basket has an additional intensive cleaning zone, which can be activated with a small lever. Even dried-out cereal bowls become sparkling clean again.  Typically Bosch, the material appearance is also excellent.    All in all, a highly recommended dishwasher that is worth the money.  If, like its Series 6 predecessor, it lasts for over 13 years, we will have done everything right by purchasing it.

1205889830.text_en: I already owned a Bosch dishwasher and after more than 13 years of trouble-free operation decided to buy a new one. I chose this tip based on positive reviews and all the functions that this dishwasher offers.  After starting the dishwasher, it did not disappoint, I praise the Czech menu, the time projected on the floor and, above all, perfectly washed dishes.  The app is easy to understand, the controls are simple, and I can only praise features such as opening the door after the program is finished.

1204813621.text_en: An excellent dishwasher with many options that you do not need. Complex operation and running a short program is not possible. Plastic also does not dry well, despite good promises. Lighting is funny, but only works when the machine is on and you open the door. That is never the case if you fill the dishwasher during the day. I would advise taking a simpler variant.

1220490431.text_en: Our existing dishwasher refused to work for us, so we bought a Bosch SMH4VX08E built-in dishwasher on the advice of friends.  My son and I installed the appliance ourselves and it went according to the manual without any problems. We carried out the initial commissioning of the dishwasher according to the instructions via the cleaning program. During the next wash, we tried the auto program. The dishwasher washes very quietly. The dishes were beautifully dry after the end of the program. We appreciate the many programs and additional functions, especially the opening of the door during drying. We believe that the dishwasher will bring us joy for many years.

1220608244.title_en: Easy to use and impeccable cleaning
1220608244.text_en: Delighted with the purchase. Installation and use are very simple. With Home Connect you can also start or program the wash remotely.     The interior space is good, and the organization of the trays helps to clean many pieces of dishes. To give it a but, the tall glasses do not fit in the middle tray, so they have to be balanced on the lower tray.     The ECO program is quite long, but it leaves everything perfectly clean and shiny. I am very pleasantly surprised with how the glasses and cups in particular turn out; Not a brand of detergent or lime, and that's washing with quite hard water.     The cutlery tray is also very large, you can put almost the entire cutlery.     Overall, super happy.

1219830275.text_en: The dishwasher completely fulfilled its purpose, because I was looking for a guarantee of quality and reliability, which is why I chose the Bosch dishwasher. So far, the pros completely outweigh the cons, which I find very difficult to find. The advantage is definitely the Vario hinges, which are much more flexible and the cabinet door does not have to be firmly attached to the dishwasher door, as well as the possibility of connecting the dishwasher via the Home Connect app and remote control. The dishwasher is also fairly easy to install, although I was a little worried myself, as I have never installed a dishwasher myself before. And I also have to highlight the quiet operation. As a negative, I could mention the difficult possibility of setting the height of the feet/legs of the dishwasher, but it rather depends on the habit and the grip, so it is not so much a negative. I can recommend this dishwasher with a clear conscience.

1207592008.title_en: Nice dishwasher, washes dishes = main reason for buying.
1207592008.text_en: I have no other experience with dishwashers, but a nice bonus was that there were already ingredients for the first wash inside. It washes well, even the eco program is fine in the end. After the first shock that the washing would take over 4 hours, I found out that 2 hours of drying time, when the dishes can already be used. So it works as I would expect, I hope it will work for a long time. I would appreciate it if the package included at least a paper measuring device for positioning the front plate of the built-in dishwasher (like other brands do). Or maybe it was there and I accidentally dumped it, but I don't think so. Thanks for the dishwasher though.

1221967853.text_en: We bought the dishwasher mainly because of the good experience with other Bosch appliances. We chose this type because of the function of automatic opening of the door after the end of washing - the dishes are not only washed excellently, but also dry. The red indicator is also a very functional thing and does not disturb at night. The washing machine is noticeably quieter than our previous one and does not vibrate during washing, so you can hardly hear it. We have had it for a month so far, but we are satisfied with this dishwasher.

1199134034.text_en: We had doubts when choosing the dishwasher since we had been told that the Polinox tanks could give off odors, but after using it and having one at home for more than 10 years, I must say that we are delighted. Very good purchase.
