The best: - EfficientDry Drying: The automatic opening of the door when finished leaves the plastics completely dry.  - Silent: You barely notice that it is on; The light projected on the ground is key to knowing if it is still working.  - Space: The third cutlery tray greatly optimizes the lower space for large pots.  It washes ten and aesthetically it is impeccable. It is not the cheapest, but the Bosch quality is totally worth it. Highly recommended.

1209545016.text_en: Although it can be integrated, it is very spacious. Very quiet. I love

1220505842.title_en: A modern dishwasher that thinks about details
1220505842.text_en: The dishwasher met expectations. The installation was simple and I was impressed with the controls right from the start – no complicated clicking, but direct selection of programs with buttons. Even the service guy confirmed to me that Bosch is a safe bet in dishwashers, so I hope it will serve for a long time. As far as noise is concerned, it's fine, although I owe the previous dishwasher a point for good, it was a bit quieter.    However, I was completely taken by the basket height adjustment in 3 steps (the previous 2 positions meant either a small place for plates at the bottom or for glasses at the top). The auto-open feature after washing allows me to leave it overnight and not deal with it. I'm just about to explore more programs on the mobile app. A great piece for me!

1220526662.text_en: This dishwasher fully met my expectations. The dishes are well washed and dry. I am satisfied with a sufficient selection of washing programs. I positively evaluate the Eco program, which saves energy and water, as well as the possibility of shortening other programs via SpeedPerfect. Control is very easy and intuitive. We also managed the assembly of the product ourselves. The positioned top drawer is practical. I am very pleased with the quiet operation of the dishwasher and the very pleasant non-disruptive sound signal at the end of the washing cycle. I can warmly recommend the purchase of this dishwasher.

1206528390.text_en: The BOSH SMH4EVX08E dishwasher is a good choice in the middle price ranges in energy class B, the solution for fixing the built-in kitchen door was very interesting, while after a while of studying and with the help of the attached tools and the meter, the mechanism works perfectly. In some parts of the program you can hear a little, but that was also what we had before.

1181750422.title_en: Good quality at a reasonable price
1181750422.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The SMH4EVX08E dishwasher meets expectations in terms of economy, functionality and comfort of use.  It has programs adapted to different dishes and the degree of dirt. The quick wash option is extremely useful in everyday use, especially for smaller amounts of dishes. The device is quiet during operation.  The dishwasher is intuitive to use, and the ability to control it from your phone is a plus. The baskets have slightly difficult to fold holders and there is no salt funnel, although the opening of the salt container is quite large. It's a pity that there is no internal lighting.

1209249048.text_en: We are very satisfied with the purchase and use of the BOSCH SMH4EVX08E Series 4 dishwasher. We like its large volume divided into 3 parts (plates, glasses, cutlery) + modern design, the possibility of control via mobile phone (Home Connect) as well as its quiet operation and high-quality design and functionality of the appliance. A great choice for a new kitchen.

1203188765.title_en: A great choice for a first kitchen
1203188765.text_en: The dishwasher runs quietly, exactly as promised by the manufacturer. The cutlery drawer is very convenient, and the baskets can hold a lot of dishes. A nice option with adjustable height of the upper basket, which allows you to easily load taller glasses.    Dishes, pots and cutlery are very clean when taken out. For me, this is great information, because sometimes some dishwashers do not remove dirt from several days, but this one does a great job. A big plus.    I also like that after washing, the door opens by itself and the dishes are dry and ready to be put away. I treated the phone connection as a gadget, but I quickly realized that it is convenient and you can see immediately when the cycle ends.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1183884107.text_en: It is a dishwasher with great features and very good qualities, the job of washing the dishes is perfect.  I would recommend it to my friends because I think it is a great brand and it does a perfect job. I also think it is very energy efficient and very quiet.

1221249841.text_en: I needed a dishwasher quite urgently and Bosch never disappoints. I love that the door opens by itself when finished and the top tray for cutlery. It has also been very easy to configure using the mobile app.

1183213889.text_en: A well-designed dishwasher, excellent internal arrangement and intuitive control, in addition, a perfectly designed application where everything can be set "remotely". I can only recommend. Quiet and washes well.

1200129676.text_en: Dishwasher with large capacity, three trays with an extra one for cutlery, and can be integrated. All with reduced consumption with B energy certification.

1221173657.text_en: Precise, silent, effective and water-saving dishwasher, ideal for a family of four, I recommend it 100%, very satisfied.

1217483526.text_en: Super functional dishwasher, works great with Alex, fast and accurate washing process, positively surprised by the quality in relation to the price 10/10

1209979456.text_en: It is an exceptional dishwasher, its tray capacity with several positions, the cutlery capacity is very large and with many possibilities

1222396359.text_en: The dishwasher is of very good quality. It is worth spending a little more and paying for the quality. It barely consumes anything

1200136726.text_en: We are really satisfied with this dishwasher. It offers extremely quiet operation, ideal for open spaces or night use. It incorporates a red LED light projected on the floor that clearly indicates when the cycle is running, a very practical feature. In addition, the automatic door opening system at the end of the program optimizes drying and improves energy efficiency. Cleanliness is impeccable even on very dirty dishes. Due to its performance and benefits, it is a 100% recommended option in terms of quality-price.

1217517446.title_en: Very professional and fast technical service
1217517446.text_en: Sergi and Jordi adapted the product to me perfectly, suffering from the fact that the gap was very tight.

1209485493.text_en: So far so good, it washes great and is intuitive. It dries well. I am happy with the product.

1203595964.text_en: Maximum satisfaction with Bosch SMH4EVX08E I bought the Bosch SMH4EVX08E dishwasher on October 19, 2025 and I am very satisfied with it. It washes perfectly, dishes are beautifully clean and dry after each cycle, even plastic bowls. I like the quiet operation - you can hardly hear it, which I especially appreciate in the evening. The third drawer for cutlery and the option to connect via the Home Connect application, where I can monitor the progress of the program and consumption, are very practical.    The programs are clear, the control is simple and the design looks elegant. I also appreciate the possibility of shortening the cycle through SpeedPerfect and the ecological program that saves water and electricity.    Overall, I rate this dishwasher as a reliable, high-quality and quiet appliance with a good price-performance ratio. I would definitely buy it again.

1207599916.text_en: It washes well, it is spacious with a good layout

1182786102.text_en: In the description it is stated that: The material of the interior is an anti-corrosion tub with a polynox bottom, while this washing machine has a plastic tub. So, great dissatisfaction with the inner baskets, where there are no movable holders at the bottom that can be used to attach wine glasses, as we were used to on the previous Bosh series 4. The only reason we bought it is the automatic door opening, which is a big plus, but we were more satisfied with the previous Bosh 4 series.

1219971641.text_en: The dishwasher is quiet but efficient, so far it has managed to wash everything. I am pleased to be able to control the physical buttons as well as the control of additional functions through the application, where there are more useful functions and connections than I expected. Economical operation will certainly support the car. opening the door during drying and, above all, the possibility of connecting to hot water - there is no need to heat the water with electricity. with a spiral when the dishwasher has 200 liters of hot water heated by DHW in reach. The only negative so far seems to be the plastic tub, which will probably not look as clean and hygienic as stainless steel over time if it becomes discolored from dirt. Overall good price/performance ratio.

182400933.title_en: the quality of the installation was a disaster
182400933.text_en: The installers left without performing a test run, and did not remove the solid plug at the end of the drain tube, causing an alarm on first use and serious water buildup. Although I bought the same model as before, the machine protrudes after installation, which is extremely unsightly. Also, the exterior panel of the dishwasher was not installed, and they said they would call to schedule another worker to do it.  In short, the quality of the installation was a disaster.

1182799847.title_en: Bosch dishwasher – great quality and comfort of use
1182799847.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I bought a Bosch dishwasher and it was an excellent decision! Thanks to modern functions such as quiet operation mode, water saving and thorough drying, daily washing has become more convenient and effective.  I like the intuitive control panel and various programs tailored to my needs - from a quick cycle to intensive pot washing. The dishes always come out perfectly clean, without streaks or stains. If you are looking for a reliable and energy-saving dishwasher, Bosch is the right choice!

1220140104.text_en: The Bosch SMH4EVX08E dishwasher pleasantly surprised me. It is quiet, washes and dries well and, thanks to the cutlery drawer and adjustable baskets, it can hold a lot of dishes. I also appreciate the automatic opening of the door after washing, the light signaling on the floor and the possibility of control via the Home Connect application. Overall, it works well and reliably. A minor disadvantage may be more complicated assembly in some kitchen sets, but otherwise it is an excellent dishwasher with a good price-performance ratio. I definitely recommend it for me.

1182423269.title_en: The perfect helper in the kitchen
1182423269.text_en: The Bosch Series 4 SMH4EVX08E dishwasher is a great choice, with which I am extremely satisfied. It is quiet, so I can run it even in the evening, and thanks to the EfficientDry function, which automatically opens the door after washing, the dishes are always perfectly dry. I also really enjoy the possibility of control via mobile via Home Connect - it's convenient and practical. The arrangement of the baskets is super variable, so larger dishes or a lot of cutlery can also fit there. In addition, it has low water and energy consumption, which is a big plus. I definitely recommend it!

1182421941.title_en: The perfect helper in the kitchen
1182421941.text_en: The Bosch Series 4 SMH4EVX08E dishwasher is a great choice, with which I am extremely satisfied. It is quiet, so I can run it even in the evening, and thanks to the EfficientDry function, which automatically opens the door after washing, the dishes are always perfectly dry. I also really enjoy the possibility of control via mobile via Home Connect - it's convenient and practical. The arrangement of the baskets is super variable, so larger dishes or a lot of cutlery can also fit there. In addition, it has low water and energy consumption, which is a big plus. I definitely recommend it!

1220762081.title_en: Quiet dishwasher with a smart space solution.
1220762081.text_en: We have had the Bosch Serie 4 dishwasher at home for some time and we are really satisfied with it. I especially appreciate the practical solution for storing dishes - thanks to the sliding upper drawer and a separate drawer for cutlery, it can fit surprisingly many things and everything has its place. In addition, the dishwasher is not unnecessarily noisy, so it can be run in the evening without any problems. I also really like the function of automatic opening after washing, thanks to which the dishes dry better. Overall, it looks good, the control is simple and for us it is definitely a good choice.

1221097848.text_en: I've only had it for a short time but I've used it several times and I'm very happy.    The assembly instructions are simple, and the start-up and synchronization with the app are very intuitive. Putting on the dishwasher from the app seems like a great idea to me since once with the previous one that broke between the rushes of one and the other, we left home without putting it in... I don't think that will happen to us anymore. The placement of the baskets and cutlery seems very comfortable to me. In short, I recommend your purchase

1192127609.text_en: The dishwasher is great, it is another purchase after 25 years of using the previous one. I trust the Bosch brand and I purchase equipment from this company.

1182814629.text_en: After a week of use, I tried all the programs, the dishes were always well washed to my satisfaction. We have very hard water, we use capsules and the dishes are clean without streaks. Simple operation, setting via the application is also without problems. A great thing is the automatic opening of the door after the end of the program. The dishwasher does not have a basket for cutlery, as I was used to, but a separate drawer. Storing it in it is more laborious than in the trash, but that's probably just force of habit. I haven't found any negatives yet.

1181291586.text_en: The dishwasher is quiet, washes very well. Opening the door is possible for all the programs we tried, it is only necessary to select this option (nothing difficult). The lower basket does not tilt as it was written somewhere. For us, the plus is the possibility of connecting via Wi-Fi, buttons instead of touch buttons (it gets damaged less) and you can see the exact time until the end of the wash. The installation was more difficult, but it was provided by the seller, so no problems - nothing was bought. Simply satisfaction, compared to the last dishwasher of another brand, one hundred and one.

1196460071.text_en: So far very good. I would point out that two of the pieces that hold the sliding door are made of plastic and will probably end up breaking, but perhaps it is a general system that other dishwashers have, because I have seen that they are pieces that are sold separately. To pass the tubes it is better from underneath than from the side of the furniture, because if not it sticks out too much, we made that mistake and the manual did not say anything about this, it was trial and error.

1221272836.text_en: Modern, silent, has many programs, and a high capacity to put plates, glasses, etc. The cutlery tray leaves plenty of free space for other pieces of tableware. Given the high number of programs available, it is necessary to read the instructions. I especially appreciate the silent program that allows it to run at night. The cleaning result is spectacular. Great Product, like all those from this brand

1220721946.title_en: Very good integrated dishwasher, quiet and practical
1220721946.text_en: I am very satisfied with this Bosch dishwasher. It integrates perfectly into the kitchen, has good capacity for daily use and the third cutlery tray is very convenient. Operation is quiet and programs are easy to select. I also like that the door opens automatically at the end of the cycle as it helps improve drying. Overall, I think it is a good quality product and I would recommend it.

1216935537.text_en: Probably the worst dishwasher I have ever used in my life. The trays are very impractical and quite cumbersome to handle, they are difficult to adjust and they do not make good use of space.  It's also true that I didn't realize that it didn't have a cutlery basket and that's my fault, but even so the interior design is a disaster. It is almost impossible to wash tall glasses or anything tall, they don't fit anywhere without having to relocate everything.

1209263242.text_en: We are very happy with the new dishwasher, completely integrated and with a sliding door to adjust to the kitchen installation.  Quiet operation, ideal if you have an open kitchen or night use.  It has a red LED light projected on the floor that clearly indicates when the cycle is running. It also has an automatic door opening system at the end of the program. I definitely recommend it.

1182487848.text_en: After a few weeks of use, I must say that this dishwasher has met my expectations. It washes perfectly, the dishes are clean and dry even without wiping. I especially appreciate the quiet operation - I often leave it on at night and I don't know about it at all. I also like the flexibility of the baskets, which can fit a lot of dishes. The Home Connect feature is a nice bonus, even if I don't use it every day. Overall, a great choice if you're looking for a reliable and efficient dishwasher.

1220223387.text_en: The dishwasher was purchased on the basis of a positive experience with other products of this brand that I already use at home (washing machine, dryer...), as well as good reviews from other users who already use it. I consider the positives of this dishwasher to be quiet operation, well-washed and dried dishes and easy control via mobile phone. However, I would appreciate a stainless steel tub instead of a plastic one and also a simpler system for attaching the front door.

1220473182.title_en: A reliable and quiet dishwasher that we are satisfied with
1220473182.text_en: We have been using the Bosch SMH4EVX08E/75 dishwasher for some time and are very satisfied with it. The dishes are beautifully clean after washing, the glasses are streak-free and the dishwasher is pleasantly quiet during operation. I also appreciate the clear control and enough space inside, so it can fit a lot of dishes. The programs are practical and the dishwasher copes well even with dried dirt. For us, a very good purchase that we can recommend.

1204194467.title_en: A reliable helper in the home
1204194467.text_en: We have been using Bosch dishwashers for years and are completely satisfied. The last model would certainly have served for years, but unfortunately suffered irreversible damage to the door after an unfortunate attack by children.  This model was new to us. We considered the Series 2 dishwasher, but in the end we chose this one, mainly because of the function of the door automatically rebounding after the washing program is finished - a function that we really missed in the last model.  We were most concerned about the absence of a dish basket and its replacement with an upper drawer. In the end, however, we are satisfied with the new way of folding the cutlery, especially due to the fact that there is now noticeably more space for larger dishes in the bottom drawer. To be safe, we kept the cutlery basket from the original dishwasher - surprisingly, despite the age of our old dishwasher, this one is still compatible with the new model. But we haven't used it yet and maybe we kept it unnecessarily.  As for the quality of washing, we have no reservations. Bosch did not disappoint in this.

1221885421.text_en: We bought this dishwasher for our parents as their very first, so they had pretty high expectations - and we have to say, it exceeded them. Even though they have only been using it for a short time, they are really excited about it. The control is simple and intuitive, which they appreciate very much, since they had no experience with a dishwasher before. A big plus is the silent operation, so they are not disturbed in any way even during the evening.

1209029759.text_en: The dishwasher is very spacious, and thanks to the adjustable basket, you can get even more out of it. I have always wanted to be able to adjust the height of the basket and compartments/separators depending on my needs. In addition, the dishwasher is barely audible, which was a priority for me when I have a living room with a kitchenette. Very decent equipment.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1188953339.text_en: Very good integrated dishwasher. It cleans well, is quite quiet and adapts perfectly to the kitchen furniture. The programs are varied and easy to use. The interior layout is good, although somewhat fair for large pieces. I have not used the Home Connect function, but without it it works very well. Recommended for those looking for quality and discretion.

1221135832.text_en: I like the top tray for cutlery, it cleans better. Also all the WiFi functionalities and the selection of the most optimal program.   What I like the least is the glass tray since I have to lower it a lot to be able to put glasses, and if I do, bulky things can't fit in the lower basket. In the end I have to wash the glasses by hand.

1209037538.text_en: When choosing a dishwasher, we considered several brands, but in the end we narrowed down the choice to only three products from BOSCH, the reason being that BOSCH dishwashers offer the best price/performance ratio. This one impressed us with its functions, automatic door opening, energy saving, separate cutlery rack and ease of use.

1215959305.title_en: The perfect washing machine - quiet and reliable
1215959305.text_en: I am extremely satisfied with the dishwasher. It washes dishes perfectly even when fully loaded, everything is beautifully clean and dry. I really appreciate the quiet operation, I almost don't even know about it when it's on. It has enough space for larger pots and a practical arrangement of baskets. The control is simple and the programs are clear. Excellent price-quality ratio, I definitely recommend it 😊

1205747405.text_en: I have had the dishwasher for 14 days and I am satisfied, I like the connection with the application and the possibility to set some functions with a mobile phone. The dishwasher has enough programs, I mainly use two anyway. I like that it includes a sideboard and automatic door opening features. What disappointed me is the bottom plastic tub, we have always had stainless steel, so I don't even see a reason for this.

1217872307.text_en: The product in terms of operation and in general is good, but I have had a problem with the integration and it was done by an installer. Since it is oscillating, it is not easy to adjust the pieces, which are also made of plastic and break easily. He couldn't finish installing it properly and now I have to buy a new kit and reinstall.... professional

1222484943.text_en: After almost a month of use, I am very satisfied with the dishwasher. It washes very well, it is very quiet and has a large capacity. The interior layout is practical and the automatic opening system at the end of the program helps the dishes come out drier. At the moment it works perfectly and meets my expectations.

1217371189.text_en: After 14 days of use, my experience is that the dishwasher washes really well, the filter does not clog and overall the dishwasher has good self-cleaning capabilities. Toto byl u mých předchozích myček velký problém. Jedinou výtku mám k tomu, že nemá nerezovou vanu. Tuto informaci jsem bohužel před objednáním přehlédl. I recommend it to everyone who is looking for a solid dishwasher.

1216886531.text_en: The dishwasher meets our expectations regarding quiet operation, simple operation, large capacity and functionality in sorting dishes. The dishes are perfectly clean and dry, even with short programs. Water and energy consumption is unquestionable. The equipment is aesthetic and fully satisfies us. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1209174297.text_en: Very happy with the new dishwasher, completely integrated and with a sliding door to fit my kitchen installation. The only drawback is that perhaps the door offers too much resistance when opening it, but I think it is something that will be corrected over time. Wash everything you put in it perfectly.

1185248026.text_en: We have had the dishwasher for about 2 months, but this is our second Bosch dishwasher. We are satisfied with the dishwasher, it washes the dishes well. We appreciate the cutlery drawer, it increases the capacity of the dishwasher, the cutlery is well washed. For us, opening the door after washing is a big plus - we didn't have it with the previous dishwasher and we missed it a lot.

1220437296.title_en: Great dishwasher with a few minor flaws
1220437296.text_en: + Upper basket for cutlery and small things + Smart - lots of settings in the app and remote start/monitoring + So far only tried a few cycles, but the dishes are always clean even without rinse aid + Automatic opening of the door after washing + Additional programs in the app + Positionable top drawer - Smart unfortunately only via the cloud - the door could open a little more, because all the steam condenses on the top of the kitchen worktop and takes a long time to evaporate again - I recommend the lower part of the kitchen somehow secure the plates against moisture - It's a pity that there was no salt funnel for the dishwasher. It's not worth buying extra.  - Plastic bathtub, dirt will probably be retained in the joints with stainless steel. It is not a negative, but I recommend not using the dishwasher until you have installed a decorative door. It opens just fine, however, the springs are built for a load that is missing (if the door is not installed) ... Therefore, the door comes back up by itself, and quite sharply, and you need to hold it when you put in dishes.

1207896085.text_en: We use the Bosch dishwasher almost every day. I appreciate the quiet operation, economical operation, interior space and layout. The dosage of tablets in the upper part of the door is well designed, it usually happened that the tablet did not fall out. I also appreciate how the dishwasher door opens by itself after washing. The dishes are then dry.

1217392525.text_en: We have been using it for several months now. The dishwasher is easy to clean. It works quietly and washes thoroughly. Does not leave streaks on the glass. Most often, we use a one-hour program. Easily washes everyday dishes. I recommend! #opinionmotivated by promotion

1185625403.text_en: The integrated dishwasher is silent and consumes little.   I like the third tray for cutlery, which does not reduce the capacity of the first tray for plates, pots, etc.   I wish there were shorter wash options.   Good quality-price performance.

1210156451.text_en: It washes great, and the possibility of opening the door and finishing the drying like this means that there is no water left in the dishes.  That the app notifies you when it's finished and that you can choose the type of water in your area is also a plus.  Very happy with the purchase.

1216672959.text_en: Dishwasher bought on the basis of a good result in dTest, installation as usual demanding, skill required and enough tools (especially star keys), with skill it can be done. The washing results look good, the noise is low, I have nothing to complain about at the beginning, we'll see later.

1216332804.text_en: The dishwasher works fantastic! It is roomy and well made. It is easy to keep it clean, even though it is frequently used by our family. We have a kitchen connected to the living room, so its quiet operation does not attract our attention when watching a movie in the evening.

1182414677.text_en: The BOSH dishwasher met our expectations, easy installation, even the sliding door was easy to install according to the instructions. It washes well and is very quiet. the only thing I miss from the old dishwasher is the integrated light, but I can get used to that.

1198719119.text_en: The product in general is very good, but I miss the rustiness of old appliances. The evolution of current technology is quite convincing. Let's hope that as time goes by, I will be more convinced that I have made a good purchase.

1196773993.text_en: We have not decided on a BOSCH because they are always the ones that have given us the best results. Super reliability and durability. The only drawback would be the plastic pieces for installation, which are somewhat flimsy and easy to break accidentally when paneling.

1201965083.text_en: Super quiet, the first few times I didn't know if the washing program had started, in this sense the red light that warns you that it is working and the possibility of it opening only at the end is very useful, letting the accumulated steam escape.

1221128557.text_en: The truth is that, being Bosch, we did not doubt that it would be otherwise. It has far exceeded expectations, the wash is excellent from the first, very low noise level and we are delighted, we would buy it again whenever necessary.

1183302898.text_en: The woman is satisfied with the dishwasher - it is quiet and washes and dries well. The advantage is the opening of the door at the end of the program, the disadvantage for us was more complicated assembly - a problem with the handle, which is installed on the inner part of the cover and still rubs. It will probably go away in time.

1184546689.text_en: This washing machine is a great helper in the home. The dishes are washed perfectly, the control is intuitive and the capacity of the dishwasher is also larger thanks to the replacement of the cutlery basket with a top drawer. Energy class B and silent washing are definitely a plus.

1217866471.text_en: We had doubts about whether the integrated device would be perfect, and we were surprised by the device, which has many programs and is very efficient in addition to making very little noise. Being able to have such an integrated product is within the reach of very few brands.

1220175386.text_en: We have only had the dishwasher for a short time, but so far we are satisfied. The brand was recommended from several quarters. Silent operation, large space for dishes, light indication, good program selection. The only negativity we currently perceive is the "worn out" cutlery drawer.

1210935211.text_en: It is easy to use. Just to put it a but, I would like there to be a shorter program for things like pouring water and that with the program it has being cold, it doesn't work for me, unless I haven't found that program.

1206031160.text_en: Another house, another Bosch dishwasher. Each previous one was great, let's see what happens this time. At the moment I only see a change of the internal casing from aluminum to plastic... savings?  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1219781639.text_en: After 16 years we had to replace our original dishwasher and we couldn't have chosen better. Quiet, intelligent, trouble-free and even washes dishes. I appreciate the drying quality, automatic door opening, remote control.

1220138639.text_en: I am happy with the dishwasher, it holds more dishes than our previous one, I appreciate that the control panel is not touch-sensitive - our previous one had problems with that. Noise is also lower with Bosch. I am still considering purchasing an extended warranty.

1210546937.text_en: You just need to open it to realize that the finishes are of quality and everything has been thought out down to the millimeter. I am very happy with the performance of the dishwasher and how it has fit into the kitchen renovation.

1202991221.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion If you are tired of scrubbing pots and unwashed forks, Bosch is the answer. I throw everything into it as I see fit and magic happens. Overall 10/10, I recommend it with a clear conscience.

1221779577.text_en: We have only been using this product for a short time, but right now we are very happy. It is true that it looks a little less robust than the Bosh we had previously, but it has all the features we needed

1181745697.text_en: I am satisfied with the purchase of this device. It washes dishes well and is quiet. In my case, sliding hinges turned out to be very useful. There was no need to cut the plinths. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1208973314.text_en: Very satisfied with the dishwasher. Large drawer for cutlery that holds well in it. The dishwasher is really quiet. The dishes are dry after washing, even the plastic bowls. Practical controls (the handles are much better than the touch panel)

1206615398.text_en: We bought this dishwasher after ours died after 15 years. It is great and the dishes are beautifully washed. The variability of baskets is a great thing. The only complaint is the noise. It seems to me that compared to the old dishwasher it is a little noisier..

1222004796.text_en: Perfect product. We love it.  It has everything we need.  As an added bonus, we would love it to have had a telescoping lower spray arm, but really, this one leaves nothing uncleaned.

1220690436.text_en: Total satisfaction. It's really quiet in the kitchen that you can't hear anything. Good layout of the crockery drawers with plenty of space.Unfortunately missing the funnel for refilling the salt, but it's not a disaster

1221753059.text_en: The dishwasher has been installed by a Bosch technician, resulting in a good installation. I am delighted with its operation, it has been a great change in low consumption compared to the old dishwasher

1198065898.text_en: It's just what I expected. Very happy with the purchase. Top quality as always. Let's hope it works for many years and without failures, something that has always happened with everything I have bought from Bosch.

1220672359.text_en: I am very pleased that the smh4evx08e dishwasher is very quiet, closes the dishes, there is plenty of space, everything is dried to perfection... a reliable purchase, 6+... I highly recommend it

1209730233.text_en: Assessment carried out prior to product testing. It comes very well packaged and the quality of the manufacturing and finishes is appreciated.  I haven't been able to install it yet so I can't provide more information.

1207653153.title_en: I have replaced a Bosch dishwasher with another

1204143416.text_en: I bought a Bosch SMH4EVX08E dishwasher and I must say that I am very satisfied with it so far. It's a built-in model from the 4 series, so it's kind of a middle ground - neither the cheapest nor the most expensive.  The main thing that surprised me is the quiet operation. With the previous dishwasher, we preferred not to run it in the evening because it hummed like an old vacuum cleaner. This one has 44 dB and you hardly know about it - we can watch a movie and the dishwasher is running next door in the kitchen without disturbing it.  As for the quality of washing, so far no reservations. The dishes are always clean, even if I throw in a burnt pot or plates of baked pasta. I really like the EfficientDry function – after the end of the program, the dishwasher opens itself and the dishes are completely dry after a while, even the plastic boxes that the old dishwasher never properly dried.  The interior layout is super well thought out for me. The upper basket can be adjusted in height, so if I have large glasses or a tall pot, I can simply move it. And the third drawer at the top for cutlery is great - I feel much better about it than the classic basket. The dishwasher can fit a lot of dishes (14 sets), which is especially appreciated by larger households.  I also tried connecting via Home Connect. Honestly, I didn't expect to use it, but it's pretty cool in the end - like when we're leaving, I'll run it on my phone. The application also shows how much time is left.  The energy class is B, which isn't top notch, but considering how much it can handle and how quiet it runs, I don't mind. Water consumption of around 9 l per cycle is excellent.  Installation was easy, Bosch has a good manual for it and the variopantes (hinges to adjust the door) work exactly as they should - the door opens smoothly and nothing rubs anywhere.  Pros: ✅ Quiet, powerful and water-saving ✅ Washes and dries perfectly, including plastics ✅ Lots of space and flexible layout ✅ Automatic door opening after washing ✅ Control via mobile works without problems It is a reliable dishwasher that feels sturdy, quiet, with good programs and results. After a long time, an appliance that simply works as it should.

1184784003.text_en: The washing machine comes with vario hinge hinges, so it is not necessary to cut the plinth under the washing machine. Quiet operation and excellent manufacturing quality.

1203502867.text_en: I haven't bought this model of dishwasher in a long time, but I am very happy with what it can do!

1185888260.text_en: Very efficient, easy to use, very low noise, multiple options for selecting washing times

1193070332.text_en: Super easy to install, many programs, perfect for home use for a family with 4 members

1176742618.text_en: The app could use more work on it. (Too much info...you get the hang of it)...

1200585226.text_en: It was easy to assemble. It has 3 shelves, it is roomy. It has Wi-Fi control.

1207689015.text_en: I didn't think it was possible for a man to enjoy an electrical appliance

1173194501.text_en: I think any Bosch MSV excels, but this one is wonderful.

1220463086.text_en: The washing machine is great, every recommendation

1211060831.text_en: I love everything about this product

1178036010.text_en: Everything is great, everything works great.

1217380183.title_en: I thought they were all the same… until this
1217380183.text_en: I've had other dishwashers before (including models from cheaper ranges), but the difference in the Bosch Series 6 is quite clear after the first few uses.    First, the wash is much more consistent. Other brands sometimes left marks or I had to "strategically arrange" the dishes. Here, it doesn't really matter how you put them - everything comes out clean without stress.    The eco program is surprisingly fast (approx. an hour in real use), which for me is a big plus compared to other models that were also 3-4 hours on the same program. I actually use it much more often, I don't wait for the dishes to be collected anymore.    The app on the phone really sets it apart from other brands. It's not just 'check off' - I use it to start the car remotely, see how much is left and get notified when it's done. In addition, you can adjust settings or programs directly from the app, which is much simpler than from the panel.    Another thing I liked: how quiet it is. Compared to what I had before, the difference is clear – you can actually leave it on at night without disturbing it.    All in all, it doesn't seem like something spectacular at first glance, but after using it daily you realize that it is above many other brands in details: more reliable, better thought out and "smarter" where it counts.

1220417789.text_en: The washing machine is a revelation, the zeolite system amazed us!

1220913890.text_en: It is a very quiet washing machine

1219918604.text_en: I like starting the device via the mobile application and selecting the program according to the type and degree of soiling of the dishes.

1214305904.text_en: It would take some time to give an evaluation of the product. This is why I indicate the rating as fair.

1213908866.text_en: Quiet and high-quality dishwashing, flexibility of interior space

1216034954.text_en: I like that it washes everything perfectly in the one-hour program.

1220278801.text_en: I trust the Bosch brand, which is why I once again reached for a dishwasher of this brand. The previous one served me for a great 11 years, which only confirms their quality. The new dishwasher washes excellently and the drying is also flawless. But what really pleasantly surprised me is how quiet it is - you can hardly hear it. A big plus for me is the self-opening function of the door after the end of the program, which I lacked in my previous model, but always wished for. The control panel is well laid out and easy to understand. I also appreciate the button for the favorite program - that's really handy. The dishwasher is spacious and holds a lot of dishes. I can recommend this dishwasher with a clear conscience.

1199691586.text_en: This dishwasher is spectacular, I am delighted with it because it is very quiet, spacious, saves a lot of water and you can also configure and start it through the home connect mobile application. Maybe I would have liked the brushed steel of the panel to be anti-fingerprint. I highly recommend it as it has an excellent quality-price ratio for its great features.

1216621979.text_en: It replaced the 9-year-old Series 6; except for the modified front panel and wi-fi, I don't actually notice a difference. It connected to the downloaded app without any problems and the app works well beyond expectations. Installation (building) into the line can be done following the instructions given in 2-3 hours; it takes the most time to align the dishwasher so that it does not fall on the back/front (unfortunately, there is no "central" screw controlling the front legs and the back at the same time - undoubtedly, centering the simultaneous lifting would facilitate/speed up the installation). I appreciate the exact same system of fixing the front cover plate as in the previous model.  I hope it lasts at least as long as the previous Bosch dishwasher.

1217233489.text_en: We are very happy with this dishwasher from Bosch. It does exactly what we expected: it cleans the dishes well and it is very quiet while spinning. This is especially nice in the evening, because you hardly hear it.    What also played a role for us is that the range of semi-built-in dishwashers is a lot smaller than that of fully built-in models. This meant we had less choice, but in the end we ended up with this one and we are very satisfied with it.    The dishes come out nice and clean and drying also goes well. So far I have not regretted the purchase. For us, this was really the best deal within the smaller range.

1218441842.text_en: Already after the first wash it is TOP. Silent, clear programs, simple operation and smart arrangement of dishes. I had the previous dishwasher for 12 years, I assume similar reliability.

1215882355.text_en: We had a dishwasher in an existing kitchen and wanted to install it again with the existing front. That worked out great.  With a good dishwasher

1185229683.text_en: It washes well and drying is also excellent, noise is not annoying

1186146504.text_en: THEY HAVE NOT LEFT MY DISHWASHER INSTALLED PANELED CORRECTLY.

1182109862.text_en: It is better compared to other older brands.  The programs are quite sufficient. Free programs are relatively quiet. The quiet program is even better and you won't hear the sink even in the evening in the living room connected to the kitchen.   The length of the programs is ok. Even a short program (1.5h - but it can be shortened) is completely sufficient for normal washing, and after finishing the dishes are dry (even plastic ones). The programs can still be shortened, but I haven't felt the need yet. As for the quality of washing, it is also better than the old one. I have the only reservation about the template for mounting the front panel. All the holes are shifted by approx. 3 mm and you really need to measure 3 times how to use the template.

1217748608.text_en: We are very satisfied with the dishwasher, mainly it is quiet and we like the variability of the baskets and the great choice of Favorit!!!

1221144038.title_en: Very satisfied with this Bosch dishwasher
1221144038.text_en: This Bosch dishwasher is a perfect replacement for my previous Bosch appliance. The ease of use has remained the same, so I was immediately familiar with it. After comparing with other brands, I thought the price-quality ratio of this Bosch was clearly the best.  So far I haven't encountered any problems. The installation went smoothly: just plug in, secure and connect the water supply. Installing the front panel was also done quickly and easily.  In short, a reliable dishwasher that does what it is supposed to do. I am very satisfied with my purchase and can definitely recommend this device.

1202116667.title_en: The BOSCH dishwasher is a solid choice.
1202116667.text_en: This is the third BOSCH dishwasher I have bought. There could only be one decision to choose since these are devices that have never let me down. Another reason was class A energy efficiency and the WIFI option. All you need to do is program the dishwasher at a time when the photovoltaic panels produce the right amount of electricity, and the BOSCH Home Connect application will tell you when it is most beneficial.  Apart from that, at first glance, nothing has changed compared to the previous models, but if everything works, what's the point? Only the basket guides seem to be more solidly mounted.  It is certainly a solid choice for many years with almost daily use.

1216527487.text_en: "We are absolutely thrilled with the new BOSCH dishwasher! Even after the first wash, we were shocked by how beautifully clean and shiny the dishes were. But what impressed us most was the practicality – the height-adjustable upper shelf is a genius thing that solved our eternal dilemma of where to put large pots or tall glasses. The separate cutlery compartment is the icing on the cake, because it leaves much more space in the lower basket. If don't hesitate, we definitely recommend this investment!"

1217004624.text_en: I mainly evaluate the possibilities of setting and adjustment positively during installation in the space to be built into the kitchen unit. Horizontal adjustment of the back of the dishwasher can be done from the front. The front panel can also be conveniently positioned to the side drawers using handy plastic spacers. Low consumption of water and electricity. We often use a remote message and start of the dishwasher via the HomeConnect app in conjunction with our PV plant. I would appreciate the possibility of setting the brightness level of the backlight of the buttons on the front panel. They can be turned off completely, but when activated, especially at night, the front panel lights up quite brightly. Low consumption of water and electricity. Relatively quiet, washing quality high.

1206147814.text_en: This is another Bosch dishwasher that works for four people in our house. The predecessor was used several times a day. We changed it because of the energy class - class A satisfies us one hundred percent, the size of the basket and the cutlery tray are a great option for a family of four. We really like the look and the metal panel (not a plastic wonder like in other brands). The previous one also had such a panel and it is perfect for cleaning.

1216770595.title_en: Smart, robust, effective and quiet dishwasher
1216770595.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is characterized by a smart and robust design that fits well into any kitchen. Striking features are a generous cutlery drawer and adjustable washing baskets that promote efficient organization. The dishwasher has simple basic operation, also with an app. Additional functions meet every dishwashing wish. The machine is remarkably quiet.

1181675932.text_en: We decided on this dishwasher because we had the same series before it and were completely satisfied with it. We told ourselves that we certainly wouldn't go wrong with it, and we weren't wrong. It has an even more beautiful design of the front control panel, it is quieter and especially more economical in terms of water consumption for washing. So far we are extremely satisfied with it.

1219466955.text_en: After 16 years of using another BOSH dishwasher model (without a single repair), I replaced it with the SMI4ECS28E model, again with a front panel, so that the faceplate does not need to be changed. After two weeks of use, I am extremely satisfied with the dishwasher, it is really quiet, there is a sufficient range of programs for normal use, practical height-adjustable baskets. This model is a good choice.

1219583530.title_en: After 15 years, we bought a Bosch dishwasher again
1219583530.text_en: After a great and reliable experience with a Bosch dishwasher, we bought a new one from this brand. According to the instructions, any slightly technical type can handle the installation. The setting is then very simple. We've had the new one for a few days, it washes great, but compared to the old one, it's surprisingly noisier than we expected.

1219951237.title_en: Exchange of a 25-year-old BOSCH dishwasher for a new BOSCH one
1219951237.text_en: After 25 years of reliable operation, we replaced the old BOSCH SGI 46A55 EU with a new BOSCH SMI4ECS28E. The installation went without a single problem. Compared to the original dishwasher, the new one is significantly quieter, smarter and the washing results are perfect. BOSCH did not disappoint again - maximum satisfaction.

1214073002.text_en: The dishwasher is user-friendly, the dishes are clean and dry when the program is finished and the dishwasher is energy efficient. I chose this dishwasher because I was satisfied with my old Bosch dishwasher that needed to be replaced after 20 years.

1214593516.text_en: Easy to operate. Super clean dishes. Valve opens automatically after program ends. Dishes dry excellently. Quiet sound when the machine is doing its work. Bosch is the absolute winner for me! Previous Bosch machine has provided 19 years of daily service.

1183805356.text_en: The dishwasher is quiet. The dishes we have washed so far have been perfectly clean. Hopefully the dishwasher will also be economical enough, which was the reason why we chose it.

1208654524.title_en: I am delighted with how well it works
1208654524.text_en: What I liked the most is that with the ECO mode it cleans the dishes great with a very small expense. I have not found any defects so far

1182669640.text_en: After daily use for about two weeks, I am completely satisfied. Easy assembly and precise execution, as I have come to expect from this brand. I appreciate the height adjustability of the upper basket and the control via the Home Connect app, which allows adjustments to the washing cycle while it is running. For example, the option to speed up the washing cycle or choose a silent mode is pleasant. Even with normal settings, it does not interfere with noise. The highest drawer, designed for cutlery, is ingenious in shape. I have nothing to complain about.

1203982759.text_en: The dishwasher met my expectations, intuitive operation, dishes washed perfectly.

1213753218.text_en: Nice machine, easy to place and use. Excellent results

1217061894.text_en: The dishwasher surprised me with the quality of washing, so far it works well :)

1183075815.title_en: A great successor to the old boschka
1183075815.text_en: Quiet, supports Google home, easy to control.

1219571606.text_en: We have all Bosch appliances at home, with which we have been satisfied for a long time. The original dishwasher served us for 12 years, which is why the choice of a new one was clear again - this option turned out to be the best in terms of price and quality.  The dishwasher is very quiet, has the intuitive controls we are used to, and its design blends in perfectly with the other appliances in the kitchen. A big plus for us is also the high-quality service, thanks to which we did not even consider another brand.  After several weeks of use, we are extremely satisfied and can recommend this dishwasher with a clear conscience.

1215233580.text_en: After having had a Bosch dishwasher for years with satisfaction, it needed to be replaced.  After some deliberation, I opted for Bosch again.  Now with cutlery drawer.  Used it a few times now and the dishes come out clean and dry.  Lots of variety in programs and a handy app where you can set your preferences and, among other things, monitor your energy consumption.

1180257422.title_en: The perfect helper for lazy husbands
1180257422.text_en: This Bosch dishwasher is top! I control it through the app, so I can start it from the couch or from work. It sends me a notification when it's ready and reminds me to add salt. It washes perfectly, is quiet and economical. Really great thing, I can't imagine life without it.

1218449826.text_en: We have had the dishwasher for about a week. So far, maximum satisfaction, except that it is a little noisier than the original one. But we turn it on overnight, so we don't mind.   What I like most is the option to open the door automatically after washing. In the morning, the dishes are beautifully dry and you just have to put them out :) The installation of the dishwasher went without any problems, even if it is not easy to understand the instructions. I recommend that you first watch a video on the Internet regarding the installation of a dishwasher of the same brand and possibly model series. It goes better then.

1180257320.title_en: The perfect helper for lazy husbands
1180257320.text_en: This Bosch dishwasher is top! I control it through the app, so I can start it from the couch or from work. It sends me a notification when it's ready and reminds me to add salt. It washes perfectly, is quiet and economical. Really great thing!

1216151680.text_en: First time seeing such a sparkling, dry wash

1202165733.text_en: BOSCH dishwasher and once again. I am fully satisfied with my choice. This company's devices have never let me down, so the decision to purchase was obvious. An additional advantage that tipped the scale is the high energy class A and the WIFI function. Thanks to the BOSCH Home Connect application, I can easily program the dishwasher to operate at times when the photovoltaic panels produce the most energy - the application itself suggests when it is most profitable.    At first glance, the dishwasher does not differ much from previous models, but since everything works flawlessly, there is no need for revolutionary changes. I only noticed that the basket guides are more solidly made, which translates into greater comfort of use.    To sum up - it is a safe, proven choice for years, especially with everyday use.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1219739024.text_en: Fifteen years ago, we purchased a Bosch built-in dishwasher, SGI55E15EU, from your company. During its long-term use, not a single malfunction occurred! The device was completely problem-free.  Based on the excellent experience with the mentioned product, we again decided to buy a Bosch dishwasher, this time SMI4ECS28E. With this evaluation, we basically recommend a company that sells quality devices to all interested parties, and that is undoubtedly BOSCH.

1206476584.text_en: This dishwasher really rocks. I use it regularly and I can say that it is simply solid. It washes thoroughly, regardless of whether I put in lightly rinsed plates or dishes after major cooking. It runs quietly, so you can turn it on in the evening and no one will blame you for making noise. Drying is also a strong point. After the program ends, the dishes are dry and ready to be stored away, and the automatic door opening does the job.    It has a well-designed interior. Everything can be arranged sensibly, including larger pots, and a separate drawer for cutlery is a big plus. Moreover, it is economical and there is no sign of wasting water or electricity.    If someone is looking for equipment that simply works reliably, without any quirks and without the need for any fiddling, I can easily recommend this dishwasher. I would buy the same one again. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1183022666.title_en: The experience with the product is positive
1183022666.text_en: What I liked the most is the efficiency in the use of water and energy, in addition to its quieter operation compared to the previous one. What I liked least is that I have not yet been able to test all its functions, since I have barely used it. I would recommend it for its durability and the trust I have in the manufacturer, especially after having had the previous model for 20 years without problems.

1207356313.text_en: I have been using this dishwasher for a long time and I must admit that it works really well. It holds a lot of dishes, and the additional cutlery drawer quickly turned out to be more practical than I thought. Everything has its place and it's easy to arrange it your way.    It is surprisingly quiet during operation, so it does not disturb you even in the evening, when the house is quieter. The Eco program uses little water, and the dishes come out clean and dry after washing, without the need to wash anything. EfficientDry does the job, even with larger loads.    Another advantage is the ability to set a half load, when there is no point in waiting for a full basket, and the option of controlling it via the application. I sometimes turn it on from my phone when I remember about it only after leaving the kitchen.    Overall it leaves a very good impression. It's a device that simply does what it's supposed to do and does it reliably.

1219871700.title_en: Very quiet, top quality and economical
1219871700.text_en: Used to full satisfaction after the first use without dishes on the advice of the seller. Nice separate cutlery drawer and everything super clean. The lid opens automatically afterwards so that the dishes dry properly. It's nice that I can start the device from work via the app, but you can also use the timer. And my door panel also fits nicely on it. Kudos to Bosch!

1217123933.text_en: The device fulfills its function perfectly, it works in silence, it washes all the dishes very well in a short cycle, it has many modification options so that you can adapt the sewing machine to your needs, which makes everyday functioning in the kitchen much easier. We are very pleased with the purchase and recommend it to everyone considering this equipment!! #opinionmotivated by promotion

1220057174.text_en: My previous Bosch dishwasher served more than 20 years. My decision was therefore quickly made to choose a Bosch again. This machine, very friendly in price, meets all my expectations. This time I also opted for a cutlery drawer, which I definitely recommend! In short, a machine with many options and good quality.

1218128030.text_en: The washing result is impeccable, it opens automatically at the end of the wash which facilitates drying while saving energy. There is also this 1/2 capacity option which is practical when you don't have a lot of dishes. I haven't had it for long but let's hope its performance doesn't diminish over time

1206687290.text_en: After 14 years, it's time to replace the dishwasher. The new model was chosen by Bosch due to its quiet operation and automatic door opening function. A big advantage is the third cutlery drawer, which allows you to save a lot of space in the lower, large drawer.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1206678214.text_en: After 14 years, it's time to replace the dishwasher. The new model was chosen by Bosch due to its quiet operation and automatic door opening function. A big advantage is the third cutlery drawer, which allows you to save a lot of space in the lower, large drawer.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1209619081.text_en: The dishwasher is amazing!! Aesthetic and economical, very roomy, works quietly. The dishes are super clean. The half-load option is very practical. The adjustable suspension height of the middle basket also helps with large dishes. I am very pleased with the purchase, I recommend it!!

1217398455.title_en: Great device, very happy with it.
1217398455.text_en: This machine excels in quiet efficiency and reliability.  Thanks to the brushless motor, you can hardly hear it, while the flexible basket layout can accommodate even difficult pans.  For those looking for a reliable, whisper-quiet machine that will last for years, it is a top investment

1206322944.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I have had good experience with Bosch devices for years, and this dishwasher only confirms it. You can see the attention to detail that really extends the life of the equipment - even such minor solutions as a hidden seal on the door, thanks to which the wheels of the trolleys do not rub against it every time the baskets are inserted.    The dishwasher rinses the dishes very thoroughly, including detergent residues, which is a huge plus for me - I can be sure that we are not drinking any chemicals left from the previous stages of washing. Programs designed to maintain and keep the device in good condition are also worth mentioning.    Another big advantage is the AquaStop system, which gives you a sense of safety every day.  Other advantages include quiet operation, well-thought-out interior layout and energy-saving cycles that do not reduce the washing efficiency.    The whole thing gives the impression of solid, refined equipment that has been designed to serve for years. I'm happy to recommend it.

1176745381.text_en: Renovation of a Bosc dishwasher from 2004 with this new model that, after its first use, demonstrates the effectiveness of washing - everything sparkling - with minimum noise and maximum energy efficiency and minimum consumption. A complete success... we hope it lasts another 20 years, at least :)

1182811349.text_en: Compared to the previous dishwasher of another brand, this dishwasher clearly fits more dishes and the storage options are really quite variable. The dishes are clean, and what is very important for me, they are completely free from the chemicals used. So far, I am extremely satisfied with the dishwasher.

1183504964.text_en: We bought the dishwasher because we were satisfied with the previous model, which lasted us 13 years! Compared to the older version, I welcomed the drawer for cutlery and opening after washing. The dishwasher is quiet, everything works as it should. The menu is clear, there are not many choices, but it is quite enough for everyday washing.

1214001389.title_en: We are very happy with it!
1214001389.text_en: Our old Bosch dishwasher has lasted more than 16 years, reason for us to choose a Bosch again. Wow, what a difference from our old one - the new one is really super modern and even has an app. It is quite quiet and washes much cleaner than our old one.

1217097079.text_en: This dishwasher is already the second Bosch dishwasher in the family. We have had the first one for over 11 years and it still works. We appreciate the quiet operation, low consumption, simple operation, automatic door opening of the new dishwasher. Most importantly, it washes the dishes beautifully. We are already looking forward to connecting it to the mobile phone!

1199286265.text_en: Easy assembly and clear instructions, silent operation and useful programs, good energy efficiency, quality product, we are satisfied, we hope to enjoy it for a long time as is already the case with other products we have from the same brand.

1217525952.text_en: The dishwasher is an excellent choice for households (3-4 people) that value sustainability and the latest technology. Anyone who is prepared to invest a little more initially will be rewarded by low running costs and very comfortable handling.

1206660844.text_en: Washing results have always been okay (after more than a month of use). Insert racks can handle fewer dishes than our previous dishwasher.   The dishwasher also always opens (10 to 15 minutes) before the end of the dishwasher's washing time.  This should be taken up with Bosch TD.

1198384589.text_en: I don't understand why all the programs have 2 different durations for what purpose.   Why does the door not open automatically with progr speed perfebt and why there is no temperature < at 50° (for plastic objects)

1184741966.text_en: Very satisfied with my previous "BOSCH" dishwasher, I used it daily for more than 20 years. I parted ways with it for reasons of economy, performance, silence... the new one fully meets my expectations! And class A

1185107886.text_en: Have good experience with Bosch products. The old dishwasher is 14 years old. So the choice was again a Bosch. Fortunately, I was able to get a machine with energy label A, for a very attractive price.  We are very proud and happy with it.

1177229603.text_en: I love it, it is super quiet and efficient, when loading the water it doesn't even start my pressure pump. It has features such as automatic opening and adjustable baskets that are great. Very very happy with my new dishwasher!

1183191232.text_en: The dishwasher is quiet and easy to operate. The interior space is well thought out. The upper basket can be easily adjusted in height. Individual cutlery can also be stored very well in the cutlery drawer. Overall, I am very satisfied with the dishwasher.

1185737163.title_en: Lots of space and easy use
1185737163.text_en: There is plenty of room for cutlery and kitchen utensils. Simple operation. The standard program takes a long 4:30 hours, but with the fast program it is ready in 1:30 hours. This may consume more power. Simple operation.

1185734507.text_en: Honestly, super happy with this dishwasher! It washes perfectly, dries perfectly, silent and frankly for the price, it's a masterclass. Unbeatable value for money. I recommend 100%, no regrets.

1217036969.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher, the previous one worked for 14 years, the new one has just been tested, everything was washed and dried beautifully, the dishwasher is very quiet, I highly recommend it :) #opinionmotivated by promotion

1211713080.title_en: No complaints so far, good as expected
1211713080.text_en: Technically everything seems to be working perfectly. Sensors and connectivity are welcome new achievements. In my opinion, material used to be more solid. Cutlery pullout is a bit tricky.

1185452077.text_en: + great satisfaction + washes well + quiet + spacious, enough space for larger dishes + well-organized drawers + automatic door opening also very quiet - I just miss the lighting inside

1184339726.text_en: A Bosch dishwasher very similar to this one served us for over 12 years. That's why we decided to trust this manufacturer again. We are satisfied with the new dishwasher, it washes and dries well. I am excited about the short program.

1217872665.text_en: Good dishwasher with all the necessary features, the fact that it is connected is a plus, easy to use and plenty of storage space inside, practical cutlery drawer

1184572040.text_en: Compared to the old dishwasher, the new one is much quieter and has an upper basket for cutlery, so we can fit more dishes there. Based on previous experience, we chose Bosch again and we are very satisfied.

1184746609.text_en: Very easy to load, much more spacious due to the cutlery drawer. Sufficient programs that are simple and intuitive to use. Class A is a bonus, especially for that purchase price

1216704944.title_en: Bosch devices are always a good choice
1216704944.text_en: Our choice was simple. Another Bosch dishwasher after 15 years of use. With the €75, the choice was extra nice. Very satisfied with the new dishwasher, it is also quieter than the previous one.

1220690631.text_en: I appreciate its ease of use, the fun aspect of the application which helps us to choose our program in relation to the levels of filling and soiling of the dishes.

1184528903.text_en: .. it's perfect! Quiet and incredibly gentle, at the same time connected by an application to the phone. But most of all, it can fit a lot thanks to the third cutlery drawer. Great buy, recommended.

1192638558.text_en: Cutlery basket: you have to get used to it but it's effective Height-adjustable upper basket: great Application for remote start and expanded choice of programs.

1217771664.text_en: We chose this dishwasher for its great value for money. It is very easy to use and very efficient. Our dishes are always well cleaned and dry.

1183666292.text_en: Our first dishwasher of this brand, very quiet, high-quality wash, dries well, the door opens by itself after the end of the program.  The baskets are also spacious for larger pieces of crockery. We are satisfied.

1216156011.text_en: Does what it's supposed to do in a quiet and good way! Operation via the app is absolutely great, and the notification that the dishes are clean again is a nice bonus.

1185987531.text_en: Very satisfied with my dishwasher. I recommend it to everyone. Makes very little noise and the machine opens itself 10 minutes before the end. Very good built-in.

1189707699.text_en: Very good and handy device! Perfect washing/drying results. An additional added value would be that you can choose the version (inox/black) of the front panel.

1220504698.text_en: I can only compare it with one dishwasher (it worked perfectly for 22 years) and now after 14 days of use (I've only tried automatic and Eco so far, I use tablets) I can say that this dishwasher washes excellently and even dries well, which I was worried about considering the reviews of all possible dishwashers where drying is generally not rated well. Maybe it's because I use the option to open the door at the end of the program (actually the door opens about 15 minutes before the end). This feature can be turned off if one doesn't like it, which is good. This dishwasher is also quite quiet - it stands in a residential kitchen and does not disturb at all during operation. The only drawback I can see is that with the old dishwasher, the mugs could be placed very obliquely on the slanted compartments in the upper basket, so (on days) the water didn't stick to them at all, which I don't like here (the compartments are narrower and the mugs therefore don't stand so much at an angle), but in the end they are completely dry. Another good thing is the easy adjustability of the height of the upper basket. You can also see high-quality material and workshop processing. So I give a full 5 stars, because it's not such a problem when storing mugs at an angle ;) Pros: - quiet - good drying and washing - high-quality workmanship Cons: the compartments in the upper basket are all the same width or narrow

1201997946.title_en: you really can't install a front panel on it!
1201997946.text_en: The instructions say it supports a front panel of maximum 725mm, ok, so the button panel is about 11cm, plus a panel which I will cut, the total will be 80cm like the Ikea kitchen. But then when you actually do it, you understand that the maximum of 725 means including the 11cm of the front panel!!! This is totally misleading!! So the maximum is 61 cm. With the Ikea kitchen it means that the dishwasher door will be shorter than the rest of the kitchen. So the most popular cuisine (and probably many others) is not supported!! Don't buy it. It also cleans poorly.

Thanks to the automatic door opening, the dishes are significantly drier, which is a big plus.     Interior very flexible. The baskets can be easily adjusted, many of the rods can be folded down and the cutlery drawer at the top is super practical. This means that even large pots or pans can fit in easily if you move something around.    The programs are clear and useful - I especially use the Eco and Automatic programs regularly. The app control is nice, but not a must.    Cleaning performance is top!     Conclusion: Very good dishwasher with a great price-performance ratio - no unnecessary gimmicks.

1215546978.text_en: Overall assessment: I am extremely satisfied with the Bosch Series 4 dishwasher after a few uses. I was looking for a reliable model that mainly dries well, and this model SMI4EVS08E delivers on that. The installation was trouble-free and the control is intuitive. If you want quality from a proven brand and do not need unnecessarily expensive additional functions of the highest ranges, this is an ideal choice.    Pros: • Automatic door opening (EfficientDry): This is a "game-changer" for me. The dishes are beautifully dry after finishing, even the plastic bowls that remained wet in the old dishwasher.  • Silent operation: We run the dishwasher in the evening while watching TV and hardly know about it.  • Cutlery drawer: The VarioDrawer at the top is great, it saves a lot of space in the lower basket.  • Home Connect app: I initially thought it was useless, but the notification on the mobile that "the program has ended" or "the rinse aid is running low" is very addictive in practice.  Cons: • Eco program is endless: It lasts almost 4 hours. Fortunately, there is a SpeedPerfect+ button that can be used to reduce the time, albeit at the cost of higher consumption.  • Stainless steel panel: It looks luxurious, but every fingerprint is immediately visible on it. Get ready for more frequent polishing.

1219493541.text_en: after trying it, the sink works to my full satisfaction, again I will save a lot of time...

1207352282.text_en: There aren't many built-in front panel dishwashers on the market, and if you do find one, it's likely to have touch buttons, which after 7 years of using a different brand of dishwasher, have been drinking my blood for at least the last 6 years. If you're hesitant, I seriously recommend going with the physical buttons. There are even fewer models with them, and the vast majority are Bosch dishwashers. The dishwasher seemed well-made during assembly and the instructions are quite descriptive. During the first wash cycle, the dishwasher seemed noisier than its predecessor, but the wife says that an empty dishwasher tends to be noisier.
