1206714511.text_en: We chose this model because it is easy for us to operate, just like our previous Bosch dishwasher.  It has 5 basic programs + a half-load program and a shortening of those 5 programs by 15-75%.  After 3 weeks, I finally alternate only 2 programs as needed: Auto 45-65C for the combined filling and the program for the pot 70C. I also tried the fast program at 65C, which should only wash for 60 minutes, but in the case of a combined load of plates + pots, the pots were washed imperfectly (traces of food remained on the sides of the pots). So I recommend it only for glass, porcelain, cutlery.     Pros: for both programs used, I rate the quality of washing very positively vs. time.   The dishwasher is incredibly quiet in any program. You can only hear the light gurgling of the water. After the end of the washing program, I have set the door to open automatically, which happens about 5 minutes before the end of the program. The dishes are beautifully dry (including plastic). I don't register the leakage of excess steam from the open dishwasher, I had to stand right next to it to notice it.   Even though I belong to an older generation, I downloaded an application for controlling the dishwasher to my mobile phone. Thanks to it, the hardness of the water and the amount of rinse aid can be set beautifully and easily before using the dishwasher for the first time. For me, a medium degree of use of the rinse aid is sufficient for the medium hardness of the water we have here. The data on water hardness was given to me by our city waterworks.   In the application, you can also monitor the amount of water consumed, energy, and the number of washing programs that the dishwasher has already completed.     Minuses: A) the only thing I would criticize about the dishwasher is the aggressively strong shade of the red indicator light, which indicates which program is selected and running.   B) Compared to the older dishwasher, I personally do not like the cutlery drawer (although the cutlery is washed perfectly). I liked the basket in which the cutlery was placed vertically. Thanks to the cutlery drawer, I have to keep the upper basket in a lower position at all times, because otherwise tall 0.4 l water glasses would not fit in it.     For myself, I warmly recommend this dishwasher to everyone who wants a quality product without unnecessary electronic gadgets. It is user friendly, the washing quality is excellent, the noise level is minimal, the consumption of only 9 liters of water per cycle.

1169705534.text_en: I have just bought the Bosch SMI6ECS00E Dishwasher and it really is great, because it is quiet and washes very well, I even tested it with the other washing modes. It is also easy to install unlike my old one from another brand.  For me, Bosch is the best, because I already have an oven, a washing machine and there a Bosch dishwasher.  At the moment I'm looking at hoods and I'm really considering buying a Bosch, because you guys are the best.

1157012528.title_en: Practical device, efficient washing and drying
1157012528.text_en: I installed this dishwasher myself, in particular to take the time to properly adjust the front to be installed in relation to the adjacent fronts of my kitchen units. I scrupulously followed the installation instructions, which were very detailed, including QR codes linking to online videos. These are very well done, clear and detailed, but some did not exactly match my device. Likewise on the instructions, some information is incorrect (minimum door opening distance for example, which caused me to waste a lot of time, having tried to increase it which is impossible). You have to be very careful when using the drilling template because in my case the printing of the document was not centered... So be careful to match the middle correctly. My holes ended up offset by 2 mm, which I was unable to correct during installation because once the holes were made there is no possible adjustment of the facade. This is a negative point for me. For the rest the installation went well.    The dishwasher user guide is a bit indigestible, with multiple repetitions, numerous cross-references and sometimes strange translations. This raises the question of paragraphs 14.8 "Interrupting the program", 14.9 "Interrupting the program" and 14.10 "Turning off the device"; after several readings this remains incomprehensible (it would have been necessary to use terms like “suspend” or “stop”). Another example of oddity: page 45 which is read in a zig-zag pattern.    Now let's talk about the device itself. The exterior panel is well finished, but as expected, the stainless steel is constantly stained with fingerprints (I prefer the faux-stainless steel in my refrigerator from the same brand). The touch panel is aesthetic and well laid out, but a little sensitive (often turns on unintentionally with the thighs). The all-stainless steel interior finish is clean, the baskets are also well made and equipped with practical functions, such as the height adjustment of the upper basket on three levels, the folding rods, the rubber protections, the extra clean zone. A few drawbacks, however: the bottom basket tends to get sideways at the end of the open stroke, when loaded, despite the guides under the front casters. The middle basket, also when loaded, makes a racking noise when fully extended, due to the poor finish of the casters (the after-sales service exchanged it for me but the new basket has the same defect). As for the cutlery drawer, it doesn't slide very smoothly.    Regarding washing efficiency, it's perfect. After several weeks we only used Eco mode, which always left the dishes clean, including a gratin dish. The dishes are also well dried. It is likely that we will use the other modes little, as with our previous device. The same goes for Home Connect which we will not install, not seeing the point of controlling a dishwasher remotely.    To conclude, we do not regret our choice, this dishwasher giving us satisfaction despite the few criticisms mentioned.

1171922746.title_en: Ignore WiFi, you may not be able to configure it
1171922746.text_en: I bought a set of BOSCH appliances for the kitchen (hob, hood, dishwasher) all equipped with WiFi and compatible with the Home Connect application.   I'm a programmer and I have some knowledge of network infrastructure configuration, and yet I struggled for several hours to connect the stove and hood to the WiFi (now I'm going with some intermittents).   The washing machine, however, did not want to connect under any circumstances, no matter how much I asked it to. It keeps telling me that I provided the wrong Wifi password (error H9005) even though I entered it correctly about 30 times, reconfigured the router for compatibility, reset the car, etc.   My conclusion: consider WiFi connectivity and the functionalities promised by Home Connect as a "bonus" that you may or may not receive. Do not take into account the WiFi functions when making the purchase decision.   Otherwise, I have nothing to comment on the quality of washing; the old Bosch machine that I used for about 14 years did its job well and without surprises; this "new" one seems to work just as well for now.

1215163745.title_en: I wanted the top and I got it. Excellent
1215163745.text_en: After having used an outdated dishwasher for years, I decided to make a leap in quality by choosing (after a thousand research on specific technical characteristics) the Bosch SMI6ECS12E Series 6 and I must say that the experience was equal to the high expectations. Already during the assembly phase I had a pleasant surprise: despite having to integrate it into a 25 year old kitchen, the installation turned out to be less complicated than expected. The range of accessories is truly complete and well-studied, and this allowed me to adapt it perfectly to the space without having to resort to any particular interventions. A plus point that not all models can boast.  From a technological point of view, this dishwasher is a little jewel. The EcoSilence Drive motor is extremely silent: during the wash cycles you can barely hear it, and this for me is a huge added value, especially in the evening hours. The intensive washing zone is one of the functions I appreciated the most: very dirty pots and pans are made like new again without having to pre-treat anything. Internal flexibility is also excellent: the customizable baskets and the third basket for cutlery make space management extremely practical, allowing you to optimize each wash.  From an energy point of view, class A is a guarantee: reduced consumption and high performance, a combination that really makes the difference today.  Moving on to the smart part, the connection via Home Connect is certainly an added value for those who, like me, love managing the home remotely. However, I have to be honest: the Connect Home app still has room for improvement. Some configurations are not stored correctly and the management of remote commands is not always smooth. Furthermore, I would have liked to have a more effective notification system, perhaps with a more evident acoustic signal at the end of the cycle or a more immediate text message on the smartphone. Nothing that compromises the overall experience, but they are details that, if perfected, would make the product truly impeccable.  In conclusion, the Bosch SMI6ECS12E is a dishwasher that I recommend without hesitation: solid, silent, technologically advanced and with a washing quality that really makes the difference. Some small software improvements would be welcome, but overall the experience is absolutely 5 stars.  I hope I have been useful to you.

1179731352.text_en: I am very satisfied with the dishwasher. The rinse aid mixture was set too high at the factory, but after a configuration change, which can be easily done via the app, everything worked perfectly. However, there is a star deduction for the app, which shows an error for me (iOS) when several people use the same dishwasher on the app. Downloaded programs can only be used on the cell phone on which they were downloaded and the favorites are not displayed uniformly on all mobile devices per device. It's a shame, but otherwise everything is perfect.

1214947383.text_en: I am very happy that I chose this dishwasher. It has a lot of programs and is easy to operate via the app, but also just normally. Really great, super happy with it.

1219212220.text_en: Our old dishwasher was 25 years old (2001-2026) but in the last six months certain programs stopped working. Finally, we were left with only the 70-degree program. We are pleasantly surprised and completely satisfied.

Overall, the device appears to be of very high quality and fits perfectly into the kitchen.  We would buy the dishwasher again at any time and can recommend it without reservation.

1198590348.text_en: [Employee of bsh-bosch] I have been using the Bosch SMI6ECS12E Series6 semi-integrated dishwasher for a few weeks and I am absolutely convinced. The Extra Clean Zone is particularly practical, ideal for stubborn dirt in the lower basket at higher pressure. The VarioDrawer cutlery drawer and the height-adjustable upper basket (3-level Rackmatic) ensure flexible loading - perfect for dishes or pots of different sizes.  I particularly like the EfficientDry drying system: the door opens automatically at the end, so it stays dry and hygienic, without manual drying. The device also offers additional security thanks to the Aquastop protection. Anyone who likes things smart will love the Home‑Connect app functionality: start and control programs and monitor the flushing status remotely – super practical.

1191407136.title_en: A perfect dishwasher in every way!
1191407136.text_en: I have been using this dishwasher for several weeks and I am absolutely delighted with my purchase. It perfectly meets all my expectations, and even beyond!    First of all, it is very quiet: even in intensive cycle, it is barely heard, which is very appreciable in an open kitchen. The capacity is ideal for a family, and the interior layout is well thought out, allowing space to be optimized for bulky dishes such as pots or dishes.    In terms of efficiency, there is nothing to complain about: the dishes come out impeccably clean and dry, even for delicate glasses or very dirty pans. The different programs are really practical and adapt to all daily needs.    I also appreciate the low consumption of water and electricity, a real plus for the environment and for the bill. Operation is intuitive, the controls are clear, and maintenance is easy.    A very nice little extra: the connected function. Thanks to the application, I can start or monitor the cycle remotely, receive notifications when the wash is finished or when I need to refill the salt or tablets, and even adjust certain settings according to my needs. It’s extremely practical on a daily basis and brings real peace of mind.    In summary, I recommend this dishwasher with my eyes closed: it combines performance, silence, economy, practicality and modernity. I am very satisfied on all counts!

1161108822.title_en: Very good for the first dishwasher

1179396980.text_en: It washes very well, even with the shortest cycle. It is quiet, which is important in the case of my kitchen open to the living room. The second disadvantage is the lack of memory for the last selected cycle. But overall it's OK.

1162420932.text_en: This is my first Bosch dishwasher and I can already see the difference compared to products from other brands. The silence option on the program intended for nights does the job - the program is much quieter than the others. Dish baskets are convenient, you can easily arrange glasses, bowls and plates of various sizes, especially in the upper drawer. The number of programs is sufficient, and a big plus is the ability to shorten any program using a special button - useful when we don't have much time. The dishwasher has mechanical buttons, connects to the application via WiFi (bonus - you can also set programs and turn it on remotely), and shows the time until the end of the program. Visually flawless. So far my best purchase in the household appliances category. I highly recommend it.

1162491934.text_en: I would highlight that it is very quiet and that it has several programs that adapt perfectly to the needs of each wash. 1213902959.text_en: I must say that the user experience was excellent right from the start. It is not just a functional appliance, but a real technological ally in the kitchen. The real strong point is the integration with the dedicated app. Once connected, management becomes very simple, precise configuration, you can set technical parameters such as water hardness and rinse aid level directly from your smartphone, without going crazy with the buttons on the front panel. Tailor-made programs, you can download new wash cycles from the app and store your "Favourite", making daily start-up quick and personalized. ​In addition to the variety of programmes, what makes the difference in everyday life is the automatic door opening system at the end of the programme. This function is a real "plus": it allows the steam to escape while the drying process is in operation, ensuring more natural and flawless drying of the dishes (even plastic ones) and avoiding bad smells. Despite the great program download feature, the experience with the short 65 minute cycle was disappointing. The temperature set is too low to allow the tablet to dissolve completely, leaving residues and dirty dishes. I would have appreciated much more the possibility of creating a 'tailor-made' program, with the freedom to independently set time and temperature

1199800066.text_en: Good evening! I bought this Bosch dishwasher for several reasons, the features satisfied me. Since we have saved water which is more expensive than the Kilowatt, time for us is very precious, the dishes are very well washed and dried, the glasses do not smell when I drink water from them, you can sterilize them, you can also sterilize baby bottles, it is very silent, you can turn it on from a distance with a wi-fi connection, many programs, Smart functions, it has two very spacious and adjustable baskets, AquaStop water protection, Technology modern...I highly recommend it, you won't regret your money, believe me!

1208118355.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion* The new black SMS4EMC06E replaced the 20-year-old BSH from the same manufacturer, which is worn out but still functional. Identical sizes and connections, easy and intuitive operation, enriched with new functions and possibilities (larger temperature range, 1/2 load, interior equipment and others) increasing convenience and reducing operating costs. The operation is so quiet that you have to hear that the dishwasher is actually working. And for a 20-year-old retiree, we still have a part-time job.

1202120654.text_en: #opinionmotivatedpromotion" SMS4EMC06E dishwasher. I am very pleased with the purchase of a new dishwasher. It has many programs, including a quick one, which is perfect for everyday use. It has a pull-out cutlery drawer, which gives more space for dishes at the bottom. The dishwasher is very quiet, you practically cannot hear its operation, which makes it easier to turn it on at night. The color and anti-pop coating worked very well for me. I highly recommend this model of dishwasher.

1219586251.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion* BOSCH SMS4EMC06E EfficientDry is a dishwasher that really makes a great impression from the first use. First of all, it washes dishes very well, even with larger loads and dirtier pots and plates. The end result is very good - the glass is clean, the plates are streak-free and the cutlery is thoroughly washed.    A big advantage is the EfficientDry system, which automatically opens the door after the program ends. Thanks to this, the dishes dry faster and better, and there is less moisture left inside. This is a very practical solution, especially when the dishwasher runs in the evening and you want to remove dry dishes in the morning.    I also really appreciate the VarioFlex baskets with foldable elements. They can be easily adjusted to current needs - sometimes you can put more plates, sometimes you can put larger pots, bowls or unusual dishes. You can see that the design is well thought out and comfortable in everyday use.    The dishwasher works smoothly, looks modern and solid, and is intuitive to use. This is equipment that gives a sense of quality and reliability. In my opinion, BOSCH SMS4EMC06E is a very good choice for people who expect effective washing, good drying and a convenient arrangement of baskets. I definitely recommend it.

1177883717.text_en: The dishwasher from the first league has everything that a modern device should have, the operation is child's play and the quality of washing and drying is fantastic, the dishes just shine, I recommend BOSCH even to the most demanding people :))

1161426723.title_en: Take care of your dishes with a Bosch dishwasher
1161426723.text_en: We often receive guests and clean dishes are essential, so we knew we were looking for a spacious and energy-efficient dishwasher. Our friends recommended Bosch to us and it was a real success! The new SMS4EMC06E EfficientDry dishwasher is a super quiet, energy-saving dishwasher that also uses a small amount of water per cycle. Thanks to the EfficientDry function, the dishes and cutlery are impeccably dry, so after washing they can go straight to the cupboard or to the table :) We were looking for a flexible solution - and this is what the dishwasher itself provides us with, allowing you to adjust the height of the basket, because it is even better and safer to fill the interior with dishes. Modern design is also important to us - the dishwasher has such a beautiful black stainless steel door, so the dishwasher is a decoration of the kitchen. I wholeheartedly recommend it!

1149057194.text_en: We have been using this dishwasher for several weeks. Hassle-free connection and configuration. A big plus is the cutlery drawer. Definitely a better solution than a basket. Automatic opening after washing is also a plus. The dishes are clean and free of stains. Another plus is the screen showing the time until the end of the program while working. The child lock works as it should and the child will not move anything.    The dishwasher does what it was designed to do well and quietly.    I recommend.

1172708734.text_en: Installation and commissioning are very simple and customer-friendly. Operation is easy to use and the programs are self-explanatory. Easy to implement thanks to the good operating instructions. The function of some washing programs with automatic door opening for better drying is simply excellent. We would definitely buy again. The color with the brushed metal is something very special and goes perfectly with our tiles and the kitchen.

1183113826.text_en: It looks aesthetically pleasing. At first I thought it was small, that there was much less space than the previous one, but I already know that it will accommodate dishes after a large party. As for the implementation of the measure, I have no opinion at this point. Everything seems very delicate. When it comes to the application, it's a very nice thing.  As for the operating volume, it is quiet and can also be adjusted. Overall, I'm happy at the moment

1222001149.text_en: So far, I am extremely satisfied with the Bosch SMS4EMC06E dishwasher. I wanted a classic sixties and the matte black stainless steel finish looks really good in the kitchen. I also appreciate that fingerprints are not so visible on the surface. The processing of the metal surface at Bosch is unrivaled!    A big advantage for me is the automatic opening of the door after the end of the program. Thanks to this, the dishes dry well and I don't have to deal with drips or wipe them again. The interior arrangement is also practical. What I especially appreciate is the separate drawer for cutlery right at the top of the dishwasher, so that I can also fit larger pots or plates underneath and no cutlery basket gets in the way.    The dishwasher is pleasantly quiet, washes really well, even for short programs. You can see that Bosch is committed to quality and I wouldn't go to another brand. Overall, I'm very happy with the purchase and have yet to find anything to fault.

1176741754.text_en: Wash flawlessly! I really like the cutlery drawer, you can definitely see the difference, unlike the cutlery basket, where I always found 1-2 dirty cutlery. I also like the middle shelf, because I can always adjust its height, depending on which pots I have placed below. The application helps me a lot, because I always have dishes that I can't wash with the preset programs. It is clearly a very good investment!

1207436709.text_en: I must admit that the Bosch SMS4EMC06E dishwasher exceeded my expectations. When you replace your washing equipment every decade or so, which was my case, you can see how technology moves forward. First of all, Bosch looks solid and modern, and at the same time is extremely functional thanks to three loading levels - the entire sink of dirty dishes fit easily and there was still space. A big advantage is the automatic door opening system after the washing cycle, which ensures perfect drying. I really like the ability to control the dishwasher via the Home Connect app. All information about the dishwasher at hand: washing time, the ability to turn the program on, off or shorten, new programs to download and much more - the only thing missing is a live preview of the dishwashing session 😉 I recommend it without a doubt

1206213636.text_en: I'm adding a review right after the purchase, but I can already say that compared to my previous dishwasher (of a different brand), this one works exceptionally quietly - and that's the biggest plus for me. Operating the control panel and controlling the dishwasher with the application is very simple and clear. The dishwasher has a number of different programs that are sufficient for me to use it.
