1160787686.text_en: I recommend it, it's a great color, it was supposed to be like that

1148126436.text_en: I highly recommend it with all my heart

1157341978.text_en: It is my first dishwasher. I was thinking about buying one for a long time, and I decided to buy the Bosch brand, since I have many Bosh appliances at home. And none of them have ever failed me. I am super happy with this dishwasher. I like that it is quiet, since I put it on at night and I can't hear anything. Loading is very comfortable, and the third tray is a success, it is much more comfortable than with the basket. I am surprised how the dishes come out, super clean and dry and shine like new. I am very satisfied with the purchase, I highly recommend it.

1152674804.text_en: It had the first AAA+ stainless steel integrated dishwasher model that BOSCH launched on the market. Purchased in 2002 for €1,200. Large family with intensive daily use of two dishwashers a day for almost 22 years. A true champion that was still working. I was looking to change the baskets that were deteriorated from so much use and it was incredible that BOSH after so many years has all the spare parts, even the smallest screw on my old dishwasher. It has been difficult for me to get rid of the old one because of all my appliances it was by far the best and they are all high-end from top brands. I had no doubt that I would buy another BOSH again for quality, efficiency, technology, easy and intuitive handling and, above all, for its fantastic technical service and if any part deteriorates over time, I will have no problem being able to replace it. If with the old one without any breakdown in 22 years, I was satisfied with the new one even more. To highlight the cutlery tray, it is fantastic. Before with the basket I lacked space and now I have plenty of space. As for programs, it has 3 more than the previous one: machine cleaning, ECO, Silence 50. Also 3 more functionalities than the previous one that are wonderful: automatic door opening, half load and SpeedPerfect+. If the old one was silent, this model is super silent, it even makes you doubt if it is working because there are washing sections where you cannot hear absolutely anything. Finally, the Home Connect app, being able to configure the functions and program from your mobile is simple and adapts to current times.  I have been using it for 3 weeks and my dishes have been rejuvenated. Drying and shine a 10. In short, IT ONLY NEEDS TO TALK.

1157151786.text_en: It is my first dishwasher. I was thinking about buying a dishwasher for a long time. And I have decided to buy a Bosch brand since I already have many appliances at home. And none of them have ever failed me. I am also super happy with this dishwasher. It is very quiet, I always put it on at night and you don't hear anything. The loading is very comfortable, and the third tray is a success. I am surprised how the dishes come out, super clean and dry. And they shine like new. Super happy. I would highly recommend this dishwasher.

1179299835.title_en: Denotes quality and good finishes from the beginning
1179299835.text_en: I just received the device and the impression has been very pleasant from the first moment, the factory packaging seemed very good to me, fully safeguarding the product. To say that I come from a SIEMENS with a lot of time but high-end and this one has nothing to envy in terms of finishes and materials. It has many more programs and variables than the previous device had and allows multiple configurations to make the task easier. The perfect Wifi connectivity and the interior materials, which was very important to me, are really good. I think I have made a great purchase and I hope to enjoy it for a long time.

1179425758.text_en: The truth is that I placed the order on a Monday and on Wednesday at noon they were already delivering it to me. Very efficient and the carrier calls you beforehand to make sure you are home. The dishwasher looks great, just like in the photos, and now we hope that its use and performance will be great. For now, we've only run a test program to see if it worked well, but we haven't washed our dishes yet. I have other BOSCH appliances and it is usually a brand that does not fail, they are durable and problem-free. I hope it's the same this time.

1153110760.text_en: Dishwasher very easy to use, super quiet, the folding plate holders on the lower tray are really useful as they are divided and the one on the upper tray is a success. It is not a bit difficult to place the cutlery on the third tray, but without a doubt they wash much better. Half load also works very well. The mobile connection is very useful, especially for mistakes. I think it has been a great choice. To put it another way, I would point out that sometimes the plastic tapers are not completely dry.

1146131317.text_en: At first glance, it is a dishwasher that is easy to use, the aesthetics are perfect as it has everything well detailed, yes it is true that I would miss a little that the plate holders would all be foldable (to put a but, nothing important) the middle tray can be raised or lowered.... The connection to the mobile phone is very simple, which has left me perplexed. Otherwise I loved it, three trays... delicious, I couldn't ask for more. A very good choice.

1146330345.title_en: Very practical and easy to handle dishwasher.
1146330345.text_en: Very practical and manageable, I don't see much difference in price with the previous series 2 that I had, taking into account that it has a much more economical energy efficiency that will compensate for the expense in a short amount of time. It also has some functionalities that the other one didn't have, for example, it is automatic and chooses the programs depending on the dirt and it also has Wifi, etc.......at the moment I can't say anything against it. I would recommend it.

1185630397.text_en: Very quiet product and also fully controllable with a mobile application, it warns you when salt or rinse aid is missing and you can choose the most energy efficient schedule, you really can't even hear it, and the water consumption is very low, very very happy with the product.  The cutlery tray is semi-hidden at the top and helps save a lot of space

1153752036.title_en: We decided on a well-known brand
1153752036.text_en: We had another dishwasher from another brand that broke down and had been around for quite some time, so we decided to buy the series 4 dishwasher, since it fit us in price, energy rating and water consumption. It has been a success, the first wash we did was the New Year's Eve dinner and we couldn't be happier. We would recommend it without hesitation

1152343338.text_en: Delivery to the home was fast and everything was perfect. We haven't used it much yet, because we've had it for a few weeks, but for now we are very happy with the results. It is very quiet, has enough programs and is very practical and easy to use.

1180061633.text_en: We are very happy with our dishwasher, not only does it have a perfect design but it also leaves all the dishes impeccable. Thanks to the three trays, it has a lot of space and when it works it is very, very quiet! Perfect!!

1184369667.text_en: We have always used Bosch at home, since my parents, and the truth is that it has never failed us. Therefore, when changing the dishwasher, we trusted the brand again, and so far we are very happy with the choice.     The installation was very easy, in a short time we had it up and running. It is very intuitive to use, with clear and accessible programs, including hardness programming and rinse aid amount. The function of automatically opening the door at the end of the wash has been a success: it helps a lot to dry the dishes completely without having to open it yourself or wait for it to finish.    The results are very good, everything comes out clean and dry, even when there are more stuck-on remains. In that sense, no complaints.    I did want to comment on something that worries me a little, and that is the issue of the plastic where the menu is, the part of the marquee, which is a plastic painted like pearlescent. In our previous Bosch, that part ended up very stained over time, and there was no way to make it look like new, especially because many times you use the dishwasher with somewhat dirty hands when loading the dishes. I hope that in this model that is better resolved.    Otherwise, very good purchase. It works well, is comfortable to use and maintains the level of quality that I have always associated with Bosch.

1179001494.text_en: I purchased this dishwasher to replace my old dishwasher that was 27 years old. After studying all the available offers, I have decided on this brand that offers me total safety and quality, of which I already have more appliances and specifically for this model, which I found very quiet, the dishes come out very clean, very efficient, use with the app, easy to handle.   And I don't find any weak point.   I can definitely recommend it and an unbeatable value for money.

1182026371.title_en: We should have bought it sooner!
1182026371.text_en: We went from a regular one, from a recognized brand, but bought 10 years ago to this Bosch model. Nothing to see...Connectivity, all the information that is managed in the application; the plus drying that leaves plastic utensils perfect (for those of us who have little ones it is important), the energy efficiency (B), the control and alert of rinse aid or water hardness, etc. The truth is that for us it was a huge evolution. If you ask me to put a fault, perhaps the noise, but don't misunderstand. I think our previous device must have been pretty good at this, because the noise is similar. Being a SILENCE Plus model, I thought we were going to notice a change in this aspect as well. But I insist that perhaps I already had a good appliance in this regard and that is why I do not see a significant change.

1154238094.title_en: Incredible quality at a knockdown price
1154238094.text_en: I was very surprised by this Bosch brand dishwasher because of all its functions, and the best of all is that you can control it from your phone, which has a very intuitive and clear interface. There you can make it clean as and when you want, even indicating the energy consumption and the water consumed. The only drawback I have about the application is that it does not indicate the consumption in liters of water for each wash or the energy consumption. You can schedule the washes to be done at the lowest cost time, but if they indicated the kwh of energy expenditure per wash as well as the liters of water, it would be an application of ten.  For me the purchase has been very successful. The dishwasher leaves the dishes impeccable and Bosch's customer service is ten, always concerned about providing solutions to its customers.

1151442895.text_en: We bought the dishwasher through the website and everything has been perfect. Perfect home delivery since we were able to choose the day and time slot. We haven't used it many times yet but for now we are very happy with the result. Everything comes out clean and shiny.   It has enough programs to choose from and is quite quiet The cutlery tray is convenient to use

1184244122.title_en: A Great Dishwasher for the Family
1184244122.text_en: From what I have been able to try It is a very quiet dishwasher, which is surprising the first time It has a large capacity, even too much, it takes you a long time to fill it The third tray is a little more work to fill it, but then it is better to empty it Good intelligent functions such as notification to the mobile phone, various graphics, configuration from the application and even hour suggestions according to the price of electricity PVPC The automatic door opening is very comfortable and improves consumption Both water and electricity consumption are very successful My experience so far has been very satisfactory

1156878914.title_en: Silent, efficient and app for control
1156878914.text_en: We were struck by how quiet it is as well as how well everything looks after a short wash of 1 hour even when you have the device almost fully loaded.  Furthermore, with the app, which we are still testing its functionalities, we see that there is extra help that we did not initially have and that we had not been told about. In the photos you can see the icon for connecting to the home Wi-Fi.

1151111728.title_en: Very nice and very functional design
1151111728.text_en: Very pretty and looks great next to my Bosch oven. It has many functions and programs to adjust to the wash you need at home at any time. I love that you can adjust the hardness level of the water in your area and the level of brightness you want. It is my second dishwasher and both have been Bosch. The first one lasted me 23 years. I hope this one lasts just as long 😊

1151116537.text_en: Good quality/price ratio. The perfect delivery, without a but. The dishwasher is very quiet, the components look of good quality, the dishes come out clean and shiny even if they have embedded dirt. Without a doubt a good purchase.

1216566981.text_en: I am very pleased with the purchase of this dishwasher. Because I ordered it online, I saw it for the first time only after it was delivered to my home, but from the first use it made a very good impression on me. So far, I have used it several times and each time the dishes were perfectly clean, shiny and well dried.  The dishwasher offers a large selection of programs, so you can easily adjust the washing mode to your current needs. Another big plus is the quiet operation of the device and its very simple and intuitive operation. Everything works smoothly and flawlessly.  I definitely recommend this product to anyone looking for a solid, modern and easy-to-use dishwasher. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐😊 #opinionmotivated by promotion*

1150586750.text_en: So far the first contact is good in general.  A little confusing in terms of programming.  Restarting a program once it has started is a somewhat slow process.

1155331810.title_en: As soon as we saw it we loved it.
1155331810.text_en: It is very elegant and pretty. A very clear and intuitive screen, with all the necessary notices. Spectacular drying, with the automatic door opening system.

1155214814.text_en: It leaves dishes spotless and is very quiet. The cutlery tray is very useful. It has more capacity than the previous Bosch we had.

1153383682.title_en: Very happy with my new dishwasher
1153383682.text_en: I really like its aesthetics, the color. It is easy to handle. I have had another one from the same brand and it turned out very well.

1219141515.text_en: When our washing machine broke down, I immediately looked for Bosch models. We used it for years and were very satisfied. I wouldn't go for another brand, because Bosch has a very nice design and I also like the sufficient space. I have bad experiences with other brands that we have at work, I choose dishes from them still wet, poorly dried. The dishes from my new washing machine lick beautifully, they are perfectly dry. It can also hold a lot of dishes. I still have to familiarize myself with the application, but it definitely also offers "enhancers". I can only recommend Bosch, hopefully it will last for many years!

1161320208.text_en: increasingly happy. The fourth tray is great. and it's very, very quiet

1210475854.text_en: Excellent dishwasher, very good quality, quiet and efficient cleaning.

1154246849.text_en: Excellent dishwasher. The cutlery tray is very practical as it leaves free space on the lower tray. The mechanism to raise and lower the middle basket is very practical and easy to use, with the previous one it was an odyssey. Allows you to adapt the height in seconds. Very surprised by how quiet it is, at times it seems like it is not working. The control panel is very easy to use, the possibility of managing it through the app and configuring it there is another great success. In short, very happy with this product.

1158797685.text_en: To be completely honest, it is the best dishwasher I have ever had in my life! I know that there are some that have other special options, but within the price range in which this dishwasher is, I must say that it is the one that has the best quality/price.  The washing is perfect, it washes even the dirtiest utensils, even in its Eco mode, and its application is simply excellent, it allows you to configure what time the dishwasher will activate and configure all aspects of the washing, including knowing when to change the salt or perform maintenance!

1202144998.text_en: The Bosch SMS4EMI06E/41 dishwasher is the best choice in this price category. It is very quiet, washes thoroughly and dries dishes well. A big plus is the automatic door opening function at the end of the program and the cutlery drawer, which facilitates organization. I also appreciate the water and energy savings, which reduces operating costs (energy class B is optimal in my case). The whole thing looks solid and modern. The connections are slightly shorter than my previous dishwasher, so I had to make minor adjustments to the installation. Nevertheless, I am very satisfied with the purchase and I can recommend this model to others with a clear conscience.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1185651640.text_en: The Bosch washing machine, series 4- SMS4EMI06E, 60 cm, anti-fingerprint stainless steel, free-standing, is worth buying even for the most demanding customers, as I consider myself. By using the finish products (detergent capsules, clarifier, salt), I get the best results, program of 2.40 hours, 70 degrees, washes the pots very well, does not leave marks on the dishes. Also, the car is silent, it also has an application from which you can make various settings depending on the load in the car. The baskets are roomy even for larger pots and pans. The height of the upper basket can be adjusted up to 5 cm.  In conclusion, it is worth purchasing, even for the most demanding. I have it since October 2024 and I am very satisfied! I highly recommend the Bosch dishwasher!  Thank you Bosch!

1151507014.text_en: My experience with the Bosch dishwasher has been generally very positive. Its silent operation is ideal for not interrupting the atmosphere in the kitchen. Timeshift scheduling allows me to take advantage of lower electric rates, and in-app control adds convenience to my daily routine.    The automatic opening of the door when finished is a standout feature, ensuring that dishes are dried efficiently. The ease of handling makes its use intuitive and practical.    However, the only drawback is the display with an old red screen, which may be less aesthetically attractive. Despite this detail, I consider that the features and washing quality make the Bosch dishwasher an excellent choice for the home.

1150139533.text_en: The dishwasher has super fast programs, it doesn't make any noise and aesthetically it fits very well in our kitchen, and it is also efficient!!

1154553790.title_en: Very spacious and quiet. Cleans very well.
1154553790.text_en: The main thing: clean very well. But very good. It is also silent; It's not that you can't hear it, but it makes very little noise. It is easy to use, without complications, and comes with some super interesting functions (pre-washing, so you don't have to rinse the dishes with water, for example; or connection to your mobile phone, to turn it on remotely if you don't want to program it, useful with photovoltaic installations or hourly rates). Could be improved: make it a little faster.  But everything can't be done...

1212381560.title_en: Very satisfied, an efficient and clean dishwasher
1212381560.text_en: I watched the presentation video and it really helped me make my choice. I don't regret my purchase at all.  This Bosch dishwasher is very easy to use, it washes perfectly and leaves the dishes really shiny. The capacity of 14 place settings is ideal, everything fits without problem.  I am very happy with the result, the dishes come out clean and spotless with each wash. It is a very good quality product that I recommend without hesitation.

1215083589.text_en: There are several aspects that I want to highlight about this dishwasher.  The most important thing is how it leaves the glass glasses, after the washing cycle they come out shiny without drip marks, I think this aspect is what defines the unbeatable quality of the washes.  It's very quiet.  It is elegant something important when you place it outside the furniture.   It has a Wi-Fi connection and once you download the application you can schedule washes and check the status at all times.  I find it very interesting that you can dose your salt consumption at home washing depending on the strength of the water in the area, I think this is the reason why the dishes come out impeccable after each wash.  It is very spacious, it has capacity for 14 covers.   In short, we are very happy and we trust the Bosch brand to last us for many years.

1211812325.text_en: I bought this dishwasher to replace another Bosch Silence Plus. This model is even quieter, more efficient and leaves dishes sparkling clean. The format is very similar to the previous one (although it includes more functions) and it has been very easy for me to adapt. An additional function is the automatic opening at the end of the washing cycle, which is very useful on certain occasions. I would definitely recommend this dishwasher.

1153004031.text_en: There are people who wonder why spend so much money on a dishwasher when there are cheaper ones. Well, I come from a Siemens brand dishwasher, which as everyone knows, basically Siemens, Balay and Bosch are the same. My dishwasher has survived 12 years and two moves without a single breakdown in all that time. I have relatives who have had Bosch for more years than my Siemens and also without a single breakdown. So I'm looking for confidence in a good brand, and if I can get an energy class B at a very good price as I have gotten this one with different cumulative offers... well, what more can I ask for apart from the fact that, at least, it lasts as long as its predecessor.

1153991158.title_en: Good capacity, cleans very well, and quiet
1153991158.text_en: Luckily the countertop is removable, otherwise it wouldn't have fit us! We wash the pots and pans by hand and accumulate everything else to run the dishwasher once a day after dinner. Very quiet, no problem putting it on at night. We always set the ECO option (3:35h), which when finished opens the door automatically to ventilate and the next morning we pick up. In cases of rush, there is also a 1-hour express wash, with drying included. From time to time we also put in the extractor hood filters and it is surprisingly clean! We are happy with the purchase.

1128147282.text_en: This silent miracle of a washing machine came to our home with awe because having something that is not heard at all and works perfectly is like winning the lottery 😁 Considering that the neighbors at the beginning of the street can hear the vacuum cleaner, and we were not allowed to turn on the old washing machine before going to bed because no one would be able to fall asleep from it, buying a Bosch product for our household is the only and best choice for any subsequent appliances.   Thanks Bosch!

1181102662.text_en: We are super happy with our purchase! We've been using it for a week now and everything has been excellent. Delivery, replacement and installation were very quick and hassle-free. The dishwasher is very efficient and has all the programs we needed. Also, the third cutlery drawer, which I initially thought we wouldn't use, is wonderful. We definitely recommend it!

1149321637.text_en: After using a Bosch dishwasher for 20 years, I bought this one. It works very well, but I have one important observation - compared to the previous old one, it has a very limited number of programs. Additionally, the instructions were poorly written. I'm trying to correct the situation with programs downloaded via Home Connect. I'm trying because I haven't managed to run any yet (it can be downloaded, but then?). I also tried a factory reset. The photo shows page 39 of the user manual where the procedure is "described". I won't ask where the "YES" button is because...

1184759944.text_en: My first time having a good dishwasher and I have always told friends that they have had a dishwasher for a lifetime and they have always told me from their own experiences that the BOSCH brand is the best for dishwashers and now having the dishwasher for almost a month I have asked myself why I have not bought the one before, it is better than the Play, it saves me a lot of time

1149949233.text_en: I had a dishwasher from this brand that lasted me 20 years, so taking into account the quality, I have repeated it and the experience so far has been very good, the third tray for the cutlery allows the pots and pans to fit better, so I get much more use out of each wash, in addition the dishes come out very clean and shiny, it has been a good choice!!

1182862161.text_en: Our current machine, another Bosch SMS58N88EU/44, has given us a completely satisfactory result, 10 years of daily use and sometimes several times without any notable mishap, has made us purchase this model for our daughter and her new home. We hope you get the same result as us and are a faithful user of Bosch products.

1203579404.text_en: The dishwasher works quietly and washes dishes cleanly. After the program ends, the dishes are dry, you can choose different programs, so you can save on energy consumption and water consumption. Aesthetic appearance, fits into the kitchen interior. The cutlery drawer is very convenient. I recommend this model of reversing machine to all buyers.

1207299897.title_en: Dishwasher with beautiful and functional design
1207299897.text_en: I recently purchased a Bosch dishwasher and couldn't be more pleased. From the first use you can see the quality of the brand: it is extremely quiet, thoroughly cleans even the dirtiest dishes and leaves the glasses spotless and streak-free. In addition, its design is modern and integrates perfectly into the kitchen.    I loved how efficient it is in terms of water and energy consumption, something that translates into long-term savings. The programs are clear, easy to use and adapt to any need, from quick washes to intensive cycles.    In short, a totally recommended purchase. If you are looking for a reliable, quiet dishwasher with excellent results, Bosch is a safe bet.

1209218191.text_en: Great product. I bought the dishwasher because of its quality, durability and economy. My previous one (from the same company) served me for 15 years without any failure, which proves the quality.  I recommend the dishwasher, it is easy to use and has all the necessary functions. Perfect for a family and also for seniors due to its simple operation.

1155164494.title_en: We were impressed by the great capacity
1155164494.text_en: Having three trays is a great help. Thanks to the cutlery tray we have the opportunity to not put the dishwasher on so many times a week. Furthermore, the fact of being able to control the appliance with the application helps us optimize time. The wide variety of washing programs is an incentive.

1216238963.text_en: Recently received dishwasher and the first impression is very positive. The excellent quality of the materials and finishes stands out, both outside and inside. Everything feels robust, well assembled and with a feeling of durability. It clearly conveys being a premium product even before using it.

1181359017.title_en: Very good product and consumes little electricity.
1181359017.text_en: Managing the shipment was very easy and within a week they called us to schedule the delivery. It went very well, they arrived at the agreed time and arrived in perfect condition in their original packaging. It has been a great purchase, it spends little, it has the top tray for cutlery and everything comes out impeccable.

1171925921.text_en: I just installed the new dishwasher at home and what a change. My previous model was also Bosch, but after 12 years the baskets had rusted and it was not worth changing them.  Not only is this model super quiet, which is a relief, but the automatic program adjusts everything without you having to worry. In addition, the Home Connect function allows you to control it from your mobile phone, something that seemed unnecessary to me at first, but in a couple of days I have gotten used to using it. Plates and glasses come out shiny even with eco mode. But what we like most at home is the upper cutlery drawer, practical and efficient. Very happy with the purchase. 👌 #Dishwasher #Bosch #LikeABosch

1157152337.text_en: Excellent level of finish, I really like being able to connect it to the network and put it on from wherever and whenever I want. It is very good to be able to download additional programs. Very little noise and very good cleaning and drying quality. Very energy efficient

1157610319.text_en: It is a wonderful appliance, its low noise level has surprised me, its drying provides optimal results for the dishes, it is controlled with an app and you can defer the washing to times when energy prices are lower. I don't put any buts to it.

1152883483.text_en: I really like to cook, but scrubbing? Not so much. I was tired of wasting time or having to scrub and now with the dishwasher I don't have to do that anymore. One of the best purchases I have made for the house, I configure it with my mobile and that's it.

1183215164.text_en: What I like the most is how it works, it dries great and it has an internet connection which makes my life easier. What I like the least is that it has some plastic finishes. I recommend it for its excellent functioning.

1207278242.text_en: #opinionmotivatedbypromotion This dishwasher really positively surprised me. It works very quietly, so you can use it even in the evening without disturbing household members. It has many practical programs - from short, when you need to wash the dishes quickly, to intensive, which can cope even with burnt pots. The baskets are well designed, easy to adjust and you can comfortably accommodate larger dishes. After the cycle, the plates and glasses are perfectly clean and well-dried, without streaks or stains. Additionally, the equipment is energy-saving, so bills do not increase. This is a really solid, reliable dishwasher that is worth having at home.

1207277530.text_en: #opinionmotivatedbypromotion This dishwasher really positively surprised me. It works very quietly, so you can use it even in the evening without disturbing household members. It has many practical programs - from short, when you need to wash the dishes quickly, to intensive, which can cope even with burnt pots. The baskets are well designed, easy to adjust and you can comfortably accommodate larger dishes. After the cycle, the plates and glasses are perfectly clean and well-dried, without streaks or stains. Additionally, the equipment is energy-saving, so bills do not increase. This is a really solid, reliable dishwasher that is worth having at home.

1207276920.text_en: This dishwasher really positively surprised me. It works very quietly, so you can use it even in the evening without disturbing household members. It has many practical programs - from short, when you need to wash the dishes quickly, to intensive, which can cope even with burnt pots. The baskets are well designed, easy to adjust and you can comfortably accommodate larger dishes. After the cycle, the plates and glasses are perfectly clean and well-dried, without streaks or stains. Additionally, the equipment is energy-saving, so bills do not increase. This is a really solid, reliable dishwasher that is worth having at home. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1213964658.text_en: Fantastic dishwasher! I chose the model with the upper tray for cutlery, more capacity than the basket I had in the previous one. Wash and dry perfectly. You can program it through the app, very practical!

1206370296.text_en: I bought and have been using the dishwasher for over a week and I am very pleased with it. It is quiet and the automatic door opening function at the end of the program is very useful. The fact that it turns off itself after the program is finished is a very useful function. I have the impression that with the same dimensions, it can fit more dishes than the previous dishwasher. The downside is the lack of a short program, which is useful when there are a large number of guests. Before that I had a 40 min program. and it was the optimal time, here it lasts 1.05 hours.  Overall, I am very pleased with my purchase and I recommend this dishwasher.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1155296909.text_en: It has not disappointed me, after other Bosch appliances. Very spacious interior for all types of dishes and accessories, it has a half load which is what I needed. Aesthetically elegant. Very quiet.

1151731925.text_en: Very happy with the purchase, the third tray is ideal and the performance of the dishwasher is magnificent, it is already the second one we have and all the appliances at home are from this brand and they have never let us down.

1149756725.text_en: It is the second Bosch dishwasher and it has once again been a success as the first one that served for almost 15 years.     We love this model's discreet but modern stainless steel design and it combines very well with the black row of buttons.    It has all the programs that Bosch offers but this one also has half load, silence, extra dry for a more than optimal dryer, Speed ​​Perfect, etc.     You can set your favorite program as a favorite and what we think is a step further for care is the dishwasher maintenance program.     Another factor because this model is due to the low water consumption it has (9.5L in the eco program) and also due to the C energy rating. A good rating for the price of this dishwasher.     Besides, the dishwasher also has technology. Yes, Home Connect and you control the dishwasher from your mobile and make updates, etc.     Two points he wants to highlight. One is that it has a disqualifier to program the water hardness and the Bosch lifetime water stop.     Come on, a buy 10 is already released!

1155449439.text_en: Very happy with the purchase of this dishwasher model... excellent quality/price and super quiet. Great variety of programs and being able to use it through Home Connect is much more practical and comfortable.

1146796351.text_en: Delighted with the new dishwasher that with the app lets me choose the most economical time of the day to activate it and eco-dry.  Many options, but I love being able to manage from an app

1157276050.text_en: Very nice exterior, I just turned it on and I can't hear any noise. Super quiet, with enough programs and the half load as I need, also very energy efficient

1157679446.text_en: Very quiet, more capacity. Great invention: the cutlery tray, also the folding racks to place pots in place of the plates. Very happy with the purchase.

1155451540.text_en: Very happy with the purchase, excellent quality/price, super quiet and very practical to be able to use it through Home Connect. Great variety of programs. Highly recommended.

1185004352.text_en: Delighted with the purchase, Bosch is a trusted brand, the dishwasher is very quiet, a success to be able to configure your favorite programs.  I hope it lasts for many years

1149407488.text_en: As always, Bosch does not disappoint, a beautiful, silent product and most importantly, it leaves the dishes perfect with a wide variety of programs.

1146796395.text_en: Careful design, many programs, 3 trays, and the best thing is to be able to be efficient and reduce costs thanks to being able to manage from the app, delighted

1148841778.text_en: This is my second dishwasher from this company, the first one retired after over 15 years of use. A few days after the purchase, I can say that I was not disappointed with my choice. The dishwasher can hold a lot of dishes, it is quiet, it removes even heavy dirt well, it has many programs to choose from, and the Home Connect application helps us choose the optimal one. Thanks to the third cutlery drawer, we have more space in the lower basket. Modern look, easy to use. I recommend it to anyone who is considering choosing a future dishwasher. So far, it works for us at 5.

1152651538.text_en: We have just tested it, it is very quiet and has a lot of capacity. It's easy to put things inside and it handles great.

1209485286.text_en: Modern line and it leaves everything very clean, I like everything in general. I recommend this product and it is also very quiet.

1215443966.text_en: He does what he has to do.  We come from a superior model, Siemens IQ500, and we liked the way the dishes came out better.

1157753221.text_en: Highly recommended dishwasher thanks to the countless programs, remote control from the mobile phone and very quiet

1157138692.text_en: The dishwasher has met all my expectations. The cleanliness is impeccable and highlights how quiet it is.

1180081828.text_en: Very good service, quiet and a great finish of the dishes, it has been an excellent purchase so far

1212273012.text_en: Super efficient and quiet. A turning point for family dynamics. Highly recommended.

1205792122.title_en: Strange noise when opening it, it doesn't open on its own
1205792122.text_en: After a short time it started to make a strange noise when opening it and on many occasions, even though I press the key to make it open, only when finished, the door does not open. You can see that if you release the lock for the door, it does not go back.  I called the technical service and the first thing they told me was that if it wasn't a factory defect I would have to pay for it all myself and the second thing was that if I wanted to take out separate insurance with them, I asked how I knew if it was a factory defect and they told me that they didn't know until the technician would see it. This dishwasher was to replace one that has lasted 27 years. I will not buy anything from Bosch again. Very bad experience.

1161121867.title_en: A few words about the dishwasher
1161121867.text_en: My decision to buy a Bosch dishwasher was not accidental, the previous dishwasher served us without failure for a very long time, maybe over 10 years, I don't remember exactly and it was worn out (two washes a day), so we decided that the next device would be from the same company. I can't say much about the new one yet, the positive changes include, for example, better use of space because instead of a cutlery basket there is a drawer, which makes it more spacious, and a few new programs that the old dishwasher did not have. EfficientDry, i.e. drying, is certainly an interesting function. Overall, I am a satisfied customer with Bosch devices and that is why I keep coming back.

1215446106.text_en: He does what he has to do.  Online downloading of non-preinstalled programs is very positive.

1149552715.text_en: It is a very good device, I have improved what an Edesa had, I recommend it to any user

1208841646.title_en: Very efficient and with many features
1208841646.text_en: It is a very complete dishwasher, its price and the fact that the door opens automatically stood out.

1214857732.title_en: I have a very good experience with the Bosch brand.
1214857732.text_en: It is very good and it has 3 trays. I like it because it has a lot of space. I highly recommend it.

1152946600.text_en: The dishwasher is just as I expected, very comfortable and easy to use. I would recommend it for sure

1182850255.text_en: Nice dishwasher. We hope it lasts. The old one lasted us 12 years. Also stamp BOSCH.

1155685360.text_en: Delighted with the dishwasher, it is very practical, large capacity and very easy to use.

1217535273.title_en: WE LOVED IT, IT'S WONDERFUL, THE BEST QUALITY
1217535273.text_en: IT IS THE BEST OPTION ON THE MARKET, FIRST BRAND WITH THE BEST PRICE AND HIGH QUALITY.

1180877079.text_en: Good quality, very quiet. And modern design. Very happy with the purchase

1154022457.text_en: Very easy to program. It's very quiet. Very happy with the results

1157692115.text_en: It is very quiet, leaves everything very clean and very easy to handle.

1215502174.text_en: Excellent idea of ​​downloadable programs. Large capacity

1154023221.text_en: A good appliance, quiet and easy to use.

1153065850.text_en: Easy to handle, super quiet. We are delighted

1157937803.text_en: It works perfectly, is quiet and dries well.

1179303769.text_en: Very good service and looks very good dishwasher

1152130557.text_en: Everything Perfect.  Very quiet Easy handling

1182448852.text_en: Everything is fine, they have brought it in perfect condition

1157443463.text_en: Very good machine, quiet and efficient

1180681798.text_en: Very happy with the purchase. It's going very well!

1208728120.text_en: It is my first major Bosch appliance and the truth is that although it is the first few days, the experience is very good. It looks like a quality appliance in its finishes and so on. It is true that the final quality of the equipment will be determined by time and its durability, but for the moment the experience is good.  I really liked the fact that I was able to monitor the status from my mobile phone, as well as interact with it remotely and program its operation remotely, as well as being able to download extra programs from the App. In conclusion, very happy for the moment.

1171585451.text_en: It is a very quiet dishwasher,

1217889566.text_en: Very spacious baskets, super drawer for cutlery, middle basket adjustable in height, which greatly increases the variability of storing dishes. The dishwasher is very easy to operate. Plenty of programs that can be shortened. We use the hourly program the most. The dishes are always perfectly washed, they dry well. It is possible to set the door opening after the end of the program. And above all, the door can be left ajar just a small crack - and it holds, which was not possible with the older model. All-stainless steel bathtub. She is really quiet. Nice design. I also appreciate the button control with backlight. We use the dishwasher daily and it is the second model purchased from BOSCH after many years. I can only recommend.

1166644920.text_en: It is a fairly easy-to-use dishwasher, with a wide variety of trays. At first the change to using the upper cutlery tray is a bit tedious (in the old models it is faster to leave all the cutlery on the tray) but they come out cleaner and not so wet. Removing the cutlery tray helps the plates have more space and do not collide with each other. Very useful when having to wash a large amount of dishes and cutlery at the same time.   If I have more things in the future I will comment.

1219383812.title_en: I thought I wouldn't find anything as great as the previous one
1219383812.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion. My purchase is not accidental, my previous dishwasher looked exactly the same, both inside and out. And since the previous one had served me for 13 years, I didn't think twice about it. In particular, I like the appearance, types of washing programs and energy efficiency - it is only class B, but it consumes only 9 liters per cycle and is similarly characterized by lower energy consumption. As you can see in the photo, the dishwasher is free-standing, but it can be built in without any problems.

1218242326.text_en: The dishwasher is completely easy to operate, it met my expectations, it is quiet and also has a quick hourly program. It is very intuitive to use. I appreciate the program that it opens itself at the end of the wash. It is connected to the application on the phone, I also appreciate the delayed start. There is another nozzle above the cutlery drawer, so the cutlery is really washed. The tablet in the washing program does not go to the bottom of the dishwasher, it jumps into the basket, from which it gradually dissolves. At the end of the program, the display turns off automatically. I am very satisfied with the quality, appearance and price.

1151790372.text_en: My purchasing experience has been extremely positive. The purchasing process was quick and easy, delivery was on time, and the staff not only installed the dishwasher, but also provided detailed explanations of the most common functions. Plus, it was easy to delve into the settings, especially considering the hardness of the water in the Balearic Islands.  Despite the good experience, one of the aspects that I am still perfecting is the exact point of the rinse aid. Overall, I would definitely recommend this dishwasher.

1207792747.text_en: I liked the delivery and start-up process, where in addition to carrying out some quick tests, they taught me the basic operation of the dishwasher (various programs, shorten duration, stop program in progress, raising and lowering trays).    As for the dishwasher, in addition to the anti-fingerprint steel exterior design to facilitate cleaning, I liked that it is efficient in terms of electricity and water consumption and very quiet, so it can be put on at night because you barely notice that it is in operation.

1211014005.title_en: It's not just a dishwasher, it's real convenience
1211014005.text_en: It's a dishwasher that washes like a movie and doesn't make any noise, but what I like most is that it opens the door only when it's finished and that way the tupperware doesn't come out soaked. The third tray from above is a total success because you gain a lot of space below for the pots, although the Eco program takes forever if you are in a hurry. The only drawback is that the interior base is made of plastic and not steel, but given how well it cleans and how little it uses, it more than makes up for it. Also, having it notify you on your cell phone when it's over is a great way to avoid being on the lookout.

1201936767.text_en: I rate the Bosch Series 4 dishwasher very highly for its washing efficiency, quiet operation and good price-quality ratio.  The main advantages are: Washing efficiency: It copes well with various types of dirt.  ​Quiet operation: with the Silence Plus function it is very discreet, ideal for open kitchens.  Functionality: it has a third drawer for cutlery and adjustable baskets, which makes loading easier.  ​Drying: My model has an automatic door opening function after the cycle, which significantly improves drying.  ​Additional functions: equipped with Home Connect (control via app) and AquaStop (flood protection).  ​In general, I recommend it as a solid and effective choice in the mid-price range. This is my second Bosch dishwasher and I was very pleased with the previous one.

1150888499.text_en: Today we used it for the first time and it has washed pots, plates, cutlery, glasses; everything excellent. The materials feel of quality and that you are looking at a good product. To improve, I think that the first synchronization with the APP was quite difficult. But once synchronized, I can activate the dishwasher through my phone and it notifies me when it is finished; you can also customize the washing programs and the app tells you how much water and energy that program will use, and shows you the times when it is most economical to run the dishwasher. The App is great and very easy to use.     It is a product that I would recommend. It is worth buying one like this one with energy class B.

1180593429.text_en: I really liked this new Bosch dishwasher. It is quiet and leaves dishes spotless. The difference with the previous one is remarkably good and I have recommended it to my daughter who has also bought the same one and I highly recommend it to everyone. The price-quality ratio is excellent.

1220076803.text_en: This is my first dishwasher in my life. The visually elegant, simple shape quickly fits into the kitchen landscape. Remote control from the application, fantastic! He selects the program, I have the situation under constant control, and the statistics are pleasing to the eye. The device itself is relatively quiet, although the sounds take some getting used to. 60 cm is the perfect width, it will fit everything from cups to pots and bowls. It works great, everything is perfectly washed, even the baking trays. Glasses and cutlery have never been so clean. Additionally, in my location it does not use much salt or rinse aid. I definitely recommend it, it is by far the best purchase for the kitchen for comfort and savings.

1208215013.text_en: I bought a Bosch dishwasher because I hope that I will finally not have to replace the device 5 minutes after the end of the warranty period. I like the ability to service and diagnose over the phone. It's nice that the bottom is metal and not plastic. I miss the light inside because it makes it easier to arrange the dishes. The dishwasher is quiet, but the sound of water does not bother me at all. It's nice that there are physical buttons and not a touch panel. It's nice that there is a dedicated self-cleaning program, but these preparations costing millions of coins are a bit of an exaggeration. Overall it does what it is supposed to do. It washes and dries, and also has a program for washing dishes for children.

1183510857.text_en: It is a very nice and spacious dishwasher.  Its third cutlery tray is very practical and comfortable.  It has a wide variety of programs, silent, intuitive and easy to use. In addition to being very convenient to be able to use it from a mobile phone, with it you can change the program, turn it on, turn it off, as well as having a program so that the door opens only for better drying.  For now I am very happy although I haven't been using it for long, I hope to continue like this in a few months.

1160303677.text_en: I have been using the dishwasher for almost a month. It was tested for the first time during the holidays, it was fully loaded and there was also an ovenproof dish with remnants of previous baking. The dishwasher washed everything very thoroughly, after the automatic opening of the dishwasher door, the dishes are already dry. I also tested a frying pan that had burnt fat on the edges that could not be washed by hand. After three washes in the dishwasher, no trace of fat remained on the pan. I am very pleased with the cutlery drawer because it has saved a lot of space for other dishes many times.

1206465212.text_en: I bought it, I'm satisfied, the dishes are shiny - when it comes to the dishwasher, it's only from BOSCH.   #opinionmotivated by promotion

1209375350.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion. A fantastic dishwasher that saved my life. A wonderful dishwasher, love at first sight. Looks brilliant. Quiet operation, sometimes I wonder if I wash the dishes at all. Short programs and, most importantly, the door opens after washing, so you can take out dry clothes immediately. It washes beautifully without any streaks or stains. Clean and beautiful dipping. It was a bull's-eye.  I won't give my dishwasher to anyone anymore

1150906174.text_en: After using the dishwasher for several days I have to say that I am delighted with it. It is very spacious, the washing and drying are very good. It has several programs that I have yet to use, I think it can be turned on by application so that's wonderful. By the way, it barely makes any noise, it's very quiet. It didn't take long to bring it, a few days and the start-up service was very good, with very professional guys. I would repeat with this brand without a doubt.

1152156649.text_en: I am very happy with my new dishwasher. It is ultra quiet and very beautiful. The economic program cleans perfectly and with great energy and water savings. It is very important to know the hardness of the water in our area and enter it into the dishwasher settings. In my case it is very soft water and it is not necessary to add salt. What you do have to use is rinse aid, even if we use All-in-One tablets because otherwise the program lasts longer, with the consequent consumption of additional energy.  The purchasing process was excellent and very well assisted by phone if needed.  The perfect installation: punctual, efficient and they took away the previous one. All this at no cost.  And the price is very good when taking advantage of a Bosch promotion.  I will repeat without hesitation. My mother's dishwasher broke and I'm going to place the order right now.

1149048424.text_en: After a month of use, when I use the 1 Hour program at 65 degrees, in general it does not dry, you have to do it by hand. Here I use Finish All in 1 Max Power Gel dishwashing liquid, some dishes are stained, I have to go over them by hand.  In the ECO program I use Finish Powerball Power All in 1 Tablets, in this case if they come out dry, but some dishes are still stained, I still don't know why I would like someone knowledgeable to explain it to me.

1150867928.text_en: At first glance it is a good dishwasher and of good quality. Good finish, although it arrived with a dent on the side of the door, and for what it costs, it bothers me a lot. It also came wet inside, but the carrier said it was because they test them first.  I don't know if it is Bosch's policy, but I think that the devices should be unwrapped at the customer's house to avoid knocks (I don't know where the knock occurred).

1179177060.text_en: We bought it encouraged by other Bosch brand products that we already had at home, they have always worked very well for us, and we were encouraged this time with the dishwasher, aesthetically it is very beautiful, it was very easy to install, and we were surprised by how quiet it is, the programs are very intuitive and therefore easy to use, the results after cleaning the dishes were very good, without a doubt a very successful purchase and totally recommended.

1184356016.text_en: After 17 years of using a Bosch dishwasher, it was time for new equipment. After using the previous one for so many years, I couldn't buy a dishwasher other than Bosch. The new equipment is in no way inferior to its predecessor, surpassing it with various amenities and novelties. It is very quiet and saves water and electricity. It has an easily adjustable upper basket and an additional cutlery drawer. The icing on the cake is WiFi connectivity and remote smartphone control.  "The Bosch dishwasher has an adjustable basket. Elegant appearance and strong construction, you bought it - you must have a good head on your shoulders. Only advantages and savings, you gain time for your guests. It is worth buying all Bosch appliances to have great profits in your wallet"

1219546350.text_en: The dishwasher positively surprised me and exceeded my expectations. I didn't expect such a good product at such an affordable price.   The most important advantages include: - dry dishes after washing, - quiet operation, - energy and water efficiency, - tablet dispensing assistant, - quick (time-saving) washing function.   I am extremely satisfied and I can recommend the dishwasher with a clear conscience.

1147118508.text_en: The dishwasher has an elegant aesthetic without extravagance, the panel includes everything you need in a dishwasher, which is not much, and its use is very simple (although everything is explained phenomenally in the instruction manual). It is quite quiet and cleaning with the ECO program is excellent, sufficient for everyday use with minimal water and light consumption (according to Bosch's own instructions). It comes with an aquastop system, which I think is an important detail, and it connects to the home Wi-Fi to control it from your cell phone. In addition, it also has the option of opening the door automatically when finished, so that drying is more natural and effective. Very happy with the purchase.

1153679952.text_en: After my first use - Eco program 50 degrees. I have been happy. The home connect app is a joy. You can follow the washing process at all times, put child safety, program, etc. What I liked the least is the quality of the metal slides. I see them very basic. Drying is also a little fair and could be better but my overall rating is positive because this dishwasher washes well.

1219169958.text_en: The dishwasher operates very quietly and has automatic door opening after the program ends. Another advantage is the spacious baskets and the possibility of control via the Home Connect application. Additionally, the dishwasher looks very modern thanks to the steel anti-fingerprint finish. I definitely recommend this model to people looking for an economical, functional and solid dishwasher for everyday use. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1172765122.text_en: The automatic opening of the door has only worked well a couple of times, you activated the option and at the end of the program it opened visibly, about 10cm, enough for the steam to escape. Now I have done several washes and if you activate this function, the door barely separates from the frame by a few millimeters, not enough for the steam to escape and the dishes to dry. Let's see how the after-sales service responds.

1155383486.title_en: Quiet, spacious and cleans very well
1155383486.text_en: Above all, clean well. Comply with being silent; Obviously, it makes some noise but it is very little. Consumes approximately 1 kWh per program. It has several extra functions, but they are very specific and perhaps not for everyone (mobile control, pre-wash). The only "but" would be that it takes a long time in the normal program (2:20), but everything is not possible: either it cleans well or it goes fast and consumes much more.

1155385727.text_en: As promised, it is silent. It's not that you can't hear it, but it makes little noise. It also cleans very well, and has plenty of capacity. The extra functions are good for us, but I understand that they are specific things (connection with the mobile phone, pre-wash, etc.). The only con is that it is not very fast, but everything cannot be done: washing well and quickly is incompatible. Consumes approximately 1 kWh per program.

1184147995.text_en: It is the first dishwasher I have with a cutlery tray and what I notice is that the tray immediately below this one fits shorter things even by adjusting its height (but I suppose that is normal in appliances of this type). What I don't like is that if you select automated door opening for drying, the program is much longer. I don't love it.

1184674838.text_en: We couldn't be happier, so far it has exceeded all our expectations, the programs used have left all the utensils that we have put in the dishwasher very clean and shiny. The ECO program is recommended not only for its energy savings, but also if you want to leave it at night, since it does not produce any noise. Furthermore, its quality-price ratio is excellent.

1203297422.text_en: I am very pleased with this dishwasher! 🧡 It works great, has a high energy efficiency class, so it uses little electricity and water. A big advantage is the removable top, so it can be easily adapted to the kitchen, even though it is not a built-in model. Additionally, the dishwasher application is really great - intuitive and convenient to use. I definitely recommend it.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1219653805.text_en: The Bosch Serie 4 SMS4EMI06E dishwasher works very well in everyday use. It is quiet, spacious and washes dishes thoroughly even when fully loaded. A big advantage is also its modern appearance and easy operation. After washing, the dishes are clean and well dried, which is very convenient. This is solid and functional equipment that is definitely worth recommending. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1156137758.text_en: Top Bosch product. It has a lot of capacity and good energy efficiency for its price. I find the cutlery tray very practical. In addition, it includes the option of linking the dishwasher to your mobile phone, which tells you the washes you have done, the capsules you have left and when the program ends, among others. I am super happy with this purchase!

1209651945.title_en: A super easy and elegant freestanding dishwasher
1209651945.text_en: I bought a BOSCH dishwasher, model SMS4EMI06E, a month ago. I am very satisfied, everything is as described. I use it every day, it is very easy to use, it works quietly, and the dishes are well washed and dried. The upper, third drawer for cutlery is a revelation, because you can put a lot in and each fork or knife is arranged separately, after washing it is perfectly clean, and unlike in the previous dishwasher, I had cutlery stuffed into the basket and washed differently. Adjustable shelves allow you to wash larger pots or e.g. tall jars. Moreover, folding the spikes is very convenient and practical, any vessel can be placed stably. Programs to choose from and many additional functions. You can also shorten the washing process by turning on SpeedPerfect+ - both this one-hour program and the eco program work great for me. I often set it for the night and nothing bothers me, and in the morning I have clean dishes. Remote control also works great.  I think this is the best purchase.

1152247851.text_en: It is a very complete dishwasher, it has all the programs that are most frequently used and is very easy to use. It is very practical that when the wash is finished the door opens by itself for better drying. It can also be programmed with your cell phone.   The quality-price ratio is very good and as for the installation and removal service of the old one, everything is perfect.

1154419472.text_en: I just had the BOSCH Series 4 dishwasher, SMS4EMI06E, installed and it is wonderful how it works, saving water and electricity, as well as being very quiet.  Once connected to the mobile, the configuration possibilities are to the consumer's liking.  We have chosen it in Steel color, to match the rest of the BOSCH appliances in the kitchen.

1147117648.title_en: He fulfills his mission with flying colors
1147117648.text_en: A dishwasher that washes perfectly with very good details such as the possibility of varying the height of the central tray or the automatic door opening for drying. It is worth highlighting the connectivity for control with the phone. The process is very simple and the application is wonderful, you have control of everything, it is quite intuitive and it even tells you, updated daily, the price of energy to be able to schedule the wash during off-peak hours. If the durability and reliability prove good over time, it can be said that it is a highly recommended dishwasher.

1184393456.text_en: After 10 years with my old Bosch dishwasher, it was time to renew, let alone after so many years, go back to the same brand. It looks like a great appliance, good materials, good silent washing programs, connectivity... I completely trust this brand (little by little all my kitchen appliances are Bosch).

1156564523.text_en: I am delighted with this Bosch dishwasher, its third tray makes it very easy to place the cutlery, they are distributed to their full size and I can place several and different sizes.  Another point to highlight is its low consumption, this was one of the characteristics that made MKE decide on it.  I highly recommend it.

1183812293.text_en: We needed a dishwasher, as we already have a Bosch brand dryer and refrigerator and it has given such good results and so far no problems, we did not hesitate to buy it from this brand as well.     The design is beautiful, we chose steel, robust materials, simplicity when adding washing products and salt, ease of cleaning the filters.    And it's a plus that you can manage it from the application, plus it tells you which are the most economical hours to start them, and since it's so quiet, you can start washing at night whatever time it is.

1221164286.text_en: We were very pleased with the dishwasher. Lots of space for dishes and cutlery. The advantage is a separate drawer for them. The great thing is that after the program is finished, the door opens automatically. The application is also very useful, in which we can find even more programs and see when the program ends, we can start the dishwasher remotely or we have information when salt and rinse aid are low. The dishwasher runs quietly on its own, but there is also a program that makes it even quieter. I can honestly recommend it, we have nothing to complain about

1181146765.text_en: Machine that we bought to replace another Bosch that had been with us for 25 years.  German from head to toe, robust, elegant, intuitive and very easy to understand buttoning.  Great features and very respectful of the environment.  Very quiet, it would greatly save energy and water.  A GREAT MACHINE, like all those presented by Bosch.

1220419704.text_en: I am very satisfied with the dishwasher. It washes perfectly, the dishes are beautifully clean and dry even with a shorter program. I appreciate the quiet operation and simple control. Saving water and energy is also a big advantage. The dishwasher has enough space even for larger pots and everything fits well into it. After a few months of use, it works without any problems. I definitely recommend it.

1217339145.text_en: I bought this dishwasher convinced that I was going to like it a lot and the truth is that I was surprised by how quiet it is and how clean and dry it leaves the dishes. In addition, it has a very beautiful and simple line. Of note is the cutlery tray, which allows you to optimize space in the best possible way. 100% recommended

1213620945.title_en: Excellent cleaning and very practical with Home Connect
1213620945.text_en: We have purchased this Bosch Series 4 dishwasher and we are delighted with the result. What has impressed us most is the quality of the wash: even with the most difficult dirt, everything comes out impeccable.    A very positive point is the EfficientDry function. That the door opens automatically at the end of the cycle helps a lot so that the dishes (even the plastic ones!) dry perfectly and can be stored directly. In addition, it is a very quiet appliance, something essential for our open kitchen.    Setup with the Home Connect app was very simple and it is really useful to receive notifications on your phone when it is finished or when you are running out of pills. Totally recommended!

1215462156.text_en: When we bought the Bosch SMS4EMI06E Dishwasher, we were impressed by the washing quality and overall performance right from the first use. This dishwasher can hold up to 14 sets of dishes, so it is also ideal for a larger family or frequent cooking.  What really surprised us is the quiet operation - only 42dB, so you can hardly hear the dishwasher even when it's running.  You will especially appreciate this in the evening or when you have an open living area next to the kitchen.  The control is intuitive, the programs are diverse (e.g. Eco, Auto, Intensive, Quiet program), and the plates, pots and glass are always perfectly clean after the end of the cycle. Drying is excellent thanks to the EfficientDry function, which automatically opens the door a little after the cycle is finished - that's a great trick!   The dishwasher also has smart functions such as Home Connect (control via the app), which makes its use even more convenient.  In addition, the basket system such as VarioFlex and the practical cutlery drawer (VarioDrawer) enable easy and flexible storage of dishes.   Both water and energy consumption are favorable, and thanks to the AquaStop overflow protection, you don't have to worry about any accidents.   Overall, I recommend the dishwasher – it's reliable, quiet, modern and will really ease everyday worries about dishes. ❤️

1216886759.text_en: This is another Bosch dishwasher in our family. I replaced the previous one only after 12 years of use, which speaks for itself in terms of durability. The guarantee of reliability and high quality of workmanship is confirmed. The device works very efficiently, the programs are well suited to various needs, and the washing results are really great.  This time I also made sure that the bottom was made of stainless steel. This is a big plus for me in terms of durability and hygiene.  I am very pleased with the purchase and I wholeheartedly recommend it to everyone!

1150524767.title_en: Very nice, modern and with a lot of capacity.
1150524767.text_en: I am very happy with the purchase: 1.- The dishwasher is beautiful, with a third cutlery tray that increases its capacity substantially.  2.- Modern and effective. It consumes very little with an Eco program that uses little water (9 liters) and energy (0.645 kWh/cycle) and 3:35 h (be careful that if you do not fill the rinse aid tank by relying on the all-in-1 tablets it lasts 1 hour longer).  3.- The Bosch service is impressive in speed, kindness, punctuality and professionalism. They installed everything perfectly and took the old one away. All included with a good price.

1131330742.text_en: A household appliance that you can't live without today.  But in contrast to the previous ones we used, the BOSCH series 4 dishwasher is a superior device that exceeds all requirements for washing dishes.   Simple and intuitive management, with a large number of washing options and combinations.  The functionality of the interior is excellent, the height adjustment of the middle basket and the partition for supporting dishes is great.  Even the most important dishes are perfectly clean no matter how they are placed in the basket, there are no food residues and everything shines after washing. The biggest advantage is opening the door after finishing washing, the dishes and glasses are so wonderfully dry and there is no need for additional wiping, which is a great advantage in dish hygiene.  Basically a device for every recommendation.

1203087202.text_en: Zdecydowałam się na zakup zmywarki marki Bosch, ponieważ mam już w domu kilka urządzeń tej firmy i wszystkie działają niezawodnie. Jestem bardzo zadowolona z wyboru. Zmywarka pracuje wyjątkowo cicho – często uruchamiam ją na noc i praktycznie jej nie słychać. Wnętrze jest dobrze zaprojektowane, a trzecia taca to rewelacyjne rozwiązanie – o wiele wygodniejsze niż tradycyjny koszyk na sztućce. Naczynia po myciu są perfekcyjnie czyste, suche i błyszczą jak nowe. To naprawdę udany zakup, który mogę z pełnym przekonaniem polecić. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1182309717.title_en: A proven classic in a new version
1182309717.text_en: Our first dishwasher was also a Bosch and it worked for us for almost 14 years! Therefore, when it came time to replace it, we didn't hesitate and knew that we wanted a new Bosch again, and we would also like the internal arrangement to be as similar as possible, as it completely suited us (especially the top drawer for cutlery).   Although the original model was built-in, this time we wanted a free-standing version with chrome doors. We were a little worried about the dimensions, but they were completely unfounded. This model has the ability to easily detach the top cover, so installation was completely hassle-free.  We were pleased with the better parameters (less consumption of water and electricity) and also the possibility of controlling and monitoring the operation of the washing machine using the Home Connect application. The operation is quiet, the control is intuitive and similar to the previous model, so the transition was simple. We appreciate the possibility of setting the door to open automatically at the end of the program, we used to do this manually before! The internal layout is a classic, thank you for not changing what works perfectly as it is.  The pearl at the end is the possibility of integration with Home Assistant, which takes the possibilities of automation and smart home to a completely different level! The configuration went without any problems and there are a lot of video tutorials on the net. Thanks to this, it is likely that when a washing machine or dryer needs to be replaced in the future, the first choice will again be Bosch.

1153916591.text_en: I really like the interior carriage stop, which no previous dishwasher had and was always out of place. The automatic opening of the door means that the dishes remain without any drips. As for the Wi-Fi connection, I thought it would not be useful to me, but due to how small the display is, it is necessary to make the adjustments and it is simply necessary to program the start of the wash, which allows you to view the electricity prices in real time, which allows you to save on the electricity bill. What we do ask of BOSCH is to use less paper for the instructions, which are of considerable thickness and in all languages ​​(quick guides of one or two hours, and anyone who wants to know more should connect to the Internet).

1148689136.text_en: Not only does the device look great, it also works according to every trick in the book. It's totally quiet, washes in an ecologically sound way (eco program) and the result is more than impressive. Of course it takes some adjustment to get used to the setup (so much different than the old machine), but you can see that, for example, the cutlery drawer instead of baskets ensures a much better result. Joy all around!

1182885520.title_en: Easy operation and good washing results
1182885520.text_en: The machine is easy to operate and has a fine washing result. However, the drying could be better, especially when there is a lot of plastic in the dishes

1149623931.text_en: Effective washing programs.  It washes well when using above-average tablets.  A cutlery drawer - whatever you prefer, for me it's the perfect solution - I have time to put away dirty forks while digesting my meal, and unpacking the cutlery in the morning before leaving for work takes literally a minute. With a basket it would be the other way around.  Automatic door opening and the ability to precisely set the end of the cycle in the application - a device adapted to the daily schedule.  Disadvantage - disconnects connection with the application. You may need to tweak something in your network settings. I recommend.

1142778384.text_en: Great appliance, silent and efficient. Very happy with all its features.

1168238153.text_en: Super quiet, with a lot of downloadable programs and large capacity.

1186728843.text_en: It was really worth choosing this Bosch washing machine - SMS4EMI06E. It is independent, special design with anti-fingerprint stainless steel.  Particularly quiet, on all programs not just the silent program Very roomy, for 14 sets of crockery, with enough space for cutlery and small kitchen utensils in the VarioDrawer drawer.  A minus, however, for the lack of a cup holder from the standard equipment (must be purchased separately). Without this support, all types of glasses cannot be safely washed.  Automatic door opening is a plus and even helps with better drying Access to the Home Connect app offers remote control, additional settings, monitoring and usage statistics, plus personalized notifications

1181457277.text_en: If you are looking for a dishwasher that combines technology, energy efficiency and comfort, the Bosch SMS4EMI06E is an option that will not disappoint you. This appliance not only guarantees impeccable cleaning, but also optimizes energy and water consumption with innovative functions.    First Level Energy Efficiency One of its most notable points is its energy efficiency. Thanks to its optimized design and intelligent management system, it reduces electricity consumption without compromising performance. In addition, it incorporates the automatic door opening function, which allows the dishes to dry with ambient air instead of spending more energy on resistance drying.    WiFi Connectivity and Smart Control WiFi connectivity is another key aspect of this model. Through the Home Connect app, you can monitor and control the dishwasher from your smartphone, receive notifications when the cycle ends or even schedule washes remotely. It also has sensors that automatically adjust water and detergent consumption depending on the load.    Silent and Powerful Despite its advanced technology, this dishwasher stands out for its low noise level, which makes it ideal for homes where tranquility is sought. Its EcoSilence Drive engine guarantees efficient and long-lasting operation, reducing vibrations and engine wear.    Conclusion The Bosch SMS4EMI06E is an ideal dishwasher for those looking for advanced technology and efficiency at home. With its WiFi connectivity, its innovative automatic opening system for natural drying and its low energy consumption, it is a perfect option to reduce environmental impact without giving up comfort.

1203444757.text_en: I am delighted with it, it is very quiet and leaves the dishes very clean, with a spectacular shine and the drying with the automatic opening of the door at the end of the program is incredible.  By having a third tray, placing the cutlery takes a little more time but in exchange you gain more space in the basket, which is great when it comes to filling the dishwasher to capacity.  To put a but it would be better if the part of the keys and the part under the door were the same color as the door but I understand that since it is plastic it is difficult
