1183616741.title_en: Spacious, quiet, easy to use and washes very well
1183616741.text_en: I've only had it for a few days, but so far I'm very satisfied with this dishwasher. It works correctly, the dishes are very clean and it is quiet. It also has more capacity than the dishwasher I previously had, especially because it has an additional cutlery tray instead of a cutlery basket. My previous dishwashers did not have the cutlery tray, and I was pleasantly surprised.  In addition to the above, the control elements are very intuitive and easy to use without making mistakes.

1136467192.text_en: I am delighted with the product. It has great technical features and allows me to choose the most appropriate program at all times. It is also very quiet and the ECO mode is perfect for great cleaning and being respectful of the environment. The quality of the finishes is very good and fits perfectly to the needs of my family.

1213038145.text_en: The Bosch SMS4EMI06E/40 is a very reliable and efficient dishwasher, ideal for everyday use. It offers excellent washing performance, leaving dishes clean and shiny even in eco programs. It stands out for its low noise level, its good use of interior space and the typical Bosch construction quality.    In addition, it is an efficient model in water and energy consumption, which helps save in the long term. In general, it is a highly recommended option due to its balance between quality, durability and good price.

1185369617.title_en: The cutlery tray and the door opener are top
1185369617.text_en: It is a very good dishwasher. The automatic door opening feature allows you to use it at any time without worrying about opening the door at the end of the cycle to release steam.  The buttons are sturdy and it is very easy to use.  The upper cutlery tray frees up a lot of space in the rest of the appliance and allows you to organize everything better.  The only thing I can criticize is that the middle tray does not allow the clubs to be laid down (unlike the lower tray which does allow it), which in some cases is necessary.

1150533550.title_en: The dishwasher is good, the application is hell.
1150533550.text_en: Manual use of the dishwasher is efficient and very similar in use to previous models, which is fine for those of us who come from a group brand, but the application is a real hell.  Pairing took me almost two hours. Manual mode, allow remote control or permanent remote control, there is no way to select it, much less get the home button to activate. The application is not intuitive at all and in the end you have to press the button on the machine.  In short, spending on WiFi for nothing.

1201128382.text_en: After many years of using the older generation series 4 dishwasher, it was replaced with a newer model, so a return to Bosch, which proves the satisfaction with the products of this brand, the newer one is even quieter, there are Internet control options, if you want, you can download additional washing programs. Not available in direct settings, the new series opens automatically after the end of washing, improving drying and airing. It also differs from the old version with an additional upper drawer for cutlery (the previous one had two drawers and a basket for cutlery on the lower one, giving up the old dishwasher. I even kept the basket because it was functional and I thought that maybe I would use it, but from the very first day I was convinced to use the upper drawer for cutlery without bending down when putting away the next ones).

1216917509.title_en: Very happy with my new dishwasher
1216917509.text_en: I am very happy with my Bosch Series 4 dishwasher, as it has exceeded my expectations in daily use. It cleans very efficiently even when the load is large or the dishes are quite dirty and it also works very quietly, which is very appreciated at home when we are sleeping. I also like its interior design, which makes it easy to organize plates, glasses and utensils comfortably. Overall, it gives me a feeling of quality and confidence and I feel that it has been a very successful purchase.

1216153909.text_en: I have been using the Bosch SMS4EMI06E dishwasher for several weeks and I am very pleased with my choice. The device operates very quietly, which is a big advantage in an open kitchen. The dishwasher copes perfectly with even heavily soiled dishes - pots and pans come out perfectly clean without the need to soak them first.    The big advantage is the capacity and comfortable baskets that can be easily adjusted to various dishes. The programs are intuitive, and the drying function makes the dishes ready to be put away immediately after the end of the cycle.    Additionally, the Home Connect application allows you to conveniently control the dishwasher from your phone, which is very practical on a daily basis.    I definitely recommend this model to anyone looking for a solid and modern dishwasher for home.    #opinionmotivatedpromotion

1209720802.text_en: The old dishwasher broke down just before Christmas. I chose this model because of its reliability and 10-year warranty.     The dishwasher works flawlessly. She perfectly coped with the pile of dishes produced by guests over the 3 days of the holiday. She walked practically non-stop and was very good at cleaning things up.  I appreciate the application in which the assistant asks me a few questions and suggests which program I should run for a given load of dishes.  And it informs me when washing is finished.    Quiet and comfortable to use. I highly recommend it

1153603723.text_en: The dishwasher works well, quiet, spacious, the regulations and everything is great. The only problem is that the door seems to be slightly crooked, so when you want to close it, depending on whether you press on one side or the other, you have to press more or less.

1182725390.text_en: The experience we have with the brand is great, in addition to the quality, finishes and durability of all its appliances. We have the washing machine, the refrigerator and the series 4 stainless steel dishwasher that we just bought. The installation was very quick since we had a dishwasher of the same brand that was many years old, and the surprise is the number of uses it has. We opted for this model due to its energy category. Furthermore, it is very easy to handle. Bosch makes your life easier

1184348694.text_en: This dishwasher is a real silent hero of the kitchen, it works so discreetly that you can forget that it is turned on! It uses a minimum amount of water while ensuring perfectly clean dishes. The operation is intuitive, and programs adapted to various needs make even the first use child's play. A Bosch dishwasher not only makes life easier, but also saves time and resources. And best of all, he never complains about the mess in the kitchen, unlike other household members!

1181047427.text_en: Bosch appliances never disappoint. This dishwasher is quiet, leaves dishes spotless and is beautiful. It has a lot of programming possibilities that I haven't used yet, but I will. I couldn't be happier.

1185799439.text_en: I am delighted with the Bosch Series 4 SMS4EMI06E dishwasher. From the first use, you can see the quality in every detail. It is incredibly quiet (42dB), perfect for use even at night. The automatic opening function at the end of the cycle (EfficientDry) improves drying without consuming more energy. I love the flexibility of the trays, especially the third one for cutlery, which frees up a lot of space.    The programs are very intuitive and varied, and the possibility of controlling it from your mobile with the Home Connect app is a plus that has surprised me for the better. Washing is impeccable, even in large loads or with difficult dirt. In addition, the low water and energy consumption is noticeable on the bill.    In short: practical, modern, silent and efficient. Totally recommended!

1152644856.text_en: We have purchased this new Bosch dishwasher and we are very happy with how quiet it is and how well it leaves the dishes. It shows that it is a quality appliance.  Especially highlight the transportation and installation service. They arrived on time and carried out a very professional installation, testing in detail that everything worked correctly. Very grateful to Adrià who has explained to us with great patience how all the programs and features work.

1185911099.text_en: Dishwasher well packed. Good external finish. Simple connection. Perfect cleaning of dishes and glasses. Silent. Let him open the door when he's done, great.  What I like the least is the plastic feel of the cutlery tray, with irregularities when opening, it dances between the rails. I better understand queeyal plastic against oxidation. I also don't like the red color of the LED indicators, which generates a feeling of alert rather than confirmation of the program and additions to it. I recommend it

1157766974.text_en: I am very satisfied with the purchase. It has a wide variety of programs, although I usually use the eco mode with automatic door opening. With this program for moderate dirt, it is more than enough. The latter is very useful, since it allows you to put it on at night and in the morning it is completely dry and thus no moisture remains due to being closed all night. The dishes are perfect, without water marks or bad odors. It is quite quiet, so putting it on at night is not a noise problem.   Another plus point is that it allows you to regulate the amount of rinse aid to use in each wash. I only have it at level 2 of 4, and it works fine for me.  Also important to highlight is the cutlery tray, much more useful and practical than the typical basket.

1210168565.text_en: Purchase following 16 years of good and loyal service provided by our previous Bosch dishwasher.  Having hesitated between integrated or free-standing dishwasher, it is its modern and practical design (anti-marks) which made us choose this free-standing model. It blends in perfectly with our gray kitchen.  It is very easy to use manually or via the application.  the first uses confirm us once again in our choice and the silence is there... A+++

1147603301.text_en: Great dishwasher. The number of programs is sufficient, and let's be honest, we will most often use the machine anyway. Some nice options. The Internet connection is a bit exaggerated, because unfortunately it will not load or empty the dishwasher, but it is "smart". Most importantly, it washes thoroughly and VERY quietly. The predecessor of another brand, when it started, it woke up the whole neighborhood, and here, my wife and I weren't sure whether it started at all XD. And opening the door after finishing the "washing" - great.

1149102644.text_en: Excellent as it is very intuitive in terms of program selections, even to create your own favorite programs with a selection of options offered (automatic door opening at the end of the program, delayed start ideal for choosing operation during times of lower electricity costs, a quick program in case of need and a long etcetera).   I wasn't planning to use home connect but in the end, the installation is very easy and practical.  Exceeds my expectations.

1207553682.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion, the dishwasher is quiet, washes dishes, has a sufficient number of programs for washing dishes, an additional cutlery drawer can accommodate any design and style (previously I had a problem with putting some cutlery into the basket due to the shape of the handle), the dishes are properly dried, the only comment is the fact that there is sediment in the upper guide of the drawer, which makes it difficult to pull it out.

1186199960.text_en: Installation was easy. The programs are useful and customizable.   The folding dividers on the undercarriage are very versatile for introducing non-standard sized tableware or pots and pans.  On the glass cart, you must lower the folding racks to hold the glasses in their slots. This is somewhat uncomfortable and represents a loss of space to place glasses under the rack.  In general, it is a good dishwasher, versatile and competent for its price.

1160396896.text_en: Bosch SMS4EMI06E dishwasher - stainless steel interior, energy class B, i.e. very economical, the quietest I have ever had, has the right number of programs, the eco program lasts 3 hours 30 minutes. and not as in the previous 5 hours 20 minutes. It washes both plates and glasses very well and does not leave streaks on the glass. Roomy - holds 14 sets of dishes. I was afraid of the cutlery drawer, but it is a very convenient solution that allows the dishwasher to accommodate more dishes. I recommend.

1140123650.text_en: Silent dishwasher, adequate and varied programs, good capacity, very versatile as it can modify the space with variations in the heights and also of the trays themselves. Good product.

1161154321.text_en: I have had the dishwasher for a month. A big advantage is the cutlery drawer, which provides more space. There were many occasions when I had to load the entire dishwasher, and it coped with everything, even old grease residues on the oven-proof dish. We also tested a pan that had burnt fat on the edges; after three washes, there was no trace of fat on the pan. After finishing work, when the dishwasher automatically opens the door, the dishes are already dry.

1180553028.title_en: Good purchase at a good price.
1180553028.text_en: I bought the dishwasher a few days ago and I have only used it once. It is very quiet, has many programs and can be operated from the Internet via Wi-Fi.

1207753264.text_en: The first thing that catches the eye is almost twice the energy consumption compared to the old dishwasher. Similar volume. In addition, the washing accuracy seems to be a notch higher. It seems that the washing time could be shorter than in the previous dishwasher (30 minutes). There are many options to choose from and something will probably fit. Intuitive photo of a countertop with hooks. Overall, a positive purchase. The disadvantages include the lack of a handle on the door and the door opening too far without the possibility of changing it to a smaller one.

1203165901.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher is worth recommending, very quiet operation, solid workmanship, a big plus for the application which increases functionality. I RECOMMEND

1181228373.title_en: A very high-quality dishwasher, above all, it washes well...
1181228373.text_en: What we like: - above all, it washes well - it is quiet - raised buttons, not a touch display - so it could last a long time - the buttons light up nicely - quality drying - you can easily program the amount of rinse aid, the hardness of the water What we don't like: - the programs are very long and when they are shortened, the door can no longer open automatically, the reason is said to be hot steam, said Bosch expert - personally, we find control via the net - wi-fi useless and does not bring anything extra in programming

1209485083.text_en: The dishwasher performed 3 (in words THREE) washing cycles and broke down. We received error E60-01 just in time for Christmas as a Christmas present.

1183216225.text_en: I was looking at several dishwashers before deciding on this one and the truth is that it was a success. I bought it directly from the Bosch website. I was able to decide the day and approximate time of delivery and they complied perfectly with what was established. The dishwasher came packed to the house and the installation and removal of the old one was quick and very professional. I have already used it several times and the dishes look great. I am happy with the purchase. I hope it lasts for many years.

1158583291.text_en: This is the second time we have bought a Bosch dishwasher (the first one I had to leave behind during a move) and it really meets expectations. Although it leaves the dishes clean, it is spacious and aesthetic, the best quality in my opinion is the upper tray for utensils. I find it much more useful than the typical basket. In addition, the tray frees up the last shelf for more plates and pots. The device is silent and has multiple functions that adapt to all circumstances.

1219191296.text_en: We bought a Bosch SMS4EMI06E dishwasher in Planeo Elektro and so far maximum satisfaction. The dishwasher is very quiet, perfectly washes even dried dishes, and I particularly appreciate the automatic opening of the door after the end of the program, thanks to which the dishes are really well dried. A big plus is also the spacious arrangement of the baskets and the cutlery drawer, which can fit a lot of dishes. Control is simple and the Home Connect app is a nice bonus. For us, a great price-quality ratio, I definitely recommend it.

1216295593.title_en: A very good dishwasher at a reasonable price
1216295593.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I bought a Bosch Serie 4 SMS4EMI06E dishwasher a few days ago and so far I am very happy with my choice. First of all, the device operates very quietly - you can practically not hear it during operation, which is a big advantage in an open kitchen.  The effectiveness of washing is also a big plus - even very dirty pots and dried plates come out clean without the need for rinsing first. The dishwasher is also spacious and well-designed, making it easy to place more dishes in it.  The operation is intuitive and the available programs are sufficient for everyday use. Additionally, the equipment seems to be energy-efficient and does not use much water, which is important when used frequently.  I think it's a very good choice at this price and I definitely recommend this dishwasher.

1214707053.text_en: It barely makes any noise in operation to the point of making one doubt if it is really running.  ECO washing with low consumption, however efficient in washing (50ºC) and drying. Other modes of reasonable consumption. Good for the option of activating or not opening the door during the drying stage. Good for the 3rd cutlery tray although without the possibility of changing its height in this model.  It is still uncomfortable and unstable to place tall glasses on the lower tray.

1207280530.text_en: The dishwasher works great - it works very quietly (42 dB), washes dishes thoroughly and dries them well thanks to the EfficientDry function. The interior is spacious (14 sets) and the baskets can be flexibly arranged. Additionally, the ability to control from the application and automatically open the door after the cycle is completed are really practical conveniences. Overall, a very successful purchase - I recommend it to anyone who wants a reliable and quiet dishwasher for everyday use. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1152745032.text_en: I opted for that dishwasher mainly because of two things, the little noise it made when washing and its low consumption, and in both aspects it more than fulfilled! It is barely audible when it is in operation and then its high low energy consumption rating will save me a few euros month after month.  After its numerous cleaning modes, both for more embedded dirt and for faster cleaning, it adapts to all types of circumstances in your daily life.

1186172770.text_en: The best thing about the dishwasher is that it is very quiet. The cleaning results are good and it is also beautiful. In general I am happy. The main drawback, for me because my previous dishwasher didn't have it, is that the cutlery tray takes up a lot of space for glasses on the top rack. Before I could fit two rows of glasses/cups, one on top of the other, and now if I lower the rack to take advantage of the upper space, nothing can fit on top or below. I think the basket system makes much better use of space. Then the eco 50º program is too long, 3:35', and if you want to take advantage of the hours of sunshine by having photovoltaic panels, it conditions you a lot. The program panel doesn't seem very intuitive to me either, you have to read the instructions to use it. But hey, in general the evaluation is good.

1207901160.text_en: The dishwasher meets the manufacturer's description, I am satisfied with the purchase.

1176873174.text_en: Silent, washes very well, the application is useful Bravo

1151990881.text_en: Bad information from the store, they told us that there was a discount of €150 and what was my surprise was that they only gave us €75 for being the series 4. There are three series 4,6 and 8 and depending on the series they give you back €75,100 or €150.  Value of the dishwasher I purchased €660 + €20 for installation and transportation, discounting €150, was within our money.  Well no, the price has been reduced by not paying us more than €75 due to the store's failure to provide the information.

1168106503.title_en: Washes quite well in the eco program.
1168106503.text_en: It is silent in all programs.

1147733214.text_en: This is my second dishwasher. According to this old lady, there is a very big leap in technology. Much more pleasant to use. I've just done the first wash and I'm satisfied at first, it's quiet, the cutlery drawer makes taking them out easier (in the old one I had a basket and I often hurt my fingers). After washing, the dishes were clean, shiny and dry. I haven't checked all possible programs yet, but they will definitely be useful. This is my first HOME CONNECT device and it is quite cool, you can set various washing parameters, see when the washing is being done, even turn on or stop the washing. I will definitely buy some more HOME CONNECT devices. I recommend . If you have an older dishwasher and it starts to break down, it is a waste of money and time to repair it - I recommend buying a new one, you will be satisfied.

1152099981.text_en: A year and a half ago we bought a Bosch washing machine and we are super happy with the machine. A few days ago we wanted to renew the dishwasher and we did so. We saw a very good promotion for this dishwasher on the website and decided to call for more information and features of the device. The salesperson's attention was impeccable at all times and she even sent me an email with all the information after the call. The dishwasher is beautiful, it is a true marvel in all aspects. It has a third tray for cutlery and this is a pro, since the basket that is always at the bottom replaces it for more large dishes. It is super spacious, it has too many programs and above all it can be programmed with the home connect application. At the end of the program it has automatic opening for more efficient and economical drying of dishes. It is also worth highlighting the delivery service, which is impressive: speed, kindness, punctuality and professionalism... All included in a great price.   And finally and very important to also highlight the "Bosch for Life" maintenance contract that for a small monthly fee, we will have the device covered against accidental damage and breakdowns in parts and displacement of its specialists. In short, I am delighted with BOSCH.

1202140414.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is another Bosch dishwasher.   The dishwasher meets all my expectations.   It is very quiet and washes even the dirtiest plates and pans.  A huge advantage of the dishwasher is that it has a stainless steel bottom and when you open the dishwasher door, there is no unpleasant plastic smell, the dishwasher is very quiet in use, it has drawers that extend far, which allows for easy and quick loading of the dishwasher.

1157449423.title_en: Fantastic dishwasher, efficient and low noise
1157449423.text_en: Efficient class B dishwasher (there aren't many), low water consumption, and a very low noise level of 42 dB. It has Wi-Fi, and can be controlled with the HomeConnect mobile application, to define your own programs, it tells you if it is running, how much time is left in the wash, program in the cheapest daylight hours,... It is also very spacious (14 covers), and very well priced. They come from Bosch to deliver it and get it running. Very happy.

1184274210.text_en: A dishwasher worth recommending! It is spacious, has a modern control panel and, most importantly, it washes dishes perfectly. When choosing equipment, I took into account electricity and water consumption. In this respect, it has great parameters. The dishwasher is very quiet, which is important to me. A very convenient cutlery drawer, I had a basket in my previous Bosch dishwasher. To sum up, the dishwasher is efficient and has modern functions that make everyday use easier.

1151336387.text_en: Super spacious interior, the third tray is wonderful and very practical; It seems silly but it gains a lot of space. Very quiet, even in normal mode. At first the app didn't particularly convince me, but it's very convenient, you can put it on a delayed schedule, check the cheapest hours,...and since it's so quiet, last night I was on it at 3 in the morning. It warns you about everything and there are a variety of washing modes. I am delighted.

1151341608.text_en: Super spacious interior, the third tray is wonderful and very practical; It seems silly but it gains a lot of space. Very quiet, even in normal mode. At first the app didn't particularly convince me, but it's very convenient, you can put it on a delayed schedule, check the cheapest hours,...and since it's so quiet, last night I was on it at 3 in the morning. It warns you about everything and there are a variety of washing modes. I am delighted.

1185528180.title_en: Once a Bosch, always a Bosch!
1185528180.text_en: This is another dishwasher in my life and the second one from Bosch.  I bought my first devices mainly based on the price, but the durability left much to be desired.  With the previous one, I decided to invest in quality by buying a built-in dishwasher (45 cm) from Bosch - and I don't regret it. If used heavily (1-2 cycles a day), it lasted for many years.  And when it was time for a change, I didn't hesitate for a moment, I also chose Bosch, this time free-standing, because the changes in the kitchen allowed it.  I am very satisfied, a larger dishwasher allows me to wash dishes less often, and the option to set the water hardness level, the amount of rinse aid and drying with the door open (and informing me on the phone about the end of the cycle) is a great thing.  I really appreciate the new purchase and I hope that the dishwasher will be at least as durable as our previous Bosch!

1208542040.text_en: We have had a Bosch dishwasher at home for years and it still works like the first day. Now the one my daughter had has broken down and we have given her this model. It is very similar to ours, but it has better features and, above all, it has much lower water and electricity consumption. Furthermore, with Bosch you ensure that the old one is removed and the new one installed.   Yesterday the technical service installed it and it works wonderfully.

1206805365.text_en: I expected nothing less from this brand, reliable, elegant and very functional. I was surprised by the details it has, such as the fact that some elements can be folded down to configure the interior of the trays, which in turn are adjustable in height. It has a drawer that collects the dishwasher tablet, which prevents it from falling to the base, remaining high to improve its dissolution. Those details that make Bosch stand out above other brands.

1219189056.title_en: Review of buying a Bosch dishwasher
1219189056.text_en: We bought a Bosch SMS4EMI06E dishwasher in Planeo Elektro and so far we are completely satisfied. The dishwasher is very quiet, washes even dried dishes perfectly, and I especially appreciate the large interior space and the practical cutlery drawer. The programs are clear and thanks to the automatic opening of the door, the dishes are beautifully dry. I also give a big plus to the low consumption and the possibility of control via Home Connect. A really great choice for this price, Bosch did not disappoint again. I recommend!

1183293652.text_en: It is my first dishwasher. The first thing I liked was pairing the dishwasher with the phone. It was easy and almost instant. The function of selecting the program according to what I want to wash is very good and I use it. Likewise, I also downloaded the other programs that the dishwasher does not have in it through the given application and I use those as well. Likewise, the remote start function is great. It washes glasses very well and pans or baking pans are clean, even in silent mode at 50 degrees, even if the programs last longer because I want to dry what I have inside, it's fine. The prewash can be turned off and on very well too and I put enough stuff in there for one cycle. It is very quiet, especially when I want to wash at night and the children are sleeping, so it is not a problem. Then the best thing is when it opens nicely and I get a message in MT that it's done, that's perfect. Thank you and highly recommend.

1219414812.text_en: The dishwasher does its job. The dishes come out clean, even after a large dinner, everything fits in one cycle. It works quietly enough that it does not disturb you in the evening. The cutlery drawer turned out to be more convenient than I expected. Drying works well, although plastic containers sometimes need to be wiped clean with a cloth. Simple operation, without unnecessary complications. A nice option with an adjustable drawer. I recommend. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1183313709.text_en: Very good results at all levels, with many modern and useful electronic functionalities in daily practice, great load capacity as the basket holders are foldable, adapting them to the need of the moment and having the cutlery tray above the baskets, where it takes up the least space, an improvement with our previous Bosch dishwasher also in modernity and an aid in cleaning the house

1160205279.text_en: This is my first dishwasher and at the beginning of use it makes a positive impression. The dishwasher works very quietly, looks good, has an external control panel with physical buttons, which is what I wanted. The baskets are spacious and the dishes can be arranged well, and an additional drawer for cutlery is very useful. I bought the dishwasher this week, so it is too early to assess the quality of washing of individual programs.

1159556802.text_en: The dishwasher is very convenient to use, three levels of the upper basket help with larger dishes. Separate buttons are used to select the program, which eliminates mistakes that may occur with multiple selection buttons.  The washing quality is excellent (I mainly use the AUTO program). It's surprisingly quiet, so it's useful to have a notification on your phone when washing is complete. Removable dishes are clean and dry.

1164161832.text_en: I have been using the dishwasher for 2 months now, what surprised me the most is that it is very quiet and the dishes come out super clean. The finish is very aesthetic and fits nicely with the furniture. A very big advantage of this dishwasher is its short program, which washes dishes perfectly with a small load. A slight disadvantage is the fact that it does not dry the dishes very well.  Nevertheless, I am very satisfied with this device.

1205303725.text_en: It's our first dishwasher, so we wanted a brand we could have peace of mind with. We have other appliances from the brand and we are happy, so we saw this model and we took the plunge. The main reasons for choosing this model were energy and water consumption, perceived quality, ease of use and the distribution of the interior space. That it also has Wifi is another plus point.

1218297228.title_en: Very happy with my first dishwasher
1218297228.text_en: This is my first dishwasher and the truth is that the experience could not have been better. This Bosch Series 4 SMS4EMI06E/50 conveys very good quality from the first moment, with an elegant stainless steel design that fits perfectly in the kitchen.    It has five predetermined programs that cover practically any need, and also allows you to connect through the mobile app, which adds extra convenience and control.    In terms of capacity, it has two main baskets for services and a third specific upper tray for cutlery, which helps to better organize the load and make the most of the space.    But the most important thing is its performance: it cleans excellently and treats dishes with great care. In general, it is a very complete, functional and well designed product. Without a doubt, a very successful purchase.

1152874902.text_en: The first few times I used it I had to get closer to make sure it was working, I couldn't believe it was actually working.  The cutlery tray is really practical because the time you spend placing them is what you later save when storing them.  I love the option of opening the door automatically after finishing the program as it helps a lot with drying.

1208964523.text_en: The capacity is large and I can also adjust the height of the basket according to the type of dishes I need to wash, which makes everything fit together without problems. Drying is efficient thanks to the EfficientDry function, which automatically opens the door when finished and significantly improves the result: the dishes come out practically dry every time.    One aspect that I also highlight is how quiet it is during the cycle.

1205259728.text_en: We are very pleased with the purchase - the dishwasher is quiet, the selection of programs is sufficient, and the automatic door opening function at the end of the program makes the dishes dry beautifully. A great solution is a cutlery drawer - each one is placed separately, so the cutlery does not get scratched and is always clean. Additionally, the drawer is located at the very top, which is very convenient. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1150946118.text_en: Good quality/price ratio.  Silent and easy handling.  Interior tank completely made of stainless steel (no “Polinox”).  Equipped with aquastop valve and 3rd cutlery tray.  Possibility of selecting automatic door opening at the end of the washing cycle.  Indicators to warn of lack of salt, rinse aid, etc.  In the absence of testing more thoroughly (WiFI, App,...) satisfied with the purchase.

1207990273.text_en: My son and I are very pleased with this Bosch SMS4EMI06E dishwasher. The dishes come out perfectly clean after each cycle, even the dirtiest ones, and the device is really quiet during operation - only 42 dB, which does not interfere with everyday activities. The only minor drawback is the red LEDs on the front panel, which are a bit bright at night when the lights are off in the kitchen.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207600283.text_en: The dishwasher meets all my expectations. It is very roomy, and the arrangement of baskets allows you to conveniently load even large pots. The biggest advantage for me is the EfficientDry function - the door opens itself after the end of the cycle, thanks to which the dishes are perfectly dry and streak-free. It works quietly, so I can easily turn it on at night. Solid equipment worth the price. I recommend! #opinionmotivated by promotion

1203129236.text_en: My first dishwasher, but I am very satisfied. It works very quietly, which is a big advantage for small children, as it can be turned on while the children are napping.  Perfect for cleaning dried dishes. A big plus is also the ability to start the dishwasher from your phone. Nicely designed interior that can accommodate a lot of dishes.  Additionally, energy-saving.  Solidly made, looks elegant.  I recommend

1209742193.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is my first Bosch dishwasher, I have been using it for a month, but compared to my previous one it is great. It is quiet and beautiful, and most importantly, the dishes are clean and dry, and it removes even the remains that are difficult to remove. The adjustable height of the second basket works great, thanks to which really large dishes can fit on the first level. I can recommend it with clear conscience

1151560520.title_en: Just a small detail to be perfect
1151560520.text_en: The dishwasher is great, it does almost everything, the only thing is that I have to adapt unlike my previous dishwasher, this one has a shelf in the upper tray which makes it of little use if we open it because there is almost nothing to fit underneath and to put something on top the tray would have to be lowered and it would leave little space between trays, so everything is perfect, it meets what I expected from the brand.

1207989233.text_en: My son and I are very pleased with this Bosch SMS4EMI06E dishwasher. The dishes come out perfectly clean after each cycle, even the dirtiest ones, and the device is really quiet during operation - only 42 dB, which does not interfere with everyday activities. The only minor drawback is the red LEDs on the front panel, which are a bit bright at night when the lights are off in the kitchen.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1182022872.text_en: For very little more money than other models (bought for €599, €525 after the refund promotion) you have many more functions, the one I value most is opening the door which allows me to go to work without worrying about the dishwasher and avoid programming it or having to wait. The application is good, so you can easily adjust the rinse aid level if you use liquid detergent instead of tablets.

1211589006.text_en: This dishwasher is very quiet, you have several programs and any of them cleans very well. The energy efficiency is very good, something very important to me due to the recent increase in the price of electrical energy.  It is very spacious and for a family of 4 people it is ideal.  I have been buying Bosch for more than 20 years and I am very satisfied with all the appliances I have from this brand.

1180149184.text_en: I bought this dishwasher because of the reviews and I want to say that they are accurate. It is quite quiet and drying is quite good.  I love the turbo function that speeds up cleaning, if you're in a hurry.  Like, but I would say that the bottom basket does not have a department just for casseroles. It has a plate holder that can be folded, but I don't know if it will break in the long run.  For now I recommend the purchase.

1207724929.title_en: easy handling and maintenance for the user
1207724929.text_en: It is my first dishwasher, I have always been reluctant, I think that the cost in materials, water and energy exceeds the use of these appliances. Right now, I feel very rushed, with no time for anything, and although it requires attention to put-remove-maintain the dishwasher, it makes up for it.   I am delighted with how quiet it is and that allows me to run it at night without disturbing the neighbors.

1158033307.text_en: I always trust this brand for my appliances but I have to say that this dishwasher has pleasantly surprised me. I must highlight that it is very quiet, you practically cannot hear it and the fact that when the program ends, the door opens automatically, leaving it with a spectacular finish, a fantastic shine and there is no need to even go over the cutlery. A great purchase and I recommend it 100%

1148655424.text_en: The dishwasher has been used for over a month, the number of programs is greater than I need, the ability to be turned on remotely from the application on the phone via WiFi. The noise is not bothersome, it cleans reasonably well, although it probably depends more on the type of chemicals used and the correct arrangement of the dishes. The quality of workmanship is good (it has a metal bottom!). A useful option with automatic door opening, I recommend it.

1160312586.title_en: Happy to be back with the brand
1160312586.text_en: This is my third dishwasher and the second Bosch brand. Due to moving to a place with an equipped kitchen, we used a dishwasher from another well-known company for some time. Even though the device was functional, we decided to buy a new one and return to Bosch. It was a good decision, the quality of washing and service was several classes higher and lower energy and water consumption was also achieved. To sum up, we are very satisfied.

1186208308.text_en: It is a dishwasher with very quiet operation. An important aspect is the Home Connect technology, since you can control the dishwasher from your mobile phone, schedule cycles and receive notifications. Finally, the automatic opening of the door, which makes drying easier. The aspect that I liked the least is the duration of the programs, especially the ECO, which is very long.

1158033195.text_en: I always trust this brand for all my appliances but in this case I was very pleasantly surprised by the dishwasher. What I highlight most is that it makes practically no noise and the fact that the door opens by itself once it has finished seems like a great idea to me since everything stays very dry, with an excellent shine and it is not even necessary to review the cutlery. I totally recommend it

1159965460.text_en: A dishwasher worth recommending. It works very quietly. Everything was always thoroughly washed, even dried pots were washed without any problems. A large cutlery basket (additional drawer), which saves space for other dishes.  A great option is the ability to control the device via an application on your phone. You can adjust the amount of rinse aid and salt.  I really highly recommend it

1151120392.text_en: The delivery and installation service was perfect, just as requested. It works very well, it is very quiet and leaves the dishes perfect. The glasses are impeccable, shiny and without a single drop of stains. The top tray is great for cutlery and is very comfortable to use. If you take advantage of the discounts and/or promotions, the price is also very worth it.

1214490308.text_en: I am delighted with this dishwasher. It washes all dishes very well, even the dirtiest dishes, and leaves everything shiny. I really like that it is made of anti-fingerprint steel because it always looks clean. It has easy-to-use programs and fits everything from large plates to delicate glasses. Plus, it's pretty quiet, so I can put it on even while doing other things around the house.

1182210405.title_en: A great dishwasher with very good features.
1182210405.text_en: It is an excellent Bosch quality dishwasher with all the latest features in this type of appliance. It has several washing modes and leaves everything very clean and dry. In addition, the aesthetics are wonderful, all in stainless steel, with only a digital panel, without a roulette wheel and the "Home connect" option means that you can manage it from your mobile phone. It is, without a doubt, an excellent purchase.

1161598599.text_en: The purchased dishwasher is the second from Bosch. I am very satisfied with the quality of washing, the selection of programs and, above all, with the automatically opening door, thanks to which the washed dishes dry. The dishwasher is very quiet, there is no need to use the silent program, because you cannot hear the operation of other programs, it looks nice, is spacious and meets my expectations 100%. I recommend

1185246209.text_en: Our previous dishwasher from the same manufacturer broke down (it was already 18 years old) and we purchased another one on the advice of the technician who came to repair it for us. Everything went very quickly and in less than 1 week we already had the equipment assembled at home. Very quiet and the alerts on the cell phone when it finishes are appreciated. I can't post any problems at the moment, everything has gone very well so far

1153322993.text_en: Without a doubt quality price, it is a good product. The efficiency and service it offers is perfect. Washing is silent, has a large capacity and leaves the dishes in perfect condition. The utensils come out dry. The programs adapt perfectly to what you put inside. The aesthetics and finishes are impeccable. To date I have no complaints despite having only been using it for a few days.

1152699980.text_en: The Bosch 60cm Class B Dishwasher is characterized by its energy efficiency and adequate capacity for domestic use. It stands out for its silent operation and effective cleaning. Although its interface could be more intuitive, it does not affect its general operability. Recommended for its balance between energy consumption, performance and durability, it is suitable for average homes.

1183232059.title_en: The material seems to be of quality, we are optimistic
1183232059.text_en: Inside it is bigger than it looked in the photos. There is plenty of space to place a variety of dishes and the cutlery drawer is very well designed.  The application, contrary to what I thought, is very good and I barely touch the buttons.  Super quiet, when I'm away I check the app just to make sure it's working because I don't hear anything.

1173471846.text_en: This is the second Bosch dishwasher in my house. Personally, I think this is the best choice when it comes to dishwashers. I am very pleased with the purchase.  The dishwasher met my expectations, which I specified on the Bosch online store website. It has automatic programs that adjust the washing length to the number of dishes and how dirty they are. It has automatic door opening after washing and also during the drying process. It has water saving programs. And WiFi. I must admit that the app is very rich in many functions and you can download NEW washing programs... What happened to the first dishwasher, you ask? She had to stay in the old place after moving.... And the most important thing. For this kind of money, you won't find a dishwasher in energy class B. In a word, I highly recommend it, although not all stores have this model. But that's what a search engine is for, right?

1186713921.text_en: Expectations confirmed: it doesn't leave marks on the dishes, it washes very well (even if the dishes have leftover food), it's silent (without the silent washing option). The application is really useful, it comes with notifications, you can order the car remotely, you can make various settings directly from the application, additional programs to download, energy consumption statistics, water, and others.

1158111696.text_en: The truth is that I have started to trust this brand and after using it, which has already been 10 washes, I have been very surprised by its functions. The one that more than the door opens by itself so that it dries better and then the low noise it makes and the little consumption it consumes in its Eco mode. The cleaning is spectacular at the moment, even if you also use finish tablets. I hope it lasts longer than the last one

1152522222.text_en: I've been with him for a short time. It is certainly super quiet. I haven't had a dishwasher except when it was rented, and it certainly cleans very well. I also chose this model for its energy efficiency and automatic door opening for drying. The truth is that I am very satisfied, although I have not been able to download the app and use it, it gave me an error when downloading (I don't know why).

160593096.text_en: It makes very little noise, it leaves the dishes really well. Its energy efficiency, classified as B, is one of the most efficient. Dry the dishes excellently. I come from other dishwasher brands and I have to say that I am very happy with the purchase. I can't forget the application with which you can start it, pause it, choose programs etc etc etc. I recommend it 100%.

1217102627.text_en: The Bosch Series 4 free-standing dishwasher is a solid piece of equipment. It works quietly, washes dishes thoroughly, even when they are very dirty, and does not leave any streaks. The operation is simple and intuitive, so you don't have to waste time on complicated settings. Moreover, it is economical. It fulfills its purpose without unnecessary problems and you can rely on it. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1155370147.text_en: When we moved to the new house in 2018, we bought appliances from other brands, only the washing machine was Bosch. Well, I tell you that I never buy anything that is not from Bosch again. The only thing that works is this brand's washing machine.   I love the dishwasher, it has a door opening system after washing that saves energy and leaves the dishes super dry.

1207078957.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher. The external appearance of this dishwasher gives the device lightness. The control panel is easy to use. A cutlery drawer, adjustable height of the upper basket and foldable spikes in the lower basket increase the functionality of the dishwasher. Water and electricity consumption parameters were also important when choosing a dishwasher.  The user manual is very clear.

1207314416.text_en: Bought 3 days ago, good product despite a high price, does not leave marks on the dishes, what we also find appreciable is that it is possible to easily adjust the hardness of the water, I recommend this product if you no longer want marks on your dishes, hoping that it lasts as long as our last Bosch is around 15 years

1158737529.text_en: My previous dishwasher died after 24 years (!). It was from Bosch. So I couldn't buy a dishwasher from another company! I have most of my household appliances from Bosch - robot, washing machine, mixer, etc. I am very pleased with the purchase of the new dishwasher - quiet, economical, spacious. A clear display, the function of opening the door after the end of the cycle and a drawer for cutlery - a great idea! This is how it was supposed to be!!!

1179041106.text_en: Large capacity and very good distribution to make the most of the space. Very quiet appliance with many programs to choose from as needed at all times. The possibility of programming a washing program and a start time allows for considerable savings and to always be informed of its operation. The best purchase I have made in a long time.

1163995582.text_en: We bought the dishwasher after another Bosch model failed. It worked for us for 13 years, so believing in its reliability, we decided on the above model. A definite advantage is the cutlery drawer and very quiet operation. The number of programs is sufficient, connection to the phone is another new convenience. We have been using it for 2 months now and the equipment meets our expectations.

1203452184.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion. Bosch Serie 4 is a very solid choice for people who want good household appliances without overpaying for the most luxurious models. It offers many functions, high quality of workmanship and comfort of use. If cycle speed or energy efficiency is a priority, this is a good choice. The advantages include water saving, quiet operation, and remote control. I recommend

1203334179.text_en: The dishwasher works without any problems, there are many functions, the best in my opinion is the quiet operation of this device and the quality of washing dishes. An additional advantage is the aesthetic appearance. I am a regular customer of Bosch and have never been disappointed. In addition to the dishwasher, I also have a washing machine, a vacuum cleaner, a food processor and a blender. I am satisfied with all of them. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1204229847.text_en: High quality workmanship and functionality. Automatic opening of the door at the end does the job and improves the drying effect and cools the dishes. It's a pity that in the case of the Eco mode (and I intended to use it most often), it extends the total dishwashing cycle from 3 hours and 35 minutes to 4 hours and 20 minutes. Why is this so? I have no idea.

1180697369.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher and of course I was not disappointed. This is a very good device with great functions. It works quietly, looks great, is energy-saving, and can also be controlled via an application. If someone wants good equipment at a reasonable price, I definitely recommend it. Honestly, it exceeded my expectations.

1219636077.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is a hit! The device works very quietly, and the dishes are perfectly washed and shiny after each cycle. The remote control function via the application and the automatic door opening system are very useful, thanks to which the dishes dry faster. I am very pleased with the purchase and the quality of workmanship. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1153998240.title_en: Very good quality and I recommend it.
1153998240.text_en: In general I liked everything. It is very practical and easy to use. The upper cutlery tray is very useful. I have installed the Home Connet connection and it works perfectly. Very fast delivery and the technicians were very attentive and informed me very well about how it worked.                              In short, a dishwasher that deserves a 10 and of course I recommend it.

1200803344.text_en: A very good dishwasher with a great price/quality ratio. I have a built-in model myself, and a free-standing model for the next floor, and when it comes to operation, it works just as great. The app reminds you to refill and clean the dishwasher. The door opening function is a complete game-changer when it comes to drying. #opinionmotivated by a promotion

1203557740.text_en: We are very pleased with our choice. This is our first dishwasher and we wanted to be able to adapt it to the existing furniture and easy-to-use equipment. The dishwasher has all this, plus it works quietly, washes dishes nicely and does not damage glass. The cutlery drawer is a very cool and convenient solution.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1157718282.text_en: AT THE MOMENT I HAVE NO COMPLAINTS, IT IS EFFICIENT, EASY TO USE, AND WITH MANY NEW AND INTERESTING FUNCTIONS, SUCH AS THE 3 TRAY, THE PROGRAMMING TO WASH AT NIGHT AND THE AUTOMATIC DOOR OPENING FOR DRYING, MAYBE YOU WILL FIND SOME PROBLEM IN DRYING THE COOKIE WHEN YOU TAKE IT OUT AT THE MOMENT, IT SEEMS NOT IT IS SO DRY THAN WITH ANOTHER MODEL I HAD

1147831990.text_en: We usually give names to appliances, choosing the name of the day they were brought to us. Yesterday Edu came home.   We had a dishwasher for a long time in which the tank with the tablet did not work and we had to put it in manually. So Edu, who has already performed a couple of "services" is being very well received at home...

1183706922.text_en: - Washes well, even at low temperatures, which mainly saves electricity. energy.   -Control is quite simple and intuitive - suitable even for seniors.  -I can confirm that it is quiet, which is especially appreciated by young families with children.  I appreciate the stainless steel surface, which is relatively well maintained.  The price/performance ratio corresponds to the given class of dishwashers.   Good buy for me!

1203488501.text_en: I am very happy with my choice. The dishwasher is quiet, very good for home use even with very dirty dishes, it does not damage glass, it is easy to use, which was very important to us as it is our first dishwasher. We managed to adapt it to the current furniture without major renovation, which is an additional advantage. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1216696899.title_en: Quiet, effective and reliable - Bosch SMS4EMI06E
1216696899.text_en: The Bosch SMS4EMI06E dishwasher is a great choice for everyday use. It is very quiet, accurately cleans even heavily soiled dishes and is intuitive to use. A big plus for the capacity and drying function, everything is clean and dry after the cycle. Solid workmanship and modern appearance perfectly match the kitchen. I definitely recommend it!  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1199129779.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher. One in the guest house, the other in my house and I think these are the best dishwashers. I bought it for guests, tempted by a seller of another brand, and it was a nightmare. Fortunately, after two repairs, I managed to return it and bought a Bosch and at least this one washes away. 1176675437.text_en: The dishwasher does its job well. With such products, the support part is also very important, and Bosch is up to the task. Congratulations.

1159596746.text_en: We have had the new dishwasher for almost two months and we are quite happy, it doesn't make any noise, the upper tray for the cutlery is very comfortable, clean and polishes very well. The WIFI connection is very good, comfortable and gives you information continuously. The only drawback that could be made is that with the ECO program it takes 3 hours.

1170882768.text_en: After analyzing many options, this dishwasher is the most suitable. The distribution of its trays is completely accessible and easy to load and unload the dishes. The materials fully comply with the description and guarantee good maintenance. After a few months of use, it meets all expectations according to its technical sheet.

1160023953.text_en: The first thing I noticed was that the dishwasher is very quiet, you basically can't hear it running. It looks solid and modern at the same time. There are a variety of programs to choose from. Controlling it is pleasant, and it is also possible to control it with a smartphone. It has functional shelves.  Washes dishes thoroughly and makes them shine. I am very satisfied with the purchase.

1150747366.text_en: It is a very complete dishwasher. I love the upper shelf to place cutlery, you save a lot of space on the lower one to be able to place pots and pans. It is also incredible how little noise it makes and the mobile application seems great to me. I just released it and I still need to master it but the app is very intuitive. I give it a 10.

1157883167.text_en: This dishwasher is one of the best I've ever had, it has 3 trays and fits everything. On the other hand, the cycles are very well thought out to choose the best programming according to your use needs. 1149248046.text_en: The appliance meets all possible energy efficiency requirements. Everything is done easily through the Wi-Fi connection and a mobile app, which also allows remote control of the device. Excellent purchase.

1159477373.text_en: The truth is that very well the only problem I had was the dishwasher door that was supposed to open by itself and it didn't and the technical service immediately found the problem. They offered me to exchange it for another one since it was 8 days old. But the problem was solved. Otherwise it works very well and Eco mode is the best program for me. And it's very quiet

1152455899.text_en: I am very happy with the purchase made. It is an elegant product that performs its function perfectly. At the moment, I have not tried all the existing programs but the ones I have tried (Eco, Auto) I am very satisfied since the dishes come out clean and practically dry thanks to the automatic door opening at the end of the wash.

1221639413.text_en: We really like that it is spacious and can fit larger saucepans, it has cleverly thought-out spaces for cutlery instead of the classic basket, foldable grates for more space flexibility, it is quiet (you can barely hear it when it is running), it consumes little and it is also good-looking. We are very happy with our purchase, worth every penny.

1182570223.text_en: We bought this dishwasher a few days ago and at the moment we are very happy, I don't know if it shows in the cost, but the fact that it has an upper tray for cutlery means it has more capacity and it shows on a day-to-day basis. It is also very efficient, and to reduce waste at the end of the wash, it opens only when finished, I think only in ECO mode.

1182287314.text_en: I have been testing the dishwasher and I have to say that I was pleasantly surprised. I can manage all the features of my dishwasher from my mobile, that makes things easier. For now I'm happy.

1200334716.text_en: This is my next Bosch dishwasher. The previous one served me well for about 20 years. No wonder I chose Bosch again. The dishwasher washes beautifully, and the Vario3 drawer significantly increases the capacity of the dishwasher. What is important to me is energy efficiency class B, water consumption of only 9l/cycle and the AquaStop system. And this quiet operation... great!

1182300591.title_en: Title: Silent, efficient and with good design
1182300591.text_en: I am very satisfied with this Bosch dishwasher. It is very quiet, leaves dishes spotless and has a large capacity. I like the automatic opening option and the connectivity with the app. However, wash cycles can be a bit long. Overall, it is a great option if you are looking for an efficient and modern dishwasher.

1179919754.text_en: After almost 17 years with my previous Bosch dishwasher (SMS58M08EU) I have once again opted for another new Bosch dishwasher due to my previous experience with the brand: I have decided to change the appliance due to some small problems related to its wear, although it still continued to wash the dishes well.

1155739647.text_en: Very good dishwasher. It hardly makes any noise. Very happy with the purchase. The packaging is perfect. The dishes are clean. The capacity is correct. It fits well under the countertop. The stainless steel color is typical, well protected by a green adhesive. Zero problems in shipping, in 72 hours it was home.

1218804160.text_en: I want to take part in the campaign "Promotion of Bosch dishwashers - get a refund to your account up to PLN 700" - I have read the Regulations of the promotion #OpinionMotivatedPromotion I recommend the Bosh extra flour dishwasher is quiet, plus the additional cutlery basket and application control consumes little water and electricity the best purchase I recommend with a clear conscience

1179163968.text_en: I bought it mainly because of its "B" rating for energy consumption and noise. I also find it very useful that it connects to the internet and that I can add customized programs according to my preferences. Of course it washes very well and dries correctly by opening the door automatically 15 minutes before the end of the program.

1158821093.title_en: I recommend it, I am very satisfied
1158821093.text_en: I am very satisfied with the purchase. The dishwasher cleans everything, has a sufficient number of programs, is quiet and energy-saving. My previous Boch dishwasher worked great for 10 years, I hope this one will be equally reliable. The currently purchased one is much quieter during operation and has a higher energy class. I definitely recommend it.

1150209810.text_en: Thanks to this dishwasher, cooking has become even more enjoyable. I no longer have to worry about dirty dishes. She will wash everything away. Bowls, pots, plastic containers, oven trays, apart from cutlery and tableware, are the basic items washed in it. Simple and easy to use. The hotline helped to connect to the application

1206528360.text_en: My second dishwasher from this series and I highly recommend it, but I would suggest that Bosch install more durable pumps because I had to replace them in the previous dishwasher after three years. And yes, all the functions are sufficient. promotional campaign "Promotion of Bosch dishwashers - get a refund to your account of up to PLN 700" #opinion motivated by a promotion

1199779519.text_en: After long searches and suggestions I decided on this model of washing machine, because I thought it was what I needed and corresponded to my daily needs.  It works perfectly, it has programs that help you, it is impeccably clean, it is economical in terms of electricity and water consumption. I think I made a perfect choice

1200783820.text_en: The device meets all requirements. A large selection of programs allows you to adapt the washing to the dirt on the dishes. The ability to control the device from an application for mobile devices opens a wide range of possibilities, from remote switching on to downloading new programs. I highly recommend this dishwasher model.

1161245744.text_en: We have been using the dishwasher for a month. The previous Bosch model served us for 13 years. A big plus is a separate cutlery drawer = no bending and more space for plates and pots. The number of programs meets all needs, from short, eco or quiet night washing. A big plus is also very good washing quality and quiet operation.

1200724332.text_en: I have had this dishwasher since September 1 and I am trying different programs to see which one I am most interested in using. For now I am happy with the result. The dishes come out clean and very dry. It is super quiet and the design is very elegant. It looks like a quality dishwasher. I just hope it turns out well in the long run.

1183116864.text_en: Dishwasher very easy to use, quiet, the folding plate holders on the lower tray are really useful and the one on the upper tray is a success. On the third tray we like the placement of the cutlery, they wash very well. The mobile connection is very useful, especially for mistakes. It has been a great choice.

1160032805.text_en: The dishwasher is solidly and modernly made, it is very quiet, you can hardly hear it working. The big advantage is the number of programs and the ability to control it with a smartphone. It has very functional shelves, especially the top one has cutlery. The dishes were beautifully washed. This is my first Bosch dishwasher and I will stick with this brand. A very good purchase.

1180540891.text_en: High-quality washing machine, with a very pleasant design. There are several programs available that are the most common, but other programs can be downloaded very easily. Smart functions and control via a mobile application are also a big plus. The noise is at a good level. Installation was really easy. Overall, I'm very satisfied so far.

1206111246.text_en: The instructions are generic and do not correspond to the specific device. In addition, they are vague. I still haven't gotten the programs right. The dishes do not come out completely dry. I don't know how to disconnect the favorite key, I can't find any instructions on this. I would appreciate it if a Bosch agent contacted me. Thank you.

1208391159.text_en: This is my third dishwasher. This one is distinguished by: a cutlery drawer, better organized baskets for dishes (more foldable spikes), a better solution for dispensing the tablet (the dishes do not make it difficult to release the capsule from the dispenser. I thought that controlling the dishwasher with an application was just a gadget, but for now that's the only way I run it.

1149308541.text_en: Very nice dishwasher, quiet, washes well, it's nice that it has a telephone control.  This is our first dishwasher, but we wouldn't give it up for anything, in the Eco 50 program it cleans dried or burnt food from pots, the dishes are dry without streaks and it is very quiet. Buying this dishwasher is a 10-step decision

1149933702.text_en: We just received our new dishwasher and it is fantastic. Okay, the previous one we had was more than old, but this one is super quiet and with the eco program it leaves everything very clean, dry and shiny. The Wi-Fi connection was a bit resistant, but once everything was installed, it was actually very easy to use.

1148725541.text_en: Very good dishwasher, quiet, many programs, starter tablets + rinse aid, I am very pleased with the purchase, I highly recommend it.    The most important features: 1. Metal bottom 2. Opening door 3. Third shelf 4. Good energy class and low water consumption 5. Smartphone-device connection via the Home Connect application

1160253615.text_en: I definitely recommend this dishwasher. Gray, metallic color - looks good in the kitchen.   The dishwasher is quiet. An additional undoubted advantage is an additional cutlery drawer.   You can childproof the buttons if necessary.   Lots of programs to choose from.   It cleans thoroughly, I didn't see any streaks on the glasses.

1202436595.text_en: The dishwasher fully met our expectations. It has a modern and elegant design, very spacious compartments and practical solutions, such as a cutlery drawer at the very top. It easily accommodates larger plates. It works exceptionally quietly, and the dishes are perfectly clean and shiny after each cycle. I definitely recommend it!

1178912665.text_en: I bought it because of the reviews and the energy label, so far very happy, easy and intuitive use and very good results. I have not had a dishwasher before and I cannot compare it, I can only say that it is very quiet and the dishes that I have put in, both porcelain, normal glasses and also plastic ones, have been washed perfectly.

1150453389.text_en: We are very happy with the dishwasher. We were looking for one with high energy efficiency, with a 3rd tray. This one surprised us because of the interior finishes and the price.  I would only say that linking it with the app was a bit expensive for me. We recommend it and the guys who installed it for us were very friendly and professional.

1176391833.text_en: A very roomy, practical, useful dishwasher in every family's home. I would have preferred the hose to be longer, but we had to buy an extra one, so additional cost. The washing machine washes very well, quiet, uses quite little water and energy, I'll be back with another review in a few weeks

1216008274.text_en: I finally have a replacement for my old dishwasher and it makes a huge difference, especially how quiet this model is. I really appreciate the automatic door opening, thanks to which the dishes are dry and ready straight into the cabinet. The upper cutlery drawer is practical because it leaves much more room for large pots and bowls in the lower basket.

1211918333.text_en: After 13 years my Bosch dishwasher got its well-deserved rest; I could have repaired it, but seeing the price of one that was very similar although current, I chose to replace it. It works wonderfully and comes standard with things that were missing from the previous one (wifi, App, Automatic Opening, etc.). I couldn't be happier.

1150345622.text_en: The use is very easy and intuitive, especially in reference to the most technological part. Using it with or without the Home Connect application is an advantage since it is suitable for any type of family, more or less digitalized. With or without the Home Connect app, you can even create your own and/or favorite program by choosing various options. An à la carte program!    It offers many attractive functions depending on the needs: delayed start to choose to use at night with cheaper electricity rates, quick programs in case of having unexpected visitors and being able to have clean dishes on time, automatic opening at the end of the program for more efficient and economical drying, obviously energy and water saving programs and much more.    In addition, its large capacity of 14 services allows you to further optimize washing, using the dishwasher less per week, which saves even more on electricity and water bills.

1161147663.text_en: I am very satisfied with this dishwasher model. It is very quiet and washes all dishes thoroughly, including dried ones. 1158072362.text_en: I have been using a different model of Bosch dishwasher for 17 years and it has never failed me (no repairs), just normal wear and tear. 1198175592.text_en: Enough for a family of 4. It's super quiet, you can turn it on even at night without worrying about waking up the neighbors. Minimum water consumption, 10 liters for each wash. 1136500902.text_en: This is another Bosch dishwasher in the family.  Easy operation and trouble-free operation made us decide to buy a BOSCH dishwasher for the elderly. 1181471294.text_en: I just received the device and the impression has been very pleasant from the first moment, the factory packaging seemed very good to me, fully safeguarding the product. 1147000521.text_en: Its capacity of 14 services means that it can fit everything, we are delighted with the simplicity of use. 1154409459.text_en: Today the order finally arrived. We have never used a dishwasher before. It's already in its place. All day long we put all the plates, glasses, covers. In the afternoon we start it up. You can hardly hear how it works. When you take it out everything is very clean and without wasting time.   I don't know how we lived before without her.

1180364785.text_en: Stainless steel dishwasher with cutlery tray and large capacity. The lower trays have a flexible part so that larger pots or other utensils can be accommodated. 1152592211.text_en: The dishwasher is very easy to use and understandable.  What I liked the most is that it is very quiet and that it has several programs that make the utensils perfect.  The worst thing??, at the moment nothing, everything perfect.  I would recommend it because I think it is a very good dishwasher and very energy efficient.

1161541997.text_en: This is my third dishwasher, the previous one was also from Bosch and worked for 18 (!) years, hopefully it will be as good this time. 1148713317.text_en: We thought for a long time about our first dishwasher and we chose Bosch. We are delighted with it. Quiet. Intuitive operation. It saves time and money. Energy class B is rare at this price, and Bosch managed it. I recommend to everyone 3 nozzles and a stainless steel interior, not plastic.

1220158287.text_en: The dishwasher washes well, low noise, counts down the time until the end of the program, nice design. I appreciate the mechanical buttons. I prefer a basket to a "shelf" for cutlery, but I'll get used to it.

1149816895.text_en: The best: Its interior space and arrangement of trays.   As an improvement: the cutlery tray should accept slightly larger cutlery such as utensils such as kitchen shovels, scrapers or ladles. Also, Home Connect notifications of program completion will allow a message through Alexa.

1182135118.text_en: I have replaced my previous 16-year-old Bosch dishwasher and I am going for the next one. Otherwise, in the absence of further use, everything is fine.

1210515873.text_en: Having had a dishwasher already a Bosch dishwasher for over 10 years.   I just purchased this new generation one.   I appreciate that it is quieter, consumes less water and electricity and of course its connection to my WiFi network.   I hope it will last me more than 10 years

1148848335.text_en: What I liked the most is the diversity of programs. It is also a good idea that some warnings can be deactivated when they are not necessary (salt or rinse aid tank empty). What I like least is that the prewash program seems to be only accessible from the favorite program button.

1203860881.text_en: The dishwasher is great. Operation using the application is brilliant and intuitive. In principle, you can do it without an instruction manual. The dishwasher is extremely quiet. And my wife says it's nicer than the previous one ;) We chose it because of positive experiences with Bosch equipment.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1179731465.title_en: Great for saving and perfect for cleaning
1179731465.text_en: I am delighted. I am using it in ECO mode, accumulating dishes for several days to fill it completely. He left everything clean, the door opens at the end and he continues counting the time back 1 hour, I think, and everything stays dry. I remove food remains from the dishes with the cutlery and napkin, but I do not rinse with water, soap, or brush them, or anything, since that is not saving water, soap, or time. I accumulated dishes for 3 days, so I had cups with dried cola-cao, dried coffee, dried tapes with grease from spaghetti with bacon, dry pans from cooking meat, a whole tape covered in oil from having stored tuna, everything came out clean. It is very important to add rinse aid and adjust the hardness of the water for the salt, so that the ducts and propellers are not damaged by lime. I used a branded 3-in-1 capsule and I will try the classic tablets and the powder as well, to see if there is a difference in the wash. I run the dishwasher at the cheapest times, as it can be programmed.

1207083913.text_en: I've only had it for a few days but so far I'm very happy. Inside it is practically the same as the one I had before, of course also Bosch, so it has not cost me anything to adapt to it. I haven't had time to try all the programs yet but for now I am very happy with my purchase.

1152507503.text_en: After purchasing the dishwasher they sent me a message to arrange the installation, and within 3 business days I had it assembled at home. To configure it I used the application, which has improved compared to a couple of years ago when I signed up with a washing machine. For now it washes correctly.

1205595690.text_en: Today I received a Bosch dishwasher, for the last 8 years I have been struggling with a Polish brand dishwasher..., Bosch is different in every respect, very quiet (class B), the 60-minute program washed all the dishes perfectly, the baskets are very stable, great workmanship, I highly recommend it.  #opinionmotivated by promotion*

1185632252.text_en: It is quite quiet, which I like, easy to use, the eco program is quite long, more than 4 hours, the function that opens the door one hour before the end of the ECO program does not convince me although they indicate that it is to save energy, I like the rest of the programs that leave the dishes clean.

1160259405.text_en: The dishwasher meets my expectations 100%. Great energy class of the device. Well-selected programs. I was positively surprised by its considerable load capacity. 1150560290.text_en: After having a Fagor for many years, when it broke down I decided on this Bosch one with a third cutlery tray and energy label C. 1147038402.text_en: From the purchase on the website, the delivery service and installation at home, everything is very fast and professional. 1200775206.text_en: Generally, I recommend the dishwasher, I have been using it for 3 months and I can say that it washes dishes very well. 1148449880.title_en: Quiet, spacious, and variety of programs.

1173128949.text_en: Purchased about a month and a half ago and at the moment it turns out to be a truly excellent purchase: easy to program and activate even remotely via the app, very spacious and silent.
