1150747160.text_en: It has helped us reduce daily work time at home, its capacity is perfect for my family.    I like how quiet it is, you can barely tell it's working. It has a wide variety of washing programs and is energy efficient. The dishes come out shiny and dry.

1145172352.text_en: What is most striking about this dishwasher is that it is extremely quiet. You have it next to you and you practically don't realize that it is working. Apart from that, aesthetically it is very beautiful, our kitchen is open-concept and we chose the appliance also for its aesthetics.

1130697297.text_en: A Bosch dishwasher is one of those things that changes your life! Now you no longer have to spend hours and hours simmering dishes in the kitchen - this machine will do it for you!  After we bought it, we never again experienced panic when we came home from a big barbecue and saw that we had a pile of dirty dishes. Now we just put everything in the machine, select the appropriate program and within a few minutes everything is clean and dry.  The machine also has different programs for different types of dishes and dirt, so you don't have to worry about ruining something. And if you're afraid that your pets will end up in the machine along with the dishes (which actually happened to me once), don't worry - the machine also has a safety function that will prevent it from closing if something is in it.  In short, the Bosch dishwasher is the perfect addition to any kitchen. Now you can enjoy the time you used to spend doing the dishes, and instead you can devote yourself to the things you love - like eating food with clean dishes!

1201746184.text_en: I think this is the best dishwasher in this class. It has very good parameters in terms of water and electricity consumption and acceptable program durations. Another advantage is the cutlery drawer and opening the door after the program ends. It's a nice dishwasher, but we'll see if it works.

1157492611.text_en: Previously our dishwasher was Bosch. After 12 years of service it was time for a change. This new model is practically the same as the previous one and is perfect for our daily use. At the moment I can't comment on what I don't like since it has always worked perfectly.

1154680156.title_en: Good machine, not so much the after-sales service
1154680156.text_en: The only reason I would recommend this product is because of the quality it has and the reputation of the brand. 1150520047.text_en: Silent, automatic door opening, very efficient in cleaning, easy to use and with fast, automatic programs and very efficient ECO. 1206046756.text_en: I recommend this dishwasher model, it is my first dishwasher, and yet thanks to its easy operation and clear instructions, I have no problems with using it, it is very spacious. 1200211499.text_en: This free-standing dishwasher has been my best investment for many, many years. 1161133630.text_en: This is my first dishwasher at home, and another Bosch product. Convenience cannot be appreciated. I was guided by the noise level and chose this model. 1160767155.text_en: The dishwasher works great, I like the online assistant that helps you choose a washing program. Unfortunately, I have not yet received the dishwashing capsules "as a gift". 1221419925.text_en: The dishwasher works great, the installer took a photo that the light was working and they left it installed, but he didn't wait to turn on the water and once the faucet was turned on, the entire kitchen filled with water. 1210537690.text_en: We've been using it for a few weeks and so far so good. We like that it has an independent upper tray for cutlery and that the middle tray (the one normally used for glasses, cups, etc.) can be adjusted in height to leave more or less space in the lower tray.

1153813646.text_en: So far very good, the construction looks quality (the entire interior is made of stainless steel). Very quiet and easy to use. 1210226310.text_en: Silent, effective in cleaning and easy to maintain the exterior without noticing the fingerprints that are barely distinguishable and that with a soft cloth the little that is visible disappears. 1161192099.text_en: The dishwasher fully met my expectations. It has many programs and is very economical. A very useful advantage is that after washing, the door opens by itself. She is very quiet. Its modern design matches my kitchen. I heartily recommend it to everyone

1217381954.text_en: The car is f silent, I can let it go at any time because nothing is heard. It washes perfectly.. 1185067952.title_en: Very pretty, efficient and super quiet. Perfect!!!

1150953608.title_en: I've only had it for a short time, so far everything is correct.
1150953608.text_en: I bought the product recently so I have used it few times. For now it's what I expected from it. Silent, does its job well, happy for now. I decided on this brand because all my appliances are Bosch and I am satisfied with their performance.

It is not well thought out, it is true that it locks the machine during operation, but it does not lock it off so you can easily start it using only two buttons, it loves to touch all the buttons with lights so it was an important function for us, this has disappointed us since we have to be careful that it does not start it. The lock should be enabled at all times as it happens in other appliances, it is for this point that I do not give it 5 stars since it was an issue that we reviewed during the purchase and ruled out other brands that did not have a lock.

1154878680.text_en: Very quiet dishwasher, easy to handle. Leave the dishes perfect. The three trays are spacious and comfortable. The cutlery is very good. The middle tray is height adjustable and is very practical. Simple but elegant design. It is a good purchase, I recommend it.

1211001473.text_en: This Bosch dishwasher is economical, efficient and very quiet. It gives a real impression of quality through its aesthetics and the washing and drying results. Once again I placed my trust in Bosch, which is a sure value and a reference. Perfect!

1147037654.text_en: From the first step on the website, the purchase and the perfect installation service at home. 1213639309.text_en: Light years away from my Whirlpool 6th sense which went into crisis in its seventh year and broke the water pump (...), this beauty is powerful, extremely silent, economical and thanks to the wi-fi connection it sends me notifications to my mobile phone and updates itself.

1151920751.text_en: Very quiet, he tells me on my phone when he's done, the only thing I don't like is that his fingers are marked. It's very practical to be able to raise or lower the glass tray although the plastics that hold it don't seem very strong, we'll see. So far super happy

1207922210.text_en: It is the second dishwasher I have purchased from this series. THE first for my parents. Wishing I had mine now. Silent. With eco programs. Perfect duration. Times can be reduced. Light saving. Large capacity. Perfectly clean dishes. Delighted with him.

1182338401.title_en: Reliability and good value for money.

1160238604.title_en: I recommend this product - intuitive, comfortable, great!

1146771560.title_en: Cleans very well, quiet and easy to use
1146771560.text_en: Complies with what is indicated.  In the times that I have used it, it leaves everything very clean and shiny. It's very quiet. Variety of programs that meet various situations, such as a need for quick cleaning. The handling is very intuitive. Very nice finish.

1142083751.text_en: We bought the dishwasher two weeks ago, and we are delighted with it, it is very quiet and has a lot of capacity, and I really like the cutlery tray. And it can also be managed from your mobile phone and energy efficiency is an extra point in its favor.

1167193599.text_en: By having the cutlery tray, it has more capacity than the previous one, although I don't like the distribution of the lower tray as much as the one I had as a whole, it fits much more dishes. The best thing is that it is extremely quiet, you don't even notice that it is on.

1184341349.text_en: A fantastic dishwasher.   The dishes were perfectly clean.    Many programs in the Home connect application.    Easily adjust the height of the middle drawer to three levels, which allows you to place large pots in the lower drawer.   Only this one, no other.

1185171125.text_en: This dishwasher has a large load capacity and I have noticed it, compared to the previous appliance from another brand.  As for operation, it is very quiet. So far we have used it at home 3 times and both cutlery and dishes are very clean.

1152651221.text_en: I haven't used the dishwasher for a while but I like it because it makes little noise, the third tray is very comfortable and leaves the dishes clean without having to rinse them first and I like that it has different temperatures and that it can be programmed. We are still getting to know each other

1176036504.text_en: The dishwasher has a very clear and intuitive control panel. Another advantage for me is the cutlery drawer and automatic door opening after the program ends. Compared to previous dishwashers, it is quieter. I don't expect anything more from a dishwasher.

1148708092.text_en: A fantastic dishwasher. This is the second Bosch in our house. 1220066948.title_en: When it comes to equipment, only Bosch

1147966799.text_en: Accustomed to older, noisy, inefficient dishwashers. Now I see how putting in the dirty dishes, before I scrubbed them before washing, COME OUT CLEAN!! And no one knows that the dishwasher is running, super quiet, more than recommended

1151297600.title_en: Very satisfied with the first washes

174569271.text_en: It is an appliance that fulfills its function perfectly. It dries all the dishes wonderfully, it has ample space, very good use of space, the third cutlery tray is super practical!   I am very happy with the purchase!

1199941337.text_en: The machine works very quietly, economically and thoroughly. It has many useful features. A very useful additional function is to be able to start it via WiFi, so that it can work when the electricity is cheapest. And it looks good. We are very satisfied.

1184780529.text_en: It is quite quiet and leaves dishes clean. We appreciate the robustness of the trays that, even when loaded, do not come off their rails.    I have connected it via Wi-Fi and I am taking advantage of the automatic calculation of the start 3n the cheapest hours.

1218275013.text_en: We just bought the dishwasher, so I can't judge it objectively yet. However, very easy handling and installation were a big plus. Great design. The dishwasher is quiet, the dishes are clean after washing and even the plastics are dry, which surprised me a lot.

1183304006.text_en: In the first wash everything worked correctly. I loved that it opens only when the washing program ends to prevent steam from condensing on the dishes. This way you don't have to wait to open it so that everything comes out dry.

1202556828.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion Very good choice. We turn on the dishwasher twice a day. It has large compartments and a cutlery drawer. It works quietly and has several operating modes. It fits perfectly in a modern kitchen. It washes dishes very well! We recommend

1176683669.text_en: The best possible choice.  I had doubts that it is too big, but it is absolutely perfect; pots, plates, glasses, cutlery together and they come out immaculate. After a meal with guests, all the trouble is solved in a wash. As in the commercial, like a Bosch

1159643259.title_en: a positive surprise and a qualitative leap
1159643259.text_en: Bosch has gone ahead with the quality of workmanship inside and out. I am not afraid, as in the case of competitors, that something will break, I will fall, something is unsteady in my hands. Intuitive and easy to use. mobile application. I recommend it to undecided people

1150769914.text_en: Good wash, quiet and has many programs to choose from that best suits your needs. But for me the best thing is that I can program the dishwasher on a delayed basis or turn it on through the 'Home Connect' app wherever I am. 10/10

1168075518.text_en: A roomy, quiet, economical (water, energy) cutlery drawer is a brilliant idea. Perfect for a family of 4 (activated once every day), great option of opening the door (I don't have to wait to walk), intuitive panel, extra application

1206824281.text_en: I bought a Bosch Serie 4 SMS4EMI06E dishwasher and I am very impressed with how it all works, the dishes are washed brilliantly, it runs quietly, saves energy, has a cutlery drawer and a remote control application.    I highly recommend this dishwasher

1160229407.text_en: Great dishwashing equipment from BOSCH, quiet and very economical in terms of water consumption and, most importantly, electricity, it also has internet control after downloading the application, I recommend this dishwasher to anyone who doesn't know which dishwasher to choose.

1216547307.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion Connecting it was no problem, after removing the top it fit under the kitchen counter. It works quietly and washes thoroughly. It looks good in the kitchen, in a metallic design with red lights on the buttons.

1182172895.text_en: I bought the dishwasher because I have had a previous one from the same brand, running every day for 15 years and it has not caused any problems. I have continued to trust the brand and it never disappoints. Silent dishwasher, and an impeccable finish.

1161070374.text_en: Very happy with my new acquisition. It leaves everything very clean and has a good number of washes to adapt to what is needed. Compared to the previous dishwasher I had, this one does not make any noise. I would buy it again

1204066876.title_en: How easy it is to achieve perfection

1148222393.text_en: This dishwasher is great, I am very pleased, it is beautiful. Great programs, very quiet, all household members are happy. I will definitely recommend it to my family and friends. I recommend it with a clear conscience 100%.

1215981798.text_en: I recommend the Bosch Serie 4 SMS4EMI06E dishwasher, it is equipment that definitely met my expectations. First of all, I was very positively surprised by its quiet operation - at about 42 dB it is practically inaudible, which is of great importance in everyday use.    A big advantage is also the high efficiency of washing and drying. The EfficientDry function with automatic door opening makes the dishes really well dried, without streaks and stains.    The functional interior is also worth mentioning - adjustable basket height (Rackmatic) is a great solution for larger pots and pans.    Another advantage is saving - water consumption of approximately 9 liters per cycle in the Eco program and a good energy class make the dishwasher economical.    Modern functions are also a plus, such as control via the Home Connect application or the ability to save your favorite program, which makes operation much easier.    To sum up - it is a very solid, well-made and functional dishwasher. A great choice for people who are looking for reliable equipment at a reasonable price.

1149537397.title_en: AT THE MOMENT IT IS GOOD

1204912834.text_en: This is another BOSH dishwasher in my house. Since I was extremely satisfied so far, I did not think long about choosing the brand of the new device. The equipment gives very good impressions at first glance. The workmanship is very solid, all parts are impeccably fitted and the materials are of high quality. When choosing, it was very important that the interior of the dishwasher was made of high-quality stainless steel. The level of energy saving (B) is also significant, which makes the equipment more environmentally friendly. In everyday use, the equipment is very intuitive to use and all functions are directly accessible from the convenient keyboard on the front of the dishwasher. To start using it, you do not have to go through the several dozen-page manual. The set of programs itself is also unobjectionable, it has everything you need for everyday use. When you turn it on for the first time, you are positively surprised by its very quiet operation - the device is completely inaudible outside the installation room. Worth mentioning is the automatic door opening function, which allows for quick and reliable drying of dishes. Overall, after these few days, I can only say positive things about the product. We'll see what time brings, the previous device worked without failure for almost 15 years.

1184336460.text_en: I decided to buy a dishwasher to save water and time, and I am very pleased.  Zmywarka ma bardzo dużo możliwości modyfikacji programu prania. Time from 30 min to 4 h, temperature, dirt level or auto program. The option of drying by opening the door automatically is nice - the dishes are then dried more naturally, not dried out.  There is an additional upper shelf that no longer has its own spray arm and I only use it sometimes for slightly dirty shovels or children's lunch boxes. It can be easily removed, leaving room for taller pots.  In general, I highly recommend comfort and pleasure.

1200811543.title_en: The equipment has been checked, everything works
1200811543.text_en: The end of the dispute over washing dishes. High-gloss washing

1219901814.text_en: I chose a Bosch dishwasher and I am very pleased with the purchase. The previous dishwasher of this brand served me for 18 years, so when choosing a new one, the decision was very easy - I chose Bosch again. So far, everything works flawlessly and the equipment meets my expectations.    A big advantage is the third cutlery drawer, but the manufacturer also left the traditional cutlery basket, so everyone can use the solution that suits them better. It's a very practical approach. Additionally, the third drawer can be easily removed if you need more space for larger dishes. The whole thing is well thought out and comfortable in everyday use. I recommend!  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1204448107.text_en: This is my second dishwasher, previously I used a different brand of dishwasher for 16 years. I like the ability to control this dishwasher using the application, the ability to download additional washing programs, which is a big plus, and the ability to change all settings from the application level. At the moment I've only been using it for a short time, but the washing and drying is phenomenal, I can't even compare it to the previous dishwasher, I'm also glad that it has a cutlery basket, but one has gotten used to this solution, but of course there is also a pull-out "drawer" for the upper cutlery shelf. The stainless steel bottom is also a big plus. Everything fits nicely and so far I can't say anything bad about the dishwasher.

1203508021.text_en: It is an excellent product that makes your life easier every day! The car is super silent, roomy for an entire family. I was pleasantly surprised by its cleaning and rinsing performance. The programs are diversified, adaptable depending on what you wash. I recommend this Bosch product! High quality!

1160533058.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher that I recently purchased is an absolute revelation! Its functions are extremely intuitive, and various washing programs make each dish perfectly clean. Additionally, the time savings this device provides allows me to enjoy more of my free time instead of spending it washing up. I am truly delighted with its performance and build quality, and I have noticed a significant reduction in water and energy consumption. I definitely recommend it to anyone looking for convenience and efficiency in the kitchen!

1217266116.text_en: The dishwasher is worth recommending, although there are some things to consider. It looks good, everything you need to connect is included, easy configuration with your phone. Overall, after a few uses, a good impression, the only drawback in terms of use - despite the door opening function, it does not dry well - water remains in the mugs and cups on the upper "seam". My previous dishwasher dried it. Maybe it's due to the strict requirements for energy efficiency - I don't know, for me it's a disadvantage.  The upper basket, although probably useful, did not work for me and was removed. It was a problem to fit large plates, larger cups and the upper drawer. Apart from that, everything is OK because it is, after all, the top model of Series 4, I hope it will work without any failures.

1181122734.text_en: The dishwasher looks nice, and the most important thing is that it washes plates well. It can be connected to the Internet, I don't know if it is an advantage, but if someone is a gadget enthusiast, it certainly is. I bought a Bosch to replace a 12-year-old dishwasher from the same company and I am not disappointed.

1202001352.text_en: The dishwasher looks great, even though the previous one was built-in, so I chose a free-standing one. It adds a modern look to the kitchen. Very intuitive programs and very thorough washing. #opinion motivated by promotion*

1200510434.text_en: I purchased this washing machine and after the first use I am very pleased! The glasses, cutlery and plates look like new!   It is excellent!  I recommend!  I will come back after more experience!

1204998163.text_en: This is a very good choice, especially when it comes to comfort of use, it is quiet, well-equipped dishwasher that offers loading flexibility. Super fast washing cycle.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1199813144.text_en: It is an efficient machine, it can be integrated into the furniture, it is made of stainless steel inside, the drawers are solid, it washes the dishes well, it has different programs, it works well with the app on the phone, I like it.

1209787792.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion #Bosch #dishwashing #largequietdishwasher. My first dishwasher in my new apartment. Bottom made of stainless steel. It works quietly and washes well. I recommend :)

1207607508.title_en: A spacious dishwasher with smart home integration
1207607508.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The BOSCH SMS4ENI06E dishwasher is my second dishwasher from this company, but this time I chose a larger model. The device is quiet and effectively removes even tougher dirt. The main advantages include the capacity provided by three drawers for dishes and an additional cutlery basket, as well as the automatic door opening function after the washing cycle. An interesting functionality is control via an application that can be integrated with Home Assistant. I recommend it to everyone who wants to have a solid and functional dishwasher in their kitchen.

1207485467.text_en: Above all, the dishwasher is economical, and this was the most important point on my list. It has nice programs, I use eco most often at night, and during the day, when necessary, I use fast. It has well-designed baskets for dishes, even wide dinner baskets can fit alongside deep ones. The previous Amica dishwasher had a drawer for cutlery and unfortunately some were always unwashed, so this time I chose a dishwasher with a cutlery basket and it was a good decision because they are always clean and dry. In addition, the third upper basket is great for large knives and kitchen spatulas, flat bowls can also be accommodated. To sum up, the choice of the dishwasher was right, because most importantly, the dishes are clean after each wash, and that's what a dishwasher is all about - it cleans and you don't have to clean it up afterwards. I recommend #opinionmotivated by promotion

1216803345.text_en: The Bosch SMS4ENI06E dishwasher was a very good choice.  The dishwasher is economical and quiet, which was important to us because of the open kitchen. Thanks to the innovative Efficient Dry function, the dishes are perfectly dry after each cycle without the need to manually wipe them. Easy adjustment of the height of the second basket allows for better organization of loading.  I am very satisfied with the quality of washing and drying, and thanks to modern functions it will meet the expectations of every user. I recommend it!!

1202538037.text_en: It is an excellent dishwasher. Cleans very well, dries dishes and is very quiet! I recommend it with all confidence, it really does the job!

1221078711.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher, I am very satisfied, it is easy to use, the dishes are clean (I have a Finisch set), I recommend it to all my friends

1201209747.text_en: The dishwasher meets my expectations and most importantly, my wife is satisfied, the plates, cutlery, glasses and pots are clean :)

1219274970.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher, I won't choose another one. I test the programs and I'm very satisfied, I recommend it.

1219270592.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher, I will not consider any other company, I recommend it overall

1209788424.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion.  The dishwasher is spacious, quiet and easy to use.

1218833876.text_en: I recommend, it's a really nice dishwasher!

1221620665.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I decided to buy a second Bosch dishwasher with a fully steel bottom - this time for my mother - because my dishwasher from this company works well. There was no dirt left on the washed dishes, everything was clean (only a few caps had turned and there was water in them). Additionally, we feel safer thanks to AquaStop flood protection. The automatic door opening after washing is absolutely brilliant, we love this feature! We were also very pleasantly surprised by the presence of two cutlery containers: both a basket and a third drawer, which on the one hand is great because it provides great flexibility depending on the items being washed (ladle/cutlery, as the basket or drawer can always be removed if it is not needed in a given wash), and on the other hand, in my opinion, a drawer for cutlery in the case of large cooking and washing a small amount later. cutlery (e.g. only a large knife and a ladle), and mainly pots - limits the height of pots that can be placed in the upper drawer (personally, I miss the small shelf present in the model without a cutlery drawer, preferably foldable; but for my mother, the current arrangement is probably enough). The option of washing half a load also makes sense. The dishwasher works quietly. The eco program takes a bit long, but if it saves energy and water, that's ok. We are very satisfied!

1218636058.text_en: Fresh and quick purchase, I needed a free-standing dishwasher and here it is. Just make sure it has a stainless steel bottom, and that's what I bought.   The previous one, a few years old - I don't remember the model - with a plastic bottom, is so-so in the long run... The new one was put to work immediately so that she wouldn't think she was on holiday... She washed what she needed and is free until tomorrow, and on the holidays that will come one day, she will earn almost non-stop... If properly serviced and cared for, it will last for several years.  And if not... ...The gentlemen will come and take her away...

1161149063.text_en: This is my first dishwasher for home, but I have used dishwashers from various companies many times. I am very happy with this purchase and it will make my life much easier and I will gain more time for other tasks.

1207024090.title_en: Premium dishwasher at a reasonable price
1207024090.text_en: I bought a BOSCH SMS4ENI06E dishwasher and from the first use I feel that I made a very good choice. It works surprisingly quietly, so you can easily turn it on even late in the evening. The programs are intuitive and the washing results are really great - the dishes come out clean and well-dried. An additional third, upper basket increases the possibilities of arranging dishes. Moreover, the price turned out to be very reasonable considering the quality of workmanship. I am very satisfied with the purchase and I can recommend this model with a clear conscience.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1180655646.text_en: After less than a year the dishwasher is reporting faults that seem non-existent to me. The instructions included with the device are as confusing as the images of the instructions themselves. I am not satisfied with the purchase I made. I previously had an old Bosch that lasted me over 30 years and never gave me any problems. These new machines with many digitized keys create many complications that are almost always poorly explained.

1218113394.text_en: ​What is striking from the first start is the incredible silence. The pump motor does the job - you can easily turn on the dishwasher at night in the kitchenette and not worry that the sound of the pump will drown out the TV series or the sleep of the household members.

1158255590.text_en: The dishwasher works great. I use it every day and haven't found any flaws yet. It washes perfectly, dries great and is very quiet. I recommend it to everyone

1163300101.text_en: The dishwasher works great. This is my first dishwasher. Very simple operation. It is quiet at work and washes dishes well.

1207598765.text_en: "The BOSCH SMS4ENI06E Serie 4 EfficientDry dishwasher is a great choice for anyone who values comfort and modern solutions in the kitchen. The EfficientDry system makes the dishes perfectly dry and ready to be put away immediately after the end of the cycle - without the need for additional wiping. The third ExtraSpace basket is a huge convenience: I can easily fit cutlery, small kitchen accessories and cups in it, so I have more space for larger pots in the lower baskets and plates. The dishwasher works very quietly, and the intuitive control panel makes it easier to select the appropriate program. I also appreciate the energy efficiency - the device uses less electricity and water, which translates into lower bills and greater care for the environment. It is equipment that really makes everyday life easier and makes the kitchen work more efficiently.

1161551155.text_en: The dishwasher works quietly, washes dirty dishes very nicely and does not make any noise.

1221294683.text_en: I bought the dishwasher after 10 years of using the terrible Bosch model (it still worked perfectly). The first minus difference I notice compared to its predecessor is the less solid door, or rather the handle itself. Maybe it is related to the size of the dishwasher (the previous one was 45). The baskets themselves also seem to have become slimmer. Overall, the steel bottom and 3 retractable trays with a cutlery basket are a big plus. I hope that the equipment will last no longer than its predecessor.

1218378748.text_en: I definitely recommend Bosch dishwashers - this is my second one, the previous one served without any problems for 10 years. Reliability and quality are really at a high level! The drying function means that plates and pots can be immediately put into the cabinets. So far, I honestly recommend it, it's super quiet compared to the old one.

1221091733.text_en: A very solid and spacious free-standing dishwasher. It washes very thoroughly, even on fast programs. 1207253127.text_en: The SMS4ENI06E dishwasher is a really great choice!  I must admit that I am very pleased. First of all, it works flawlessly - with low noise level, and it washes dishes very well. 1209888349.text_en: The Bosch SMS4ENI06E dishwasher was a really good choice - it washes thoroughly, is quiet and easily holds a lot of dishes. 1221508703.text_en: The dishwasher has a modern design that emphasizes the modern character of the kitchen. I tried all programs. 1201584638.text_en: I am satisfied with the choice of Bosch dishwasher. Operation is really simple, and you can also use a dedicated application that makes it easier to choose the right program. I was also positively surprised by the automatic opening of the dishwasher door during drying. I recommend #opinionmotivated by promotion

1201449706.text_en: I am satisfied with the purchase of the Bosch SMS4ENI06E dishwasher. It is intuitive to use and has various programs.  When choosing, we wondered whether the third ExtraSpace basket would limit the space, but it turned out to be a great solution. Large flat dishes and trays as well as kitchen utensils fit well into it, which in the previous dishwasher were simply "stuffed" between other dishes. The option of adjusting the middle basket, which we lowered to accommodate taller dishes, fits perfectly here. With this setting, the lower basket is of sufficient height.   A nice option is the ability to operate the dishwasher from the Home Connect phone application and track information there, such as the cleanliness of the filter and the status of consumables. I was surprised by the ability to download additional washing programs! It is also interesting to monitor water and energy consumption in individual cycles and view statistics.   An additional advantage is the option of opening the door after the washing cycle is completed.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1215710333.text_en: The Bosch Serie 4 SMS4EMI06E dishwasher is very quiet and effective - the dishes are perfectly clean and well dried. 1221766018.text_en: The dishwasher washes well, even heavily soiled dishes. I expected it to be a bit quieter - but there is an option to mute it for 30 minutes. 1219942668.text_en: The dishwasher is well made, it has an additional third metal basket that is easily removable, other models have a plastic one. It is quiet, has all the functions needed for standard use and is worth recommending in this price group.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

An additional cutlery shelf also does the job - thanks to this, we have a whole bottom for dishes. I chose a model with a door that opens automatically after the program is finished, very useful when you turn on the dishwasher and have to leave, and when you return there are washed and dry dishes waiting for you. In the evening, the additional silent washing function comes in handy - very helpful, the device works almost silently. I highly recommend it.

1219634112.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I just bought a Bosch SMS4EV108E dishwasher. This is a very recent purchase, but I can confidently say that it looks extremely modern. I was very impressed by the interior of the device. It is extremely roomy, it seems to have more space than my previous dishwasher 60, from a different company. Noteworthy are the well-designed, foldable plate baskets that can be adjusted to your needs and the third cutlery drawer, which makes the dishwasher seem even more spacious. An additional advantage is the ability to adjust the height of the upper basket, which allows you to wash tall dishes.  What made me choose this model was the automatic door opening at the end of the program. This solution speeds up drying and prevents condensation, so the removed dishes do not require wiping. And after the first wash, I was delighted with the cleanliness and shine of the dishes.  A big surprise is also the very quiet operation of the equipment, practically inaudible - a big plus.   Although it is a brand new purchase, I am very happy with my choice.    Also worth mentioning is the convenient operation via the Home Connect application. Which allows you to start the dishwasher from your phone or check the time until the end of the program. This is a really useful solution.  The dishwasher looks modern and solid, and the quality of workmanship is high. I believe that the equipment is worth the price. I recommend it to anyone looking for a quiet, spacious and solid dishwasher.

1213853659.title_en: A very nice and quiet dishwasher
1213853659.text_en: I am very satisfied with my new Bosch dishwasher. It is very easy to use and very quiet. The dishes are super clean and the special drawer for cutlery and the function that ensures that the door opens are very nice options. The dishes are now always dry at the end of the program. This is very useful for me because I usually program the dishwasher to run at night. With my previous dishwasher I had the disadvantage that the dishes remained wet because I could not open the door after the end of the program. With this smart function this is now a thing of the past!

1207462180.text_en: I bought the dishwasher thinking that I would have a helper in the kitchen. I have more than that.  It's practical, easy to use, quiet and economical, and the dishes come out without a trace of stains. I really made a deal.

1220317135.text_en: I'm very satisfied. The dishwasher is very good, and has many extras. Lots of programs that you can easily find via WiFi. I can only recommend it.

1200226617.title_en: Washes well, but the layout could be much better.
1200226617.text_en: Bought 2 months ago. The layout of the racks is very illogical. Not suitable for standard glasses, just doesn't fit. The raised pins on the right are too long. You can reach into a pen like that. Light plastic containers are knocked over by the pressure, and the (dirty) water remains in them. The bottom rack is much too coarse and if only the front (for plates) is used, the rack folds down a bit when brought forward. The cutlery rack is well laid out. Furthermore, the dishes are clean and that is ultimately what it is all about, but unfortunately the layout has not been carefully thought through. (not someone from the field, I think).

1201574598.text_en: Super satisfied. I recommend this product

1203708993.text_en: Helga BoschII is the granddaughter of the first Helga Bosch who served faithfully in our kitchen for more than 20 years and retired a few months ago to a well-deserved retirement.  The niece is very modern and flirty. It is connected via the BOSCH app to everything new in the field. Through the application, it can execute a lot of dishwashing programs adapted to the most varied requirements.  It is very roomy. Holds 14 sets of dishes plus cutlery in a special drawer.  It is extremely quiet in operation and uses electricity and water sparingly.  Easy to install, all necessary accessories are included in the delivered package. With a little skill you can ditch the specialist.  It is a reliable helper of the house in the kitchen.  Highly recommend.

1214549586.text_en: I have been using the Bosch series 4 sms4evw08e dishwasher for a few weeks now and am generally very satisfied. The device looks modern and fits well in the kitchen. Installation was quite easy and the instructions were clear. What is immediately noticeable is how quiet the dishwasher is. Even when it's running, you can barely hear it. The different programs are useful. The dishes come out clean and dry, even when the machine is full. And I am happy with the automatic door opening at the end of the program.

1215660967.text_en: After more than 15 years, our Bosch dishwasher has been retired. Developments have gone quickly in 15 years. Looking at our experience with Bosch appliances, we bought a new one with even more options and economical in use. The options for "washing dishes" are ample. We also like the separate drawer for cutlery, etc. The top drawer is adjustable, so you can put taller things in it. Cleaning the device is easy. We are satisfied!

1208812994.title_en: My Bosch – A reliable everyday helper
1208812994.text_en: I am really very happy with my new Bosch Series 4 dishwasher SMS4EVW08E, which I have been using for a month.    Cleaning is easy. The device rinses really thoroughly.  The app is practical in everyday life. What really impressed me is the ability to control the machine via the Home Connect app. I can start or delay a rinse cycle from anywhere and see when the machine is finished. This is particularly practical if I want to plan flexibly.    A big plus point: The app shows me exactly how much water and electricity each rinse cycle requires. This is helpful if you want to know how economically the machine works.    With energy efficiency class B, the dishwasher consumes around 65 kWh of electricity in 100 operating cycles and only requires around 9 liters of water per wash cycle in the Eco program.     The Silence program with 43 decibels is pleasantly quiet. The dishes come out really dry thanks to the Efficient Dry drying technology - no damp cutlery or wet glasses.    The Bosch is a solid dishwasher that works reliably and doesn't use too much electricity or water. I would recommend him.

1207681803.text_en: Everything is superlative! It has changed our lives, more time to spend with family and 0 time to wash dishes. I also got rid of the dish drainer. I take the dishes out sparkling clean and put them right back in their place, ready to dry. The variety of programs helps enormously. What I would add would be that all programs have the option to open the door at the end. Otherwise, I don't have enough words to praise the product!

1217280251.text_en: It has almost everything you need for a dishwasher, AUTO program, automatic door opening, separate drawer for cutlery, height-adjustable drawer and, of course, half load... I used the 1-hour and auto program and the dishes come out flawlessly. Aaa... not to forget.. Yes. She is very knowledgeable.

1199852780.text_en: It is competitive, silent, economical, roomy, ideal for dishes left dirty after the departure of the guests. It is exactly what I wanted for myself and my family.

1201226261.text_en: Everything is 5 stars and up. I had an unpleasant experience with another brand, after which I bought Bosch! All fears disappeared when I noticed the quality of the product. It washes exceptionally well. If you use softening salt, rinse aid and the recommended detergent, everything comes out without stains. I couldn't believe how shiny the dishes are, I've never been able to do that washing by hand! Everything is super easy to use, the 3 baskets are more than enough for our needs and the app makes everything easier. Everything is under strict observation with the help of the app, the salt level, etc., the different programs that can be downloaded from the app are wonderful, suitable for everyone's needs, perfectly adapted according to what you put in the wash. Wonderful in a word, we've been using it for about 2 weeks but I clearly notice a saving in water. In the application we also find a meter to monitor water and electricity consumption. One cycle washes 10 liters of water... I think we use 10 liters for 3 plates with the tap running continuously. I'm not saying that I had to drain them. Now I take them out dry and directly in the closet with them.

1203503377.text_en: Wonderful product, it changed our lives! He makes his presence felt when his wife cooks and dirty many dishes. It washes perfectly and the multitude of programs are perfectly adapted to every need or type of dish. The only thing I would like every program to have would be the automatic opening of the door at the end of the program or at least an option by which you can activate this option. Otherwise, perfect quality of the materials from which it is made, everything is solid. The dishes come out perfectly clean, I feel sorry to touch the cutlery because I leave prints on them 😂.

1207228903.text_en: it's just what you need for those who want reliability and very good results without complications. It washes excellently, is silent and consumes little

1218412832.text_en: The design is very well chosen and the lighting on the display is impressive.

1214654324.text_en: Very nice dishwasher, user-friendly. Looks nice and handy cutlery drawer.

1217379598.text_en: I am extremely satisfied with this dishwasher and can honestly say that I cannot imagine my life without it. It quickly became an indispensable aid in my daily routine, saving me time and effort.    It works flawlessly every time: dishes come out clean, shiny and streak-free, no matter how dirty they are before washing. The programs are well thought out and the results are consistent, which gives me confidence that it is doing its job perfectly.    In addition, it is very easy to use and effective, which makes it ideal for daily use. For me, it is one of the best investments for home comfort.    I wholeheartedly recommend this dishwasher to anyone who wants more free time and less stress in the kitchen.

1216730553.text_en: The Bosch SMS4EVW08E Series 4 impresses with good washing results, quiet operation and easy operation. The Home Connect control is particularly powerful because the dishwasher can be easily monitored and controlled via the app. In conjunction with Home Assistant, there are additional advantages, such as displaying the device status, notifications when the program ends and integration into automations. This means the dishwasher can be integrated even smarter and more conveniently into everyday life.

1219918635.text_en: I'm thrilled! Everything will be super clean! Thanks to the app, I was able to set up the dishwasher very easily and received helpful tips. I also think it's very good that the app regularly reminds you to refill the rinse aid and salt and to clean the device. What's also perfect is that the dishwasher is built so that it can be cleaned quickly and easily. All in all, my expectations of the dishwasher were even exceeded.

1182448041.title_en: Silent dishwasher, large number of programs
1182448041.text_en: Purchased to replace another Bosch dishwasher, which lasted just over 10 years. Very quiet, amply sufficient number of programmes, the Eco one is excellent, even if it lasts a long time. The 1 hour program is good, although with some drying problems. Positive purchase for now, we need to see how long it lasts. The weak point, as in the old dishwasher, could be the plastic bottom, subject to deformation with consequent water leaks.

1216913845.text_en: Our old dishwasher went away without notice after many years.   My skepticism about the ECO program at 50 °C is completely unfounded. We don't wash up every day, which means the leftover food has already dried out. Still a great result with 9 liters of water.  I put a program from the app on the favorites button. I had to do some searching to find out how to save the program as a favorite, but then it worked.

1217398702.text_en: I have owned this dishwasher for about 1 year. The Home Connect app is a big plus. I'm alerted to maintain the device, I get alerts to refill supplies, the user manual is at hand in the app.  Dishes, even very dirty ones, are impeccably washed, thanks to the multitude of programs included, some downloadable.  In conclusion, I recommend this model.

1204895119.text_en: I chose the Bosch dishwasher from a wide range of products, primarily because of its eco-friendly philosophy and focus on water and electricity consumption. Additionally, its cleaning performance is incredibly powerful. It offers space for 14 place settings. It saves me a lot of time and is one of the essential household appliances. He is simply fantastic!

1203519885.text_en: A silent washing machine. It is roomy and the diversity of available programs makes it super interesting and useful.   It's the kind of equipment that makes you dirty as many pots/plates as possible to turn it on.   The Home Connect application is interesting and reintegrates this experience.  That's what I call a purchase worth the money.

1201210071.text_en: The machine has been working very well for about 1 month, washes better and is much quieter than what I had before. The application is a big plus, the car being connected even when it is stopped. The only problem would be that in the application it seems that it is not possible to select the liter as a unit of measure for statistics.   I hope that in time the car will behave just as well.

1195381152.title_en: Top dishwasher – quiet, efficient and smart!
1195381152.text_en: I am very satisfied with the BOSCH Series 4 SMS4EVW08E! The dishwasher impresses across the board - from the easy operation to the convincing washing results.  I would particularly like to highlight the very quiet operation - ideal for open-plan kitchens. You hardly notice that it is running. The cleaning is excellent - even heavily soiled dishes are thoroughly cleaned. The Home Connect function is also practical - it can be controlled via the app, which makes everyday life much easier.  The interior is flexible thanks to the height-adjustable upper basket and the folding holders, although I would prefer a cutlery basket instead of a cutlery drawer. Energy consumption is also pleasantly low, which saves money and resources in the long run. All in all, a device that ideally combines technology, efficiency and comfort.   The installation was simple and the price/performance ratio is great.  I would buy the device again.

1217176226.title_en: Quiet and reliable dishwasher - clear Ka
1217176226.text_en: I am very satisfied with my Bosch Series 4 dishwasher. I am particularly impressed by how quietly the device works thanks to the SilencePlus technology - it can hardly be heard even in an open kitchen.    The various programs such as Eco 50 °C, Auto 45-65 °C, Intensive 70 °C and the quick program (SpeedPerfect) offer the right setting for every situation. The dishes are reliably cleaned and even heavily soiled pots are cleaned thoroughly. The operation is simple and clear, so you can quickly select the desired program.    I also find the favorites function, which allows you to save frequently used programs, very practical. The device also impresses with its high-quality workmanship and timeless design, which fits well into any kitchen.    Conclusion: A quiet, efficient and reliable dishwasher with excellent cleaning results. A clear purchase recommendation for me!

1203526334.text_en: it seems to me an ok car, very roomy, but with 2 small things that are difficult to control: 1 silent mode, I can't even activate it 2 the application doesn't remember the settings, i.e. what I put in favorites, I set remote control and I can't start it from the phone unless I set remote control every time

1220683168.text_en: I was so amazed when I first saw the results after rinsing. The glasses shine like new, plates and pots were perfectly clean and the dishes didn't need to be cleaned dry. The cutlery from the cutlery drawer was also great. I am very satisfied 👍🏻

1218472781.text_en: It is spacious, incredibly silent, the modular upper shelf makes the difference. Easy connectivity to the app on the phone, notifications regarding the completion of the program, additions with salt or rinse solution. All in all, after 3 weeks of use I am very satisfied.

1218336426.text_en: I was looking for a dishwasher with good value for money. I am really completely satisfied with my decision. I can also easily control the dishwasher via the app. It is quiet and the result is satisfactory.

1207760910.text_en: Delighted with the purchase, it is part of the daily routine.

1208425627.text_en: The machine is super quiet and washes fantastically

1205512512.text_en: I am very satisfied with the product 🙏🏼

1216463861.text_en: Good dishwasher. I'm happy with it.

1218444025.text_en: So far everything is ok, wash well.

1217330727.text_en: The dishwasher is a very nice and functional device, it meets all home requirements, it has many programs, it is of high quality, as a customer I am extremely satisfied with the quality of the product. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1199944712.text_en: The Bosch SMS6ECC12E is an excellent choice for anyone who values ​​comfort and reliability in everyday life. It works very quietly, so you can leave it running in the evening without disturbing the household. Thanks to the practical programs, the washing cycle can be optimally adapted to the type of dishes - from a quick rinse to intensive programs for heavily soiled pots.    The additional drawer for cutlery is particularly practical, making the interior optimally usable. The dishwasher is also energy efficient and uses little water, which is directly reflected in savings. Another highlight is the control via the Home Connect app - so you can easily start and monitor the washing cycle using your smartphone.    In summary, the Bosch SMS6ECC12E is a modern, robust and functional dishwasher that makes everyday life easier and ensures perfectly clean dishes.

1206776793.title_en: Damage to the product, laterally on the left and right sides
1206776793.text_en: We unpacked the washing machine and were surprised by the damage to the sheet metal, which could not have occurred either during transport or during assembly, but only during the process of assembling the washing machine in the production plant.

1207264156.text_en: Beautiful and perfect operation Washes and dries perfectly Not yet tried all the programs but really happy with this model.  Besides, I repeat myself, but he is very beautiful.

1213572395.title_en: If I really have to talk about it with enthusiasm, I'll tell you c
1213572395.text_en: Cooking every day - including homemade first courses, trays of lasagna, desserts and pans always on the move - I needed a dishwasher that was truly up to par. And she is. It washes impeccably: even the most encrusted pans come out clean without having to pre-treat them too much. For me, who loves experimenting in the kitchen, it is a salvation.  The capacity is excellent: I can load everything in an orderly manner, without making impossible jams. The baskets are solid, well designed, and easily adjusted when I have large plates or taller baking molds. It's one of those things that seem small, but make a difference in everyday use.  Another strong point is the silence: I can run it even in the evening while I watch TV or while the family chats at the table, and it doesn't disturb at all. It also dries very well, which is essential for me – I can't stand having to wipe glasses with a cloth.  Aesthetically it is elegant, modern, it gives a nice touch to the kitchen. And you can see that it is built with quality: solid materials, a feeling of robustness, no "light" plastics that make you think about saving money.  In a nutshell? It's a dishwasher that makes you feel at ease. You know it does its job and does it well. For those who, like me, live cooking with passion every day, it is truly a concrete and reliable help. I would buy it again without thinking twice.

1211882195.text_en: I don't regret my purchase, my old Bosch model lasted 10 years of intensive work (there were seven of us at home). The model I just bought has a drawer for cutlery, which I find very practical because you don't have to bend down as much to put it away and it frees up space in the lower basket, which means it has a large capacity. The ultra-sensitive touch keys can be locked during programs. My old model had lightly pressed keys which tended to get clogged. I am therefore delighted with this ultra-easy-to-clean dashboard. The color is superb and matches my interior and my other appliances. It is very quiet, it washes and rinses very well. (at the beginning, I had not opened the water inlet tap enough so the tap symbol came on to signal as soon as I understood. Everything was back to normal and the dishes were perfectly rinsed. It is very easy to buy even without programming the extra drying button. The manual is clear. Some programs end with the automatic opening of the door which is an asset for finalizing the drying. I have not yet found how to activate or deactivate this automatic opening. It I've only had it a week! I sincerely hope that it will last at least 10 years like its predecessor which pushed me to choose the Bosch brand again.

1215156725.text_en: It's the first dishwasher, I had some emotions reading on the net that it's not worth it in general, it's better without it. But honestly I wouldn't live without it. I had a few dishes that were dry for a day and I was convinced that it wouldn't be clean. What you see is perfect and with excellent consumption, I think I used the manual only for that bowl as msv used for the whole load. Silent and last but not least special design. A big plus is the application that helps you with the initial settings and you get notifications when the washing process is completed, plus it shows you a consumption statistic. I recommend it with confidence for those who want a German quality MSV.

1203507460.text_en: The Bosch series 6 dishwasher far exceeds my expectations. I program it remotely, it notifies me when the dishes are finished, it notifies me when the pancake liquid is finished, etc. Washes flawlessly! Only one thing I regret is that I didn't purchase it earlier.

1207389631.text_en: I have just received this new Series 6 Dishwasher. Lots of new features compared to the 2010 generation while remaining in continuity. The connect function didn't seem useful to me but I changed my mind by using it yesterday! In addition, the aesthetic of the door with the deep blue of the protective plastic is really too beautiful. Besides, I left it.   I hope it will last at least as long as my previous LV Siemens (same manufacture!)

1203027211.text_en: The old BOSCH machine washed better. After 4 and a half hours, I take out the beštek, which still has pieces of food on it. And that's the washed beštek before putting it in the dish. What if, FOLLOWING THE WATER SAVING INSTRUCTIONS, I don't wash the dishes at all, because like my BOSCH, it will wash everything. And it's due at 4:30!  Another thing, the device arrived damaged. A dent in the sheet metal on the left side. I don't know how they did it because there was no damage on the packaging. Obviously goods for Eastern Europe! And the price for a sheikh from the Arab Emirates!  So all in all sadness, misery and misery.  You can give €2000 for a dish and you will get D_R_E_K!!!

1193855721.text_en: Day by day we asked ourselves, It's your turn... Should it be mine?  All of us on e-mag are entering, Is there any point in getting upset?    And here is a Bosch on offer.  The dishwasher is beautiful, Made of stainless steel, spacious, quiet, It's class A, come on, put it in the basket, It will work flawlessly!

1216575782.text_en: Even though we have only had the dishwasher for a week, we are very satisfied. What's great is that it can also be controlled via an app.

1217728317.text_en: It took us many years to get a dishwasher but now I don't understand why we didn't do it sooner.   Every day we gained half an hour, at least, time that we spend with the children outside in the air or doing something around the house.  The machine behaves impeccably and the dishes are clean at the end. It is not noisy and can hold many dishes at once. We wash the dishes used for serving the meal once every two or three days. We use finish as a detergent and rinse solution. We have no vessels that require any other intervention. For our family it's the right thing to do.

1207157893.text_en: Very quiet, various preset functions, in addition, more functions can be downloaded.

1218195835.text_en: I recently purchased this dishwasher as an upgrade from my previous model and I am very happy with the choice I made. I used the old machine for about 5 years and it worked flawlessly without any problem, which gave me a lot of confidence in this brand.    The new model looks just as well built, and even comes with improved features that make use easier and more efficient.   I hope this car also lives up to the same level of reliability and durability as the previous one. I will stay loyal to this brand!

1221608575.text_en: After a month of using the dishwasher, I am thrilled. It does dishes beautifully and the glass is beautifully polished. After previous experience with another brand, it is a very pleasant change. Assembling the drawers suits us perfectly, and thanks to the app, I don't have to guess the end of the washing (we are a big family and the dishwasher sometimes runs calmly even twice a day). The black color goes well with the rest of the dark kitchen. I can't fault her and I recommend it to everyone in the family.

1218719783.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher really pleasantly surprised me. It works very quietly, which is a big advantage if the kitchen is connected to the living room. Dishes come out completely clean and dry, even after shorter programs.  I especially like the arrangement of the baskets because they easily adapt to larger pots and pans. The programs are easy to use, and the consumption of water and electricity is noticeably lower than with my previous washing machine

1219001882.text_en: This is our first dishwasher and we are really excited. It washes perfectly, the dishes are beautifully clean and the control is simple and intuitive. We also appreciate the quiet operation and overall high-quality workmanship. After the first experiences, we can say that it significantly facilitated our daily functioning in the household. A great choice for us and we definitely recommend it.

1204954280.text_en: I particularly like that I can download programs.  I've already created my own program.  It washes well and the dishes come out of the machine dry.  I am very satisfied with the performance.  And he looks very good too.  All in all, a very good purchase.  Can fully recommend the dishwasher.

1181339356.text_en: Great product, excellent initial results. Very small defects. The lower plate rack is not suitable for the new thicker and wider types. The door does not have a "closed" position and therefore you have to close it (with the click) so as not to get in the way.

1219691858.text_en: The Bosch SMS6ECC12E Series 6 dishwasher exceeded our expectations. It is very quiet, perfectly washes even dried dishes in half the time of the previous dishwasher. A big plus is the practical arrangement of baskets, including a drawer for cutlery and simple operation.

1218223673.text_en: The product has a slightly darker color compared to the presentation pictures on the Bosch website. The washing machine door seems to be unevenly placed compared to the left and right sides. The product received is Made in Germany.

1206556718.text_en: The dishwasher we purchased is of good quality and at an attractive price. We are very satisfied with our purchase which fully meets our expectations. The product is easy to use and cleans very well.

1219996009.text_en: I've been using the dishwasher for a while, but after just a few uses I can confirm that it runs completely quietly, perfectly processed, it's obvious at first glance that it's a quality product. The function of opening the door after washing is absolutely brilliant.....

The dishes are washed well, but I don't notice a significant difference compared to the previous low-range Bosch dishwasher.  One complaint refers to the processing of the handle of the cutlery drawer, which has a sharp edge on which the person emptying the dishwasher cut himself (paper cut) when removing it from the half-extracted upper basket. 1219810230.title_en: Great dishwasher, but details need to be improved.
1219810230.text_en: ﻿#opinionmotivated by promotion We switched from another Serie6 dishwasher, it worked for us for almost 10 years, washing up after a large family - often three loads a day, it survived 3 moves and still works in the summer house. However, it was time to rejuvenate the equipment - this was the only one with an integrated control panel. I really wanted the buttons to be invisible and at the same time to display the time until the end of washing. It was the only free-standing Bosch model available and one of the few on the market considering other manufacturers. As for functionality, we were surprised by how quiet it is compared to our previous one. During normal loading, it is practically inaudible, which is important when the living area is connected to the kitchen. It washes thoroughly, dries, is easy to clean (filters), an additional plus for a dedicated cleaning program. As for turbo-saving eco-programs, it is too early to judge, but we hope that they will be consistent with what the manufacturer declares.  The arrangement of baskets is perfect, although I have the impression that the baskets are of lower quality than the previous one. There is no adjustment of the depth of the cutlery drawer, there are no chrome elements on the handles in the upper and lower drawer, the aesthetic detail may not be important, but it shows a bit about the class of the equipment, it looks "cheap and crap" and the dishwasher costs over 4k.   Overall, the washer is a plus when it comes to washing, drying, installation and capacity. The downside is the shoddy finish of the baskets, it could have been done better. It's a real shame because it would be perfect.

1217314124.text_en: I bought this Bosch Series 6 dishwasher to replace a similar model from another manufacturer and I can say without exaggeration that the difference is significant.    First of all, the noise level is much lower. It is surprisingly silent, to the point where sometimes I have to check if it is still working. For an open space kitchen or for evening use, this aspect makes a real difference.    From the point of view of washing performance, the results are beyond expectations. I use exactly the same consumables as before - detergent, rinsing liquid, salt and obviously the same water - but the dishes come out noticeably cleaner. Removes difficult stains much more effectively, including traces of dry grease or persistent residues. An aspect that particularly impressed me is the fact that the glasses and tableware come out without those fine limescale deposits that frequently appeared on the old car.    Another major advantage is the integration with the Home Connect mobile application. Initially I was skeptical about the applicability of this functionality in everyday experience, but the possibility to download additional washing programs is extremely useful and brings more flexibility. Practically, the car becomes more versatile according to your needs.    Overall, I am very happy with this purchase. Bosch Series 6 delivers exactly what it promises: efficiency, silence and excellent washing results. I recommend it without reservations to those who want a real upgrade over the standard models.

1208057664.text_en: I mention that I have no objective term of comparison, because it is the first dishwasher I have. What I like: - electricity and water savings - until now the average was 1.6 KW/cycle and approx. 14 liters of water, in the conditions in which I used the high consumption program;  -extra warranty (check the Bosch website), with a total of 5 years on the device and 10 years on the tub;  - it is very silent even if you do not activate the special program for this;  - has a flood prevention system; - the upper drawer adjustable in height and the general modularity of the drawers;   - the mobile application that helps you choose the right program, has a lot of extras and is very intuitive and easy to use.   What I don't like: - long washing times. A cycle for heavy dirt and pots exceeds 2 hours and reaches 4, if you want eco. In addition, the maximum temperature is 70 degrees (others have 90).   The program for "half load" does not have a significant effect on time, but only on water and electricity consumption;   - It is not very effective on pots (burns, even new ones), but probably none are;   -The closing system is a push/pull system, by force, I would have preferred a button to release/set a safety;  -The adjustable legs are made of a hard plastic, which skates on the floor;  I would have liked more downloadable programs in the application, a short washing time program under 1 hour (I think it's not even close) and more explanations/examples of how the dishes and cutlery should be placed in the drawers.   Other specifications> It dries well in general, although it does not have that function of automatically opening the door at the end of the cycle, in addition, it also has an "extra dry" option;   - the 6 series is from the top range, a kind of 'premium at a reduced price, without frills'. It was cheaper (during the Black Friday promotion) than the more current lower range, although it is still in production. The model has already been in production for several years.   - the extension hoses do not come in the package (the standard ones are a bit short if you place it further from the water source and sewage), but the original ones are decent for the price. The cutlery basket is replaced by a tray. It does not come in the package, but can be purchased separately.

1186425004.text_en: I owned a Bosch dishwasher for over 20 years without any intervention, but I thought I had to replace it with another one, of course also Bosch. I do not regret for a moment the choice made. It is a great car and the Home Connect program is very helpful. It's not about the convenience of starting the device from the phone, but about how much this application helps me. I could choose my favorite program, I downloaded many other programs, and the smart program allowed me to create my own program depending on the degree of dirtiness, water and energy consumption. Also from the application I can set the start time as well as the immediate start, and at the end I am notified that the program has ended. The dishes come out impeccably clean, the glasses shiny, but the detergent must also be of high quality.  I am extremely happy with the choice I made!!!!

1216784229.text_en: The machine looks modern, the front is actually made of stainless steel and half of each of the two baskets folds down the plate holders to make room for the pots. It can be connected to hot water up to 70°c to reduce electricity consumption if you have a solar panel for hot water and most importantly it has the zeolite drying function, that is, all machines with a decent electricity consumption open the door to dry the dishes naturally but if you have a problem with the humidity in the room the zeolite function saves you, it consumes little and does not open the door after washing, does not let the steam escape.

1183876914.text_en: We've only had it for a short time, but we really liked it. It is silent, you have many options for drying, times...we need to connect it to the home Connect. We still need to try the extra drying, but without it it already comes out quite dry compared to other dishwashers we have had.

1215822848.text_en: I loved the drying, that's why I bought it at Electrodométicos Cañete, in Almagro (Ciudad Real) they recommended it to me and it has been a success

1185644424.text_en: Silent, impeccable dishes, adjustable programs according to your needs! I recommend with confidence, a reliable helper in any kitchen!

1218678576.text_en: Good cleaning and drying. It is a general problem for many brands and models, but it would be desirable to pay more attention to those small assembly details.

1220942844.text_en: The noise is tolerable and it has a good variety of programs.  I'm still getting used to the new cutlery drawer. 1219381732.text_en: This is our third dishwasher, so we wanted it to have the features we want. We really like the upper shelf for cutlery and we can't imagine washing them in the lower basket. We do not need to control the device by phone, but the set of programs suits our needs and habits. We use rinsing often, because in a two-person household we usually wash dishes every other day. We most often use the Expres 60 program, but during the month of having this dishwasher, we tested most of the programs - with very good results. The real highlight is the internal lighting of the chamber and the automatic opening of the door after the end of the program. 1219788524.text_en: I highly recommend it, a very good dishwasher at a fair price.

1219788114.text_en: I highly recommend it, a very good dishwasher at a fair price.

1217650114.text_en: Great dishwasher. Shiny clean and dry dishes, quiet, energy-saving. 1215696125.text_en: I have been using the Bosch SMS8ECI02E dishwasher for several days and I am very pleased with the purchase. The equipment operates exceptionally quietly - you can hardly hear it during operation, which is a big advantage in an open kitchen.    The most impressive thing is the washing efficiency. Even heavily soiled dishes come out perfectly clean, without streaks or stains. Additionally, the dishwasher dries very well, especially thanks to the automatic door opening at the end of the program.    The capacity and functionality of the baskets is also a plus - everything can be easily adjusted, even larger pots or non-standard dishes. The third cutlery drawer is a very convenient solution.    I also use the app and although it is not a necessary feature, it gives additional control and convenience.    To sum up – a very good, modern and reliable dishwasher. If someone is looking for higher-end equipment, I definitely recommend it. This is my second dishwasher from this company - the previous one served me for 15 years.

1220508984.text_en: This dishwasher operates very quietly and washes dishes effectively, even with larger loads. It has intuitive operation, modern functions and solid workmanship typical of Bosch. Economical, comfortable in everyday use and definitely worth recommending. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207141606.text_en: This is my first Bosch dishwasher and at first glance it is clear that it looks like a top-shelf premium product. The equipment looks solid and aesthetic, both from the outside and inside. The price is very attractive for what it has to offer.

1209857226.text_en: I had a series 6 dishwasher that I left after 15 years, or I bought a series 8 and I must say that it is impeccable in every way, silent, the tac controls are fast, the automatic opening at the end of the wash and the drying is impeccable, Bosch for life

1189763427.text_en: Satisfied with my old Bosch dishwasher which lasted for years, I bought the same brand with a more recent model. Nice model with integrated interior lights, it is very quiet and the dishes are impeccable!  Very efficient drying system.  The only downside for me is the lack of the "short wash" function that I had on my old dishwasher.  That being said, I am very satisfied with my purchase and recommend the Bosch brand with my eyes closed..!

1151025134.text_en: We already had a Bosch XXL multi-door refrigerator and we were delighted, so we decided on the dishwasher. The aesthetic is really beautiful and elegant and it looks great in the new kitchen. We've only had it for a short time but we really like it. It is spacious, very quiet, and the washing and drying results we have had have been unbeatable. Your purchase was a great success.

1134603966.title_en: I am happy with the dishwasher
1134603966.text_en: The dishwasher is very quiet, I still have little time to check my electricity bill to see if it is efficient, I hope so.  I love that when the device itself is finished, it opens the door to ventilate and disconnects.  The button panel is hidden in the upper edge of the door and I don't know if that location will end up getting dirty and causing problems.

1169330938.title_en: Very practical and easy to use.
1169330938.text_en: This dishwasher is very practical with its remote start.  However, I will put a downside on the noise when loading water into the device.

1149826459.text_en: Versatile and with a very good finish, super complete program

1150997544.text_en: Very good dishwasher. It's not easy to compare it with other brands because I've only had Bosch (including the old one). The washing is impeccable, no complaints. I appreciated the connected function which allows you to configure everything from the application. But my favorite function remains the automatic door opening which allows me to no longer have to wait until the end to go to bed, for example. The door opens by itself once the program is finished and that's very nice! (The instructions should have been clearer on this subject because it was poorly explained and it took me a while to understand that it was necessary to activate the "EfficientDry" option in the general settings). I was doubtful about the cutlery drawer, that's why I bought an optional Bosch basket, but as a result I use the drawer for other items and it's very practical.  The only downside is that I expected it to be quieter than my old Bosch which was an old built-in model, but the difference in noise is not huge. Another flaw also: I find that even the "Express" program is still a little long (1h30 minimum if I remember correctly) and my old model did just as well in much less time because I had a 45 min program I think.  The height adjustment system for the feet could also have been a little more qualitative and better thought out, it was tedious to put everything square... To return to the noise, There is however an optional silence mode for those teleworking in an open room for example. But the washing remains impeccable and that is what we mainly ask of it. The overall quality printing is also there.  It is also very practical to have the buttons on the edge of the door so you don't have to bend down to program.  Overall, I remain very satisfied, especially since the price difference with the Series 6 was not huge. So I opted for this excellent series 8. Hoping that the reliability is there too ;-)

1148007422.text_en: We are very happy with the new purchase. We already came from another dishwasher from the same brand that has lasted a whopping 22 years (it was still working). Although we have only had it for a short time, we really liked the aesthetics as well as its energy efficiency and how quiet it is. Another point in its favor is its capacity, as well as being able to program it through the Home Connect app, it allows you to create a customized program and download it to the dishwasher, it also warns you of the lack of salt, as well as any anomaly...etc. A complete success.

1185769182.title_en: ible, durable, perfect for the home. I recommend c
1185769182.text_en: An exceptional dishwasher! A+++ in efficiency, works super-quietly (48 dB) with EcoSilence Drive, and washes impeccably even intensive cycles. Large capacity (14 sets), adjustable FlexLoad shelves and HygieneDry system for dry and sanitized dishes. Smart technologies: AquaSensor adjusts water/energy and WaterSoft combats limescale. Elegant design in stainless steel, easy to program with LED display.

1146236043.title_en: Long search, 100% happy with the result
1146236043.text_en: I have had a 45 cm dishwasher for several years and I have changed to 60 cm. I have searched a lot about energy savings and obtaining good washing results. Zeolite drying is simply great, dishes come out of the machine dry, only the bottoms of cups, bowls, etc. where the water accumulates during the rinse cycle need to be dried, everything else is cupboard dry.  3.)Program diversity 4.)Smart home control

1150518406.text_en: Quality/price does not correspond. For a dishwasher that is one of the most expensive in the range, the finish is quite tacky (a lot of plastic). The functionality and use are quite normal. The Bluetooth connection leaves a lot to be desired.

1143590702.text_en: Beyond its aesthetic appearance, the cleaning performance is simply exceptional. The results are impeccable with each cycle. When it's on, it's hard to believe it's washing dishes. No noise pollution, which is a real advantage, especially if you have an open kitchen or prefer to operate the appliance at night.    In conclusion, the dishwasher is an investment that is well worth it.

1150691821.text_en: Quiet, high-tech dishwasher with very low energy consumption. Great design but above all offering several washing programs depending on use.
