To our surprise, halfway through the cycle we have observed condensation that occupies approximately 20% of the screen, so, regardless of whether it washes well (which we still don't know) we will have to ask for a replacement.    It seems at least surprising to us that this happens on the first day, what can we expect in the long term?

1184672270.text_en: The Bosch SMS8TCI01E dishwasher has truly changed my daily life. This device is incredibly convenient and offers awesome connectivity. But what impresses me the most is the quality of cleaning: my dishes always come out ultra clean. In summary, it is an investment that is definitely worth it!

This appliance does clean better as well, making it an all round pleasure to use.      Don't take my word, but one, yes may be a more money,than the usual ones.  But I think it won't disappoint, money on the craftsmanship well spent.

1126967842.text_en: I recommend this dishwasher since it consumes less energy and it is super practical to be able to start it from your cell phone and everything is super clean and when the cleaning is finished, it will have just left me surprised.

1186494831.text_en: I am very satisfied with this device.   Positive points: - beautiful stainless steel finish, - completely modular and robust interior layout, - possibility of putting large glasses at the bottom, - automatic opening at the end of the cycle is also a positive point - the ease of configuring the device via the application (water hardness, setting the time, etc.) I have not yet found any negative points...

It is very economical, which is also important to us. This is definitely recommended for a freestanding dishwasher. Dishes come out dry and of course clean!

With this one you can store twice as much material because you no longer have a basket for the cutlery, but you do have an extra drawer at the top. The drawers are also adjustable in height if you want to put larger plates or pots in the dishwasher. Energy efficient, especially the eco 50 program. LED lighting when you open the dishwasher. Any downside. The first time you use it, especially the settings, you have to press quite a few buttons to set the correct settings. It took me half an hour before I got the hang of it.

1144084974.text_en: My father bought this machine a month ago and he advised me to make the same choice, for its advantages: very beautiful, good consumption and super quiet. Very happy and proud to have made this purchase!

1176923896.text_en: Buy this dishwasher to save energy. Really great drying with the zeolite and also the door that opens at the end of the cycle. Washing, nothing to complain about. Papers arranged well + a third basket. Silent.

1148612285.text_en: I've been using it for 1 week now and I honestly can't live without it. It is a very nice dishwasher with all the trimmings. At first I found it a bit difficult with the touchscreen, but now I can get along well.

1193006437.text_en: The product is wash / dry quality / the programs are configurable from the application to benefit from off-peak hours. The door opens for optimal drying

1133183427.text_en: The dishwasher works well. Perfectly cleans even the toughest dirt. Quiet at work. Unfortunately, the application and connection with the dishwasher leave something to be desired. If the dishwasher is turned off, it does not always connect to the application. There is a server connectivity problem. When the dishwasher is turned on, the problem disappears. And the application connects to the dishwasher. So we can turn it on manually. Why do we need an application if we have to turn it on manually anyway? Work on the dishwasher's application and connectivity.

1152167362.text_en: It's everything someone wants, who also wants to do something else...besides washing dishes, first of all (Bosch) means quality, I'm very satisfied. Thank you Bosch.

1158454754.text_en: Elegant appearance, it cannot be hidden in the building, perfect workmanship and the operation of the dishwasher are the main advantages, the range of possibilities cannot be described in one post.

1186178672.text_en: We got the Bosch Series 8 on 23 February 2024. It is now 8 May 2025 so the dishwasher has been well used. I cannot speak to highly of it.     It is a 'connected' device so once connected to your home WiFi  it establishes a connection via Bosch's servers in Germany. Using this connection you can control the device from anywhere in the world - especially useful when you go on holiday and want to take advantage of cheap rate night-time electricity after you've left.     The Bosch Home app on my iPhone gives me detailed control of the machine, it also gives feedback and allows you to control all the many programme options as well as downloading new programmes to your machine.     The machine also automatically downloads firmware updates. If there is a problem, the Bosch service team can monitor the machine and assess any problems via a remote connection. The machine also has hot and cold fill.     Above all, it cleans wonderfully and quietly at night which is when we put it on.     Bosch always get great reviews in Which Magazine and for good reason. Bosch make great domestic appliances and the Series 8 is another. I cannot recommend it highly enough.

1147498547.text_en: Fast dishwasher, deep cleaning, no remains, perfect drying, without water drops. The Internet connection without failures.

1173318440.text_en: Car with a very nice design. Economy class A. It's not noisy and I like that it has home connect. Wash and rinse super ok.

1194187948.text_en: It seems that the price is forgotten and the quality remains. We'll see in 15 years ;)

1145163403.text_en: Paine arrived just plugged in and already configured (and connected to my smartphone).  first impression: silence. It's a change from my old Bosch.   Then, first load to the maximum just to see how it washes and dries: RAS.   whether on plates, glasses or even a plastic box fully loaded in eco mode (ok ok a little long in eco mode but it's worth it) well otherwise the cutlery basket I think it's worth taking... we can see that the quality is there. To be monitored over time and use. but I remain confident with Bosch

1150034003.text_en: Good quality and very quiet and dry to perfection

1125704654.text_en: THIS DISHWASHER IS BEST IN THE WORLD IN 2022!!

I don't even know how I was without it! It is very easy to maintain, because Home connect warns you if your device requires any intervention. Examples: if you run out of tablets; if the cleaner runs out; if salt must be added; if the filter needs cleaning... You receive a message in the application with the problems of the device.  Spacious, quiet! The height of the drawers can be adjusted according to the dishes loaded. It can be set in the app so that the machine door opens after each wash! Cons: The Eco function is much longer than on the 6 series.

1150341948.text_en: I really appreciate the special care given to the arrangement for storing the dishes.  The basic programs are numerous and the options just as many, it is even possible to download others from the application.  I chose this model for its consumption in ECO mode and I plan to save money now.  The sound emitted is acceptable and will not bother me at night.  The only negative point, at least, has been greatly improved: the user interface of the mobile application is not intuitive, the alternating line inserts make the pages difficult to read, there is a lack of a UX/UI designer worthy of the name.  Also, the reaction time of the buttons on the edge of the door allowing you to configure and control the dishwasher is sometimes a little long or does not react.  Would a firmware update improve this negative point?  I recommend.

1121275292.text_en: Beautiful in appearance. Lots of washing and additional programs.  The advantage of control via Bluetooth and Wifi. Washes as expected. This is the third dishwasher from the same manufacturer - we wouldn't change.

1130725716.text_en: Salvation from scrubbing and polishing pots, glasses, cups, cutlery and everything else that ends up in the dishwasher. When the dishes are finished washing, they will be like new, clean and fragrant. More efficient than me in any case, and therefore more economical. It reduced my expenses for detergent, not to mention water.. Since I got the machine, I have at least an hour more for myself. Of course, I'm a man, and with me, that washing the dishes goes on and on, like everything else, which shouldn't last, and for the other things that should last, there's neither the place nor the time to write about it. :D

1168927103.text_en: I am very satisfied! Washes impeccably well! I really like the interior light! Home conect is a great help! I was on vacation and mom loaded the washing machine, and I from 100 kilometers away started! It is ANTI-FINGERPRINT! It is made of a state-of-the-art material! I had the Series 6 also from Bosch, but that one was not as good! The door can be set to open every time you wash! It has smart schedule that adjusts according to your feedback! All three drawers are adjustable! And it's Made in Germany!!

1143758211.title_en: Quiet device with home connect difficulties
1143758211.text_en: The device itself is very quiet and the washing results are fine. Only the WLAN connection to Home connect is sometimes available and sometimes not, even though the router is only 3m away. This should be fixed urgently, otherwise the function will not be useful for accessing it remotely. There is also no obvious possibility of improving the software through a software update and any bugs present in the device could be neutralized. This possibility should be created urgently.

1109154688.text_en: Delighted!  I was reborn. After 23 years, we decided on a dishwasher. We took yours and we are so surprised we are speechless. Easy to use, large capacity, everything in its place, quiet, dishes come out like new. When I used it for the first time, I exclaimed: "thank you, God". My painstaking washing of dishes is finished, my helper has arrived.  All recommendations for her. It also fits in the small square footage of the kitchen. Easy installation. I didn't even need a master, I connected it myself! That's why I put my hand in the fire for this washing machine.

1119880297.text_en: On the whole its a great dishwasher, good cleaning and drying, however after just a few months use parts of the interior are breaking. The middle basket retainers (very poor quality plastic parts) have broken on one side and fallen off. Not only is this quality not acceptable but it makes the dishwasher extremely dangerous. Without the stops the middle tray can be pulled out of the machine and fall, imagine: fully loaded with glasses or heavy pans, could easily cause a serious injury and even kill a small child or pet.

1142645030.text_en: I don't like to do laundry and I'm constantly fighting something at home, so I decided to buy it, I had to bang my hand, because everyone in the house was against it, but that was my motive. That's why now everyone adores it and supports your brand. Quality, consumption and price are for all time, number one for me personally because there is nothing like it.

1154577526.text_en: I haven't been able to test everything yet, but it's a change from my old dishwasher. The cutlery drawer is super practical. Deep enough to place my SodaStream caps. And being able to put my 10 liter pressure cooker in and it came out perfect. I am very happy because in the sink it was not easy to clean. I'm waiting to see if my electricity bill goes down. In summary, for the moment I find it very well designed. Maybe a small basket. For small items and this will be 6 stars.

1118123282.text_en: Ever since I saw it in the store I said it was what was missing from the kitchen and I wasn't wrong, especially since it makes my life a lot easier, especially having two small children. The design is special and the quality of the product exceeds expectations. I recommend

1160376977.text_en: I have no objections to the operation of the device, but considering this price range (it's the 8 series, after all), the workmanship is hopeless.  You can't feel the budget at all, and when it comes to competitive dishwashers, models priced at 1/3 of the price of this model present better quality of workmanship and give the impression of dealing with a more expensive product.  During the purchase, the pragmatic reasons for choosing the product were mainly technical parameters and functions, which are actually top-of-the-line, but unfortunately at the expense of the feeling of cheap workmanship.

1161197292.text_en: On the classic programs, the dishwasher is very efficient. Smart washing does not meet our needs because the washes would have to be similar. Rather than offering intelligent washing, it would have been preferable to allow personalized washing (+/- heat / drying... like intelligent) and to save this personalized washing to use them according to the filling: more or less plastics which dry poorly, very dirty dishes...

1147158642.text_en: Good dishwasher, sleek design, very easy to adjust using adjustment screws at the front. It is very quiet, easy to operate and has many different programs to choose from. A big advantage is that the machine can also be operated via your phone, which is useful if you forget to turn it on. You can also see the status of the program and the status of the salt and rinse aid in the app. A small downside is that you still have to load and unload the machine yourself.

1173857535.text_en: I am really delighted with my new dishwasher! It cleans all types of dishes perfectly well, and I have never had such brilliant results. Plates, glasses and pans come out like new with every wash.    In addition, it works wonderfully: it is quiet, fast and very easy to use. I can only recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable and efficient device. A big thank you to this brand for this quality product!

1132052258.text_en: For the amount I paid for this appliance, the quality of the baskets of the appliance seems too low-end unlike another Bosh dishwasher that I had previously purchased for half the price. The cycles are way too long.   As a result, I put it on sale because the store where I bought it wants to charge me an astronomical sum to return it.  It remains to be seen how long the tactile keys will survive.

1130411684.title_en: For a peaceful day and quality sleep, BOSCH!
1130411684.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is the best thing I've ever bought! The drawers for plates and cups are so well done, the drawer for the ice cream is the best and something that no other dishwasher has! The machine is so quiet while it is working that it is simply impossible that it will interfere with your work and that you will not be able to sleep while the machine is on. You just can't hear it while it's working, milina!😍 Now I'm moving to a new apartment and all I buy is, of course, again only Bosch❤️

1132250313.text_en: This cost more than I had intended to pay.  However, the functionality, ease of use, controls and wi-fi features have moved dishwashing into a new level of convenience.  The results are simply outstanding.  Doing the settings using the wi-fi interface is a pleasure.  Program choice is excellent but pay attention to the combination of water and energy consumption.  The Silence 50 cycle is a winner - night time ease of use, with no audible disturbance.

1185023387.text_en: We chose this device because it is very interesting for us in many ways, such as the digital operation via app, which works perfectly, and the zeolite drying.  The only thing I don't like is the cutlery drawer because it's not easy to categorize. I know other drawers that are much better. But the cleaning, drying and operation are excellent and I can definitely recommend the device.

1134972542.text_en: We are thrilled with our purchase and glad that we invested in a high-quality model. The connection to the cell phone works perfectly and we almost always use this function. I really liked the many setting options via the app. The washing result is perfect and the drying is very good. It is also economical to use and looks really good in our kitchen. We are completely satisfied.

1142430924.text_en: Every word of praise is superfluous, she is my best friend! I have had machines from other manufacturers, but they cannot be compared to the Bosch machine! The dishes are impeccably clean every time, the dishes shine, the steel shines, pans and pans are still like new after many years! The husband was skeptical, after several machines from other manufacturers he wanted to give up the dishwasher, but after the Bosch machine he changed his mind. Since then, everything is Bosch for us 🙂😉

1171294701.text_en: The Bosch site is very serious, very simple, the means of payment are very well made, our series 8 dishwasher product is really very satisfied whether it is the delivery or the dishwasher itself, everything is perfect, no problem reported, even for the extended warranty offered, we did not wait for the dishwasher to arrive, took the serial numbers put on the Bosch site, it was very simple, really perfect and serious.

1155371775.text_en: After 12 years it was time to buy a new dishwasher. The choice quickly fell on a Bosch dishwasher. We are very happy with the machine as it offers more space and spaciousness than our old one. The variety of programs is also better designed. Nice to have is the WiFi and app function that is now integrated into everyday life. We are also enthusiastic about cleaning and drying the dishes.

1142305425.text_en: This dishwasher is exteremly quiet in comparison to anything we had before. But the main thing that strikes us is how much customization there is. Besides the usual (long) list of different cleaning programs, there are also specific features that can be turned on and off according to your preferences. The efficient drying feature that automatically opens the door upon comletion is a game-changer and a must in our opinion.

1172297986.title_en: The device is great and works very well.
1172297986.text_en: We rented the dishwasher because we have been working with Bluemovement for two years. We also had the previous generation dishwasher and we were very happy with it. But after 2 years we wanted the latest device. The device works perfectly and the dishes are clean, provided they are put away correctly. All in all, we are very satisfied with the rental of the equipment.

1139685455.text_en: I waited a long time before deciding and I am really not disappointed with my purchase, this dishwasher is the best of the best. Washing silence drying connected light inside baskets with adjustable height are the positive points. The only negative point would be that the programs are a little long for my taste. In any case it's the best I've had so far and if you're looking for one take this one.

1136066401.title_en: Great device. Good integration with Home Assistant.
1136066401.text_en: No surprises, it does a great job as a dishwasher. By using the third-party integration “Home Connect Alt”, you can easily integrate it into your Home Assistant infrastructure. The device responds perfectly to remote control commands. As far as power consumption goes, it uses slightly less energy than my 7 year old Series 6 dishwasher on the same Eco 50 program.

1192900031.text_en: True to the brand's reputation, this is an excellent product. Washing is great, drying is however random. Too bad the dishwasher doesn't have a "half load" program. The connected function is a real plus, but the automatic opening of the door at the end of the cycle (AutoOpen) does not work with all programs. This is information that is not specified in the description.

1125856750.text_en: The dishwasher is wonderful, it washes perfectly. The problem is the wifi connection. It loses configuration every now and then. This is the reason why Bosch replaced my dishwasher. So far this second dishwasher has only failed me twice since they changed it at the end of July. If you have to use it remotely as is my case, it is not your product.

1162069891.title_en: All dishwashers should be like this
1162069891.text_en: The dishwasher, purchased a few weeks ago, meets my expected criteria in every respect. It is quiet, has many useful programs, is very easy to use, and after activating the Information function, a description of each button is available.  The dishes were perfectly clean.  To sum up, we get a perfect dishwasher for a reasonable price, but quality and features come at a cost.

1171591839.text_en: Besides the fact that my dishes always come out spick and span, this machine is everything and more than you expect. The functions for extra dirty containers, light on the inside and the option to place it as a free-standing machine or under a countertop means that this beautiful machine can also be taken to my next home. In short, I'm really happy with this!!

1127173419.text_en: When the husband makes an appointment, the Bosch machine shows up! 😁 The best part of every kitchen is hidden behind a Bosch door, so quiet that even a baby sleeps next to it.   The guests are coming, the half hour program will be escajg, I promise you that!  A pan, a pan, a spatula and a lid to spare, and a pot too!   Without further ado, buy a Bosch so that the kitchen is posh next to you!

1146264181.title_en: I did a good research and won
1146264181.text_en: It's the best machine and a real workhorse. The customer service was excellent so I will only buy BOSCH appliances in the future. Cleans brilliantly and dries well. Buy with confidence I highly recommend it. We prepare a lot of Indian dishes in the home as you can imagine how many pots and pans we use just for one meal! we can't live without this machine.

1130906352.text_en: It can be connected to hot water, the door opens by itself when finished and everything can be managed from your cell phone (you have to have the bar of soap inserted).   The center tray does not fit tall glasses vertically, which is a problem for large stemware and beer glasses. The rest very good. Very quiet, you can hardly hear it even in the room itself.

1197629536.text_en: Very good dishwasher, it meets everything we expect: impeccable washing quality, impeccable drying, quiet, easy to use, little extras like automatic opening even if not on my list initially we appreciate, and finally its design and yes that's important too!! in short for the moment it is "perfect"

1176681520.text_en: My wife and I also work from home, we are freelancers in web development. I took the car because both my wife and I were too busy with work and actually didn't even have time to wash the dishes. It's really what we need and compared to the gas, water and electricity used for manual washing, we get much cheaper with this washing machine.

1179217189.text_en: Dishwasher received a week ago which seems to meet all the expected qualities. The dishes come out clean, dry and streak-free. It's not noisy and the cutlery drawer is really a plus in my opinion. My previous Bosch appliance had lasted almost 20 years and that is why I naturally chose this brand.

1168303505.text_en: Now in operation for over a year. We mainly wash in the ECO program. Everything will be super clean. The zeolite drying system completely exceeded our expectations. Of course, as with any other system, dishes that have a large area where water can remain will not dry. An absolute purchase recommendation from us.

1154670908.text_en: only installed Saturday, three ece washes later and could not be more impressed. things really do come out DRY! we loved our old logixx, it was brilliant, gave twelve years of loyal service without problems, approx 300 washes per year! So when it died, (E37 code kept appearing) we decided to update rather than repair.

1167937744.text_en: After a long search I opted for this device. And since its arrival, I have greatly appreciated the quality of the product and the choice of programs. Very fan of the application to discover the device and the functionalities. Also very appreciable is the possibility of ordering maintenance products etc.

1168326408.text_en: Great dishwasher.  Control via the Home Connect app is great. The dishes are very clean. The application also gives you very good advice for choosing the program depending on the dishes to be washed. This allows you to save a lot of water. I recommend with your eyes closed.

1156869970.text_en: Extremely quiet dishwasher, has several programs, plus it can connect to the phone to be more intelligent. It is programmed from the inside, which is particularly interesting when you have young children.   We recommend this device.

1124326875.text_en: This dishwashing machine is perfection. everything is thought of there. Led light, door that opens by itself at the end, storage on the sides of the plates, the cutlery drawer, silent, efficient, beautiful and connected. Delivery with installation and recovery of the old one.

1154832156.text_en: I like it because it is an appliance of great quality and durability, I already had one from the same brand and I was very happy, this new series has many more applications and possibilities to make the program appropriate to my interests. What I didn't like, so far I have no complaints

1133861745.text_en: The third tray is fantastic, especially for me who has a baby. The pacifiers, nipples, teethers and other baby accessories look great and without the risk of falling or deteriorating, and they also include more than ten bottle accessories. Washing all the baby stuff is fantastic.

1157608021.text_en: Having used it several times, I am happy with the purchase. You can modify the distribution of the trays according to the needs you have, variety of programs and with the information in the App. One point to improve in my opinion is the screen, larger or a more modern line

1157728731.text_en: State-of-the-art dishwasher.  Very quiet and with a variety of programs. Energy and water savings with perfect washing and drying.  It also has Home connect... you couldn't ask for more.  I don't give it 4 stars because of an aesthetic failure that is in the process of being resolved.

1161158548.text_en: So far so good! Better than my old dishwasher, I am very happy with it, whether from an efficiency or ergonomics point of view. I would just have liked a more resistant plastic on the top and a little long to have effective energy saving.

1151575630.text_en: It came from another dishwasher that was over 15 years old. The initial sensation of the product was its robustness; the convenience of carrying it; space and low noise level. You can't even hear it when it works. The truth is that we are very happy with the purchase. We were definitely right in the decision.

1121003333.text_en: I thought for a long time whether to buy such an expensive dishwasher. But now I'm very glad I did. The dishwasher is perfectly quiet, the plastic dishes are dry after washing and the connection to the smart home is perfect. I can recommend. Now just hope it works for a long time :-)

1127658731.text_en: Very high quality dishwasher that will leave you speechless when you discover what it can do. I have not seen such a device so far and it is highly recommended if you can save a few extra euros. So far I am amazed by this product.

1193575279.text_en: Bought 3 weeks ago, I can only recommend this dishwasher, several possible programs, the "favorite" button is very useful to find your program and I finally found a dishwasher that dries my dishes perfectly, a top purchase.

1193902982.text_en: This dishwasher is the best I have bought in 20 years, washes very well even with a lot of cutlery, (family of 4). Zeolite technology makes all the difference (the dishes are completely dry at the end of the cycle). I recommend 100%

1155901968.text_en: This dishwasher does a great job of drying at the end of the cycle - all plastic containers dried. Dishes come out perfectly clean. Great to use with the app so you get a notification when it's finished. A very quiet operation is the icing on the cake!

1181195150.text_en: Excellent device which performs its functions very well... with however a small regret concerning the absence of a third rotating arm above the cutlery drawer, which occasionally produces small defects in washing said cutlery.

1143006473.text_en: I love this item but unfortunately it doesn't respond on the internet app well and also there isn't a short wash cycle. And if u put the wash on to stop it u have to open the door which is quite frightening as a big bang and a lot of steam covers u .

1109302649.title_en: The best washing machine for judges
1109302649.text_en: Until I bought it, I didn't know how beautiful life is, I often boast and say that it is my best friend, the dishes are impeccably clean, shiny, quiet in operation, the water and electricity bill is still the same and doesn't spend much, it's really the right thing to rest your hands

1177216906.text_en: This is the first time I have purchased a dishwasher in this price range, I am not disappointed, it cleans and dries perfectly, while being economical.  Programming the phone is very practical and the application really adds a plus.

1149568628.text_en: The device works almost silently and gives a phenomenally beautiful result, even in eco mode. Small downside: the Bluetooth connection with the smartphone required a lot of puzzling, but if it works, it has added value in terms of user-friendliness.

1133072036.text_en: Simple operation, plus the intelligent program, the drying function. Plenty of space, making the machine more than suitable for two people. The machine cleans very well. Remote control is very useful with dynamic (daily) energy prices.

1155516051.text_en: You can see the good quality of the product, it was very easy to install and it is very intuitive to use. I like the design and that it has several programs with different functions. Plus, it's very quiet and you barely realize it's working.

1133918991.text_en: What we like most about this dishwasher is the rationally arranged space for storing dirty dishes, the additional auxiliary partitions that make it easier to store them, the quiet operation of the machine, as well as the way in which the machine washes it perfectly.

1161369970.text_en: a super combination of energy saving and low water consumption and quite quiet. Design integrates perfectly into my kitchen.  Touch with display. Easy to use. Smart. Connected to Alexa. Everything perfect. I can only recommend it.

1136347631.title_en: My basic help in the kitchen
1136347631.text_en: Since I bought this washing machine, my work has decreased. Considering that our family is quite large, it is essential for me. Programs suitable for the types of dishes, short time and optimal results.

1118883413.text_en: A very good household appliance, which together with Finish Quantum Ultimate, Finish rinsing liquid and Finish salt, washes the dishes exceptionally well; the drying system is very efficient; quality corresponding to the purchase price.

1129932552.text_en: Extremely quiet! This is surprising! We didn't buy it on this criterion but it's appreciable! The zeolite drying is really great and with the automatic opening of the door even better. To be seen in 6 to 12 months, with use

1138177823.text_en: This dishwasher rocks. It cleans very well, is very quiet, the dish baskets are nicely adjustable and can be adjusted. I recommend it, it's a good purchase, I hope that after some time I will be able to write more. At the moment, it's the best dishwasher I've ever had

1179902516.title_en: Finally a dishwasher that dries dishes
1179902516.text_en: Completely satisfied with my new dishwasher. I haven't tested all the programs yet, but I must say that I appreciate its low noise level, its ability to dry dishes correctly and make them spotless.

1178070899.text_en: Since we bought this dishwasher, it has brought shine back to all our dishes. The programs are very good like the one for plastics or even for baby bottles.  Very happy with our purchase!!!!

1122147452.text_en: Hello. As this is our very first dishwasher, we are very satisfied with the choice. Due to the short time, it was only tested, so it is too early to write some experiences. We believe that we have chosen well and it will serve as long as possible.

1150439014.text_en: We have not been disappointed by the quality seen in the product. The interior is solid and comfortable to handle. The cutlery tray is very convenient to fill and collect. We hope it lasts as many years as the previous one.

1168291404.title_en: Very good device despite a bumpy start
1168291404.text_en: Am very satisfied. Despite a bumpy start. The device had to be replaced again because of an electronic problem with the first one. Was very uncomplicated.  Dishwasher now runs perfectly without any problems. I really like the many settings for the baskets, storage options and various small parts holders. And a cutlery drawer is a must have.   The front with the individual display is great. Operation takes place on the inside of the door flap.     Runs very quietly.   Operation also possible via app. Works too. You can still download programs here, but the ones available are enough for me. I think the app's information about salt, rinse aid and machine cleaning is good. Also shown on the display on the dishwasher.   The reminder about machine care and the separate program is very helpful. So I now have a good rhythm for when it's time again.  The workmanship is top.   The dishes come out of the dishwasher clean and dry.    Thanks to the app, you can easily adjust the details without having to navigate through the display. I think it's good.     I would buy this again.

1140494815.text_en: ... with the dishwasher. I like the design and the washing results are great. Only the WiFi connection could be more stable, as it keeps dropping out, which makes using the Home Connect app more difficult.

1178596147.text_en: Happy with this purchase which resembles my old LV Siemens.  Affordable high-end thanks to the outlet price and a top-notch Bosch Washing and Drying ODR and basket settings that really help!  I recommend

1160260563.title_en: Once a Bosch, always a Bosch
1160260563.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher. I chose this brand again because it is maintenance-free and error-free, delivers good washing results and the price-performance ratio is completely right.

1132153665.text_en: This cost more money than I had wanted to spend, but having used it, I am delighted with its ease of use, functionality, build quality, flexibility and - above all - the washing results.  It is simply outstanding.

1141105158.text_en: Nice dishwasher. Dishes are clean and dry, quiet machine.  Very handy that you can completely adjust the subdivisions (fold down, open up) to what you need.  I am very satisfied with our purchase.

1138062709.text_en: This dishwasher is easy to operate even for a 66 year old, great text and explanation from Bosch service to connect the machine to WiFi and telephone.  Dishes are super clean every time with every program.

1134657010.text_en: Incredible how it leaves everything clean. In my case, I have a baby, the third tray is a triumph since I can put the nipples, pacifiers,... Up to ten bottle accessories plus spoons, etc. I love it.

1143432962.text_en: This dishwasher is very quiet, and above all adjustable in functions and program duration, while being very efficient in the quality of washing and drying even for short programs.

1157620096.text_en: Extremely quiet dishwasher, the eco mode works at 10, leaving the dishes perfect, simple installation following the manufacturer's instructions and connectivity with a very complete and practical app.

1149569021.title_en: A bit pricey but great dishwasher
1149569021.text_en: I hesitated to buy it because 1099€ is not nothing and I started to buy it with doubts after my purchase but perfect result drying + extra washing nothing to complain about it I am super happy with it

1152904553.text_en: I've had the dishwasher for over a year now and don't want to be without it. It reliably cleans plates, pots, glasses, etc. I often turn it on via the app and it works perfectly.

1182155583.text_en: Great dishwasher. It washes wonderfully and dries very well. Possibility of connecting to hot water, interior lighting, precision of workmanship, ability to customize programs from the application level. I recommend!

1116031813.text_en: It's a good device and cleans well, but it would be very nice if the upper part were smooth and without recesses so that it is easier to integrate into the kitchen and easier to clean.

1142235085.text_en: I love how little noise it makes and the capacity it has. The exterior is beautiful. I was resistant to the cutlery tray at first, but now I find it very useful. I find the Speed ​​wash very comfortable

1165453237.text_en: The dishwasher looks very modern with interior lighting.  Works very quietly and very thoroughly.  Everything perfectly clean and dry.  I recommend it.  Bosch is the best!

1147111520.text_en: I bought this machine and gave it as a housewarming gift. I received thousands of compliments, as it is very compatible with everything that can be expected from a dishwasher. I recommend it with confidence!

1150502484.text_en: It is the best dishwasher I have ever had. It is silent, with great capacity and very easy to use because it guides you every step of the way. Price quality meets all expectations.

1155228886.text_en: Very easy to use and effective. The dishes are clean and dry. Note a slight smell at the outlet, like “burnt”, probably the natural stone drying system.

1148806339.text_en: The purchased Series 8 dishwasher is quiet and easy to use. The dishes are clean and dry after washing. The phone app is also helpful. The dishwasher is worth recommending.

1176770313.text_en: MSV is silent, washes and dries dishes very well.  The washing cycle times are the same or sometimes longer compared to older models, depending on the degree of soiling.

1120663197.text_en: + zeolith drying technology + height adjustment of the basket, variability when I need to wash large pots + connection of the appliance to home connect and remote control + appearance of the dishwasher

1135479262.title_en: Does what is asked of it perfectly
1135479262.text_en: My old Bosch dishwasher lived 18 years. I didn't hesitate for a single moment to pick one up. The performances have further improved (energy and impeccable results).

1143190692.text_en: I have been using the washing machine for over 7 years.  It washes the dishes very well without the need to rinse them first. It is very roomy and very easy to maintain. I recommend it!

1154802371.text_en: We are very happy with this new purchase. The washing is impeccable, no complaints. I appreciated the connected function which allows you to configure everything from the application.

1133906008.text_en: Leaves the dishes super clean and completely dry!!! It barely makes any noise and I haven't used the Silent program!! Lots of capacity and I find the cutlery tray very useful.

1181158189.text_en: Overall happy with using the dishwasher.  A little disappointed by the drying which I thought would perform better.  However, there was some bug with the application.

1180201007.text_en: I am very satisfied with my purchase it gives us complete satisfaction washes very well super drying and especially the connection by telephone for perfect control.....

1134921552.text_en: This is highly recommended, very dry and beautifully washed of cutlery, plates, glasses and all cooking utensils. The time setting is energy-saving for us because of our solar panels.

1173933652.text_en: Lamentable to make these connected devices given the catastrophic environmental impact of rare earth mining. Deplus emits waves therefore toxicity

1128874192.text_en: I have a Bosch but I want more!  I have several of them and they all do their job without noise at the quietest!  I don't know which one I prefer, so I'm looking for another one. The refrigerator is also great for us, it is spacious and big, it has safety glass, the shelves are as strong as steel!  It is easy to maintain and wash, it is constantly eaten. Hehe!  It has a small freezer with 3 drawers, sometimes we freeze chocolates inside. Slug!  The kitchen is clean, everything shines in it because we all know that you pick up your plate behind you and put it in a bowl for her to wash it nicely! Our favorite program is of course the fast '55, but in the evening mom puts it on Eco so that in the morning we have something to pour milk into.  It is very quiet, it does not hum at all, the consumption is low, you can see it in the electricity.  I'm not done yet, we still have more.  And our oven is Bosch!  We also have a stove with 3 gas rings, we cook and bake, we are not hungry because the Bosch works perfectly! :)

1178574455.title_en: Flexible baskets, great drying, best results
1178574455.text_en: I am a big fan of this dishwasher. I've always wanted a BSH dishwasher with zeolite drying after hearing so many positive things about this technology. I can definitely say: Bosch doesn't exaggerate when it comes to drying results. Everything completely dry. Also plastic. No other manufacturer can compete with this. Only in the Eco program does it weaken a bit when it comes to plastic, but that's not a bad thing. If you want it drier, there is always the extra dry option, which you can even switch on permanently in the settings without pressing the button every time. The flexibility of the baskets is also worth emphasizing, I can design both baskets the way I want, the option of only folding down every second folding spike on the high folding spikes in the lower basket is also great. And I can also fold down all the spikes in the upper basket so that I can load the dishwasher very flexibly. It is also very quiet and the cleaning results are great even in the short program. Runtimes are also good, even without SpeedPerfect. It's also great that the controls are not on the visible front, but on the top of the door, like with a built-in dishwasher. Just looks good.  I only recommend dishwashers from Bosch/Siemens-Hausgeräte to everyone in my circle of friends and acquaintances.

1137107541.text_en: I find the smart options of Bosch dishwashers very convincing and use them almost every day. Visually, the device is unobtrusive. The machine washes very cleanly even at 40 °C, the dish racks are extremely well divided and all the racks, really all of them, can be folded down (very intelligently: also divided), which means that the space can always be divided sensibly without bending anything. What I've never had before: The spikes have round beads at the top, which reduces contact with the dishes and the resulting small drying spots to a minimum. The cutlery drawer can be deepened on the side for bulky items.    Actually, I would really like to give it 5 stars. I'm deducting one because this top model only achieves efficiency class B, while there is one in the 6 series that achieves A - albeit more expensive. The fact that the upper class is more inefficient than a mid-range device irritates me. There is also a deduction for the noise it makes: The machine is not as quiet as advertised. My old Siemens, which was a device class below this one, was supposed to be 1 dB louder on paper, but was considerably quieter than this one! In particular, a pump that usually runs at the beginning of the rinsing program and then again during active drying hums quite obtrusively, whereas all of the pumps on my old Siemens were almost unnoticeable until recently. That's disappointing.

1161149440.text_en: Very good dishwasher. It's not easy to compare it with other brands because I've only had Bosch (including the old one). The washing is impeccable, no complaints. I appreciated the connected function which allows you to configure everything from the application. But my favorite function remains the automatic door opening which allows me to no longer have to wait until the end to go to bed, for example. The door opens by itself once the program is finished and that's very nice! (The instructions should have been clearer on this subject because it was poorly explained and it took me a while to understand that it was necessary to activate the "EfficientDry" option in the general settings). I was doubtful about the cutlery drawer, that's why I bought an optional Bosch basket, but as a result I use the drawer for other items and it's very practical. The only downside is that I expected it to be quieter than my old Bosch which was an old built-in model, but the difference in noise is not huge. Another flaw also: I find that even the "Express" program is still a little long (1h30 minimum if I remember correctly) and my old model did just as well in much less time because I had a 45 min program I think. But we can download new programs apparently, and that's cool! The height adjustment system for the feet could also have been a little more qualitative and better thought out, it was tedious to put everything square... To return to the noise, There is however an optional silence mode for those teleworking in an open room for example. But the washing remains impeccable and that is what we mainly ask of it. The overall quality printing is also there. It is also very practical to have the buttons on the edge of the door so you don't have to bend down to program. Overall, I remain very satisfied, especially since the price difference with the Series 6 was not huge. So I opted for this excellent series 8. Hoping that the reliability is there too ;-)

1140165781.text_en: I've came at this review after using various programs and different items in the dishwasher; its too easy to gush over a product you've just bought just to justify why you bought it...    Firstly I couldn't find a Series 8 in any store locally. So to get an idea of how it felt I took a look at a Series 6.  So it was a bit of a leap of faith to pay for an "8" based on doing this and looking at other reviews online.       It feels very solidly built; the racks, controls and door.  Compared to the 13 year old machine from another manufacturer it replaced it also looks rather classy in the stainless steel finish.    But how does it do cleaning?  Exceedingly well. Using quality cleaning products helps but I can say that there is nothing that has been washed that I didn't feel was anything less than spotlessly clean when I took it out at the end.  It uses so little energy and water to do it too.  This is my first time using a third, top, cutlery tray and I thought it would just waste space in the machine.  It doesn't.  Loading and unloading cutlery is a lot easier than the chicken peck method you have to do to put cutlery into and out of a cutlery basket.  The choice of different loading options, by using the various folding racks that are clearly marked in red, is good.  This is the first dishwasher I've ever used that actually dries plastic, completely. It sounds silly to have say that. The Zeolith drying really makes a massive difference to all those plastic jugs and food containers that I had  to finish off with a dish towel in the past.    The connected app works well and is clear to use.    Pros:    It cleans and dries very well. The drying in particular is on a different level to anything I've had before.  Quality feel and design.    Controls are very intuitive to use and the screens are informative and clear.  Very energy and water efficient for what it can do.  It'll save money in the long run compared to what I had before.  So quiet, I can't imagine ever using the "Silence" program    Cons:  It was expensive.  That has to be a con right?  Not really.  I could also place this under the "Pros" as good value for money.    If someone blind folded me and replaced this with my previous washer I WOULD immediately know the difference.    I'm looking to buy a new built in oven in the next couple of months and based on my experience with this product it'll be a Bosch.     I would recommend the Series 8 for anyone looking for a quality washer, with excellent results.

1142463087.title_en: The perfect companion for carefree dishwashing!
1142463087.text_en: Bosch is known for its quality and reliability, and the 60 cm wide freestanding dishwasher is no exception. This machine brings advanced functions, efficient washing and elegant design, giving you a simple and comfortable experience when washing dishes. One of the most important features of this machine is its capacity. With a width of 60 cm, it can accommodate a large number of dishes, glasses, plates and cutlery, which is ideal for family meals or larger gatherings. The interior of the machine is well organized, with flexible baskets and compartments that allow you to adjust the arrangement of dishes according to your needs. When it comes to washing performance, the Bosch dishwasher is extremely efficient. It uses different washing programs that are optimized for different types of dirt and materials, as well as for economical consumption of water and energy. You can choose an intensive program for heavily soiled dishes, or an economical program for less dirty dishes. This machine also has a quick wash function that allows you to wash a smaller amount of dishes in a short time. One of the advantages of this machine is its quiet operation. Bosch has made efforts to reduce noise during operation, which is especially important if the machine is located near a relaxation area or bedroom. Also, the control panel is intuitive and easy to use. You can select the desired washing program and monitor the remaining washing time via a clear display.  Additional features include automatic salt dissolution, which helps maintain optimal water hardness levels for efficient washing, as well as a flood protection function that prevents unwanted water from overflowing. Bosch is a brand you can count on when it comes to dishwashing, providing you with a high-quality product that will last for many years. The Bosch 60 cm wide freestanding dishwasher is an extremely reliable choice for anyone looking for an efficient and practical way to wash dishes. With its spacious capacity, various washing programs and quieter operation, this machine will make your everyday tasks in the kitchen easier. The design of the machine is elegant and modern, so it will easily fit into any style of kitchen. Also, Bosch is known for its focus on energy efficiency, which means you will have less water and energy consumption while using this machine. Bosch is a brand with many years of experience and high quality standards, so it is worth investing in their products.  All in all, the Bosch Freestanding Dishwasher is an excellent choice for anyone looking for an efficient, reliable and stylish dishwashing solution. Its advanced features, as well as Bosch's reputation for quality, make it a worthwhile investment for your kitchen. I am very satisfied, as you can tell from my review!

1207533421.text_en: I am delighted with this purchase. Almost no noise and even heavily loaded dishes come out not only clean but dry and streak-free. 1207869009.text_en: After more than a year I finally had the dishwasher I wanted so much. Design-wise it is beautiful, it makes me want to use it constantly. As for washing, I'm not disappointed with the zeolite as a bonus, it's really comfortable on a daily basis. The Home connect mz app signals when the salt or rinse aid level approaches zero and notifies me, even when I need to clean the dishwasher.

1207983344.text_en: I already had a Bosch dishwasher for several years. This new model retains the strong points of the old model and is supplemented with several very practical everyday improvements. Bravo to the engineers who listened to customer needs!

1210314463.text_en: The Bosch Series 8 SMS8TCI04E dishwasher is very efficient and quiet. The dishes are always clean and dry, even in the eco program. The baskets are practical and easy to adjust. A reliable and very good quality device.

1208907148.text_en: My Bosch Dishwasher is the best, light, magnificent red interior design, the integrated control panel on the top of the door, all perfect stainless steel Excellent washing and drying, quiet, I recommend without hesitation🥰

1186696760.text_en: Easy installation.   Quick and intuitive commissioning.  After a few uses, each program is easily evaluated.  Connection to the application simple and immediate.  I recommend this product.

1217346762.text_en: Old dishwasher from Bosch series 6 silent, in need of replacement due to higher energy consumption (E) Series 8 logical successor because it consumes the lowest energy. The new one has much more interaction via Home Connect, you can save your own favorite here with advice on what is best, and a clear explanation of how much water and kWh you have lost. What I find disturbing compared to series 6 is the roughness of the two top drawers. Probably due to the ability to change the heights. Here should be the option to do that with or without, and get smooth loading again. Series 6 was silent, initially Series 8 makes more noise, but you can cancel that in the Home Coneect Menu. All in all happy with this purchase

1205260010.text_en: The dishes come out perfectly washed and dry. The dishwasher is quiet. I am very satisfied with this purchase.

1217647736.text_en: A car that looks top notch. It washes well, but plastic pots do not excel when drying. The other materials dry well. It is roomy, has 3 shelves and very useful flexibility. I hope it will be reliable (the car I had before was also good, but it broke down often). The fact that it has a long-term warranty gives me hope in this regard. It has low water and energy consumption. Beautiful appearance, suitable programs and screens that make it easy to use. 1216025714.text_en: Very quiet and economical dishwasher, very nice design

1181108298.text_en: It fulfills its function, I hope to get the most out of it.

1183872862.text_en: I recently purchased the Bosch Series 8 dishwasher, trusting in the brand's quality, although at first I had my doubts due to the price. Now I can say with complete certainty that it was an excellent decision. It is an incredible appliance. It's so quiet that you barely realize it's working.   What I liked the most is that it has a lot of super versatile programs, and the best of all is that, by connecting it with the application, you can customize everything to your liking. You can program it remotely, choose whether you want the door to open automatically when the wash is finished, activate super quiet modes (even though it's already quite quiet), adjust the drying or rinse aid level, and even change how the sensor detects dirt.  Another strong point is that it offers information on water and energy consumption for each wash, something very useful if you are concerned about being more efficient at home. In addition, even the internal lighting and the external screen can be controlled from the app. And if that were not enough, you can also download additional programs to adapt it even more to your needs.   But most importantly: the washing and drying of the dishes is impeccable every time. Without a doubt, an excellent purchase that I totally recommend.

1210865541.text_en: The Bosch SMS8TCI04E is technically impressive across the board: very good cleaning performance, quiet operation and many useful programs. It's really fun to use every day.    Unfortunately, the workmanship seems disappointing for a device in this price range. When it was delivered, the tab container was already broken off, which doesn't leave a particularly high-quality impression. That shouldn't actually happen at Bosch.    Conclusion: technically a strong device, but there is clearly room for improvement when it comes to material quality and final inspection.

1211996901.text_en: Excellent product. Perfect cleaning, extremely quiet and very economical in water and electricity. Special mention for the perfect drying with the Zeolith system on all materials and the very easy to configure Wi-Fi connectivity. Bosch has created a high-end device that exudes robustness.  It is incredibly quiet (you almost forget that it is rotating) and the modularity of the baskets allows you to accommodate large dishes without difficulty. The Home Connect application is a real plus for receiving a notification when the cycle is finished.

1198938791.text_en: I bought the product recently and yet its ease of use makes me believe that I have had the product for a long time. The control pad is clear and setting up the machine is child's play. The design is truly cutting edge and the interior light allows you to see clearly during loading/unloading stages. Washing is also impeccable, the functionality of opening the door automatically to finish drying is great and economical. In short, a product that I highly recommend.

1179101347.text_en: I like the possibility of programming it to operate at the lowest cost hours, its design, etc.

1210810594.text_en: 1st experience with the Bosch SMS8TCI04E dishwasher, very positive. nice article. 1200906518.text_en: Since it came from a top-of-the-range Siemens in its day, the changes have been minimal in terms of service, but significant in handling.  In service, it improves the number of programs, the information on the screen, the internal light, the extra cleaning area, the division into two batches of the outermost folding combs of the lower tray, the possibility of height adjustment with lateral inclination of the central basket without extra noise, improvement in all the moving parts of the trays or baskets, better drying, automatic opening of the door, zeolites, without increase in energy expenditure.  Regarding noise, it does make noise when it is not filled too much and some parts can move.   What does improve compared to previous models that were top of the range in their day is in handling. Almost everything can be configured from the phone, but also from the device itself. In addition to several additional options in each program, it provides various information about the program phase you are in, remaining time, consumption... Very useful are the maintenance notices. (We have a series 8 washer-dryer and we already know its advantages).  I miss information about zeolites, how they work, how to take care of them, what we should do... How to use them. More information on what's new would be appreciated.  A larger tank for rinse aid and another for soap or tablets would be nice, with a barcode reader, to dose just enough, just like the washing machine does.  I really like the possibility of turning off the external screen and the placement of the buttons and control screen, which are hidden and not accessible by children or inadvertently when the device has the door closed. The button panel on the upper edge of the door is a success. Horizontally they are easier to see and handle. The small screen next to the buttons is very helpful in addition to allowing configuration without a phone.  We also miss knowing how the use of options such as vario speed, extra drying, extra hygiene influences the conservation of the machine... To decide or not the use we give to the options.  Regarding the flexibility in the baskets and trays, it is so good and complete that all dishwashers should be like this. Baskets as versatile as these should be mandatory.  I'm not going to name other brands, but one that costs twice as much and claims to last a long time without breakdowns (its name means that) turned out to be a piece of cake compared to this dishwasher or the previous Siemens one that continues to work perfectly after many years and will continue to do so.  And most importantly: even with shorter programs the dishes come out clean and dry. Cleans better than other brands, this I can say with complete certainty.

1179852590.text_en: very good product, performance and quality

1218754416.text_en: Our old dishwasher was a different brand. We were never really satisfied. That's why we decided on a Bosch dishwasher. I now have many more programs to set up. You can operate it with your cell phone and the dishes just get cleaner. And if I can't take the dishes out straight away, they no longer smell unpleasant, despite cleaning the machine regularly.  There's a reason why we only buy Bosch devices!

1219267068.title_en: Our dishwasher is a good servant
1219267068.text_en: I took an online cooking course and the new dishwasher helped me a lot in saving time and in the joy of creating new meals. I wanted a push-button dishwasher and it got it, plus it has a mobile app that my tech-savvy husband can use. The dishwasher has simple controls, it has a pre-rinse, which I use when I don't wash daily. I like the upper basket for cutlery, where they line up neatly next to each other. I was surprised how spacious the inside of the dishwasher is, even large pots can fit in it. It also soaks up dried deposits and the dishes are nicely clean. I use the eco program most often. Dry with the door ajar to allow the steam to escape. That was new to me. I am very satisfied with it and I am glad that my husband came up with the idea to buy a dishwasher and I was not so busy working in the kitchen. I have always had the best experience with the Bosh brand, so this brand's dishwasher was a clear choice for me.

1219281840.text_en: Dishes are cleaner than manual washing. SmartStart is a great and practical feature.

1207075000.text_en: I am very satisfied with the dishwasher. The device makes a high-quality impression, runs pleasantly quietly and cleans reliably. The operation is also uncomplicated.

The third drawer for cutlery and small items is great.  Control and information via a mobile app increases utility. No problem.  After registration, the warranty is extended to 5 years. Cool. 1193184451.text_en: On May 19, 2025. I bought a Bosch SMV25AX06E built-in dishwasher. After the first wash, the "water indicator" error appeared. After the second wash, the "water indicator" error lights up again. I call Bosch after sales again. They are now ordering a repairman. In 4 days, the repairman comes and approves the replacement of the dishwasher for a new device. I am returning the defective device and paying extra for another model 70% more expensive because I am not sure if this model has a serial error.

1210532194.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher proved to be a very reliable and high-quality household appliance. Washing is thorough, the dishes come out clean and shiny even with more demanding soiling, and the programs are clearly defined and easy to use. Quiet operation is particularly noteworthy, which is a big plus if the washing machine is used in the evening or in the open space of the kitchen and living room.    The layout of the baskets is practical and flexible, so it is easily adapted to different types of dishes - from glasses to larger pots. The consumption of water and electricity is reasonable, which is felt in the bills in the long run. The construction seems solid and high-quality, which instills confidence in the long life of the device.    All in all, the Bosch dishwasher lives up to its reputation and is a safe choice for those looking for a combination of quality, silence and reliability.

1182847930.text_en: Easy to use. 5 basic programs that are completely sufficient for me. A very useful "1 hour" program. The VarioSpeed-Plus option is also useful, reducing the duration by 20% to 66% depending on the selected washing program. Relatively quiet operation. InfoLight is helpful, especially since sometimes there are longer breaks during the work cycle of individual programs (especially eco). Note: Compared to previous models, new Bosch dishwashers have a shorter range of drain hoses (left 170 cm and right 150 cm) and inlet hoses (left 150 cm and right 120 cm). The current dishwasher, which replaced the previous model, actually fits within the range of clean and dirty water connections. My previous SGV45M83EU/36 dishwasher had a breakdown after 15 years of operation that was no longer worth repairing, I hope that the current one will last at least 2/3 of that time.

1203545959.text_en: I have had my Bosch dishwasher for about two weeks now and I can say that it has already convinced me that it was worth the investment. It is very quiet, you can hardly hear it when it is working, and the dishes come out flawlessly even after an eco cycle.    I really like the fact that it has clear and easy-to-understand programs, and the interior is well thought out - the trays are easily adjusted, it holds a lot more than it seems at first glance. I also tested with dirtier pans and it cleaned them without problems, without the need for pre-washing.    Another plus is that it leaves no traces of detergent, and the glasses come out shiny, like new ones. Water consumption is low, and the eco program, although it takes longer, is very effective.

1209142471.text_en: Bosch SMV2HVX02E Series 2 is a really nice dishwasher for the price. It delivers great washing results, and both washing and drying work flawlessly in daily use. The machine is easy to operate and the programs cover most needs without unnecessarily advanced functions.  However, you can tell that Bosch has saved a little on the robustness of the trays and cutlery drawer. They work fine, but the materials don't feel quite as solid as on more expensive models. It's not something that spoils the overall impression, but it's worth paying attention to.  On the other hand, the delivery was both fast and friendly, which is always a big plus when you need a new machine.  All in all, a good and affordable dishwasher that does the job efficiently – with some compromises on the quality of the materials.

Water and energy consumption seems efficient. The only minus would be the longer duration of some programs, but the final results are very good.

1164923753.text_en: This dishwasher is fantastic, it washes very well and has various programs that can be added with the home connect application, which is best downloaded and connected to be able to configure it as best as possible, it is also possible to start it remotely. 1201913712.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher. I bought the first one 10 years ago, it worked great. I heartily recommend the Bosch dishwasher with a clear conscience. #opinionmotivated by promotion.

1207626439.text_en: The dishwasher is solidly constructed, the stainless steel interior is impressive, and the baskets are comfortable and flexible - they can be adjusted to accommodate larger pots or non-standard dishes. 1103493135.text_en: The machine is phenomenal. Even the dirtiest pots and pans are washed perfectly. The dishes are perfectly clean and shiny. The best machine I've used!

1201252396.text_en: This is the second time we have purchased this washing machine, we were so pleased with it. Where we moved, we wanted to have it. We weren't even aware of how much water and detergent we were using until we bought it. It washes at least once a day, most often in eco mode, but short programs are also quite sufficient. The smartest purchase ever!

At first glance, the new washing machine does not look as good as the old one. parts of the interior are made of plastic (the previous one was all made of SS metal). The new washing machine is also much noisier than the old one. The inner shelves do not open, i.e. they do not pull out on the guides as easily as on the old washing machine. Basically, the quality of the new washing machine is not at the level of the old one that we had for 12 years

1138319555.text_en: I have this machine incorporated in the kitchen furniture made to order, and I am very satisfied with it, it is very roomy, I frequently use the 1 hour program and I can say that both the pots and the glasses are washed so well that even after 4 or 5 washes, even though they are no longer new, they look as if they were new, it is an extraordinarily good product in the kitchen, I recommend it! I have also read reviews in which people say that the handles of Tefal pots hold water after washing, I actually have two sets of Tefal pots in use but I have never had water left in the handles. This machine if you occasionally buy Salt from Finish (I put a whole box for 5, 6 washes and I bought those finish tablets for 50 washes (1 tablet for each wash) I am very satisfied, it has low energy consumption and effectively after each wash everything looks like new, I recommend that the dishes are not loaded or dried with a lot of food on them, it is a very good product if used properly. I recommend!

1138875834.title_en: great dishwasher at a good price
1138875834.text_en: I've been thinking about a dishwasher for my family of 4 for a long time and I finally decided that when renovating the kitchen, it's the perfect opportunity to finally stop washing it by hand and just relax, saving not only time but also money, especially since my water bill has recently skyrocketed and the price exceeded my expectations. 1128183671.text_en: I waited two months to review, I wanted to be sure. I also tested with encrusted egg, cheese etc. Always impeccable dishes! The jet? very powerful so be careful with glass and plastic objects because? if they are not of good quality? they will be filled with micro scratches.   I'm a little disappointed with the drying: plates and glasses are always impeccable even when washed at low temperatures; Plastic cutlery handles and pans stay wet even with extra drying.

1071006087.text_en: Installation and commissioning: - The machine comes with a relatively OK but not very intuitive user manual for a person who has never installed a dishwasher before.  - If you want to mount and put it into operation, I recommend you to check the installation sheet from this link https://media3.bosch-home.com/Documents/9001170055_C.pdf because you have QR codes that will show you detailed videos on how to do that step. The sheet my car came with (November 2019) did not have the respective codes.   - As a recommendation, if you don't consider yourself a technical and skilled person, contact a person who has dealt with such things until now.   - It can be installed directly in hot water, but the temperature should not exceed 60 °C. All details can be found in the user manual.  - After commissioning, do not forget to set the water hardness according to the water hardness you have in your location. You can search online for the report issued by the local water supplier. The user manual contains all the information on how to set it up.      Functionality: - I was very attracted by the pre-wash function, if you are a small family (2-3 people), you may not load the car in one day and the pre-wash helps to soften the dirt.   - At first, I thought the cutlery drawer would be uncomfortable, but after 2-3 uses, I changed my mind. Very practical, more comfortable than the usual 'basket'.   - I can't detail the noise part very much, it's the first washing machine I own and use, I don't consider it noisy, but you can hear the water hitting the walls and the dishes. Surely you have heard different comments that it would make it like a hurricane, typhoon or other similar 'descriptions', but from my point of view it produces normal noises of a dishwasher and the noise is not disturbing.   - There is an additional drying option, which can be activated in most cases, except with the option of 1h at 65°C.   - If the washing time is too long, you can use the "VarioSpeed ​​Plus" function, which further reduces the washing time.  - After completing the wash, the machine emits 3-4 semi-annoying beeps. Volume may change. Check the manual for more details.  - Another acoustic signal, different from the completion one, you receive when you close the door when the car is prepared with the related program but does not have a pill or detergent.   - The screen is very useful when the car goes into error. You receive an error code and an icon. You can find the error codes and their solutions in the user manual. I recommend that you have those codes nearby.        Other information: - For the curious, the car is manufactured in Turkey - Lidl tablets have a decent quality/price ratio, I used both versions and noticed a better efficiency when removing dirt using the simple W5 Classic 60 piece tablet, not the 3 in 1 one. I also bought the cleaning liquid and salt also from Lidl and I am satisfied with them.  - From November 2019 until March 2020, I used the washing machine successfully and had no problems with it. I can warmly recommend it.
