Loading the dishwasher is easy and the cutlery drawer is a great solution. The light on the floor shows the dishwasher is working and I don't have to wonder "is it finished" or is it still working. I recommend it with all my heart because it is a faithful friend of my house :)

1097542860.text_en: The modular shelves are very useful because you can lower/raise the various plate racks to make room for larger pots.    I washed 10L pots, woks, pans, crystal glasses and all kinds of other things in it.    It washes well, and if it is maintained correctly, it does not retain bad smells.    Attention: from personal experience, if you have pans or plates dirty with eggs, I recommend that you rinse/clean them of egg quite well before putting them in the car, otherwise the smell will persist for a long time.

1063415205.text_en: Since I received this washing machine as a gift from my husband, I have been a real lady in the truest sense, it is silent and does its job much better than me, and in the meantime I have time to take care of my husband and children. It's worth every penny because you gain time with your family and save water.

1193999348.text_en: The old dishwasher broke down not long before Black Friday 2024, after 5 years of use. So I bought this model from Bosch, and after the first wash, my wife said to me: "What's more, you should know that this Bosch machine really washes better than the old one. After washing, the dishes are warmer, drier and impeccably clean. And it's also quieter!"   And with that, I think I've summed up everything there is to say about the product! :) We most often use the 1-hour program, which is sufficient in most cases. It doesn't even have shorter programs. I would have liked it to have automatic opening, but I knew in advance that this model does not have it and it is not a problem. The light indicator on the floor is also useful.  Finally, I strongly recommend this washing machine!

1149826010.text_en: I have been using a free-standing BOSCH dishwasher for twenty years. Now, however, there is more space in my built-in dishwasher, even though there is an additional cutlery drawer in which you can also place small items. I use BOSCH washing-up cubes. The dishes are perfectly clean. The dishwasher is so quiet that I often turn it on at night or just in the morning.   The sound of the end of washing is a very good idea from the manufacturer. Then I know that I should go to the kitchen and take out the dishes.

1151851974.text_en: Washes very well, silent and super roomy. The top drawer specially created for cutlery can be an advantage as well as a disadvantage. Advantage, more space for plates in the bottom drawer, disadvantage = less space in the top drawer, which makes it impossible to wash a little tall glasses in this drawer, so they end up in the bottom drawer, created more for plates than for glasses.   Having experience with another Bosch machine, but without this special cutlery drawer, I tend to recommend that one.

1131004632.text_en: For a long time, we weighed which dishwasher to get. Looked at the specifications of dozens of devices. In the end, we decided on this machine, primarily because it is Bosch. We were amazed at how quiet this machine is, it's almost inaudible that it's working, and it washes much better than we would wash by hand. The fantastic thing is that the machine has a third shelf for accessories. Also, since I have small children, it's a great thing that the machine has a mode for bottles and other things that children use. It is also very easy to use. Recommendation!

1156693172.text_en: Whether you are a passionate cook or just a foodie looking to save time and energy, the dishwasher is an indispensable companion in the kitchen. As the owner of this amazing device, I can confirm that it was a choice that made my life easier and brought more comfort to my daily routine. It is extremely convenient to use. The intuitive control panel and flexible programming options make using it a pleasant experience.

1177338711.title_en: A combination of silence, efficiency and quality
1177338711.text_en: We are very satisfied with the Bosch built-in dishwasher! 🥰 Its quiet and efficient washing function is a real delight - it is barely audible while it is working, and the dishes are always impeccably clean and dry. The programs are practical and adapted to various types of washing, and the Eco option is great for saving energy and water. The design is modern and fits perfectly into our kitchen. The installation was simple, and the instructions were clearly written. We definitely recommend it to everyone who wants reliability, quality and a long-term investment!

1105179994.text_en: The machine is large enough, in the lower part they fit next to the plates and pots because the cutlery is placed in the upper basket, it works quite quietly, there are enough different programs that can satisfy various needs.  however, this machine, unlike my previous one, has a plastic bottom, and after several months of use and my intervention with the manufacturer, it still has an unpleasant smell when it is opened (the smell of rubber and heated plastic). my advice after this experience is to buy machines that are entirely made of stainless steel.

1176389296.title_en: Efficiency and peace in one device
1176389296.text_en: The Bosch Series 4 dishwasher has become our family's trusted helper! The fully built-in design blends seamlessly into our modern kitchen, offering a seamless and elegant look.    What impressed us the most was the silent operation – you barely know it's on! The washing programs are extremely intuitive and the smart sensors optimize water and energy consumption, making it both budget-friendly and environmentally friendly.    Cleaning dishes is flawless, whether it's delicate glasses or difficult pans. In addition, the extra drying function is a wonderful bonus, especially for those times when you need dishes to dry quickly.    I warmly recommend this product to everyone who wants a reliable partner in the kitchen!

1217373178.text_en: Personally, after 2 years of use, I consider it a good dishwasher, it doesn't leave marks on the dishes, it cleans well, the only minus is that the door doesn't open automatically after the washing cycle is finished, but this is a mentioned aspect, but I wasn't paying attention. On the other hand, compared to another dishwasher from the past, although the door does not open automatically, the moment I open it, the dishes are already dry. It seems to me that Bosch is a remarkable brand, they are durable and of high quality.

1064590143.text_en: Since I have this miracle in my house, I gain precious time with my husband and children. Wash well, but you need to put the dishes in an order so that water can penetrate everywhere.

1108571860.text_en: The machine is excellent, it has several options that are very intuitively combined (acceleration of the program + drying). It is very quiet so the laser indicator that it is working is very useful.

1149223580.text_en: First of all, it washes and dries dishes well. The plastic stays wet. The third drawer is very useful. Quiet in operation. After using it for a long time, I give it a rating of 5

1148958873.text_en: Very roomy, additional cost for cutlery at the top, so there is no container at the bottom and more dishes can fit. Very quiet, overall ok :)

1072452867.text_en: Perfect machine, has a lot of functions. It always washes everything, and what is very important, it is not heard at all while it is working. For every recommendation!

1184941072.title_en: Revelation! The best purchase of recent years!
1184941072.text_en: The dishwasher exceeded my expectations - it works quietly, washes even heavily dried dishes thoroughly, and is energy-saving and very easy to use. The programs are intuitive and the design fits perfectly into my kitchen. Express delivery, exemplary contact with the store - everything from A to Z went without any problems.  I recommend it to anyone who values ​​comfort, quality and professional customer service! With a clear conscience – 10/10! 👏 #opinionmotivated by promotion

1184941148.title_en: Revelation! The best purchase of recent years!
1184941148.text_en: The dishwasher exceeded my expectations - it works quietly, washes even heavily dried dishes thoroughly, and is energy-saving and very easy to use. The programs are intuitive and the design fits perfectly into my kitchen. Express delivery, exemplary contact with the store - everything from A to Z went without any problems. I recommend it to anyone who values ​​comfort, quality and professional customer service! With a clear conscience – 10/10! 👏 #opinionmotivated by promotion

1065625833.text_en: The machine is perfect, the dishes are shiny and clean without spots and stains, our kitchen is clean and tidy!!!

1055354740.text_en: We bought all possible Boch appliances, including a dishwasher, and for now we are satisfied

1069811801.text_en: Great washing machine, very quiet and washes well! Purchase recommendation 5/5

1176536709.text_en: I have owned this machine model for 2 years. Without error every program. I like 65° for 55 minutes the most. Apart from the impeccable limits of the courts, it is also fast until the new round of setting up lunch/dinner. Instead of helping anyone in the kitchen, I just have this machine and we handle everything. Fatty and sometimes old deposits, only a higher removal temperature without heavy chemicals, and that's what this machine does. Once a month, definitely cleaning according to the instructions, arranging the dishes according to the instructions from the first day and everything is impeccably clean.

1080281398.text_en: A great product that is easy to use and has a lot of options

1203465834.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is my next Bosch dishwasher. The previous one didn't disappoint me either. We just wanted a newer one. I'm giving away the old one for my mother. This dishwasher has great bottle sterilization functions. Which is a salvation for small children. It's super quiet. I've been using it for a few days but I'm already in love with it. She laughs at my husband at the TV, I may not be at home, but I have my friend Bosch always and everywhere. I recommend it because it is really solid equipment.

1215835794.text_en: I purchased this dishwasher recently and I am very happy with the choice I made. It washes even very dirty dishes impeccably, without the need for pre-washing. The programs are varied and useful, and the operation is surprisingly quiet, which makes it perfect even for nighttime use.  A big advantage is the reduced consumption of water and energy, something that can be seen in the bills. The interior is well compartmentalized and the baskets are easy to adjust for different types of pots and pans. The dishes come out clean, without stains and perfectly dry.  The modern design fits very well in the kitchen and the use is simple and intuitive. In conclusion, I confidently recommend this dishwasher to anyone who wants to save time and get great results with every wash

1217373710.text_en: Wash well. After a year of use, it started to dry a little with spots, I added a little salt and it was solved. I don't use rinse aid and it works very well.  I haven't tried all the programs. Most often I use the auto program of 2h45', I had no problems. I recommend - Machine care - with cleaning solution for the washing machine every 6 months or so, cleaning the filter. silent No leaks.  So far I have no problems. Thank you!

1177573945.title_en: A great addition to the kitchen
1177573945.text_en: After two years of use, we have come to the following conclusions about this dishwasher. It is big enough for a family of four, quiet enough to watch TV in its immediate vicinity while working. Even while we sleep it doesn't bother us. The dishes were washed flawlessly. Easy to manage and maintain. The only complaint concerns the warning sound that the cycle is complete, which consists of 5 beeps, not too loud but unnecessarily long.

1204175251.text_en: I recommend. This is my next Bosch dishwasher. The previous one still works, this one was purchased due to the change of furniture in the kitchen :) it has all the necessary programs, it is quiet, the cutlery drawer is very convenient. Intuitive controls. Easy assembly thanks to detailed instructions. If I have to look for any flaws, I have the impression that the seals in older models were made of better quality materials (more flexible). In general, I sincerely recommend it.

1084180630.text_en: I bought three of your devices, and I am very satisfied. I bought a built-in dishwasher smv46kx04e, a built-in hob pvs651fb5e, and a washing machine wat 24461by. Both machines are almost silent and the whole family is very happy. And the plate not only captivates with its appearance, but it's really great and it's our first induction plate and we wouldn't trade it for the world. I am very satisfied with the Bosch technique and would recommend it to everyone.

1080246276.text_en: I bought a Bosch dishwasher again after 20 years of the old one.  I chose this model why? it was on offer but? a very good product with an extra basket? upper for the dishes... I was used to the classic lower one and therefore I still have to get used to this one... but is everyone happy...? very quiet and spacious, the programs are very long but designed specifically for energy saving

1216861692.text_en: Great dishwasher!  I use the Bosch Serie 4 SMV46KX04E model and I am very satisfied. The dishwasher washes quickly and thoroughly, has a lot of space inside, and the basket arrangement is very practical and allows you to conveniently arrange dishes of various sizes. The operation is intuitive and simple, making using it a pure pleasure. The device works quietly and smoothly. I definitely recommend it! #opinionmotivated by promotion

1150082232.text_en: I used an older generation Bosch dishwasher for 11 years, now I bought a new device, the dishwasher was loaded into the car and brought home. Built-in dishwasher, I easily attached everything myself, and what's best, the water connection was the same in the old dishwasher and in the new one, which took me a maximum of 30 minutes to complete the installation and connection to the power supply, and after that the dishwasher was already running. Everything is a big plus!

1204057635.text_en: I bought a built-in Bosch Serie 4 SMV46KX04E dishwasher and it's great! holds 13 sets, washes without streaks thanks to Aqua Sensor and ExtraDry (even dry plastic), and quiet operation of 46 dB allows you to turn it on at night without making any noise. The cutlery drawer and adjustable VarioFlex baskets make loading easier, and AquaStop protects against flooding; economical (9.5 l/cycle, class E) and easy to use, perfect for a family - I honestly recommend it, 5/5!

1151297451.text_en: I bought my dishwasher about a month ago and I can say that I am very satisfied with this purchase! The dishes come out dry without the need to wipe them later. I like that it has an adjustable height, the cutlery drawer is well compartmentalized, it is roomy, it consumes little water and it is silent. So far I am satisfied with the purchase and I have nothing to complain about!

1172575297.text_en: Provo equipped the place with the first sudo machine.  Slight trepidation on how to start the machine for the first time, reading the instructions in detail - the first time, the second time, the fifth time.   And finally our first wash, after which the great pleasure begins in the ease of stacking all the dirty dishes.   So that our socializing would not be boring, we left the dishes to dry for a while, but regardless of everything, they wash perfectly.  The courts are glazed and do not have a single scratch.

1152242757.text_en: An excellent dishwasher. It is roomy, well compartmentalized and extremely silent, and consumption is reduced. The dishes are washed and dried very well. The glasses, with the use of a clarifying solution, come out incredibly clean and sparkling. All in all, an irreproachably efficient and good product that saves you the time for washing dishes, but also the discussions at home on this topic. 😂

1084167493.text_en: I know that the best friendships are made in childhood. I did not believe that I would meet my best friend at the age of 50, my court machine. I also named her after my very good friend Radoslava, because I love her and the name says it all. Joint "Celebrating Work". Buy it without hesitation, it is worth more than the investment! Many years of positive experience with the Bosch washing machine. She "raised" my two children.

1129301310.text_en: I chose Bosch for all the appliances in the house for one reason. Let me forget that I have something in the socket. To have that peace that someone has worked so that I can leave and let my intelligence work on me. Silent, with perfect results every time. I have the impression that I am spoiled. The diversity of programs and the ease with which they are handled will make this brand my constant choice.

1109127313.text_en: I have been using the machine for about half a year. In the first few months, when it was opened, a rather unpleasant smell was felt (on the rubber and plastic). Fortunately, that unpleasant smell is no longer noticeable. It is quite quiet when working and washes well. Sometimes, if the salts are not at a good angle, water remains, and they do not feel good. What is lacking is the "half machine" program. Overall, satisfied with the price-quality ratio.

1072209698.text_en: I purchased this dishwasher a few months ago, I must say that I am fully satisfied first of all with the quality? of washing: even with the short 1 hour cycle, the dishes are washed perfectly!  Furthermore, the dishwasher is? very quiet!    I was dubious about the horizontal cutlery drawer: should I tell you what it is? very comfortable...I am very satisfied!  Bosch? a security!

1072540713.text_en: I purchased this dishwasher a few months ago, I must say that I am fully satisfied first of all with the quality? of washing: even with the short 1 hour cycle, the dishes are washed perfectly! Furthermore, the dishwasher is? very quiet! I was dubious about the horizontal cutlery drawer: should I tell you what it is? very comfortable...I am very satisfied! Bosch? a security!

1118177639.text_en: I like the machine first of all because compared to the previous Bosch I had it has an adjustable shelf size. It is roomy, dries better than the other. It fit perfectly in the kitchen furniture. I hope I won't have any problems with it and if I do I will be able to find the cause and the spare part because I had to recycle the previous one due to the lack of technical solutions

1149825322.text_en: I have been using a BOSCH built-in dishwasher for a month. Previously, I used a free-standing one for 20 years. There is much more space for dishes even though there is an additional drawer for cutlery. The dishes are perfectly clean. The dishwasher works so quietly that I often turn it on at night. In the morning, the sound of the end of washing "invites" me to go to the kitchen. I definitely recommend it.

1201170953.text_en: Very good dishwasher! It is very roomy and has many compartments! It is easy to handle. It has very good and useful programs. It washes the dishes very well and does not leave any stains. Dry the dishes and leave them crystal clear. I recommend this dishwasher. Consumption is low. Fits many dishes and glasses. It is easy to handle and does not take up much space.

1172580149.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is a real hero in the kitchen – quiet, efficient and reliable.     Smart programs make every task easier, and trust me, it's not a big expense in the long run.     Saves water and electricity, works without noise, and at the same time saves your hands!     The investment is easily returned, because the courts shine like that every night!     Recommended for everyday comfort and longevity!

1122864738.text_en: My family and I have been buying only Bosch dishwashers for years, we have always been happy with them, they are durable and functional machines that always do their job very well. In the house I recently purchased there was an Indesit and was there? a huge difference, I wasn't happy with it and in fact after 2 months I replaced it with this model

1126103607.text_en: I am satisfied with the product. The consumption is low, the dishes are clean (as I could not clean them by hand), and the flexible arrangement system is a plus. The only minus I find is that at the end of the program, water remains on the dishes, not being dry enough. I also tried the drying option and even this does not leave them ready to be put in the closet.

1078901971.title_en: Poor rinsing and damage to glasses
1078901971.text_en: Generally speaking, we are not very satisfied with the purchase. You can see the dried remains of the foam on the pans, while the washing agent can be felt in the glasses if they are not washed afterwards. At the same time, we tried the recommended ECO program as well as the Auto program. We also noticed small scratches on the glasses that were not present before using the machine. We expected more from Bosch.

1149364099.text_en: As a father of two small children, time is priceless, and the Bosch dishwasher has become our indispensable ally. It cleans the dishes quickly and efficiently, giving me more time to spend with my family. Bosch is synonymous with quality and reliability, and this dishwasher is no exception. I recommend it to everyone who is looking for a practical and high-quality dishwashing solution.

1107808967.text_en: The washing machine is very roomy, the three storage compartments are more than enough for a large family, the programs are diverse and according to the need for washing, you can control the consumption according to the selected program. All in all, I have the necessary peace of mind to do other chores around the house without having to worry about washing the dishes.

1127872171.text_en: It's the first dishwasher and I can say that I can't imagine my life without it. The model is very roomy, for 4 people it is more than enough. It helps a lot that it has the cutlery holder on top and you can put more dishes in the large baskets. The programs are sufficient, we mostly use the eco mode anyway. Even if many people say it's too long, it doesn't bother me, I usually let it go at night. It's not noisy at all, if I close the door to the kitchen at night, I don't even know it's on (it's good that the red light comes on to indicate that it's on).   The only minus, which I can get over, is that at the end of the washing cycle the dishes are not completely dry, even if I also use the extradry function.  In conclusion, I chose the car based on which functions I was interested in, but also the well-known Bosch brand. P.S. by using it almost daily, we save on water, and the current consumption does not seem much higher than what we had before.

1167460545.title_en: Quality at an advantageous price with a 5-year warranty
1167460545.text_en: Quality at a great price with a 5 year warranty Now after 2 weeks I can't afford a conclusive review yet but I'm happy with how it's doing its job.  However, if you have a worktop that is too high over 90cm, you almost always get a build-in problem and have to find a creative solution.

1217374401.text_en: Hello. The machine washed the dishes well, but after a year of operation, rust spots appeared on the inside of the door. I requested service and was told that it cannot be repaired under warranty and that it is an aesthetic part. I take great care of the car and it is wiped with a clean cloth when necessary. I am totally disappointed with this company and the situation

1153810328.title_en: A bright house of happiness and joy
1153810328.text_en: A high-quality, reliable and fast bosch product with a really large washing capacity. It saves us water and our costs are lower. The built-in dishwasher fit perfectly into our new kitchen and all the household members are very satisfied. Once again the decision fell on bosch and we are sure that we will never regret it. All honest and warm recommendations for this product.

1084110017.text_en: After a long search for a dishwasher that is energy efficient, but not at the expense of washing quality and overall quality, I came across this Bosch model. The installation was relatively easy (the instructions are clear, and there are also YouTube video instructions), and the use justified the Bosch name. Namely, the dishes are clean, and the washing machine is silent. So far there are no problems.

1145156628.text_en: Small consumer of electricity and water, even if the eco mode is not used. It works very quietly. Excellent user interface, easy to manage (never have to look at the manual). We are also satisfied with the washing effect, only the drying is not at an enviable level and there is room for improvement, 10 minutes is short and the dishes cannot be put together immediately without drying.

1145147058.text_en: I have been using this model for two years and I am very satisfied. The drawer for scraps takes up minimal space in the machine, unlike models that have a basket for scraps and therefore less space in the lower basket. The upper basket has many levels of height adjustment, so large dishes can be placed in the lower basket. The machine is very quiet during operation. All recommendations.

1217433165.text_en: First of all, it must be stated that we are using our first dishwasher and we chose it to be of high quality, so we chose Bosch.  I don't regret anything about the choice made, it works flawlessly and comparing it to other washing machines we realize how useful the compartmentalization is, including the cutlery drawer

1124412277.text_en: I bought my first Bosch dishwasher last year on the advice of my cousin....It won't end? never to thank her. I gave it to my dad last month. Very practical and intuitive even for elderly people, extremely silent and the short and Eco cycles clean like an intensive cycle with notable energy savings.....

1129297228.text_en: A very quiet machine, it blends nicely into the kitchen so that you can't even see that there is a machine there. It is easy to use, easy to maintain. Choosing this kind of dishwasher was a requirement for us that it has larger dimensions and that it has a special shelf for escajg, which leaves plenty of space for other dishes in the machine itself. The recommendation is definitely Bosch.

1149945913.text_en: I'm on my third dishwasher, but none compares to Bosch. The newly added compartment for cutlery, which is the first drawer of the machine, makes loading much easier, and their washing is much better.  I am very pleased. I am going to replace the electric stove and the dryer with Bosch products.

1080280911.text_en: Easy to use and has a special shelf for escajg

1211114045.text_en: The dishwasher offers enough space with its 2 large drawers and the cutlery drawer. We are a two-person household and the dishwasher runs once, max. twice a week. Dishes, even if they have been waiting for a long time to be washed, will be perfectly clean. We particularly like that the dishwasher is very quiet.

1152176737.text_en: I purchased this product after looking at and questioning several brands, and I am currently very happy with the choice I made. It's a quiet, economical dishwasher, and what I think is a big plus is that it shuts itself off at the end of the wash cycles.

1191878279.text_en: I purchased two products of this type. It washes very well, it is silent.     As an unclear aspect, the car came with traces of splashes, I requested to change the product. The emag support team claims that all Bosch washing machines come with these splashes, uncertain appearance. We appreciate a clarification from the manufacturer.

1117233600.text_en: It is a top-of-the-range product in the field of Bosch dishwashers, but at first glance it is a good product, with quality materials and no manufacturing or transport defects. It does its job well with the programs it has, for a family with few members/few dishes to wash, it is suitable as it is not very spacious.

1127680827.text_en: I kept avoiding buying a dishwasher, because it consumes a lot, because I don't have room, but now I'm sorry that I hesitated for so long. In the evening, after the friends leave, she saves me, and I have time for something else. The dishes are clean, the car is quiet, a marvel, and it's Bosch. I also have an oven, a stove, a Bosh central and I am very satisfied.

1205375188.text_en: Spacious enough to fit large pots, which is very important. It is not noisy during operation. I especially like the light signal on the floor because you don't have to keep opening it and checking if it has finished the program or if it has been turned off. Adjusting the height of the upper basket is very easy. Most importantly, the dishes were washed perfectly.

1197933516.text_en: What I like best is its quiet and economical operation, a very environmentally friendly device. I expect a long service life with proper use, because I am very satisfied with the Bosch washing machine, which we have been using happily for 3 years. We have some other Bosch small appliances in the household that we are happy with. I recommend Bosch to everyone!

1218987375.text_en: Pros: the car behaves ok. the automatic door opening option at the end of the program was useful.  Not ok: I signed up for the offer with the set of free capsules. still no sign related to them..:( I got the extra warranty only after an exchange of emails (not directly in the application when I registered the product)

1129302131.text_en: It is our first dishwasher and I can say that it is an indispensable product in any household, it saves time which is insufficient anyway and money, after studying the market well I can say that I made the best choice.  I highly recommend this model and in general Bosch products do not disappoint.

1207278300.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The Bosch SMV46KX04E dishwasher works very quietly, is roomy and handles dirty dishes very well. The programs allow you to adjust the cycle to the degree of dirt, and the water and energy consumption is reasonable. I definitely recommend it - solid equipment that makes everyday washing easier

1109745205.text_en: Very silent, roomy, I like the multitude of programs.  The bright LED that indicates the operation of the car is a brilliant idea!  I didn't think I would like using the dishwasher so much.  I use it daily and it is a real help for our family (2 adults and 2 children)

1129339970.text_en: The construction compared to the previous models could be better, what used to be stainless steel in some places is now plastic, such as the bottom of the machine. The middle part of the machine that is pulled out is a little more difficult to pull out. The last compartment for large dishes does not have a limiter, so it happens that it goes out more than it should, and it is difficult to return.

1186477602.text_en: I've had it for about half a year and I'm very pleased. It saves me a lot of time, it integrated perfectly into the furniture, the dishes are impeccable, most of the time they come out dry. Glasses have never looked so good, with no limescale, wipe marks, etc. I would never give it up.

1155335924.title_en: Mandatory product in the human house
1155335924.text_en: I have the model with 08E at the end, but unlike other models and brands tried, it is all you need. The washing quality is impeccable, there are no stains on the cutlery, the large load volume is a big plus and the drawer for cutlery is mandatory on any model of dishwasher.

1109128645.text_en: Installed in the existing place without problems.  The device works quietly. Programs are standard. In my opinion, the dish storage compartment is the biggest advantage because it has 3 drawers, the top one for the tray, which frees up space in the plate drawer, which was not the case with the previous machine we had.  Any recommendation.

1150211921.text_en: The machine washes the dishes, cutlery, pots very well, leaves them dry, the door can be opened at any time during the washing program if you forgot to put something in the machine or if you urgently need something from the machine, after which the machine continues its program. I am very satisfied with the machine

1082778387.text_en: The purchase was an excellent one, taking into account the previous experience with the Bosch brand. Regarding the product under discussion, I mention that it is very silent and has an additional shelf for cutlery, aspects that led us to choose it and complete the purchase.

1212565736.title_en: An excellent product at a good price
1212565736.text_en: This dishwasher came to replace the dishwasher that, after 10 years, suddenly decided that it no longer wanted to heat water.
