1207310468.text_en: After a few weeks of use, I can say that I am extremely satisfied with this built-in dishwasher. The first thing that stands out is the extremely quiet operation — even in the most intensive program it is barely audible, which is a great relief in open spaces or smaller apartments.    The interior is thoughtfully organized, with flexible shelves that can be adjusted depending on whether I'm washing larger pots and pans or smaller dishes. The third cutlery drawer is particularly practical and significantly improves capacity.    The programs are clear and easy to use. The Eco cycle washes thoroughly and at the same time consumes very little water and electricity. For quick washing, there is a short program that has proven to be excellent when you need to quickly wash a small amount of dishes. Drying is excellent, especially with the automatic door opening function at the end of the cycle (if the model supports it).    It has a discreet appearance, fits perfectly into kitchen fronts and gives a clean, modern impression. In terms of consumption, I noticed significant savings compared to hand washing, both in water and time.    All in all, this is an extremely reliable and efficient built-in dishwasher that offers excellent value for money. I would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a quiet, economical and practical solution for everyday use.

1218403626.text_en: After weeks of searching for a fully built-in dishwasher (no visible front panel), I chose the Bosch Serie 4 SMV46KX04E, and I can honestly say that it was one of the best decisions I made for my kitchen. What I liked the most: Absolute silence. With 46 dB and the EcoSilence Drive motor, you can barely hear it when it's running. In the evening, when the children are asleep, I turn it on without any worries. It's quieter than a washing machine!  Flawless washing. Even dishes with dry food residues (pan with egg, pots with dry sauce) come out perfectly clean with the Intensive or Auto program. AquaSensor automatically adjusts the amount of water and time, and the result is always sparkling.  Excellent drying with ExtraDry. Plastic (grocery boxes, Tupperware cups) comes out dry, I don't have to wipe anything. The heat exchanger helps a lot.  Capacity and flexibility. 13 real sets (not theoretical). The VarioDrawer (top cutlery drawer) is brilliant – it frees up a huge amount of space in the lower basket. RackMatic allows you to adjust the height of the upper basket on 3 levels in just a few seconds, and the VarioFlex baskets adapt perfectly to any shape of dishes.  InfoLight – the red projector on the floor when the program is running. Small detail, but extremely useful!  Low consumption. Class E, 9.5 liters of water and approximately 0.94 kWh in the Eco program. We are clearly saving compared to the old model.    What I didn't like (small minuses): When I first used it, I needed 2-3 "break-in" cycles to fully understand how it loads optimally (but once you get the hang of it, it's perfect).  Sometimes if I load the lower basket too full, large glasses touch the upper basket slightly, but that's a loading problem, not a design problem.

1100298647.text_en: Purchased on promotion as the previous dishwasher no longer satisfied? the needs.     I'll start by saying that when new the Bosch has a strong plastic smell even after a few washes, but it doesn't affect the dishes inside; in any case, with several washes it fades and disappears.     The result already? from the first wash? very positive: with the 3:30h eco program it never left anything to be desired even using different detergents to try. Maybe some imperfections are possible? have on dirt from the previous day, but there ? I only happened to notice it on one plate (perhaps badly positioned?).     The third shelf for cutlery in the previous dishwasher wasn't there so getting used to this method initially seems to take a bit of time but it's just a matter of getting used to it. The space inside the dishwasher? very large and the central basket has three easily adjustable positions which allow you to make the most of the spaces for the smallest pots and pans. large.     A warning should be made to those who, like me, are preparing to buy this built-in dishwasher and install it independently: don't take this procedure lightly, which seems simple but isn't?!   The paper instructions for installing and applying the front panel are not clear but they provide a link (with QR Code) to some video tutorials that help a lot if followed carefully. Bear in mind that you will have to saw the plinth of the furniture and therefore you will need to have the appropriate tools!    Personally the 4 stars are more? what else for this last reason as not everyone may be equipped to do the installation independently.     At the moment I can say that I am satisfied with the work it does and the silence. of work that we were not used to: now to understand if? in operation we must check if the red light on the ground? turned on (another small convenience to underline in a built-in).

1124568317.text_en: Very good product, washes well, very quiet even if there is a silent program that I have not yet used.  Very practical cutlery drawer so you can put more dishes at the bottom. The dishwasher is built-in, so the small LED which lights up at ground level when it is running is very practical.   Several programs, delayed start, extra hygienic for baby bottles etc. I recommend this product

1147955188.text_en: Let me start by saying that I have had a Bosh dishwasher for 25 years and have been very happy with it; then the float broke and they advised me not to repair it. When I renovated my kitchen I wanted another Bosh at all costs by purchasing the product through the kitchen retailer. I didn't have the opportunity to see the product on display but I really regretted it: I was very disappointed by the poor quality of the materials used and the fragility of the product. The interior of this model is entirely made of plastic and therefore a lot of grease remains which can only be removed by frequently using specific cleaners; the filter is also uncomfortable, narrow and difficult to clean, also all made of plastic full of grease that cannot be removed even with the degreaser. To give you an idea: after 10 washes (so not even two weeks for a family), I cleaned the filter by hand with soap, degreaser and toothbrush and then washed at 70 degrees with a cleaning product: it is still dirty. Unacceptable and decidedly unhygienic. I would add that compared to the one with a steel interior, a bad smell easily forms and if you don't wash it immediately, even mold appears on the dishes! The cutlery, in the top drawer, is not always cleaned perfectly and I often have to wash it again by hand; a minimal obstacle caused by a glass in the basket below is enough to prevent the water from reaching the cutlery basket. Truly a very basic product, I didn't expect it from Bosh. Unfortunately the kitchen was completed 6 months after the order (!) and I was unable to return it to the retailer. At this point I advise you, if you can, to spend a lot more but focus on the 8 series (which I hope is up to the mark of the Bosh brand) otherwise find a top of the range product from another brand. I'm sorry I wasted my money and after just 10 months I can't wait to get rid of this product which I found really poor. I add photos of the interior and the filter.

1197875679.title_en: After 5 years, he goes to the scrapyard
1197875679.text_en: In use, silent, practical.   After 4 and a half years, one or two drops of dirty water under the door after a cycle + regular bug but not all the time, it pauses on its own after a few, forced to restart the cycle.   Being covered by Darty Max, technician intervention, he changes the seal, performs a reset operation. The bug disappeared, the drops too.   after a few weeks, condensation appears on the sides of the saucepan drawers next to it, the fronts swell.   Technician travels, he changes the door seal but that doesn't change anything. After discussion with Darty, it appears that this series has regular problems with the chassis becoming warped, a lot of after-sales service after 5 years.   it celebrates its 5th anniversary in August 2025... Oh yes and the bug starts again, it pauses on its own, regularly and now only starts very rarely if you set a delayed start... If you like to change your dishwasher every 5 years, this is the one for you!

1216370205.text_en: The dishwasher cleans the dishes very well. It has two compartments for dishes, pots and others, and a compartment for cutlery. It has both a short one-hour program and longer programs for heavily soiled dishes.

1200673329.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion A very spacious dishwasher, great for a large family. I bought this dishwasher on the recommendation of a friend. A huge advantage is a separate drawer for cutlery. I highly recommend the Bosch brand to everyone, the products are proven and very durable.

1085150983.text_en: We replaced our old Bosch dishwasher with this one because we were satisfied with the old one. But today we have a problem with the bottom basket or that there are 2 plates at the front, when we pull the basket, the front wheels get stuck in the junction between the dishwasher and the door, the basket tilts under the front weight. This is a problem that we never had with the old one, so we have to spread the plates out at each corner, but the rear spaces are for small plates. I will not buy this brand again, even though this system worked on the old model.

1197734223.title_en: The most useful household appliance in the household
1197734223.text_en: For a healthy life, buy your dishwasher from Bosch. For me it is the best investment in the household. Time saved, clean and sterilized dishes, happy family. What pleases me the most is the fact that no matter how dirty the dishes are, the washing machine does its job perfectly, leaving each dish perfectly clean. The cutlery drawer is super useful and definitely an appliance I would recommend to anyone considering buying a dishwasher. Moreover, with the dishwasher from Bosch, you will surely make your wife the happiest!

1045851433.title_en: Drying problem and very fragile resistance
1045851433.text_en: I had this LV installed in December during the installation of my fitted kitchen.    Pros: It is quiet, good storage with cutlery tray, simple programming Cons: drying is average even when using the drying + option.  We had 2 E09 error codes in 2 months (HS resistance) The technician recommends not using the eco program (low temperature) and replacing the powder with tablets.    Waiting for the problem to be resolved with the installer (a major brand of household appliances).   I also contacted Bosch after-sales service.

1138095444.text_en: The dishwasher is very intuitive in everyday use, super quiet. The only drawback is the lack of a salt funnel. Overall, recommendable and worth purchasing.

1079365482.text_en: Well-made, according to the information on the packaging, made in Poland. It washes off great. Quiet. It has great options: protection against water leakage, ActiveWater technology: lower water and energy consumption, higher efficiency, Dosing Assistant and Info Light. I highly recommend it.

1200068030.text_en: A wonderful experience, a reliable aid that should exist in every kitchen. Used both for the family and when we have many guests, it helps us enormously. She is like a robot, very discreet, silent and doing her job.

1174703664.text_en: It runs great and has low power consumption

1064119772.text_en: The machine is excellent, works perfectly without errors. Every recommendation for the machine, it is spacious, many programs for washing dishes, informs when it has finished the washing program. Removes hardened fat, high temperature up to 70 degrees. A small consumer of electricity and water!

1114329383.text_en: We buy appliances like dishwashers once every few years, that's why my choice is always bosch. Reliability, durability and top quality are the first association with bosch, so the dishwasher is one more in a series of bosch devices that I have in my home. I am very satisfied with the effect of washing and drying dishes, the capacity, the possibility of three-level adjustment of the upper shelf and other adjustments to the needs of consumers. Additionally, I would like to point out the quiet operation, which is a big plus and advantage compared to devices from other manufacturers. If I were to give a rating from 1 to 10, it is of course 10 and I would honestly recommend everyone to buy this model.

1072225415.text_en: We decided to choose the fully integrated SMV46KX05E built-in dishwasher for our new kitchen and we were not disappointed! The dishwasher is quiet (incomparable to other competitive brands that we have used) and washes every dish thoroughly. No more washing dirty dishes by hand! The dishwasher is very large and efficient. What pleasantly surprised me was the additional cutlery drawer, which is definitely more functional than traditional baskets placed in dishwashers. I highly recommend it!

1197640381.text_en: Extremely reliable and efficient. Dishes come out completely clean and dry after each wash, even plastic dishes that often remained wet with some models. The programs are diverse and cover all needs - from quick washing to intensive washing for heavily soiled dishes.    I would especially like to point out the quiet operation - the washing machine is almost inaudible, which means a lot to me because the kitchen is connected to the living room. Also, the VarioSpeed ​​Plus function is excellent when I need a quick wash, and the InfoLight (red light on the floor) practically shows when the device is in operation.    The interior is flexible thanks to adjustable baskets and practical partitions. Installation was simple, and management was intuitive.

1149562169.text_en: Life without a dishwasher in the kitchen is very burdensome, so no one in the household can imagine life without it. Good dishwasher. It washes similarly to the previous one. The currently purchased Bosch is slightly different from the previous one. It has a cutlery drawer instead of a basket. Half of the household members prefer the previous solution, but everyone sees the advantage of the larger capacity of the plates due to the lack of a basket. The bottom of the dishwasher is plastic, previously metal. It's hard to say whether it matters. The work light is a nice thing, but I think that's what most dishwashers have today. Overall, a good, cheap dishwasher that cost us PLN 1,600

1145591004.text_en: I have been using the Bosh SMV46KX55E dishwasher for more than two years. There was not a single problem or defect with this machine. I almost always use the Automatic program, and I often use delayed washing (timer), and the dishes are perfectly washed. The machine works very quietly, so if it is used at night, it does not disturb sleep. After this period, the machine is cosmetically identical to the first day. I would recommend her to friends and family without hesitation.

1053507420.text_en: Very bad storage system: my plates are quite large and I have stemmed glasses, with the cutlery drawer, I have to make a choice: either the plates or the glasses. Additionally, the washing is very poor. In conclusion I find that the price of this dishwasher is far too high for the results obtained.

1064979447.text_en: All it needs is a pre-wash program.

1148553861.text_en: This is my third BOSCH dishwasher. The foreman who installed the kitchen 15 years ago said that the car was MERCEDES and the dishwasher was only BOSCH. The first dishwasher (60 cm built-in) still works today (it's 15 years old), I love it. A second one from BOSCH was bought 6 years ago, smaller (45 cm built-in), it does not break down, looks like new. Both dishwashers clean very thoroughly and are quiet. Now another one (60 cm built-in) was bought for a new apartment, it was unpacked today. I am sure that it will be as reliable and failure-free as the previous two. What is BOSCH is BOSCH.

1079312316.title_en: Well within warranty period, breakdown 6 months
1079312316.text_en: Washing is average, drying is decent, and the little noise during washing means it can be used without any problems at night.  The only problem is that a few months after the end of the warranty, the dishwasher displays an E19 error and refuses to start. The previous wash cycle seems to have gone correctly, the dishes came out clean, but they have since been unable to be used.  Searching the net, it seems that this E19 error on Bosch dishwashers shortly after the end of the warranty is not an exception. Is there a defect noted at Bosch in this regard?

1146535898.text_en: Only been using it for a short time, very pleased with it so far.  Handy program with sufficient, not redundant, programs. Loading with the special cutlery rack is very convenient and gives the rest of the baskets more space for loading. I think it is a great pity that there is no separate rinse program. Before purchasing I had read the instructions for use and thought I had a rinse program available, but that is a general program for several types of machines. It's a shame, but you can live with it, otherwise programming wouldn't be possible, I think. Otherwise very satisfied.

1065975668.text_en: For years we have been using a Bosch built-in machine of 45 cm and, with the move to a new apartment, we also decided on a Bosch built-in machine but of 60 cm - SMV46KX55E. First of all, I would recommend that if you have the possibility to install a 60 cm machine, you must take a larger one. The subjective feeling after switching, from smaller to larger, is as if it is twice as big and can fit much more dishes. The baskets in the machine are extremely light and easy to pull out. It's the first time I've come into contact with the third basket for escajg and I think it's a great thing - it's easier to put in and take out, because I don't have to bend down to the bottom basket. Also, a big plus is the possibility of short programs - a program that lasts an hour is absolutely phenomenal and, by the time you turn around, you already have clean dishes. The dishes are very nicely dried and have a nice shine. The machine is almost silent (it happened that I had to sit next to it just to check if it was working or not). All in all, a high recommendation for the machine. I hope it will serve us for a very long time.

1159934026.text_en: Siemens succeeded by Bosch.  Price was the deciding factor.  Disadvantages, no stainless steel bowl, lower basket runs less smoothly than with the old Siemens.  Fewer adjustment options and cannot be transferred from the old to the new basket.  Advantages Furniture door exact sizes of mounting material and quieter, more economical programs.

1202198398.text_en: the control panel is legible, fully covered, easy to use, a big advantage is the cutlery drawer. very quiet and energy-saving. I am very satisfied, I recommend the product #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207608526.text_en: I recommend the Bosch dishwasher to everyone, it's a great product, I already have the second one from this company and it's fantastic, it works quietly, washes everything, I wouldn't replace Bosch with any other company

1206595884.text_en: Device installed today, and already happy with the silence of operation, even in "normal" mode (44dB): it seems quieter than our old LV which was basic at 42dB.

1186424722.text_en: The machine is silent, it has a plastic tank. The drawers are ok, but they rust after a period of 10 years. They are expensive and better to buy a new machine than the drawers separately.

1152394708.text_en: It holds a lot! It even works on an hourly program. The previous one was also from Bosch, I had no doubt that it would serve us for years again. I recommend

1208396787.text_en: Great dishwasher, it's quiet, washes well, has simple and functional software, great #opinion motivated by a promotion, I recommend it, I already have the third one, this one is great

1209599643.text_en: The dishwasher washes very well, is quiet, and has many programs and additional options. thanks to the cutlery drawer, there are no stains on the cutlery. I recommend.

1160451361.title_en: I don't know how I lived without her!
1160451361.text_en: I am someone who is always in the kitchen and have spent most of my life experimenting with candy recipes. I had never owned a dishwasher before and when I saved the money from selling my first cakes, I knew exactly which dishwasher I was going to buy. I had the opportunity to see her at my friend's place and I analyzed her in detail and my goal was clear. Even though I didn't have the ability to install it and renovate the kitchen, I certainly bought it and grabbed a very good price on Black Friday. Now that it is in operation and I, with two small children and my small cake business, could not imagine a day without this machine. I would really recommend it from the bottom of my heart, because the machine is really well organized, there is space for my large trays, pans, pans, etc. I also wash some of my sensitive models in it, which are not too small. Only space for escejg and my spatulas, spatulas,... It's really worth every dinar. Every house today should have a sudo machine, stick vacuum cleaner and dryer. I have everything from Bosch and it's really much easier for me to maintain everything with small children.  My advice to all women is to first make their daily responsibilities easier and to invest money in that, because their daily responsibilities will fall more easily.

1216714895.text_en: This dishwasher is an absolute hit! From the first use you can see that this is top-shelf equipment. The dishes come out perfectly clean and shiny - even dried food remains remain. A huge advantage is the quiet operation, thanks to which you can turn it on even at night and completely forget about it.  I also really appreciate the intuitive operation - the programs are well selected and the control panel is simple and clear. Additionally, the dishwasher is extremely economical when it comes to water and energy consumption, which has a positive impact on bills.  The capacity is also noteworthy - it can easily accommodate a large number of dishes, and the well-thought-out arrangement of baskets allows you to conveniently arrange even larger pots and pans.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1081525443.text_en: So far, very satisfied with the choice of bosch washing machine. It is quiet and washes as it should.

1220632899.text_en: Top quality device, the name says it all and promises high quality

1160263483.text_en: This is the second Bosch dishwasher. The specialist advised me to buy the 4 series and that's what I did. Programs are similar to the previous one and they work. There is an additional one, dedicated to self-cleaning, it will definitely come in handy. In addition, the advantage of this company is that each dishwasher from the new series is the same size, so we know that it will fit into the recess, and above all - that the front of the previous one will perfectly fit the new one, and that's exactly what happened. There are many companies producing dishwashers, but they often do not specialize in it, while Bosch does. So the choice was obvious.

1086979160.text_en: Top product! It washes well, even the escajg that settles at the very top. The drawer wheels are excellent, there is no creaking when pulling out like the previous one we used. Since it is fully built-in, when it is turned on, it throws a strong enough red light on the floor, as an indicator of whether it is working or not. It can be interrupted at any moment by opening the door and absolutely nothing will leak! In this way, it is possible to check how much time is left for her to finish, and it is also possible to add a time that was not set at the very beginning. It's hard to do much better than this, even the buttons used to adjust the program work extremely well! The door opens and closes softly. When it's running, there's almost no sound, it's amazing how quiet it is! Any recommendation!

1175384846.title_en: The machine started leaking water at the door
1175384846.text_en: It washes great, but it started leaking water somewhere in the contact between the door and the machine. Replaced one cedar on the machine itself, water is still leaking. Ordered a tire that goes to the door itself, we hope that replacing it will solve the problem

1071404531.text_en: The dishwasher meets our expectations 100%, previously we had a 45 cm from a competing company, now 60 cm so much more space, the previous one had a metal bottom, the current one is made of plastic, at the beginning we were afraid but probably for no reason, many programs, quiet, great cleaning, intuitive operation, third basket - great, the previous one had a container for cutlery, we rarely washed it in the dishwasher because it took up a lot of space, now it can only fit in the dishwasher additional saucers and other small plates, I sincerely recommend it

1087762544.text_en: despite several adjustments including reinforced drying, inconclusive drying... above by the brand because device between 600 and 700e

1060736111.title_en: device broken down a few days from warranty
1060736111.text_en: error code E19 a few days before the end of the warranty

1130347111.text_en: An excellent washing machine, quiet, with a beautiful design and excellent performance.

1103099538.text_en: We have had the dishwasher for 7 months and are very pleased. Initially, I received a product with a defect (the side water tank was cracked and water was flowing from the first minutes of the first wash program), but the product was replaced in a few days by the partner store where I purchased it, and the replaced product works flawlessly. The water consumption has decreased, the dishes are washed well, it is silent and we even managed to eliminate the sound signal for completing the washing program, so that we can use the dishwasher at the end of the day/during the night without any unpleasantness. The cutlery drawer saves a lot of space. We are very satisfied with the value for money and the technical assistance of the Bosch team.

1054067480.text_en: The LV is delivered with completely useless papers. The assembly instructions are incomprehensible, which is unworthy of a reputable group like Bosch.

1085378803.text_en: Looks good, runs good.  In addition to all the good things, I also noticed the minuses: It is not very silent.  It does not contain the plastic spacers that are mounted on the side.  The water hardness test was not found in the delivered accessories.  The manual does NOT explain what accessories the purchased model must come with. So you are satisfied with what you find.

1206021920.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion The dishwasher works quietly, is roomy with an adjustable top shelf height and a cutlery drawer, which I highly recommend. All dishes are perfectly washed, I have no objections to the operation of the dishwasher. The dishwasher replaced the previous one, also a Bosch Serie 6, which after 11 years of intensive operation failed (damaged pump). This one differs from the previous one in that it has a cutlery drawer and slightly different washing programs. The dishwasher is rather quiet and I am happy with the purchase, I hope it lasts at least 10 years.

1185387543.text_en: The bottom basket tilts forward when the rollers pass over the door.   In addition, it rubs on the side joints, these two points making its use unpleasant. I do not find in the baskets the differentiating Bosch quality visible on the previous dishwashers of the brand that we have owned.

1065329449.text_en: A very serious machine. Incomparable quality of finishing with competitive machines in the class. The first time we turned it on, we thought it wasn't working because it was quiet. I recommend the device because I think the price-quality ratio is completely acceptable.

1072917038.text_en: The dishwasher has a nice panel and interior design, great functionality. It cleans dishes and pots properly, with many functional solutions without unnecessary additives that are not used in practice. For me it's super extra loose!!!

1065658643.text_en: I have just replaced my whirlpool dishwasher which stopped washing plates after 2 years. I'm back in Bosch shape and I'm very happy. The dishwasher is quiet and cleans well. Only the cutlery basket is a bit poorly made.

1073945972.text_en: I have been using this dishwasher for almost 2 years and it works flawlessly.  It is very quiet and suits a family of 2-3 people, with a frequency of washing about every 3 days.  The available programs are suitable for all the kitchen utensils, dishes, pots, and cutlery that we have.   I also had a delivery problem with the first dishwasher, which had to be replaced. The Bosch team and the authorized service in our area helped us to fix the problem quickly.

1145146714.text_en: We have owned a Bosch dishwasher for more than two years. As a family with two small boys (2 and 4 years old), it is very important to us that the dishes and utensils are always impeccably clean. Also, it is important to us that we can store all used dishes during the day and wash them during the night. Our Bosch machine fulfills all these conditions and does its job easily, quietly and quickly at the end of each day. We always know when she is done working because it has a light signal that is discreetly reflected on the floor.  I want to mention that we haven't had a single problem with the machine so far. It works the same as it did on the first day. Additional security is provided by a guarantee that covers a period of five years.  The final message would be that we got what we were looking for when we decided to buy a Bosch appliance - a quality product that lasts.

1054720657.text_en: We bought the dishwasher about a month ago. It is our first larger appliance of this brand. We selected based on customer ratings and D-test results. We mainly wanted proven quality. So far we are very satisfied with the dishwasher itself. It has a sufficient number of programs, compared to the previous dishwasher, it is spacious, it has a better arrangement of baskets. The cutlery drawer is practical and saves a lot of space for other dishes. The dishes are beautifully clean and shiny after washing. As for drying, we are currently struggling with which program to choose so that the dishes are sufficiently dry. It helps if we leave the door ajar after washing the cycle for better air circulation. Another advantage is that the dishwasher switches itself off at the end of the cycle. As I wrote at the beginning, we have only had it for a month, so we are in the testing and learning phase. So far 100% satisfaction.

1064060408.text_en: Cool functions, washing programs. Very roomy. A cutlery shelf instead of a basket, I love it. Also the device's operation control light, this one is liked by all household members... including the cat :)

1209878245.text_en: I have been using it for over three weeks. It is quiet and works properly. The upper cutlery drawer is practical and can accommodate much more than in the basket. For me, traditional buttons are much more convenient than the touch panel. When you start it for the first time, the eco program imposed by the manufacturer is unnecessary and needs to be changed. I also consider the advantage of being able to connect hot water and adjust the water hardness, so you don't have to use salt. Overall, a very good product, I recommend it.

1203584037.text_en: I highly recommend it 06/10/2025, Krzysiek Confirmed purchase I bought the dishwasher "quickly" because an old one from another company refused to cooperate after 10 years of intensive use. When purchasing, I was guided by the opinions of other users and the price because I believe that modern equipment has a shorter lifespan than old ones, regardless of their price range. I have only had the dishwasher under review for a short time, but after a few washing cycles I can say that it works quietly and washes dishes, which is what I mainly cared about.

1148963120.text_en: After just a few uses, compared to my previous dishwasher, I notice quiet operation and a practical cutlery drawer. The disadvantages are the lack of a salt funnel and loud beeping at the end of washing. There are also fewer programs, but I consider this an advantage because I usually used 2-3 anyway, and the control panel is very intuitive. This makes operation really simple. The idea of ​​shortening the program duration is also cool. If the durability is good, what more could you want.

1073047737.text_en: Excellent product, I feel good with all the programs and even with more tablets? economical. Purchased on the advice of my sister and I recommend it again. I am satisfied

1071215337.text_en: Since I have a Bosch dishwasher, my dishes on the table look like royal tableware, shiny with a hint of gold, or maybe even better ;)

1209235872.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher (the previous one lasted almost 15 years), so attached to the brand and quality - I chose the new model. The inside turned out to be very similar to the previous one, which was one of the selection factors - a functional cutlery drawer and 2 baskets that could hold a lot of plates and cups, plus possibly other non-standard tableware. But the new model has other advantages that the old one did not have - the diode informing about the dishwasher's operation is a really great solution, the operation is much simpler and intuitive. The rest remains the same: the dishwasher is very, very quiet, the dishes are washed and dry. The downside is the really poor instructions, you really have to work hard to understand what the author had in mind in the subsequent assembly steps. Generally - I highly recommend it, because it is a really good model.

1065962985.text_en: I purchased this product at the recommendation of my supplier and I am thrilled with it

1201666227.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion* The dishwasher meets my expectations. A roomy and convenient cutlery drawer and a pill basket in the drawer holder ensure that it dissolves completely and that it does not fall on the dishes. Foldable plate holders in the lower drawer allow you to wash larger dishes or pots. Even on the shortest program, the dishes are washed perfectly. The diode indicates that the device is still working, which eliminates its opening during the cycle.

1066075815.text_en: Excellent appliance. Quiet and equipped with large internal spaces.

1066074804.text_en: Excellent dishwasher. Quiet and equipped with large spaces.

1066076288.text_en: Reliable and functional. Equipped with every comfort.

1085537368.text_en: I couldn't find the rinse program.

1158782329.text_en: The dishwasher is easy to use, a really intuitive panel. A fairly large container for salt and rinse aid, when filled and filled to the brim, it is enough for over a month of use for two household members. It works really quietly. You can relax in the living room while the dishwasher is running. The installed MDF furniture front further dampens the sound. The list of programs is adapted to everyday use, without unnecessary frills. I'm very happy with it!

1160103133.text_en: When replacing our kitchen we ordered an integrated dishwasher. This device went, after the first rinse, into after-sales service for the adjustment button stuck pressed. 35€ each. Complete replacement of the device for a slightly superior model with different functions. The 1/2 load function, for example, is missing.  Good device, very good to see, but for more money there are fewer functions.

1208866220.text_en: The Bosch SMV46KX55E dishwasher meets my expectations. It washes dishes very well, even when fully loaded. It works quietly, which is a big plus in everyday use. The interior is functional and roomy, and the cutlery drawer makes it easier to arrange dishes. The programs are clear and easy to use, and the washing acceleration function is very practical. I am satisfied with the purchase and recommend this model.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1074633917.title_en: Prefer the old style cutlery basket
1074633917.text_en: The dishwasher works well and while the extra shelf on top does add more space, the old style basket for cutlery was just easier to use. In the old style basket, you didn't have to worry what orientiation your forks, knives, or spoons were in, they were cleaned the same. Here if you don't fit them into the grooves, they won't be cleaned perfectly. The shelf is both a plus and and minus, but overall the dishwasher works fine.

1074678504.text_en: In operation for a short time, it is quiet, the choice of programs is satisfactory. The arrangement of dishes in the dishwasher is great, I especially like the upper sideboard. Plastic tub (probably for silence). The time indicator on the floor is missing, but unfortunately it is not included in this price category. I have read criticisms of the dish drying that it is not sufficient. This is true, but it is possible to turn on extra drying and dry the dishes. Excellent price/performance ratio. Hopefully it will last at least 10 years.

1209958914.text_en: I have had this dishwasher for several months and am very pleased with my choice. This device really meets all my expectations.  Practical Cutlery Drawer One of the biggest advantages is the intelligently designed Vario3 drawer dedicated to cutlery. Instead of a traditional basket, a drawer allows for much more flexible arrangement of cutlery without having to sort them into separate compartments. This saves a lot of time both when loading and unloading the dishwasher. The convenience of use is at the highest level.  Efficiency of Short Programs What is extremely practical is that the short program washes dishes as thoroughly as standard cycles. This allows for significant savings in water and electricity when I need to clean a smaller number of dishes quickly. This was an important selection criterion for me.   #opinionmotivated by promotion

1160536303.text_en: The SMV46KX55E dishwasher is a real breakthrough in my everyday life! Since I've had it, washing dishes has become a task that I simply forget about. The device is extremely quiet, which is a huge advantage, especially in open kitchen spaces. The efficiency of washing and drying dishes is impressive - everything comes out shiny and dry, ready to be put away in the cupboard without the need for additional wiping. The programs are intuitive and easy to use, and the energy-saving function is a great way to reduce electricity bills without compromising on the quality of washing. Additionally, the capacity of the dishwasher perfectly suited the needs of my family, allowing me to load a large number of dishes at one time. I definitely recommend the SMV46KX55E dishwasher to anyone looking for a reliable, economical and efficient device that will make everyday chores much easier!

1073424992.text_en: we've had this dishwasher for a while, but I dare say it's amazing. Only a few programs have been tested so far, but the washing is incredibly great - with all of them. And the silent operation is great. And I want to try the "Supersilence" program at night. Compared to our old 11-year-old Indesit, which worked reliably but growled like a tractor, it's like a balm for the ears. Maximum satisfaction for our family with this Bosch dishwasher.

1051122015.text_en: Device built with robust materials, the presence of the light to indicate the status is convenient. Silent and, despite its capacity, quick and effective in washing. The baskets allow for excellent organization of the dishes, a shame about the tub with the plastic oven (of excellent quality?) and not entirely in stainless steel like the very dated ones, the same goes for the internal baskets too.

1109195152.text_en: Advantages: efficient operation; low noise level; top shelf very good; correct ratio of price and quality; economy in operation Disadvantages: the lower shelf often falls out due to the lack of a braking system that can manually release the lower shelf; middle shelf too close to top shelf; the infolight red light does not show the time until the end of the program as advertised in the store where the machine was taken

1145148745.text_en: As in the previous apartment (almost 10 years) I used a Bosch built-in dishwasher, and this time I decided to use a device from the same manufacturer. After 3 years of use, I can say that I am 100% satisfied, the machine is quiet, it washes well, there are no signs of use after this time and it has a sufficient selection of washing programs (maybe next time I would choose a model that also has some super-fast modes)

1109127134.text_en: What can I say that hasn't already been said? I think it is enough to say "BOSCH". I have been using your products for years and I am very satisfied. In particular, this machine model is perfect. The dishes are fantastically washed. I am especially pleased that she is completely reckless. Since I have a problem with eczema, I saved myself and would gladly recommend it to everyone. By the way, all appliances in our home are "BOSCH". They are for every recommendation.

1146106829.text_en: This is my first dishwasher. I made the purchase based on the opinions of friends and family. Most of them had Bosch dishwashers. I did not find a single person among them who was not satisfied with this company's dishwasher. It is with great pleasure that I join this group and I will recommend purchasing a device from this company to anyone looking for a durable and reliable device.

1088218523.text_en: I have a BOSCH product for the first time. The first time that a product exceeded all my expectations caused by advertisements on TV. Usually the man is disappointed. I hope that it will also justify my trust when I bought BOSCH with a much shorter warranty than the competition.  As for the dishwasher itself> Incredibly quiet, incredibly fast, the effect is incredible. Washing and drying is unimaginably good.

1091900106.text_en: Delivered within one day...delivery complete with installation description. Works perfectly.  1 minus, there were no instructions for use in Dutch included. In various Eastern Bloc languages, which unfortunately I do not speak. A general Dutch description for the SMV46..... can be found on the internet. Finally found all the secrets of this excellent machine. Great

1201280382.text_en: The Bosch SMV46KX55E dishwasher is perfect for everyday use. It is very quiet, even in the "Quiet" program, and the capacity of 13 place settings allows you to conveniently wash larger quantities. The Vario3 cutlery drawer and the Extra Dry function make everyday use easier, and the LED panel is intuitive and easy to use. I recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable, modern dishwasher.

1102872991.text_en: The best purchase I've made in my life. It is so quiet that I forget I turned it on. Easy to install, looks too good. Washes great!!! All praise for the possibility of adapting the height of the partition, because it means a lot. Especially since I wash crystal wine glasses without worrying for a moment about them. Really great machine, and I would buy it again if I could. Kudos!

1211068226.text_en: Since I finally decided to buy my first Bosch dishwasher, I can only write words of praise and satisfaction. I am really satisfied with the washing machine because it has a lot of additional programs, it fits a lot of dishes, which after washing look impeccably clean and shiny, especially the glasses, and it is extremely quiet during operation. All recommendations for this washing machine series!

1035612476.text_en: It washes without leaving marks. Cleaning the accessories is simple. He is very quiet. Its modes are very practical in terms of saving water or energy.

1087483794.text_en: The courts are crystal clear and dry. The machine is silent, so I turn it on at night using the delay start. It has an upper basket for escajg, which allows me additional space in the lower part. A great thing for families with small children, because it also has the HygienePlus option, for rinsing at higher temperatures. Very satisfied, so I'm thinking about ordering a Bosch washing machine as well.

1179179991.text_en: After a malfunction, we had to get a new dishwasher and the TOP technician from the white goods brigade said that Bosch was the best. After a quick and neat installation, it turned out that this was completely correct. We had an AEG but this BOSCH works cleaner. We had to get used to the fact that the cutlery had to be loaded at the top, but what a great machine. We are very satisfied with it.

1160431482.text_en: This is another BOSCH device, the previous dishwasher worked for almost 15 years. The dishwasher works flawlessly, the additional drawer on the piece is a solution worth recommending. Adjusting the upper basket in three positions allows you to adjust the dishwasher depending on your needs. I hope it will last as long as the previous one or even longer.

1159519197.text_en: As I have tried many dishwashers from different companies, Bosch wins. It's simple, easy to use, there's nothing fancy, they rarely break down, and when they do, it's not terribly complicated, and it's a huge plus because you can always come to an agreement with the service center. If someone is thinking about buying one, there's no point in hesitating, you only have one life, why waste it on the reservoir?

1161487986.text_en: My fifth dishwasher in my life. I once had a similar, older generation one and it was reliable, but unfortunately I moved to another apartment and bought a dishwasher from another company. After several years of struggle, I returned to proven equipment. It's nicely designed inside, the cutlery drawer is great. Quietly. It has as many programs as it needs. I hope it will stay with me for a long time.

1158249241.text_en: The dishwasher was purchased on March 5, 2024. It works well. This is the second dishwasher of this brand in the family. Quiet operation, washes well. You can see that the workmanship is no longer what it used to be (the previous one, bought 9 years ago, still works today). I hope this one will wash much longer :-) I chose Bosch because of the cutlery drawer that works well.

1148128892.title_en: this is my next Bosch dishwasher
1148128892.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher, the first one after 9 years of trouble-free operation, and it was turned on at least twice a day (unless the children stayed at home alone, then of course they forgot that we had it and left the pots in the sink so it could rest), even if there was an error, simple cleaning always helped. This time I decided on the same brand - only a newer one, with a drawer for cutlery - it is much easier to put them in and take them out - you don't have to aim at the holes in the basket - although I left the basket from the old one as if it might be useful again someday.   I recommend these dishwashers - although the question is whether I am satisfied with the number of programs - in fact, 2-3 programs would be enough for me - I don't know how many I have, but I know that I will use a maximum of 2 programs. In turn, what catches my eyes, or rather ears, is the fact that the new dishwasher is much quieter than the previous model. I'm happy because the kitchen is open to the living room.

1073593862.text_en: I decided on the dishwasher of this brand after reviews and advice. I have been using it for more than a week, and I can say that I am satisfied.    I like the size, especially the place for cutlery. Several options for setting temperatures and length of washing. Furthermore, setting the water hardness, beep volume when the washing cycle is completed. A light shining on the floor indicates the dishwasher is in operation.

1145153289.text_en: After more than 2 years of use, compared to machines from other manufacturers, I have to praise the quality, advanced options and design. I tested with different tablets and it turned out to be ideal with Finish Powerball Essential. Bosch is always an excellent choice, which proves to me based on the other devices I have from this manufacturer.

1161377629.text_en: After 13 years of trouble-free use of the Bosch SRV53M13EU dishwasher, it was time to replace it. We chose the SMV46KX55E model because it has great reviews, a reasonable price and we trust the quality of Bosch products. When it comes to use, I have no comments, on the contrary, as in other opinions - it is great. I recommend.

1153617790.text_en: We were fixing up the apartment and after comparing manufacturers (price, service, quality,...) we decided on Bosh. The machine fulfilled everything we expected and the third year of using it without problems has begun... P.S. This is not a recommendation, for more information contact: neighbors, relatives, parents,... who use it!

1078847605.text_en: correct wash but missing a short program.    the lower basket tilts forward when loaded with plates.    The big disappointment comes from the noise for a device which is advertised as silent (56db measured in the kitchen) while we could not hear the series 6 when free-standing. Is this normal?

1220774509.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher purchased at RTV Euro AGD is a great choice. It has a very convenient control panel hidden in the door and a useful cutlery drawer. I most often use the hourly and Auto programs - the dishes are always perfectly washed and shiny. The equipment operates quietly and stably. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1109121033.text_en: This is the second Bosch dishwasher I have bought after 9 years of using the first one. The first apartment worked for 9 years without any problems until its water pump failed, after which we decided to buy a new machine. So far, everything is working as it should. Silent mode is excellent and improved compared to the previous model.

1160414869.text_en: I recommend buying a Bosch SMV46KX55E dishwasher, it is at a very good price and easy to use, even my 90-year-old mother knows how to set it. Another advantage is the adjustable height of the drawer. It is really very quiet, spacious, cleans great and leaves no residue. It is worth the price. I am very satisfied.

1183252957.text_en: The BOSCH Serie 4 SMV46KX55E dishwasher is a model that certainly attracts attention with its functionality and aesthetics. As a built-in dishwasher, it fits perfectly into modern kitchens, offering an elegant look and saving space.    However, it is worth paying attention to one important aspect - the noise level. Compared to expectations, the dishwasher is noisier, which may come as a surprise to users who expected the device to operate quietly. The sounds made during the washing cycle can be bothersome, especially in open spaces or when household members are in the kitchen.    Nevertheless, the dishwasher offers many useful functions, such as different washing programs that adapt to different needs. Its efficiency in removing dirt is high, which is certainly a big plus.    Overall, the BOSCH Serie 4 SMV46KX55E is a solid choice for those looking for a built-in dishwasher, but you should be aware that it may be noisier than expected.

1066007514.title_en: Goodbye to washing dishes by hand, BOSCH has arrived!
1066007514.text_en: When we discussed at home which dishwasher to buy, the decision definitely fell on Bosch, because we heard from many friends and acquaintances that they are the best and most reliable. What was important to us at the start was that it should be a larger model of 60 cm, because when you need to wash large dishes, you need to pack and arrange them all nicely, and you will admit that in a narrower model of 45 cm it will be much more difficult, so if you have space in your kitchen, definitely get a bigger dishwasher. So we decided on the SMV46KX55E model and we are very satisfied with it. This model of Bosch dishwasher fits 13 sets or it can fit a lot of dishes, starting from bulky pots and pans, through various deep and shallow ovals and plates, to cutlery and dining utensils, and all this thanks to the excellent position of all 3 baskets. Yes, yes, you read that right, 3 baskets, of which the middle one can be adjusted in height as desired and needed, which is very important when you need to wash a lot of large bulky dishes. There is also a shallow basket suitable for escajg or spoons, forks, knives and more, which definitely saves space in the washing machine. What I liked about this machine is that it is possible to set the start time of washing or use the timer to delay washing, e.g. for the evening hours when electricity is cheaper, which you will admit is great, and the machine itself is incredibly quiet, so it won't bother anyone during washing, neither the housemates nor the neighbors. We also really liked the large selection of washing programs, and the most economical and fast ones. with a shorter washing time, which is very convenient when we celebrate, for example, so due to the large number of guests, it is necessary from several rounds or to set the table repeatedly in a shorter period of time. And the most important thing is that the machine washes and dries dishes perfectly. You just need to choose the desired program and that's it. And finally, I can only recommend this Bosch dishwasher model. You won't regret it!

1150240529.text_en: You can feel the bad smell of plastic now, even when it's new. AFTER 4 washes, it still hasn't disappeared. Otherwise, the dishes are well washed and dried. 1066019324.title_en: Goodbye to washing dishes by hand, BOSCH has arrived!
1066019324.text_en: When we discussed at home which dishwasher to buy, the decision definitely fell on Bosch, because we heard from many friends and acquaintances that they are the best and most reliable. What was important to us at the start was that it should be a larger model of 60 cm, because when you need to wash large dishes, you need to pack and arrange them all nicely, and you will admit that in a narrower model of 45 cm it will be much more difficult, so if you have space in your kitchen, definitely get a bigger dishwasher. So we decided on the SMV46KX55E model and we are very satisfied with it. This model of Bosch dishwasher fits 13 sets or it can fit a lot of dishes, starting from bulky pots and pans, through various deep and shallow ovals and plates, to cutlery and dining utensils, and all this thanks to the excellent position of all 3 baskets. Yes, yes, you read that right, 3 baskets, of which the middle one can be adjusted in height as desired and needed, which is very important when you need to wash a lot of large bulky dishes. There is also a shallow basket suitable for escajg or spoons, forks, knives and more, which definitely saves space in the washing machine. What I liked about this machine is that it is possible to set the start time of washing or use the timer to delay washing, e.g. for the evening hours when electricity is cheaper, which you will admit is great, and the machine itself is incredibly quiet, so it won't bother anyone during washing, neither the housemates nor the neighbors. We also really liked the large selection of washing programs, and the most economical and fast ones. with a shorter washing time, which is very convenient when we celebrate, for example, so due to the large number of guests, it is necessary from several rounds or to set the table repeatedly in a shorter period of time. And the most important thing is that the machine washes and dries dishes perfectly. You just need to choose the desired program and that's it. And finally, I can only recommend this Bosch dishwasher model. You won't regret it!

1203510058.text_en: I have a Bosch Series 4 dishwasher it is excellent! Cleans impeccably even very dirty dishes, is silent, energy efficient and consumes little water. I really like the fact that I can control it directly from the mobile app. I can start or stop programs from anywhere and receive notifications when the cycle is complete. An excellent choice for anyone who wants performance and reliability!

1160343757.text_en: For now I am satisfied with the purchase made.  I would highlight that the upper cutlery tray greatly increases the capacity, both in cutlery and in plates and pots. It is very versatile to raise and lower the height of the trays. It also integrates comfortably into kitchen furniture.  On the other hand, I expected all the programs to be quieter, not just the "silence" program.

1091882345.text_en: Leaves the dishes and cutlery very shiny and dry, just setting the AUTO program. And also, it is very the half load additional program. It doesn't make any noise, but if you want it to be completely silenced, there is a special program for this, ideal for putting it on at night.

1142218224.text_en: I once had a Bosch dishwasher... which died after 16 years. It was effective but it was not flexible to program at night... especially since it came out of its cycle with a shrill beep that could wake the whole house. There, this model is flexible in terms of programming, the basic program offered is "eco", extraordinarily silent (and there are even quieter programs on the machine) and it emits an absolutely not disturbing micro-beep at the end of its cycle. Plus, its capacity is impressive: having a cutlery drawer at the top opens up a much larger space at the bottom. 14 place settings, that’s not a myth. To buy with your eyes closed.

1173377144.title_en: Very quiet and with many programs
1173377144.text_en: I wanted to trust Bosch again because I had the previous dishwasher for 20 years and I had no problems, as always this brand gives me confidence in all the products I have from BOSCH, and for now I am very happy with this dishwasher, it is very spacious, quiet and has a lot of programs depending on the dishes you put in

1149369395.text_en: The truth is that the dishwasher is amazing.  Easy installation, energy efficient, silent, it is the first Bosch dishwasher and I don't regret a thing.  The glass is shiny and it is quite spacious.  Anyway, we are very happy, I recommend 100%. In the photos it is still unpaneled, but it can be used anyway.

1124511392.text_en: While building our kitchen in new house, it was a great decision to consider the devices. One of my friend working at Bosch suggested us of Bosch Home appliances.   Our Dishwasher 'Dora' was easy to integrate in the kitchen, especially the sheet with instructions and markers to drill holes on the door was really helpful.  The dishwasher not only gives high quality cleaning with multiple options but also has high-tech functions like Voice and Mobile controlling. The app also gives you indication of the Salt and Klar-spüller agent.  Really with this dish washer Bosch made my life easy.

1171633569.text_en: This dishwasher has three removable trays.  I was looking for a dishwasher with an ECO function and quiet.    This dishwasher is so quiet that I only know it's on when I see the red light reflecting off the floor.  In addition, when finished it opens on its own and everything is impeccably dry and ready to store.

1134690035.text_en: Since we acquired it we have been delighted, it washes perfectly in less than half the time than the previous one. The dishes come out perfect and dry. We also control everything from our mobile phone, being able to choose the best start-up time even when we are not at home. I recommend 100%

1156963273.text_en: In the time I have had with the dishwasher I couldn't be more happy and surprised. The installation and configuration has been very easy, thanks to the amount of help it provides both in documentation and through its application, which I 100% recommend, allows you to adjust the hardness of the water and notify you of everything related to consumables. The quality of the product looks very good as we are accustomed to from Bosch.  It is very quiet and at all times in the programs that we select through the application it allows us to see the electricity and water consumption.  Super recommended.

1154277351.text_en: I like it because it is silent and its entire interior is made of steel.  At first glance it seems quite robust.  It has several programs that include eco and another automatic program that detects by itself the necessary temperature based on the dirtiness of the water.

1156118760.title_en: I repeat Bosch dishwasher for satisfaction
1156118760.text_en: Replaces another Bosch that is more than 13 years old due to kitchen renovation. I really value the new model's larger interior space, the Wi-Fi connection to control it from the app, and the quietness of the device. I'm starting out and at the moment everything is positive advantages.

1153007947.text_en: Dishwasher of very good quality, practical and complete. I especially appreciate the door that opens automatically at the end of the cycle and allows for better drying of dishes, and the 24-hour delayed start. This product fully meets my expectations!

1130968387.text_en: Dishwasher fully integrated into the kitchen, quiet, practical, connected to WIFI network. Washing now lasts half as long, resulting in energy savings. Programmable from anywhere. A great acquisition.

1152649856.text_en: As always, trusting Bosch for its quality. Quiet and very comfortable dishwasher thanks to its app that allows you to program it.  With 3 trays.  The dishes come out perfect

1157842833.text_en: I like the case, it connects to Wi-Fi, you have multiple washing options and programs that you can download, clean and dry the dishes, it's good.

1157993978.text_en: It is quiet, has a large capacity and the dishes come out impeccable. Easy to install by yourself

1157362202.title_en: After a good search, we found it!
1157362202.text_en: The best: - silence - consumption - automatic opening door - class b - perfect drying

1153458735.text_en: It has been a good choice for my integrated kitchen. Good result.

1128074115.text_en: I am extremely satisfied with the dishwasher

1154999413.title_en: It runs very well, it's quiet
1154999413.text_en: It runs very well, quiet and efficient

1142867517.text_en: The description promises a lot, so expectations are very high.  The machine was very quick and easy to add to our home network and we were able to get started quickly.  Dishes perfectly clean and dry. Program selection simple and effective.  The quiet mode (which unfortunately increases the time a bit) is actually not needed because the machine is already very quiet.  The only point deducted is that it is promised that even plastic dishes will dry. However, she also has some problems with bowls, cups or cans.  Actually I would like 5 points but the above-mentioned shortcomings, I would like 4 1/2 points but it is not possible to choose.

1101740994.text_en: This dishwasher seems to have much more space than the previous ones I have had because of the three trays it has and how it is organized. So far all the programs we have tried have cleaned everything without a problem, from pots to cutlery and other quite dirty items... The fact that it is connected to the app is an advantage since it can be programmed from the mobile phone, which is quite useful for older people who are not very familiar with technology, although an improvement (and that is why the 4 stars) would be that there was no need to press a button to be able to operate it from the mobile phone. But we are very happy with the purchase!!!

1167996712.text_en: We bought this dishwasher first, because of its eco label since it is a B label and that in the long run will save us a lot on electricity consumption. On the other hand, we wanted an integrated dishwasher to be able to panel it and leave it visible like the kitchen and this meets the requirements to be able to leave it the way we want and lastly it has many programs that help you save when putting it in depending on the load you have inside and above all how quiet it is. The purchase is a success, which is why we are very happy.

1177471830.text_en: Bosch SMV4ECX21E is a high-quality dishwasher from a well-known brand, best quality 'best brand. Which offers smart functions such as control via the Home Connect app, which enables remote control and monitoring of the dishwasher. Water consumption of 9.0 liters per rinse makes it ideal for larger families or intensive use. In addition, it is very quiet with a noise level of only 42 dB, making it ideal for use at any time of the day. Although it is slightly more expensive and belongs to energy class B, its advanced features and reliability make it an excellent choice for users looking for a modern and efficient dishwasher.  I'm very satisfied.  Here is a clear recommendation.

1184533799.text_en: I recommend this dishwasher with a clear conscience! The size of 60cm allows you to wash a large number of dishes at the same time - even several really large pots. When taken out of the dishwasher, glasses, glasses, etc. are shiny and do not have any streaks. An additional advantage, which at first seemed a strange "fancy thing", is the HomeConnect application, thanks to which you can personalize the washing program depending on your needs and the filling of the dishwasher.  The dishwasher is quiet, has an intuitive control panel, and is trouble-free. I will also mention that this is not the first Bosch dishwasher I have had, which speaks for itself - there is no better choice.

1217473074.text_en: I have purchased this dishwasher for some time and overall I am satisfied with its performance. The design is modern and easily integrates into the kitchen, and the capacity is sufficient for daily needs.  It washes the dishes effectively, even when they are dirtier, and the available programs are varied and useful depending on the situation (fast, eco, intensive). A positive aspect is that it operates quite quietly, which makes it suitable for use at night as well.  Water and energy consumption seems reasonable, and use is simple and intuitive. As a minus, sometimes heavily loaded dishes or with dry dirt require a pre-rinse.  All in all, it's a practical and efficient product that does the job well and helps save time in the kitchen.

1167803992.text_en: I purchased the BOSCH Series 4 Fully Integrated Dishwasher SMV4ECX21E a month ago and it has been a great investment. It is very easy to use thanks to its intuitive panel.    What I like most: Efficiency and Silence: Cleans incredibly well and hardly makes any noise.   Variety of Programs: It has options for all types of needs, from intensive to quick washing.  Capacity: Perfect for a family of 3, with enough space and adjustable baskets that make loading easier.    In short, it is an efficient, quiet and easy-to-use dishwasher. Very happy with the purchase, I totally recommend it.

1155532384.text_en: The best thing about the dishwasher is that it doesn't make a sound even on normal programs (and it still has another extra quiet one for the nights). Thanks to the fact that it has a light projected on the ground, we know that it is running, otherwise it would be impossible. We love the 1-hour program, it is the one we use the most and despite being so short, everything is very clean and dry. The operation is very simple, which we appreciate, each button serves one thing, you don't have to go through the screen or anything strange. To add a drawback to improve, the red grip area of ​​the upper tray is inserted about 2cm inwards, it could have been straight.

1152572978.title_en: Good cleaning performance, poor use of space
1152572978.text_en: So far, the dishwasher performs its job reliably and the drying performance is within expectations. What's really annoying, however, is the lack of usability of the upper basket, because the rows are too narrow for practically all glasses, cups and small bowls, and the side area is also too low. It would be much more pleasant if the bottom of the upper basket was a flat grid. The spacing provided for the wine glasses also does not match standard white wine glasses in any way. Ultimately, the manufacturer is apparently only interested in advertising with space for 13 place settings, without pointing out that place settings are anything but common household items.

1128360967.text_en: I am unexpectedly very enthusiastic, the functions are super easy, you can fold the dishwasher in half and set the speed of cleaning. In addition, a small red lamp lights up on the Biden to show that it is in operation. The great thing, of course, is that the dishwasher has WiFi integrated and the app on your phone always lets you know which dish cycle is currently running and whether anything else is missing. You can also set and turn on the dishwasher remotely using the app. The dish racks can also be adjusted up or down and the grids can be individually adjusted on the inside.  Simply great, I'm very excited ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

1144296970.text_en: Overall a reliable quality product. Offers a lot of storage space for dishes, more than our previous model from another manufacturer with the same external dimensions. Works quietly and the dishes get clean. The floor LED and Home Connect are very practical. Small weaknesses when operating the device, e.g. canceling time programming or an active process is unnecessarily complicated - this is easier with other brands; and we often have to press the start button twice before it registers. Compared to the essentials, these are "small" things, overall still 5 stars.

1161398295.text_en: About a month ago we bought a new Bosch dishwasher mod.SMV4ECX21E/38. Since we bought it, we couldn't be happier, easy handling and great performance.  Thanks to the control panel on the door in the upper area, it is easy to program the wash we need at each moment of use, it works great, it washes incredibly well, it makes zero noise and its washes are incredible.  We couldn't be more delighted in this short time we have had it.

1168777663.text_en: I have always had dishwashers, washing machines, refrigerators... Bosch, but I am afraid this will be the last. From the first day this dishwasher, which has cost me a fortune, always brings out the dishes that taste like detergent. In plates and glasses it is not very noticeable, but in tupperware or plastic utensils the flavor is embedded and the food tastes like detergent because of it. I have changed Tupperware and kitchen utensils several times but they always get flavor again. The truth is that the previous device, which was 10 years old, worked much better than this one. The technical service does not give me a solution either, since they do not detect any fault, so I think this will be my last Bosch appliance.

1135986828.text_en: After putting this dishwasher to the test, which has surprised me from the first minute, I have to highlight several points: It is very very spacious, so placing the dishes is extremely simple; In addition, the third upper tray is extremely practical, which makes filling and placing even easier. It doesn't leave a trace of dirt, without the need for pre-washing, it removes even the most stubborn remains... I've even put it to the test with a tray of cannelloni, with gratin cheese stuck to it... and not a drop of dirt. With the blades up and down, it makes anything very clean. The cost of water and electricity is reduced which is wonderful, it leaves everything clean, dry and shiny. Programming and operation is quite intuitive and simple, as well as very quiet. IN SUMMARY, a dishwasher of 10 in every sense.

1180724888.text_en: We couldn't be happier with the purchase of the BOSCH Series 4 SMV4ECX21E dishwasher. From day one, it has proven to be an incredible investment. Its capacity is impressive, allowing us to wash a large number of dishes, utensils and glasses in one go. In addition, the multiple programs available allow us to adjust the cycle according to our needs, and the best of all is that even in the quick program, the results are perfect. The dishes are spotless and free of grease or dirt, which is a great relief. Without a doubt, an excellent option if you are looking for an efficient and quality dishwasher. We have not regretted a day of purchasing it!

1152892855.text_en: My previous Bosch dishwasher lasted 23 years with very good results, yes, replacing some elements such as the two trays, the soap bar dispenser box and the salt tank lid. But one day the engine said enough and there are no more spare parts. The new dishwasher was very easy to install, including changing the hardware on the front panel. It works very well and is very quiet. It also has a third tray for cutlery, although the space for the two lower trays decreases.  On the other hand, the delivery of the new device was very fast and within the established time.

1155424624.text_en: Excellent washing, the quality of the dishwasher is excellent. But we had a problem with the installation, before purchasing, please note that the hose has nozzles and may need extra space to connect it. Therefore, we had to connect everything ourselves, we could not use the Installation Service, as an additional place had to be organized.

1120691300.text_en: After almost 20 years, I threw out the old Bosch dishwasher and bought another Bosch. This is very spacious and what I like is the cutlery drawer at the top. The cutlery is no longer against each other, cleans well and creates even more space. Oh yeah, it's quiet too.   I mainly use the eco mode at night (lasts 5 hours). The quick scoop (1 hour) for when I need something quickly. In the eco mode, the dishes come out dry. Also the plastic utensils. The quick was slightly less dry.  The WiFi function is nice, but I hardly use it myself. All in all great value for money. I am happy with the purchase

1207228505.text_en: I am very satisfied with the product, it meets my requirements, when I take the dishes out of the machine and touch them, they are also dry. It has various programs that really help you especially after a party. It helps me even when I leave home with the help of the application I can start it remotely to consume from the photovoltaic system. It has no competitor for the price-quality ratio.

1163973990.text_en: After our old dishwasher started having problems, we decided on this dishwasher after intensive research. The smart functions and app integration are really great. With a little skill, the dishwasher can also be added to other systems such as Apple's HomeKit or HomeAssistant. This allows you to set, among other things, that the dishwasher mainly runs when, for example, the photovoltaic system is currently producing electricity. This is how smart home is fun 🤩 In addition, you take care of the environment in the long term due to this better controllability.

1132419700.text_en: Robust dishwasher with excellent qualities.  -Noise: it is minimal as soon as you are aware that it is working.   - Capacity: Very spacious with the third tray helps to better organize the kitchenware.  - Drying: I have only had a few washes but it is a point that would improve.    The installation and attention by Bosch professionals has been fantastic.

1149755509.title_en: Excellent quality and design, as always
1149755509.text_en: We have been Bosch users for years. The quality is unbeatable, it doesn't make any noise and the functions and programs cover all needs. The built-in Wi-Fi is a total success for not only scheduling washes but also for controlling the number of tablets used and many other options. Very happy with the purchase.

1148790825.title_en: Very good device, service from the brand that could be improved
1148790825.text_en: Very good dishwasher, very efficient in washing and drying, the noise is practically imperceptible, there are times when you have to go closer to check that it is running. Energy class B, very good. Very complete programs that cover all needs. High capacity and good distribution to make the most of its capacity. The great cutlery tray, a great advance over the traditional basket. I give 4 stars for the terrible transportation service, even though it was from the brand and not much better technical service to assemble the interlocking door, they had to come twice.

1176750981.text_en: I have been using it for 3 and a half years and it washes the same as on the first day. Used almost daily. You just have to do the maintenance cycle on time (1 wash/month without dishes on the coach schedule) Whatever dishes I put in it and in all possible seating configurations, it always washed them well. Bosch quality is a certainty.

1157791482.text_en: We had a previous model from the sister brand Neff that was in daily use for 10 years without any problems. The new one from Bosch no longer has the usual projector that shows the program and the running time on the floor. There is now a good app for this that informs the user with push notifications on their cell phone when the rinsing process is finished, the device needs to be cleaned, etc. The app shows everything important in real time and you have the option of starting or stopping the rinsing process remotely.   We are very satisfied with the device.

1170946895.text_en: very practical connected device for starting the dishwasher remotely when you have forgotten to do so (we always put a tablet in advance in the compartment). several programs available and others to download. it washes very well and I find it very quiet.

1160154402.text_en: This model is silent, with a lot of programs and a great capacity to insert household items for cleaning. New: the third tray to clean the cutlery, a matter of getting used to it since the previous model had a basket to arrange it.

1151518914.text_en: The dishwasher is very good in general. The most important thing is that it is silent. In addition, other things are very appreciated: - The separate cutlery tray is very useful and saves space - The dishwasher is quite spacious and accepts very large dishes that I had problems with in other dishwashers due to colliding with the washing blades.  - It has a lot of programs and functionalities.    The only drawback we have is that the ECO and AUTO programs - the ones most used - do not dry enough. Even when the extra-dry option is selected, some things come out wet.

1096013991.text_en: Silent and well distributed. It has three trays, the one with the cutlery is not even visible, at the top. Leave room for all the large pieces at the bottom. The best thing is that it starts up and you have to pay attention because you can't hear it, until you get used to it. The red light on the floor indicating operation gives it an innovative touch. Satisfied.

1151305133.text_en: I bought a Bosh dishwasher at the urging of my friends who already had Bosh... today I would not give up this help in any way, I am satisfied with how it works, how much it consumes and the fact that it increased my rest time.

1088804196.text_en: Dishwasher with a lot of capacity. The 3rd Variodrawer tray provides extra space for accessories and cutlery, leaving the entire bottom basket empty for plates and pots and the 2nd basket with the Rackmatic system is very easy to use and comfortable. For now happy. A change compared to the other Bosch dishwasher we had. Now let's see how it behaves.

1157206636.text_en: The model is super quiet, it also includes a third tray for cutlery that allows optimal cleaning, even the plate supports on the lower tray are foldable, allowing pots and pans to be inserted.
