1149831131.text_en: We are happy with the purchase, it has better efficiency than other products in both water and energy and better performance. With time programmer, clock indication, half load and with connection to home connect.

1149834796.text_en: We are happy with the purchase, it has better efficiency than other products in both water and energy and better performance. With time programmer, clock indication, half load and with connection to home connect.

1154017467.text_en: From the purchasing experience from the official website, to the start-up of the dishwasher, everything went great. I was surprised by how quiet it is and the quality of the drying.  I am very happy with the purchase.

1171417404.title_en: It's incredible, it washes without making noise!!!
1171417404.text_en: This dishwasher is the best, its eco function is really eco and the great advantage is that you can raise and lower the upper basket in case you have to wash larger pots, dishes or dishes than usual.

1165301433.text_en: Have had the dishwasher for several months. Are very satisfied. It's quiet, dishes come out spotlessly clean, what more could you want. Last but not least, it's also economical. Highly recommended!

1135521484.text_en: The Bosch brand was recommended to me by relatives who have had this brand dishwasher for more than ten years and without a doubt, I have opted for this model, which exceeds my expectations.

1156581061.text_en: I've been using it for a couple of days and so far I'm happy with the operation and ease of installation (I installed it myself). Also happy with the app to program it from the mobile

1149832716.text_en: It's very quiet, it's very spacious. I really liked the cutlery part, since it leaves a lot of space for the rest of the dishes. Leave the plates, glasses clean and be safe.

1163907597.text_en: It has everything you could need in a dishwasher and also has a Wi-Fi connection so you can control it from your mobile. A success at a competitive price.

1111053795.text_en: For this dishwasher you actually only need an instruction manual for the initial settings. Otherwise, everything can actually be operated intuitively. The cleaning performance is top and thanks to the height-adjustable upper basket, even my entire deep fryer can go in the dishwasher. A regular reminder to clean the dishwasher (i.e. not the program but simply a reminder to disassemble and clean the machine) would be worth adding and the "smart function" only works to a limited extent as the connection constantly breaks down.

1147234104.text_en: There are definitely plus points for the WiFi function in conjunction with the Home connect app. You can also download and use the program. The Bosch service on site was also great. The cutlery basket is definitely missing from the device. Sorting the cutlery on the top shelf requires a lot of patience and time. Unfortunately, I was wrong when I assumed I could use my old cutlery basket because the device doesn't have space for it. Interior lighting would also have been great, but the dishwasher can't help but other models do.

1185746426.text_en: A big plus for me is that you can control the washing progress from the application.  Being a built-in machine, you don't have controls on the surface and without an application it would be impossible to follow the washing progress.  I've had it for a short time, but the control in the application simplifies the process a lot. Silent, roomy.    FYI: For those who are thinking of installing LEDs in the plinths of the furniture, the built-in machines confuse a lot because it has to be cut from the top of the plinth where the LED wire should continue. When opening, the car door needs a little more space than the entire plinth would allow. I woke up with this situation, I was not warned and now I have to turn off the light at the washing machine.

1105982919.text_en: Very good options and consumption. The cutlery tray is very practical, and the connection to the mobile phone is a plus.  Perfect integration in my kitchen.

1149381708.text_en: I hope to continue using the Bosh dishwasher for another 16 years since the previous one has lasted me that long and I hope this one lasts the same.....

1157253997.text_en: I've only tried 2 washes. The satisfactory cleaning result. It is very quiet compared to my previous dishwasher.

1154838172.text_en: A dishwasher with many programmable functions, Wi-Fi connection and very quiet for the kitchen integrated into the living room.

1177276997.text_en: till now i'm not so satified about it. all my glasses have stains, sometimes the plates, forks etc are not well washed

1171113225.text_en: Very happy with the choice, very good product and very good service both in delivery and installation

1162891719.text_en: Super nice staff for the assembly and start-up of the appliance and a very good dishwasher.

1097662753.text_en: Silent, washes very well, stainless steel tub connects via Wi-Fi. I'm very satisfied. I recommend it

1157028485.text_en: Without trying it, it looks quite complete, it has a good distribution of the trays

1119622200.title_en: Perfect, what we were looking for
1119622200.text_en: We are delighted with it, very quiet, many programs to choose from and it goes unnoticed

1157347198.title_en: The dishwasher is very good and functional
1157347198.text_en: I like it a lot, it is very functional, the cutlery drawer is very practical.

1169360525.text_en: Integrated dishwasher with quick installation and multiple washing options

1131735507.text_en: The Bosch appliances work very well and the dishwasher is luxurious.

1154463648.text_en: Good qualities, good technical service and incredible performance.

1153804907.text_en: At the moment the dishwasher works at 10. Very good appliance.

1132649822.title_en: We are very happy with the dishwasher
1132649822.text_en: It is a comfortable, intelligent, integrated and easy-to-use appliance.

1153703732.text_en: Very satisfied with the purchase, very quiet and easy to program.

1144471613.text_en: My new dishwasher saves my life. It is very quiet

1122135391.text_en: Super spacious. Everything fits in there. Dishes are kept clean and dry

1154392552.text_en: Silent, efficient and very well finished. Excellent purchase!!

1169955854.text_en: I haven't used it much, but I am very happy with the purchase.

1129613631.text_en: Very good interior layout. Everything in its place....

1146837118.title_en: We are simply thrilled with the devices
1146837118.text_en: Works very quietly, has very good options.

1168806514.text_en: My experience so far is positive.

1154366344.text_en: As it has 3 trays, it is much larger than the basket I had previously and the all-stainless steel interior finish denotes a lot of quality. You can adjust the hardness of the water and the amount of rinse aid, which makes it more economical than other models. Regarding the programs, I normally use the echo, but depending on needs you can use a shorter one. The light projected on the floor when in operation is great and I find it very useful. And above all, the fact that the door automatically opens for drying is perfect. Washes and dries wonderfully.

1153096917.text_en: It is a good quality dishwasher

1175450456.text_en: I HAVE ALWAYS BET ON THIS BRAND

1135128691.text_en: I haven't opened it yet, kitchen renovation.

1135131618.text_en: I haven't opened it yet, kitchen renovation.

1130419422.text_en: It was exactly what I was looking for, a dishwasher with a lot of capacity and that could be programmed to clean at night to save money. It has different programs that adapt to various situations in everyday life.   What I don't really like is the last cutlery tray since it looks very plastic and it is difficult to fit any type of cutlery.  Also for the plates, there are different separations between them, so the deep plates can be placed further apart than the flat ones.   For now, it fits perfectly with what I needed.

1150191504.title_en: Bosch has always given me excellent results.

1119796515.title_en: Hardware is great - software is not
1119796515.text_en: The dishwasher does its job as expected. The app "kicked me out" after about 4 weeks... Attempts to reinstall it were successful for me (iOS) and my wife (Android). Too bad

1094039335.title_en: Very good device at a fair price
1094039335.text_en: Very good device at a fair price. After our old Noname dishwasher got on our last nerve because it washed so poorly, we decided on this model from Bosch. We are extremely satisfied! He does what he's supposed to - wash the dishes impeccably clean. We don't want to be without the cutlery drawer anymore, as it leaves a lot more space in the lower part and it also holds small items such as fasteners and larger items such as wooden spoons. It is very quiet and the automatic program detects the level of soiling well, as the dishes have always been clean. You can even adjust the sensitivity of the sensor using the app. The smart function works well and is a fun gadget if you're into that sort of thing. This is how you find out: For example, I receive a mobile phone push message when I'm out and about that the dishwasher is ready.

1155737031.title_en: Good purchase, reliable brand but some doubts
1155737031.text_en: I just bought this dishwasher after having a previous model, the SGV67T33EU, which lasted me 17 years and was, without a doubt, a great purchase. Although I have just started using this model, I trust that it will give me a good result, since the brand seems reliable to me. My washing machine is also Bosch, it is 18 years old and it still works there. I hope they do not disappoint me with the planned obsolescence of the new models and they are as reliable as the ones I bought at the time. I miss an interior light and I'm not sure that the cutlery tray is better for cleaning than the baskets, although it does give you more space in the trolley below. The feeling, in general, is good, but the one I just retired had steel and metal details that seem of higher quality than some plastic finishes that the new model has (for example, the upper panel of the front of the door, the closing mechanism of the appliance or the filtration grille that surrounds the drain, which was previously entirely made of stainless steel and completely removable and is now divided into two parts, one of them plastic and screwed). We'll see what happens with use. I also find it interesting that the water saving compared to a 2007 class A is approximately 3 liters per eco cycle and the electricity saving is 30-40%. I hope to notice it on the bill as I use it daily, sometimes even twice a day.

1145443270.text_en: After 8 months of daily use, the impressions are favorable. If it was offered in the menu, I would choose a rating of 4.5.  We most often use the Eco program 50°, if necessary fast (approximately 75 minutes, 65°) or the one for heavily soiled dishes, 70°.  We praise: It is very quiet, the commands via the buttons are understandable and sufficient for everyday use. For gaming and exploring, there's also a WiFi connection with the HomeConnect function that allows personalization according to needs. The reminder that the machine needs to be cleaned (appears after a certain number of work cycles) is a useful detail.  We are very satisfied with the quality of washing.  Remark: Not very good drying of dishes, even with the option of additional drying.  General impression: A quality-made device that is a pleasure to see and use.

1164477638.title_en: Top device, lots of functions, does what it's supposed to do!
1164477638.text_en: I have been using the device for several weeks now. I was surprised by the many functions, including the “half load” function. This saves a little energy and you don't have to wait forever until the dishwasher is completely filled. Advantageous for single-person households!  The spring hardness for the door was already set perfectly at the factory for the cover from a well-known furniture store. Otherwise, the most important thing, of course, is that the dishes are clean, completely free of stains and streaks.  Can only recommend the device!

1149566773.text_en: New kitchen, new dishwasher, I didn't know about Bosch and yet the reviews were very good.   In use, the Bosch application is very practical and very intuitive, much simpler than control buttons which never allowed me to use, for example, the delayed start.  Several settings are available, while being guided, and it is very practical.  Washing is really effective, even in fast mode. Our glasses came back to new condition, despite a previous, more expensive dishwasher.  The materials are quality and the storage equipment offered by my Bosch dishwasher is really well thought out (modular, the plate shelf even offers retractable holders for glasses, etc.) Very happy

1088983087.title_en: Good dishwasher at a TOP price
1088983087.text_en: We purchased the dishwasher online from a dealer in Vienna on Black Friday. In addition to the price, the decisive factor was the range of functions of the device, which for us could not be beaten in this price range. The device is extremely quiet and the phone app with the device's information is more than I expected. I would purchase the device again at any time.

1096906023.text_en: My previous Bosh dishwasher lasted me 18 years, so I'm used to Bosh quality. But this dishwasher has surprised me in terms of its capacity, despite being the same measurements, it fits more dishes by having the cutlery tray up and horizontally.  Also highlight how quiet it is, if it weren't for the red light you wouldn't even know it was working.

1141601592.text_en: Very good dishwasher. Since the last update, you can even tailor your own programs. Individually tailored to your personal needs. With the app you can view, control and manage everything. It may cost a little more than other dishwashers but it's definitely worth it! Once integrated into the SmartHome, you can even use a known device to determine whether you should wash the dishes. True to the motto: “At least one woman who listens to you” 😄😉.   I am very satisfied with this device. Everything is always clean. The inside can also be individually adjusted if you have larger things. From the connection, which could also be connected with hot water, to the end of the program, it's a great device.

1107756897.text_en: It's so quiet that we often think it's not on. And the cutlery drawer fits more in than our old one before. The automatic program is our favorite. It impresses in terms of consumption, results and duration of the wash cycle. We are a household of 5 and our machine really has to perform. This one does it with the left. Therefore a full purchase recommendation. And something else. The app control is not a gimmick but a real convenience. This makes it super easy to set up the machine and even control it remotely. Super good.

1150162289.text_en: I recently had the opportunity to experience the wonder of modern technology in my kitchen with the Bosch fully integrated dishwasher. This appliance has not only exceeded my expectations, but has also raised the bar for what I consider essential in a modern home.    The first thing that stands out is its fully integrable design. It blends perfectly with the aesthetic of my kitchen, maintaining a clean and minimalist look. Being hidden behind a facade that matches the cabinets, this dishwasher becomes a discreet and elegant element.    In terms of functionality, this dishwasher is a gem. With multiple washing programs, it adapts to different types of dishes and levels of dirt, always ensuring an impeccable result. Its sensor technology automatically adjusts wash duration and water consumption, which translates into energy efficiency and savings on your water bill.    The noise level is another point to highlight.   Furthermore, ease of use is an aspect that I cannot fail to mention. The control panel is intuitive and accessible, making selecting the right program a simple and hassle-free process. This ease extends to the maintenance of the device. Cleaning is simple, and the filters can be removed and cleaned effortlessly, ensuring the dishwasher always operates at peak performance.    Bosch innovation also shines through in the additional features this model offers.    They include Home Connect technology, which allows you to control and monitor the dishwasher through a mobile application. This functionality adds a layer of convenience and modernity, allowing me to start or schedule wash cycles from anywhere.    Attention to detail is evident in every aspect of the dishwasher's design. From the internal layout that maximizes space to the efficient drying system. A wonder

1137736291.text_en: We have had this dishwasher for 2 years and it runs great.  It is very easy to use on the device and in the app; you can also download new programs in the app.   With Home Conect you always have an overview of how long the program still needs and at the end you receive a notification and messages if something needs to be refilled or the machine needs care.   Dishes are always clean, even in the quick program, despite being heavily soiled.   All in all we are very satisfied with our helper 😀

1130307463.text_en: I would highlight the dishwasher's capacity. With the third tray we have noticed that we can fit many more things. Also, although filling it takes a little more time, by having everything organized, it looks better when washed and then placing it in the drawer is faster.  We also really like how quiet it is, compared to the previous one we had.   As a plus, it is very convenient to say that the home conect application is very convenient to see how the program is going, how much is left, and even be able to program it.  In short, we are delighted with the purchase.

1204101617.title_en: The best at an affordable price.
1204101617.text_en: Good product (like all Bosch appliances) that meets expectations: variety of programs, ease of use, very thorough washing and above all very quiet during operation. The only aspect that did not fully satisfy me is the upper basket for storing glasses and cups which is not at all convenient as they cannot fit together properly and the cutlery basket is useless in my opinion... thank goodness I kept the cutlery basket from the old Siemens dishwasher.

1105395137.text_en: We chose this LV to replace a similar Siemens model following the replacement of our kitchen. The previous one gave complete satisfaction after 16 years of service and he left to continue his career elsewhere. It is this robustness that encouraged us to purchase a product from the Bosch group. The connectivity function which seemed like a gadget at first glance has found its place. The auto function has a very variable duration, the machine completed alert is very practical on a built-in model

1173010750.text_en: Very spacious dishwasher washes the dishes very clean and everything is sparkling clean. It has a practical 1/2 load mode that allows you to run it more often even if you haven't dirty much dishes, the dishwasher is quiet enough to run at night. In addition, when finished it opens on its own and everything is impeccably dry and ready to put away.  I have always bought Bosch appliances, starting with the legendary Maxx washing machine, and I have never regretted it: Bosch is synonymous with quality.

1123527225.text_en: The dishwasher I just purchased is perfect for my needs. The cutlery tray frees up a lot of space in the lower basket. The truth is that with the same exterior dimensions, it has a large interior capacity, much greater than my old dishwasher.  It is silent, it has the programs I need and, when connected, I know the program and remaining working time at all times. Also the red light on the ground outside tells me if it is finished.  Highly advisable and very very happy with it.

1120356612.title_en: Nice spacious dishwasher that works great.
1120356612.text_en: After having a Bosch dishwasher for >20 years, I bought another Bosch. Dishwasher functions very well. Many options from fast (just over an hour) to Eco (5 hours). I use the latter to let the machine do its work at night. No noise problems because it works quite silently, also because it is built-in.  The machine also dries well in Eco mode. Even plastic utensils come out dry.  An absolute plus is the cutlery drawer at the top, which fits a lot neatly in order.   Absolutely recommended in terms of price/quality

1129714743.text_en: Finally a perfect dishwasher. After we bought a no-name appliance with the kitchen 10 years ago, we needed something new and more economical. The old machine used a lot of electricity and water and felt like it was always full and we didn't regret anything at Bosch. The flexible layout of the interior as well as the functions that the machine offers are great. Thanks to WiFi, it is also smart and you can control a lot of information and access information via the app. A really successful device!

1148714321.text_en: Bosch was my first choice in terms of brand for my kitchen appliances and it's a dream come true! This washing machine removes all the dirt from the dishes and leaves everything smelling clean and dry. All you have to do is clean up the dishes yourself! It couldn't have been a better choice!

1152611578.text_en: Its 42 dB make it a silent dishwasher and I think it is phenomenal, since there are more and more kitchens integrated into the living room. In addition to being integrable, making the entire kitchen look uniform.   In terms of its use, I find it to be one of the most practical, it is easy to understand each washing program and its additional programs, it is very good to be able to choose the 1 hour program and also be able to add 1/2 half a load.   If I also connect it to the application, I can manage everything very comfortably.   Simple, aesthetic and complete

1173171672.text_en: The Bosch SMV4ECX21E dishwasher is actually very quiet. Dishes are washed and dried thoroughly. In addition, you can activate the function of opening the dishwasher door after the program has finished to dry the dishes even better. The cutlery drawer is a real convenience and allows you to place many more dishes in it.  In addition, we can adjust the upper basket if we have taller pots or other dishes.   This is my second Bosch dishwasher and I still wouldn't trade it for any other brand.

1162071234.text_en: This is our second Bosch dishwasher, this time after moving we bought a larger one. It is very roomy, the control panel is easy to use, the only thing I don't like is the cutlery tray - the previous one had a basket and it was simply more convenient to unpack the cutlery into the drawer. The dishwasher is very quiet, you can hardly hear it, a light on the floor is useful, which informs about the device's operation. After connecting to the phone, we also receive a notification when washing is completed. Overall, I recommend it

1129312553.text_en: It fits perfectly with my kitchen furniture, (we have a 10 cm plinth) I was hesitant about the third tray but it is certainly very practical and now I have more space than ever to put all kinds of salad bowls, frying pans and pots that I previously ended up washing by hand because they took up all the space.   The interior has a perfect finish. The price is not cheap, but I think the investment in a good dishwasher is worth it knowing that in the end you will be using it for years and years.

1146785552.text_en: The cutlery drawer really saves space and space, it is easy to use and very intuitive. If you really need help, the application linked to the device helps you in your choice of c top program.  It washes very well, leaves no marks and dries very well on the basis of plastics, but if necessary you can increase the drying power.   The height adjustment of the basket is also great if you have a larger plate or something else.  Really complete for a family of 4 people

1173846490.text_en: et is my second dishwasher. After the first one, I knew that the next one had to be Bosch. The first one is 9 years old. Unfortunately, it is too small for us. As the number of children and dirty plates increased, we had to change to a larger model. After reading the descriptions, we chose the built-in Bosh Series 4. She's brilliant. It is quiet, opens the door itself after washing, and has programs adapted to a family of 5. It has a separate drawer for cutlery, which was very important to me, but most importantly, it is solid.

1172548402.text_en: After receiving the product, I set about anchoring the paneled door to the rest of the kitchen and with the instructions it was super easy. It turned out perfect and not very handy.  Regarding the dishwasher, great, having the cutlery tray gives you a lot of space to put more things, before I had to put two dishwashers to wash the same thing and with the application it is super easy, it gives you the best options to consume less and if you put the drying on, everything comes out super dry. 100% recommended

1128803175.text_en: A review of a dishwasher that I carefully chose, and decided I wanted something real German forging and production :) because I was born there after all. Namely, a full 11 years after moving without a washing machine and that day happened when our "Milka" arrived (I always call the washing machine by that name :) ) What can I say but that it met all my expectations, quiet, spacious, functional (the third drawer for accessories was a condition when choosing). All praise and a warm recommendation to those who are currently looking for a washing machine.

1171507511.text_en: Delivery and installation were carried out correctly. It arrived within 3 days of purchase. The operation, for now, is satisfactory.  I like that the baskets are "multipurpose" and adjustable, so the appliance can hold a large number of kitchen utensils.       Variety of programs and being able to turn it on through the BOSH application is a convenience.     We will have to see how it evolves with use, but at first glance you can see the high quality materials.

1139699920.text_en: This dishwasher is extremely excellent and washes and rinses dishes well. There is no difference between this dishwasher and higher models from other brands. It starts quietly, so sometimes after an hour I have doubts whether it is even switched on. But when I look, I notice that the device is on and washing the dishes.    This dishwasher can be connected to your mobile phone and controlled via the mobile phone. Even if she needs salt, she will give you an alert on your cell phone. You can program the device to turn on and wash the dishes when everyone is asleep, and when you wake up, take out the clean dishes.    Overall, I couldn't find a better dishwasher than this.

1173869005.text_en: I definitely recommend the Bosch dishwasher! Previously, I used a dishwasher from another company, but after switching to Bosch I see a huge difference. First of all, Bosch works quieter and is more energy efficient, which has a positive impact on bills. The dishes are perfectly clean, even with short programs, and the organization of the dishwasher's interior allows for better arrangement of various types of dishes. I am very pleased with the purchase and I'm glad I chose Bosch - it's definitely worth it!

1147259816.text_en: We've only had it for a short time, but it gives a good feeling, the cutlery holder is super practical.

1144921889.text_en: We are very satisfied with the Bosch dishwasher. It has a cutlery drawer that saves a lot of space. We would never have thought that until then. Although the dishwasher is exactly the same size as the previous one, it fits a lot more, so we save at least one wash cycle per week. The device itself is very economical (energy class C) and we will notice this noticeably in terms of water and electricity consumption due to the fewer rinse cycles per year.

1141282499.text_en: I chose this device because I have only had good experiences with the Bosch brand.  Unfortunately I made a mistake this time.  The dishes don't get clean in the Eco cycle, so I always wash them in the 70 degree program. It has also happened a few times that the tab was still partially stuck in the "collection basket" after the program had ended. Yesterday the tab stuck to the dishes as individual white grains, so I had to rinse everything again under the tap! All in all, not a satisfactory device. I would also like to note: I pre-rinse under the tap (very environmentally friendly!), which I only did with the previous machine if parts were really dirty or burnt in.  But at least: I can switch it on via remote control...

1161075149.text_en: This is my next Bosch dishwasher purchased for a new apartment. Compared to other brands (assessment based on observations/comparison of dishwashers from family and friends), the solutions in Bosch/Siemens are, in my opinion, simple and at the same time the most effective: easy to place dishes, easy to pull out/change the height of the baskets (I have a dishwasher from another company at work, in which sliding out the basket usually ends with the dishes placed in it moving/overturning), easy to clean the strainers and arms.   As for the specific model (SMV4ECX21E), my advantages are: quiet operation, ability to shorten the program even during its duration, light information on the floor (plus information in the application about the time is a substitute for the more expensive option with time display on the floor), half load, automatic door opening for more efficient drying.

1161150836.title_en: Nice quality at a low price
1161150836.text_en: This is my second dishwasher from Bosch and once again I was not disappointed. Easy to use, programs that are necessary for me, and in the case of this model - the ability to control via the application, which is very convenient when, for example, we come back from work and want to have washed dishes and after washing, open the door so that everything can dry nicely. It works quite quietly - it doesn't bother me. In general, the equipment at this price is a big plus.

1161363277.text_en: This is our first Bosch dishwasher and we are delighted with it. A definite advantage is the Eco program and the 1h program, which efficiently and thoroughly washes even the worst dirt. An additional advantage is the ability to run it via the application. This is new for us, which is an incredible convenience because we turn it on whenever we want, when we are not at home. Solidly made, with an additional drawer for cutlery. Definitely worth recommending!

1205383906.text_en: The dishwasher was released with a fault and since it was under warranty, the Bosch technician changed an electronic "board" that was like the brain of the device. Obviously the repair cost me nothing but the dishwasher was out for more than a week. I often use it in the ECO program and it never runs out of time on the clock, stopping and opening earlier, ending the wash. I don't know if this has to be like this. Otherwise everything OK

1138134046.title_en: Totally consistent in the price-quality ratio
1138134046.text_en: It does what is expected from a dishwasher: clean and dry dishes, including plastic containers that are so difficult to get completely dry. The application is a perfect ally for this dishwasher to be able to customize the programs. In my opinion, it should show the remaining time to finish the wash projected on the floor like other brands do. Now it is essential to use the telephone to know.

1171943887.text_en: Very good dishwasher, easy handling and high efficiency.   Recessed door assembly service from the brand itself, regrettable no, the following and charging €60.   Three times they had to come and they didn't even leave it like the Balay that was in its place before. I left it as impossible.   Technicians always in a hurry and eager to finish.   Perhaps it is better to do this service through another professional, carpenter or something like that.

1168030496.text_en: After more than 18 years of using a Bosch dishwasher, it changed Speed...without a single failure!! We decided to buy this new dishwasher, very similar and which came with the exact inserts as the previous one, also making integration very fast and without a single hole.  BOSCH: Without a doubt a brand that thinks and has an extraordinary useful life and great quality to take into account.  I hope this new series 4 dishwasher lasts just as long!

1144651160.text_en: I compared a lot to choose this dishwasher and I am absolutely not disappointed! The many different programs make my life easier and I have a crush on the cutlery drawer! As for the application that connects the device to my tablet and phone, I thought it was a simple gadget but in fact it is extremely practical! So I even connected the dryer and the wine cellar to the wifi!

1173209147.text_en: After a few years, I returned to the Bosch dishwasher. I'm pleasantly surprised, but that's what I expected from the product I purchased. I will not go into detailed analysis. However, I would like to emphasize one element of this dishwasher's equipment that is important to me. These are well-thought-out washing programs that fulfill their purpose well. Finally, the dishes are washed and there is no possibility of shortening the program or lowering the temperature. I recommend

1161647312.text_en: Very happy with the dishwasher. The two trays, both below and above, have a part of the grates that can be folded to accommodate tableware such as larger pots, etc. It also has racks to hold glasses. They have several washing options that are easy to put on. And the surprise that we liked the most is the light that faces the ground to indicate that it is running, once finished, the light remains off.

1148418004.text_en: Silent and efficient.   The programs (except one) are very long for my taste, but it is something that happens with all dishwashers.  Although it is integrated and recessed, I don't like that the inside of the dishwasher is not protected (the sides matter less because they are tight, but the top does not). In some furniture, as in my case, there is a lot of space and the foam it contains is very welcoming to bugs.

1100402682.text_en: The dishwasher has very good use of space, the third tray fits many more things and cleaning is very good, even with hour-long programs.   It is much quieter than the ones I have had before and the mobile app also works very well, and notifies you when the wash is finished.  Very happy with the purchase so far, I hope it lasts for many years.

1155245097.text_en: The Bosch Series 4 SMV4ECX21E dishwasher is a great machine! Not only does it have a sleek design that looks great in the kitchen, but it's also super quiet. And speaking of washing, it leaves everything sparkling with its different programs! Plus, it's eco-friendly, so you feel good about using modern technology. In short, it is a must-have in our kitchen for easy and hassle-free cleaning! 👍

1152952081.text_en: We have been using the dishwasher for a few weeks now and are very impressed. The washing results are really good, the different modes are sufficient and the connection to Home Connect was quick and easy. You could even control the dishwasher via the app, but we don't use that. What is useful, however, is the information sent to your smartphone as soon as the program has ended. Clear recommendation.

1139783409.text_en: new Bosch versus old Bosch in the same price range - not really better - although with Extradry and Double Superdry no dry result - drips and moisture are the result after many tests.  I don't see any difference to the old machine.  WiFi took a while to set up (Iphone) - WiFi cannot be switched off overnight - constant access - I find it problematic for my health.

1126800315.text_en: With the upper tray you gain much more space for the cutlery and they are also more organized, which makes it easier to collect, otherwise it is the second one I have bought since the other one that is 4 years old I have put on another floor and to date it has not given me any problems, that is why I wanted the same thing but with the upper tray, I have not tried the home connect but well since it already comes standard I imagine it gives it a plus.

1179183030.text_en: This product is AWESOME!!!   The programs are optimized to avoid overconsumption of electricity and water. In the quick program the dishes are perfect! There is even an ultra dry option!   But the must-have is the Home Connect app, which allows you to navigate and control your device remotely because it is connected to wifi! I didn't think I'd use it, but it's great! You can control everything from the phone!

1162467016.text_en: The device is excellent. Very quiet and easy to handle. It has a wide variety of programs and you can even customize the most used program. In addition, its Wi-Fi connection keeps you informed of its status and whether the wash has finished, in addition to allowing you to configure some parameters. I'm glad I chose it although it's not the first one I've had from this brand. The previous one lasted 17 years, which is not short.

1127125269.text_en: Comfortable and large, cutlery tray that fits great and being panelable, a perfect size.  I can't find a program shorter than 1:10m. I don't know if it's because I haven't read the instructions correctly...once I got the E25 error and I cleaned the drain and it seems to have been solved even though there was nothing stuck...let's see if it doesn't happen to me again, could you tell me what the rinse program is? I can't find it either.

1127014878.text_en: Very good looking. My previous dishwasher was Balay and the operation is familiar to me. The panel is hidden, which does not allow it to be seen, but the operation is very smooth and silent. I hope that consumption is contained - It does not have a basket and it does have a third tray that seems more curious although it may be more laborious. The red Inca spot that is in operation is a very good idea. Very satisfied

1219595446.title_en: Very quiet and reliable – clear purchase recommendation
1219595446.text_en: Overall, a clear recommendation for anyone who values ​​quality and a long-term purchase.   Cleans thoroughly and is nice and quiet. Operation via the app is also particularly practical. This means you can easily control it remotely and receive notifications when, for example, the rinse aid needs to be refilled.  Even after 3 years, the dishwasher still runs like it did on the first day.

1158532771.text_en: We bought this dishwasher recently and at the moment we have not been able to test it in depth but in general the first impressions have been good. The capacity and distribution of the baskets is quite good and versatile, you can fit crockery, cutlery, and utensils very comfortably since having a lot of space and various configurations you can adapt the placement of the load depending on the moment. Another detail that we liked is the warning light, in a built-in device it is very useful. Regarding the washing programs, we have only tested the automatic one and so far both cleaning and drying have been good. The use and start-up has been easy following the instructions, once you know the control panel it is very easy to make the necessary adjustments.   For the moment we are happy with the purchase, very good quality-price ratio, I recommend it.

1152270871.text_en: The product meets the characteristics I wanted, however the lack of stock and information about it has taken a long time for delivery. On the other hand, we have waited more than a week for the Bosch technical service to install it for us, and finally we have decided to install it ourselves, so a month after the purchase, I cannot rate the product yet, since I have not been able to use it

1098419556.text_en: Fitting out a new kitchen is always a challenge. After many comparisons and searches for the perfect dishwasher, we have opted for a trustworthy, solvent and reliable brand like Bosch.      The best, without a doubt, is the quality and reliability apart from the energy efficiency, the low water consumption and above all that, as it is for a kitchen open to the living room, it is completely integrable and very quiet.

1134624362.title_en: The Rolls roycs at an unbeatable price
1134624362.text_en: I've had this dishwasher in my kitchen for almost two months now and I'm absolutely thrilled with it. In my opinion, this machine, which is actually offered at a top price, is definitely the RillsRoyce among dishwashers. It is extremely quiet, super efficient and actually makes the dishes shine like no other. I can therefore recommend this device unconditionally

1155490179.title_en: So far the product is great.
1155490179.text_en: Product that looks quality and I hope it lasts a long time. What I am not happy with is the service provided by the Corte Inglés (establishment from which I bought the product). Terrible service, bad advice and worse customer service. (Surprisingly, in terms of online sales, El Corte Inglés is not what it was). I do not recommend it and I will not buy an appliance there again).

1135145938.text_en: Easy handling, low noise, adequate size. We have only used the 1 hour program and in principle it cleans very well. Perhaps the interior space seems a little smaller than the previous one (also Bosch) and we have not yet gotten used to the third tray which is, at least initially, quite uncomfortable. I recommend saving the cutlery bucket from the previous device just in case.

1152557840.text_en: We have bought it to replace another BOSCH dishwasher that is 20 years old and in which everything mechanical was in perfect condition and the electronic programmer has failed, without the possibility of repair or replacement. What I like most about the new one is its connectivity and efficiency. The least, the feeling of lack of robustness of the trays and their lateral movements.

1178349078.text_en: I found this dishwasher at a very good price with the 100 euro cashback promotion. The interior of the dishwasher looks very good quality and is very spacious. Its features include the upper drawer for cutlery and, above all, the function that opens the door automatically once the program ends (this allows the steam to escape and the dishes to dry faster).

1150370955.text_en: Very happy with the new dishwasher. What I value most is its silence of use, that you are always aware of the duration of the program and the quality of its finishes. It looks like a solid and durable product and dries very well. Adding that it has very low consumption and that the possibility of programming, controlling and activating it from your mobile offers extra convenience.

1134741230.text_en: Worst dishwasher I've ever had.  The dishes never come out clean... regardless of the tablets used.  The glasses come out matte despite the use of rinse aid.  A shame for a big brand. Purchased in September 2022 and already the control panel is acting up.  Even the 1st price (purchased for €299) from my line washes better.

1159471665.text_en: The dishwasher is really very quiet, the only sign of its operation is a light sign on the floor. It washes and dries dishes thoroughly and also has the option of opening the door automatically after the program ends. The cutlery drawer is a great solution. I recommend this product to everyone - it is my next dishwasher of this brand and I would not exchange this quality for any other brand.

1139257952.text_en: The dishwasher impresses on the one hand with its smart operation and on the other hand with its simplicity. The only point of criticism is the aborting of programs, this could be made easier. Another suggestion for improvement would be, for example, to be able to fill several tabs into the machine and then start a program at almost any time without having to fill them first.

1131745260.title_en: One of the best purchases I have made!
1131745260.text_en: I am very happy with this dishwasher. I use it every day, it has enough capacity, I almost always use the 1-hour wash, although it has much superior options than other dishwashers, it is easy to handle. What I liked the most is how quiet it is. The operating indicator light on the floor is very practical. Very good acquisition. I am very happy!

169150125.text_en: Very happy with the dishwasher and with the English cut. The installation and removal of the old one was free and the workers were very efficient. A few days later they installed the panel, also of the English cut, with very efficient and friendly workers. The dishwasher works great, is very quiet and has many program options. Very happy with the purchase.

1147176535.text_en: We had to get a new one and at first I was very skeptical. But now after several weeks I can say that the purchase was the best decision! The many programs offer a great selection so that you can adapt the program individually to the dishes in the machine.  So far everything has gone perfectly and I have nothing to complain about

1147183442.text_en: We had to get a new one and at first I was very skeptical. But now after several weeks I can say that the purchase was the best decision! The many programs offer a great selection so that you can adapt the program individually to the dishes in the machine. So far everything has gone perfectly and I have nothing to complain about

1148766078.text_en: The dishwasher is quiet and spacious. I bought it replacing a Siemens that has lasted me 15 years. I hope it lasts the same. It can be connected to the network and you can control it from your mobile phone, which is very useful to put it into operation if you have cheaper daylight hours. When finished, the door opens automatically to cool the dishes. For now happy.

1154274873.text_en: It has many useful features, such as automatic door opening once the program has finished, which is very useful when the dishwasher cannot be emptied immediately. The cutlery tray is very comfortable and useful; The cutlery is much cleaner than if the baskets were used. Very good experience to date.

1137052285.text_en: We've been using the dishwasher every day for almost two months now. The Home Connect app keeps us informed about everything and it's easy to use. The dishwasher even has a quiet mode, really great.  Rinsing/drying results are outstanding.  It does what it is supposed to and we are 100% satisfied. Clear purchase recommendation!

1126352215.text_en: I emphasize how quiet it is. I was surprised at how it even removes dried sauce from dishes. It has many programs to choose the most suitable one. The bottom basket is very high so I can also put the large trays without them hitting the blades. The light that tells me that it is in the wash is another success. We are very happy

1136067968.text_en: We had a limited budget for the entire kitchen and that's why it went with the Series 4 dishwasher. We didn't really think about it much before purchasing. Now I'm very excited about the device. It can be operated smartly and has therefore received additional programs. The device is very quiet and cleans the dishes well. The additional drying function works great and allows the tupperware to dry well. The device reports via the home connect app when the rinse aid or salt needs to be refilled. What I don't like so much is that it is displayed in the Bosch smart home system but not operated. If you press the dishwasher tile you will only be redirected to the home connect app. I would like to see Bosch grow more together across all business areas there. But since I didn't expect the smart function at all, I am completely satisfied with the device.

1134851573.text_en: We are delighted with the purchase. It is quieter than the one we had even without activating the silent option. We had doubts about the third tray for cutlery accustomed to the basket but it is a success. Initial settings through the app are very simple. Now I just hope that the result in the long run is the usual one for the brand.

1148100458.text_en: very complicated to connect the device to the HOME CONNECT application! After 2 long hours of effort trying to connect to my phone, I decided to test with another phone (less recent) and the magic happened, connection successful! And here comes a question! (the bluetooth version and compatibility) could this be a clue?

1154549008.title_en: Does what it's supposed to do and does it excellently
1154549008.text_en: It is the second device of this type from Bosch that we have purchased and are once again completely satisfied with it. The layout is optimal, as are the adjustment options for different sizes of dishes. The operation is also very easy to handle, whether on the control panel or via the app. So worth a clear recommendation.

1152794041.text_en: It is very quiet and spacious. Leaves the dishes clean without drying stains on the glassware, since the door opens automatically at the end of the cycle and allows perfect drying. The upper cutlery drawer frees up space in the lower trays. The light sign on the floor is a very practical detail. Highly recommended.

1142329256.text_en: I wanted a very quiet dishwasher since it is close to the living room. You really hardly hear this. I also like the cutlery drawer, I wouldn't want to be without it. The flexibility of the two levels and the height adjustment of the top drawer are great. And everything will be clean too.

1159250589.text_en: Hello. I highly recommend the Bosha dishwasher, I have been using them for years, they are fantastic and unrivaled. Reliable in terms of failure-free operation. Quiet operation. Low water consumption. Large capacity. The stainless finish inside is perfect. An essential household appliance product in your current kitchen. Also a big plus is the large and convenient programs. I highly recommend #likebosh

1146890201.title_en: Lots of space and super quiet
1146890201.text_en: The dishwasher offers plenty of space thanks to the cutlery drawer and height-adjustable baskets. This means you can load flexibly. I am also very satisfied with the cleaning results. The menu is self-explanatory and easy to use. There is also control via app. This means you can set it to very quiet during operation if necessary.

1133010504.text_en: I specifically chose this device because I was already very satisfied with its predecessor. The workmanship of the device, which is completely lined with donkey steel, is excellent and the washing results are very good. The third level for cutlery and the height-adjustable middle level are particularly helpful. Clear purchase recommendation!

1112392085.text_en: In general it is a good dishwasher. I chose it because of the extra tray for cutlery and I think it is a very good option. The only reason for not rating it with 5 stars is that despite using the extra drying, everything does not come out dry (I understand that plastic utensils or similar come out somewhat damp, but they come out wet).

1145613138.text_en: Very complete and silent dishwasher. It has a great capacity inside. The mobile application is great to also be able to manage the programs and the duration and times. After evaluating various alternatives and brands, we decided on this one and we are very happy with the purchase and recommend its purchase.

1173147975.text_en: I have been using the dishwasher for several weeks and I am very happy. It has several programs and even in the short ones it cleans very well. It is very quiet, the fact that the upper tray has several positions is very comfortable, the arrangement of the baskets allows a lot of dishes to fit. So far very happy with the purchase, I recommend it.

1173112627.title_en: Excellent product. It's worth what it costs and more.
1173112627.text_en: Bosch is always a guarantee of quality and good performance and on this occasion it was no other way. I was tempted to save a little money, but seeing that my previous Bosch dishwasher had lasted 22 years (or more) I didn't want to risk it. And now after several weeks of use I am very satisfied with my purchase.

1162591832.text_en: Super quiet, and I haven't used the specific Silent Plus option. The only thing that doesn't satisfy me is that if you leave the door to open automatically at the end of the program, there is a lot of water condensation that ends up on the upper wood, but luckily it can be deactivated. Removing that detail is great

1158010088.title_en: DISHWASHER OF 10 AT A VERY COMPETITIVE PRICE
1158010088.text_en: Very quiet and efficient dishwasher with a variety of programs for all types of kitchenware. Important: It has a cutlery tray and the option to modify the height of the upper basket for cups and glasses to optimize filling. You can also program the wash by adjusting the delayed programming.

1168292090.text_en: We quickly decided on this dishwasher because 1. the quick installation without a professional, 2. the cost-effectiveness, 3. the ease of use and 4. the space in the dishwasher were important to us. The device fulfills all of these points with flying colors and we can always recommend it to others with a clear conscience.

1084304785.text_en: The washing machine was more expensive, but it is really worth the investment. When it is turned on slowly, you can't even hear it and what we like the most is that it is spacious and can fit a lot of dishes. We chose it to save energy and water, which we cannot assess at the moment, but we assume that the bills will be lower since we wash in it 1-2 times a day.

1144287696.text_en: I find this dishwasher great. What's great is the notification at the end of the cycle on the laptop, the cutlery drawer which saves a lot of space. Cleaning is great automatically The downside: the door is a little complicated to open, you have to open the dishwasher at the end of the cycle for drying.

1155389700.title_en: Dishwasher does what it's supposed to do
1155389700.text_en: We are very happy with our device. What we like best is the light that shows the dishwasher is in operation and that it is also drying. The instructions were brilliant because they also served as measurements. You could put it on the front and mark where you needed to drill.

1201770939.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is very quiet and nice. You can't hear it while it's working, so I turn it on whenever I want, it doesn't bother me even at night. Beautiful colors and elegant design, and every glass comes out shiny. Everything that gets dirty comes out of the machine shiny and without any stains. I regularly buy Bosch appliances and highly recommend them to everyone.

1134467089.text_en: The WORST dishwasher I've had in 30 years!!! Whatever the program, some of the dishes systematically come out DIRTY! A shame for a device of this price, I who thought I would get a major brand, I am very disappointed. Even the 200 € distributor brands washed better...

1153079875.text_en: For now it's great, the space is used much more than with our previous dishwasher, in addition the consumption is much better and on top of that the knives no longer rust. The app is wonderful, we have an appliance from another brand and there is no point of comparison, as soon as it breaks we will change it for a Bosh

1131775913.text_en: Quiet and fast. So far, I've only tried the quick 1-hour program and it's really great. Everything is washed, shiny and fragrant. I'm delighted with the additional shelf for storage and the movement of the upper basket up and down. Everything fits, you can adjust depending on whether you have more glasses or, for example, pots. Recommendations in any case

1153485433.text_en: Good dishwasher, cleaning is impeccable and the cutlery drawer makes it cleaner and easier to pick up, the Smartbox conect system makes life much easier by being able to connect it remotely and with notifications that indicate the lack of rinse aid salt or the completion of cleaning

1148762555.title_en: Excellent dishwasher, I can finally program it!
1148762555.text_en: I have been looking for a dishwasher for a long time where I could program the start time, and this product more than delivers. I can turn it on from the phone, 65º program in 1 hour and a 75º program that I have never seen. In addition, B energy efficiency at a more than competitive price. Very happy.

1131681341.text_en: I haven't been using the dishwasher for a long time but, for now, very happy. It has many programs and some more that can be downloaded with the Home Connect application. This application allows us to control the dishwasher, without having to open the door. The washing results are quite satisfactory.

1158325096.text_en: I bought a dishwasher from this company because I trust the Bosch brand. I think it will be failure-free like other devices from this company. A lot of washing programs and the ability to control it with a smartphone is very convenient for me. Very well made and gives the impression that the manufacturer took care of all the details

1150563015.text_en: It is a dishwasher connected to the internet, it allows you to view the time left in the program, even ask Alexa... A good option is to open the door for final drying.  although the remaining time or an indication of the program status is missing from the light indicator

1169201956.title_en: I love the thing about the door opening after
1169201956.text_en: What I like the most is once it's finished, the door opens by itself and I can put it in when I'm leaving for the weekend. Also the community and leaving it configured with the app is a point since it allows me to configure it based on the type of water, dirt... and you optimize the consumption to what you need

1158013017.text_en: I've had this appliance for about a month now and I'm certainly quite happy with how it works. It has more programs than my old dishwasher and I still need a little time to know which one is best for my use. Yes, it is true that I cannot get the dishes to stay very dry.

1172649586.text_en: I love this dishwasher model! It has a lot of space and washes super well. I like that it has a separate level, just for the cutlery - This way the cutlery comes out clean and there is also much more space for plates and pots (in other models the cutlery basket takes up a lot of space).

1155698047.text_en: After the previous BOSCH dishwasher had lasted us 16 years, continuity with this brand was beyond doubt. This is a very quiet and easy to use model. The third cutlery tray makes optimal use of dishwasher space. The dishes come out very clean.

1152932217.text_en: Totally meets my expectations. It is the second Bosch dishwasher, I retired the previous one due to changing the kitchen and it was a non-panelable model, but it is a magnificent device.  This new one is as quiet as the previous one and with a lot of new features that I hope to take advantage of more.

1151936197.text_en: I loved the level of drying achieved because even Tupperware brand products come out almost all dry.  On the other hand, the ECO program lasts more than 4 hours, which requires a time schedule if you do not want to find yourself at a meal without dishes available.

1137164378.text_en: I found the dishwasher to be very good, it has a wide variety of programs and is very effective even in short programs.  It leaves the dishes completely dry and shiny and is very quiet.  The third tray is very practical, because it leaves more space on the lower tray and thus more dishes can fit.

1169167333.text_en: It is a very good dishwasher, it is quiet and has plenty of space for cutlery and plates. It notifies you when it is finished washing with a red dot on the floor and the door automatically opens and thanks to that detail everything dries better. I love the Bosch brand. All my appliances are Bosch.

1131595286.text_en: Very simple to use and load with two baskets and a cutlery drawer for the different types of plates, bowls and cutlery. The baskets are very well designed to enable maximum capacity as is the cutlery drawer All items get throughly cleaned and dried. I am completely delighted with the results.

1161721833.text_en: I chose this model due to ergonomics and, as a blind person, very important for me, operation via physical buttons, which is rare in current devices, or via an application, which is also a convenience for people with my disability. I recommend it to everyone

1149596403.title_en: Why do they call it 4 when it could be 8?
1149596403.text_en: This dishwasher, due to its silence and efficiency in washing, makes me the happiest man in the world. Its operation and washing are incredible. All automatic programs work perfectly. It's impossible to be happier. As for its noise level...a 10...#likeabosch

1126986010.text_en: Very satisfied with the purchase. Great loading space thanks to the third basket. Multiple programs and combinations that make it more efficient in terms of water, electricity and time savings. Very quiet, you know it is working thanks to the red light. We will continue buying Bosch.

1143973793.text_en: Cleaning work is very good with this dishwasher, the height adjustment of the upper compartment is very practical, the cutlery drawer is also practical and saves time when clearing out.     The negative thing about this device is that the pump is quite loud when starting, so it's easy to hear.

1142832371.title_en: Dishes are clean, operation is easy
1142832371.text_en: Dishes get clean and even stubborn ones come off. Adjustable upper basket so that our large plates also fit below. Foldable divisions at the top are great. I'm missing it below. I already had that with a predecessor. So far no wear on the inside. Covering still great after years.

1144647182.text_en: The product is delivered without a front panel contrary to what is advertised. As a result, there is no counterweight on the door and it closes very violently (already 2 skinned knees). In short, it's an unfinished product. Avoid if you don't want to have an ugly and painful product.

1130853446.text_en: The best dishwasher on the market that is not appreciated because of how stealthy it works. Quality at a low price for the features it accumulates. It is without a doubt the best option for an integrated dishwasher. We searched and the best we found was the Seria 4 SMV4HCX48E dishwasher.

1148351748.text_en: The dishwasher is very quiet, the dishes are washed very thoroughly and the drawer on the pieces works very well, I highly recommend this dishwasher, I am happy with the purchase of this dishwasher, the automatic opening of the dishwasher is great. The home connect app is the icing on the cake, I highly recommend it.

1087127607.title_en: Great device, with a good price/performance ratio
1087127607.text_en: The device is quiet and also rinses very cleanly. The WLAN function is very helpful, the flushing process is visible at all times, the device automatically reports via the app if there is a problem, or if, for example, E.g. rinse aid etc. needs to be refilled.

1131677193.text_en: We were looking for a very quiet dishwasher, since we have the kitchen open to the living room, and this was one of the fundamental requirements. This appliance has more than met our expectations, both for how quiet it is and for its impeccable operation.

1178600443.text_en: After only a few weeks of use, the dishwasher developed a problem that the service was unable to detect or solve. Only after countless calls to both the store and the store's distributor (because the SAT refused to exchange it) was I able to exchange it for another one.

1176684772.text_en: The only complaint is that the picture shows that the hinged door has a white facet, and I received it without a facet (mask). I thought it was from the reseal when I saw the situation. It wasn't. It was brand new and well sealed, except it didn't have a facet. And this, of course, means an extra expense.

1153320867.text_en: Although it was purchased about 3 weeks ago, its use has been intensive due to the dates we have passed. The expectations generated have been met, a silent and effective dishwasher. Surely with its continued use little by little we will get its full potential and performance.

1130764320.text_en: A good dishwasher with a large capacity. We miss being able to select the washing temperature, although perhaps we haven't learned how to do it yet.  Pending integration of the door, it is not as quiet as the previous one. We hope that with the door it is.

1185640244.title_en: Wifi technology at Bosch at home
1185640244.text_en: It is incredibly useful to have appliances with WiFi access.  To be able to receive notifications when it needs to be cleaned, maintained or when the program has finished.  Or to know when you need to add more salt, detergent, etc.  I think this series from Bosch is extraordinary

1092562201.text_en: We replaced a Bosh dishwasher that has worked without problems for almost 20 years and only broke because my daughter fell on it.  We have purchased another Bosch, we are delighted with the dishwasher and we are sure that we can count on another 20 years of good service!

1177547971.text_en: The change has been enormous, compared to the previous one (it was another brand). The third cutlery tray is a success. So far very good. That it notifies the application to set the cleaning program is a success because that way you don't forget and you keep it cleaner.

1108136174.text_en: Our Tilly is super quiet and also runs quickly in the automatic program. The rinsing and drying results are convincing. In our five-person household it runs at least once a day. We're excited to see how long she lasts. Hopefully for a long time.

1161192347.text_en: It more than meets all the expectations I had. It can be operated with your mobile phone without having to read the instructions. And what the door will be like after the end of the cleaning cycle is a point since when you are going to place it everything is completely dry.

1152696916.text_en: It is a high quality dishwasher, very quiet and very easy to use. You have a sufficient number of programs and a very easy and intuitive control panel to use. Its consumption of both water and electricity is very tight. A highly recommended product.

1147178985.text_en: I have always found Bosch products to be above average! After using the service for the first time, I realized that I had made the right decision with Bosch. No matter what, I always choose Bosch and rightly so!

1146283775.text_en: We are very satisfied with the product. The dishwasher is very quiet. The fact that a red light on the floor lights up when it is running is also practical, so you know when it is finished. The workmanship is very high quality. It is very easy to open and close.

1168346888.text_en: Overall positive review. The device works quietly, the capacity is good, the adjustment options for the dish racks are good, and I particularly like the glass holders at the bottom. One point deducted for the fact that the WLAN connection often fails and has to be set up again

1199130302.title_en: washes well, is difficult to place tall glasses in
1199130302.text_en: washes fine, many programs to choose from, but it cannot hold as much as my old machine, although this machine should be able to wash the same number of curves as my old machine. It is, among other things, difficult to find space for the same number of glasses per dishes

1141614175.text_en: The dishwasher is really great. He cleans everything the way it should be. Everything will be clean and dry. Plastic also gets really dry if you select Extra Dry. Home Connect also works perfectly. Good product at a good price.

1132054949.text_en: Very quiet dishwasher, you can barely hear it when it is running. It has a red light that points to the ground and indicates when it is in operation. The third cutlery tray is a success for convenience and capacity.  Very satisfied with the purchase.

1173861954.text_en: I recommend purchasing this dishwasher. It's amazing. It is very roomy, which is really important when there are 5 people in the house. It is quiet and economical because it is tilted when drying. Moreover, it is made very solidly, especially inside. I wholeheartedly recommend the purchase!

1176729707.text_en: I am extremely satisfied with the product. I would especially like to point out different work programs and economy. It works quietly. There is enough space for larger dishes. I especially liked the basket with accessories because it is practical, I have not had the opportunity to use a similar one until now.

1157922115.title_en: What I was looking for in a dishwasher
1157922115.text_en: This is the first time I have tried the Bosch brand and I have to say that this dishwasher has pleasantly surprised me. I see that it is a quality appliance. If it turns out well, I will repeat the brand. For now the result is satisfactory. Totally recommended.

1131469484.text_en: I love this dishwasher, its capacity, the programs it offers but above all, how clean it leaves the glasses and pots.  Their ECO program is also an advantage.  I haven't added it to my wireless connections yet but I'm looking forward to it.

1119251510.text_en: I can only rave about the excellent efficiency and the excellent results. Compared to our predecessor, the space is used much more intelligently. The cleanliness is impressive and the intelligent features are a real innovation!

1129485684.text_en: It is the quietest dishwasher I have seen to date. Shares a wall with a room. Silence was our priority when purchasing this appliance and it did not disappoint us.   It has good capacity for a family and the cleanliness is good.

1137314554.text_en: Very good dishwasher that I have had since 2021, super practical application apart from the fact that to date it no longer works having changed internet operator, it is impossible to reset the dishwasher application which is of no use. Is this really useful?

1121281381.title_en: Great device at a reasonable price.
1121281381.text_en: After our 9-year-old dishwasher completely gave up the ghost, we quickly looked for a replacement. Based on the various reviews and test reports, we decided on this device and are very satisfied with it after 3 weeks of testing.

1173140105.text_en: It is very quiet, in the Eco program it leaves the dishes perfect, the program adjusts to the dirt to be cleaned, it always finishes before the standard time. I was surprised that it opens on its own, but it leaves everything perfectly clean, dry and shiny.  Excellent.

1147348521.text_en: Although I have to test it thoroughly and get used to it, the finishes are excellent and the acoustic level is imperceptible. If it continues at the level of all the brand's appliances that exist and have existed at home, for me it will continue to be the reference brand.

1118639975.text_en: I am super happy with the dishwasher as it is very quiet and was very easy to set up. It also has Home Connect, which is quite an advantage for me as it can also be controlled via the app.  Clear purchase recommendation.

1155674332.title_en: The dishwasher you are looking for
1155674332.text_en: Starting with good design and functionality, going through noiselessness and in this case good energy efficiency. Bosch does not neglect its good reputation in household appliances and continues to deliver. Let's hope it lasts for many years and we will trust as before.

1088535370.text_en: An excellent selection made in Germany, spacious, large, quiet in operation... for the assembly, I used an authorized service technician, BRATOM Servis from Veliko Polje, who installed the device in a short time and who also gave important advice when using the device for the first time... I recommend it.

1171834185.text_en: High-performance dishwasher: low noise, programmable, washes well but... After 3 months already a part to change After 6 another part After 10 an update...... On the other hand, excellent after-sales service:!!!!!! and fortunately :-)

1161108375.text_en: It's fine for now, everything cleans up, the top drawer is easy to load and unload - much better than the cutlery basket I had in my previous dishwasher. It could be a bit quieter, it's not loud, but I expected 42dB to be almost silent.

1128399354.text_en: I bought this dishwasher for my second home because the other one I have is also Bosch and I love how quiet it is and how it leaves everything very clean. In addition, the half-load program also works very well for when there are few of us at home.

1157157618.text_en: Good evening!! My experience with the new appliance is very encouraging. It meets the required expectations. I have only had it for a few days but I am very satisfied. I hope it turns out as good as other BOSCH appliances I have had.

1123690650.text_en: After 1 month of using my Bosch SMV4HCX48E, I am extremely disappointed. It washes very poorly, whatever the program, whatever the tablets. Disappointing for a machine costing almost 1000 euros. This is the first and last time!

1198800431.text_en: I sent the purchase receipt up to 6 times to receive the €100 refund. El Corte Inglés itself told me it was a scam. They even gave me 3 different invoices and there was always an excuse. I will never buy the Bosch brand again.

1176741270.text_en: I like how it washes, it's silent and the fact that I can see from the phone what stage it is in and especially to choose options while running is a big plus. Connectivity also offers the possibility of discovering what the dishwasher can do

1102929923.text_en: Nice quiet dishwasher. What is unfortunately not entirely expected is that if you use the hot setting, plastic dishes are not properly dried when the program has ended. I have to empty the device with a tea towel in hand.

1102927855.text_en: Nice quiet dishwasher. What is unfortunately not entirely expected is that if you use the hot setting, plastic dishes are not properly dried when the program has ended. I have to empty the device with a tea towel in hand.

1142149764.text_en: Doing enough work, I use it almost every day, nothing to report on its use. I think it only lacks a very short cycle to wash the dishes which are extremely dirty from you well and do not clog.

1164177600.text_en: Compared to the one we replaced, it has a lot of capacity. We liked the cutlery tray. It's very quiet. As a negative point, comment that it does not dry at all. Otherwise, very happy with the purchase. I recommend it.

1154611740.text_en: Very happy with the dishwasher, I already put it on at night as it is so quiet, it leaves the dishes super shiny, when finished the door opens automatically for low consumption drying, the 3 cutlery tray is great and very comfortable

1127166858.text_en: We are a household of five with correspondingly dirty dishes. After a few tests with cleaning and a suitable washing program, everything works perfectly. Cleans well. It's quiet and for me it's the price/performance winner.

1173376257.title_en: Ease of handling and washing quality.
1173376257.text_en: A dishwasher with functions that help you save on a daily basis. With the app you can choose the best schedule based on the energy cost of the moment. In addition to being a very quiet dishwasher, it washes very well. 100% recommended

1131796931.title_en: Very good Dishwasher / connectivity needs improvement
1131796931.text_en: Good, rather qualitative dishwasher. not a bad program and quite effective. the connection side however needs to be improved because it is quite complicated to initialize for the first connection (I spent more than two hours the first time)

1153907877.text_en: I've only had it for a month and it's very good, in terms of capacity, washing cycles and ease of setting them up.   I only miss one little thing, and it is rubber-type details to protect glassware, the accessory for tall bottles and little else.

1149415391.text_en: Having owned dishwashers for most of my life, I was really looking forward to finally having my own Bosch. If you're like me, having a dishwasher still means pre-washing dishes or suffering from the heat-dried remains of last night's dinner on plates, pans, and bowls. With Bosch, it's time to break the habit, save some water and let the appliance do the work. After all, you don't pre-wash your clothes by hand and then throw them in the washing machine; The washing machine is simply left to do what it was designed to do. This Bosch dishwasher is amazing! We tried it after a tomato- and cheese-heavy Italian meal, which is usually one of the trickiest messes to clean up. While I couldn't help but wipe off the worst of the grease and bolognese, I didn't rinse them and just put them on. An hour later, they came out of the machine shiny, smelling great and with no trace of red. sauce, grease or stuck to cheese! Put your energy and love into cooking and let your Bosch dishwasher take care of the cleaning. Oh, and did I mention I drove the cycle from the couch? Home Connect is wonderful. Totally recommended!

1130140716.text_en: Bosch SGV4HCX48E Since Black Friday, we have had our new Bosch SGV4HCX48E in operation.  So far we are very satisfied, even the "plastic dishes" are much drier than with our Electrolux, which is only 11 years old, and which has simply said goodbye from now on - it was probably due to the electronics... After the dB is so quiet, we listen to see whether the device is actually switched on, you could even leave the kitchen door open.    Unfortunately, the signal volume when switched off is far too quiet for this even though we have set it to position b03?!. The dishwasher is fully integrated?!.     Unfortunately, we didn't have a display for the rinse aid on the Electrolux, so we filled it up every 14 days and the salt display only came on every 5 - 6 - 7 months.    Now I'm curious what it's like at Bosch?!.  The instructions for use contain some very vague information about the time of the program, but unfortunately it's a bit too little - how often you have to refill the rinse aid or salt certainly depends on how often you wash?  Our dishwasher is only turned on about every 3 days, there are only 2 of us.

1150805437.title_en: Very good except for the cutlery compartment
1150805437.text_en: The dishwasher was installed very quickly thanks to the assembly service, the division in the plate compartment is great, pots can be put away quickly and easily by folding down the division, and there are holders for folding out glass carafes or large wine glasses in the same compartment. The same holders can be found in the height-adjustable middle compartment for glasses and bowls. Here too, the right side can be easily folded down and the cutlery compartment is at a decent height and is easy to put away. The cleaning performance is great and everything gets clean without any problems. Unfortunately, there are spoons in the cutlery compartment. Normal dirt is not a problem, but rice or egg residue is a real problem and doesn't go away. On the whole, however, this is not a problem with a short pre-rinse. The app connection also works great. The only thing that should be communicated in the instructions is that the router must be switched to WPS mode to establish the connection. Unfortunately, this was not communicated and I was only able to find out through the internet. Overall, we are very satisfied and would recommend him without reservation except for the points mentioned!
