1182033507.title_en: We wanted Ack's consumption, so we have it
1182033507.text_en: We wanted Ack's consumption and it would also be a bit smart. This model met all our requirements. The only thing that is a little bit wrong with us is the numerical derating on the floor, but it was replaced by a light indicator on the floor. The installation in the kitchen unit was easy and the QR codes and video instructions were great. I recommend.

1183695954.text_en: We are satisfied, especially the wife. Quiet and smooth operation. Plenty of space for cutlery and other kitchen utensils.

1218578803.text_en: Clever and very surprisingly very quiet dishwasher, I recommend it if you have a living room with a kitchen. Great variability of settings for both operation and programs, clear app with additional options. Super sound and light signaling, the possibility to see the progress of washing via the app with the remaining time. Internal variable arrangement with the possibility of folding for pots, height adjustment. The quality of the processing of the thermoplastic surface of the baskets looks like it should last a long time. I'll buy the forehead and it's perfect.

1207895205.text_en: The dishwasher is the perfect choice for us so far. We have used it every day since we bought it, even without the final door from the joiner, and it works flawlessly. The dishwasher has many useful functions, thanks to which it can be adapted to different types of dishes and soiling.  I especially appreciate the 3 extra nozzles in the middle drawer - a great thing if you need to clean burnt pots or pans with quality. The washing is thorough, the programs are well set and the consumption remains reasonable.  A big plus is also the stainless steel tub, which looks high-quality, durable and guarantees a long service life. Overall, we are very satisfied with the choice and I can honestly recommend this model to anyone looking for a reliable, functionally rich and quiet dishwasher.

1218479801.text_en: We are very satisfied with the Bosch dishwasher. It has simple controls, so using it is hassle-free. The Home Connect application is also a big plus, thanks to which control is even more convenient, clearer and you can control everything even via mobile. The dishwasher works reliably and the dishes are always beautifully clean. We definitely recommend.

1220508446.text_en: We bought a Bosch built-in dishwasher again and I cannot fault its quality. We have already for the second time. The first one lasted us 15 years.   It is quiet, washes perfectly, the cutlery organizer and the easy filter cleaning are great. Clear display and washing signal (red dot shines directly on the floor). I also like the height adjustment of the washing baskets, as we have a tall teapot. Conversely, the upper basket can be lowered for wine glasses.   It holds a lot of dishes, doesn't leave stains on the glasses, and the adjustable pressure or eco wash has no competition. Newly, you can also set it to open after washing, which is a signal even for children that it should be cleaned :) I definitely recommend the product with all ten. I did not find any disadvantages even with the new or older type.

1182756925.text_en: we bought a bosch smv4ecx27e built-in dishwasher and we couldn't have bought anything better, absolute satisfaction, excellent, economical, quiet.

1220168781.text_en: I have been testing the Bosch 4 series dishwasher for several days. Surprisingly quiet operation. Many program modes with different operating times and temperatures up to 70 degrees. After washing is completed, the hinged door function operates. The operation of the dishwasher is indicated by a red diode displayed on the floor. I tested various programs, including the longest Eco mode, the dishes were well washed and dried without streaks and streaks. The dishwasher has a third drawer for cutlery. Drawers slide out easily. Possibility to control the dishwasher from a telephone application. The device has the ability to program your favorite washing function. I recommend it.#opinionmotivationalpromotion

1180943598.text_en: I have been using the Bosch SMV4ecx27E dishwasher for several days now and I am very satisfied with it.  The washing machine is quiet, efficient and has many useful functions. I appreciate the SpeedPerfect+ function the most, which makes washing dishes much easier.  The dishwasher is more expensive than other models, but I think it is worth investing in a quality appliance that will serve you for many years.  I would recommend the Bosch SMV4ecx27E dishwasher to anyone looking for a quality and reliable dishwasher.

1180585925.text_en: Bosch dishwashers are a sure bet. It's our second Bosch built-in sink, so we knew what we were getting into. Compared to the previous model, it is subjectively quieter, and I personally like the automatic door opening function after the program is finished.  I'm not a fan of IoT, so I don't really like the mandatory driving in the form of an Internet connection, but it can be useful when solving problems, or there is an option to download specialized washing programs (although I don't think I would need it, but it might come in handy).  Adjusting the height of the second hood is extremely easy, since there is also a third accessory, so it is inevitable... I am looking forward to the next decade with Bosch.

1218949473.text_en: Our dishwasher recently broke down and because I only wanted the best, most solid appliance in our kitchen, this appliance was chosen partly due to our satisfaction and good experiences with our Bosch dryer and washing machine from the Home Professional Line. What is immediately noticeable is the nice, solid finish and it is a very quiet machine with a larger capacity than our previous device. You can also immediately see from the layout and finish inside that it is a very high-quality machine that stands out. Very happy with our choice for this Bosch. Enjoy it for years to come.

1203784386.text_en: We decided on this dishwasher because we already have a proven Bosch brand, which is very reliable. Compared to the older model, it has added functions - such as automatic door opening, variability of the interior space... I highly recommend it.

1207234671.text_en: A competing brand broke on us 3 months after the two-year warranty. When the repairman told us that the repair would cost almost the same as the dishwasher, we asked which one we should buy new, that is, which dishwashers he repairs the least. He didn't even let us finish and said "Bosch." So we've had the dishwasher for a week and I'm absolutely thrilled. It washes much better, it can fit almost twice as many things as before and it is INCREDIBLY QUIET (I have had many dishwashers in my life, but this one blew my mind, even though there is a red light, otherwise I wouldn't know it was running). Assembly was a bit of a pain, the instructions are not entirely intuitive, but the man managed it himself. We have never had anything from Bosch, but after the experience with the dishwasher, there will probably be more from them. Now we just hope it lasts more than 2 years.   + very quiet operation + large capacity + washes without a mistake so far + washing signal with a light + catch basket on the tablet + consumption - slightly chaotic installation instructions - the cutlery drawer is fluffy and sometimes difficult to pull out - applications and internet connection (we don't like IoT, AI and "smart" appliances)

1206521232.text_en: Dishwasher with nice dising, but above all programs suitable for our family. Energy saving and lower water consumption were the priorities when choosing. Drying process by opening the door after washing.

1183217189.text_en: It washes perfectly. Super functions... shortening the program, extra drying, intensive zone for extra dirty dishes... a large selection of programs. The cutlery drawer is top. It is spacious... very quiet. We are very satisfied

1207610648.text_en: We bought the dishwasher based on previous positive experiences, we had a narrow 45 cm, due to the larger family it was time for a 60 cm. We like the quality and control via the app.

1217055299.text_en: After the recommendation of the family, our first dishwasher at home, in terms of appearance and quality, it is excellent and above all, it is functional and easy to use, and I am not talking about the mowing inside... satisfaction

1206611053.text_en: After many years, we had to say goodbye to our original BOSCH dishwasher. The choice fell on SMV4ECX27E. Installation was easy thanks to detailed instructions and QR codes. After a few days I can express my satisfaction. The dishwasher is quiet, we hardly even know about it. The dishes are washed and dried perfectly. I'm a bit bothered by the number of functions and settings, I would like easier control, because I only need to wash the dishes, not fly into space. But that's the only minus. The design is robust and looks nice. Overall assessment: BOSCH once again confirmed that it can make an excellent appliance. I highly recommend it.

1208852692.text_en: A great helper for a new kitchen. Only positives so far. Low noise, washes great. Ease of use Everything I expected from the Bosch brand was fulfilled 😉

1182503864.text_en: I am very satisfied with the dishwasher and I really appreciate the upper part for the cutlery and the self-opening of the door at the end of the washing program. She is great.

1219103784.text_en: Great dishwasher, very functional, automatic door opening, standard buttons, simple and trouble-free operation. Quiet operation

1207596385.text_en: The product is wonderful. The device operates quietly, washes dishes very well and has a fantastic 3rd cutlery drawer.

1182899483.text_en: I am very satisfied with the dishwasher, I appreciate the top drawer for cutlery and the automatic opening of the door at the end of the washing cycle.

1182064909.text_en: I am very satisfied with the fully built-in Bosh dishwasher, it meets my expectations and I definitely recommend it.

1208966500.title_en: A great replacement for an old dishwasher
1208966500.text_en: High-quality and thorough washing of dishes is the most important function for me, and this dishwasher fulfills it perfectly. I appreciate the fast washing thanks to the VarioSpeed ​​Plus function, the automatic door opening and the very simple operation. I give it 5* and I believe it will serve as long as possible.

1219718309.text_en: The washing machine is very quiet, but we were unlucky and it broke down in 8 days

1202022228.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion Great dishwasher, I already have 2, I recommend it

1218748587.text_en: The best dishwasher I've ever had

1219732730.text_en: Top dishwasher, a very good purchase

1180329297.text_en: After a long decision on which dishwasher to choose for the new kitchen, we finally chose the Bosch dishwasher, which is known for its quality and reasonable price.   This is a built-in version.  After installation and start-up, the dishwasher is pleasantly quiet.   Top control is simple via buttons and has a clear display.   Everything is intuitive and completely logical. The interior is well organized, if the plates are taller, simply move the middle compartment higher. There is also a projected control light on the floor about the operation of the dishwasher. The overall workmanship is up to par.  Exemplary noise reduction and good processing.

1217168816.text_en: This is my first dishwasher and I am really very pleased with the purchase. The assembly turned out to be very easy, everything was well described and it was installed without any problems. The dishwasher works great - the dishes are perfectly washed, even with a full load. It is also surprisingly quiet, so you can easily turn it on in the evening without any noise in the apartment.  A big plus is the intuitive operation and practical interior - everything is easy to arrange and holds more than you think. The automatic door opening function after washing also works well because the dishes dry well. For my first dishwasher, I'm really positively surprised - it makes life easier and works without any problems. I recommend it with a clear conscience 😊 #opinionmotivated by promotion

1208711363.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I am very pleased with the purchase of the Bosch SMV4ECX27E dishwasher. The device operates exceptionally quietly, and the dishes are perfectly clean and dry after each cycle - even with eco programs. A big advantage is the capacity and well-designed baskets that can be easily adapted to various dishes. The operation is intuitive, and the ability to control it via the Home Connect application is a great convenience. The dishwasher looks solid and seems very well made. I definitely recommend it - Bosch quality is as always high.

1203442679.text_en: Before the renovation of the kitchen, we were looking for a replacement for the original narrow dishwasher 45. I looked for certainty with the proven BOSCH brand, from which I have several appliances and have only had good experiences with them, we invested in this model due to the great functions that the appliance offers. Due to the large number of positive reviews and energy class A, we chose this type due to the stainless steel bottom of the dishwasher.  ADVANTAGES: Compared to the previous dishwasher, great success when washing cutlery, Very quiet operation, Economy class, Light signaling on the floor, Control via application, ...

1208397397.text_en: I wanted a dishwasher that would wash dishes without having to wash the dishes by hand first. This one is just like that, all you have to do is scoop up the leftovers and the dishwasher will do the rest. In the previous dishwasher from a different company, I had to wash the dishes under running water, put almost clean dishes in the dishwasher, and they were still dirty after washing. In this Bosh dishwasher, even the oven-proof dish was almost perfectly clean.   Advantages: - cleans without any problems;  - the holes in the washer nozzles do not get clogged;  - the door opens automatically, so the dishes are dry or almost dry in the morning;  - high drying temperature;  - I think it has more capacity than the previous dishwasher from another company.  The downside may be its loudness. It's not quiet, but it's not loud either.   I am very satisfied.

1219205123.title_en: I recommend it - it washes very well
1219205123.text_en: I am very pleased with this dishwasher. The device washes dishes very well, even with more dirty pots and plates. It works quietly and is practically inaudible, which is of great importance in an open kitchen.  The assembly was carried out without any problems, and the operation of the device is intuitive and convenient. The programs are clear and using the dishwasher on a daily basis is very comfortable.  A big plus is the mobile application, which informs, for example, about the end of washing. This is a very practical solution.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1202967319.text_en: Very solid dishwasher. It is well soundproofed and the entire interior is made of stainless steel, which is no longer standard. Very roomy. Most of the elements in the lower and upper drawers are foldable, which allows for great flexibility. I am very pleased with the purchase.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1208993943.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion* I bought this model on November 3, 2025, so I can say that it is a device that meets all expectations. What was important to me was quiet operation because I have a kitchen connected to the living room. When watching movies, you can't hear the dishwasher at all. Another additional function is automatic opening, which I did not have in the previous dishwasher of this brand. Everything is working out nicely - I am very satisfied.  The previous model lasted 13 years, I hope it will be similar in this case.

1206631907.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion Very functional dishwasher. Adjusting the height of the upper basket - a great thing. The choice of programs is a plus - everything is thoroughly washed, even on the shortest one. The biggest advantage of the dishwasher is the cutlery drawer. This makes unloading the dishwasher very easy.

1218219779.text_en: The dishwasher was recently purchased and installed. First impressions are definitely a plus - the quality of workmanship is as expected from Bosch, refined details, solid hinges, sensible arrangement of baskets. I'm happy with a cutlery drawer instead of a basket, because it saves space when built-in. Features that convinced me: automatic door opening (drying without streaks), class A, Home Connect. At this price, it is very difficult to find something better in the 60 cm built-in segment. 5/5 for now. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1218243254.text_en: I am very pleased with the purchase of the Bosh SMV4ECX27E dishwasher. The dishwasher washes dishes perfectly. It does not leave streaks on glasses and plastic containers thanks to more efficient drying and automatic door opening. It is very roomy - there is no problem with loading really tall pots in the lower drawer - it was a pleasant surprise for me when pots that did not fit in the previous dishwasher can be washed in the new dishwasher without any problems. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207248803.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion I am very pleased with the purchase, despite the large number of dishes, everything fits without any major problems, super-adapted washing programs are another advantage of this dishwasher. The interior of the dishwasher is tastefully designed and looks very nice. It is very, very easy to use, which is an additional advantage. The baskets slide out very smoothly, there are no creaks or squeaks, the dishwasher is barely audible during operation, a strong 5 in my opinion!

1201662976.text_en: This is my second BOSH dishwasher. The previous one worked for 14 years and I was very pleased with it.  I decided to buy it because of its quiet operation and high energy class.  Thanks to the additional cutlery drawer, there is a little more space in the lower drawer.   First impressions are very positive.  High ergonomics of use, quiet operation, capacity and functionality - all this made me satisfied with the purchase.  #opinionmotivated by promotion*

1202434718.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion A very good model of the Bosh dishwasher, I highly recommend it to everyone

1182801285.text_en: We are always very satisfied with Bosch products and have purchased a Bosch dishwasher for the second time. One of the biggest pluses of this built-in dishwasher is its great performance. The dishes are always perfectly washed and dried, without food residues or streaks. Other advantages are its quiet operation and capacity. Thanks to spacious baskets and flexible storage options, even larger pots and pans can be washed.   Last but not least, we also appreciate the possibility of using control via a mobile application.

1183490775.title_en: If you have a dishwasher, it's only Bosch!!!
1183490775.text_en: This is the second Bosch dishwasher (the previous one worked for 12 years - it had several breakdowns :(). The dishwasher washes dishes very well (unlike the Samsung dishwasher, which I used for 2 days and had to return). The additional Extra Clean zone is great. Very roomy, many options - half loading, opening the door, extra drying. Another very nice thing is the application where you can view the condition of the dishwasher and change options. I highly recommend it!!

1218256612.text_en: I am very pleased with the purchase of this dishwasher. The dishwasher washes dishes perfectly. It does not leave streaks on glasses and plastic containers thanks to more efficient drying and automatic door opening. It is very roomy - there is no problem with loading really tall pots in the lower drawer. The energy class A also convinced me to buy it. A great dishwasher at a really good price. I recommend!!!  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1219941875.title_en: Bosch is the definition of quality
1219941875.text_en: Bosch is the true definition of a modern and refined dishwasher. The equipment operates very quietly, washes dishes very well and is very convenient in everyday use. The automatic door opening at the end of the program is a brilliant feature, as is the cutlery drawer and remote control via the app. Everything works smoothly and without any problems, and the quality of workmanship immediately impresses. You can see what you pay for. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1217810829.text_en: After 2 days of using the BOSCH Serie 4 SMV4ECX27E dishwasher, my first impressions are positive. Previously, I had been using another Bosch model for 9 years, so I decided to choose this brand again. The dishwasher works quietly, washes dishes effectively and is convenient to use. Additionally, the interior is well designed, which makes it easier to arrange dishes. There will still be time for the final evaluation, but I think the beginning of use is very good.

1207178522.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion.  The Bosch dishwasher is our new housewife. A very important function for us is the automatic opening of the door after the washing cycle, we do not have to wait for the end of its operation as before. The dishes are perfectly clean, another advantage is the cutlery drawer, which holds a lot of them and gives us more space for other dishes. I highly recommend this dishwasher because it makes everyday functioning easier.

1220730131.text_en: The dishwasher really pleasantly surprised me. It is very quiet during operation, so we can turn it on in the evening without any disturbance. The dishes come out completely clean and dry after washing, even with heavily soiled pots and pans. I especially like that there is enough space for larger dishes and that the shelves can be easily adjusted.    The programs are easy to use. So far, I am very satisfied with the device and would recommend it to others.

1217295139.text_en: This is my third dishwasher in my life. I returned from a competing dishwasher that did not wash dishes to Bosch and I am extremely satisfied. The cutlery is finally perfectly clean, the well-planned space for the dishes and the quiet operation make me feel that it was a very good choice. We cannot forget about the physical buttons, which are comfortable to use and do not break like some touch buttons.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1217482069.text_en: This is our second Bosch and once again we were not disappointed. The dishwasher is great!  Quiet mode: A brilliant solution - I put the washing machine on overnight and I don't hear it at all.  Capacity: Very well-thought-out interior, even large pizza plates fit easily.  Quality: Washes perfectly, the dishes are shiny and streak-free.  I sincerely recommend it to anyone who is looking for proven and quiet equipment that will last for years!

1182961186.text_en: I repeatedly bet on a proven brand and chose a more expensive model because it is all stainless steel. Cheaper models have a plastic bottom. The dishwasher even offers many programs to the point that it seems rather extroverted, with a suitably chosen program we can easily achieve beautiful clean and dry dishes. If we have dirtier dishes, he has a place for such dishes, where he directs his attention and carefully cleans them, like a glass or a plate. I haven't had time to try it yet, but thanks to the Alexa app, the dishwasher can be connected to Home Connec and we can give the dishwasher a command to start working :D, which I'm looking forward to. Perhaps he will also want to explain that artificial intelligence is not so limited. The dishwasher has many programs, but others can be downloaded in the Home connect application. I don't have to worry about rust, because there is a 10-year guarantee that it will last :-) and I also don't have to worry about putting a lot of something in there, because the dishwasher dispenses the cleaning agent itself. So the dried tablets that haven't dissolved already fall out :) One joy, I just hope that the dream will last for many years and she will like it here :D

But what I have already noticed is that I can write that the dishwasher runs relatively quietly, the drawers are very nice and smooth, there is a small minus that there is no short wash for 30 minutes, but it is very easy to fill the container with salt. A plus for the extra space for placing a capsule in the dishwasher, I miss the light with the time display, but I can somehow survive. In fact, I knew this before the purchase, compared to my previous medal from another manufacturer, after the squeaking of today's washing, the glasses were completely clean, I was also satisfied with the installation and the bringing and taking of the previous model. so the cooperation with the store was correct. That's all for now after one day of use. Here's a tidied up and more natural-sounding version of your opinion: I've only had the dishwasher today, so for now I can only share my first impressions. Right from the beginning I noticed that it works relatively quietly and the drawers move very lightly and smoothly, which is a big plus.    The only downside is the lack of a short 30-minute program. In turn, filling the salt container is very convenient. I also like the additional space for a dishwasher capsule - it's a practical solution.    I miss the time display a bit, but I knew about it before purchasing it, so it's not a big surprise.    After the first wash, I am satisfied - the glasses were washed perfectly. Compared to my previous model (from another manufacturer), it looks very good.    The order processing was also a plus - installation, bringing in the equipment and taking away the old dishwasher went smoothly and without any problems. Cooperation with the store was at a high level.    That's it for now - I will be able to say more after longer use.

1182895136.text_en: Dishwasher large enough to handle everyday life, with very good finishes. It has room to pair all types of utensils, the second tray is adjustable in height and it is highly recommended to order it with the third tray for kitchen utensils, it saves you time and cleaning is more efficient. It is very well connected to the Home Connect app where all the programs, assistants, options, etc. are. Being able to connect it remotely is a bonus, since it tells you the cost of the appliance and if you have to leave the house, you have the option of turning it on during the time period that interests you most. 100% recommended.

1206800756.text_en: Without a doubt, a dishwasher that meets the standards that one can expect from a brand like BOSCH.  Very quiet and it is also class A. To give an example, I come from an Ariston Class A+++ and in the eco program it had a consumption of 0.83kwh, when this Bosch model consumes 0.55kwh with a longer duration and only 9 liters of water.  It also has an App to control it remotely.  Operating indicator light etc.  We are very happy with our purchase.

1194876062.text_en: After 23 years with a Bosch dishwasher, the time has come to change it. I continue with the same brand because of the trust and reliability it has given me. The incorporation of the third tray for cutlery is totally a success, since the cutlery comes out cleaner.  I must highlight that the extra drying function improves the drying of plastics.  The connectivity with the Home Connect App is a great advantage, which allows you to control and supervise the washing from your mobile phone.  In short, very happy with the new model purchased.

Overall, we are very satisfied with the new Bosch dishwasher and once again it was confirmed that the choice of this brand was correct.

1206806456.text_en: My experience with the BOSCH Series 4 SMV4ECX28E dishwasher has been very positive. What I liked least is that the Eco cycle, although very efficient, is quite long, something common in low consumption programs. I would recommend it because it offers an excellent combination of low consumption, good washing performance, silence and modern functionalities. It is ideal for those looking for daily convenience, reliable results and a durable appliance from a renowned brand.

1217465336.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I value the Bosch Series 4 dishwasher for its high energy efficiency and quiet operation. It is a solid choice for modern kitchens. The SpeedPerfect Plus function shortens the washing time. In terms of washing efficiency, the dishes are dazzlingly clean. The EfficientDry technology automatically opens the door after washing, which allows the dishes to dry. Using the dishwasher is surprisingly simple and the panel is clear.  In one word, it is quiet and solid equipment that has passed the test in everyday use.

1202274047.title_en: practical and versatile with some problems
1202274047.text_en: The three trays allow a good distribution of the kitchen items that we use at home. Very easy to install and install the front panel. Its operation is intuitive. The drawbacks are the automatic opening that, for built-in dishwashers, causes high-temperature steam to the built-in coating; If this coating is natural, such as wood veneer or wood, it causes serious damage and degrades in a short time. This type of opening should be exclusive to non-integrable versions. I understand that BOSCH thinks about the quality of the wash, but it also has to worry about the environment where it can be installed, especially if it is an integrated appliance.

1218964845.text_en: The BOSCH SMV4ECX28E dishwasher is a very successful purchase that significantly facilitates everyday functioning. I definitely recommend this model to anyone looking for a reliable dishwasher for their kitchen.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1197860035.title_en: Failure to enter and start up
1197860035.text_en: Very friendly treatment. But the cover of the downspout of the closets resists because two rusty screws do not come out. It seems that I have to remove them myself, call again and wait another 6 days with the new dishwasher in the middle of the dining room and the old one not removed, having paid for both services. I have requested a refund for non-compliance with deadlines, integration and withdrawal within 72 hours, since removing two screws that resist from a downspout is a minor sin for an installer, although I point out their seriousness and kind attention. A shame because for me the added values ​​make me decide whether or not to make a purchase. Thanks for the attention

1178613568.text_en: Well, it turns out that we already come from a dishwasher in the group, a Siemens that passed away after a few years, really. Well... if you want it not to be heard too much, you have to do engineering and a master's degree in Tetris to be able to put the pots, plates, glasses and other utensils to wash.    If you don't do it correctly, you run the risk of having to put on earplugs because of the noise and knocking that the device makes, and this is literal.

I also took advantage of the interruption of the program when I had to leave. I don't like to leave the appliance on when I leave the house. I will definitely trust the Bosch brand in the future. 1216603709.title_en: Beautiful drying results and wonderfully quiet
1216603709.text_en: The Bosch Series 4 (SMV4ECX28E) exceeds my expectations, especially in terms of drying performance and ease of use. If you are looking for a dishwasher that simply does what it promises, then this is a bull's eye.  Why I give 5 stars: • EfficientDry (Automatic door opening): This is the biggest gain for me. At the end of the program, the door automatically opens ajar. This means that the dishes (even plastic containers) dry much better in the air and the machine always smells fresh.  • Flex baskets and VarioLade: The layout is very flexible. The cutlery drawer at the top saves a lot of space in the lower basket, allowing me to store large pans and plates without any problems.  • Home Connect: I initially thought that an app was unnecessary, but it is extremely useful to receive a notification on my phone when the tablets are almost empty or when the program is ready.  • Silence: At 42 decibels I can barely hear it running in my open kitchen. The red light point on the floor (InfoLight) is therefore essential to see whether he is still busy.  Conclusion: A very solid German machine that combines modern convenience with a sparkling clean result. The value for money of this Series 4 is simply excellent. Definitely recommended for every household!

1221562199.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion Loudness - 42 dB, so it's really quiet and doesn't bother me. Automatic door opening at the end of the program actually improves the drying of dishes, although it does not always work. A useful additional option for drying dishes, although not super efficient.  The third cutlery drawer provides more space in the lower basket. Home Connect is an add-on you can live without, but the ability to check the washing status from your phone can be convenient. It has a large capacity. However, it does not fit glasses, especially taller ones.  Using the application and configuring Wi-Fi for the first time is a bit of a problem.  Unfortunately, the programs are very long. ECO is economical but long lasting.   There is no program, e.g. 30 minutes long.  However, overall it is a good and solid device.

1203466215.text_en: I bought the integrated dishwasher - Bosch SMV4ECX28E, Series 4, 14 services, 6 programs, 60 cm, Home Connect, Silence Plus, Without paneling a few weeks ago and at the moment I am very happy with it, it is a very quiet dishwasher and with multiple washing programs to adapt to your needs at all times, it also includes the possibility of controlling it from your mobile phone, but I cannot rate this option since I have not used it yet, in short a good product that fulfills its purpose of excellent shape, totally recommended.

1197754605.title_en: BOSCH SERIES 4 DISHWASHER VERY GOOD OPERATION
1197754605.text_en: I had a Bosch dishwasher that has worked very well for me for 19 years and I decided to trust Bosch again by purchasing this Bosch series 4 integrated dishwasher a few days ago. The first impressions are fantastic, it has a program that lasts only 1:30 hours which is already enough for the dishes and cutlery to be very clean and dry. When you start any program, a small red light focused on the floor illuminates so you know that the dishwasher is running and when the program ends the front door even opens by itself. It has a top tray to place a large amount of cutlery in a horizontal position. At the moment I am very happy with the purchase of the Bosch series 4 dishwasher and I recommend it to you.

1207248832.text_en: Bosch devices are quality in themselves, no matter which device you choose, you will be satisfied (or at least I am, having been using Bosch devices for 10 years). However, various additional options certainly make the use much more pleasant - such as a light on the floor informing about the operation of the device or a WiFi connection, thanks to which we know, for example, how much water or electricity is used in a given program. This dishwasher is newly purchased, but for the last four years I have been using a very similar model (also series 4) and nothing happened, which is probably the best recommendation :) Ps. Of course, the upper cutlery drawer does the job - you can also fit many other flat things in it.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1183387637.text_en: I chose the washing machine on the basis of low noise (42dB) and because of the quality of Bosch, it has the possibility to save its own settings of the washing program, which the person then still uses, or can set a program that is automatically selected after switching on. In the HomeConnect application there is a lot of useful information and settings that do not need to be searched for in the manual after a while. Among the minuses, I miss the indication of the remaining time projected on the ground (only the red light is on during operation), the previous washing machine had it, I was used to it. But it can be viewed in the application. I also have a problem with the integration into the IKEA kitchen unit (if I use the original door lining, I can't open the dishwasher all the way down), it will require modifying the lining, or using a "hinge" system.
