I also find it very useful to have several programs, depending on how dirty the dishes are or how much time I have. The Home Connect function is a plus, since I can control it from my mobile.  As it can be integrated, it looks great in the kitchen and does not break the design. Overall, I find it to be a practical, efficient and comfortable product to use. I would buy it again without a doubt.

1208862399.title_en: Better than the previous one / #opinionmotivated by promotion
1208862399.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion Dishwasher bought "quickly" to replace a damaged one from another company, of the same class.    What's the advantage?  1. Detachable power cable, in my case it greatly simplified installation 2. Classic control keys. The previous model had touch and classic controls, but they work better.  3. Possibility of connecting to a hot water connection. 4. Brackets for mounting a plinth made of furniture board. You have to buy it separately, but it's great.  5. Quiet, very quiet operation, especially in eco mode.  6. Adjustable middle basket (3 positions) 7. Application for configuration/control/control.    What's the downside?  1. Assembly instructions, unfortunately here Bosch does not stand out from the competition ... 2. No lighting in the dish compartment, it seems like nothing, but it is missing compared to the previous one ... #opinionmotivated by promotion

1201050701.text_en: I knew the brand and I have not considered another one when changing the appliance. I love that it has wifi; It tells me on the Apple Watch when it's over. The previous one was also Bosch, but this one takes out the dishes less hot and the automatic door opening system when finished is great.  I don't give it 5 out of 5 because with only a few uses, the door no longer closes, but Bosch's response is fast and I hope they solve it soon.

1207487917.text_en: The BOSCH SMV4ECX28E dishwasher operates extremely quietly. It is also very economical, uses little water and electricity, and cleans thoroughly. The drying function works great. The Home Connect app is a big advantage. You can turn on the dishwasher remotely, check when it is finished, or select a program without going to it. It's comfortable and simply modern. I am very pleased with this dishwasher and I can recommend it to anyone with a clear conscience.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1219919660.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This dishwasher is an absolute hit in the kitchen! It works quietly, washes even heavily soiled dishes perfectly and saves a lot of time every day. The programs are intuitive, and the dishes are perfectly clean and shiny after the cycle. Additionally, it uses little water and energy, so it is not only convenient but also economical. It's hard to imagine everyday life without it - definitely one of the best purchases for your home!

1201609828.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher washes and dries very well, even on short programs. It consumes little energy and is relatively quiet. The ability to pair the device with the application is an additional advantage. In addition, there is an option to download additional programs as well as view energy and water consumption. Another advantage is the automatic opening of the door to dry dishes (you can turn this option off). So far I'm very satisfied.

1201609645.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher washes and dries very well, even on short programs. It consumes little energy and is relatively quiet. The ability to pair the device with the application is an additional advantage. In addition, there is an option to download additional programs as well as view energy and water consumption. Another advantage is the automatic opening of the door to dry dishes (you can turn this option off). So far I'm very satisfied.

1207027119.text_en: This is my second dishwasher. The dishwasher fits perfectly into the installation, installation is quick and easy, even for a person who has not done it before (the instructions are clear and understandable). After the first washes, I can say that the dishwasher is equipped with intuitive controls. A big advantage is the ability to connect the dishwasher to Home Connect. With a clear conscience, I can recommend the dishwasher to those who are considering purchasing this type of device

1205370140.text_en: I am very satisfied with the performance of this dishwasher. The upper cutlery tray saves space on the lower one, allowing you to place plenty of dishes in each cycle. All the programs I have tried so far have left the dishes spotless, even when they came in very dirty. In addition, the variety of programs and the possibility of adapting them to a half cycle or quick wash allow them to be adjusted to each person's needs.

1217651688.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher completely meets our expectations regarding the quality of washing, work and price. Additionally, the authorized service that performed the installation performed its work to a very high standard, everything efficiently, precisely and relatively quickly.  The only comment concerns the noise, which seems to be at a similar level to that of the previous Bosch dishwasher, purchased 16 years ago, although this model was supposed to be quieter.

1206548511.title_en: The perfect dishwasher. Another one in the family
1206548511.text_en: I have almost all Bosch appliances in my house - washing machine, oven and now this dishwasher - and seriously, I don't look at other brands anymore because Bosch has never let me down.  The dishwasher is great - it works very quietly, washes dishes thoroughly, and the control panel is exceptionally intuitive and aesthetic. After washing, the dishes are dry, which is very important to me.   I recommend it to anyone who cares about quality and peace of mind in the kitchen. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1200114140.text_en: Very happy with this dishwasher. It washes really well, leaving all the dishes spotless and stain-free, even on pieces that previously cost more to clean by hand. In addition, you can barely hear it while it works, which is very appreciated when you are at home. Installation was also very simple thanks to the clear and detailed instructions, in no time I had it up and running without complications. I would recommend it without hesitation

1177347487.text_en: Dishwasher very quiet in operation and very good cleaning.  The cutlery tray can be a hassle to carry, but once you get used to it it's done, and it also leaves plenty of space for plates.  It has a delayed start.  The only problem is that the folding rods of the lower basket fold down the entire row. They could have made them fold down only half in case you are only going to put one pot.

1201877959.text_en: The Bosch SMV4ECX28E dishwasher made a really great impression on me. It works quietly - I almost don't hear it in the living room, which is connected to the kitchenette. The ExtraDry program (together with the heat exchanger) ensures perfectly dry dishes, even plastic ones, which can be problematic in the case of competitors. The AquaSensor system ensures optimal water consumption, which translates into savings and ecology. The Home Connect screen and the ability to control it from the application are a nice addition - it is convenient to check the program status from your phone. I also like the flexibility of the interior: adjustable upper drawer, foldable elements in the lower basket - it's easy to adjust the arrangement of dishes.  The app shows energy and water consumption for a given washing cycle. To sum up: classic Bosch - solid, functional, with good drying properties and quiet operation. Basically, it meets all my expectations regarding high-quality washing.

1208204638.title_en: High-quality, economical and quiet built-in dishwasher
1208204638.text_en: It meets exactly what we expect from a quality dishwasher. It has a quiet operation of 42 dB, a well-designed internal arrangement. Holds up to 14 sets of dishes, has variable baskets for regular and larger pots and plates. Washing is efficient - energy class A, dishes clean and well dried, intuitive controls, practical ECO programs, intensive, quiet, fast. The dishwasher works reliably and generally corresponds to the quality we expect from the Bosch brand

1184126714.text_en: After 14 years with a Siemens dishwasher, I had to change and did not hesitate to continue with the group. This model is the technological evolution of the one it had with the consequent advantages of energy efficiency, connectivity and some extras at the level of programs and configurations.   Very quiet, and waiting for the first wash to finish, to see the final results... which will surely not disappoint.

1223028483.text_en: Sound level is incredible, fabulous cleanliness

1207508999.text_en: This is my next binder from this company. I bought it primarily because of how long the previous model served me. Even if it started to be a bit demanding after many years, all spare parts were available.   A nice thing about the current device is the option to set it via an application on your phone.   I wasn't sure about it, but everything went smoothly and I connected without any problems.

1209944899.text_en: I am very happy with this fully integrated Bosch Series 4 dishwasher. It cleans thoroughly and is very quiet, and also consumes little water and energy. I like that it has several washing options, the third cutlery tray is very practical and easily adapts to different types of dishes. The integrated design looks great in the kitchen and Bosch quality is evident in every wash. Advisable!

1207473619.title_en: Bosch does not disappoint, clean, dry, silent
1207473619.text_en: I have been waiting to be able to buy a Bosch Class A dishwasher because it is the one that had been recommended to me for its quality and durability. At the moment the operation is silent and the dishes come out clean and dry.   Installing the panel is a little complicated, if you want to do it yourself it requires patience and you have to adjust the instructions exactly to the furniture or type of countertop you have.

1207608179.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is our second Bosch dishwasher and again we are very pleased with our choice. The equipment operates quietly, thoroughly removes even the toughest dirt and dries dishes perfectly. You can see solid workmanship and refined programs that really facilitate everyday use. Bosch once again confirms that it can make a reliable and easy-to-use dishwasher.

1207290871.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher. When choosing, I was guided by electricity and water consumption and the opinions of friends. The dishwasher is quiet, washes and dries well thanks to the automatic door opening at the end of the cycle. It is roomy, you can adjust the height of the upper basket and an additional cutlery drawer is a great solution. The device is easy to use and looks great. I recommend .

1202368071.text_en: I am pleasantly surprised by the efficiency of the device, after washing everything is nicely polished and clean, even on shorter cycles. The application works well, you can easily control the device's operation and organize your time. The dishwasher is definitely quiet and is perfect for an apartment where the living room is connected to the kitchenette.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1221021031.text_en: Installation is relatively simple despite not previously having a dishwasher. It is quite intuitive and has multiple programs that adapt quite well to what will be needed every day. It is quite quiet and the fact that it visually tells you when it has finished cleaning the dishes helps a lot. So far everything is ok and a recommended purchase. Time will tell if it lasts.

1221684238.text_en: After 17 years of using our old BOSCH washing machine, we chose this brand again and we do not regret it. It is economical, quiet, and a big advantage is that it can be set up and controlled via the Home connect application. At the end of the program, the door opens by itself, making drying faster and more efficient. A big plus is also the possibility to choose a program with a half load of dishes or shorten the duration of the selected program.

1218457926.text_en: We already had a Bosch dishwasher that has lasted us 18 years and when it broke down it was clear that the next one would be another Bosch, the functionality is similar to the one we had, it is true that it is heard less when it is in operation and the red light helps to know when it is finished. We also liked that the plastic dishes came out dry, which was not the case in the previous one.

1201661696.title_en: Great dishwasher, cleanliness and reliability in one!
1201661696.text_en: I've been using this Bosch dishwasher for a few weeks now and I'm really impressed with its performance. This is a model that perfectly copes with everyday challenges in the kitchen - it can easily handle dirty pots after dinner or greasy plates after a party. The washing programs are optimized for various types of dishes, and the Eco option saves water and energy, which will be visible over time in lower electricity bills.   What I value the most is the drying system - the dishes come out perfectly dry, ready to be immediately put back in the cabinet, without any streaks or moisture. Quiet operation is another plus; it doesn't bother me even during night washing. The design is elegant and modern, fits any kitchen, and the capacity allows you to place up to 14 sets, which is enough for the whole family.   To sum up, this dishwasher is a solid piece of equipment. I recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable kitchen helper!

1219925027.text_en: We love this dishwasher, it hardly uses any electricity, it doesn't make any noise, it leaves the dishes super clean and dry, it is the best dishwasher we have had so far. I recommend it 100%. It is also very practical and has a lot of space. By having a tray just to put the cutlery, more space is used for plates, pots and other kitchen utensils.

1220297174.text_en: This is my first dishwasher and I am very pleased. It works quietly and washes dishes so well that even in the quick mode it removed old dirt that I couldn't wash by hand. It dries dishes perfectly and is easy to use. I recommend using the application - you always know what stage the washing is at and when exactly it will be finished. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1218725988.title_en: Another purchase of a Bosch dishwasher
1218725988.text_en: The Bosch SMV4ECX28E dishwasher is a very good choice - it removes even difficult dirt very well, and the dishes are perfectly dry after the cycle. A big advantage is the quiet operation and comfortable, roomy baskets that can easily accommodate a larger number of dishes. Additionally, the equipment is energy-saving and easy to use, and the ability to control it via an application is a nice addition.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1184350623.text_en: I am delighted with this product. Compared to the previous model, which has lasted me more than 10 years, there are not too many changes, so I think it is positive. If something works, don't change it!   Yes, I have found a lot of change in the digitalization of the appliance. This makes the user experience much more dynamic and helps to use it more efficiently.

1207091065.title_en: This is the second Bosch dishwasher
1207091065.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion. The SMV4ECX28E Bosch dishwasher is equipment that really makes life easier - it washes thoroughly, is quiet and very economical. The programs are practical and the interior is well thought out, making it easy to fit even larger dishes. After each cycle, everything comes out perfectly clean and dry. Solid workmanship and intuitive operation make it a purchase that will last for years.

1206508678.text_en: After consulting with the sellers and the AI, the BOSCH brand appeared to be one of the most reliable and the best in quality/price, for this reason I was inclined to purchase this model.  Very satisfied with it and it improves on the previous one we had, both for its high capacity, for its quality of materials and for the consumption of electricity and water.  In short, a good purchase.

1201796313.text_en: This is my second Bosh dishwasher. What can I say, reliability and solidity. In this model, the only thing missing is a light that signals the washing and shows the time until completion. A nice thing is the manual buttons and it's great that Bosh has them, because I don't like the touch buttons in other dishwashers. On the plus side, class A and the third shelf.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1215514450.text_en: It is an excellent option for those looking for comfort and efficiency in the kitchen without complications. It stands out for its good washing performance, capable of removing grease and food remains even in short programs. In addition, its capacity is adequate for daily use, allowing you to wash several items in a single load, something very practical to save time and effort.

1211366641.text_en: The device is very easy to use and delivers excellent cleaning performance ("dishes have never been so clean"). The only downside is that it is a little louder than the previous model. The associated app was uninstalled because it was felt to be unnecessary because it takes over all functions and means the machine can no longer be overridden manually.

1218167366.text_en: The dishwasher works very well and meets my expectations. The dishes are washed thoroughly even when they are more dirty, and the programs are well adapted to various needs. The device works quietly, which is a big plus, especially in an open kitchen. Additionally, operation is simple and intuitive. I am satisfied with the purchase and I can recommend it.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1216611741.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The Bosch SMV4ECX28E dishwasher is a device that simply does its job and there is nothing to complain about on a daily basis.  It washes even more dried-out items well and you don't need to scrub them in any special way beforehand.  It is quiet, so you can easily turn it on in the evening and it does not disturb you, and it uses little water. I recommend!

1221780754.title_en: Our first dishwasher and it was a hit
1221780754.text_en: #opinionmotivatedbypromotion This is our first dishwasher in our lives and now we wonder how we could function without it! After a few weeks of use, we are delighted. The dishes are dry (even plastic containers for dinner), and the operation of the device is incredibly quiet. We have a living room connected to the kitchen, and the dishwasher is almost silent in the evening, so we can relax and watch a movie. Even though we are just learning how to use such equipment, everything is very simple and intuitive. The baskets are incredibly capacious, and thanks to the foldable elements, we can easily fit large pots and pans there after cooking together. Another great thing is that the dishwasher uses water very effectively and economically. The equipment is hidden perfectly under the furniture front and looks very aesthetic. For us, it's an absolute revolution and a huge time saver, which we can now spend together and not at the sink. We recommend it with clear conscience!

1221779939.title_en: Our first dishwasher and it was a hit
1221779939.text_en: This is our first dishwasher and we wonder how we ever lived without it! After a few weeks of use, we are delighted. The dishes are dry (even plastic containers for dinner), and the operation of the device is incredibly quiet. We have a living room connected to the kitchen, and the dishwasher is almost silent in the evening, so we can relax and watch a movie. Even though we are just learning how to use such equipment, everything is very simple and intuitive. The baskets are incredibly capacious, and thanks to the foldable elements, we can easily fit large pots and pans there after cooking together. Another great thing is that the dishwasher uses water very effectively and economically. The equipment is hidden well under the furniture front and looks very aesthetic. For us, it's an absolute revolution and a huge time saver, which we can now spend together and not at the sink. We wholeheartedly recommend it!

1215868917.text_en: The Bosch Serie 4 SMV4ECX28E dishwasher is working very well after a week of use. The dishes are washed thoroughly and the device operates quietly, which is confirmed by its low noise level (approx. 42 dB). Another big advantage is good efficiency and low water consumption. At the moment, everything works perfectly and I am satisfied with the purchase.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1203404705.title_en: This is a jump into space
1203404705.text_en: My Bosch dishwasher is truly amazing. We have made a technological leap. Only now I know what washed and shiny plates look like. None of my previous dishwashers cleaned like this Bosch dishwasher does. I am very delighted with the new capabilities of the dishwasher. Thanks to such equipment, I have more time for myself and my family.

1220032618.text_en: We have only been using the Bosch SMV4ECX28E dishwasher for a relatively short time, but so far we have been extremely satisfied. I especially appreciate the very quiet operation - even when washing in the evening, we hardly know about it. The dishes are perfectly clean and well dried after the program, including the plastic boxes that our previous dishwasher had a problem with.  A big plus is the internal arrangement of the bins. They are variable and can be easily adapted to larger pots or glass bowls or taller glasses. The cutlery drawer is also practical, thanks to which there is more space below. The programs make sense, we most often use Auto and Eco mode, which has a surprisingly low consumption of water and electricity.  The control via the Home Connect application was also a pleasant surprise - a notification on the completion of the program. The integrated control panel is very intuitive.   For me, a very successful built-in dishwasher with a good ratio of performance, functions and consumption. You can see that Bosch has these appliances well thought out. I definitely recommend it.

1207617523.text_en: We have had the dishwasher for a short time, but so far we are satisfied. The original dishwasher was really old, so the difference in washing dishes is really noticeable. We like the cutlery drawer, which is easier to access during washing than in the basket. What we definitely wanted and it suits us is automatic door opening. We appreciate the detailed and clear instructions with links to instructions (videos).

1220475448.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion Very good purchase - the dishwasher is quiet, washes dishes thoroughly, even those with greater dirt. I like the automatic door opening function, it keeps everything well dried. It has a convenient arrangement of baskets, and operation is simple and intuitive. I am satisfied with the purchase and I definitely recommend this model.

1217748527.text_en: I am very satisfied with the Bosch dishwasher. It arrived the next day after ordering. I also purchased with installation from Alza. The gentlemen came, took away the old dishwasher and installed a new one. Great connection and no worries. It washes perfectly, is quiet with low consumption of water and electricity. Simple operation, automatic door opening after the end of the program. I can only recommend 👍😃

1180820384.text_en: Very quiet dishwasher with a third cutlery basket. Additionally, protection against flooding and the option of connecting to hot water greatly increases the rating of this product. The workmanship itself, like Bosch's, has nothing to complain about. We have been using this product for 2 months now. After connecting to the application, the dishwasher informs us about everything. I highly recommend it

1179133992.text_en: It is a dishwasher that is easy to install and works wonderfully. It has 2 main levels, and 1 upper one for cutlery. As it is an integrated dishwasher, it comes without a door, so that you can put on the cover that has the same appearance as the kitchen furniture. It can be connected to your mobile phone to control it remotely.

1181413189.text_en: It came from a dishwasher that was many years old (18 years) and therefore the leap in quality and resources is very important.   The dishwasher is very easy to use. It is very quiet and also very practical since it offers various options for tableware availability.  In short, very satisfied. I hope it lasts as long as the previous one.

1219926975.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher works very quietly and effectively washes even heavily soiled dishes. The programs are intuitive, and the adjustable baskets make it easier to load larger pots and plates. Low water and energy consumption is also a plus. After a few weeks of use, the device works very well in everyday use.

1202286788.text_en: I have been using the BOSCH SMV4ECX28E dishwasher for several days and I am very pleased with the purchase. First of all, I was surprised by its quiet operation - you can practically not hear it, which is a huge advantage, especially in the evening. The ExtraDry function really works - even plastic containers are dry after the cycle, which was previously problematic in other dishwashers.    AquaSensor perfectly adjusts the washing parameters to how dirty the dishes are - I see this especially with smaller loads. A big plus is the well-thought-out interior and flexible baskets - everything can be arranged easily. I also like the Home Connect option - the dishwasher can be controlled from the application, which is sometimes really useful.    The only thing that caught my attention was the relatively long duration of the ECO program, but it's worth it - water and energy consumption is very low.    To sum up: a very solid device that meets all my expectations. I recommend it to anyone looking for a quiet and effective built-in dishwasher.

1175298284.text_en: In general, I have all Bosch appliances because it is a great brand and has excellent technical service. I like this dishwasher for its capacity and its details such as the folding rods for pots, the silent program for the night and the auto program that optimizes the water temperature depending on the dirt of the dishes.

1183594676.text_en: This is my first dishwasher. Many people recommended the Bosch dishwasher to me and I was not disappointed. I used dishwashers from other companies occasionally during my holidays and the Bosch one seems much quieter to me. The cutlery drawer is also great. The dishes come out of the dishwasher clean and fragrant :) I am fully satisfied and I recommend it to everyone!

1182089693.text_en: This dishwasher meets all the requirements that were important to us. It is very quiet, saves energy and has a drawer for storing cutlery. A big advantage over our previous dishwasher is that it opens itself after the program is finished. As a result, we can effectively use the long but economical ECO program during the night without restrictions. Great satisfaction!

1207728632.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is a hit!  The equipment operates quietly, washes very thoroughly and is extremely energy-efficient. The programs are intuitive and the interior is well designed - it can easily accommodate larger dishes. After each cycle, everything comes out perfectly clean and dry. I definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable and solid dishwasher!

1182993769.text_en: I am very satisfied with the dishwasher. It washes well and I have no complaints so far. The previous appliance was of a different brand and we have had a lot of dishwashers in our family, and this one makes the best impression so far. The only thing we have to get used to is the smaller space at the top under the cutlery, which we used to have larger, as the cutlery was still classically at the bottom of the sorter.

1221837478.text_en: I really liked the number of programs it has, I also liked how little noise it makes, nothing like the previous one that was already many years old and made a lot of noise, it is a pleasure to put on the dishwasher and barely hear anything.  I also like the red light that it projects on the floor and that disappears when the program ends.

1209725670.text_en: We have owned and used the BOSCH SMV4ECX28E dishwasher for several weeks and we are very pleased with this purchase. The dishwasher washes all dishes perfectly, even using shortened programs. Operation is rather simple - Bosch, as usual, focuses on simplicity and in my opinion it works as always. I recommend! #opinionmotivated by promotion

1202482430.title_en: Bosch Serie 4 SMV4ECX28E – quiet perfection in the kitchen
1202482430.text_en: The Bosch Serie 4 dishwasher is a real everyday comfort. It works extremely quietly, thoroughly washes even difficult dirt and impresses with its simplicity of use. Thanks to the Home Connect app, I can start the washing cycle from my phone and check its progress at any time. This is a dishwasher that combines modernity with the reliability typical of Bosch.

177747789.title_en: Built-in dishwasher is not removed or installed
177747789.text_en: Purchase made online. It appeared that they were taking the previous dishwasher, and it was assumed that they left it installed. I had to find a plumber on my own to have it installed, and take the old dishwasher down to the street, prior notice to the town hall so that they could pick it up on the day and time indicated with the code they gave me.

1207076650.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion Like a dishwasher - it cannot be compared to Bosch. This model has automatic door opening, mechanical control, floor light, solid bottom. This seemed to be standard in most dishwashers, but we had to look hard to get it all. This model has it. We highly recommend it. :-)

1206544866.text_en: I have almost all Bosch appliances in my house - washing machine, oven and now this dishwasher - and seriously, Bosch has never let me down.  The dishwasher is great - it works very quietly, washes dishes thoroughly, and the control panel is exceptionally intuitive and aesthetic.  I recommend it to anyone who cares about quality and peace of mind in the kitchen. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1201399112.text_en: Great dishwasher with A+ energy rating. It has an incredible capacity, the quality of the materials is good and the option to control it from your mobile phone through the HomeConet app with the possibility of downloading a variety of programs is very practical and interesting. When you register it, they give you a 10-year warranty on the tank.

1202683770.text_en: Great dishwasher, very quiet and accurate. My wife admitted that the machine washes better than hers :). I didn't realize that washing up by hand was so energy and water-consuming until we started washing up with a dishwasher. Well-thought-out, ingenious design. Stuffed with sensors like a fruitcake with raisins. Control via mobile phone - great. Worth every penny!

1209683974.text_en: The dishwasher has not caused any problems after a month of use. It meets our expectations. It is quiet and washes thoroughly. Mainly turned on at night in eco mode. It has what we expect: auto-opening, additional drying, half load, cutlery drawer, adjustable baskets, metal bottom. I recommend. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1204815210.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion Great dishwasher. An additional cutlery drawer eliminates the previous problems of not being able to insert the entire cutlery. Quiet, roomy and practical. Everything you can expect from a new generation dishwasher. Energy class - A, just like the dishwasher class. I recommend!

1221310065.text_en: A large integrated dishwasher that cleans even the most stubborn dirt. Although it is true that it cleans very well, the type of bar or soap used is important, with white label ones it does not clean as well. To put some downside, I would only say that it is a little expensive, but as far as functionality is concerned it is wonderful

1183502962.text_en: The dishwasher is very good. I like the half-load function and quick washing. It works quietly and washes thoroughly, even heavily soiled dishes. My previous dishwasher, also from Bosch, served me for 26 years and I was satisfied with it until the end. I hope that this one will serve me for that long and I will also be satisfied with it.

1207764767.text_en: After the old dishwasher (also Bosch - 11 years) reached its end of life, I chose a replacement. This model met everything I expected from a dishwasher. Energy class A, very quiet, all-stainless steel bathtub, automatic door opening. I even had a door from an old dishwasher fit and I managed to replace it myself. I am satisfied with the product and recommend it.

1219923909.text_en: I bought this dishwasher and it is great, super happy, it doesn't make any noise, it washes super well, it dries and it is also the best brand of dishwasher I have bought so far. It is easy to use, uses very little electricity, and has a cutlery tray that saves a lot of space. In short, we are delighted.

1201415324.text_en: The Bosch SMV4ECX28E dishwasher is a great model. Very easy to use and you can also download new programs via the app. The dishwasher is very efficient and washes dishes very nicely. It is also quite quiet, it has a function to silence the washing, which extends the cycle a bit, but you cannot hear it. I can confidently recommend Bosch dishwashers.

1217880661.title_en: I recommend it - the best choice for the kitchen
1217880661.text_en: I was looking for an energy-saving dishwasher and the SMV4ECX28E class A model met all my expectations. It washes very thoroughly, works quietly and dries perfectly thanks to the automatic door opening. The capacity of 14 sets is perfect for a family. High-quality equipment, worth the price. I recommend! #opinionmotivated by promotion

1203405041.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The Bosch SMV4ECX28E dishwasher works great - it is very quiet, has many programs and flexible baskets that make loading easier. The dishes always come out clean and well dried. The installation was professional and the old dishwasher was removed efficiently. I am very pleased with the purchase!

1207092151.text_en: Quiet dishwasher - we already have 2 Bosch dishwashers and before that we had a Siemens. Same quality. We especially appreciate the quiet operation of this dishwasher, the projection of information about the washing process onto the floor. Before the purchase, we used the services of the Bosch client center (Prague 5 - ul. Radlická), I recommend it - we received excellent information when choosing a dishwasher.

1207614005.text_en: A great dishwasher - quiet, functional and very comfortable to use. A big plus is the automatic opening of the door after the end of the cycle - the dishes are drier and ready for use faster. Modern look and intuitive operation. Advantages: control via phone. Another advantage is low power consumption. I definitely recommend it!

1210342712.text_en: I was very satisfied with the purchase due to the quality of cleaning of the dishes, the energy efficiency and the possibility of connection with the Bosch Home Connect app from which there is total control of the appliance and with the possibility of downloading other interesting washing programs

1208056801.text_en: After 20 years we sadly retired the dishwasher. We wanted another 15 years with Bosch and the one chosen is the SMV4ECX28E. The brutal technological sakto. The detail of the final opening is a 10. The cutlery tray is very practical. We've been there for almost a month and everything is perfect. We won't be 15 years old, but we are very satisfied.

1186388145.text_en: First experience with a dishwasher and we do not regret purchasing it. Excellent energy efficiency. Quite quiet, multiple washing programs with administration from a mobile application.   The dishes are clean and dry perfectly.   Without a doubt, a "life-Changer" product

1202291407.text_en: I have been using the BOSCH SMV4ECX28E dishwasher for several days and I am very pleased with the purchase. First of all, I was surprised by its quiet operation - you can practically not hear it, which is a huge advantage, especially in the evening. The ExtraDry function really works - even plastic containers are dry after the cycle, which was previously problematic in other dishwashers.    AquaSensor perfectly adjusts the washing parameters to how dirty the dishes are - I see this especially with smaller loads. A big plus is the well-thought-out interior and flexible baskets - everything can be arranged easily. I also like the Home Connect option - the dishwasher can be controlled from the application, which is sometimes really useful.    The only thing that caught my attention was the relatively long duration of the ECO program, but it's worth it - water and energy consumption is very low.    To sum up: a very solid device that meets all my expectations. I recommend it to anyone looking for a quiet and effective built-in dishwasher. #opinionmotivatedbypromotion#LikeABosch

1217466185.title_en: Great washing quality, but less robust
1217466185.text_en: We bought it to replace an SGS5365MX that, after 22 years, has stopped working.    Great scrubbing results and above all surprised by how well it dries compared to the old one.    However, it feels much less robust overall; door, trays, buttons seem flimsier.    Time will tell.

1202876126.text_en: It's very quiet. I like the red light that is projected on the floor while it is working, and also that the door opens automatically when it is finished. Drying is very efficient even on plastic utensils. The cutlery tray is a plus since it saves a lot of space on the lower tray.

1186101305.title_en: Integrable and integrated with Home Connect
1186101305.text_en: Integrated dishwasher with Home Connect function, a great advantage to control the operation through your mobile device, with energy advice.  As for the appliance itself, highlight the 3rd tray that eliminates the cutlery basket in the lower basket, leaving space for the most voluminous tableware.

1206713562.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I have been using the dishwasher for a short time, but I can already see only advantages. Apart from the fact that Bosch tops the rankings of dishwashers, what made me buy this model the most was the steel bottom and the automatically opening door. I believe it will serve me well for the next few years and I will not be disappointed. I recommend!

1180937881.title_en: DELIGHTED WITH THE BOSCH DISHWASHER AND SERVICE
1180937881.text_en: I contacted the hotline on the Bosch website, they assisted me with great patience and very friendly treatment.  The guys who installed the dishwasher for me were very friendly and professional.  The dishwasher washes perfectly and dries the dishes completely, I would buy it again without a doubt.

1208423380.text_en: It washes, cleans, polishes, dries, polishes... and saves my time! It's a pity he doesn't cook ;) If you want to spend time more pleasantly, there are more interesting solutions than standing at the sink with a pile of dirty dishes. Put in the dishwasher and don't have to do anything else for 1-2 hours... unless you want some tea?

1185300966.text_en: I am absolutely delighted with this dishwasher! Runs extremely quietly. The cleaning results are top-notch: even the dirtiest dishes come out clean. Drying is also excellent. Finally it is no longer necessary to dry any more.  Clear purchase recommendation!

1202299188.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This dishwasher is a real revelation! It works almost silently and the dishes are perfectly clean - no streaks or stains. The control panel is very intuitive and the programs are well selected. Drying works great. Great dishwasher. Very quiet and roomy. WE RECOMMEND!!!

1222174509.text_en: I've been using the Bosch Series 4 SMV4ECX28E for a few weeks and the truth is that it has convinced me. It washes very well, even the dirtiest dishes, and it is quite quiet, you can hardly notice that it is running. It has good capacity, and the upper cutlery tray is a success, it allows you to put more dishes without problems.  I like that it is fully integrable, it looks perfect in the kitchen without attracting attention. Consumption is reasonable and I have not noticed any reliability problems so far. For the price, I think it is a good value for money.  A plus that I would highlight is the application to control and program the dishwasher, even with delayed use. In addition, it allows you to download additional programs that may better suit your specific needs, something that not all dishwashers have and that gives it extra convenience.  I would recommend it if you are looking for a Bosch dishwasher that works well on a daily basis without complications and with a little more flexibility thanks to the app.

1210588336.text_en: I had a 45 cm dishwasher and as the family's needs grew, I decided on this 60 cm dishwasher. For now we have used it a few times, even so we have verified that the results are as expected. Spaciousness, comfort, excellent washing results. A success.

1184657425.text_en: I was hesitant to buy a dishwasher with a 3rd tray and connectivity, and I don't regret anything, on the contrary, the dishwasher is the best purchase I have ever made! We love our new dishwasher!! Super quiet, energy class A and leaves everything super clean. Totally recommendable!!!

1221166675.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is a hit. It is incredibly quiet, washes even dried dishes and dries perfectly, after all, the glasses are streak-free. Very intuitive panel and great quality of workmanship. I sincerely recommend it to anyone who appreciates peace of mind in the kitchen!  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1218169678.title_en: Great quality at a reasonable price #opinionmotivatedpr
1218169678.text_en: I am very pleased with this dishwasher. It washes well, the dishes are clean and well dried, and it works quietly. Another advantage is the capacity and convenient arrangement of the baskets, thanks to which larger dishes can be easily accommodated. The equipment works well for us every day and I can definitely recommend it.

1210776298.text_en: It is my best purchase of the year. I put all the dishes of the day to wash on a timer and it comes out very clean. It doesn't make much noise, it washes well, it has several programs. For maintenance, you only have to clean the filter and do a self-wash from time to time. My water consumption has also been reduced.

1218385644.text_en: Yes - this is quite a successful Bosch model from a newer series. It is energy-saving (class A), so it is one of the more economical dishwashers on the market, and additionally has EfficientDry, i.e. automatic opening of the door after washing, which improves the drying of dishes and reduces electricity consumption.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1217478037.text_en: I bought a Bosch SMV4ECX28E ExtraDry AquaSensor dishwasher at Media Expert and I have been using it for 2 weeks with great satisfaction. Super dry. She is quiet. He washes the dishes. Works nice with the app. I hope I won't be disappointed and my positive #opinion motivated by the promotion won't be excessive.

1197995515.text_en: It washes very well, the dishes come out clean and dry, without drips. Washing is silent and the automation options are also very useful.  The only thing I don't know if it's right or if it's me is that the door doesn't stay open to load the dishes. I'll have to ask.  I recommend it.

1202182243.text_en: The dishwasher has been working intensively for several days now, it is quiet and washes very well, which is no surprise. The surprise is that it dries even plastic items very well, I definitely recommend it. An interesting compromise for people who are looking for the right quality for the price.   #opinionmotivated by promotion

1215299449.text_en: This dishwasher does what it is supposed to do, it is also very quiet when in operation, it is also easy to operate, and there is also an app. available, operation becomes even easier, you can also monitor the duration of the program, in short, another satisfied customer.

1216975702.text_en: I am satisfied with the dishwasher. It washes dishes well, is easy to use and operates relatively quietly. 1206435506.text_en: quiet operation, good positioning of the dish baskets, the advantage of the height-adjustable upper basket, easy assembly of the furniture door (same attachment as the previous Siemens dishwasher), we used the services of the customer center at ul. Radlická where we were provided with all the information for purchasing in the showroom

1214719974.text_en: I purchased the dishwasher and in terms of presentation it was great. Huge capacity, cutlery has its own tray. The truth is that the washes that I have been doing come out very clean but I see them all taking too long. I miss washing less than an hour.

1212446836.text_en: The built-in dishwasher is easy to start and works well.  The drawback of this model is that it is difficult to panel, it has measurements that are difficult to find on the market so it can look a little out of place in your kitchen if you don't look closely.

1218171990.text_en: The purchased dishwasher meets my expectations. It saves on water and electricity consumption. Additional drying and opening after washing is a good solution. 1206564309.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher is very roomy - thanks to the third drawer for cutlery and the adjustable height of the baskets.  The automatic door opening function is a great advantage - the dishes are not only well washed, but also dry when taken out. The dishwasher runs quietly.

1209661101.text_en: The dishwasher is quiet and economical (mainly turned on at night in eco mode). Washes dishes thoroughly. One month of use without any problems. It meets our expectations (auto-opening/half-loading/cutlery drawer/metal bottom). I recommend.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1222612623.text_en: The dishwasher is very quiet during operation and so far the cleaning results are absolutely convincing. We also like that the door opens automatically a little before the program ends so that the dishes dry better

1220943714.text_en: I am very satisfied with the purchase of this Bosch dishwasher. It cleans dishes perfectly, works very quietly and offers efficient water and energy consumption. In addition, its handling is simple and the washing results are excellent. I recommend it without a doubt.

1217113362.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion. The equipment met my expectations 100%. It works flawlessly, is easy to use and very solidly made. Quiet operation, practical solutions and comfort of use are also advantages. You can see the high quality that Bosch is famous for. I definitely recommend it!

1209256291.text_en: We are a household of two and Bosch is our first dishwasher (we lived in sublet). It is very quiet, washes the dishes thoroughly, and thanks to the adjustable baskets and cutlery drawer, everything fits easily in it. It meets all our needs and even exceeded our expectations in terms of quality.

1211032536.text_en: We bought the dishwasher to replace the previous one, also Bosch, after 30 years of service we were clear that we would continue with the brand that has given us the best results. We are not wrong! The installation was super simple and the device is easy to use and very practical

1180133863.title_en: It is very quiet and leaves dishes spotless.
1180133863.text_en: It leaves the dishes very well and is very quiet. I find the third cutlery tray very useful as it leaves plenty of space for the rest of the dishes in the baskets.   I should have the tubes a little longer because I had to buy the extension separately.

1203164794.text_en: We are very satisfied with the dishwasher. Washes reliably, the dishes are always perfectly clean and dry. I appreciate the quiet operation and clear control. The programs are practical and economical, so the consumption of water and electricity is low. Excellent price-quality ratio - I would definitely recommend it.

1218219512.text_en: Based on short-term use, I have to praise the dishwasher. Washes well and quietly. I had a bit of a problem with the harder adjustment of the feet, but that's just a detail. What is not quite nice is the door, which does not stay in position when fully opened, but returns with quite a lot of force.

1215202479.title_en: Excellent dishwasher, easy to install yourself
1215202479.text_en: All dishes come out of the dishwasher perfectly clean, even on the eco program. The cutlery drawer is spacious, nice for slightly larger cutlery items such as serving spoons.  If you chose to install it yourself, it is easy to do with the included manual and videos on YouTube!

1203640693.title_en: A change for the better in every respect
1203640693.text_en: Perfect cleaning of dishes and cutlery, separate cutlery drawer, quiet operation, remote operation via mobile application. I also hope for savings on electricity (class A) and for much longer failure-free operation than in the case of my previous dishwasher (only 4 years!).

1217329304.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is another purchase from this company and definitely worth recommending. It is a reliable device, quiet and cleans dishes perfectly. The programs are clear and easy to use. I am impressed with the quality of the equipment and will recommend it to anyone.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1203658952.text_en: The best dishwasher I have ever used. It washes dishes and cutlery perfectly, has a functional separate cutlery drawer, and operates quietly. Convenient remote operation via a mobile application. I also hope to save on electricity (class A). #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207887542.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The Bosch SMV4ECX28E dishwasher is very quiet - approx. 42dB, uses little water per cycle, and washes and dries very well.  The ExtraDry drying function is a big plus. AquaStop protection protects against flooding. Equipment worth recommending.

1207470804.title_en: Bosch - quality, price, equipment for years!
1207470804.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The Bosch dishwasher is a hit - solid, comfortable and well-designed. The installation was quick, everything was intuitive and refined. It washes thoroughly, works quietly and hassle-free. Perfect kitchen equipment for years!

1184077011.title_en: At the moment it seems fine
1184077011.text_en: At the moment it meets what we were looking for, it is very complete, it has a few programs, but you don't go crazy with those that have thousands. It's pretty quiet. Wash and dry very well. It has an indicator light that it is working and when it is finished it opens by itself.

1217125534.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion The dishwasher is great at washing dishes, even very dirty ones, and at the same time it works quietly and is very convenient to use. The programs are well suited to various needs. This is very solid equipment. I definitely recommend it!

1218277078.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion.  The BOSCH SMV4ECX28E dishwasher turned out to be one of the best purchases for my home in recent years. From the first start, it is clear that this is a device designed for a modern user who values ​​both comfort and high work culture. This is a model that not only looks great when installed, but above all impresses with its functionality and quality of workmanship. The interior has been very well thought out. The adjustable height of the upper basket and additional foldable elements make it possible to freely arrange both larger pots and more delicate dishes. The cutlery basket is also comfortable and stable, and everything has its place. Thanks to this, each cycle holds more dishes than I expected, which makes everyday functioning much easier.    The dishwasher works very quietly - this is one of its greatest advantages. Even during an intensive program, the sound is very muted and does not disturb you in any way if the device is operated in the evening or at night.

1217068028.text_en: Perfectly washed and dried dishes without prior rinsing, with low consumption of water and electricity. I appreciate the storage of cutlery in a separate top drawer. It is very quiet in operation. I use the delayed start option and also operate the appliance using the application.

1208392374.text_en: It is a simple machine to use, very intuitive. If you like home automation, you can program it with what you can do in the Dishwasher whenever you feel like it and control it from your own phone. For me, it has surpassed everything I wanted from the Dishwasher.

1175605510.text_en: From day one it has worked great and is very effective in cleaning; The plates, glasses, cups, pots and cutlery come out very clean and completely dry.   Plus, it's very quiet. The red light is very necessary to know if it is running or not.

1184284241.text_en: I had had another Bosch dishwasher and this is the second for renovation reasons and we had to purchase this one that is integrated. We've already tried it for a few days and it's going great. The extra drying is a novelty compared to what I had and it works very well. A success with Bosch.

1182288537.text_en: Dishwasher recently purchased through the Bosch online store. For now everything is perfect, assembly deadline, etc. The dishwasher is super quiet and leaves the dishes perfect. Just one but, the trays do not seem very stable, they move in a "strange" way

1206783979.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher works without any problems. Shiny, well-dried dishes. Economical in terms of water and electricity consumption. It has many useful functions. Very spacious. A plus for adjusting the middle basket and for the additional upper basket.

1220904167.title_en: JUST PURCHASED PREO VERY GOOD LOOKS
1220904167.text_en: At first it seems to be very good, it is very quiet, extremely quiet and does not vibrate. It has plenty of space for glasses and plates. The only thing that surprises me is that the duration of the programs is very long, but maybe it is the way the dishwasher works

1185386028.text_en: Very roomy and quiet. Lots of space for cutlery, which allows you to load more dishes. A convenient application that adjusts the appropriate program and operating time of the device. Remote inclusive.   The only drawback is the lack of display of working time on the floor.

1179165979.text_en: We have bought another dishwasher, because the experience we have with another model from the same brand is good. This is integrable and therefore a little less capacity, but it is still sufficient.  Different programs to choose from and easy to use.

1199104337.title_en: I love how quiet the dishwasher is.
1199104337.text_en: I have a Bosch in my other house. It has been very reliable for over 12 years. It has never needed a repair. It runs very quietly and washes dishes very well.    This Bosch also works great so far. It met my expectations.

1221521008.text_en: It is the first time we have bought an integrated dishwasher and we are very happy with this BOSCH. It is silent and offers us many programs for our daily lives. Without a doubt, an appliance with many features and an impeccable brand.

1184702232.text_en: It is a dishwasher that exudes quality. It is 100% integrable, making it easy to go unnoticed in the kitchen and look like just another piece of furniture. I expect great quality and durability, which is what is expected from a recognized brand like Bosch (Like Bosch ;))

1221571053.text_en: The product is very quiet, it leaves the dishes clean, dry and shiny. Through the Home Connect app you obtain a lot of information about the status and consumption of the appliances, you can even turn it on remotely! Recommended!

1213989226.text_en: The dishwasher cleans even the dirtiest dishes very well and runs quietly. The programs are practical and fast, and the interior is well organized to easily place everything. A very successful purchase, totally recommended.

1217518179.text_en: I am very pleased with the purchase of this Bosch dishwasher. The device works quietly, washes dishes thoroughly and is very easy to use. The big advantage is the capacity and modern appearance. I definitely recommend this model. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1183396568.text_en: I purchased the dishwasher as a replacement for a broken one from another manufacturer. After trying the dishwasher, it lives up to expectations. In this case, the purchase price corresponds to the quality and result of washing. A big advantage is the connection with a phone, which can be used to fully control the dishwasher.

1204080855.text_en: I highly recommend the dishwasher. A big advantage is that it is quiet. The half load program is a hit and miss - quite often used. Also a plus for the lower drawer lock - it's great that it doesn't fall out. The dishwasher is spacious and well placed. I recommend the purchase.

1209379533.text_en: The dishwasher washes perfectly, even heavily soiled dishes. The ExtraDry function keeps the dishes completely dry. Very quiet operation - you can barely hear it. Perfect for everyday use in the family. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1209043576.text_en: We are satisfied with the dishwasher.  Pros - silent operation - Home conect application - cutlery compartment - signal light - economical class A Cons - more complicated instructions, QR video guide, but it will help

1197276574.text_en: High quality and quite quiet dishwasher. Adjusted price thanks to the promotion of Bosch integrated appliances. Connection to the mobile application is simple and allows me to run the dishwasher even from outside the home.

1219191188.title_en: A great quiet dishwasher with automatic opening
1219191188.text_en: So far, we are extremely satisfied with the Bosch Series 4 SMV4ECX28E. The dishwasher is also very quiet and practical thanks to the cutlery drawer at the top.

1208958131.text_en: The first dishwasher that was already a few years old had to be renewed. I wanted to give myself the opportunity to try something that had quality, guarantees and a good price. I think it was worth making the jump to BOSCH. It has everything. Very happy.

1209946165.text_en: Having an integrated dishwasher was my priority, this model has not only allowed me an impeccable aesthetic in the kitchen but is also functionally perfect, its cutlery tray is very comfortable, cleans very well and is also silent!

1219106348.text_en: The dishwasher arrived the next day after ordering, it was easy to connect and works great. I was able to download additional programs for the dishwasher in the app. Total satisfaction!

1218287129.text_en: I purchased the dishwasher after many comparisons of virtually every parameter. This model won in terms of quality/price ratio and energy and water savings. The dishwasher is quiet - this is also very important. At the moment, it's a very good choice.

1201564083.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The Bosch dishwasher works quietly and washes dishes very thoroughly. Practical solutions, such as a cutlery drawer and adjustable baskets, facilitate everyday use. Solid and durable equipment, worth the price.

1185618823.text_en: I haven't done any washing yet, but the first impression has been very good; The instructions explain the assembly as well as the initial configuration very well. As soon as I do the first wash, I will comment on the experience.

1180928672.text_en: It is a dishwasher with a lot of capacity, the cutlery tray avoids the basket, it is silent and leaves the dishes very well, I was surprised by the opening of the door to dry. It has been a good acquisition.

1208809633.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is high quality and reliable. It effectively removes dirt, works quietly and economically, and intuitive programs make daily washing quick, convenient and hassle-free.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1205238561.text_en: I was looking for a dishwasher with a metal bottom (stainless steel) for a long time and this is one of the few devices still on the market that has one. Very good functions and a 10-year warranty against rust ensure peace of mind for years.

1220273393.text_en: A very successful purchase. The dishwasher copes well with even the toughest dirt, and after the cycle ends, the dishes are well dried. Additionally, it is very roomy and quiet. The equipment is definitely worth the price, I recommend it!

1205173800.text_en: I have been using the product for a short time and so far it works flawlessly. Everything as described, without unnecessary frills or problems. Simple, solid and does its job as it should. I'm waiting for your #opinionmotivated by promotion.

1182463252.text_en: Even though it's advertised, I was surprised at how quiet it is, I also like the ability to download programs with Home Connect. As for washing, perfect. The third cutlery tray is a very good idea.

1207523117.text_en: The dishwasher is easy to use, many options for adjusting programs - shortening, additional drying, etc. Quiet, roomy, opens the door, has a light indicating operation. In the eco program, it uses very little water. I recommend ;)

1220802445.text_en: We've had the dishwasher for a few weeks now, but we're delighted with it being exceptionally quiet. Very compact and the compartments are very large. What I like most is the cutlery tray and the washing modes.

1179468783.title_en: Something is wrong, noisy and defective.
1179468783.text_en: When installing it, the guys who installed it left a program running... when they left you could hear it rubbing against something... Then, I put a program with 3 things that I had just to test it and it made a lot more noise...

1177701710.text_en: The truth is that we are very happy. After retiring our old Balay, with which we were also very happy, we are satisfied to have been able to purchase such an efficient type A dishwasher and so quiet.   The first time we started to place everything, we found it strange that the top basket was so high that we could barely fit a few glasses, but we quickly realized by reading the instructions how easily it could be lowered or raised to our liking.   We are happy that it has the cutlery basket on top, leaving more space in the basket below.  I also find the option to configure the softener very interesting, as in our area, which is hard water, and the option to use more or less rinse aid.  It has different programs, from eco, half load... The best thing is to read the instruction manual, where you will learn which program you will save the most and which ones will make the wash faster (even using more water and energy), all depending on your needs at all times. So far very happy with your purchase.

1222199502.text_en: I am satisfied with this dishwasher, it is silent, the cutlery comes out impeccable and completely dry without the need for pre-washing. The spacious interior with adjustable trays and Wi-Fi connectivity helps a lot.

1204000534.title_en: We are happy with the dishwasher
1204000534.text_en: First of all, we are happy with the €100 refund, which was also done in an agile and simple way. We are happy with the appliance itself: quiet, efficient, spacious. A good acquisition

1180000237.text_en: The dishwasher is perfect: large space, quiet, multiple options, it only needs a program end notice. You never know if your partner has put it in the dishwasher or not, because it doesn't say it's finished

1182669725.text_en: After a month of reading the internet and comparing, I decided to buy this dishwasher. The reviews don't lie, it washes great, it's smart, it can be controlled with an iPhone app, but above all, the dishes are washed better than by hand. I can only recommend.

1206571598.text_en: I am satisfied with the dishwasher. It washes well even on economical programs. Control is simple and intuitive. The pull-out cutlery drawer is very practical. I appreciate the possibility of choosing half filling, reliability and quiet operation.

1218993024.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I have been a happy user of the SMV4ECX28E dishwasher for less than a month. You can write forever about this product!!!  Let me start by saying that the dishwasher is practically inaudible! I wanted the device to operate quietly, but I had no idea that a dishwasher could work so quietly! The EfficientDry function is another "delicacy"! After finishing work, the dishwasher door opens automatically, which speeds up the drying process and cools the dishes!   High baskets with foldable elements allow you to fully load the device. The Rackmatic upper basket adjustment system allows you to change the basket settings at different heights, so you can adjust the interior according to your current needs. Finally, I can easily place very large plates in the lower basket. The third cutlery basket is also very spacious! Of course, the guides of all three baskets are top-notch.  Another very cool thing is InfoLight, the red light on the floor informs us whether the dishwasher is still working or has already finished its work.  And finally, something for remote control fans! Integration with the Home Connect application allows for voice control and receiving notifications on your phone.  With a clear conscience, I can recommend this model of Bosch dishwasher, I think it is the "Mercedes" among dishwashers!!!

1219067907.text_en: I have been using the BOSCH SMV4ECX28E dishwasher for several weeks and I can confidently say that it is one of the best purchase decisions I have made. The device impresses at every step.    The ExtraDry function is an absolute game changer - the dishes come out perfectly dry, even plastic containers, which always leave puddles of water in other dishwashers. No more wiping - you can immediately put the dishes in the cupboard.    AquaSensor does exactly what it promises - it intelligently analyzes the degree of dirt in the water and adjusts the washing program, thanks to which the dishwasher uses a really minimal amount of water and energy. Electricity and water bills have dropped significantly.    I am also delighted with its quiet operation - the noise level of ~44 dB makes the dishwasher almost disappear in the background, even during evening programs. You can easily watch a movie in the next room.    The model is fully built-in (SMV), which allows it to perfectly blend into the kitchen furniture - the aesthetics of the kitchen have not suffered at all. Installation was simple and intuitive.    The capacity and flexibility of arranging dishes is another advantage - foldable spikes in the baskets and the adjustable height of the upper basket allow you to fit even large pots and pans without any fuss.    To sum up - BOSCH SMV4ECX28E is a dishwasher for demanding customers. Solid, quiet, energy-saving and effective. The price is fully justified by the quality. I recommend it without hesitation to anyone looking for reliable equipment that will last for years!

1221981629.text_en: The purchase of the BOSCH SMV4ECX28E ExtraDry AquaSensor dishwasher turned out to be a great decision. What first caught my attention was the quiet operation of the purchased equipment, which allows it to be turned on even late at night. Its undoubted advantage is the ability to run it from your phone using the Home Connect application. What is also important to me is the fact that the purchased device has the AquaSensor function, which saves water. The dishwasher does not consume much electricity, which is also a huge advantage. Another important issue is that the BOSCH SMV4ECX28E ExtraDry AquaSensor has the ExtraDry function and the automatic door opening function after the end of the device's operation, thanks to which it perfectly dries the washed dishes and cutlery, which means that they can be put into the cabinet immediately after removing them, without the need for wiping and unnecessary waste of time. It is also worth mentioning that the dishwasher control panel is very clear and intuitive. Another advantage of the device is that it washes everything without any problems, regardless of the number of dishes in it. The BOSCH SMV4ECX28E ExtraDry AquaSensor dishwasher is very spacious, so I don't have to divide the washing up into two times, and thus save electricity. I think it is also important that the device has a large selection of washing programs that are tailored to individual needs. The BOSCH SMV4ECX28E ExtraDry AquaSensor dishwasher is very solidly made, taking into account even the smallest details, so I can recommend it with a clear conscience.

1219588336.text_en: The dishwasher is quiet, which I consider a very big advantage. A clear light on the floor (red circle) is useful, thanks to which we know whether the dishwasher is still running or has completed the washing and drying process. Automatic opening of the door after the end of the cycle is a great solution, especially if you want to leave the house before the washing process is finished or if you want to wash it at night. The number of programs is sufficient and, most importantly, there is an automatic program available that adjusts the program duration and washing temperature to the amount of load and the degree of dirt. We use this program most often. The second super important thing when it comes to programming is the ability to set a delayed start. Perfect if you want clean and dry dishes in the morning, we use it every day. The solution used inside the dishwasher with a basket into which the capsule falls before it dissolves is a great idea - we have never had any cases where the dishes had remnants of undissolved cleaning agent (which we have experienced several times in other dishwashers). As for the interior: it is spacious, enough for a family of 4. The baskets slide out easily, the arrangement of spikes for dishes is well planned, although it would be ideal if more elements could be folded, preferably not all of them, but e.g. half a row. Then you can more easily place larger dishes such as bowls or platters in the lower basket or place lower cups in the upper basket, which cannot be placed on spikes that are too high for them. Maybe it's just a matter of getting used to it, because in the previous dishwasher we had a little more options for adjusting the folded/unfolded position. The cutlery drawer is convenient, and the ability to adjust the position of the upper basket (higher/lower) is definitely a plus. To sum up: I am satisfied with the purchase and I think that if I buy another dishwasher, it will also be from Bosch.

1186529462.title_en: The silent hero who saved our desserts and n
1186529462.text_en: Having two kids, cooking every day, and surviving spaghetti wars without a good dishwasher… it's like going into battle with a spoon. Since this integrated Bosch arrived home, we feel like we live in a gourmet kitchen series (but without the washing mountains of dishes part).    First: it is so quiet that at first we thought it didn't work... but the dishes came out shiny as if an army of elves had washed them. German magic!    The interior space is very well used. They fit pots, tupperware, baby bottles, mixers and even the little ones' birthday dishes without having to do Tetris. In addition, the drying system leaves everything ready to store, even the glass glasses that previously came out with more drops than a quick shower.    It has quick programs for everyday use and more powerful ones for when you make a paella “with everything.” And the extra: it is so integrable that it seems that the kitchen designed it for it. Total minimalism.    Conclusion: if you want peace of mind, clean dishes, silence and more time to spend on the couch watching movies with your family… this dishwasher is an investment in happiness. Thank you Bosch for giving us back the nights without rubber gloves. 1218830862.text_en: It is an excellent dishwasher, with an all-steel tank, a rare plus to find in this price range.

1216655225.text_en: Efficient and silent dishwasher. Class B should guarantee significant energy savings.

1218185510.text_en: A fantastic product. Many functions, clear instructions, intuitive control. The dishwasher finish is stable and solid. 1208810596.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is worth recommending due to its functionality and ease of use. The dishwasher can be operated with a smartphone thanks to the free Home Connect application, a very useful half-load function, automatic door opening is great for me, thanks to which the dishes dry quickly, steam does not condense inside the chamber, an additional third basket allows you to wash more dishes, an additional tablet container placed in the upper basket, which further increases the accuracy of dishwashing, a red light beam falling on the floor, which automatically turns off when the dishwasher is finished

1221784991.text_en: I purchased this dishwasher to replace another, previous Bosch model that, with almost daily use, has lasted more than 15 years. I probably could have repaired it, but I think it has more than paid for itself and I wanted to have the functionality that the current models have. For example, the WIFI connection and control with your mobile phone through the Home Connect app. The possibility of remote ignition, receiving notifications of the washing status, need for rinse aid, etc. seems very interesting to me. Also the light indicator of operation that allows you to know at a glance that it is in operation. It's a good idea.

1209655897.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion I definitely recommend the Bosch dishwasher. SMV4ENX06E This is my second device from this company and I was not disappointed again. I wash them very thoroughly, I take out the dishes dry and shiny (even plastic containers are dry), it is energy-saving, low electricity and water consumption). The programs are well-thought-out and the device's operation is almost inaudible, and I know what I'm talking about because my kitchen is open to the living room and I wanted it not to be heard when watching my favorite TV programs. If anyone is wondering about choosing a brand, Bosch is unrivaled in this category. Solid equipment for years.

1184825114.text_en: The third drawer is of little use and reduces the two main drawer heights. It is worth considering the height of the dishes you want to wash because I don't have enough height in the upper basket. Only densely arranged ladders can be assembled. The outermost places on the lower basket are practically unusable because it makes no sense to put small plates there and large plates or boards get stuck on the sides of the dishwasher. The upper basket has a strange, single, sparse ladder and a strangely angled part of the basket - large diameter cups, for example, are difficult to place there, and smaller baskets are a waste of space. A small adjustment of the height of the middle basket does not help (in another dishwasher I had 3 height levels). There are 5 pre-loaded programs. To have a short program (1h10) or even just soaking, you need to install an application on your phone - so how can I tell someone to put the dishes in? Does everything have to be done by a woman? Or should every person in the house, even a child, have the Bosch application? misunderstanding.   Advantages: the dishwasher informs itself about the need to wash the filter because it has a sensor - something for lazy people.  There is good access to the pump, so if something unwanted gets into it, it is quite easy to remove it yourself. The removal of the filters itself is so-so - other manufacturers (my previous dishwashers) have nicer solutions.  The metal bottom - now a rarity - I consider it a plus.  The dishwasher washes dishes that are not dried quite well - regular washing, even with a smaller amount of "detergent" (e.g. half a tablet), is ok.

1218821430.text_en: I have been using this dishwasher for a short time and I am really positively surprised by its performance. The equipment operates very quietly, which is a big advantage in everyday use, especially in the evening. The dishes are perfectly clean and shiny after each cycle, even with more demanding dirt. The operation is intuitive and the programs are well suited to various needs. You can see that this is solidly made equipment that should last for a long time. 1207553712.text_en: I bought a Bosch SMV4ENX06E and I am very satisfied. The dishwasher holds 13 sets of dishes - which is really convenient in a larger kitchen. Additionally, I appreciate the automatic opening of the door after work (EfficientDry function) - it helps the dishes come out dry.  If someone is looking for a built-in dishwasher, this model fully meets its purpose. I recommend.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1208446201.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion VERY COOL, CAPACITY, QUIET DISHWASHER. 1207149630.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The BOSCH SMV4ENX06E dishwasher is the best dishwasher I have ever owned. I am very pleased with the appearance and operation of the device. 1216260816.text_en: The SMV4ENX06E dishwasher is a device that definitely makes everyday duties easier. Three solutions that work well in everyday use convinced me to buy this particular model: 1. 1209411303.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion In my opinion, the dishwasher deserves 6 stars! 1200684719.text_en: A very good dishwasher: quiet, economical and made entirely of steel. 1178677686.text_en: The machine itself works well. Layout is pleasant. Eco program is extremely long, more than 4 hours. I am also very disappointed with the drying result.
