1207628273.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I would like to share my opinion about the Bosch SMV4ENX06E dishwasher. This is a fully built-in model from the Serie 4 series, which I chose for my kitchen, looking for a device that will be effective and, most importantly for me, very quiet.     My short impressions with the SMV4ENX06E dishwasher I am really happy with this dishwasher. From the very beginning of its use, I was most surprised by its quiet operation. The declared 42 dB in practice means that it is almost inaudible in the open space of the kitchen and living room, and the special Silent program, operating at a level of 41 dB, is a hit when I turn it on late in the evening.     As for the effectiveness itself, I have no reservations. Dishes, even those with dried-on leftovers from dinner, always come out clean. I really appreciate the EfficientDry drying system. At the end of the program, the dishwasher door opens automatically, which significantly improves the drying effect, especially for plastic containers, and I don't have to worry about steam inside.     When it comes to loading, the presence of a third ExtraSpace cutlery basket is a huge advantage for me. This solution frees up space in the lower basket, so I can fit larger pots there. Loading flexibility is great, and the adjustable baskets allow me to adjust the interior to accommodate a variety of vessel shapes.     I also use the Home Connect app. It's convenient that I can remotely start the washing when I'm away from home or check how much time is left until the end of the cycle. A red light beam emitted on the floor informs about the ongoing washing cycle. When the program ends, the light automatically turns off, so you don't have to open the door to check the operating status of the device, although it actually opens itself to dry the dishes. In my opinion, this is a dishwasher worth recommending. It combines high quality washing and drying with modern amenities and the comfort of quiet operation.

1207241447.title_en: BOSCH SMV4ENX06E dishwasher - a successful purchase
1207241447.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The BOSCH SMV4ENX06E dishwasher is our choice for years to come. This is a built-in dishwasher, standard width - 60 cm. We chose this dishwasher because the quality of its workmanship and the layout of the internal space were the best compared to the competition. The lower drawer has a classic cutlery basket, which is what we wanted. On the upper, third drawer, there is plenty of space to arrange knives, flat plates, and even small bowls or small cups. The central part has solutions that allow for good arrangement of dishes. The upper, third drawer also has a sliding part, which allows you to place taller items in the middle one. The dishwasher is well laid out and is quiet. It has a red light signal when working. When it goes off, the program has finished working. This is a convenient solution, the red light can be seen from a distance, but it does not interfere with use. What is also important for me is that the washing machine is Made in Poland.  Overall, the dishwasher is very functional, quiet, washes even dirty dishes nicely, and there is a wide range of programs to choose from. I recommend this product for those who are undecided.

1209120439.text_en: I have been using a Bosch dishwasher for some time and I can say that it works very well in everyday use. First of all, I appreciate its quiet operation - even when it works in the evening, it is practically inaudible. The dishes are always thoroughly washed, including pots and glass, which do not have streaks or stains after washing. Solid construction, the bottom of the dishwasher is made of steel, resistant to various types of damage, scratches and corrosion.  Operating the dishwasher is simple and intuitive, and various programs allow you to adjust the cycle to the degree of dirt on the dishes. I often use the Eco program, which saves water and energy and at the same time provides good washing results. A big advantage are the solid, adjustable baskets, thanks to which you can easily load larger dishes.  An additional advantage is the **Home Connect** function. Thanks to it, I can control the dishwasher from the application on my phone, check the washing status, receive notification about the end of the program or select the appropriate cycle. This is a very convenient solution that facilitates everyday use of the equipment.   I am satisfied and with a clear conscience I recommend the reliable Bosch dishwasher. Comfort and convenience at the highest level.

1207418349.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The purchase of a Bosh dishwasher turned out to be a great choice. After the previous dishwasher broke down, I thought we were doomed to frequent repairs or washing by hand. This new one is a completely different class: it washes dishes effectively, and the automatic door opening function (EfficientDry) makes the dishes dry on their own - no more wet cups or dripping steam inside.     A big advantage is the capacity - 13 sets are enough for even more dishes.  The baskets are flexible, and the additional third ExtraSpace basket allows for better organization: cutlery, smaller accessories, kitchen utensils - everything has its place.     The dishwasher operates quietly (42 dB), which is very comfortable in home conditions - an open kitchen or dinner, and it works almost unnoticeably.  Additionally, washing programs, the ability to shorten the time (SpeedPerfect Plus) and options for saving water (approx. 9 liters in the Eco program) and energy make it economical and convenient.     To sum up: the new dishwasher is a clear improvement in quality compared to the old one - practical, quiet, roomy and well-made. It really makes everyday washing up easier.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1203432935.text_en: As a mother of two children and the wife of an athlete, for me the BOSCH SMV4ENX06E dishwasher is a real salvation in everyday kitchen chaos. With so many meals during the day - breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks for the children and recovery meals for the husband - there are always plenty of dishes. That's why I immediately appreciated how quietly and efficiently this dishwasher works.  The biggest advantage is the capacity and flexible interior - thanks to the adjustable baskets, I can easily accommodate both large pots and everyday dishes. The cutlery drawer is a game changer for me - no more spoons and knives getting lost between plates, small cups and boxes fit perfectly there.  I also really like that it has an Auto program that automatically adjusts the time and temperature to the degree of dirt - a perfect solution when I don't have time to think about which program to choose. And the ExtraDry function really works - even plastic containers are dry and ready to be stored.  On a daily basis, I also appreciate the quiet operation - I can turn it on in the evening after dinner, when the children are already asleep, and there is no fear of waking anyone up.  To sum up - for me, BOSCH SMV4ENX06E is a dishwasher that fits perfectly into the life of an active family. #opinionmotivated by promotion It saves time, water and nerves, and is very intuitive to use.   This is another model of BOSCH dishwasher in our house (the previous 10-year-old one is still functional and has been moved to the summer kitchen), it is a product worth recommending.

1206793958.text_en: The purchased dishwasher, honestly recommended by the seller in the store, works very well. It has been used for less than two months, but it has already washed a bit due to moving to a new house and related events. During the reconnaissance and search for a dishwasher, the most important things for me were the large capacity, the ability to adjust the baskets, the cutlery basket and, above all, the closing efficiency. I found all this in this dishwasher, and on the plus side there is a red light informing about the dishwasher's operation (when using other dishwashers, I often had to open it while it was working), the operating noise (often turned on at night, it does not disturb while sleeping, and the bedroom is located very close to the kitchen - there is also an additional Silence program for people who are disturbed by such sounds). The pre-loaded programs are sufficient for our family and the hourly program really does the trick and washes the dishes nicely - I should point out that I use eco-tablets for washing, which do not work effectively in every dishwasher, so I see it as another advantage. The upper basket, which I have seen opinions about as being useless, I must say that it works well for me for tiny spoons, longer cutlery such as ladles, pestles, silicone spatulas and tiny dishes that could fall out of other baskets. The lower basket, after lifting the upper one, holds my large dinner plates (non-standard size), which I once had to wash by hand because they did not fit in the previous dishwasher and got caught in the water fan.  To sum up, I am very pleased with the purchase of the dishwasher, it is actually the best I have ever used (thanks to the seller in the store) and I would like to emphasize that this is an honest opinion even though I am taking part in the #opinionmotivatedpromotion campaign

1216283122.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion. Opinion written for promotional purposes. The dishwasher replaced a 14-year-old Siemens that was still working. The replacement was due to rusty baskets (the price of new baskets is absurd - half the price of a new, cheapest dishwasher), but let's get to the point: the dishwasher is installed, it's quite quiet (a lot depends on the program and loading), it works well, it washes just like the previous one, no objections here. Compared to the previous dishwasher, it can be noticed that the workmanship is worse and the manufacturer is looking for savings in the materials used. The dishwasher has a metal bottom, but the front frame to which the main tank of the dishwasher is attached is plastic. This (frame) probably applies to the entire 4 series produced in Poland. The outside of the previous dishwasher's tank was completely damped with bituminous mats, in this one the mat is only at the top of the tank, the whole thing is covered with felt. The dishwasher is easy to install, installation is exactly the same as in the previous 14-year-old dishwasher, hassle-free replacement. Despite the visible savings in materials, I recommend the dishwasher (unfortunately, other manufacturers also save money). The additional upper third drawer is an advantage (additional space for large cutlery or ladles, or very small cups), but sometimes it is also a disadvantage (it slightly limits the space (height) in the middle basket, even small plates cannot fit). I hope it lasts at least 10 years. One star less for the materials. I will be able to write about reliability in some time. A plus for easy configuration of the possibility of opening the dishwasher door after washing. In my case, I turned this option off (for fear of damaging the fronts of adjacent drawers). The dishwasher controls are also very traditional, with normal buttons, which in my opinion is a big advantage. For me, the WiFi option is an unnecessary gadget.

1215633959.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is a really great piece of equipment. It is very good at washing dishes, even when it is more dirty, everything comes out clean without the need to correct it. The control panel is simple and intuitive, you don't have to wonder what it is used for, everything is clear and convenient to use.  A big plus for the phone application - it works efficiently, you can remotely start the dishwasher or check how much time is left until the end of the program. This really makes everyday use easier.  Overall, the equipment is worth recommending, well-made and simply does its job as it should.   #opinionmotivated by promotion

1202858292.text_en: It is a very good dishwasher! I haven't had anything so far that came out with stains, traces or anything else, everything came out flawless.  It is quite silent, even if I did not incorporate it into the furniture, but in a space in the storage room, and the sides are largely free. I took an incorporable one for the smaller dimensions compared to a normal one. The application is very good and I like that I can customize a program to save on the favorites button on the car, so that I can choose this program directly from the control panel when I'm on the run, especially in the morning. The red light that indicates that it is on is very good to remind me of this and not to open it, although I still did this once, but there were no problems because of this, after closing the door it resumed its program. The door and hinges seem solid and I haven't had any problems with them so far, about 2 months of use. I also liked the gift from Finnish, 50 capsules, which probably helps the fact that they have all come out flawless so far, although the Cycle Sync mentioned on them is absolute magic, but that's another story.   When I bought it, they had a campaign with 8 years extra warranty for the tank, a good thing I would say.   Quite easy to assemble, the instructions are quite clear and all the necessary screws were included. AquaStop seems like a good solution for supplying water in case the hose is damaged.   Drawers for dishes and very well thought out for almost any article of crockery, cutlery and utensils. The cutlery drawer is very good and roomy, and the only minus is the fact that you can't put reusable drinking straws, but for that I kept a basket from the old car that fits perfectly in the bottom drawer. The bottom drawer is very good for large items, such as pots, and because the middle drawer can be raised, you have room for quite large items below. I like that the middle drawer can only be lifted from one side, so you can put a large item in the bottom one, but you still have space in the middle one for something medium in the part I leave below.   If I have problems in the future, I will definitely come back to this review, but at the moment it is an excellent choice.

1201728932.text_en: It is a good washing machine. I still haven't identified a solution to fix all the dishes so that they don't twist and fill with water. The drying part doesn't seem very well set up, but I don't have experience with other washing machines either. It also does not clean dry dirt. I mention that so far I have only used the ECO program, but I will try others as well. A dishwasher, however, becomes indispensable in the kitchen. Attention to incorporation, the plinth requires cutting to be able to open the door.

1203497185.text_en: If I had to recommend it in one sentence: The Bosch Series 4 is a very solid choice for a user who wants a balance between performance, quality and advanced features — and is willing to pay a little more for comfort and durability.  For you, if: you have a compatible kitchen space (eg: 60 cm standard width or 45 cm for the slim version) you want a silent, well-equipped appliance, with flexibility when charging and you want to invest in a long-lasting equipment... then the Bosch Serie 4 is definitely worth considering.  But if: the budget is very tight or you only do a few washes a week and the time or extra functions don't matter so much... then you might find a simpler, cheaper model that covers your needs.

1197873208.title_en: “Cleanliness through the lens – a dishwasher that puts on a show
1197873208.text_en: The SMV4EVX08E/72 dishwasher is not only a household appliance - it is my everyday helper, a silent hero of the kitchen who takes care of every detail like a professional photographer - capturing the sparkle of glass and the cleanliness of dishes with a precision worthy of a Leica!    When I turn it on, I feel like I'm throwing dirty dishes into a portal to a parallel world of cleanliness. Thanks to Home Connect, I control it from the couch, and the ExtraDry function is like a magical touch of sun after rain. Even the most stubborn fat disappears like bad memories on Insta360 camera.    It's more than just a dishwasher. It's a lifestyle.  #LikeABosch – cleanliness, technology and comfort captured forever.

1218085109.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion After over a week of use, I can say that the purchase of a Bosch dishwasher was a very successful one. This is my second dishwasher, so I have a point of reference... the dishwasher works quietly and is very intuitive to use, both manually and using the application. A big plus is the very spacious lower basket, which can easily accommodate flat plates with a diameter of 27 cm. The upper basket is well adjustable and even when raised to its maximum position, it can easily accommodate smaller pots or all kinds of containers. Speaking of containers, all plastic containers are cleaned very well, and after removing them from the dishwasher, there are no visible stains. The cutlery drawer is very well thought out... it can easily accommodate small cups, all kinds of kitchen spatulas and large knives and spoons. The assembly instructions are very clear and intuitive, each step in the instructions is additionally marked with a QR code that redirects us to short videos that make it very easy to connect the dishwasher and screw the furniture board to the front of the dishwasher - this is a great help for people who have never done it before... everyone should be able to cope with these instructions. To sum up... a very good purchase, I hope that the dishwasher will serve me without failure for many years. I RECOMMEND.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1221308266.text_en: The Bosch SMV4EVX08E dishwasher meets all my expectations and definitely makes everyday duties easier. The device works very quietly, which is a huge plus for me due to the kitchenette connected to the living room. After taking out the dishes, they are always perfectly washed, without any stains or food remains. A huge advantage is the automatic door opening function at the end of the cycle - thanks to this natural drying, even plastic containers are completely dry and ready to be stored.    I really appreciate the well-thought-out organization of space inside: The third cutlery drawer: this is a great solution that frees up a lot of space in the lower basket, allowing you to easily fit large pots and pans there.    InfoLight light: a red dot projected on the floor is a great, very intuitive way to check whether the dishwasher is still running, without having to open it.    Home Connect: control from the application level I initially considered it to be an ordinary gadget, but phone notifications about the end of washing or the lack of rinse aid are extremely convenient.    The quality of workmanship and materials used is at a very high level, typical for this brand. This is an extremely spacious, modern and energy-saving device. I wholeheartedly recommend this model to anyone looking for a reliable kitchen helper!    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1220602821.text_en: The Bosch SMV4EVX08E dishwasher is a model that combines the latest technologies with extraordinary attention to economy. Its greatest advantage is the record-low water consumption of only 9 liters in the Eco program, which, if used daily, can save up to several hundred zlotys a year compared to washing by hand. Energy efficiency includes the consumption of 0.65 kWh per cycle in the Eco program, which places it in energy class B, and the EfficientDry function, which uses natural air circulation for drying, eliminating energy-consuming heaters. The key innovation is the Dosing Assistant, which, by placing the tablet in the upper basket, ensures its gradual dissolution and optimal mixing with water, which significantly increases the washing efficiency. The flexibility of the device is emphasized by the capacity of 14 place settings and the third Vario3 drawer, which allows you to reorganize the space and conveniently wash even the smallest accessories. The comfort is complemented by extremely quiet operation at the level of 44 dB, full remote control via the Home Connect application and the SpeedPerfect Plus function, which shortens the time of selected programs by up to 66%. For the safety of your home and budget, it also offers full, long-term AquaStop flood protection. It's an investment that pays off over the years in the form of lower bills and everyday convenience.

1202042171.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion* This is our second Bosch dishwasher at home, the first one we use is already 15 years old and we are very satisfied with it, the principle of operation is the same, but the new one is definitely better and the new dishwasher is: - more economical - 65 kWh vs 85 kWh, which translates into savings of approx. PLN 1,500 for 15 years of use in the eco program with one cycle per day - quieter, although I don't have a decibel meter, but in normal operation mode it is noticeably quieter and there is also the SILENT program, - washes dishes better, - dries dishes better after the program is finished, even though there is no Extra Dry function, the EfficientDry function, i.e. opening the door after washing, is sufficient to fully dry the dishes, - equipped with a light warning lights informing about the operation of the dishwasher, in the old one it happened more than once to open and "shower" while washing ;) - more possibilities in programming a delayed start, i.e. every hour up to 24 hours and in the old one it starts in 3, 6 and 9 hours, - more programs, including additional ones: SPEED PERFECT PLUS - washing in an hour, dishwasher washing program, ability to control the dishwasher from the phone, the previously mentioned silent "SILENT" program - an additional third cutlery drawer - very practical :) - the height of the middle drawer can be adjusted, which makes the dishwasher very ergonomic. While browsing and comparing dishwasher offers on the Internet, I assumed that a dishwasher is like a dishwasher - the principle of operation is the same and there will be no miracles, but after buying a new one and testing it, I can say that it is definitely better and quieter, so I recommend the new Bosch dishwasher :)

1207087224.text_en: I definitely recommend buying a Bosch dishwasher. Pairing the application with the dishwasher went smoothly, its functionality is great so far.

1184094266.text_en: ALREADY THE SECOND BOSH WASHBASIN IN THE HOUSEHOLD.

1217376654.text_en: It is a fully built-in dishwasher from the Serie 4 range, 60 cm.  It has a large capacity (approx. 14 sets), suitable for families.  It is quiet (44 dB), ideal for open-space kitchens.  It consumes efficiently: ~9 liters of water per eco cycle and energy class B. The EfficientDry function automatically opens the door for better drying.  Flexible interior with VarioFlex baskets and cutlery drawer.  It has smart connectivity through the Home Connect app.  Includes InfoLight (status floor light).  Provides good hygiene, including programs at high temperatures (70°C).  All in all: reliable, quiet and practical, but no top premium features.

1218721072.text_en: I've only had the Bosch Serie 4 SMV4EVX09E EfficientDry dishwasher for a week, but I'm completely satisfied. The dishes are beautifully clean after washing, without food residues and the drying works very well. The control is simple and intuitive, the programs are completely sufficient for an ordinary household. Overall, the washing machine is of high quality and reliable. Our previous dishwasher was also a Bosch brand and worked for us without any problems for 8 years under full load - that's why we decided on Bosch automatically and without any doubts about the quality.  The only small minus is that there is no lighting inside, which would sometimes improve comfort when storing and removing dishes.

1211224930.text_en: Thanks to the SMV4EVX09E dishwasher, everyday work has become easier. Quiet, quick washing, external light that indicates whether the dishwasher is in the operating mode or has already finished. It's great that it opens itself after finishing work, the dishes dry faster. This purchase is absolutely necessary for the house. It's easier, faster and more pleasant with it. The basket located inside the dishwasher is great, because I can always add more dishes to wash lower down, and it also makes it easier to adjust the inner basket. for dishes, as usual, some larger pots, some smaller ones, super spacious. Awesome. I recommend!!!

1215876996.text_en: Since the purchase, the wheels of the upper basket have been rubbing so hard that they get stuck and the basket has to be lifted completely to be able to fully extend it. The service technician only changed the rails and said that the drives of dishwashers manufactured today are no longer as good as those of dishwashers manufactured 15 years ago. However, this is not true, because even non-branded dishwashers still use high-quality ball bearings. It is evidently a faulty design and low-quality materials used. Plastic wheels on soft plastic shafts and the bending of the thin wall of the dishwasher, which causes the wheels not to line up but to be crooked and therefore cannot roll well in the rail. I can send a video where you can see the "flexible" curved wall.

1206073109.text_en: The SMV4EVX09E dishwasher is a great choice if you are looking for a high-quality and reliable appliance. It is fully built-in, so it fits perfectly into any kitchen and fits perfectly into the overall design. What appealed to me the most about it is its quiet operation - I don't even notice it when it's washing dishes. It has enough space for everything I need to wash, and the different programs allow me to customize the wash according to the type of dishes. In addition, the energy efficiency is excellent, so it saves energy while providing great performance. The dishwasher is easy to operate, and after washing the dishes are always perfect, dry and without marks. I definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable helper in the kitchen.

1207880515.text_en: I've been using this dishwasher for a few days now and I'm very happy with it. It also thoroughly washes dishes that are usually problematic - for example, pots and pans with burnt marks. The programs are intuitive and clear, and thanks to the various flexible settings of the baskets, it can really fit a lot of dishes. The noise level of the dishwasher is low, so that it does not interfere with normal household operations. I also appreciate the simple maintenance and quality workmanship, which seems durable and stable. Functions such as a delayed start or an intensive program are practical and facilitate everyday use.  Overall, I rate the SMV4EVX09E dishwasher as a reliable appliance that fulfills its functions efficiently and comfortably.

Washing - I like the cutlery drawer in the old one I had a basket. It seems to me that there is a little less space in height around the cutlery drawer. Washing is fine, I use gel capsules. 1208249002.title_en: Washing machine Bosch Series 4 SMV4EVX09E EfficientDry
1208249002.text_en: We are very satisfied with the product so far. Washes perfectly on all programs. We consider its quiet operation to be its great advantage. After reading several reviews, we were a bit apprehensive about connecting to the Home Connect app, but the connection was quick and completely seamless. In the application, you can monitor the remaining running time of the dishwasher, which means that there is no need to project the time onto the floor at all. The Vario drawer for cutlery is absolutely great. It's a bit more laborious to load cutlery into it than into a basket, but on the other hand, when the cutlery is grouped by type, clearing out takes place in no time. The only negative is that the door assembly instructions did not consider all types of opening. I followed the instructions using the template and drilled my door...

1184488204.text_en: I am very pleased with the purchase of the Bosch Serie 4 SMV4EVX09E dishwasher. First of all, it is great at washing even very dirty dishes, and at the same time it works really quietly - it is practically inaudible. A big advantage is the cutlery drawer, which gives more space in the lower basket, and the very convenient automatic opening of the door after the end of the cycle - the dishes dry faster.  I also like its capacity - it can easily accommodate a whole day's worth of dishes for the whole family. Additionally, it uses little water and electricity, so it is economical and wallet-friendly. It looks modern, is easy to use and works flawlessly. I definitely recommend it!

1216243772.text_en: This is our second Bosch dishwasher. We chose based on the energy class, the number of dishes and the vario drawer for cutlery, which we had before and we didn't even want another one. Connecting to the app was quick and easy. The application recommended the dosage of rinse aid and salt. Opening the door for better drying works fine, but it is necessary to turn it on for each program (it can also be done in the application, even if the program is already running). The dishwasher does what it's supposed to. Since this is not our first washing machine, we knew what to expect. We are satisfied with the product.

1213136546.text_en: Plenty of space for dishes and cutlery. Variable height of the upper basket. Good programs for dishes with different levels of soiling. Installation relatively easy. I found the missing side walls a bit strange. But OK is still in the kitchenette. I still have a suggestion for improvement. Since the machine is on the far right in my case, it is covered by a furniture panel on the right. It would be great if there was a second attachment point at the bottom. Then you could tighten the plate evenly onto the seal. Otherwise everything is OK.

1206371065.text_en: Simple control of all basic functions and setting of additional functions. Large capacity also thanks to the upper cutlery basket.    Very quiet in operation, completely inaudible for a large part of the cycle. Signaling of operation with a red light on the floor, possibility to set automatic opening of the door during drying. Just be careful, when washing oversized plates, with the upper basket in the upper position, the height of the glasses in the upper basket is limited by the cutlery basket from above.    If you "skillfully" stack (sort) the cutlery, removing all of them is a matter of seconds.    A replacement for an older dishwasher that has so far met all expectations, the price/performance ratio is excellent.

1206954400.text_en: We bought the SMV4EVX09E sink instead of the old 10-year-old Bosch sink. With both the old and the new, a separate piece for cutlery and knives suits us. I positively evaluate the possibility to connect a mobile phone and set, for example, the hardness of the water through the application. What bothers me a bit is the jamming of the lower scythe when taking it out, the scythe has the front wheels a little behind, and when it is empty, it tends to lean forward and get stuck. Over time, a person finds a way to select it without a jam, but I have not noticed a similar problem with older models. Otherwise, overall washing is fine. one surprising thing is that the shortest program lasts 1 hour, we would definitely be happy if there was a shorter program.

1184129433.title_en: Satisfaction with the BOSH SMV4EVX09E dishwasher
1184129433.text_en: I have many years of experience with Bosh electronics, I have a washing machine, dryer, blender, etc. at home. of this brand. I learned that I prefer to pay extra and buy quality. That's why the BOSH SMV4EVX09E dishwasher was a clear choice, due to the remodeling of the kitchen, I currently changed my old free-standing dishwasher, which still works 100% as a built-in one, so I'll probably give it to someone else. I am satisfied with the BOSH SMV4EVX09E dishwasher, it has the same programs as the previous one, so I know how to work with it. It washes beautifully, it is quiet, there are programs that I need exactly, and it has strong and high-quality baskets, which I appreciate about the Bosh brand.

1218513277.text_en: I am very satisfied with the Bosch SMV4EVX09E dishwasher. Cleans the dishes impeccably, even with shorter programs. It's very silent, you almost don't even notice when it's working, which is a big plus.    I also really like the fact that the door can open automatically at the end of the washing cycle, helping to dry the dishes more efficiently.   It is very easy to use, the interior space is well organized, with a drawer for cutlery. All in all, an excellent choice for my kitchen.

1209508343.text_en: The purchased Bosch Serie 4 SMV4EVX09E dishwasher is a real hit! I have been using it for several weeks and I am delighted with the effect and the convenience it brings to everyday life. It copes well with even heavy dirt, and the cutlery drawer makes it much easier to arrange the tableware. I really like the automatic door opening at the end of the cycle, which helps to dry the dishes better and makes using the dishwasher simply more pleasant. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1208868423.text_en: The Bosch SMV4EVX09E dishwasher meets all requirements, it is quiet, efficient, and washes all dishes. I have been using it for a month and so far only positives!

1206298473.text_en: We chose a dishwasher among many variants and manufacturers, we decided to stop at Bosch because of the German origin of the brand and the connection with Siemens, the dishwasher looks well-made from the outside and inside, the detailed instructions for installation were quite interesting, the washing process is normally the same as in other dishwashers, I would say, not noisy and not completely silent, the dishes were clean, the only thing that bothers me so far is that the right drive is stuck on the top drawer, I can't say if the government is in us or in the drive, otherwise everything is ok.

1211139202.title_en: Top dishwasher – smart, quiet and efficient.

1218749182.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion THE SMV4EVX09E BOSCH DISHWASHER is excellent. I've been using it for a few weeks now and I really have nothing to complain about.  The capacity of 14 sets is perfect - everything fits in one place after Sunday dinner. It works very quietly (44 dB), so I can easily turn it on at night and it doesn't disturb anyone. The dishes come out clean and dry, which is helped by the automatic opening of the door at the end of the cycle (EfficientDry) - even plastics are really dry.  I really liked the third Vario3 drawer for cutlery - it gives the lower basket a lot of space. The upper basket can be adjusted in height, so I can easily place tall glasses or pots. The Home Connect app is a bonus for me - it's nice to get a notification on my phone that the washing is finished.  In addition, low water and energy consumption, AquaStop and a 10-year anti-corrosion warranty. Solid equipment at a good price, I recommend it.

1220175161.title_en: Great dishwasher, modern, absolutely suitable for everyday use
1220175161.text_en: I'm really excited about my new dishwasher. The dishes are always perfectly clean and the device runs pleasantly quietly. I think it's particularly great that I can easily control the dishwasher via the app - it makes everyday life much more relaxed and modern. The different programs and the large space inside also really convince me. Clear recommendation!

1207556234.text_en: Bosch SMV4EVX09E is a quiet, economical and practical dishwasher that fits perfectly into my kitchen. Water consumption of only 9 l for the Eco program and energy class B are big pluses. Flexible VarioFlex baskets and a height-adjustable upper basket make it easier to load dishes. Programs such as Auto, Intensive and VarioSpeed ​​Plus ensure that the dishes are always clean and dry. Overall, I am very satisfied with her.

1184402835.title_en: The Bosch SMV4EVX09E dishwasher is a hit
1184402835.text_en: The Bosch SMV4EVX09E dishwasher is the perfect combination of modernity, economy and convenience. It effectively washes and dries dishes perfectly, leaving them sparkling clean and ready to be stored away. It works exceptionally quietly, which will be appreciated by anyone sensitive to noise. A huge advantage is the Home Connect application, thanks to which you can remotely control all functions, check the time until the end of the cycle, water and energy consumption, as well as receive notifications about the lack of salt or rinse aid. You can also create and save your own favorite programs. This is not only convenient, but also real savings - the dishwasher uses exactly as much water and energy as needed. The perfect choice for a modern home! To sum up: Bosch SMV4EVX09E is a dishwasher that meets all expectations - economical, effective, quiet and intelligent. Perfect for anyone who values ​​comfort, modern technologies and perfect cleanliness of dishes. I definitely recommend it!

1207689123.text_en: We have only had this dishwasher for a few days, but we have been satisfied with the product since the installation itself, we especially like the instructions for assembling the dishwasher and subsequently the ease of operation. We also appreciate the application, with which we can monitor the consumption of water and electricity and everything can be set. Already after the first few starts, we appreciate the excellently washed dishes. We definitely recommend the dishwasher.

1202957108.text_en: I am very pleased with the dishwasher! It washes thoroughly, even heavily soiled dishes are perfectly clean and shiny. It works quietly, so you can easily turn it on in the evening. It has a convenient arrangement of baskets and a lot of space - you can easily fit pots. Water and electricity consumption is really low. Great value for money - definitely recommend!    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1209260845.text_en: After my Siemens gave up the ghost, I decided on the Bosch. And I have zero regrets. I love the cleaning results.   What was important to me was a cutlery compartment (no basket), the automatic meeting for drying and an app connection. He offers all of that. He is also whisper quiet. I'm sure I'll continue to have a lot of fun with him.

1206227872.text_en: - washes and dries perfectly - the tablet always dissolves and there are no stains on the dishes - well-designed storage space, including a cutlery drawer - after the program ends, the door opens automatically - I appreciate that it is quiet and economical - useful function: red InfoLight light point projected onto the floor - after a short use, I rate the dishwasher positively and I definitely recommend it

1219312788.title_en: A great choice for the second time as well
1219312788.text_en: This is our second washing machine from the Bosch brand and we made the right decision again. We were very satisfied with the previous one, so we remained loyal to this brand. We are especially looking forward to the automatic opening of the door after the end of the program and the smart functions that make everyday use easier on this new one. We believe that it will be as reliable as our previous Bosch washing machine.

1215320541.text_en: Overall, the washing machine is good and does its job reliably. However, I feel like the quality has deteriorated a bit over the years and it's just not what it used to be. Nevertheless, it works solidly and you ultimately have to come to terms with it and learn to live with it - you have no other choice.

1217377034.text_en: When I purchased it, it seemed to me that I would not use it very much because I was not used to this concept. But I was very wrong, she is amazing and makes my life so easy. The dishes shine when I take them out of the car, and it has some functions that are very helpful, such as opening the door and the variety of programming. I recommend it!

1219564130.text_en: We have been using the Bosch dishwasher (model SMV4EVX09E/75) for a while now and are absolutely satisfied. Here are the points that struck us as particularly positive: Cleaning result: Whether it's dried food residue or delicate glasses - so far everything has been sparkling clean and streak-free.  Operating noise: The device is surprisingly quiet. This is a huge plus in our open kitchen as you can hardly hear it while it's running.  Home Connect Features: Thanks to the smart connection, you receive a notification directly on your cell phone when the program is finished or the tabs are empty. This is more practical in everyday life than I initially thought.  Flexibility: The basket design is well thought out so that you can easily fit bulky pots or lots of plates.  Conclusion: A typical Bosch device: well made, intuitive to use and very reliable. I would buy again at any time!

1208815111.text_en: After a few days of use, I can say that the washing machine met my expectations. It washes dishes very well, it is quiet and the controls are intuitive. So far everything is working without problems. The only thing we have to get used to is the vario drawer - it's a little more difficult to slide it out and back in, but it's nothing major... Overall, I'm very satisfied and definitely recommend it.

1184651932.text_en: After a month of use, I can state maximum satisfaction with this dishwasher. Installation was quick and easy. Dishes are perfectly washed and dry with all programs, even when using a minimal amount of detergent (gel). It also has a pleasant quiet operation, you can hardly hear it. The light signaling of the end of the program is also pleasing. No cons yet.

1208983712.text_en: The dishwasher exceeded our expectations. Great adjustable drawers - for washing taller pots, a separate drawer for cutlery, a clear control panel with a wide range of washing programs, a light beam as a signal and automatic opening of the door after washing, as well as the setting of washing via mobile phone are bonuses that make this dishwasher exceptional. I definitely recommend it👍

1216611766.text_en: Great machine, has a lot of different programs (maybe more than you need). There is plenty of space, the drawers are spacious and of good quality.    We are satisfied and warmly recommend the device to anyone who is in doubt about which to buy.

1180800118.text_en: Our original Bosch dishwasher has reached its end of life after 8 years, we were very satisfied. So we chose Bosch again, so far we have had it for about 2 weeks and it washes well and is much quieter compared to the original dishwasher. The only complaints so far are that 1) the drawers (upper) rub a bit - a habit against the first dishwasher, and after 2) the tablets sometimes fall out and the remains can be seen, for example, on the upper drawer.

1207574709.text_en: The dishwasher is a great helper in our kitchen, the Bosch brand provides us with quality and a guarantee that the dishes are always clean. A big advantage of this dishwasher is the automatic opening of the door after the completion of the cycle, it is quiet, energy-saving, with sufficient capacity for dishes, it is easy to operate and has several programs to choose from according to the degree of soiling.

1185390630.text_en: After almost 20 years, our old dishwasher has served its purpose. Since it lasted us so long, we decided to buy a Bosch dishwasher again. I also consider the automatic opening of the door after washing to be good.

1206095195.text_en: This dishwasher offers us a very smart and well-thought-out design — an ideal choice if you are looking for a quality built-in appliance with modern functions. We also use the Home Connect app which is a big plus. We are very satisfied.

1205133559.text_en: I have had a Bosch dishwasher for several years and I am delighted with the Bosch company. This is another dishwasher from this manufacturer. 1210445081.text_en: The dishwasher does not work, it does not drain at the end of the test program started by the Mediaworld installer technician with error E:61-03. 1207607988.text_en: I am very satisfied with this dishwasher. I like that it has an hourly program, so the dishes are clean quickly. I definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a quality built-in dishwasher with modern functions.

1204034678.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion* The dishwasher fully meets my expectations. Roomy cutlery drawer. A very cool idea with the sliding height of the middle drawer. 1215998193.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is my second BOSCH dishwasher. The first one lasted over 10 years! I'm satisfied! 1208979304.title_en: A quality product at a good price
1208979304.text_en: A quiet and thorough dishwasher. This is my second product from this series of dishwashers and I am very satisfied. 1205867821.title_en: A very good product at an affordable price

I definitely recommend it to anyone who is looking for a high-quality and affordable helper for the kitchen, Pros: Nice design Quiet operation Quality of washing Economical consumption of electricity and water Ergonomic design Cons: Plastic design of the bottom

1182971534.text_en: We have been using bosch dishwashers for many years, so it was clear that when we buy another one, it will definitely be bosch. 1207421061.text_en: The Bosch SMV4EVX09E dishwasher is a great choice for any modern household looking for a combination of top performance, quiet operation and smart features. 1181757729.title_en: SMV4EVX09E – Our first dishwasher and we are satisfied
1181757729.text_en: Since this is our first dishwasher, we didn't know exactly what to expect - but we quickly got used to it and don't regret the purchase. 1220518204.text_en: The dishwasher works well, it's really quiet, you can't hear it at all when the TV is on. 1202176241.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher meets my expectations, very quiet operation, easy to use, economical. 1217383848.text_en: I am very satisfied with the purchase and very satisfied with the Finish products, especially those from the premium range, especially after I tested several products including DM, own brand LIDL, other Finish products from the entry-level range and in the end, the ideal combination, at least in this case, remains Finish Ultimate Plus.

1222713067.text_en: I highly recommend this dishwasher! 1183901766.text_en: I have already learned that I pay twice for cheap appliances. That's why I'd rather throw a few hundred for BOSCH and that's a guarantee of quality and reliability. 1208294188.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion.  I have already bought the second dishwasher of this series. 1220407005.text_en: I replaced the Bosch Serie 4 SMV4EVX09E with an old dishwasher and it was a very good choice. The dishwasher works perfectly, is quiet, washes and dries dishes well. 1183534671.text_en: We proceeded with the replacement, despite the fact that we were still satisfied with our BOSCH dishwasher, which we have had for 16 years. 1220349955.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher washes well. 1183000205.text_en: Our new dishwasher has been installed and a few days of operation in our large family. The installation was without problems, the operation so far too. 1205401528.text_en: We have many Bosch appliances in our family, so when our 12-year-old one broke down, the choice was easy. 1219413517.text_en: The device met all expectations in terms of quality, utility and design. 1217531250.text_en: All recommendations for this model. Perfect washing and drying of dishes. 1207233105.title_en: I recommend the Bosch SMV4EVX09E dishwasher

1205960407.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion, a dishwasher that fully meets my expectations, cleans and dries dishes thoroughly, works quietly, the automatic door opening function makes it much easier to use, and the dishwasher cleaning program is something that was missing in previous models. I RECOMMEND!

1183718121.title_en: The perfect helper for the kitchen!
1183718121.text_en: This dishwasher is a great choice! The dishes are always perfectly clean and dry, water and energy consumption is low, and its quiet operation is a big plus. 1219492687.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher is quiet, works very well, and is very spacious. I have been using it for almost a month and so far I am very satisfied. What I would welcome. The previous model had a greater variability of internal combs and holders in the dish baskets. On this model, the upper basket on the side with the support holder has fixed combs, there is a bit of a problem with taller wine glasses. You can't put them a little lying down. However, it can be solved by reducing the bin (great feature). Overall, we are very satisfied with this model and the choice is definitely not wrong!

1202508908.text_en: I purchased a BOSCH dishwasher with the symbol SMV4EVX09E. I have only used it for a short time, but I still see its advantages. 1205932904.title_en: A silent helper in the kitchen
1205932904.text_en: The SMV4EVX09E dishwasher works exceptionally quietly, making it perfect for my open kitchen. 1207156590.text_en: The Bosch 14-set dishwasher is excellent: spacious, very quiet and extremely efficient at washing and drying. The programs are well thought out, the consumption is low, and the results are impeccable every time. A very good choice for any modern kitchen!

1207174970.text_en: It is easy to install and use. I connected it with Home Connect and it works well. It is intuitive to use and quite easy to use. I haven't figured out how to put the big glasses down yet, but they can probably be washed. It is what quality. I am satisfied with the product.

1202938784.text_en: A very good dishwasher with all the necessary programs for various applications. The automatic door opening at the end of the washing program is easy to use and particularly good. This allows the moist air to escape and the dishes are dried even better.

1185271678.text_en: Hello, I bought my first dishwasher. All my friends recommended the Bosch brand to me. That's why I bought them and I don't regret it. I sound absolutely thrilled. 1202773572.text_en: It was a great decision! The Bosch Series 4 dishwasher is an absolute hit. In fact, my friends were right - it is quiet, roomy and washes dishes perfectly. The programs are intuitive and the drying works great. I finally have peace and the dishes shine! I highly recommend it.

1221044783.text_en: After a few weeks of use, I can confidently say that purchasing the Bosch Serie 4 SMV4EVX09E dishwasher was a very good decision. The device is perfect for everyday dishwashing, effectively removing even more difficult dirt. A big advantage is high energy efficiency, thanks to which the dishwasher is economical in use and consumes small amounts of water and energy.    Particularly noteworthy is the automatic door opening function after the end of the program, which significantly improves the efficiency of drying dishes. A very practical solution is also a cutlery drawer, which allows for better use of the space inside the device. The dishwasher offers well-selected work programs, is intuitive to use and gives the impression of equipment refined in every detail.    An additional advantage is very quiet operation, noticeably quieter than my previous dishwasher, which significantly increases the comfort of everyday use. High quality workmanship and reliability associated with the Bosch brand make the equipment trustworthy from the first days of operation.    To sum up, Bosch Serie 4 SMV4EVX09E is a modern, functional and energy-saving dishwasher that offers a very good value for money. It met all my expectations and I can fully recommend it to people looking for solid built-in equipment.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1182847902.text_en: + Automatic door opening and subsequent shutdown + Basket into which the capsules fall and subsequently dissolve there. One does not have to deal with a capsule stuck somewhere on the basket that did not dissolve well and thus the dishes were not washed well.  + Convenient operation + Relatively quiet + The installation of the front door is well described, so the installation itself was not very problematic + Connection with the Home Connect application is very simple - I find the upper basket for glasses and smaller dishes too loose and less stable in the rails. Even the way it is put up and down is perhaps less intuitive than with the previous dishwasher. (I think that with more expensive models it is handled a little differently... at least according to the photos). But it is nothing fundamental. We are satisfied with the dishwasher so far. It cleans well and without errors (ordinary Finish All-in basic capsules are used) I mainly use the Eco program. But I haven't tried the burnt baking pan yet... The dishwasher only projects a red light on the floor (which is more or less useless, since it will open itself after it's finished anyway. So you know it's finished).  If you want to know how much time is left until the end of the program, you can find it in the application. It also contains statistics of water and energy consumption, grouped by month... for someone who wants to have an overview of how often the dishwasher is used and how much it costs. Alternatively, you can compare how much energy is consumed by which program.   We will mainly see how long it lasts, but only time will tell.

1184399286.text_en: The Bosch SMV4EVX09E dishwasher is an absolute hit - modernity, functionality and economy in one. Since purchasing it, I have been delighted with its performance and intelligent solutions that really make life easier.  First of all, water and energy savings are at the highest level here. The device uses only as much resources as it actually needs, and thanks to the consumption monitoring function in the application, I know exactly how much energy and water each cycle uses. It is not only ecological, but also beneficial for the household budget.  When it comes to the quality of washing, the dishes come out perfectly clean and - equally important - perfectly dry. I no longer have to rub anything in by hand or leave it to dry - everything shines immediately after taking it out. Another big advantage is the quiet operation - the dishwasher is practically inaudible, which is of great importance in an open kitchen or with small children. Even when working at night, it does not disturb or disturb the peace of household members. However, the real game changer is the Home Connect app. It allows you to fully remotely control the dishwasher, add your favorite programs, check the time remaining until the end of the cycle, as well as receive notifications about the lack of salt, rinse aid and detailed information about media consumption. This is a huge convenience - especially in busy everyday life. To sum up: Bosch SMV4EVX09E is a dishwasher that meets all expectations - economical, effective, quiet and intelligent. Perfect for anyone who values ​​comfort, modern technologies and perfect cleanliness of dishes. I definitely recommend it!

1184979994.text_en: Purchased almost 2 years ago. Functionality, many programs, easy operation and practical solutions such as basket adjustment or an additional cutlery drawer are definitely a plus. Another nice option is the automatic opening of the door after the end of the cycle, thanks to which the dishes dry better. 1217383132.text_en: I purchased this model in February 2025 and after several months of constant use, I can say that it is a very good choice for a modern kitchen.    Strengths: * Efficient washing: Dishes come out clean even in eco or fast programs. It also copes well with more difficult dirt (grease, dry debris).  * Silent operation: It is very discreet - ideal for open-space kitchens. It can also run at night without disturbing.  * Perfect integration: Being completely embeddable, it integrates aesthetically into the furniture without standing out.  * Low consumption: Eco programs are well optimized – water and energy consumption is reasonable.  * Interior flexibility: The baskets are adjustable and allow easy organization of dishes of different sizes.  * Useful smart functions: Automatic programs and options such as extra drying or perfect speed really make a difference in daily use.    Less ideal points: * Plastic drying: As with many models in this range, the plastic dishes do not always come out completely dry.  * Duration of eco programs: They are quite long (normal for energy efficiency, but must be taken into account).    🔧 Reliability and construction: The build quality is solid, typical of Bosch. I haven't had any technical issues so far and the materials seem durable.     Conclusion It is a balanced, reliable and efficient dishwasher suitable for everyday use in a family. I recommend it if you want a quiet, economical and well-built product, without entering the premium range.

I have tried it on the normal program, silence program, full, with little dishes and I hardly notice any difference between the normal program and the silence program. It has not met my expectations, it surprises me for a brand like this, this model is not up to par with Bosch.

1216507777.text_en: I am very satisfied with this dishwasher model, first of all for the diverse number of work programs. The smartest thing is that you can more informedly choose the most suitable program for the dishes you want to clean using the home connect application. You can choose the program directly from the application depending on the degree of dirt, the type of dishes to be washed and the intensity of the drying level you want to apply. All this by viewing in the application the level of energy or water consumption estimated for the cycle chosen by you. Another very useful element is the TimeLight function through which, during the operation of the washing program, the remaining time until the completion of the washing cycle is displayed by projection on the floor, as well as the phase of the program in which the washing cycle is currently located. I don't even need to mention about the efficiency in washing dishes because it is superlative and well-known for Bosch brand dishwashers. Otherwise, nothing to complain about. I highly recommend this product.

However, these aspects do not affect my overall opinion :) This is my third dishwasher: the first one was Bosch and I was satisfied, but after connecting it to the network, the electronics burned out and I replaced it with a dishwasher from another company. Now I have returned to Bosch because I believe that when it comes to a dishwasher, only Bosch is the best choice.

1202829037.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I bought Bosch for the first time and I am very satisfied. 1183159081.text_en: A fully integrated built-in dishwasher like the SMV6ECX10E has many advantages, but also some disadvantages. Its main advantage is aesthetics - thanks to the ability to match the front to kitchen furniture, the device becomes almost invisible, which fits perfectly into the minimalist design. The standard width of 60 cm ensures large capacity, and the low noise level (e.g. 44 dB) means that the dishwasher does not interfere with everyday life. Additionally, ecological functions, such as eco programs, and intuitive control increase the convenience of use. Flexible shelves and baskets allow you to adapt the space to various dishes.    On the other hand, the hidden control panel, although aesthetic, requires opening the door, which can be less convenient. In addition, changing the design of the kitchen may force the need to replace the dishwasher, and limited ventilation in the built-in structure may affect the efficiency of the device. Despite these disadvantages, for people who value a consistent kitchen appearance and quiet operation, this type of dishwasher is a great choice.

1203437551.text_en: The Bosch Serie 6 SMV6ECX10E dishwasher is a very advanced device that allows for great comfort of use and savings on water and energy consumption. 1180686068.text_en: After a long and ongoing adventure with the reliable Bosch Series 6 washing machine, choosing a dishwasher was quite easy. I am satisfied with the purchase.

1220940999.text_en: A really great dishwasher. No problems with connection or installation. Classic programs, but there is an additional function of stronger washing, which is also nice. The light helps a lot, you can load the dishwasher in the evenings and not turn on the general light, just tune in to sleep. Quiet, very roomy, and the cutlery drawer is an absolutely wonderful thing. The phone app is great, you can view everything and play it remotely. I highly recommend this model.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1219947692.text_en: The dishwasher is great. The original BOSCH dishwasher worked for me without a single fault for 16 years. That's why I chose the same brand again. What I appreciate most is the display of the time until the end of the program on the floor, it's an absolutely cool thing. The original only beeped. Furthermore, even after so many years (after 16), the attachment is the same, so I didn't have to drill or measure anything on the kitchen door, I just removed the door from the old dishwasher and installed it on this new one. It has touch buttons, which may not suit everyone. The interior arrangement is great, it now has an extra drawer for cutlery compared to the original. The interior lighting is also a good thing and when the door opens automatically, the dishes are dry much better than with the original dishwasher. Of course, this new dishwasher is more economical, both in terms of water and electricity. I'm pessimistic about the noise, I think that splashing water is just as audible as with the old dishwasher. I hope it lasts as well as the original

1212344824.text_en: The quality of processing is at a very high level. I like the arrangement of the baskets, plenty of folding pins, height adjustable middle basket and a really huge upper cutlery basket. The dishwasher is thus extremely variable and can fit almost everything in it. Control via the touch screen is very simple, trouble-free and clear. The number of programs is sufficient, and if someone needs more, they can additionally download more via the Home Connect application. The app is stable, works well and I enjoy using it. I can use it from the comfort of the couch, e.g. additionally turn on silent mode during washing.   The most important thing about a dishwasher is how it washes. And this washes perfectly. It can handle really resistant dirt or dried dough. And we use ordinary tablets. The washing machine has additional Extra Clean Zone nozzles in the middle basket, and the Intensive Zone can be set in the lower part, which increases the pressure of the nozzles for stubborn dirt. I also really like the detailed graphic about the remaining wash time. We are also satisfied with the drying. We decided between the Zeolith system and this opening of the door after the end of the program (careful that the door does not open during the quick program so that too much hot steam is not released into the space). Out of concern for possible service costs during the life of the Zeolith, we chose this more classic system and we are satisfied with it. Especially if the dishwasher is started at night, the dishes are completely dry in the morning.     The only negative of the dishwasher is the noise. Even though this model has the Silence Plus label and is one of the quietest on the market, splashing water can still be heard. Especially when quietly watching TV in the evening. There is no difference in this between the Bosch and our 13 year old dishwasher. It is possible to set the silent mode through the application, but it only lasts 30 minutes and essentially only extends the washing time. During the day, the noise is acceptable, but if someone expects not to hear the dishwasher at all, they will be disappointed.     Despite this, it is an excellent product that I can only recommend. But I'm deducting one star for the Silence Plus surprise, which doesn't correspond to reality.

1217486149.text_en: The dishwasher is absolutely great, economical, interior lighting, wi-fi, apps and great interior layout... 👍👍

1218123396.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is our next Bosch dishwasher... the previous one served us for several years, so the choice of the company was obvious. At this point we are very satisfied, the dishwasher works quietly and washes very thoroughly. What's new for us is the cutlery drawer - a great solution... And the washing time displayed on the floor - great. The door opens automatically after washing. We hope that it will serve us as long as the previous one

1221528062.text_en: We are very satisfied with the Bosch dishwasher. As we are used to with Bosch products, the product is made with high quality and attention to detail. The dishwasher is quiet, the control is simple and intuitive. I also appreciate a few advanced features/gadgets that make day-to-day use much more enjoyable. The dishes are perfectly clean and dry even with economy programs. Bosch did not disappoint again.

1221198508.text_en: The Bosch Serie 6 SMV6ECX20E dishwasher pleasantly surprised me with its quiet operation, very good washing performance and practical internal layout. The dishes are clean even when the dishwasher is fully loaded, and I appreciate the economical operation and modern functions. The fully built-in design fits nicely into the kitchen. For me, a high-quality and reliable dishwasher that I can recommend.

1220619766.text_en: I bought a Bosch dishwasher from the TPD Zvolen dealer, we started using it immediately after installation and we are very satisfied. It could be installed flawlessly in the kitchen, it has many programs and we can't imagine running a household without such a great helper. I highly recommend it to everyone

1219816104.title_en: opinion motivated by the promotion of the SMV6ECX10E dishwasher
1219816104.text_en: We are satisfied with the dishwasher, we chose it because of our previous experience with this brand. Roomy, quiet, with lots of programs and the possibility of modification. Great - I recommend it

1220285723.text_en: The dishwasher was professionally installed. We were surprised by the very quiet operation and the internal LED lighting. It is economical and washes perfectly. I recommend this product.

1220369103.text_en: The dishwasher washes well, runs quietly and is easy to operate. The dishes are clean even after a shorter program.

1220348765.text_en: It washes well, it is quiet, we are satisfied.

1219288807.text_en: we have had the dishwasher for a while, it met expectations

1120349402.text_en: I really chose this machine for its "A" eco rating and Bosch's reputation for reliability, but I'm very impressed by both the washing and drying performance.  The only thing I find mildly irritating is the cup stacking rack on the upper basket: like many others we don't use tea cups and most mugs are too tall to allow us to close the rack.  This means that we can't use the glass supports unless we leave the space below empty.    I wondered it it might be possible to have the glass support without the stacking rack, just a pull down wire support loop with small indents to support glass stems?  Thus I could have tall mugs and glasses in the row.

1109041041.text_en: Salvation in our home is three things. The first washes everything we get dirty after lunch. Everyone happy because no one has to wash the dishes. The second happiness washes all the clothes and the third happiness is the greatest drying everything that is washed, no hanging laundry and running outside in case of rain. Long live Bosch!! All praise for the devices we have. Well, now we don't have a coffee machine, and since my husband says I have to go to the bar for coffee because you don't have a machine, so if I surprise him under the pine tree with a Bosch machine, I believe the fourth luck would be the greatest haha ​​Thank you Bosch!

1149167594.text_en: EASY TO HANDLE, DRY VERY WELL, IT COME OUT VERY CLEAN. I LIKE THE UPPER BASKET HEIGHT ADJUSTMENT.

1136443726.text_en: After having a Bosch dishwasher for 25 years, I bought another Bosch.  The old dishwasher was not yet broken, but condensation appeared on the front, which threatened to break the front.  So I ordered a new Bosch again, simply because I like it and it lasts a long time.  This washes super well on the eco program with a lot less energy and water consumption.  The zeolith drying technique also works perfectly, resulting in everything being nice and dry. Also the plastic containers!!  It is also a lot quieter than the previous dishwasher.  If you download the Home Connect app, you can even switch on the dishwasher via the app whenever you want, and also see how long the program will last.  The cutlery drawer at the top also works well. You have more space at the bottom for pans, etc. All in all, very satisfied with this dishwasher.  The next one will just be a Bosch again😀

1129066243.text_en: We bought this machine after our old Bosch broke down.  Unfortunately, the washing results were very poor, glasses had stains and dried food residue was also on the dishes.  After the first “repair” where we were accused of incorrect loading and using the wrong tabs. The tabs should only be the cheap classics, as the more expensive ones contain rinse aid and salt, which are automatically added by the machine. In addition, the Eco mode was extended, which theoretically leads to greater energy consumption, which we wanted to reduce by purchasing an A machine.   Of course we swapped the tabs. But I wonder why the old machine delivers significantly better results than the expensive one with the same load and the same tabs, even though it also regulates rinse aid and salt internally.  We are very disappointed with this machine, especially considering the high price that has to be paid. We want a machine where we don't have to wash the dishes twice.

1116189148.title_en: It has to be Bosch again !
1116189148.text_en: I have just moved house and I need all new appliances as the ones that are in are very dated and not efficient.  Afraid it has to Bosch appliances again !    Why ? I can really rely on Bosch appliances and this dishwasher  is a great energy saver too ! Something we all have to consider now .  Love the programmes and I will use quite a few of these including the quick wash such a good looking model too the red dot display on the floor is a real help too to let you know the program is still running this dishwasher is so quiet you would not know it is running  !              Money well spent I think such  a great purchase !

1119097972.text_en: I am very satisfied with the purchase. First of all, the dishwasher is very energy-efficient and has many intuitive water-saving programs (e.g. loading and dirt sensor). A fantastic option with drying and automatic opening of the dishwasher door after the program is finished (you can set it and leave the house without worrying that the dishes will get stale! A separate drawer for cutlery - a fairy tale for me! Clean and dry! The dishwasher intuitively informs about the need for cleaning and has a program that does it. The dishes are clean and shiny after washing. So far, I'm delighted! An intuitive, economical mini robot at home!

1140467066.text_en: Installation and initial commissioning are made easy by well-written instructions. The Home connect application adds ease of use and a fun side. We were skeptical about the effectiveness of the cutlery drawer but after the first uses it is great: because the cutlery is not stuck together, it is possible to put more, they are better washed and this allows you to increase the space in the rest of the dishwasher. The dishes are perfectly clean and dry even in eco mode: nothing to say. That would make you forget the price. We also chose Bosch for its reliability, but we will verify this in the long term.

1117987710.text_en: What a disappointment! There was no model SM69T50EU/32 - FD 9106. If this model is constructionally the same, I do not recommend purchasing it. The previous Bosch dishwashers were fantastic but not without problems. This model required several technical interventions, the drain pump is delicate and insufficient, electronic boards and now more. Now it has stopped again... but if I were to buy a new one, should I expect the same problems?

1129908110.text_en: Economical class A dishwasher. Peu Bryant. The most intelligent dishwasher and very practical height-adjustable basket.  Nice design. I recommend.

1215657466.text_en: After much hesitation, we opted for the Bosch SMV6YCX02E and we have absolutely no regrets. From the first use you will notice that this is a real upgrade compared to our previous dishwasher. The machine is incredibly quiet, which is especially nice in an open kitchen - you hardly hear it running.    What strikes us most is how clean and dry everything comes out. Even plastic containers that normally remain wet are now dry thanks to the Ziolithe function. The layout is also super practical: the cutlery drawer at the top provides more space at the bottom and everything fits just a little easier. In addition, the operation is very simple.

1163615285.title_en: I should have purchased much sooner...
1163615285.text_en: After 16 years of loyal service, we switched to this model from our previous Bosch dishwasher. I definitely wanted one with a cutlery drawer and A-class.   I can store a lot more in this appliance and what a difference in washing performance! Technology has clearly not stood still... The device itself contains the basic programs, but thanks to the app I was able to download some, which gives a wide choice of programs. The Eco program takes a long time, 5 hours, but this program runs overnight and the dishes come out spotless.  There is also a big difference in water and electricity consumption compared to the old one. Top device!

1128661222.text_en: + clean, quiet and dry (also plastic!) + various programs that can be expanded with speed & perfect + duration is very useful if the dishwasher is on while generating electricity with solar panels + program selection can be set with the app + dishwasher is easy to install with the supplied instructions - eco program without speed & perfect takes 4.55 minutes and gives rise to doubts as to whether this program is the most economical - the dishwasher can be activated remotely with the app, but this is not activated because Little is known whether the app is hacker-proof

1217445149.text_en: We really like the Bosch Series 6 dishwasher. It is nice and quiet and cleans everything well. The layout is also practical, making it easy to store everything.    We had a dishwasher from IKEA before, but this is a lot nicer. Especially the fact that you can turn it on via your phone, even when you are not at home, is super handy. It also simply indicates when it is time to refill rinse aid or salt.    The only disadvantage is that plastic sometimes remains a bit wet, but other than that we are very satisfied with it.

1156113421.text_en: The dishwasher delivers good washing results. Coarse parts still hang on the dishes. The drying function works very well. The dishes are much drier than with our previous dishwasher, which only had condensation drying. We particularly like the door opening function.   The rinsing baskets feel less high-quality in terms of workmanship. One of the washing baskets was delivered with a defect in the height adjustment. Bosch was contacted through the seller and quickly sent the appropriate replacement part. The deeper upper cutlery drawer is very practical. Even larger parts fit in very well.

1182483469.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion I use a Bosch SMV6YCX02E dishwasher and I am very satisfied. First of all, it works quietly - you can hardly hear it, which is a big advantage in an open kitchen. The programs are well selected, and the PerfectDry function actually dries even plastic containers, which was a problem in the previous dishwasher.    I also like the ability to control it via the Home Connect app - I can start washing remotely or check how much time is left until the end of the cycle. The interior is flexible, and adjustable baskets make it easier to load large pots or tall glasses.

1116195034.title_en: It has to be Bosch again !!!
1116195034.text_en: I have just moved house and I need all new appliances as the ones that are in are very dated and not efficient.  Afraid it has to Bosch appliances again !    Why ? I can really rely on Bosch appliances and this dishwasher  is a great energy saver too ! Something we all have to consider now .  Love the programmes and I will use quite a few of these including the quick wash such a good looking model too the red dot display on the floor is a real help too to let you know the program is still running this dishwasher is so quiet you would not know it is running  !              Money well spent I think such  a great purchase !

1216330117.text_en: The Bosch SMV6YCX02E is now running here every day, and to be honest: I don't regret buying it for a second! It's nice and quiet, so I sometimes have to check if it's even on. The layout is handy, especially the top drawer for cutlery and small items — saves hassle with that basket.    Everything just comes out clean, with no surprises. And drying goes remarkably well; I hardly ever have to dry it anymore, not even the plastic, which I think is a real plus. My previous dishwasher remained damp and tropical after a wash.    In short: a nice dishwasher that does its job great without requiring attention. Exactly what you want.

1215773759.title_en: Top dishwasher: quiet, clean and user-friendly
1215773759.text_en: I am very satisfied with this Bosch Series 6 dishwasher. It is very quiet while running, which is ideal at home. The dishes come out clean and dry, even when fully loaded. The layout is practical and flexible, making it easy to accommodate different types of tableware.    The operation is simple and the programs are clear. It's also nice that it is energy efficient. The installation went without any problems and the device feels solid and of high quality.

1184236427.text_en: We are very satisfied with this dishwasher! It works quietly, is energy efficient and the dishes always come out perfectly clean. The different programs are very useful and thanks to the flexible layout there is always enough space. The Home Connect app is also a nice addition, it allows us to operate the dishwasher remotely, choose programs, set the start time and see when it is time to refill salt or rinse aid, for example. Definitely recommended!”

1106501304.text_en: I have a Bosch dishwasher. The machine is fantastic. Mine prints the washing time on the tiles. All recommendations for bosch 10 +

1217028381.text_en: Machine does what it is supposed to do in silence, big difference with old machine (15 years old)

1216494164.title_en: From dishwasher frustration to zen in the kitchen
1216494164.text_en: After more than 10 years of loyal service (and let's be honest: quite a few problems) we had to say goodbye to our dishwasher.  After some research (top 10 dishwasher search) we arrived at this Bosch series 6. First impression? The door that closes softly and smoothly is a relief.     The dishwasher is quiet. You can also adjust the volume in the app. The dishes come out super clean (something we almost forgot 😅). The operation is simple and works as it should.
