The red lamp on the floor when the dishwasher is on is very welcome. In a household with an adolescent, this is worth gold. No more unexpectedly opening the dishwasher during a program.     We were looking for an energy-efficient, reliable dishwasher (with today's energy prices in mind) and we definitely found it.

1124629279.text_en: I purchased the dishwasher to replace another 7 year old Bosch dishwasher, which unfortunately had broken down. Even though I would have preferred to stay with the old one a little longer, I considered that the expense, although huge, could be acceptable compared to the repair costs.  The main reason that led me to purchase this product? its very low energy consumption: although the previous dishwasher was class A, the current one consumes a quarter of the energy of the old one. I have not found equivalents on the market with the same specifications.  The other features are a good addition: the third shelf ? more? convenient of the traditional basket (which I kept anyway, for when it is necessary to clean a large number of cutlery) and the smart functions, even if I don't consider them necessary, can be convenient.  I hope this model can last longer? of the previous one, in any case for at least 3 years? covered by warranty.

1127792158.text_en: nice economical dishwasher easy to use and the installation was also easy to do yourself.  It's nice that the door doesn't need a handle and opens with a little pressure on the door. The light on the floor that shows you that the dishwasher is still working also works well.  the separate cutlery drawer has enough space for all the cutlery and saves you having to put a basket in the bottom drawer.  the dishes come out clean and dry, all in all an excellent device.

1174100935.text_en: Our old dishwasher was finally allowed to retire after 14 years of doing its best. After some searching we came across this Bosch. What a relief with these 3 drawers. This ensures that you immediately have extra space in the bottom drawer to place large objects. The handy light at the bottom so that you can follow whether the program is still running is also super handy. And then there is the app where you can follow or set everything. You will be notified when the dishes are ready. Or you can download an extra program that suits your needs but is not yet available as standard. This dishwasher is also super quiet and super economical. Price/quality so a top device.

1215659426.title_en: My new friend's name is also Bosch
1215659426.text_en: My new dishwasher takes the place of my previous best friend after 16 years. His faithful predecessor served for years without complaints but eventually gave up the ghost. My new friend works even faster, quieter and more economically. Everything comes out sparkling clean and I tell all my friends that. A real upgrade in my home appliance social circle!

1140937762.text_en: I was looking for a fully integrated Bosch dishwasher or its counterpart from the same BSH group, with grade A in energy consumption as a criterion. I found what I was looking for at Ubaldi with this model, and I confirmed my purchase having seen the refund offer that referred to it.  Little extra, wifi connectivity, can be a bit gimmicky but allows easy adjustment of the device.

1185640530.text_en: I have been using this washing machine for about 2 years and I have yet to find anything that disappoints me. It washes and dries the dishes very well, it is spacious and configurable, I really like that you have to press the door a little to open it automatically. Also through the application this product is completely configurable from the phone, there is an assistant that helps you choose the optimal washing program depending on the preselection of dishes and accessories to be washed, the degree of dirtiness as well as a list of important priorities for the user: speed, efficiency, drying, etc.. Depending on what we choose in the application, the washing temperature is also set, e.g. pvc bowls.

1125188356.text_en: After a few weeks of use I can confirm that ? a valid product and I recommend it.    Pros - Materials seem well made and resistant - Installation? simple also thanks to the detailed installation procedures (possibility to see step-by-step videos) - Very useful app for configuration and daily use - Silent Cons - The adjustment feet wear out/deform very quickly - The app lacks consumption history, they are presented before starting the washes but are not saved - Torx screws to install the front panel

1144419515.text_en: Had to replace old Bosch dishwasher after 17 years and yes again with a Bosch. A very economical dishwasher that has been very satisfying so far. Good layout, it takes some getting used to the cutlery drawer, but I don't want anything else now. Switching on online with HomeConnect when the solar panels supply power is an option that I use a lot.

1131374490.text_en: Dishwasher at the top! After a few months of daily use I can tell you this: my dishes are perfect even though they consume nothing in terms of energy and water! What more could you ask for? The silence? You have it with this product: it makes very little noise. I have a kitchen open to the living room and I can watch a movie without turning up the volume when it's on.  The cutlery drawer is great, and big congratulations to the engineer who thought of making a height-adjustable shelf: as a result, even large pots fit, everything fits: it's great!

1215695163.text_en: This dishwasher meets all our wishes: - perfectly dry, including plastic and plastic dishes - perfectly clean - very quiet - energy efficient (label A) - many extra useful programs such as eco and speed All in all, a complete dishwasher from Bosch for a great price, especially with the cashback promotion

1135983315.text_en: We have purchased a new Bosch dishwasher, we already had another one that we took to the town house. The new one even surpasses the previous one for all the improvements it provides both in functionality and consumption or the low noise that is only perceived if you are next to it.  We are very satisfied with this choice.

1155096215.title_en: My findings with the Bosch dishwasher SMD6TCX00
1155096215.text_en: Been using it for a month now and the dishwasher is working well. The dishwasher is dry when the machine is ready, this was less so with the old one. Home connet is a valuable addition for us and we use it a lot. We will also see whether IFTTT (If This Then That) for the dishwasher also offers advantages.

1125146021.text_en: The washing machine is awesome. Easy to use despite the variety of programs. Very good washing and drying quality, very quiet and the highlight is the operating indicator of the fully integrated device - the red pointer on the floor. Simply brilliant.

1136898458.text_en: I have been using this dishwasher for almost 2 years and I am very satisfied! I suggest you also use quality products (capsules, cleaning liquid) for maximum effect. It is very roomy, I even put pots in it and it works!

1174211257.title_en: The product is too expensive and of poor quality
1174211257.text_en: This dishwasher is of scandalously poor quality and the price is very high. We very much regret that we chose Bosch. When I think about it, I would definitely not prefer the Bosch brand.

1213802348.text_en: Very good dishwasher.  Energy class A and easy operation.  Moreover, very quiet during use. Perfect for an open kitchen. Nice drawers, can hold a lot. Also dries excellently. I am very satisfied with this dishwasher. Good purchase.

1174249477.text_en: Our Series 4 died after 9 years, we wanted another Bosch dishwasher. We chose this one for its energy class A. Good material, but I preferred the feel of the Series 4 buttons.

1201666781.text_en: This dishwasher does its job well!  It is quiet, cleans dishes well and even dries them, except for some plastic pots.   The drawers are easy to organize.   The first installation went slightly less smoothly.   The accompanying app stubbornly refused to connect to this smart machine at first.   A few days and installation attempts later, luckily it worked.   We haven't used it for very long so we don't know how solid it really is.   We expect quality from Bosch and that is why we count on years of reliable services.  For now we are very satisfied.

1140932497.text_en: I am very pleased with this dishwasher! In one month I managed to save 40 lei on the water bill. I purchased it for 4600 lei from a Bosch partner store and I'm not sorry!

1212427065.text_en: A beautiful device with lots of space and a good layout. The cutlery all fits in the cutlery drawer at the top, there is plenty of room. This provides many options for positioning pans, plates and bowls.

1147090197.text_en: Nice and quiet. Lots of space. Besides energy consumption A, you certainly don't have to run every day. Open the front door by applying light pressure. Also nice.   Now still looking for a front panel!

1218493687.text_en: to replace our 10 year old dishwasher from another brand, dries and washes great! even plastic containers and the like! It is also nice to operate the dishwasher remotely with the app.

1142703167.text_en: BOSCH SMD6TCX00E built-in dishwasher of TOP quality. Quiet, efficient in drying, energy efficient. Dishwasher to recommend without hesitation.

1147594855.text_en: I have (almost) no complaints. The dishes are perfectly washed, there are no stains or spots on the dishes, I only clean the pots beforehand of larger pieces of food. It's incredibly quiet, I literally can't hear it even though I'm sitting next to it. It also has the additional option of silent operation, although I really don't know how much it can be. It has a lot of functions, although not too many, it has a half charge option, start delay, gloss and salt indicators, adjustable drawer height, wifi. Plastic dishes also wash perfectly. The only drawback is the very short warranty of only 2 years, and I did not find an option to buy an extension.

1128990934.text_en: The CAR wash program is not working? satisfactory, however the cheapest (ECO) does the cleaning job very well.    The instructions for connecting the appliance to WiFi are very simple, ? It was really quick to connect the device to the "Home Connect" APP

1146639212.title_en: Fine, but the automatic door is a right pain
1146639212.text_en: It's a dishwasher.  It works.  It dries far better than our last dishwasher, but you have to be careful, not all our stuff can handle the extreme heat. But that's just the way it goes.  The new top cutlery rack is a useful innovation, but that comes at the expense of not being able to fit pint glasses or long-stem wine glasses on the middle rack.  But the automatically opening door is a pain.  Sometimes it just will not stay shut.  You have to close it impossibly gently to get it to close at all.  Just the slightest knock and it opens again. Really really anoying.

1109027816.text_en: For the first five years of my marriage, I didn't have a washing machine because the kitchen is somehow the most expensive, and we moved into my grandparents' apartment, so the kitchen was the last one to be renovated. I waited a long time, but I did welcome her. Personally, I'm not one of those people who wash dishes before putting them in the washing machine. Heavens... an excellent device cleans everything, but considering other Bosch devices, I didn't expect anything else.

1156870100.text_en: I ordered this dishwasher directly from Bosch online. The price was not more expensive than on other merchant sites. But above all, Bosch sent me all the documents concerning the guarantee that they themselves carried out upon the purchase of my dishwasher. Bosch took care of everything. Whereas before I ordered on other sites and it was up to me to manage everything. And when I had a problem there was no one there even though I had taken out the warranty.  This is why this time I ordered directly from Bosch. Fast delivery, fair price, and I forgot: the dishwasher is perfect, top notch, all stainless steel inside, right down to the filter which is stainless steel. And the programs are great.  So thank you Bosch.

1161111382.text_en: Purchased when my "old" but dear dishwasher ran out on us on the advice of my parents who already owned it and of my friend who was a sales assistant in the usual electrical appliances shop, it is perfect, silent, fast, it leaves the dishes clean, fragrant and dry and with the Home Connect App you have the possibility of monitoring it, and activating it, remotely. It warns when it needs maintenance, i.e. cleaning to keep the ducts in order, or lack of salt or rinse aid. Of course it's expensive but they assured me it's top of the range..

1171667381.text_en: The Bosch Series 6 fully integrated dishwasher is the best dishwasher for me. It is very easy to use and, using the app, you can even download additional cleaning programs. You can also use the app to make additional settings and see how long it will run for or what mode it is currently in. Thanks to the zeolite drying, it saves energy and the dishes are dried perfectly without having to be polished.  We are very satisfied with the new household helper.

1151107430.text_en: This dishwasher is an absolute life saver not only can you use the buttons but easily connect to app and use on our phone in the app it tells you when salt and rinse aid need re filling also when the filter needs a clean , it will ask you about your dishes and make a personalised programme you have complete control when to start it and the best thing is the silence function perfect for night time washes .

1159640779.text_en: I am very pleased with my first dishwasher, the Bosch Serie 6 SMV6YCX02E. It is efficient, quiet and has many functions that make everyday dishwashing easier. PerfectDry technology ensures perfect drying results, while the Vario3 drawer and Rackmatic system add flexibility. While there is no direct integration with Home Assistant, I plan to try integrating the dishwasher with Home Assistant using the Home Connect API. I hope that manufacturers will see the additional benefits of creating integrations for their products with Home Assistant.

1137473635.text_en: I recently purchased one and I am very satisfied Very good quality

1168087932.text_en: I'm thrilled!!!! The cleaning result is super and the drying is excellent, even plastic becomes completely dry and there are no drops of water at all. The app is so easy to use that I use it almost exclusively.  I'm not a cell phone freak, but I managed everything and the operation is self-explanatory. I prefer to run the eco program overnight, it takes over 5 hours, but that doesn't matter LOL. The light (dot) on the floor when it's running is also great. Otherwise, I hardly hear it when it's on and therefore don't have to open the door or check my cell phone. When he's finished, the door opens a crack and I'm informed via my cell phone... all in all, super satisfied.

1168375089.title_en: Top device at a fair price
1168375089.text_en: I really like the cleaning performance of the device. Of course you have to change if you buy a new device after 14 years, but the cleaning performance is incredible! The basic functions are sufficient on the control panel, but you can make a lot of settings using the app. The app is also necessary for “commissioning”, but that doesn’t bother me. I also think the automatic opening after completion is absolutely great. The dishes are very clean, dry and especially the cutlery has no stains.

1127650361.title_en: Washes and dries perfectly - also plastic
1127650361.text_en: Mainly runs the eco program with delayed start at night. Perfect result. The other programs have also delivered top marks. With the app, it is easy to adapt the machine, for example to open the door automatically after all programs, remove the end signal completely, set the exact start time and much more. The adaptability of the baskets makes filling extra flexible. Very satisfied with the machine and can only recommend it. If you have an old integrated bosch, the kitchen door can be moved over very easily, as the screws are in the same place.

1217884170.text_en: This dishwasher is very economical, quiet in use and dries dishes very well. The options of the app are also very useful. For example, you will receive a push notification when the program has ended.  The only point for improvement is that due to the size of our plates (which we of course place at the bottom), we have to set the top drawer to the highest position. This leaves very little space for the cups and glasses because the cutlery drawer is directly above them.  But this is only a small point for improvement, because all in all we are very satisfied!

1207986184.text_en: The dishwasher performs excellently and has far exceeded our expectations. Both daily dishes and heavily caked oven dishes are cleaned effortlessly. The device is easy to use and offers enough space for larger items such as an Instant Pot insert or air fryer accessories. Plastic and glassware also come out of the machine without streaks and completely dry. The app is user-friendly and helps you choose the right program. In addition, the dishwasher is energy efficient and remarkably quiet during use.

1214266752.text_en: After having had a Bosch dishwasher for years, we opted to install a fully equipped kitchen with built-in appliances when we moved 6 years ago. Because the move was under time pressure, we left the choice of built-in appliances to the installer with the assignment that it had to be good, but not necessarily the most expensive. The dishwasher was not a Bosch, but another 4-letter brand that also makes a lot of household appliances. From day 1 I actually didn't have a good feeling about the dishwasher. The baskets started to rust after a few months (renewed under warranty) and the dishes did not dry properly. But yes, bought is bought... so we try not to bother ourselves too much about that. Over time, not drying properly started to become more and more of an annoyance. We increasingly think back to the Bosch dryer that we had used for years to our complete satisfaction in our previous home.  So one thing is clear, if our current dishwasher were to break down, the new one would become a Bosch again!  After the door lock (spring and cable system) of the current dishwasher broke twice, the 2nd time a guide roller, including mounting, was broken and this was not available as a part, the decision was quickly made.... a new dishwasher is coming!! After reading many reviews of different brands of dishwashers, I quickly decided to purchase a Bosch dishwasher. Why? Well actually longing for the satisfied feeling of our first Bosch dishwasher. In combination with Bosch's new drying technology (Zeolith) and economical energy use (A label), we opted for this Bosch dishwasher. Because I was fairly handy, I chose to install it myself. A simple job thanks to the clear instructions. Now, installed and using it myself, a very satisfied feeling..... just like with our first Bosch, back to the old nest, as they say... or something like home sweet home.......

1142821800.text_en: Easy to use whether via the mobile phone or the keyboard surface.    The device is quiet and makes work in the kitchen much easier.    After washing, the dishes are 99% clean and dry, even stubborn stains have disappeared.    The device is an indispensable part of our household because it takes over a large part of our work.

1150587940.text_en: Price quality superb. Device dries very well. I thought the device opened automatically, but apparently it doesn't. It can hold a lot, but the top rack is a bit low, which means less stacking at the top due to the centrally sloping cutlery rack in the middle. But overall very satisfied with the purchase. Recommended!

1159205878.text_en: After almost 20 years, it was time to part with the previous Bosch dishwasher. I chose this model and I am extremely satisfied. The dishwasher turns off and opens by itself, it is quiet, and there is remote control in the app, which is really useful with additional programs to download. At first, I wasn't convinced about the cutlery drawer, but now, after a few uses, I know that it is a much better solution than the basket. Everything washes beautifully in the dishwasher and the dishes are well dried. Overall, I highly recommend it!

1128516197.text_en: After our old Bosch dishwasher died after 10 years of faithful service we just didn't think of replacing it with any other make but being disabled meant replacing it quickly and John Lewis did an excellent job of that part.     The new dishwasher we chose because of A rating and compared it to other makes even more expensive and found power and water consumption favourable.     Love the 3rd cutlery tray - had used it while staying with a friend and found it excellent.  Much safer and perfect cleaning.     Easy to raise or lower middle drawer and find we are fitting much more in.     Very quiet and easy to use though door opening on drying cycle caught me out at first 😊 but no harm done and despite switching it off early all was bone dry.      Delighted overall. Thank you Bosch.

1213346526.title_en: Great price for top quality – Bosch doesn't compromise
1213346526.text_en: I am very satisfied with the BOSCH Series 6 Fully Integrated Dishwasher SMV6YCX02E. The value for money is really excellent. For this price range you clearly get the high-quality finish and reliability that you would expect from Bosch.    After installation, you immediately felt the quality of the device: sturdy materials, solid door mechanism and very quiet operation. The interior space is cleverly laid out and fully equipped – including a practical cutlery drawer at the top, which provides plenty of extra space in the lower basket.    The programs work efficiently, the dishes come out perfectly clean and dry, even when fully loaded. Energy consumption is also favorable, which is a bonus.    In short: a very good investment. Very satisfied with my choice!

1182236293.text_en: The dishwasher cleans well and is very quiet.  You can distribute the cutlery well on the cutlery drawer and it will be cleaned well. You can also easily switch in height on the middle rack, so you have the option of placing higher crockery. The dishwasher opens automatically during the drying process, which is very beneficial for drying.  The app is also useful so that you receive a notification when, for example, the salt or rinse aid needs to be refilled. In short, I am very satisfied with this purchase.

1181271148.text_en: Nice smart and economical dishwasher. Everything is easy to set up via the app and to monitor whether anything needs to be refilled.  The dishes are always clean and dry, and it is also very quiet.    4 instead of 5 stars because the link with Homewizard is currently not working. This was one of the main reasons for choosing this dishwasher. Being able to start based on the yield of my solar panels. Homewizard is aware but does not yet have a solution.     If this works it is definitely worth the full 5 stars.

1129497422.text_en: I ordered the device directly from Amazon.  ? My first Bosch dishwasher, you can see the difference with others.  The baskets are more easy to push without anything jumping out of place.  Device Purchased mainly for energy data, using only the Eco program everything becomes clean - unfortunately it takes a long time.  The possibility? to be able to control the dishwasher remotely? a plus on overall operation, but useful I can only recommend the device.

1153139660.title_en: Bad experience with the integration service
1153139660.text_en: I haven't had any problems with the dishwasher. It is a good device that washes very well and very efficiently, apart from the advantages of being able to connect it to the Internet to manage it.   Yes, I have a complaint about the integration technical service that I also contracted and that, after seven days with the device, I have not yet received. Once the dishwasher was installed, they did not call me to make the integration appointment and I had to contact customer service. The first time they promised me that they would come on Friday, January 5. Since they did not call me this day to arrange the service, I had to contact them again and they have again postponed the appointment for Monday. In short, very bad service for a device of this price and for a company like Bosch.

1147466488.text_en: Very versatile and large capacity machine. The separate cutlery tray is a must have.

1161168340.text_en: Bought to replace another Bosch that lasted 13 years and is still working. Quiet enough to let it start at night and I have a bedroom adjacent to the kitchen, perfect drying with zeolite and the automatic opening of the door at the end of the wash is a gem that I could no longer do without. The Home Connect App is also very well done, from which, for example, it is useful to know how much is left until the end of the wash cycle. The only flaw is the lack of modularity of the baskets.

1121243089.title_en: Super dishwasher and A energy label
1121243089.text_en: Very satisfied with our new dishwasher, washes super clean and is very economical with energy and water with the eco mode. Drying is also very good with the Zeolite system. The app is also very easy to use and you can see how long it will take, afterwards you can receive a notification when the dishwasher is ready. You can also install other programs on your dishwasher, such as the 45 degree fast program. We would definitely recommend this dishwasher.

1199831501.text_en: Unfortunately or fortunately, the comparison is made against a small Chinese car.    I can say that, somehow, compared to my dishes, somehow, they do not fit in the fixed, nothing, while in the Chinese "no brand" everything fits in the fixed. Here I have to fit them more time. The car, after all, gets the job done and I love that it is class A in terms of energy consumption compared to the competition.    All in all, you won't be disappointed with this car, but you won't jump for joy either.

1152144358.text_en: Simply perfect in every way. Price quality what you expect.

1182959833.text_en: After 10 years, the Bosch built-in dishwasher that was used every day needed to be replaced. The replacement had to be a Bosch again.  A useful adjustment is to replace the cutlery basket with a drawer. The Zeolite solution will still have to prove itself. The washed dishes come out dry. Great dishwasher for a fair price. The installation description is detailed and easy to follow. The booklets in almost all European languages ​​are somewhat redundant.

1154229738.text_en: We are thrilled with this machine. I was a bit sceptical at first when the Eco cycle showed it was over 4 hours long but we now use that programme at night when the elec is at the cheap rate too. This cycle is however the most economical despite the length of time it takes.   We were initially a bit wary of the top tray for the cutlery having been used to a cutlery basket but it seems to wash it all perfectly. Overall we are very pleased with the machine.

1140341341.title_en: Not a lot of dishwasher for a lot of money
1140341341.text_en: Our old dishwasher cleaned the dishes much better than this Bosch. We have used different tablets and different programs but the dishes are just never completely clean. And this while we also pre-rinse the dishes. The dishwasher also feels plastic and not solid at all. You would almost think that a dishwasher costing €1250 was solid and good, but then you should not buy a Bosch. No more bosch for us next time.

1218275033.text_en: This dishwasher really exceeded my expectations. From the first use you will notice how quietly and efficiently it works. Even with a full load, everything comes out spotless, without residue or stains. The different programs are convenient and easy to choose, so you always have the right setting for every type of dishes.    What I especially like is the energy-efficient character. You notice that it has been designed with sustainability in mind, without compromising on performance. The layout is also practical: there is enough space for plates, glasses and cutlery, and everything stays in place during the program.    The operation is simple and intuitive, so you don't have to spend a lot of time figuring out how everything works.    In short, a reliable and powerful dishwasher that makes everyday life a lot easier. Definitely recommended!

1170862707.text_en: The previous dishwasher, also Bosch, was about 18 years old, after reaching the age of majority, we decided to give it a free run... During the use of the previous one, it broke down several times (minor injuries, at the end of life), most of them could be repaired using a screwdriver and cleaning the hoses.  The new dishwasher, although it is also from the top shelf, is noisier, has less capacity (the height of the plates), the baskets seem to be weaker, and overall, it gives the impression that it was designed not by an engineer but by an accountant... Undoubtedly, it washes better than the old one (the dishwasher, of course), the plates are clean and squeaky.  The length of the ECO program is irritating, but eco is not the same today, it does not equal comfort, well, such are the times.  The application and remote launch work perfectly.  Adding the dishwasher to the app was painless.  Although disappointed with the sound level, I recommend it.

1116909231.title_en: Assistant for silence in the house
1116909231.text_en: Surely you all know that two people a day can get the dishes as dirty as two average school classes. Coffees, juices, breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks, preparing food for tomorrow... No one has dishes to repeat the next day without washing. Of course, there are always three hundred more interesting things than washing the dishes, which is somewhere two places above watching the paint on the wall dry. That is why the BOSCH dishwasher is the solution to the problem. In addition to no arguments over whose turn it is to wash the dishes, the SilencePlus feature allows your dishes to come in dirty and come out clean, without you even knowing it was washed. In three months of use, not a single dish or utensil came out of this washing machine with the need for additional washing, which was often the case in two out of four previous washing machines of other brands. Taking out a clean and still warm cup for afternoon tea really adds an extra touch of comfort to everyday life.

1151030079.text_en: 1 - 8 of 241 Reviews    This review sorting takes into consideration review length, helpfulness votes, number of pictures as well as recency in order to show most relevant reviews first. It does not take into account the rating.    Most Relevant  Rating  Age  UsageFrequency  Household        2022-06-14  This review is from Great Britain  ccbrentford  Household: Couple    UsageFrequency: Almost Every Day    Age: 65 or over    Perfect  I really chose this machine for its "A" eco rating and Bosch's reputation for reliability, but I'm very impressed by both the washing and drying performance. The only thing I find mildly irritating is the cup stacking rack on the upper basket: like many others we don't use tea cups and most mugs are too tall to allow us to close the rack. This means that we can't use the glass supports unless we leave the space below empty.

1130781197.text_en: Does it wash well? silent and, above all, it doesn't consume much. The only flaw, for the moment (and I hope they solve the problem)? the app. You don't pair with the router but, to be honest, the two items relating to wifi are missing in the settings menu, as if it didn't have it. Nevertheless ? the E/17 model with wifi. It is useful why? Only via the app can additional wash programs that I require be loaded.

1130781101.text_en: Does it wash well? silent and, above all, it doesn't consume much. The only flaw, for the moment (and I hope they solve the problem)? the app. You don't pair with the router but, to be honest, the two items relating to wifi are missing in the settings menu, as if it didn't have it. Nevertheless ? the E/17 model with wifi. It is useful why? Only via the app can additional wash programs that I require be loaded.

1129542001.text_en: I also relied on Bosch for my new dishwasher and as always it met my every expectation.  My old one was also a Bosch which after 17 years of daily work I decided to change due to a breakdown due to limescale in the city? where I live, the worst in Italy.  I am also extremely satisfied with this new dishwasher, both in terms of how? made for perfect operation at all times.

1161261159.text_en: I am very pleased with the purchase. The dishwasher is very quiet and has many intuitive water-saving programs (e.g. loading and dirt sensor). A fantastic option with drying and automatic opening of the dishwasher door after the program ends (you can set it and leave the house without worrying). A separate cutlery drawer is very useful. After washing, the dishes are clean and shiny. So far, only advantages. I recommend.

1165072135.text_en: I really like the dishwasher; perfect washing results and really very quiet; The only thing that really annoyed me was the pointless and incomprehensible instructions for assembly and commissioning; Who came up with this nonsense?  A YouTube video helped me a lot here; but how sad is it that I have to turn to Google to get the machine up and running?

1160193952.title_en: I recommend a Bosch dishwasher - economically and qualitatively
1160193952.text_en: The Bosch SMV6YCX02E dishwasher is a solid choice for those looking for efficient and reliable equipment for everyday use. One of the biggest advantages of this model is its energy efficiency, which translates into lower electricity and water bills. Moreover, thanks to various washing programs, you can adjust the operation of the dishwasher to different types of dishes and the degree of dirt, which is very practical.    Additionally, I am also pleased with the quiet operation of the device, which is important especially in the case of open kitchens or evening washing up, when we do not want to disturb the peace of the home.    From the user's perspective, the Bosch SMV6YCX02E dishwasher looks like a solid piece of equipment that does its job effectively and reliably. Despite possibly higher purchase costs compared to other models, the value it offers in the long run is priceless.

1140918095.text_en: I use a lot of plastic plates and cups for my children, and these are completely dry in this dishwasher! It's also nice that this dishwasher is very quiet. This way you can easily wear it while you sleep or when you have visitors.     The top cutlery drawer is also very nice, so there is plenty of space at the bottom of the dishwasher for plates and pans.     Really a fan of this dishwasher and recommend it to everyone!

1130645814.text_en: We purchased the new model a few days ago, to replace an old dishwasher (also Bosch). Yeah? from the first use we were able to appreciate the validity? of this appliance. Silent, perfect and with many innovative functions. And the Zeolite system is excellent and left us really surprised by leaving the dishes perfectly dry. Incredible. Very satisfied with the purchase.

1122442707.text_en: Technologically packed dishwasher, connectivity with a smartphone with the possibility of downloading additional programs, complete settings from a mobile phone, plus a few things that were not on the old Bosch: automatic door opening after finishing, child lock, energetic class A (one of the few on the market), low noise level, high-quality dishwashing results, easy installation in the line, thanks to identical dimensions as 10 years ago

1214890991.text_en: This Bosch dishwasher is an excellent choice for those looking for quality and reliability. It works quietly, cleans thoroughly and offers smart functions that make daily use incredibly easy. In addition, the device has a modern design and is energy efficient, which is good for both the environment and your wallet. In short, a top-class dishwasher that is worth every investment!

1159484604.text_en: I have been a Bosch fan for many years, I use many Bosch appliances and have always been happy with them. Nothing to say, even this dishwasher is up to Bosch standards. Negative point in my opinion is where to put the cutlery is a little awkward. Next time I will take the one with the more comfortable basket. Otherwise perfect. After almost 30 years I have to change the freezer and I'm already looking for a new one. Definitely Bosch.

1127147675.text_en: Perfect dishwasher! I use eco wash often and I'm very happy with it, impeccable drying! I researched a lot and read many reviews on dishwashers.  I chose Bosch why? Everyone speaks well of it (and it has zeolite which not all have) and I must say that I am satisfied.   Very quiet and reflects the characteristics I found in the description.   Recommended.

1185509971.text_en: We have been using the dishwasher for a month now. All in all we are very satisfied. In particular, the drying capacity compared to our previous dishwasher is a huge plus. Plastic now also comes out of the dishwasher almost dry. The only downsides are the long duration (5 hours on eco mode) of most programs, and we also find that the cutlery in the separate drawer is not always clean.

1157543491.text_en: Very good cleaning performance, even in the short program, which lasts just over 1.5 hours. The Eco program takes quite a long time, almost 5 hours. But the device is so quiet that we usually leave it running at night, so it doesn't bother us. The door opens on its own at the end, so the dishes are dry in the morning.  We have been using the dishwasher for 3 months now and can absolutely recommend it.

1103755645.text_en: If you want dishes without spots and stains, this sudo machine is highly recommended. The dishes are shiny after washing. The internal organization is such that it enables quick and easy arrangement of dishes. The machine is easy to maintain and easy to clean (you can remove and wash the filter in just a few minutes). The programs make it possible to save a lot of water and electricity. Simply, the right thing for every family.

1133296222.text_en: Great dishwasher. The dishes come out clean, no pre-rinsing is necessary. Compared to other HomeConnect devices I have at home, you only have to activate the remote control once and without constantly pressing the button to activate the function. This means I can activate the dishwasher remotely at any time. So far I don't have any negative points.

1122454570.text_en: We are satisfied with the dishwasher. It is quiet, washes and dries perfectly, control via the app is just the icing on the cake. We didn't think about this dishwasher for a long time, energy consumption was important to us these days, and compared to other dishwashers from other manufacturers, with energy class A, the price of this dishwasher is 3 times lower.   Overall, we are satisfied with the dishwasher and can certainly recommend it.

1220374633.text_en: This dishwasher has been with me for more than two years now. It's just a dream to receive such dry dishes regardless of the program. The plastic bags also get super clean. All the settings are great. And the quick program cleans everything extremely well.  Most of the time it runs in ECO mode. This saves energy and water.

1209950797.text_en: I am delighted with the quality of washing. Each cycle is a small kitchen fulfillment.  The plates are sparkling clean without a single streak, the glasses are sparkling like new, day after day, without any worries.    Pots regain their shine after dinner, even dried sauce has no chance against it.  Quiet, accurate, reliable in operation, this dishwasher is a real comfort in everyday use.

1178184665.text_en: Our older dishwasher stopped working after 15 years, so we were looking for a new one. The expert was very well informed and they chose this one, a real winner. Especially the drawer for cutlery at the top. It takes some getting used to, because she has been using it a little longer than our old one. But so far everything comes out clean and dry, even most of the plastic is dry.

1150612906.text_en: The dishwasher looks solid, does not creak, drawers run smoothly.   A separate cutlery drawer helps keep things organized and speeds up loading and unloading.   It took a while to connect to the application - the dishwasher does not like the 5G network, the compatibility mode worked better. Additionally, the Bluetooth connection drops during activation. It worked the first time.

1168303896.title_en: The dishwasher cleans poorly. Despite technical
1168303896.text_en: We are very disappointed with this dishwasher. She doesn't clean the dishes thoroughly; glasses in particular often remain dirty. Despite two visits from a technician who explained to us that we were loading the dishwasher incorrectly and using the wrong detergent, nothing has improved. We were advised to use cheap detergent as there is already salt and rinse aid in the machine, but that didn't help. We have given up and sometimes wash the dishes twice.  The technician also said that we shouldn't use the EU Eco program because it doesn't clean properly - this is completely incomprehensible as we bought the machine precisely because of its energy efficiency.    Our old Bosch dishwasher cleaned significantly better with the same load and the same detergent. Overall, we are very dissatisfied with this dishwasher and cannot recommend it.

1122264393.text_en: We changed the BOSCH dishwasher to BOSCH SMD6TCX00E. We are very satisfied with the new dishwasher. We especially appreciate the more space in the lower basket thanks to the separate cutlery compartment and the possibility to adjust the height of the upper basket. We didn't have that with the previous dishwasher, and we can confirm the higher comfort by using it. Also the compartment for dissolving the tablet works perfectly. We are satisfied with the product.

1128640968.text_en: The Bosch brand? reliable and the dishwasher I purchased? excellent. Many programs to choose from, also to download from the Home Connect application, which is very convenient for managing start-up, time and more. The cutlery basket is very convenient, it washes very well and the eco programme? long but it saves money, especially because? the dishwasher? in class A.

1150620449.text_en: The installation went smoothly, everything was clearly described. The first commissioning also went smoothly. This device does what it is supposed to do. Operation and follow-up via the app is a nice bonus. The drying method is also useful for removing plastic from the dishwasher when dry. No more having to dry everything with a kitchen towel.

1152374249.text_en: Based on the test results from Stiftung Warentest, I would have expected a significantly better product. The first thing you have to deal with is the assembly instructions. The QR code with the help videos are well done, but the rest of the assembly instructions could be improved - everything is far too small and confusing. The machine itself is okay, but the capacity is even worse than our 18 year old Neff machine. With a cutlery tray at the top and large plates at the bottom (i.e. the norm), you cannot adjust the middle basket down so far that capacity can be used for large glasses or the double tier for small cups. This is just bad! The cutlery on the top shelf is usually not completely clean, even though we only use every third grid. Well, the dishes and/or the plastic aren't super dry either. I think the Home Connect version is good, but that's not why we bought it :-/

1209950617.title_en: Bosch SMV6YCX02E - reliable and quiet dishwasher
1209950617.text_en: The Bosch SMV6YCX02E dishwasher is a very good choice for people who value quiet operation and high quality washing. It effectively removes dirt, and thanks to the drying system, the dishes are dry even after short programs. A big advantage are the functional baskets and cutlery drawer, which make loading easier. This is solid, modern equipment for everyday use.

1159187155.text_en: A very quiet, spacious and intuitive dishwasher. Washes all dishes thoroughly. An additional advantage is the cutlery drawer - a very convenient solution. The dishwasher is also of high energy class and uses less water, which was a very important aspect for me when making the decision to purchase this particular model. I recommend!

1131359559.text_en: I'm really happy with our choice! Does the dishwasher have a separate drawer for cutlery, ? very quiet and easy to use. I like the possibility? to connect it to the app and monitor the salt level or quality? of water. Absolutely the right choice, it consumes little energy and is Large enough to hold many plates and pots.

1149056950.text_en: We bought this dishwasher on the advice of BSH employee based on a number of advantages, namely energy label A and Zeolith drying system (and that works really well).   For the rest, you can get advice about programs, setting favorites, etc. via Home Connect. I see this purchase as a good investment and a top purchase.

1107215079.text_en: The best machine, big enough to fit all the dishes we get dirty during the day, yet compact enough to fit nicely into the kitchen.  Her, perhaps, best advantage is that it sounds like a cat purring, so I slept in the kitchen more than once while she worked during the night and I didn't even hear her.    Any recommendations and the best dishwasher ever

1126022559.text_en: Excellent product that washes very well and dries dishes equally well, even plastic ones, which the previous but older one was unable to do.  Very quiet, can you? make it work even at night with peace of mind, saving a little? of current.  Configurable both from the app and from the menu, the latter is very cryptic as there is only a small display where you can read the data but with the help of the manual and the right page nothing complicated.  A single note for the app with which you can? configure everything but not ? It is possible to set the WiFi of the dishwasher always connected, you have to do it right from the menu? cryptic just mentioned. I discovered this by calling assistance to whom I complained that the appliance was disconnected after the same period of time, which made me think of a setting and not a malfunction.  Definitely a product to recommend if you want an excellent dishwasher

1172250266.text_en: Compliant with the sale flexibility of use most home connected. Perfect wash. Intelligent program which thanks to home connect is constantly evolving, a plus. I recommend. The only downside is that delivery times do not comply with the announced deadline and no response to date from Bosch regarding this specific point communicated.

1216235586.text_en: Finally a dishwasher that cleans as well as dries everything. Finally you no longer need a tea towel for drying. In addition, this dishwasher is easy to install thanks to the good instructions. And the programs are easy to personalize and operate remotely using the Bosch home connect app.

1127496888.text_en: This dishwasher does what it promises. I mainly run the eco program on the timer, which takes the machine 4.55 hours, but is energy efficient. There is plenty of choice for other programs. Operation is simple and the machine will let you know via a beep if you have forgotten to press the start button.

1213864890.text_en: The nice thing about this dishwasher is the cutlery drawer at the top, which gives you a lot of extra space in the lower basket. The Perfect Dry system is also very nice! With our previous dishwasher we could always dry the kids' plastic containers by hand, but that is no longer necessary! Highly recommended!

1147715099.text_en: This is another dishwasher in my house, but the first Bosch. We are very pleased. Quiet operation, intuitive operation. An additional shelf for cutlery is a great convenience. The eco program is great. After washing, the dishes are dry and shiny. The ability to start and operate via the app is a really good option.

1184702690.text_en: Having had several dishwashers from different brands, this is the best of all!    It cleans perfectly well, even pans with a well-adhered milk base :D If you are looking for a quiet, economical, spacious, efficient, robust and connected dishwasher, it will be perfect for you!

1129709009.text_en: After a long search I decided to purchase the SMD6TCX00E due to the unbeatable quality/price ratio. Class A (pay attention to the new identification started in 2021) and quality? bosh. The baskets are very sturdy and managing the dishwasher via app simplifies program management.

1145186247.text_en: Machine feels sturdy and radiates quality. If you connect the machine to the smart home app, you can create your own programs (especially combining built-in features such as extra dry).  If I had to mention a negative it would be the lack of the remaining timer on the floor projector.

1176148304.text_en: I am very satisfied with the device. When I ordered it, I didn't even realize that it was a smart device and that I could also control the dishwasher via an app.    The first rinsing results are perfect. The glasses are streak-free, the plastic parts are dry, what more could you want.

1127373140.title_en: Best A rated dishwasher - Fantastic results
1127373140.text_en: This dishwasher is the same size as my previous one but appears larger inside! I can fit more items in! I use the eco setting mainly as it is so cheap to run with brilliant results. It is so quiet too. Plus you just press the door for it to automatically open. It has made my life so much easier.

1174963729.text_en: I have a BOSCH dishwasher SMS 2021 from 1980. I am very happy with the quality as it never broke down and worked flawlessly. Unfortunately, it is broken now and I don't know what to do because the existing services in Zrenjanin will not accept repairs. I am also sentimentally attached to her, and what do you suggest?

1116124430.title_en: So far so good, good price for A rated machine
1116124430.text_en: Purchased as seems very good price for an A rated dishwasher on the new rating scale (A-G).  Quick to install but attaching the door took some time. Lots of smart efficiency settings and so far everything is coming out clean. The cutlery tray takes a bit of getting used to, do prefer a basket

1129476938.text_en: Excellent product. Washes perfectly, very quiet. Good ergonomics, everything has its place. We normally use the ECO program at night and if it weren't for the light you wouldn't know it was washing. The internet connection and the app are useful, you can manage the washes intelligently.

1125925490.title_en: Excellent product with some small flaws
1125925490.text_en: I recently purchased the SMD6TCX00E dishwasher and I must say that I was pleasantly surprised by the quality. cleaning dishes. The dishwasher? equipped with the latest generation cleaning and drying technologies (zeholite) which really makes the difference. Only flaw if so? can you? say, ? the associated app, in the sense that it does not always connect to the appliance and often loses connection. Obviously the dishwasher can? be used without the app, and certainly after the first few days you will no longer use it? what? often, but from it you can download new washing programs that are not available "physically" on the menu? dishwasher controls; for example, I downloaded the quick wash which I then added to my favorites directly from the menu? of the physical appliance. Interestingly, the app indicates the level of water and energy used for each program. In any case, for the moment I am happy and can only recommend the purchase

1125925396.title_en: Excellent product with some small flaws
1125925396.text_en: I recently purchased the SMD6TCX00E dishwasher and I must say that I was pleasantly surprised by the quality. cleaning dishes. The dishwasher? equipped with the latest generation cleaning and drying technologies (zeholite) which really makes the difference. Only flaw if so? can you? say, ? the associated app, in the sense that it does not always connect to the appliance and often loses connection. Obviously the dishwasher can? be used without the app, and certainly after the first few days you will no longer use it? what? often, but from it you can download new washing programs that are not available "physically" on the menu? dishwasher controls; for example, I downloaded the quick wash which I then added to my favorites directly from the menu? of the physical appliance. Interestingly, the app indicates the level of water and energy used for each program. In any case, for the moment I am happy and can only recommend the purchase

1130179043.text_en: The choice of the BOSCH brand is obvious to us.  Very reliable device, the quality of washing is undeniable.  In addition, the Bosch brand is one of the only ones to offer class A devices, which demonstrates the quality of their product development.  I recommend this product.

1155296263.text_en: The height adjustability of the middle drawer is advantageous. However, with long-stemmed glasses, the dinner plates underneath usually no longer fit. If you put the glasses in the lower drawer, damage is inevitable. Are there accessories that protect the edge of the glass?

1129731402.text_en: Are very satisfied with the dish washer only with the Eco Program which takes 5 hours does the door open a little to dry, which was not known that there was an unpleasant smell from the heating. Although after several washes the unpleasant smell decreases

1171090412.text_en: It couldn't have gone better!!! Price/performance is right, machine top!!! Ordering was completely uncomplicated, we paid via PayPal!!!  Dear Elektro Wagner company, always happy and we will recommend you at any time!!! Greetings from Emmendingen near Freiburg i.Br.

1150398056.text_en: It's really too early to judge this appliance. I have only just started to use it. So far, all is well and the machine seems to do a good job. Instructions regarding salt and rinse aid are not clear. I have hooked my machine up to WiFi but really do not see the purpose of this.

1114833786.text_en: Super dishwasher, super quiet, super efficient.    Really practical, ergonomic and easy to use.    Connecting it gives you access to a large number of options: hot water, water hardness, favorite program, sound/light suppression

1131859218.text_en: This machine is SO quiet and efficient! Love the top tier for the cutlery - it washes and dries so much better than before. Think all the options are useful tho so far have only used the Eco and the Auto. I like being told by the app when the programme has finished..

1215846770.text_en: High-quality dishwasher with excellent washing and drying efficiency. Silent operation and light signaling of operation contribute to user comfort. Dish baskets are spacious enough and allow for an even distribution of dishes, ensuring their perfect washing.

1149649893.text_en: After the choice, problem-free installation and operation with the help of Stiftung Warentest.  The machine is very large and can be put in and out very easily.  It is very quiet and it rinses and dries excellently. The glasses and cutlery shine again.

1127795017.text_en: Dream to use. Items come out clean and very dry. Lots of useful features such as home connect-allowing remote control of machine when out of house, automatic door opening-gives the perfect fry for all items without the water collection on top. It's basically silent-which is why the red light is so useful to see when running. We love the third tier rack for utensils and cutlery-so much better than the basket-as this limits positions of items in lower rack, now no constraints due to layout of rack and basket. Chose this machine mainly due to efficiency rating-however, all the added features are so useful. Hopefully this stands the test of time, but 2 year free warranty and 3 extra years for minimal cost was well worth it. Our plumber said it was much easier to install than other machines too. Only downside was the amount of wasteful paper instructions for numerous languages that had to end in the bin-come on Bosch-this was a waste! Should have the option to access instructions in other languages on internet to save the paper.

1125705010.text_en: This is amazing, it dries Everything in the dishwasher perfectly. After being without a dishwasher for a couple of weeks, this does just what it says it does and plenty of easy instructions to set it up for the Perfect clean in the Perfect time, Thank you Bosch

1157049648.text_en: We bought an equivalent device from Siemens 14 years ago, all rows of spikes could be folded down, the noise level was 2dB lower and the device was even illuminated. Since both devices are in the same price range, we are now disappointed.

1174248870.title_en: Bosch dishwasher - does what it promises
1174248870.text_en: I've only had it for a few days, but I'm already very happy with the washing and drying results. I also feel like I can fit more dishes than my old unit, especially pots. Easy to use with and without the app. Highly recommended.

1142031839.title_en: A very good and useful product
1142031839.text_en: A dishwasher should not be missing from any household, you save time, energy, water. This machine would be a suitable option for a family with 4 members, having a fairly large capacity, the type of organization of the shelves is very useful

1130635793.text_en: I moved house and relied on all Bosch appliances.  I saw this dishwasher and I was intrigued by the topic of home automation.  if you also like complete control even remotely, this is it? the right product for you

1159386807.text_en: I am very pleased with the use, zeolite works great. The dishes are perfectly washed and dry. The pots shine like new.  I use the application, which is super helpful. This is the first time I have a dishwasher in which the door opens. I highly recommend it!!

1142429254.text_en: The machine is M A G I J A! All moms will understand: seven dirty glasses in five minutes and before breakfast! My hands are grateful, and I am grateful for my friend because she is quiet, precise, does not leave stains and saves time and money. 60 cm wide recommendation!

1167323027.text_en: After 15 years of good and loyal service from my old Bosch, I took over without apprehension this model which is even more economical in terms of water and energy. The intermediate basket is height adjustable, it's a really well designed product. I recommend.

1156691818.text_en: It is the first of this brand that we have and so far we are very happy with it, it cleans and dries quite well, and at the end of the programs it opens the door and thus finishes drying completely. In addition, it notifies your cell phone that it has finished. I recommend it.

1149568579.text_en: The previous dishwasher was a Neff that did its job for 23 years. Because Neff is no longer available in Belgium, we purchased a device from the same manufacturer. In terms of ease of use, this device is of course a better version

1148705285.text_en: The dishwasher cleans very well and is quiet. A great feature is the automatic opening of the door after the program ends. We built the dishwasher without a handle and the opening function by pressing the front works perfectly. I highly recommend it!

1128380415.text_en: A super cool machine, everything works as it should.. The dry fuction is absolutely perfect... But I thought it was bad that a machine for 12,000 has no light inside... It might be due to an old habit from the old one... But it seemed to be missing...

1214344882.text_en: I am happy with this dishwasher purchase. Cleans, is quiet and fast. The only thing wrong is pre-rinsing, so I don't have to rinse the leftovers under the tap. Although I still have this device new, maybe it is there.

1216207545.text_en: Although we installed it in December, we only started using it in January. And since then I forgot what it's like to wash the dishes by hand. All come out super clean and with minimal effort on our part; just to arrange them in the car). I recommend.

1113920454.text_en: Do I need to say anything else? I think it's enough to say BOSCH. The problem is no longer the dishes or time, the bosch machine does everything for me.  Washes, dries, everything shines, both my husband and I are satisfied❣️ If you don't want a bad life, live it LikeABosch

1129723810.text_en: The dishwasher is easy to install and connect to the wifi. Once you have named your dishwasher (Dave is a good name) it will tell you when the dishes are done. Overall great value for money compared to the competition and user friendly.

1154999227.text_en: Qualitative product, the cutlery drawer is a nice addition, replacing a 16 year old Siemens installed in place of no modification to the front of the door.  Simple and intuitive programming plus a wifi connection

1152714829.text_en: A very nice and solid device with many functions. For me the best deal in terms of price-quality. We chose this device because of the good performance of drying plastic objects such as our baby's pots.

1203560513.title_en: opening door and modifying kitchen plinth
1203560513.text_en: It is a good product, but I would like to point out that it was necessary to modify the kitchen plinth to allow the door to be opened. This detail should be reported during the purchase phase to allow an informed choice.

1149571605.text_en: New dishwasher replaced a 20 year-old Bosch model with a cutlery basket, so weren't sure about the new top cutlery shelf.  But delighted with the quality of the wash, the quietness when running and the relative ease to pack and unpack.

1120761761.text_en: The dishwasher has well-finished details which suggest it is a well-made product. I haven't encountered any problems. The app also works simply and precisely.  Congratulations on the third year of warranty.

1141685071.text_en: The dishwasher runs perfectly. The drying function dries plastic itself, no further drying is necessary. This is rounded off by the “Conect app”, super useful and also connects to my existing smart home!

1128564123.title_en: Super dishwasher, ideal with home connect.
1128564123.text_en: Super dishwasher, quiet, wide choice of different programs and washes super clean.  Ideal with home connect, quick and simple setup, well organized and with a clear delayed start option (start and end time visible)

1151077872.text_en: In general, a very robust product. I quite like the WiFi technology in this model and the feature that you can pair it with Home app. You can get other washing programmes on top of the standard ones. Very happy with our purchase.

1168351732.title_en: Quiet and very good cleaning performance
1168351732.text_en: Very good layout, lots of space, good cutlery drawer, top cleaning performance.  Very quiet, so it doesn't even bother you when you're sitting with guests.  Great value for money.  Would buy it again at any time.

1137222216.text_en: Rinses very cleanly and dries very well. It is also very quiet and even has a whisper program.  It's my first Bosch household appliance. It exceeded my expectations and I'm happy with my new appliance

1157381220.text_en: I chose this dishwasher because it can be integrated and adapts to my kitchen, in addition to being a high-end model with low energy efficiency and a low acoustic level. I just installed it and I hope its performance is good

1216186587.text_en: Bought a new dishwasher last week.  The product was delivered on the agreed day/time, neatly installed and adjusted.  Dishwasher is easy to use and has clear programs. Very satisfied with device and service.

1134286984.text_en: We replaced our old dishwasher with this great Bosch. We are more than satisfied because since then we have finally had great washing results again! It is very quiet when in use, you hardly notice it.

1169548006.title_en: Boscht it out of the park
1169548006.text_en: So pleased with my new Bosch Dishwasher. The Zeolith drying technology is brilliant. This is the first Bosch product I've ever bought, on recommendation I have to say, and very pleased I did. Don't need the Wi-Fi though.

1157607416.text_en: Very good dishwasher, it has a large capacity, the upper tray to place the cutlery gives you more space to put more utensils inside. I recommend it for its capacity and the low light consumption it has.

1183123428.text_en: I had the following experience with this product: the efficient dry function that has 3 options (inactive, active for all programs or active only for the eco program) sometimes works, sometimes not. I had preset a washing program in which the speed perfect function was active, I also selected the efficient dry option active for all programs, the first efficient dry wash cycle worked, the next one did not work. The support people told me that efficient dry does not work together with speed perfect. Although the support people say that these 2 functions do not work together, they can still work together one time. It seems that there is a software limitation missing, I would say that if you activate one of the 2 functions, the other will automatically become inactive. From my point of view, a software update is necessary for this aspect. It took me 1 week of tests to figure out why it works once and then stops working again.   Overall, I am satisfied with the product, leaving aside the software limitation that can be improved through an update. It deserves 5 stars!

1148690476.title_en: A successful purchase and very satisfied
1148690476.text_en: This dishwasher is wonderful, quiet, spacious and organized, with which excellent results are obtained whatever program you set. Furthermore, its energy consumption is one of the lowest on the market.

1186603573.text_en: Our old Bosch dishwasher broke down after 8 years. Bought another Series 6. What is striking is the low noise level and the robustness. We experience the separate cutlery drawer as more convenient than the cutlery basket (mandl in the old one).

1146300521.text_en: We have had a Bosch SMD6TCX00E dishwasher for two weeks now and are very satisfied with it. Very quiet when it runs, and by means of You can operate the varwasser remotely via WiFi and also see if anything needs to be refilled.

1156541431.text_en: Pleased with the Bosch having owned a Jeff for 12 yrs. it seems to take more washing up too but feel it's lacking for a good place to put cooking utensils like a ladle or masher. Things a little bulkier than spoons!

1134148995.text_en: Great device. Lots of space. Well thought out system. EEK A ✅ because we run the dishwasher almost every day.   I can only recommend zeolite technology. Everything is perfectly dry, regardless of whether it is glass or plastic.   Absolutely recommended

1147827877.text_en: At home with 2 small children, the device is used every day. Super quiet. He contacts me via smartphone. It doesn't make any noise when it finishes the work cycle, which is a great advantage with a small child. I recommend.

1214085115.text_en: We like it, cutlery drawer instead of basket is easy to use, in the beginning we had to listen carefully to make sure it was on so it was quiet, good description of how to connect and install, all in all a nice device.

1163865032.text_en: Extremely silent, you don't notice when it's working, excellent capacity and truly effective washes starting from just 90 minutes. But the top feature is the drying system that really works!

1215644456.title_en: Nice device and even I was able to install it
1215644456.text_en: The dishwasher cleans well and, above all, dries well. Very nice not to have to dry things every morning. I also really like being able to set a timer. Installation went smoothly (for me!).

1141437756.text_en: Doesn't really get things properly clean no matter how often I clean inside the machine -and the eco programme is particularly disappointing. I'm afraid it's back to the more expensive German brand next time

1215808942.text_en: Excellent product, the technical characteristics displayed fully correspond to the functioning of the product. among other things, the choice was very careful given specific needs and intensive use.

1131017506.text_en: The machine has great functions and is super quiet. The dishes are very clean, even with burned-on food residue. The very deep cutlery drawer takes up some space on the lower levels. Otherwise perfect.

1201205285.text_en: I have been using this model for 2 years already and it works flawlessly. it is very easy to configure from the application, with each wash I change the content and priorities and the application offers me an optimized program

1160179790.text_en: Quiet dishwasher. It washes very thoroughly and dries very well. The automatic door opening works brilliantly and silently. It has everything a dishwasher should have. Another purchase from the Bosch group that can be recommended

1164852340.text_en: The dishwasher does its job great. It's easy to use and the app gives you a clear overview. In addition, you don't have to wake them up and the dishes are clean and dry at the end

1153951739.title_en: Perfect cleaning helper in the kitchen
1153951739.text_en: We have used the dishwasher several times since purchasing, there are 5 of us in our house and there is a lot to clean. Responds perfectly. Clean and dry dishes (which is the main thing). We are very happy.

1130386925.text_en: Our old dishwasher had served its time for 15 years with Siemens. We are very satisfied with this new dishwasher which meets our expectations and faithful to its washing properties, no complaints

1133725308.text_en: The device is not the cheapest, but you really get value for your money here.  The dishes are super dry and remote control is extremely convenient.  Very simple to operate.  Definitely recommended.

1205223498.text_en: This dishwasher is absolutely great. Everything comes out bone dry and even all plastic items can go back into the cupboard dry.  The old Bosch dishwasher couldn't do that, so it's a very good improvement.

1111680189.text_en: It's amazing, it hardly makes any noise and the dishes come out sparkling because the door push system has given me some headaches because my panel has a handle and I didn't need it.

1159133046.text_en: There are many things that I like about this model, but to highlight two, I will say that it is very quiet and that especially the glassware leaves it cinematic, the difference with the previous model is abysmal.

1153323084.text_en: We are most satisfied with the ease of use, the drying function, the noise level and the program for cleaning the machine. 1 downside: 5 year warranty instead of 2 for this price is a good thing, I think.

1194155731.text_en: I purchased a Bosch built-in dishwasher, everything corresponds to the descriptions, the only thing is that it had a dent on the left side. The shipment also respected the delivery times

1164049392.title_en: Unfortunately not the best cleaning result
1164049392.text_en: Overall, there is little that can be written about the machine. It rinses reliably, but it seems to me that the overall cleaning result is worse compared to an older model.

1110632362.text_en: The dishwasher is simply great, it washes perfectly and it is energy-saving. At the end, it will open itself, so you can set it and go away for the weekend without worrying that the dishes will get stale.

1119148465.text_en: She is new and we are still getting to know each other, but I have to say that she surprised me quite a bit. It is really a step forward in washing controls and settings through the application. The announcement of the termination of the program is really great, I can only recommend it :)

1123071182.text_en: Dishwasher purchased for a new kitchen unit based on previous long-term experience with this brand. So far, it has only been in operation for a short time, but the layout of the interior space and the controls work perfectly.

1215779977.text_en: After three other brands, I returned to Bosch, my search filter was: quiet, energy, A cutlery drawer (much more space in the lower basket), price and delivery time. And I find everything in the Bosch dishwasher

1129029599.text_en: Excellent wash times and consumption. Modular spaces with baskets and "foldable rods". The connection with Smart home needs to be improved and sometimes the buttons don't take control immediately.

1172519119.text_en: This product is of excellent quality, its functionality is very satisfactory, its ergonomics are perfect. Its efficiency is optimal.  We particularly like the dry perfect function.

1136366765.text_en: Excellent dishwasher. Really like the notifications through HomeConnect app telling us when the salt, rinse aid, etc are running low. We like the cutlery tray - beats the old basket style.

1129329009.text_en: Really great, washes very well and finally clean dishes when you take them out of the dishwasher Never disappointed with Bosch And the application which allows you to start it remotely and conveniently

1146396777.text_en: Works perfectly, especially the perfect dry system is a real solution, you don't have to dry anything afterward. And the handy third drawer for cutlery is great too. In short, a top dishwasher.

1164110427.text_en: Purchasing this dishwasher was a great decision. The selection of programs is really large, which is important for a large family because the dishwasher fills up very quickly. The dishes are beautifully washed.

1151311995.text_en: What I liked the most is the quality of the product and the least, for now I don't have any. I recommend this product for its quality and for obtaining excellent washing results.

1207685935.title_en: Super clean dishes, quiet, handy layout
1207685935.text_en: The dishwasher is quiet, washes the dishes super clean and dries very well!! The cutlery drawer is super handy and the rest of the layout is also very nice! Super happy with it! No negatives discovered.....

1135918724.text_en: This washes great, runs quietly and has loads of options.  Love the delay start so I can use it with the cheaper rate electricity. Was more expensive but worth the extra for the quality

1117654455.title_en: Door only opens sporadically to dry
1117654455.text_en: You can activate a setting on the device via the app that opens the door at the end of each program for better drying, unfortunately this function only works sporadically

1120735626.title_en: Nice dishwasher if you find it on sale
1120735626.text_en: In the given price category, it could be illuminated inside and show the time until the end of the program (not just a red light). The competition has these functions in the same price category. Otherwise, no objections.

1150225367.text_en: In addition to fulfilling its basic function of washing, it is very comfortable with its practical trays to put all the kitchen utensils, and it is also the one that uses the least energy. Like Bosch!!!

1139840246.text_en: I am delighted with my purchase, the dishwasher works very well, it washes and dries perfectly (compared to my other dishwasher) The remote connection is very practical.

1128462383.text_en: Excellent dishwasher that guarantees perfect washing of the dishes even with the eco program, it is also particularly silent and guarantees perfect drying

1128462229.text_en: Excellent dishwasher that guarantees perfect washing of the dishes even with the eco program, it is also particularly silent and guarantees perfect drying

1121794140.text_en: We like the design of the dishwasher, that it has a top drawer for cutlery, it's huge (great for a family), it has loads of programmes. We'll see how it passes the test of time, we don't know yet, we have it new.

1134329873.text_en: the loudest dishwasher we've ever had, baskets can no longer be used as flexibly, most of them can no longer be folded. We wouldn't have expected a cheap version given the price.

1141444727.text_en: Once it was installed we loved this dishwasher. The instructions for installing were very complicated though.  We always use the economy setting even though it takes several hours.

1130330949.text_en: This dishwasher is wonderful: super quiet, very efficient and surprisingly quiet. Furthermore, being able to control it from the app is all advantages. Highly recommended!

1160175134.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher and I think it will work as well as the previous one. After a short use, I am very satisfied with the work and the number of programs.

1218281229.text_en: Nice machine. I was skeptical about the cutlery drawer, I was used to a container. But it actually works very well, everything is organized immediately. It was super clean and dry. I'm very satisfied.

1215773556.text_en: Great device! It took some getting used to as we were used to a cutlery basket, but once we get used to it, a cutlery drawer is much nicer! It is nice and quiet and does what it is supposed to do.

1217373405.text_en: We once started with a Bosch that has never let us down. This is even quieter, more energy efficient and dries maximally. Don't bother looking at other brands.

1127885392.title_en: Nice and dry and surprisingly spacious
1127885392.text_en: Our previous dishwasher had cutlery baskets instead of a drawer. That drawer provides a surprising amount of extra space in the two drawers. We now lose our dishes much more easily. In addition, the various fold-out racks are particularly useful. Both on the side and in the back of the drawers.   An important reason for choosing this dishwasher was the promise of dry dishes. Without using an extra drying function (just the normal Eco setting), plastic cups and bread containers are indeed much drier or simply completely dry. Drying with a tea towel is only necessary for parts where it can remain in a puddle on top.   A small negative point for the do-it-yourselfer: the installation manual indicates 2-3 hours as the time required. This turned out to be quite correct in the end because there are many details to pay attention to (such as having to cut off a small part of a plastic piece for mounting behind the dishwasher door). The videos (QR codes) referred to in the manual (1 huge sheet of paper measuring 60*100) sometimes add extra details. It's doable but take your time ;-)

1176677693.text_en: Very useful when you have a lot of dishes to wash, it removes even dry food residues. I recommend everyone to buy a dishwasher, you will not fail.

1147827823.text_en: Really good equipment. With two small children and daily use, it is better than the previous dishwasher. It communicates via smartphone, so it's super quiet. I recommend

1136954297.text_en: The ability to start the machine remotely is a gretat feature. The extra cutlery drawer provides extra room and makes for a better clean. Adjustable tray height also nice.

1148448768.text_en: The control buttons on the machine itself are clear, but it is completely fun to do via the app. The machine is quiet, economical and a handy light on the ground when it is working.

1171433402.text_en: I like the storage of cutlery and being able to modify the necessary space by raising or lowering the baskets, it is quite quiet, does not open automatically
