1213796913.text_en: Everything you would expect from a Bosch, never anything else.  Handy with App.Home Connect with Smart Start function, you can set and operate all functions via the app

1216974500.text_en: Always chose Bosch. No regrets about this either. Easy operation. If you have trouble choosing a program, the app is a great tool.

1152767894.title_en: Good performance with unfortunately little space
1152767894.text_en: Rinses reliably cleanly, but not many tall items or large glasses fit through the cutlery drawer, which means that the dishwasher fills up quickly

1127261883.text_en: I come from an old top of the range Rex, this one? absolutely better, consumes little, silent, Wi-Fi, ? very convenient automatic opening. Obviously it washes very well.

1213479043.text_en: Absolute top quality – as you would expect from Bosch!  I recently purchased a Bosch dishwasher and I can honestly say: this is one of the best purchases I have made in recent years.  You will immediately notice the difference from the first use. The dishes really come out shiny and sparkling - even caked-on pans and glasses with limescale are cleaned perfectly. What strikes me most is the combination of power and silence. The machine runs so quietly that you almost forget it is on.  In addition, the layout is very practical and flexible. Even larger pans and dishes fit effortlessly, and everything dries optimally. The energy efficiency also gives a pleasant feeling: top results with low consumption.  The operation is intuitive, the design is sleek and modern, and the build quality exudes solidity. This is clearly a product that is made to last for years to come. The device also has a red light that turns on when it is washing, so you will see that red light on your kitchen floor. When the washing is finished, the red light on your kitchen floor goes out, and then you know that the washing is finished.   In short: highly recommended for anyone looking for quality, reliability and perfect cleaning results. Bosch never disappoints!

1120905778.title_en: Super clean and very economical in the Eco 50 mode
1120905778.text_en: After 15 years of loyal service from our old Bosch dishwasher, it started to wash and dry worse. So looking for a new one that will hopefully last just as long.  After some research with various brands, we ended up with Bosch again because it also has an A label, which costs more to purchase, but you will quickly earn back due to the low power consumption of approximately 0.53 kWh per Eco 50 wash, especially now that energy prices continue to rise.  In the Eco 50 setting it washes the dishes nicely, but it takes a very long time to do so, we don't find this a problem, we usually only unpack the dishwasher the next day.  If you want faster, you can use one of the other programs, which also wash well, especially with the extra setting options, quickly and very dry (but this does cost more energy and water). The dishwasher has WiFi so you can operate it using an app and see how far it has progressed with the program. You can also download other laundry programs with it if you want, but it is not necessary because there are already many programs on it. We have downloaded the quick 45 degree program, which you can now use from the app, which is super easy to do.  Conclusion: We are very satisfied so far and definitely recommend it, it is a bit more expensive but it pays for itself and the dishes are very clean and dry thanks to the Zeolith drying.  So that's why 5 stars.

1136368350.text_en: The dishwasher is extremely quiet, it's great because it has a zone with additional nozzles, silicone rubber for sensitive dishes and similar and great drying of dishes using zeolith!

1085085474.text_en: The dishwasher is a real kitchen wizard!  With it, great savings are achieved in every respect - saving water, energy and most importantly, saving time.  The washing machine works quietly, so it can be turned on at any time of the day, and all this is even easier with the Bosch Smart Home application. Bosch really deserves top marks in this field.  Like a real wizard, it removes even the most stubborn dirt with silent movements, even on the Eco program (50°).  A precise display of the remaining time until the end of the wash, which is projected on the floor, will make it easier for you to wait for the end of the dishwashing.  By choosing this washing machine, you will definitely not make a mistake and you will get a faithful collaborator and partner in the kitchen.

1131976228.text_en: The dishwasher is a real kitchen wizard! With it, great savings are achieved in every respect - saving water, energy and most importantly, saving time. The washing machine works quietly, so it can be turned on at any time of the day, and all this is even easier with the Bosch Smart Home application. Bosch really deserves top marks in this field. Like a real wizard, it removes even the most stubborn dirt with silent movements, even on the Eco program (50°). A precise display of the remaining time until the end of the wash, which is projected on the floor, will make it easier for you to wait for the end of the dishwashing. By choosing this washing machine, you will definitely not make a mistake and you will get a faithful collaborator and partner in the kitchen.

1087246925.text_en: After 17 years, we decided to change the old washing machine, which was at the end of its life. After a cursory look at the technical centers, with the conclusion that "they are all the same", I started to search a little more in detail on the Internet. At the persuasion of a friend, I began to look more closely at bosch washing machines. The first thing that attracted me, since I love gadgets, is the projection display. I set myself the task of choosing a washing machine with a display. Since I saw the promotion then, and I got a great offer for "Black Friday", I decided on this model.  The first thing I liked after installation was the feeling of opening and closing the door. It is much more pleasant to open compared to the old one. Only commissioning is standard ... salt, shine ... but the definition of water hardness is now through software, not mechanically.   Ok, first washing the dishes ... I deliberately put dirtier dishes than usual, to see how much dirt will "remain" on the surfaces. I start the washing machine and enjoy two things ... one is the display of the status on the floor, the other is the silence with which the washing machine works. Every now and then I pass by the washing machine in order to take a look at the floor and the display, which is beautifully readable on the oak parquet. I look forward to the end of the cycle. 0:00 done. I open the washing machine and I am very surprised ... all the impurities were washed even though I did not use the "strongest" program, and the second delight is that the dishes are literally DRY, even the bottoms of the cups are dry. Excellent, I put the dishes in the cupboards, and I don't have to do any additional cleaning.   Additionally, on the technical side, the drawers appear to be very well made and well thought out. With a little effort, the complete dishes of a family of four fit in the washing machine at once.   One of the things I haven't done yet, which remains to be researched, is connecting the washing machine to a wifi network. Maybe at first those options don't sound like a "must have", but at the very thought of connecting the washing machine to the Internet, it sounds like a new segment that I hadn't thought about before.

1129755931.title_en: Very good washing machine - great value for money
1129755931.text_en: We have had the washing machine for two weeks and our impressions so far are as follows: Plus: We have the impression that the washing machine is built robustly and solidly, as if the sheet metal is thicker than on the previous washing machine we had, the seals between the washing machine and neighboring elements are excellent. The washing machine washes well and dries well, and the control is intuitive and simple.  Minus: The maximum height of the front panel is too small for our kitchen, because our worktop is quite high, so the element with the washing machine sticks out compared to the others. It would be great if the height of the beštek shelf could be adjusted, because our spoons are quite wide, so we can't stack them as in the instructions, but closer to the middle of the top drawer, because they get stuck, so they fit less, but we still need to experiment a bit with that.

1141467810.text_en: After many years of using an older model dishwasher from another manufacturer, there was a need to buy a new one. The decision fell on this Bosch model and it's really a choice you can't go wrong with. Top quality and performance, easy to manage and use. There are enough options for everyone to adapt the dishwashing to their needs. The cutlery drawer is a real find and much more practical than a standard basket. Additional nozzles and rubberized parts on the basket that prevent dishes from sliding are also a big advantage. Also, a useful addition is the projection on the floor of the remaining time until the end of washing. All recommendations!

1215339524.text_en: Purchased this model to replace our previous A-brand dishwasher, which broke down just outside the warranty. Installed the new one myself, and that was surprisingly easy. The timer projection on the floor is more convenient than expected and the dishes come out really clean and dry. With my previous A-brand everything still remained damp, but this one is really ready and can be cleaned out as soon as it beeps. We now use it more often, especially at dinners or parties, it is ideal: the first batch of cooking and preparation is dry by the time we have finished dinner and dinner, so I can immediately run a second batch.

1206656552.text_en: This is my first dishwasher, so I have nothing to compare it to. But I am delighted - it washes excellently, there are no food or detergent residues on the dishes, the glasses shine like crazy even in relatively hard water. The dishes are perfectly dry after washing - in the case of metal or glass; drops sometimes stick to thin-walled plastics, but I expected that and it's not a problem. Door opening can be set after each program. The dishwasher is spacious, the top drawer can be adjusted to three heights and the spindles can be tilted in different ways. The motor itself is very quiet, but the roar of the water can be heard loudly at times. But it will be lost during the day. The basic controls on the dishwasher are simple, any other settings are better via the app. The cutlery drawer works great. Projecting onto the floor is such an unnecessary piece of crap, but it turned out to be very useful :) Bottom line - I'm very satisfied and I hope that the relatively high price will pay off with a long life. When choosing, pay attention to the labeling of a large number of models, which is confusing for the user - a different number or letter at the end can indicate a significantly different model.

1083069975.text_en: Excellent dishwasher, well designed, special drawer for cutlery (I didn't have it on the old washing machine). Clean and dry dishes.  The washing machine works quietly, the display with duration and washing processes is a great thing. My recommendation!!

1127917279.text_en: I'm really satisfied with the machine, the baskets are beautiful, I was most impressed by the rubber for the glasses in the upper basket so they don't slip, plus the sprinkler in the upper basket that can be turned on if necessary for larger bowls, e.g.    The machine is entirely made of stainless steel and is made in Germany..the timer on the floor is a hit..I'm just waiting for the new kitchen so we can install it and then my heart will be in the right place :) Thank you BOSCH

1183249912.text_en: I appreciate the possibility to set many things as needed (light, sound, door opening...) and wifi connection. Washes and dries perfectly. She is really quiet. The cutlery drawer and the upper basket allowing for height adjustment are great.

1206324604.text_en: When I bought this dishwasher, I did not expect how quiet it would be when it is running, we hardly know about it. I also really like its interior arrangement, especially the top drawer for cutlery, which is more practical than a classic basket. Drying with Zeolite is really noticeable, the dishes are beautifully dry after the end of the cycle, even plastic boxes. The only thing I see as a minor minus is the longer Eco program, but on the other hand, thanks to it, the dishwasher consumes a minimum of water and energy. A big benefit for me is also the projected time to finish the washing program on the floor, I hesitated about this when choosing it compared to the Series 4, but in the end I was very pleasantly surprised.

1136885402.text_en: After washing the dishes for the first time, we were surprised at how quiet the washing machine is. Until now, we didn't have a third drawer for accessories, so we like the fact that there is more space in the bottom drawer. The washing machine is great.

1128974644.text_en: We have only had the washing machine for a few days, but so far we are satisfied.

It also rinses well plastic dishes (eg Tupperware). Dishes regardless of their size and shape are very easy to place in the washing machine and are well secured. I also like the TimeLight function, which in an innovative way provides information about the course of washing dishes. I am also very satisfied with the speed of washing dishes. All in all, an excellent product designed to fit perfectly into any modern designed and equipped kitchen.

1084750989.text_en: We took the time from the day of purchase to test this washing machine completely. We paid attention from installation itself to washing the machine. Bosch engineers and designers thought of everything. Installation and use are equally simple. Instructions are available in digital and paper form. The programs are clear and the autonomy is impeccable. The only thing she lacks is to open the apartment door herself and to install herself. This washing machine "doesn't have anything". It even gives information about which process is currently processing. Eh, even if she herself puts the dishes in the cupboards when she washes them... humanity would complain if robots were stealing our jobs. Bosch fulfilled all our expectations this time as well.

1086973033.text_en: Some things are irreplaceable!!!  1) The old washing machine broke down (just before the holidays) 2) While waiting for the new one, the husband solemnly declared that he would wash the dishes until the new one arrived 3) You can guess what it looked like... :)) 4) One of the rare non-replaceable things is the dishwasher... and the other is the husband, of course (but not as a replacement for the washing machine...) YOU WANT SUPER CLEAN DISHES and PLENTY OF TIME FOR OTHER ENJOYMENTS - HIRE A WASHER BOSCH DISHWASHER... and leave some other things to the husband... for example to set it up. ;)) CHECKED 100%

1215413961.text_en: I am very happy with this dishwasher.     Pros: It is very quiet, which is very nice for a user with a young family. The zeolite drying technique works very well. I am also very happy with the indicator light that shines on the ground, super useful for time management! Many options to raise and lower the racks. It is clearly indicated which can do this and how it should be done.     Negatives: dishwasher does not have the option to automatically open after running, so that it can cool dishes. Too bad Bosch doesn't have an option for a basket instead of a drawer. Pol spoons don't fit on the top drawer.

1184587955.text_en: This dishwasher is a great choice for demanding customers. First of all, it works very quietly (42 dB), which will be appreciated by everyone in an open kitchen. It can accommodate a lot of dishes thanks to 3 baskets and the adjustable VarioDrawer drawer. The programs are varied - from fast to economical, and the "ExtraDry" option really works - the dishes are dry, even plastic ones. Home Connect technology allows you to control the dishwasher via an app - it's convenient, especially with the notification function. The loading sensor adjusts water consumption, which can be seen on the bills. The fully integrated front with an elegant InfoLight indicator light on the floor is a nice touch. It works flawlessly, is intuitive to use and economical.

1092176067.text_en: 9 months ago, we decided to renovate the kitchen, and for the new kitchen, when choosing new appliances, we chose to buy Bosch appliances. The ratio between what was purchased and what was received is very satisfactory, so our rating is 5. The washing machine is quiet and cleans the dishes very well. I really like the interior design of the washing machine and its option to connect the washing machine to a mobile phone, and of course what I like most is the screen on the floor that shows how much time the washing machine has left to run.

1150837119.title_en: It seems ok, but not entirely
1150837119.text_en: When purchasing a top-shelf dishwasher from one of the best household appliances companies, I expected something more. The old Bosch dishwasher, which was twelve years old, is not much different from the new one. I chose this model because of Zeolith, I hoped that I would finally be able to take out the plastic water bottles, bowls and cups and put them in the cabinet instead of placing them around the kitchen. Unfortunately, even with the PefectDry system turned on, the dishes are not dry as you can see in the attached photos. Maybe I expected miracles, but Zeolith is described and promoted as such a miracle. The drawers are cool, but still wobbly, the competition probably has better guides, one company has ball guides and it definitely works better. If I had known that it would look like this, I would have probably bought a model over a thousand cheaper without Zeolith or another company because I have the impression that I could be more satisfied despite the lack of Zeolith.

1152378006.text_en: The washing machine is great!!!!!   So it can't be better.  Dishes should be perfectly clean and dry after washing. The plastic dishes are dried and ready for disposal.  After the old washing machine, which did its job, we decided to buy a bosch dishwasher and we have never regretted it. So perfect, it couldn't be better.  If you are hesitating about buying a bead, you will certainly not go wrong by buying this bead.  All recommendations for this bead!!!!

1207262638.text_en: The dishwasher is spacious, in my opinion, it has a great layout of baskets. We were surprised by the possibility of creating our own programs or even downloading ready-made programs. Control is simple and intuitive, the dishwasher is surprisingly very quiet, it cleans as described by the manufacturer, efficiently and surprisingly economically. Thanks to the Zeolith technology, it dries perfectly. We are satisfied with the purchase

1150087864.text_en: After 14 years, I replaced my Siemens with this Bosch model. I've been using it for three weeks. I am very satisfied, the drying is actually much better than the old, very high model at that time. A lot of programs that can be added to the application level. The intensive zone works great. Personally, I use the third cutlery basket for flat caps or large knives, and I left the old basket because it's more convenient for me. Display of time remaining, really useful. Additionally, notification from the application is perfect. I really recommend this model. The perfect dishwasher.

1109739598.text_en: It has many interesting functions, e.g. the eco program that saves energy, and many other programs for every occasion. It also has special nozzles for intensive washing of dishes after breakfast cereals, which often stick to the bowl and are difficult to remove (of course, cereals). And of course Zeolith, which improves the drying of dishes. Steel bottom, great possibility of arranging the interior for various types of dishes. Not to mention the time display - a projector that displays the time on the floor next to the dishwasher (fully built-in version), and the possibility of compatibility with a smartphone. It works relatively quietly.

1088448069.text_en: The washing machine washes well; the dishes can be stacked very nicely and there is plenty of room (family of 4, dishes from the whole day). It is very quiet, you can sleep in the next room with the door open. It has a time indication on the floor. It has Wifi through which it can be controlled, which is much easier than typing in buttons. A bit expensive but the quality seems great!

1147173868.text_en: The dishwasher looks modern at first glance, but I don't recommend the cutlery drawer, which everyone recommends, the cutlery is not washed, of course, not all of it, but selectively, forget about washing the buckwheat even on the dishes, the cutlery drawer makes it very difficult to use the basket below because something is always too high and doesn't fit, at the lower and upper prices it also often happens that it doesn't wash the dishes, the Bosch I had previously for 12 years without failure was much better. I do not recommend this equipment, honest opinion, the cost of the cutlery is a failure and it is probably its fault related to other problems.

1182268434.text_en: This fully built-in dishwasher from Bosch pleasantly surprised me with its performance and smart functions. Thanks to the efficient washing system, the dishes are always perfectly clean and dry, even for plastic containers. I appreciate the quiet operation that I can hardly hear, which is great especially in an open kitchen.  Another big plus is the connection to the Home Connect application, where I can control the dishwasher remotely or set a notification when the program ends. The flexible interior arrangement with a height-adjustable basket and a third drawer for cutlery is super practical.  In addition, the dishwasher is very economical, which can be seen in the consumption of water and electricity.

1129455751.text_en: We have been looking for a dishwasher for a long time that has good drying capabilities and this Bosch with zeolite turned out to be perfect. Finally, all dishes, including plastic, are perfectly dry without the need for additional wiping. It is spacious with large baskets and a drawer for beštek which is a dream of dreams. All praise to Bosch and recommendation to others to buy.

1142059439.title_en: A washing machine that really washes
1142059439.text_en: So far we have had no luck with dishwashers. Until now, until we switched to a Bosch dishwasher. Bosch simply confirms that it is the number 1 brand in the category of best buys for household appliances. We no longer need to wash the dishes before putting them in the Bosch washing machine, as we had to do with dishwashers of other brands.

1120989870.title_en: There is nothing she hasn't washed!
1120989870.text_en: When buying a new kitchen, we decided on all Bosch household appliances. We have no objection to any of them, on the contrary! However, I would like to highlight this dishwasher in particular. I have had experience with several brands, but none leave the impression of this level of quality. The drawers are solid, both are adjustable, the grates can be lowered, all the dishes fit. What particularly attracted me was the accessory drawer because I find it more hygienic that way, which turned out to be correct. Here is a year of use, not a dirty piece of dishes has come out. I absolutely recommend it to anyone and I'm sure that when he does his thing, I'll take the same one.

1185550508.title_en: The Bosch dishwasher is number one
1185550508.text_en: The fully built-in Bosch dishwasher pleased me with its design, storage space and functions. I welcomed the practical drawer for cutlery, the time projector, thanks to which I have an overview of the time course of washing.  I am pleasantly surprised by the quiet operation, low consumption of water and energy.  This dishwasher is a joy to use.

1129473928.text_en: After our previous, free-standing one broke, we were wondering if we would like a free-standing or built-in one again. Since this model has TimeLight, it is predominantly built-in. The assembly instructions are clear, and the washing machine in these few washes gives an indication that it is a good device. We used the automatic program (there are recommendations on the forums that it is best to choose it in most cases) and so far it has always estimated that it needs less time than planned for washing.  Drying with Zeolith technology ultimately gives better results than the usual one and with less steam at the end, so when you open the door of the washing machine, less comes out, which is more convenient for us.  And that it is quite quiet, in any case quieter than our previous model.

1087825265.text_en: We are intensive dishwasher users, and since we bought a Bosch dishwasher, the entire dishwashing process has reached a new level. From stacking dishes, quiet and almost silent operation, quality of washed dishes... Easy and simple assembly with very good instructions. For every praise and recommendation! :)

1083055625.text_en: This is not my first Bosch washing machine, but this is the one!! The dishwasher is well organized, the dish rack works great. The dishes are impeccably clean, shiny and dry. The washing machine is quiet while working, the display with the duration is a great thing.  Definitely recommended!!

1141768862.text_en: The Bosch SMV6ZCX42E dishwasher is perfection, everything works flawlessly and I really don't know what else it should have to make it even better. It has a really high-quality performance, easy and simple use, spacious and well-designed baskets, perfectly washes and dries, it is very quiet, and features such as anti-slip strips, time light, Zeolith technology are an added bonus, but also very handy things that in the end were decisive for me to decide on that bowl from series 6, instead of one from 4, as I had originally planned. It was bought at a good sale, so this was definitely the best buy ever!

1209155298.text_en: Our new dishwasher is great, the best thing about it is that it washes perfectly, we had an older type, but you can see a big difference in how the dishes are washed even better and especially dried! A big advantage is the lighting in the dishwasher and a plus display on the floor with a time indicator

1138992608.text_en: Believe it or not, this is our first dishwasher ever! We finally moved into our apartment and are doing the kitchen our way, and we decided on this acclaimed model! We can't wait to install it in the new kitchen and try it out! We are sure that it will delight!

1088475701.text_en: A large selection of programs in which you can dose the salt according to the hardness of the water, very quiet, the dishes are dry after washing, which is not the case with other washing machines. A big plus is the third drawer for dishes, so that the other two drawers have more space for dishes.

1180803900.text_en: The installation instructions on YOU TUBE helped us with the purchase. The washing machine steps on the unit, compared to the old model that served for many years, it is much quieter. We like the top drawer for cutlery and small cups. We are very satisfied with the washing performance.

1086861698.text_en: With our new Bosch washing machine, we have entered a new generation of dishwashing.  The washing machine gives us enough space for our dishes.  With the new Boscg washing machine, we got more time for rest and leisure.  Well done Bosch!

1142385899.text_en: After a long search for a new dishwasher, the choice fell on the SMV6ZCX42E. We haven't regretted it, the washing machine is really quiet and significantly more powerful than the previous ones. It is for every recommendation.

1216175750.text_en: This dishwasher is great, very convenient to operate, washes and dries everything to perfection, and is extremely economical due to its eco mode....Great machine!!!

1136368515.text_en: After 12 years of full satisfaction, we again decided on Bosch and this quality model. We hope that it will serve us at least as much as the previous one

1131789752.text_en: Extremely quiet and at the same time very powerful because it removes even the most stubborn stains from dishes. The special part for washing glasses or small dishes is very useful.

1087225932.text_en: Great device!!!  The dishes shine and everything is dry, I'm really surprised!  And the most important thing is that the wife is very satisfied :)

1090521919.text_en: A beautiful and highly efficient dishwasher. It is quiet and washes delicate glasses and glassware fantastically. I recommend!

1091849033.title_en: It will only be in full operation
1091849033.text_en: The washing machine has just been installed and we only turned it on once for testing.  First impressions are excellent - everything shines :-)

1180753626.text_en: It meets all our requirements. variable baskets, silent. Possibility to connect to the Internet. Everything perfectly dry.

1209157000.text_en: Super dishwasher with perfect programs, super lighting when loading and unloading the salt filling.
