It is also very roomy - it can easily accommodate dishes from larger meals. The dishwasher is solidly made and its design fits perfectly into modern interiors. Additionally, using it is economical - both in terms of water and energy consumption, which translates into lower bills. The perfect choice for those looking for performance and elegance in one.

1130429533.text_en: Top quality dishwasher, quiet and attractive in design.

1130195780.text_en: It washes excellently and is very spacious for washing large dishes.

1139843103.text_en: The device washes well even with cheaper tablets.

1136325623.text_en: I am satisfied. Wash and dry the dishes well.

1105597433.title_en: The imagination that envelops my judges
1105597433.text_en: Imagination...we can't do without it.  What is imagination? The thought process of imagining future events, the work of the mind that helps us create creative.  And so while I'm fantasizing....my Bosh bowl sucks everything I put in it!  And I still have to imagine what she could do even more enchantingly to amaze me again and again when I open it and say WOW for 101 times because she surprised me with her ingenuity in approaching every stain and dirt from her perspective, to perfection!  And this morning I opened it and said WOW.  Sometimes I feel like giving her a kiss because she saves me!

1084660053.text_en: We have already used Bosch washing machines before, with which we were very satisfied. The new Series 6 washing machine has an additional waste drawer that saves space on the bottom drawer, where there is no longer a waste basket. This provides additional space for pots and plates. The central drawer is adjustable in height, which is convenient for long cases. I really like the display of the duration of the washing cycle, which is projected onto the floor. It is also very practical to dry, so the dishes can be stored immediately. All in all, series 6 is an excellent helper in the kitchen that you can't live without.

1134201570.text_en: recommendation to everyone! high quality and silent.

1104122159.text_en: If you are still wondering which dishwasher to buy, I recommend the smv6zcx42e model - it's poetry when it comes to quiet operation and the quality of washed dishes. Folding baskets make it easier to wash pots and the zeolite system leaves the plastics dry. For me it's a bomb.

1086300157.text_en: We are satisfied with the washing machine. The previous one was bosh and this one is bosh. We have received recommendations for them from everyone and we are still not looking for them. The only thing that needs to be taken care of is that it is taken with an inox interior, which is already in the mid-upper range of washing machines. What was a condition for us was the visible time, how long the washing process still takes. My wife was in favor of a partially built-in one precisely because of the time display, and I was in favor of a complete one because of the aesthetics. But we found a compromise and bought a fully built-in one with a timer function that is commendable. We planned to buy the previous model, but it was no longer in stock at our dealer, so with a little bargaining, we got this newer model for a small extra charge of HRK 100. The biggest difference is that this one has the Home Connect function, which was not a requirement for us at the start. Now that we have it an interesting function to brag to friends :). Normally, we don't like to leave devices on when we're not at home, so the function doesn't mean much to us. Except maybe a pill counter that counts exactly how many pills you have left and notifies you when they're low. It is also possible to manage the functions of the washing machine via mobile phone, see how much time is still needed and receive a notification when it has finished. I think that SW has some bug because from time to time it can "go crazy" and does not report anything even though it has finished and a notification comes but is not displayed. After the soft restart, the washing machine works properly. Well, here's a little criticism about that.   And be sure to make sure that your washing machine has a third drawer, without it, a lot of space is wasted on the laundry box.

1142542294.text_en: After 20 years, my husband gave me a new kitchen with new appliances. When we were looking at dishwashers, we immediately decided on Bosch because we got recommendations from all our friends and neighbors and heard only the best. In the sales center, they recommended this one with the Zeolith drying method, series 6, as one of the top products. Bought it yesterday, tested it immediately and used it twice already. It is extremely quiet, almost inaudible, and the dishes are perfectly clean and dry. Washed quickly, quietly and thoroughly. Warmest recommendations, top quality and design, perfect product.

1084673522.text_en: I am very satisfied with the dishwasher. It fits a lot of dishes, the drying of plastic dishes is excellent, the removal of stubborn stains (e.g. a pan after roasting meat) is excellent. I'm really satisfied. I like the separate section for cutlery, everything is clear and easy to put away. It's the first time I've encountered management through a mobile application and I was a little skeptical at first, but it's actually a great thing. Ease of management, program selection, connection without any problems. I hope that it will stay that way and that it will serve me for many years.

1084673519.text_en: I am very satisfied with the dishwasher. It fits a lot of dishes, the drying of plastic dishes is excellent, the removal of stubborn stains (e.g. a pan after roasting meat) is excellent. I'm really satisfied. I like the separate section for cutlery, everything is clear and easy to put away. It's the first time I've encountered management through a mobile application and I was a little skeptical at first, but it's actually a great thing. Ease of management, program selection, connection without any problems. I hope that it will stay that way and that it will serve me for many years.

1087526639.text_en: I bought a Bosch washing machine 10 years ago. Perfect, practical, perfectly washed dishes. If I hadn't moved, I probably wouldn't have bought another one because this one still worked perfectly. However, a new apartment needs a new dish, right? That's why I bought this new one without much thought and I'm sure I'll be very satisfied again. What I like the most is that it has a special drawer for laundry, instead of a basket, and this drip-free drying technology! Due to the excellent previous experience, I intend to buy other Bosch household appliances!lp

1128934516.text_en: I decided on this Bosch dishware model because it had everything a dishware should have, plus it was made in Germany.  Zeolith drying also dries plastic really well, of course if your machine is full of plastic some water will remain, but there is no help there.  The machine seems to be made of high quality and in combination with the recommended Finish quantum ultimate tablets, it cleans really well even when I turn on the dishes after 2-3 days until my dishes accumulate.    All in all, a quality product that I don't think you can go wrong with.

1137308637.text_en: The washing machine is very functional, I like the option to change the height of the baskets (for larger plates) and additional shelves, special nozzles for heavily soiled areas, excellent drying (even plastic) and VERY QUIET operation (since we usually start the washing machine late at night). It's a very nice (especially for kids ;)) indicator that shows the operating time and the current washing step. Of course, there is safety and energy saving. The instructions are clear and very detailed, it is worth studying them. We are very satisfied with the device, we hope for long-term use.

1184361487.text_en: When my second dishwasher broke down, I immediately started looking for one that would meet my requirements. And this dishwasher really fulfills them.  It is beautifully spacious, it can fit a lot of dishes, a perfect basket for cutlery, water jets that are adapted so that water reaches all the dirty places.  The dishwasher opens by itself after washing and ventilates beautifully. I am also grateful for the light that goes out by itself. And it can also be controlled via a mobile app. The dishes are really beautifully clean.  Energy saving.  For me, it is the TOP dishwasher.

1216196404.text_en: We specifically chose this dishwasher with zeolite drying technology, because we still use quite a bit of plastic tableware in our family for the children. I was a bit skeptical, but boy am I pleasantly surprised! All plastic dishes are really dry. We also find the indication on the floor that alternates between time remaining and symbol (e.g. rinse) very useful. Installation was easy and the dishwasher delivers really good results. So far I haven't had anything that hasn't come out clean. In short, we are very happy with it!

1085537604.text_en: I am very satisfied with the dishwasher. It fits a lot of dishes, the drying of plastic dishes is excellent, the removal of stubborn stains (e.g. a pan after roasting meat) is excellent. I like the separate section for cutlery, everything is clear and easy to put away. It's the first time I've encountered management through a mobile application and I was a little skeptical at first, but it's actually a great thing. Ease of management, program selection, connection without any problems. I hope that it will stay that way and that it will serve me for many years.

1083312235.text_en: PREVIOUSLY SATISFIED WITH THE PURCHASED PLATE, SATISFIES ALL CONDITIONS, SUPER QUIET, EXCELLENTLY CLEAN DISHES, CLEANS INTENSIVE ZONES AND THE Stubborn STAINS WITHOUT PRE-RINSING, EXTRA DRYING OPTION DRIES ALL DISHES, ESPECIALLY PLASTIC DISHES, VARIO DRAWER GIVES EVEN MORE SPACE, SO IT FITS IN THE MACHINE A LOT OF DISHES, TIME LIGHT EXCEPTIONAL AND ELEGANT DISPLAY OF THE REMAINING WASHING TIME, THE HOMECONNECT APP IS GREAT FOR MANAGING THE MACHINE EVEN WHEN WE ARE NOT AT HOME. THE MACHINE IS EXCELLENT AND ALL RECOMMENDATIONS TO FUTURE BUYERS!

1160779260.text_en: The dishwasher has a serious design defect, because the dishes washed in it simply smell like a dirty rag. All maintenance procedures using the manufacturer's materials, several visits by warranty technicians and the replacement of virtually all components did not help for more than a few days. Drama...

1184332775.text_en: After almost a year of using Bosch SMV6YCX05E, I can confidently recommend this model. The dishwasher is quiet (42 dB), solidly made and very functional. The Home Connect system allows remote control and access to additional programs. TimeLight displays the time on the floor, and EfficientDry and Zeolith guarantee effective drying, even of plastics. Baskets with the Flex and Rackmatic systems make loading easier, and the loading sensor and detergent dosing system optimize consumption. The Auto, Eco and SpeedPerfect+ programs work effectively and quickly. Additionally, the Extra Clean Zone function perfectly removes difficult dirt. The stainless steel interior is easy to keep clean. This is modern, energy-saving and reliable equipment - definitely worth the price. I recommend this model to everyone who is undecided!

1087633136.text_en: We are very satisfied with this washing machine.  In addition to doing its job superbly in the domain of washing, we are also delighted with the drying based on zeolite technology (PerfectDry). On the old washing machine, it often happened that the dishes were still damp or at least dewy. With this Bosch washing machine, these problems are no longer present, the dishes are always completely dry.  For the "more advanced", there is also the option of using the Bosch Smart Home app and connecting the washing machine to a Wi-Fi network.  In short: a superb device whose quality justifies the price.

1128416592.text_en: A dishwasher that deserves all the praise. So far, Bosch has never let us down, so I believe it won't let us down now either. The washing machine washes cleanly, I like the upper part the most, which is intended for cutlery, so the other parts are left for larger dishes. All recommendations!

1142578021.text_en: The dishwasher lived up to expectations, it is very quiet in operation, saves water and energy, and at the same time washes and dries perfectly thanks to Zeolith technology. The display of the remaining time until the end of the wash, which is projected on the floor, is a big plus, as is the use of the Bosch Smart Home application.  The upper drawer for the cutlery is much more practical than the basket, although it cannot fit larger accessories, but it is certainly welcome because it makes a difference. It is built robustly and we hope it will serve us for many years.  Kudos to Bosch!

1088423575.text_en: Since until now, due to the very limited space in the kitchen, we didn't have a dishwasher, we didn't even know what its benefits were... As all other kitchen appliances are of proven Bosch quality, there was no doubt about choosing a washing machine from the same manufacturer. After being informed about the characteristics, the choice fell on this particular washing machine and it justified all the characteristics mentioned in the description...extremely quiet, excellent programs, very spacious, low water consumption...never again a kitchen without a washing machine!

1091218739.title_en: Poor washing and drying of cutlery,
1091218739.text_en: The washing machine is intuitive and washes most of the dishes well, however, we are not satisfied with the option of increased drying of the dishes - the dishes still get wet!   Cutlery is washed by hand because it does not wash well in the washing machine.  In these two and a half months of use, the washing machine "failed" two or three times and it was not clear to us what we pressed wrong.  It is necessary to approve the wireless control every time on the washing machine, otherwise you cannot start it "remotely", if you accidentally forgot.  Ignition via mobile phone and notification of what is missing in the washing machine or the existence of a fault and monitoring via mobile phone is a good feature.    Although we are generally satisfied with the cleanliness of the dishes after washing and the functioning of the washing machine, we believe that the price is too high considering the shortcomings and especially that we bought it because of Zeolite drying, which we are not satisfied with.

1131777562.text_en: I haven't used the washing machine for the first time yet, but I hope that it will meet the requirements: that of course it washes well, that the partitions on the lower shelf can be fully lowered, that the dishes dry well at the end, that it has a tray for cleaning and that it writes a timer for how long it is still washing...these are some of the reasons why I decided on this model. Since I have to register for a refund, which is currently on sale, within 30 days, and the new kitchen is not ready yet, I will do a new review when I see how it works.

1083624053.text_en: Easy to install, quiet in operation, excellent quality. The third accessory basket, although it seems unnecessary at first, is actually a hit. Also, the ability to adjust the middle level to a higher or lower level without removing it greatly facilitates adjustment, depending on the height of the dishes. A series of possibilities that even after a month I didn't manage to discover them all!  Very satisfied with the work, washing efficiency and spaciousness.  Much better than the previous washing machine I owned.   Overjoyed!

1137659132.text_en: We use the washing machine every day and are very satisfied! The cutlery drawer is something I could no longer imagine a washing machine without. In addition to leaving more space in the lower basket, it enables a more orderly arrangement of accessories, which means that all accessories are always clean, regardless of the quantity.  The display that shows the time remaining until the end of the program is quite useful for us, but we were most delighted by the fact that the programs are really not loud and that the dishes come out completely dry!  We recommend!

1158354134.text_en: This is my second dishwasher of this brand, and my choice was fully conscious and supported by arguments. I can definitely say that it is excellent in every respect, especially considering its cleaning efficiency, low noise level during operation and water and energy saving. These were my main selection criteria, and I'm glad they were definitely met. To sum up, I highly recommend this product to anyone looking for an efficient, quiet and economical built-in dishwasher

1140928149.text_en: Points with "+" compared to other machines: The light projection of the process from the machine on the kitchen floor is very useful (compared to the light point).  Points with ''-'': The projection board that is attached to the counter is mounted with some "nails!!!" (I was expecting holzsurub, it seems more professional) It is not easy to find the information about drying with Zeolith, which of the machine's programs activates this function, how long must the door be kept closed after the end of the program?

1132406721.text_en: Extremely quiet built-in washing machine, perfectly washed and dried dishes. A large selection of programs according to the types of dishes and a good selection of additional functions make this washing machine an essential appliance in our household. So far, I haven't had a problem with some dishes not being washed well.   The cutlery drawer increases the possibility of washing dishes because it is a much better option than the basket inside the washing machine. Programs provided for everyone and the duration of the program is short, so the energy consumption is in accordance with the chosen one.

1171443146.text_en: It is a built-in Bosch, series 6, SMV6ZCX42E. The saucepan is 2 years and 2 months old, so it was 2 months out of warranty. The drying part, the zeolite, broke, and the ladle no longer works. According to the authorized Bosch repairman who was supposed to come to repair the ladle, the repair is not worth it because the zeolite costs about 400 EUR. According to him, it is better to buy a new saucepan with a full warranty. My experience with Bosch is very bad and I don't think I will buy Bosch appliances again.

1088021383.title_en: The most important household appliance - the dishwasher
1088021383.text_en: It's only when something doesn't work well or doesn't work at all that you realize its importance. In a household that has 6 members and fills 2 pots a day, the lack of it showed how important this machine is today. From the consumption of water, electricity and detergent to the most important thing, time. In addition to the fact that this is a very practical, quiet and economical machine, this juicer is large enough and adaptable to all our needs. That feeling when someone gives you back 2 hours a day, indescribable! :)

1090992780.text_en: Totally brutal machine... I didn't expect anything else from Bosch

1172480627.text_en: This is the second BOSCH dishwasher. The previous one served for 15 years. I was looking for equipment that is quiet, efficient, economical, with the ability to select programs with shortened washing time and good drying, and this equipment meets my expectations. An additional advantage is the operation via the application, which allows you to turn on the dishwasher at specific hours (for those who have lower tariffs). A nice addition is the display of the dishwasher's operating time on the floor. I recommend the product.

1127454812.text_en: The washing machine is really great.

1184703447.text_en: along with the new kitchen, we bought a new Bosch dishwasher. we chose for a long time, read various tests, reviews, etc. and the Bosch brand came out the best. this dishwasher meets all our requirements - energy class A, low noise and so far perfect washing.    made in Germany fully integrated panel energy class A perfectly dry dishes low noise guarantee Aqua stop projection of the remaining time on the floor automatic opening after the end of washing none yet

1082306004.text_en: The washing machine is quiet while working, the display with the duration is very impressive. It seems to be of high quality as far as manufacturing is concerned. The dishwasher is excellent. The only problem is the assembly - there were no instructions in Croatian or English and, although there are videos that guide you through the process, the instructions are not clearly put together. Fortunately, we had a Bosch washing machine before, so we shortened the process.  The cool thing is the ability to connect with the Home Connect app. so it can be managed that way.

1108802673.title_en: I waited 3 days with the dishes until the courier arrived.
1108802673.text_en: Easy and pleasant to assemble. Roomy compared to the previous Bosch (which lasted 10 years - changed due to a broken hinge). Impressions after the first washes are very good. Nice function of lowering and adjusting the middle drawer. Cool display on the floor. Very quiet - I can finally sleep normally (the previous Bosch was not as loud as a tank, but you could hear it). Overall, great experience. I hope it will also serve me for a long time.

1132008348.text_en: We recently purchased this dishwasher and are very pleased with the results. It achieved perfect results, with the practical flexibility of the drawers and it is almost silent so you can use it late at night without disturbing anyone. Also the dishes are perfectly dry and we no longer have to worry about leaving wet dishes in the dishwasher. Home connect is the icing on the cake :) I would highly recommend this dishwasher to anyone looking for an efficient and reliable product.

1132308885.text_en: An excellent device that has phenomenal efficiency. Since we bought it, it has saved us time, which we are now using by reading reviews for the next bosch appliances we will buy :) This washing machine with zeolite technology and extra dry effect leaves the dishes spotless, shiny and perfectly dried.   We connect through the application so that we have full control of the device throughout the day remotely.   It's great that at the same time, the application informs you if you need additional salt.  It is easy to use and very logical.  The advantage of the projector on the floor should also be emphasized, because we can see exactly digitally what the washing machine is currently doing, i.e. in which phase it is.  If you have very dirty dishes, you can also use the intensive spray zone, where stubborn fat deposits will melt and be washed away.  It is easy to maintain and definitely a favorite among household appliances.  Recommendation for further!

1083269827.text_en: During the first dishwashing, the stench of heated rubber began to spread. The outside of the main chamber is lined with rubber so I doubt that is the possible source of the smell. I hope that this is something that occurs with the first washes, and if so it would be good if it also stands as one of the warnings among all the other warnings. I definitely plan to call the service center to find out more information. Burning tire smell aside, everything else was great after one wash

1136905737.text_en: Dear Sir/Madam, So far I have had two washing machines from Bosch, series 4 washing machines, and now I am using a series 6 washing machine for the first time. What can I say but I am delighted. Options of new programs, WiFi connectivity have been added to the already excellent Series 4. Build quality without compromise. It perfectly washes stubbornly soiled dishes and dries them even better, thanks to the new system. And the light projected onto the floor is a really cool detail. All in all, a complete hit! Well done Bosch

1129301823.text_en: A pleasant surprise right after the first wash. In addition to the fact that the dishes are sparkling clean (with the purchase you received 2 finish capsules and a gloss) they are also completely dry! I am especially delighted with the display of the remaining washing time, which can be seen on the tiles (kitchen floor) and, along with the time, you can also see the washing phase. A big plus is the presence of a 3rd drawer for beštek, as it provides more space for other dishes.   In short, we look forward to every dishwashing! :)

1085564961.text_en: When I bought a Bosch appliance, my wife sang to me: Immaculately clean dishes, more beautiful than a swan lake.  No more scraping the dirt off the utensils, And that was a nightmare for me!  The washing machine is so good, as if it is from the royal court.  All Bosch appliances work harmoniously and excellently as if they were part of an orchestra, which does not need a maestro.  Harmony is another name for my kitchen, When Bosch appliances brighten up my everyday life

1131093058.text_en: We bought the SMV6ZCX42E device because of a major failure of our previous BOSCH washing machine, which we used for many years - we remain loyal to the brand because that washing machine has served us well for a long time and without any problems.  We installed the new washing machine relatively easily ourselves: the dimensions were identical to the previous one and the installation instructions were simple and understandable.  After a month of use, we can say that we are satisfied: it washes quietly and well. Management is simple

1131169107.text_en: We bought the SMV6ZCX42E device because of a major failure of our previous BOSCH washing machine, which we used for many years - we remain loyal to the brand because that washing machine has served us well for a long time and without any problems. We installed the new washing machine relatively easily ourselves: the dimensions were identical to the previous one and the installation instructions were simple and understandable. After a month of use, we can say that we are satisfied: it washes quietly and well. Management is simple

1086861540.text_en: I am very satisfied with this washing machine. The way it works and the fact that it also has short programs that wash and dry equally well. After opening the door, there is no rising of that steam. The top drawer is a total revelation. I now have a lot more space on the lower shelf where pots and plastic bowls fit. The only thing I would like to mention is that this oven is not for kitchens with a height of 91 cm or more. As far as I know, Bosch xxl washing machines are for such kitchens.

1082774079.text_en: We had a great Bosch washing machine before this one, but this model is in a class of its own. I don't know if I would single out great programs and adjustment options, excellent and always perfect washing or the dryness and shine of the dishes after washing, and I was especially delighted by the projection of the current program and the time until the end of the program on the floor!  This washing machine is a miracle of modern technology and in the truest sense my best friend in housework :)

1082791124.text_en: After we bought a Bosch washing machine, we were delighted, so we decided to buy a Bosch dishwasher as well. The element is easy to install in the washing machine. It looks luxurious and high quality. It washes very quietly, and the dishes are clean and shiny. The washing process and the time are projected on the floor, and when the washing machine is finished washing, a notification is immediately sent to the mobile phone. We are very satisfied and would recommend it to everyone. It is more expensive, but worth every kuna!

1149126689.text_en: After 10 years of using a previous Bosch dishwasher that gave out, I bought this one. One can see a great technological leap through those 10 years. It washes great, but that's what the last one did, the drying is really impressive with this one. Plastic dishes and accessories that I always had to dry extra, are now dry after the cycle. And kudos to that floor projection of the time until the end of the wash and what the washing machine does exactly at what time.

1088303358.text_en: I am satisfied with the washing machine, it washes and dries very well and is very quiet even on normal programs, and on the quiet program it is silent. I especially like the 3 drawers that are shallow enough not to take up much space, but deep enough for accessories. Adjustable baskets are also great. The timer display on the floor was not a priority for me when choosing a washing machine, but now I'm glad my washing machine has it, it's a great thing.

1083172693.title_en: The main assistant in my kitchen
1083172693.text_en: This washing machine fully met my expectations. Silence in operation was one of the more important characteristics I was looking for, because before I was often demotivated to turn on the washing machine, which would create noise in the apartment for 1-2 hours. With this Bosch dishwasher, washing dishes is discreet and silent. The only thing left is the sound of the washing completion notification, which heralds the pleasant feeling of well-washed dishes. Definitely recommend! :)

1082774977.text_en: This washing machine is a miracle of modern technology with a lot of discreet charm :) Always exceptionally clean, dry and shiny dishes, many programs with the possibility of smart remote start and especially quiet operation are only part of why we call it our/my best friend.  Personally, I am most pleased with the innovation in the form of the projection of the time until the end of the program and the execution of the current program compared to the older models.

1084342731.text_en: I only have Bosch appliances in my house and I am very satisfied with them. My previous dishwasher was also a Bosch brand, so when buying a new one we decided on the same brand again and we were not disappointed. Our new washing machine is very quiet, the programs are customizable, the washing machine remembers the favorite program so everything can be adjusted with one touch, and Zeolith technology dries all dishes, even plastic ones. We are loyal to Bosch.

1084018487.text_en: The choice of programs is very good, additional options as well.  Zeolith drying and Time Light, I can no longer imagine a washing machine that does not have it. And only the third drawer for cutlery - a superb thing! No more sitting on knives!  The dishes fit nicely, they are not noisy, all the dishes (both plastic and glass) have been nicely washed and dried.  Home Connect is also a welcome novelty.  I hope that we will be together for a long time and happily!

1088772064.text_en: After 5 years I changed the dishwasher. The old one broke right before the holidays ☹. I bought a new Bosch one and I wasn't wrong. Excellent dishwasher! All three drawers are well designed. It fits more dishes than the old one. The dishes are clean and dry (unlike the old ones). The washing machine works quietly, almost silently, and the display with duration and washing processes is a great thing. I recommend!!!!!

1087940849.text_en: After 5 years I changed the dishwasher. The old one broke right before the holidays ☹. I bought a new Bosch one and I wasn't wrong. Excellent dishwasher! All three drawers are well designed. It fits more dishes than the old one. The dishes are clean and dry (unlike the old ones). The washing machine works quietly, almost silently, and the display with duration and washing processes is a great thing. I recommend!!!!!

1087940455.text_en: After 5 years I changed the dishwasher. The old one broke right before the holidays ☹. I bought a new Bosch one and I wasn't wrong. Excellent dishwasher! All three drawers are well designed. It fits more dishes than the old one. The dishes are clean and dry (unlike the old ones). The washing machine works quietly, almost silently, and the display with duration and washing processes is a great thing. I recommend!!!!!

1131915808.text_en: In addition to the ingenious layout of the washing machine itself, the possibility of purchasing additional items, such as a rack for glasses (with a stand), delighted me and provides additional comfort when using it. The touch screen display makes it easy to use, and I especially appreciate the projection so that I always know what phase the washing machine is in (an additional plus of the mentioned function is that it keeps the kids occupied because they watch how the display on the floor changes 😆).

1090518216.text_en: I have been using the washing machine for several weeks and I am satisfied with the quality of the dishes. There are various washing programs, including an auto option that automatically determines how dirty the dishes are. A special convertible top for cutlery is practical. Via Wi-Fi, it is possible to adjust the options of the washing machine and adjust its operation to, for example, the level of water hardness. The projection of the remaining washing time onto the floor is useful

1088708249.text_en: Our new washing machine is excellent. After we had to replace the old 13-year-old bosch washing machine, we decided to go for bosch again. The Vario drawer is really very useful, everything is much neater and frees up more space in the lower drawer. The machine washes the dishes very well, and my favorite is the extra dry option, the dishes come out of the washing machine dry and hot. We are very satisfied and would definitely recommend.

1134903442.text_en: She would refer to the program number. The washing machine contains only a few programs, which are actually all you need, depending on whether you want Eco, short wash, glasses, plates, etc... We are extremely satisfied with the quality and general layout of the dishes in the washing machine. We recommend the washing machine to everyone! Let me not forget to mention that my husband has become interesting, so our dishes are always washed and clean! Thank you!:D

1090471073.text_en: A simple washing machine, easy to use, the indicator on the floor is cool, but the wifi that it has is useful, although it has unnecessary functions, because you have to fill the washing machine anyway and put on a delay, remote ignition is a luxury here, as is the notification on the mobile phone that it has stopped. you hear the washing machine stop. :) the pill counter is a handy reminder that you have to take more, but I still take pills when they're on sale and I have a supply.

1172646880.text_en: I have been using the Bosch Series 6 built-in dishwasher (SMV6YCX05E) for some time and I am very satisfied. The elegant design fits my kitchen perfectly and the cleaning results are impressive. Energy saving is also a big advantage, thanks to which my ecological rate is much lower. I highly recommend this dishwasher to people who are looking for a reliable and high-class device.

1172641398.text_en: I have been using the Bosch Series 6 built-in dishwasher (SMV6YCX05E) for some time and I am very satisfied. The elegant design fits my kitchen perfectly and the cleaning results are impressive. Energy saving is also a big advantage, thanks to which my ecological rate is much lower. I highly recommend this dishwasher to people who are looking for a reliable and high-class device.

1087197585.text_en: An exceptional household appliance that will meet all your expectations that you are looking for from this appliance. Top results for drying and washing dishes, a comfortable space for washing large dishes, a space for washing dishes with excellent washing and drying results. The washing machine has a short program for washing less soiled dishes. All in all, it is a device that you will love to use with pleasure.

1087939037.text_en: After 5 years I changed the dishwasher. The old one broke right before the holidays :-( I took a new Bosch one and I was not mistaken. Top-notch dishwasher! All three drawers are well designed. There are more dishes than the old one. They dry clean and dry (unlike the old one). The washing machine works quietly, almost silently, the display with time and washing processes is a great thing. I recommend!!!!1

1086702806.text_en: Kudos to the new Bosch dishwasher, Home Connect app for mobile phone wi-fi connected to the washing machine, very useful and easy to use. Switching on, monitoring the progress of the program, simply changing the program and settings of the washing machine, there is no error. This morning, the first message on my cell phone: "I'm running out of washing-up liquid" - here it is, my beautiful, wait, now you'll get it, just keep washing for me.

1148734064.text_en: It washes very well, as you would expect from a dishwasher of this class. This model has a metal bottom (that's what I was looking for). A very interesting addition is the display that projects an image onto the floor, where you can see what stage the washing process is at and how much time is left. The buttons are sensory with sound and light signals. We can confidently recommend this model.

1134037016.text_en: The washing machine is really great, well designed, a special drawer for cutlery that we did not have on the old washing machine, which was also a Bosch but Series 2 and did not have all these possibilities and functions. Clean and dry dishes. The washing machine works quietly and silently, the display with duration and washing processes is a great thing. We have had the washing machine for 6 months and so far we are very satisfied. My recommendation!!

1087936462.text_en: After 5 years, I changed the dishwasher. The old one broke just before the holidays. :-( I took Bosch's and I didn't make a mistake. Superb dishwasher! All three drawers are well designed. It fits more dishes than the old one. The dishes are clean and dry (unlike the old one). The washing machine works quietly, almost silently, the display with duration and washing processes is a great thing. I recommend it!!

1082491087.text_en: The washing machine does its work in the manner of the greatest professional - without complaints or questions, and in the greatest silence. A small complaint that there were no instructions in English or Croatian, but with the videos with QR codes, everything went much easier.  The washing quality is excellent. The option to check the status of the device, as well as the management via the Home Connect application, raises the whole story to an even higher level!

1128923401.text_en: The washing machine only did a few washes, but it turned out to be excellent - what impressed us is that it is very quiet, the drawers are well made (the middle one can be expanded), it washes very well. For now, we are satisfied, and our only complaint is the problems with connecting to the Home Connect application (bluetooth persistently refused to connect to two different mobile phones). Besides, all 5 :)

1141665914.text_en: Hello... Until now, I thought that nothing could surprise me in the relationship between me and the dishwasher... And yet... When Bosch appeared in our kitchen, the perception of everyday use of a dishwasher completely changed. It's even a pity that sometimes you use it every day. Access via the application only increases the sense of comfort... A very good purchase. I highly recommend it.

1133998475.text_en: The previous dishwasher, also a Bosch that we had for 15 years, was outstanding. That was the reason we bought Bosch again. We have to admit (I am conveying my wife's impressions) that we are extremely satisfied, it is even better than the previous washing machine, which we did not expect. We are particularly satisfied with the drying of dishes, because we did not expect it to be so good.  LP, Čedo Maletić

1105615023.title_en: The dishes are clean and dry without any trouble.
1105615023.text_en: Look, miracle. The machine just doesn't talk to you. But, with the purity of the judge, the best comes at the end. Dry, yes, dry with zeolite. Who and where has never seen it? And if you have to wash the judges because you don't have money to pay for the dinner, with the Bosch dishwasher, wash the hall. And while you wait for her to wash herself and dry, you can paint your nails or read a book. Even better, you can dedicate yourself to your love.

1088229944.text_en: It was a pleasant surprise to finally have a washing machine that is almost inaudible. The display on the floor that indicates which phase the washing machine is in and how long it has left is also a very nice thing, as is the function of shortening the cycle duration and a large selection of programs. Although they have the same dimensions, this washing machine is more spacious than my previous one, which also made me happy.

1161248461.text_en: Aesthetic design, packed in flexible foil and thick cardboard, which protected it well during transport. It washes and dries well, and thanks to the Zeolith function, it also cleans plastic packaging. Thanks to TimeLight, you don't have to open it to see how much washing is left. My previous dishwasher had a cutlery basket, but a separate shelf does the job. I recommend ;)

1089255227.text_en: This is the first dishwasher that I bought for myself and I must say I'm very pleased with the results I experienced.    The fact that I don't have to pre-clean the dishes, and just relax knowing that the machine will do the work, is worth the price. If I add the extra features, like push notification on my phone, it just rounds the whole experience.    Top value

1183673099.text_en: We recently bought a Bosch SMV6YCX05E dishwasher and we are extremely satisfied. It washes great, is quiet (44 dB) and thanks to PerfectDry, the dishes are really dry, including plastics. The VarioDrawer for cutlery frees up space at the bottom and can hold a lot of dishes. Connecting to Home Connect is a nice bonus, although not a necessity. The price is higher, but the quality and economy balance it. I recommend!

1140950881.text_en: I recently bought this washing machine. I am satisfied with the programs it offers as well as with the effect of washing dishes. It is very quiet during operation, and the optical projection under the washing machine shows the remaining operating time. It's great that in the bottom drawer, the plate dividers can be completely lowered, leaving a huge space for large dishes. Zeolite drying process is excellent for plastics.

1090347283.text_en: We have been using the washing machine daily for a little over a month. It washes very well even very sticky dishes, PerfectDry is the perfect description, it dries really well. Also "Intensive zone" is a great addition. Another great thing is the adjustable tines in the lower basket. The remote strat is cool, but you have to remember to turn on the washing machine in order to be able to start it via the app.

1091898983.text_en: The super dish that has Zeolith in it is the perfect solution for families that use plastic dishes (children's plates/cups or plastic food storage containers). The top shelf accepts cups and thus gives extra space on the bottom two for bigger things. The interface is easy to use and this makes the entire association with our washing machine a real pleasure.

1085973824.text_en: The washing machine is extremely quiet. It gives the possibility of adjusting the height of the middle basket. It washes the dishes perfectly. Connecting to a mobile phone opens up new possibilities for managing work, you don't have to set the settings on the display of the washing machine, but you can set all the settings on the mobile phone. The remaining time display on the floor is useful and actually tells you that this is a top-of-the-line device.

1143775742.text_en: A very quiet, discreet and yet very powerful dishwasher. It's really hard to decide which feature impressed us the most, from the cutlery drawer, the silence program, or the max flex basket. However, my vote still goes to the perfect dry technology, because I'm busy this is super useful because as soon as the washing machine finishes my dishes are ready to be used again.

1081093908.text_en: After the previous G device failed again in a short time with the same failure, we took this device. The installation went without any problems and it was immediately activated. The device is very quiet and did the first washes without any problems and with excellent results. I hope for a better experience than with the previous device and a long period of excellent washing results and without malfunctions.

1084881553.text_en: Given my previous experiences with dishwashers, I expect that PerfecDry is just a good advertising slogan.  However, after a few washes, I found that PerfecDry really works. Even when washing plastic dishes, with which there are almost always problems with residual moisture. By extending the drying cycle, even plastic remains perfectly dry.  Thank you and greetings

1148663118.text_en: Since we bought most things from Bosch, we also decided on a dishwasher on the recommendation of other family members who use it. We have not yet had the opportunity to use the same washing machine at home, but we have tried it at our family's and it is truly top-notch. And it's praised from all sides :D We can't wait to start washing the dishes too!

1096674540.text_en: After the old dishwasher, this one is a dream come true. It works wonderfully quietly, the most audible is the water in the pipes outside the washing machine :) Super washes - even 1l glass bottles of soap! <3 The trash drawer is something that takes a little getting used to after we had a basket for 10 years, but I'm sure there won't be any problems there either.  All in all, we are very satisfied.

1084400532.text_en: We have all Bosch appliances in the house and we are very satisfied. The old dishwasher was the same Bosch brand, so when we bought a new one, we again decided on the same brand. The new washing machine is super quiet, the programs are excellent, and the washing machine remembers the favorite program, so everything can be adjusted with one touch. Zeolith technology dries all dishes quickly. We are loyal to Bosch.

1134402463.text_en: This washing machine delighted me with its quiet operation and outstanding performance in terms of perfectly clean dishes. I have only words of praise. I would like to say that a dishwasher is the best assistant in the kitchen for everyone, especially a busy woman. I am very grateful to the person who patented the first washing machine and to all the others who brought them to perfection.

1106122982.text_en: The washing machine with zeolite really dries the dishes perfectly, compared to the model of another manufacturer that we had before this one, the washing and drying results are much better. A small complaint (which may be of a subjective nature) is the compartments for stacking dishes, where it seems that not everything we would like fits, but this is really minor in relation to the entire product.

1213613603.text_en: The installation went perfectly based on the supplied instructions. The parts feel solid and the build quality feels top notch. It does washing like a charm and that is why you naturally have this device. Many different programs and easy to operate via the app (if you want). For now I would definitely recommend the product.

1142287337.title_en: The pleasure of buying a BOSCH dishwasher
1142287337.text_en: After learning about buying a new dishwasher, the old one was not good enough for the needs of our household from the beginning. In a conversation with friends, I got information about the BOSCH dishwasher and decided to change the old one. I must emphasize that we in the family are very satisfied with the washing machine and all family members use this new washing machine with ease

1125499910.text_en: In general the appliance has a very clear and clean user interface and the quality of wash and materials are of high-quality - Like a Bosch! However, I would still improve the connectivity, make sure that the on-boarding also works smoothly for multiple users. Whilst it worked perfectly fine for me, other family members struggled.

1088434000.title_en: Excellent washing machine - the warmest recommendations!
1088434000.text_en: A washing machine for every recommendation, from the design to the choice of functionality to the price. One note for future buyers - if you open the washing machine before installing it in the kitchen element, do not worry that the door does not stay in the desired position but closes back. It's not a mistake, things change during assembly.

1140350910.text_en: After 12 years, I decided to replace the old Bosch washing machine (which worked flawlessly for all 12 years without a single failure) with a newer model. I am very satisfied with the improvements compared to the old model. The only thing I miss is a short semi-permanent washing program. I hope that this washing machine will serve me as well as the previous one.

1136880289.text_en: Our new washing machine is excellent! By folding the plate racks, you get a really large space, enough to wash all the pots used for lunch by a family of four.  I especially like the quiet mode of operation, as well as the light indicator of the current phase and the remaining working time on the floor :) Recommendations to everyone who is in doubt!

1128938643.title_en: A dish that met all my expectations
1128938643.text_en: Top quality already at first glance, very practical multi-functional and spacious baskets for judges and an additional drawer on top for storing cutlery, proved to be a complete hit. When a bunch of additional functionalities and super quiet operation are added to that, I can say that this dish has fulfilled all my expectations for now.

1081164533.text_en: The installation of the device went without any problems and it was immediately activated. The device is very quiet and did the first washes without any problems and with excellent results. We look forward to a long period of excellent washing results from an extremely quiet device. The Infolight function really improves the user experience. We would recommend this device to anyone.

1203523240.text_en: I purchased the dishwasher 2 years ago! Best investment ever! The dishes are washed impeccably, the programs in the machine menu successfully cover the dishwashing mode. Easy to use, with phone access is ideal! Worth every penny! I would happily recommend this car model to anyone!

1090530469.text_en: After many years of using the washing machine, it is time for a new one. Considering the positive experiences from the Internet and reviews, the decision fell on Boch. A great third drawer for dishes, so there is more room for other dishes. A large selection of programs, they are fast, excellent and efficient. An excellent choice of washing machine. I hope it will serve us for a long time.

1097753589.text_en: While the washing machine is washing, the woman verbally yells at me. My dear wife, I bought you a washing machine so you don't have to, wash the dishes EVERY day. Now my wife "washes" me every day, and without a new washing machine I would have an hour or two of peace. ;).    The new washing machine doesn't hear anything and doesn't howl, while the woman watches it with her mobile phone while drinking coffee with her friends.

1200240564.text_en: We have had it for 4 years, and now I am writing a review due to the registration of a new Bosch device. There was only one condition for the purchase. If it's Bosch. It serves us well, it is quiet, it can be even quieter with a button on the mobile phone via Home Connect. Zeolite drying without steaming and humidifying my kitchen by opening the door. Recommendation for better classes.

1199525767.text_en: The dishwasher is very quiet and economical, and even though it seemed like an unnecessary addition, the interior lighting works great. Even the most dirty dishes are washed thanks to the Intensive program. The dishwasher is very well made, there are no creaks or unnecessary squeaks, and the operation is intuitive. I recommend!

1117057244.text_en: The dishwasher is great. The arrangement of the drawers is very ergonomically matched to the size, and the possibility of adapting the arrangement to your own needs is excellent.  Zeolith technology is yet to be verified. :) TimeLight displayed on the floor perfectly shows how much time is left until the cycle ends.

1089762935.text_en: The perfect washing machine. The Super Dry drying system completely dries the dishes, so it is not necessary to wipe some stains after removing them from the washing machine. Washing the cutlery in the top drawer is also a great thing, a lot more utensils are washed and it is no longer poorly washed like in the basket when it is overcrowded. Excellent feature

1086247114.text_en: The washing machine is extremely quiet, if there was no time display on the floor, one might wonder if it is working at all. It washes well, even very dirty dishes, and Zeolith drying is perfect. The lower basket for plates is not adapted to larger plates, so stacking is sometimes complicated. And even if she had an inner light...

1139748945.title_en: It makes everyday life a lot easier
1139748945.text_en: The washing machine works great, we had an old one from another brand and this washing machine saves us a lot of time every day. Functions such as remote control, automatic notification of salt filling and other notifications make maintenance of the device much easier. Dishes have never been so clean and shiny, I can only recommend!

1133882819.text_en: I like that the washing machine has a large selection of programs, the possibility of stacking dishes and accessories in 3 levels, quiet operation and zeolite technology. Ideal for a large family because it fits a lot of plates and large pots. A small complaint - there is no interior light, nor the ability to activate the light via the Home Connect application.

1201220130.text_en: Pleased with the product. We have had it for 3 years, we use it 1-2 times a week. It washes very well, I only use Finish for washing, clarifying, salting. The Home Connect app shows me that the car is in good condition and cleaned regularly. I usually remove the dishes clean, white marks still remain on a Teflon pan

1082799711.text_en: Excellently written installation instructions. The device was installed without any problems. The only complaint is the plastic screw for lifting the washing machine on the back, which was worn during installation. Excellent design and quality. Compared to the old washing machine, it works much quieter, and it dries glasses perfectly. Without any drying stains.

1090518544.text_en: We are very satisfied with the washing machine after 3 weeks of use.  It washes very well and offers a variety of options, stain-free glass. Fine adjustment via Wi-Fi, for example adjustment to the level of water hardness. The screen that is projected onto the floor and offers information about the remaining time is a convenient but also useful feature

1150930918.text_en: We have had a Bosch dishwasher for more than ten years and it still works without a problem (the plastic baskets look like they did on the first day even though we use it every day) but we decided to treat ourselves to a new model that has Zeolith drying and a cutlery drawer.  What can I say but a complete hit.

1136577171.text_en: we thought for a long time whether to buy this washing machine or not, but in the end we are very happy that we bought it. the washing machine is quiet, the dishes are perfectly washed and dry after the washing machine is finished. what I like most is the information about the remaining washing time, which is projected on the floor. Overall a great product for now.

1107219497.title_en: The quality you expect from Bosch
1107219497.text_en: It washes well and has a premium feel when the door opens. The display that shows how much time is left until the end is great for me, and it comes with an application that I can use to control it. It also has modular baskets so that all kinds of dishes fit, and on top I can wash espresso cups.

1214171806.text_en: Easy to connect and install. Washes very clean and has time indication on the floor. The home connect app is also very useful. It's nice that there is lighting in the dishwasher and the cutlery drawer is also super handy. The best part is of course that it washes super clean and that the dishes are dry.

1134859845.text_en: The washing machine lived up to all my expectations. I haven't used all the functions yet, but I have to praise the extremely quiet operation, which comes to the fore when you have a kitchen connected to the living room, the flexibility of the baskets that allows for adaptation to different dishes and, of course, Wi-Fi connection with a mobile phone.

1086247826.text_en: It is extremely quiet when working, if there was no time display on the floor, one might wonder if it is working at all. It washes dishes well. Drying with Zeolith technology is flawless. The lower basket is not adapted to larger plates, so stacking is sometimes complicated. And also that it has an internal light...

1132001035.text_en: After only a few days of use, the device justifies its excellent rating (5). The fast washing programs and the additional function of enhanced drying for plastics are particularly noteworthy. The possibility of modulating the lower basket for large dishes and raising the middle basket in height makes the device efficient.

1142581353.text_en: My experience with Bosch dishwashers is very good, and now I have bought another washing machine, and considering that it has three shelves, it fits a lot of dishes, it is practical, high-quality interior, digital control, so it is recommended, both in terms of price and quality.

1131834315.text_en: Once upon a time, I had my first dishwasher and after it gave out, I replaced it with a washing machine from another manufacturer, but after a few washes I regretted it and went back to the Bosch washing machine at the first opportunity.    I have everything in my household from Bosch and all appliances work perfectly.    Well done to Bosch.

1089634384.text_en: I have been using Bosh products for years, so after my old dishwasher broke, I decided to buy a Bosh dishwasher again and enjoy perfectly clean and shiny dishes in the future! I am especially impressed by the progress in technology and new accessories that will make it easier for me to use.

1142510035.text_en: We bought the SMV6ZCX42E washing machine because of a major failure of the previous washing machine. Installation is simple thanks to clear instructions.   After a month of use, we can only praise it - it works quietly and washes well. There are plenty of programs and opportunities.    A big advantage is the third basket. I recommend.

1088672588.text_en: Our old dishwasher was also a BOSCH and we were very satisfied. Series 6 is incomparably softer and delights us every day. Home Connect deserves special praise. The user instructions could perhaps be a little more "user friendly". In any case, we give it 5/5

1136746723.text_en: The washing machine is spacious, there is a great top drawer for cutlery. The drawers can be adjusted according to the needs and size of the dishes. The display is inside so that the washing machine actually looks like another kitchen element, and the remaining time is displayed on the floor. We are satisfied with the product.

1137525008.text_en: We haven't started using the washing machine yet because our kitchen is not finished, but so far I can say that we chose it because of the many useful washing programs, the functions it has, the third basket and a lot of positive reviews about it. I am sure that we will also be very satisfied with her when she starts working. :)

1090422034.text_en: We decided to buy this washing machine because of the pull-out mechanisms that worked well, easy to pull out, sturdy, with the possibility of adjusting the height. It was also important for us to have a pull-out drawer for the cutlery, not a container.

1083640939.text_en: In addition to the existing Bosch household appliances we use - series 8 washing machine and dryer, induction hob and oven with pyrolysis, refrigerator and microwave oven, the new dishwasher has met our expectations in these 10 days. Until now, we had a 15-year-old Bosch washing machine.

1092181712.text_en: We've only been using it recently, so we haven't even tried all the options. It seems well made and has a lot of options. It is quiet in operation and we have no complaints about the quality of washing. Touch buttons are sometimes slow to respond.    Projecting cycle status on the floor looks and works great.

1142256201.text_en: I like the built-in washing machine because it offers numerous possibilities, a large selection of programs. It is quiet and has the possibility of stronger cleaning of dishes. This is important to me because of hygiene. I really like the indicator on which I immediately notice if something is missing during washing. The washing machine blew me away

1128762770.text_en: The washing machine is superior in every way, after a month of use we are completely satisfied and we sincerely hope that it will serve us for many, many washing cycles because at the moment we cannot imagine that there is anything better. It fully met our expectations. Warm recommendation.

1129479288.text_en: After 17 years, the old Bosch is finally retiring, the baskets have started to fall apart, although they wash as if they were new.  Wifi management is excellent, the display on the floor is super useful, it washes quietly, it washes well, as many programs as you want... I haven't tried everything yet. Mostly all 5.

1091976017.text_en: The dishwasher is really great. From the design itself, the quality of the materials and the most important functionality. The device is of top quality and I would recommend it to anyone who is starting a renovation or new construction of a kitchen because it is really worth investing in such a beast.

1084399844.text_en: We recently bought a Bosch dishwasher. It is very quiet, dries all the dishes perfectly thanks to Zeolith technology, remembers the favorite washing program, through the application we receive notifications about the end of the program and allows delaying the washing with a precision of one minute. Great washing machine!

1128072554.text_en: I am extremely satisfied with this modern dishwasher.  The dishes are perfectly washed and completely dry. It is possible to create improvements in certain washing programs according to personal preferences, such as extending the drying process or increasing the dose of gloss.  For every recommendation.

1085257424.text_en: A washing machine that perfectly fit into our custom-made kitchen. Beautifully designed inside, with lots of space and 3 drawers, washing dishes is a breeze. The options and programs it has are commendable. We hope that he will serve us for many years and be a resident of our kitchen.

1083228782.text_en: A washing machine that is so quiet that you check whether it is working, a washing machine that has a display like in the airport, a washing machine that is controlled via WiFi, is it even a washing machine, yes, there are dishes inside and it is beautifully clean and dry. Thank you Bosch, thank you Zeolith technology

1141276772.text_en: When choosing a dishwasher, some of the most important points for me were: - Zeolith drying technology - energy class - third basket for accessories - stainless steel interior - that there is no hole under the dishwasher so that the door of the dishwasher can be opened

1140622383.text_en: This is already the second exactly the same Bosch washing machine that we took for the second apartment because we are very satisfied with the first one. The device works flawlessly and quietly. The light on the floor shows the work process and the remaining time until completion. The area is clean and we are very satisfied with it

1130517152.text_en: Pericilca is very quiet and thrifty. It has 3 drawers for dishes and utensils. The remaining washing time is projected onto the floor. Zeolite drying does its job very well. There is also home connect for monitoring work on a mobile phone. All in all, an excellent ratio of invested and received.

1128178635.text_en: We are extremely satisfied with the quality of Bosch home appliances. The washing machine has a third basket for waste, a height-adjustable middle basket and additional nozzles for washing the freshly cut dishes. It is easy to use, the buttons are touchable, it is easy to maintain!

1090910626.title_en: Excellent ratio of quality and price!
1090910626.text_en: Overjoyed! We definitely recommend buying this washing machine. The washing machine is of high quality, technology, efficient with numerous washing program functions. It has a large volume, fits all the dishes and utensils we use on a daily basis. The doors close easily and efficiently, simple program selection via the transparent control element. A very useful LED projection option of the duration of the program, as well as a pleasant sound signal when it is finished. It is very quiet in operation. Optimum working time. The drawer for cutlery has a large capacity and is very transparent, so it simplifies the cleaning of washed utensils. The upper basket for crockery fits a lot of glasses, mugs, etc. The glasses are crystal clear and stain-free. Very useful function of moving the upper basket in three levels, as well as the folding function of the lower basket, which makes it possible to wash large pots, pans and other dishes. Efficiently washes heavily soiled dishes, pans, pots, baking trays... PVC containers washed perfectly, drying function perfect. We are very satisfied and definitely recommend the purchase.

1142906405.text_en: We've only been using it recently, so we haven't even tried all the options. It seems well made and has a lot of options. It is quiet in operation and we have no complaints about the quality of washing. Touch buttons are sometimes slow to respond. Projecting cycle status on the floor is practical.

1135412408.text_en: We are extremely satisfied with the new washing machine. A combination of functionality (planning of space) and high-quality construction (containers for storing dishes). The interface is intuitive and easy to use, so programming and initial setup was relatively quick.

1215000876.text_en: Nice well thought out dishwasher. It has many nice functions and technical gadgets. Does its job well, dishes are clean and perfectly dry. I installed the dishwasher myself and this was well described in the instructions.   In short, value for money!

1105890106.text_en: As always, Bosch is the daddy of dishwashers. Excellent third drawer for accessories, hidden controls, time light on the floor where you can see how long the program lasts. Washing and drying results, as usual, excellent. Bošica washes and dries plastic like no other!

1183691547.text_en: Nice energy-saving dishwasher with zeolite for extra drying, additionally with support for the Home Connect application. A pleasant surprise turned out to be that it has interior lighting.  It could be a bit quieter and use less water, but you can't have everything :)

1140435640.text_en: We were looking for a quiet dishwasher since our kitchen is part of the living room and we definitely didn't go wrong with this one. German production, the quality can be seen and felt under the hand. Dishes clean and completely dry. Definitely recommend. :)

1084572636.text_en: This Bosch dishwasher is a typical quality, quiet Bosch product.  Although it is fully built-in and has no visible control on the front, there is a working indicator in the ground so that the remaining time until the end of the wash can be clearly seen. My recommendation to everyone.

1136718550.text_en: We bought the washing machine 3 weeks ago and have been using it for 2 weeks (we wash the dishes 3-4 times a week, when it is full :) ). For now, we are really very satisfied. If in the future it will work as well as these first 2 weeks, then it is really to be recommended.

1081921216.text_en: The washing machine has a great arrangement of baskets, an upper shelf for laundry and wi-fi connectivity as part of Home connect. Considering that I put parquet in the kitchen, the lifetime warranty against water spills caused by a malfunction of the washing machine is important to me. Recommendations!

1085991701.text_en: After a careful review of the range of dishwashers, we decided on this model. We got exactly what we wanted - an excellent washing machine. What is stated in the description really comes true - beautiful dry dishes, shiny. Extremely satisfied :)

1088361853.text_en: An excellent washing machine that I am very satisfied with.   The dishes were washed well, and the quiet operation of the washing machine itself is not negligible. We personally do not like the long delay on the keys, we expected more from the 'touch display'. Setting the timer function (wash delay) can therefore be a bit frustrating. Also, it took time to get used to the fact that after selecting a program, we also have to click on Start.    Washing is satisfactory, washes greasy dishes and stubborn stains well. The glass is shinier and washed much better than after washing with the old washing machine. We most often use the Auto 45-65 program, but Eco and other shorter washing programs give good results. We expected more from drying using zeolite, but thanks to the additional drying program, it also met our expectations. The only problem is the more transparent plastic, which after additional drying has visible limescale stains. So far we have tried tablets from several different manufacturers and the result of washing and drying was more or less the same.

1092315893.text_en: This is our second Bosch washing machine that we bought for the household (similar model).  Its programs are logical and easy to choose. Its operation is extremely quiet, so in case of emergency it can be switched on even when you don't like the noise in the room. It washes well even on shorter/weaker programs.  Some items impressed me even 7 years ago when I chose this washing machine, which is why I chose Bosch and a similar model again: * a digital light clock that projects on the floor how long the washing machine has to work * a great dish drying system with Zeolite, due to which there are no traces of dried water drops even on the plastic dishes * a separate basket for washing cutlery on top, above the other two (it may take some time to get used to putting each item separately cutlery, but once you get used to it, it's the only thing that becomes normal and acceptable to you... The cutlery is washed much better this way than by putting everything in a traditional cutlery basket. Besides, the lowest basket is therefore fully usable.) * adjusting the free space of the basket by moving the folding partitions It's a bit more expensive, but if these items are important to you and finances allow, I definitely recommend it.

1105603782.text_en: I searched and googled for a long time which washing machine to buy... I didn't go wrong with this one.    What I especially like about it are the fexi baskets and a separate basket for cutlery.   This really makes stacking easier and increases the utility of the washing machine. Not to mention that the middle basket can be adjusted in height... Darkness!    The washing machine connects to WiFi. Not only can you select a washing program and start it, the application also takes care of the consumption of tablets, so it is unlikely that you will forget to buy them.    The night washing program is also a great thing for me. I use this a lot when I have guests sleeping on the couch in the living room. The program lasts a little longer, but that's why you hardly hear the washing machine.    The most important thing is that the washing machine washes really well! That's why I bought it and it works very well. It saves me time because I don't have to rinse the plates and pans first to make sure they will wash! I use Jar platinum liquid tablets and in combination with this washing machine the results are excellent.  The dishes are always well dried, clean, shiny and ready to be stored in the kitchen cupboard directly from the washing machine.    The washing machine is easy to install. I installed it myself and placed the front on the door, and I did it for the first time. It comes with all the detailed instructions so you can save yourself money there.
