1131537336.text_en: Oh... that's why I'm delighted with the Bosch device. Guys... this dish is something ingenious and the best thing I bought for our new stancich. Where to start... darkness and only darkness... I simply have to write only in superlatives (not because it's a competition so I'm flattering myself... check out my other Bosch reviews... I'm not proud of them... but I want to help others know what they are about) ... A technical marvel that has one thing that makes it so good... volume... in this case it's better to say silence... you can't believe it can work so quietly... I've had the opportunity to hear a lot of devices in my (already... unfortunately... long... approaching 42... life) and this is unprecedented. You can easily have the most beautiful dreams with her.   Without further ado... the display on the floor... the kid keeps hanging around it and wondering and trying to click on those numbers... it's an extremely useful function. Outstanding... Home Connect... in ten... you can turn on remotely and it tells you when there is no salt... Dishes washed... no complaints... I can't believe it when I put a glass bowl all burnt in the baking roll and when I take it out it's washed like new. The hottest (hot) recommendations.   This hype with Zeolith... somehow it seems to me that it is a marketing trick... but... it makes a man happy to have the latest technology.   I'm glad to have a dish like this... many thanks to Uncle Bosch!

1137331095.title_en: Bosch dishwasher - TOP top shelf furniture.
1137331095.text_en: The Bosch SMV6ZCX42E dishwasher is the first Bosch product in our home and so far we are very pleased. After a few days of use, there is no comparison to the previous device. Bosch has made every effort to ensure that if the kitchen is connected to the living room, the dishwasher is as inconvenient as possible. This is really solid and well-refined equipment. First of all, the dishwasher does what it is supposed to do with full responsibility :) it is spacious and washes dishes very well, even very dirty ones, and also dries plastic containers (I have the Zeolith system). It has many programs to choose from, so you can easily choose the right one for you. The dishwasher can be easily connected to an application in which the fun begins anew, i.e. a lot of control and support facilities. The remaining time until the end of the program is displayed on the floor. . An additional advantage is logging in to the manufacturer's website, Bosch, where you can intuitively take advantage of many benefits, such as extending the warranty to 10 years! most importantly, I resigned from the team for leveling and installing the furniture front because Bosch came up with the idea of ​​holding the hand and doing such adjustments on his own - Awesome and respect for the idea... we are still getting to know each other but I already feel that it will be a real piece of furniture in the house :) In one word, great equipment that I definitely recommend.

1109776224.title_en: Cichociemny: quietly and effectively - a revelation
1109776224.text_en: Despite its price of PLN 4,700 (I managed to buy it for PLN 3,800), the dishwasher is really a piece of equipment made with full precision and care. I have already used the equipment several times. It is really quiet, auto programs about 2:40, eco programs about 4 hours. Possibility of connecting to hot water (max 60°C) and cold water. Roomy with cool applications of foldable compartments in the drawers and the ability to adjust the drawers up and down (max flex). I also tried the perfect dry function or something like that. It dries perfectly even plastics and cups, even if you do not place the cup at an angle. This dishwasher does not have a door opening function, but it does have the Zeonit system and normal drying. It's nice to be able to set everything in the application. At the beginning, I set everything on the compartment connected to the dishwasher, such as the water hardness through the connection to the water, the amount of rinse aid and a cool function - the number of tablets in the package and a countdown and warning function before the end of the package of dishwasher tablets. The time function and the function performed by the dishwasher on the plates, as well as the ability to see the time on your phone at any time. There is also a sound signal when the dishwasher is finished. The set includes a sheet for the countertop, an inlet and outlet hose, screws for the countertop, 2 handles for the plinth, which I have to shorten because it is 10 cm long and this one can be a maximum of 6 cm, instructions for probably 8 pieces (but very poorly described, which in my opinion is a minus for Bosch), 2 Finish Quentin capsules or something like that, and a rinse aid. Please remember to fill the salt container with water only and wash the dishwasher before the first start. In one word about the dishwasher: IT SWEEPS. I recommend the purchase

1087232307.text_en: This is the first serious Bosch in our home. Both in terms of price and function. Two dear families recommended the previous model to us, they praise it and are extremely satisfied. Prompted by a promotion, we choose this device, although we did not get to see it before buying - they are not available as exhibition specimens. They are not in stock, we have been waiting for it for a month - like the cold sun, the covid vaccine or the end of the lockdown. The holiday season is upon us, Santa has had mercy! After a month of hand washing, spent liters of detergent and a dozen sponges, we can't wait to start it for the first time. The assembly with the strict instructions was challenging. Nothing that a real housemaster can't solve - in a couple of days. The first impression is cosmic - the drawers open with such ease that, accustomed to the moment we had to pull the old drawers, we almost pulled them out! The manufacturing details are impressive, each end of the pins on which the plates are placed has a rounded end and are robust and solid, the dishes fit into their place unusually easily. The distinctive red color intuitively prompts even tech noobs like us to use and move the internal parts. The cutlery drawer contains filigree slots in which any shape fits perfectly and most importantly - it does not tip over during the washing cycle. The salt opening and drain require a firm hand - as it should be. The detergent/tablet door also likes a tighter grip. The smart function of connecting to the mobile phone works from the first and the control via the mobile phone works superbly. The biggest criticism is on the HomeConnect application itself, which sometimes reports a non-existent completed cycle. Then our faces are even bigger when Siri suddenly exclaims to us in front of the company that our washing cycle has just ended. Management and controls are very intuitive and easy to master. Zeolite is the biggest delight - in 13 years we have never taken the dishes out of the washing machine so dry! In fact, the wife is most delighted with the light indicator that projects the remaining time and the stage of the wash cycle on the floor - she is totally fancy. Quiet operation, clean and dry dishes, less time spent in the kitchen and a happy wife - what more could a man wish for!

Two dear families recommended the previous model to us, they praise it and are extremely satisfied. Prompted by a promotion, we choose this device, although we did not get to see it before buying - they are not available as exhibition specimens. 1218409272.text_en: After many years of satisfied use, the previous dishwasher left us today, so the choice again fell on the proven Bosch brand, this time with the Zeolith function for perfectly dry dishes, with 3 nozzles for removing possible dirt and food residues. And the absolute highlight for me is control using the Home Connect app

1218771798.text_en: She surprised me very nicely. We have been using a Bosh dishwasher for more than 11 years, but it has reached its end, so we reached for a newer type. We have no regrets at all. The display of the time on the floor is great. It dries dishes very well and is not noisy at all. The advantage is the app in which I can monitor energy and water consumption.

1220660838.text_en: So far, I have had excellent experiences with the Bosch brand, which is why I chose here again for my new apartment, and so far I am satisfied with the performance of the dishwasher. I appreciate the automatic door opening and the integrated Zeolith, which makes the dishes really dry, as well as the turbo jets under the upper basket, which make them perfectly clean. Control is simple and I can find out the consumption of water and energy in a clear application. The execution is of high quality and the remaining time until the end of the program lights up on the floor. I haven't found any minuses so far, so hopefully it will last as long as possible without malfunctions.

1218572316.text_en: I bought the dishwasher as a replacement for the old built-in dishwasher. The installation went absolutely smoothly. For me, I like new functions such as control via mobile phone, creating electricity and water consumption statistics, a large number of different washing programs and their parameterization.  On the other hand, simple operation even without a mobile phone. So far, it washes and dries perfectly, it is quiet. The only glitch is the remaining time projection on the floor that happens to where I have the bottom furniture rail, so I'll have to deal with that.

1219927721.text_en: At this price, I really expected nothing less than a technological marvel. And wow, the dishwasher actually washes the dishes. Clean plates, glasses without maps, cutlery do not resemble an archaeological find. Honestly, if it didn't wash great for the money, it wouldn't be a dishwasher anymore, but a modern art installation about consumer disappointment. In any case, it is comforting to know that one does not have to sell a kidney completely unnecessarily.

1220534845.text_en: The washing machine met expectations. It is very quiet, elegantly shows the remaining time with a lamp on the floor, washes perfectly, it is possible to set the door opening after the end of the program. A small disadvantage is the storage of cutlery in the upper strainer - every time you load dishes, you have to open and close the drawer, sometimes it gets stuck. The second disadvantage is the higher price of the dishwasher.

1220231647.text_en: I bought the dishwasher on a recommendation, after the first wash I was very satisfied. We had our first dishwasher from BOSCH for 15 years and I believe that we will be as satisfied with this one as well.

1221996946.text_en: We have been using the dishwasher to great satisfaction for approx. 1.5 months. It fulfilled everything we expected according to the description

1219943303.text_en: A very nice dishwasher that washes dishes beautifully. I appreciate the upper cutlery basket and the quality of the workmanship.

1221992159.text_en: I am very satisfied. Easy installation in the kitchen unit. The wife was happy.

1219689909.text_en: A washing machine (and its numerous functions) just to my liking!

1218246862.text_en: The dishes are beautifully washed, the dishwasher is quiet.

1207613211.text_en: This is my second BOSCH dishwasher. I had no doubts about choosing the brand and again I was not disappointed. The dishwasher is absolutely perfect. It cleans very well and is energy-saving. It dries dishes well after washing. When working with regular programs, it is very quiet, you can hardly hear it at all, and it also has a night mode (i.e. even quieter). It has very convenient baskets and a cutlery drawer. The upper basket is slightly higher than in the previous model I used, which is a big advantage for me because I have large plates. A very useful and convenient option to display the remaining washing time and the type of program on the floor. I recommend it to everyone!  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1184399614.text_en: I purchased this machine specifically through the PerfectDry program. According to the advertisement, it perfectly dries plastics, but this does not happen.  Calling SAC, help is 0, they admit that the problem exists, but the machine continues to be sold/advertised as providing perfect drying.  I just don't give zero stars because there isn't that option.

1186208739.text_en: Have previously had an integrated Bosch brand dishwasher with good results

1199955669.text_en: Bosch SMV6ZCX10E is the perfect combination of performance, silence and modern technology. It washes and dries flawlessly thanks to the PerfecDry system, and the SilencePro function makes it almost imperceptible during operation. Flexible drawers with Rackmatic are extremely practical, and the TimeLight display and connectivity via Home Connect add extra convenience. Although the Eco program takes longer, the energy efficiency and excellent results make the investment well worth it. A premium choice for anyone looking for reliability and German quality

1223109680.title_en: Great equipment for a great price
1223109680.text_en: This is my second BOSCH dishwasher. The dishwasher cleans very well and is energy-saving. It dries dishes well after washing. When working with regular programs, it is very quiet, you can barely hear it at all.  It has very convenient baskets and a cutlery drawer. A very useful and convenient option to display the remaining washing time and the type of program on the floor. I recommend !   #opinionmotivated by promotion

1159672105.text_en: The dishwasher washes perfectly (the old BOSCH dishwasher also did it, so I don't see much difference). Drying is also excellent (although despite Zeolith technology it is not able to remove water from the inside of pot handles ;-)). Applications for smartphones and smartwatches are mostly a gadget, but the dishwasher settings in the application are much more convenient. I really liked the display on the floor about the program cycle and the time until it ends. One glance and everything is clear. Roomy and easy-to-arrange dish baskets, quiet operation, energy efficiency, protection against flooding, and what more could you want? A truly excellent dishwasher.

1221440190.text_en: Super machine that can do everything you need without having made it so technical that you don't use the functions. Had the previous model for 8 years

1148054707.text_en: The dishwasher deserves a positive opinion due to its solid build quality, dishwashing effectiveness and energy efficiency. The high-quality materials used guarantee durability and aesthetic appearance. Various programs allow you to effectively remove dirt, and saving water and energy is an additional advantage. A simple control panel facilitates operation, adapting the device's operation to individual needs. The Bosch dishwasher is not only a functional device, but also an ecological and economical solution that is recognized for its effectiveness, durability and comfort of use. Perfect for those who value quality and efficiency.

1208701934.text_en: I have been using this dishwasher for a few days and I can already see that it is a very successful device. It washes even heavily soiled dishes thoroughly, and after the cycle ends, everything is clean and dry, including plastic containers. A big advantage is the convenient arrangement of baskets and a separate cutlery drawer, which makes it easy to load.    I also like that it works very quietly and does not interfere with the daily functioning of the house. The operation is simple and intuitive, and the ability to check how much washing is left is really useful. After a few days of use, I can say that it meets expectations and gives the impression of a solid, well-thought-out device.

1207520041.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher and once again I am absolutely delighted. The previous model served me for years without any problems, so choosing this brand again was obvious - and again I was not disappointed.  The new dishwasher works even quieter, faster and more economically than the previous one. The programs are perfectly refined and the washing results are always perfect - even with difficult dirt.   You can see that Bosch maintains a high standard of quality and reliability. If someone is looking for equipment that really makes life easier and works flawlessly for years, I recommend it with a clear conscience. I already know that during the next replacement I will choose Bosch again.

1158134090.text_en: The previous dishwasher was from Bosch and was 19 years old, so the choice of manufacturer was easy. However, choosing a model was difficult due to the different options of each model. I wanted it to be quiet and the dishwasher is indeed quiet. After a few washes, I can say that the cutlery drawer works better than the basket. Setting the dishwasher via the app is convenient. In the previous dishwasher, I could place both plates and pots in the lower basket in the second row - here either the entire row of plates or pots. The dishes are dry, I hope the zeolith technology will last until the end of the dishwasher's days.

1184164055.text_en: It washes and dries perfectly, a really well-thought-out cutlery drawer easily accommodates spoons for pouring soup, a whisk or even small cups, and it also displays on the floor what it is doing and how much time it has left. The application is brilliant, interestingly enough, you can use programs that are not even on the regular device panel, each program shows water and energy consumption and you can view the statistics. Can be added to Home Assistant. Assembly is very simple, the power cord is included so it can be easily routed through nooks and crannies in the furniture, the power cord itself could be a bit longer or available on sale in several variants.

1203612128.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher and again I am very pleased with my choice. The previous model served me for many years - it always cleaned the dishes thoroughly and never caused any problems. The new model maintains the same high level of quality and is also extremely quiet during operation, which really makes a difference - you can hardly hear it running (which is important when the kitchen is connected to the living room). The dishes are perfectly clean after each cycle, the programs are clear and the operation is very intuitive.  The only drawback I noticed is the lack of automatic opening of the door after the end of the program - it would be a convenient solution, especially when drying.  Apart from this minor drawback, I definitely recommend it, solid equipment at a reasonable price that meets all expectations.

1199073360.title_en: After a year of use still 5/5
1199073360.text_en: The Bosch washing machine has consistently impressed me in this year of use. The app connectivity on the phone is a big plus — I can download new programs, get useful notifications, including alerts to clean the car. It washes flawlessly and dries very well, and the design of the remaining time directly on the floor is a smart and practical detail. It's an investment that makes my life a lot easier and I confidently recommend this car to anyone who wants performance and advanced technology.

1187144322.text_en: Now with a cutlery drawer and Zeolite drying, WiFi notification when ready, remaining time illuminated on the floor.   It takes some getting used to the layout. Nice dishwasher!

1220109333.title_en: Great dishwasher - I am very satisfied.
1220109333.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion* The Bosch Serie 6 SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher is a hit. The equipment operates extremely quietly, which is crucial for me when the kitchen is open to the living room. I always take out perfectly clean dishes, including difficult-to-clean pots and dried plates. A very big advantage is PerfectDry drying with Zeolith technology - even plastic containers are completely dry and can be immediately stored in the cupboard. The Vario3 cutlery drawer frees up plenty of space in the lower basket. The device is intuitive to use, and the Home Connect application allows you to conveniently control it from your phone. I definitely recommend this model to anyone looking for reliable equipment that will last for years.

1223173994.text_en: Everything works great. Quiet, washes well. I am satisfied. #opinionmotivated by promotion.

1175180870.text_en: When it comes to dishwashers, only Bosch brands are used - I focus on quality and functionality, which makes this company stand out from others. I decided on Series 6 for the newly renovated kitchen. When choosing, I took into account the price, the time display on the floor and the bottom made of stainless steel, and I liked this dishwasher. Additional advantages include a cutlery drawer and the ability to connect to a smartphone. Something completely new for me is the use of zeolite, which reduces the dishwasher's energy consumption and thus lower electricity bills. I highly recommend this device!

1199187953.text_en: This dishwasher is great: quiet, economical in water and electricity, very good value for money. Very easy to use. The materials seem very sturdy. The plus: the display of the remaining time of the washing cycle is projected on the ground!!! This is very ingenious and above all practical. The covered drawer has a large capacity.  I recommend this machine with my eyes closed! I know it will work for several years.

1161761667.text_en: The previous Bosch dishwasher served us for 12 years, it still works flawlessly, we only bought a new one because we moved. The new dishwasher could not be other than Bosch. The equipment is fantastic - it washes beautifully, dries perfectly, comfortable baskets, a great cutlery drawer, cool programs and intuitive operation.  The smartphone app is a nice additional gadget. The choice was quite difficult because there are many models, compared to other models, this one has everything we wanted. The quality of workmanship is very good. Displaying the time remaining until the end of the cycle is very practical - one look and we know how long washing will take. I recommend this model, lots of functions at an affordable price.

1208374792.text_en: The Bosch SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher was recommended to us by friends who use a similar Bosch model, who praised its functionality, large capacity and solid workmanship. We decided to choose this particular dishwasher due to several functions that interest us, such as Zeolith drying, the possibility of half loading or delayed start. Additionally, displaying the remaining operating time of the dishwasher makes organizing work in the kitchen much easier. A big advantage is its quiet operation, which makes it perfect for a kitchen open to the living room. A product worth recommending. 	#opinionmotivated by promotion

1219148283.text_en: The dishwasher is very easy to use. It has many programs that can wash dishes even with the speed Perfect function. It has a cutlery drawer and lifting baskets that can be quickly removed for washing the device or adding salt. It has buttons and a great function with displaying the washing time and how much time is left until the end of the cycle. I recommend #opinionmotivated by promotion ;)

1168986865.text_en: It is an excellent choice for those looking for an efficient, durable and easy-to-use dishwasher. With multiple programs and advanced technologies, it provides top performance while saving resources and time. Bosch reliability and quality make this model a long-term investment, perfect for any modern household.

1207723003.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I chose the Bosch Serie 6 dishwasher, model SMV6ZCX10E, because of many opinions, quiet operation and the possibilities it offers, but above all as a replacement for a 13-year-old dishwasher that has already reached the end of its life. Needless to say, the gap is huge in favor of Bosch. The Bosch dishwasher has everything you need and, above all, washes well. The advantage is the mechanical buttons, not touch ones. There is an external TimeLight display that shows the exact time with the operating mode. Perfectly refined baskets inside. I highly recommend the purchased device to everyone.

1207232573.text_en: the contents are piss wet after washing up, even the cutlery basket and the internal parts of the machine my 20 year old Bosch dried better template for door fitting is wrong so the door cannot be opened if fitted as shown. Even if the template is moved all the way down on the door, there is no room for the door to go under the machine

1163374686.text_en: The dishwasher is definitely not cheap, but I think it is worth the price. The equipment has a very large selection of programs, an additional cutlery drawer is a great solution because it allows us to put more dishes or large pots into the main drawer at the bottom. A brilliant solution is the display that projects the image onto the floor and thanks to this, even though the dishwasher is built-in, we can still see what is happening and how much time is left until the end of the program. The dishwasher does not work particularly quietly. I don't see any difference here compared to my old 20-year-old Siemens. Overall, the equipment is worth the price. The device is new, so it is difficult to assess its durability. This remains to be seen in the future.

1201421670.text_en: The purchase of the Bosch 60 dishwasher, model SMV6ZCX10E, turned out to be a bull's eye. ECO 3.35 h program and display on the floor with time - a revelation. The device operates very quietly, is easy to use and energy-saving. I am very satisfied and recommend it to everyone! #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207076220.text_en: I've had it for almost a year and I really like it, it washes excellently, it's quiet, it projects the remaining time on the floor, it connects to the phone via the Home Connect app where you can download new programs and make various settings.

1216991608.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion. This is my second Bosch dishwasher. The previous model served me without failure for 16 years, so the choice was easy - Bosch again, model SMV6ZCX10E from the 6 series. The new dishwasher is very quiet, perfectly washes even heavily dried dirt, and the PerfectDry function dries everything perfectly - without streaks, even on plastic. The very convenient Vario3 cutlery drawer and flexible baskets accommodate a lot of dishes.  Additionally, I appreciate the Home Connect application - I can remotely control the dishwasher and receive notifications on my phone.  Solid equipment for many years. I recommend!

1207828310.text_en: It washes and dries perfectly and works very quietly. A big plus is the projector on the floor. It's nice that it was made in Germany. Let it serve as long as possible.

1202981233.text_en: The dishwasher is very functional, displays clear messages and, most importantly, is almost silent.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1198181780.text_en: Purchase according to my needs. Ease of installation. Effective and varied programs. I do not regret my purchase on the BOSCH website!

1208374744.text_en: The Bosch SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher was recommended to us by friends who use a similar Bosch model, who praised its functionality, large capacity and solid workmanship. We decided to choose this particular dishwasher due to several functions that interest us, such as Zeolith drying, the possibility of half loading or delayed start. Additionally, displaying the remaining operating time of the dishwasher makes organizing work in the kitchen much easier. A big advantage is its quiet operation, which makes it perfect for a kitchen open to the living room. A product worth recommending.

1209357049.text_en: Once again, I decided to buy a BOSCH dishwasher because it has never let me down #opinionmotivated by promotion

1219053148.text_en: Large capacity, deep and silent cleaning.  In addition to being easy to use and having Wi-Fi.

1198921908.text_en: Efficient washing and drying What I appreciate even more is its quiet operation

1206799990.text_en: Great dishwasher, I look forward to having it in my home

1208235215.text_en: Very helpful display on the floor.  Quiet operation

1175224424.text_en: The choice of Bosch as a manufacturer was mainly influenced by 22 years of experience with the previous SGV59A23 dishwasher (I hope I won't be disappointed this time either!), while the choice of the SMV6ZCX10E model was determined by the lowest (of the available Bosch models) noise level of 40dB (quiet program 39dB) combined with relatively economical energy and water consumption, washing class A, stainless steel bottom and Aqua flood protection. Stop. What was also important to me were programs with different washing temperatures from 45-70 degrees, the half-load option, adjustable height of the upper basket level, delayed start functions and a function that shortens the duration of any program while maintaining the desired washing effect. Folding shelves and spikes are also a good solution, but in the lower basket they could be divided into two parts (like in my previous one), which would provide greater loading flexibility. With a covered control panel, it is very useful to display the time remaining until the end of the program (I missed this in the previous one). For now, after over 2 weeks of use, I am satisfied with the purchase. First of all, the dishwasher is quiet, washes and dries well, allowing you to take out the dishes and put them back in their places right after the device is finished.

1209995923.text_en: It seems to be a nice quiet machine. I am satisfied with it. Operation locally on the machine is not entirely intuitive WHEN you have connected the machine with the Bosch Connect app and run with Smart Start. Still haven't quite figured out how to start the machine without using the app if I want to run a wash with it.     The template and installation instructions for the kitchen front are also not described well enough, despite pictograms and videos. I think I have full instructions to the letter, but the door came to sit incorrectly on the first assembly attempt.

1161304851.text_en: The Bosch SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher is an absolute gem among dishwashers! I am delighted with its efficiency and functionality. Firstly, its design is not only elegant, but also functional, fitting perfectly into any modern kitchen. Moreover, its quiet operation means that you can run it at any time of the day without worrying about noise.    However, what really impressed me was its effectiveness in cleaning dishes. Whether it's delicate glasses or dirty pots, the Bosch SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher handles them perfectly, leaving the dishes sparkling clean.     Additionally, I also appreciate the water and energy-saving functions, which not only have a positive impact on the environment, but also on my wallet. I highly recommend this product!

1158213339.text_en: I have been using this dishwasher for several days. It's very, very quiet. Thanks to the third cutlery drawer, I have more capacity for other things, e.g. pots. I use capsules, wash thoroughly, I have no comments. A big plus is drying. In the previously used dishwasher, after the cycle, there was water left on the upper parts of the cups, now it is dry. Great, I don't have to wipe anything. I used my previous dishwasher every day for over 18 years. I don't know if this model will work, we'll see. For now I am satisfied, it meets my expectations. Without any comments.

1177074183.text_en: After a month of use, I am very pleased with my choice. Previously, I had a dishwasher from another company, and it served for a very long time. But current devices use less energy, are quieter and have additional useful features. My new one has all these benefits and also washes very thoroughly. It is very quiet... The function of displaying the time until the end of washing on the floor is nice. Instructions, assembly, etc. very precisely and clearly described. I haven't used the mobile application yet, but it's not that important to me. Awesome so far...

1148986833.text_en: A very good dishwasher model.  The dishes are very well washed and dried.  It has all the basic programs necessary for everyday use without unnecessary frills, including 1/2 load and reduced washing time with perfect results. The dishwasher is very quiet. The time remaining until the end of washing is displayed on the floor, which is very useful when there are too many dishes. The interior of the dishwasher is all metal, including the floor. Large capacity and good quality baskets.  The dishwasher is solid and really worth recommending.

1193811978.title_en: No more rinsing or cleaning behind
1193811978.text_en: The dishwasher sold with the house suddenly failed. Might as well buy a quality one. Even going from A++ before 2018 to class B, it consumes less and the dishes are finally really clean, not just half. Well the door is super heavy and no external controls but the main thing is that it does its job well.

1208809586.text_en: I have been using this dishwasher for a short time, but I can already say that it meets my requirements :) Compared to my previous dishwasher, this one works really quietly. A big plus for me is the additional cutlery drawer, which allows more plates to fit in the lower basket and makes it easier to arrange everything. I also really like the option of displaying how much time is left until the end of cleaning the floor. The operation is simple and the dishes are always clean :) After such a short period of use, I can definitely recommend this model.

1160478313.title_en: The dishwasher is overrated. I'm disappointed
1160478313.text_en: 1. Too loud! 2. TimeLight is a mistake. For me, it only displays about 1/3 on the floor. There is no adjustment for the distance at which the display takes place. As a result, if you have a higher plinth and placed it a little further from the dishwasher, this function practically disappears. 3. Why press the start button additionally after selecting an option. All dishwashers I know start washing when closed. 4. Something is wrong if you want to interrupt the program or change it once it has started. The dishwasher ignores the change attempt, even after turning it off and on. And after performing the reset, instead of returning to the program selection, all buttons and all segments on the display lit up and even turning it off and on did not help. 5. The buttons are also too small and uncomfortable. 6. It washes nicely, but the question is what will happen in one or five years.7. The editing is dramatic, but I would need more space to describe it here. Some elements need to be purchased additionally when, for example, we attach them to the countertop.

1208540473.title_en: Overall impressions after 3 weeks of use
1208540473.text_en: I have been using this dishwasher for 3 weeks and I am very satisfied. The biggest advantages are: Quiet operation - you can barely hear it working, even in an open kitchen.    Large capacity - you can easily fit a whole day's worth of dishes for the whole family, even large pots and pans.    TimeLight - displaying the time remaining until the end of the program on the floor is a brilliant feature! There's no need to open the door or bend down to check how much is left.    I recommend it - a great choice that I don't regret! #opinionmotivated by promotion

1160135400.text_en: When I bought a Bosch dishwasher, I immediately felt a difference in my daily routine. Its quiet operation and effective cleaning mean that I do not have to worry about the dishes. With various washing programs, I can always be sure that the dishes will be clean and shiny, regardless of the type of dirt. Additionally, the elegant design and ease of use make it not only a useful device, but also a decoration for my kitchen. I definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a high-quality dishwasher that will make life easier in the kitchen.

1205127845.text_en: The dishwasher works great, is very quiet, and the dishes are perfectly washed and shiny after each cycle. The operation is simple, intuitive and the programs meet all your daily needs. I am very pleased with the purchase and I definitely recommend this model.

1218113043.text_en: I am very pleased with the purchase of the dishwasher. This is my first Bosch dishwasher, but the opinions about the brand do not disappoint. Definitely the best household appliances company. The dishwasher is energy-saving, washes and dries dishes very well, leaving no streaks. Very roomy, has practical baskets, a drawer for cutlery and lighting, which is an indispensable element for me :) Additionally, it works very quietly, which was very important to me.  I recommend it to everyone, reliable quality!   #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207536097.text_en: I chose the Bosch Serie 6 dishwasher, model SMV6ZCX10E, because of its very quiet operation at 40 dB, which makes it perfect for a kitchen open to the living room, and I was not disappointed. It also has a TimeLight display that shows the exact time and operating mode on the floor. This is a very convenient solution that allows you to quickly check the washing status without having to bend down to the device, making everyday use of the dishwasher more comfortable and intuitive. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1178846807.text_en: I have had 2 dishwashers from other manufacturers so far. Now I have decided on Bosch and I am extremely satisfied. I have been using it for a short time, but after only a short time I have realized that it is fantastic. Dishes clean, dry. In my opinion, the operation of the device is simple, with many functions and advanced programs available through the application. And this gadget, connecting the dishwasher via Wi-Fi with an app is great. The third cutlery drawer - a great solution. I recommend purchasing this device.

1209699578.title_en: I wouldn't exchange it for another one
1209699578.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I have been using it for over a month and I am very positively surprised by the drying with Zeolith - the dishes are clean (even dried pots), dry, ready for cabinets and there is no automatic door opening - which is good for small children. Additionally, customizable compartments and shelves inside, a large cutlery drawer (they fit perfectly), intuitive programs, a stainless steel bottom (we don't like plastics), quiet, it's just a dream come true :)

1207526539.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher and once again I am absolutely delighted. The previous model served me for years without any problems, so choosing this brand again was obvious - and again I was not disappointed.  The new dishwasher works even quieter, faster and more economically than the previous one. The programs are perfectly refined and the washing results are always perfect - even with difficult dirt. I also really appreciate the well-thought-out interior with adjustable baskets, thanks to which I can easily adjust the space to the dishes I have to wash.  You can see that Bosch maintains a high standard of quality and reliability. If someone is looking for equipment that really makes life easier and works flawlessly for years, I recommend it with a clear conscience. I already know that during the next replacement I will choose Bosch again.

1204200743.text_en: Pros: The dishwasher works exceptionally quietly - with a declared noise level of 40 dB (surprisingly, newer devices from the 6 series work at 44 dB) it is almost imperceptible during operation, which was very important when choosing, because we have a kitchen open to the living room. The display on the floor is a nice gadget :) Cons: Installing the front of the building (a uniform front with a height of 80 cm from Ikea) turned out to be problematic - the front is too long, because the limit of the device it is 725mm, so you will have to do some miracles with cutting the front and the hinge or rails.    After the first use in Eco mode, the device did not thoroughly clean relatively easy items (salad bowls) - which suggests that with a light load or economy mode it is worth checking the effects or considering a more powerful program.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1158817647.text_en: I decided to purchase this model of a BOSH dishwasher primarily because we wanted an energy-saving drying system that would not involve opening the door ajar at the end of the cycle. Choosing this model turned out to be a bull's-eye. Drying is very effective because even plastic containers are dry.   The dishwasher is located in the kitchenette connected to the living room, so it was important for us that it had a quiet operation program. In this model, we can turn on the night program, but I don't feel the need to use it because the regular ECO cycle is quiet enough. It is also worth paying attention to the high energy class of the equipment, steel bottom, adjustable upper basket, capacious cutlery basket and small containers.  To sum up, after a month of use, I recommend this model to everyone.

1207788540.text_en: The SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher washes and dries dishes thoroughly. The advantage is a separate cutlery drawer and adjustable drawer height. Zeolite dries dishes well. Another big advantage is the quiet operation of the dishwasher and the time remaining until the end of washing, which is displayed on the floor. The downside is that there are only two drop-down dish inserts instead of four as was the case with our previous dishwasher. In general, however, the new dishwasher works very well and we are satisfied with it.

1159263518.text_en: Dishwasher with Zeolith - purchased deliberately to ensure dry and streak-free dishes and plastic boxes. It fully works and met expectations. A reasonable number of programs, the working time display is also nice. It's true that the baskets seem delicate compared to the previous dishwasher (hence the 4 stars), but I hope they will last. A program for washing pots - removes all dirt - and that's what it was about. I hope it will last as long as the previous one, which is about 12 years.

1207866894.text_en: The SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher washes and dries dishes thoroughly. The advantage is a separate cutlery drawer and adjustable drawer height. Zeolite dries dishes well. The downside is that there are only two drop-down dish inserts instead of four as was the case with our previous dryer. Generally speaking, the new dishwasher works very well and we are satisfied with it.

1197704153.text_en: Second time I buy bosch. There is nothing wrong with the old one, but in connection with a new kitchen it must be integrated

1159075261.text_en: This is my third Bosch dishwasher - this time built-in. The first dishwasher (SMS53L18) has been operating without failure for 10 years! 1193383103.text_en: A machine that is spacious and with a practical interior.  Extremely quiet and very good drying ability.

1158670108.text_en: I recommend it to those who are undecided. The Bosch SMV6 dishwasher is very quiet. 1181302785.text_en: I really like the time indicator, everything is very clean and dry.

1186676730.text_en: Super good and spacious, very quiet and washes clean every time.

1176307923.text_en: We have been using the Bosch Serie 6 dishwasher for some time now and we are super satisfied! 1206760842.text_en: The Bosch Serie 6 SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher is a hit. Remote control – the ability to start, monitor the cycle and adjust programs from your phone is a comfort you can quickly get used to.

1184357696.text_en: Roomy, modern, economical! The dishwasher offers many programs that can be controlled using a very intuitive and quick application. Additionally, a great gadget in the form of a hologram that displays the current cleaning stage on the floor. I hope it will last for many years. I highly recommend this model!

1210546136.title_en: Excellent cleaning but important parts missing
1210546136.text_en: delivers a very high cleaning quality. It is extremely quiet and washes better than our previous machine. The washing and drying ability itself is top notch, and on that point the product fully lives up to its reputation as a test winner.    However, it is important to note that the machine is delivered without a front and foot panel. This only appears discretely from the product material and can easily be overlooked. In addition, the door closes very hard until a heavy kitchen front or alternative solution is installed, which means that you have to pay attention to your fingers in daily use.    Overall, it is a technically very well-functioning dishwasher with excellent performance, but the lack of included parts for the high price that the dishwasher costs and the door closing drags down the overall experience. For this reason, the product is rated 3 out of five, otherwise it would have received top marks.

1220724592.text_en: I have been using this dishwasher for about half a year, since November 2025, and I am very happy with the choice I made. I especially appreciate the fact that it is very quiet and can work without problems even in the evening or at night. The interior is well compartmentalized and roomy, so I can easily organize larger pots and pans.    The programs are intuitive and the drying function does its job very well. In addition, the consumption seems efficient, which is important for daily use.    After a few months of use I can say that it is a reliable, practical and comfortable product for everyday life. I confidently recommend this dishwasher to those who want a powerful and easy-to-use appliance.

1203030673.text_en: The dishwasher works great - the dishes are perfectly clean after each cycle, without the need to rinse them first. An additional advantage is low water and energy consumption, which translates into real savings.  #opinionmotivated by promotion*

1199140312.text_en: We replaced our entire old kitchen and purchased new equipment. This device was a hit from day one. What options. And that machine washes so well. We are very happy with it. And then again Home Connect. Linked to Home Assistant, you can run the machine at times when it is economically convenient. Our dishes always come out well. Nice, such a leap in time of 20 years compared to the old machine.

1220277342.title_en: The first Boch dishwasher in use
1220277342.text_en: This is my first BOSCH dishwasher. The dishwasher cleans well and is energy-saving. It dries dishes well after washing. It's great that it includes the option of displaying the remaining washing time and program type on the floor as well as interior lighting. So far there are no problems with it.   #opinionmotivated by promotion

1159761102.text_en: Bosh is the undisputed leader in the production of dishwashers, this is not the first time I have purchased a dishwasher from this company - so far, other models have not disappointed me once. The multitude of functions, capacity, cutlery drawer, zeolith system and time and program display on the floor make working with the device more enjoyable. I am convinced that the new model, just like the previous ones, will not disappoint us and will serve our household for a long time,

1173954845.text_en: This is my first Bosch dishwasher and I can say that it was a bull's-eye. In my opinion, the biggest advantage is the Bosch Home Connect application. Thanks to the application, I can run the dishwasher during cheaper electricity tariff hours, thus being at work. The application has several additional washing programs, and thanks to the program assistant, it selects the program depending on the load. I highly recommend it and wouldn't trade it for any other.

1222095884.text_en: The purchase of a BOSCH dishwasher turned out to be a very good choice. The device works very quietly, and only the light indicates that the dishwasher is working. When it comes to the washing effect, it does a great job. The dishes are clean, dry and shiny. Even dried pots are removed without any signs of dirt. The equipment is well made and easy to use. I wholeheartedly recommend it to everyone who is looking for a solid and economical dishwasher.

1219570552.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion My current Bosch dishwasher has come to an end after 20 years of brave service. Therefore, the choice of a new one could not be other than another Bosch. This time my priority was quiet operation, short washing programs, a timer on the floor and good drying. The first wash cycles show that the choice was right. The only thing missing in this model for complete happiness is automatic opening of the door after washing.

1219096973.text_en: I have been using this dishwasher for almost a year and I am very happy with the product. It cleans very well, it is quiet and it is very comfortable that at the end everything is dry. Three months later I had to use the warranty because a light stopped working. It was easy to request the repair. It took about 2-3 weeks for the piece to arrive. When the part arrived the next day the technician came and made the change. I am happy with the service provided.

1207539281.text_en: We recently purchased a BOSCH Serie 6 SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher and we are very pleased with it, the dishwasher runs quietly, dishes and other kitchen accessories are washed, no dirt remains. The total gamechanger is the time until the end of the cycle, which is displayed on the floor. I recommend it to everyone, great equipment. We had been using a Bosch dishwasher in our previous apartment for 10 years, so this time we also chose this company.

1221884964.title_en: There can only be one king - BOSCH!
1221884964.text_en: If you are looking for a dishwasher, there can only be one choice - BOSCH. My parents' house uses a Bosch that is at least 15 years old, we use a Bosch that is 8 years old (no failures), we also bought a Bosch for our new house, we didn't think about anything else - the 6 series seems to be optimal. Great and aesthetic workmanship, available parts, quick and simple service (apparently, I haven't checked it yet). I RECOMMEND!

1208783959.text_en: This is my second Bosh Series 6 dishwasher. The previous one served me for 10 years. Without hesitation, I bought another similar one. The newer version has slightly more built-in baskets upwards, which allows you to "press" a little less dishes, but on the plus side there is an additional drying option and the time remaining until the end of the cycle is displayed on the floor - very useful!  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1222384233.text_en: This is another Bosch dishwasher that I use, the first one is in my family home and it washes fantastically, that's why I also bought a Bosch for my apartment, it is very quiet, the sound of washing is downright relaxing :) I use the simplest ecological soda tablets and usually in the eco mode and all the dishes are clean, the glass is shiny without any additional rinse aid. I recommend #opinionmotivated by promotion

1149316965.text_en: The Bosch SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher surprised me very positively in terms of work culture. Due to the fact that I have a kitchen connected to the living room, it was important for me that the dishwasher was as quiet as possible. I can say that the selected model met my expectations. A big plus is the ability to connect to the application so you can monitor the device. When it comes to the quality of washing, I have no objections

1217660382.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion Really solid equipment. The most impressive thing is the level of drying of the dishes - no water and practically everything can be immediately put into the cupboard. Quiet operation, almost imperceptible. A convenient function is the display of the time until the end of the cycle, which makes it easy to plan work in the kitchen. The Eco mode is a plus - compared to the previous dishwasher, it is significantly shorter and the dishes stay clean and dry.

1206260571.text_en: The dishwasher was chosen for a long time, and finally I chose Bosch with Zeolith due to better results when drying dishes. After the first use, the difference is actually visible because the dishes are practically 100% dry. Additionally, Bosch has perfectly working basic programs. I haven't tested all of them yet. The dishwasher is quiet and works well. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1186250662.text_en: A dryer worth recommending. The quality of workmanship is at the highest level. It washes dishes well and removes even dried dirt. No streaks remain. Good solutions for safe washing of wine/champagne glasses. Great cost for cutlery. Well-selected programs. I recommend. This is my third Bosch dishwasher. Once I decided to buy a dishwasher from another company and after two years I returned to Bosch.

1219323520.title_en: One of the best decisions for our kitchen
1219323520.text_en: I bought a Bosch SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher and it is one of the best decisions for our kitchen. I didn't expect that a dishwasher could make everyday life so much easier! First of all, it's incredibly quiet - sometimes I actually forget that it's working. With an open kitchen, this is a huge advantage because there is no noise and you can watch a TV series or talk in peace. What impressed me most was the drying. Even plastic containers and cups come out perfectly dry, without a drop of water. For me, this is a great convenience because I don't have to wipe anything additionally by hand. The dishwasher is also very spacious - everything fits easily after a large dinner or a meeting with friends. The baskets are well-designed, you can conveniently arrange both delicate glasses and larger pots.  I also really like the time display function on the floor - it looks modern and is super practical. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1160126882.text_en: We had the same Bosch 6 series dishwasher for 8 years and it broke, after looking at the market we decided to buy the same one.     The problem for these home appliance manufacturers is that they have not devoted their energy to improving product quality, but have only focused on cost reduction and "planned obsolescence." This is harmful to the environment and forces consumers to make multiple purchases.

1206816236.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion* The Bosch SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher is a great piece of equipment that definitely meets my expectations. First of all, it is very quiet, so you can easily use it in the evening. The programs are well selected, and the Auto function adjusts the parameters perfectly - the dishes always come out perfectly clean. I also appreciate the function of weighing the load and automatically selecting the amount of water, which really saves both time and energy. Another advantage is Home Connect - the ability to control the dishwasher from your phone is a convenience that you can quickly get used to. The baskets are solid and well-thought-out, and the PerfectDry coating with Zeolith technology is great at drying, even plastic dishes. The dishwasher looks aesthetically pleasing, and as a built-in appliance, it fits perfectly into the kitchen.  To sum up: functional, quiet, economical and reliable. I definitely recommend it!

1217575600.text_en: The Bosch SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher is an example of how technology can discreetly support everyday life, instead of dominating it. Fully integrated, it disappears into the development and leaves space for what is really important - interior harmony.    On a daily basis, I appreciate above all her work culture - it is almost inaudible, and at the same time extremely effective. The PerfectDry system does exactly what you expect: dishes, even plastic ones, are perfectly dry without the need for wiping.    The interior is well-thought-out and flexible - it is easy to adapt to various needs, from everyday dishes to larger, more demanding loads. The whole thing seems refined in every detail.    This is equipment that does not impose itself on its form, but consistently builds comfort of use. Minimalism, functionality and reliability - exactly what I expect from a well-designed product.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

From this point of view, I am very disappointed with my purchase and I really regret not having taken a model with automatic door opening (or a combination of the two systems). 1210542317.title_en: Excellent cleaning but important parts missing
1210542317.text_en: The dishwasher is really good, but we unfortunately overlooked that it is delivered without a front and foot panel. It was in the headline at Punkt1, but all product photos showed the machine with front and panel, which was misleading. At Bosch, however, it appears in the pictures, but only by close reading, that these parts are not included. We bought the machine because it was voted "best in test" by Tænk. The cleaning itself is excellent: the machine is extremely quiet and washes significantly better than our previous LG. However, the door slams very hard until a heavy kitchen door or an expensive metal door (approx. DKK 1,800) is installed, and you have to watch your fingers. At a price of DKK 12,698, I believe that the front and foot panel should be included. When these are purchased additionally, the price ends at approx. DKK 14,798. Therefore, the product deducts two stars - otherwise it would get 5. Point 1 also connected the first machine incorrectly (high current) and the next one has E31 error with water leakage. It is still under investigation and does not affect my rating.

1206586929.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I have had the dishwasher for a week, everything works as it should - it washes and dries very thoroughly. 1160277573.title_en: Finally no more washing dishes by hand
1160277573.text_en: For a long time, I had a hard time washing dishes by hand. After 8 hours of work, shopping and cooking, there was no strength or even desire to wash up. I decided that it couldn't go on like this and a dishwasher had to be installed in my apartment. Looking through various types of materials, I determined what my future dishwasher must have - primarily Zeolith, thanks to which I will avoid the choice between wet dishes in a classic dishwasher and a swollen furniture board and peeling veneer when the door opens automatically. Motivated by my parents' good opinion about the Bosch dishwasher, which has been serving without failures for 10 years, I knew that I also needed a Bosch. I chose the 6 series. I was sure that I had made the right choice after removing the first batch of washed dishes. The dishwasher is virtually inaudible, the washing results are great, there are no problems with cleaning. The dishwasher has a Zeolith system - washed dishes are dry when unloaded. Today I can't imagine life without a dishwasher.

1161620938.text_en: I am satisfied with the purchase. The dishwasher works very quietly and is intuitive to use. It washes and dries great. When using a previous dishwasher from a different company, I couldn't remove the dishes without using the cloth multiple times.    I was skeptical about the cutlery drawer as I thought it would be easier to put them into the basket. However, the fears were unfounded. Placing them on a shelf is not a problem and arranging them in individual groups makes it easier to take them out later. A big advantage of the dishwasher is the function with a time display on the floor. There is no need to open the dishwasher during washing to check the remaining time.  The dishwasher has a sufficient number of washing programs. The advantages include the ability to shorten the program's operating time, wash with half a load, control via the Internet and delay the start. One small minus is the fully, not partially, foldable spikes in the lower basket. I believe that partially unfolding them would make it easier to arrange pots and dishes in one row.

1219740295.text_en: The dishwasher looks very good - the materials seem durable and solid, the baskets move freely on the guides. For me, the advantage is production in Europe and easy availability of service and spare parts, which ensures safe use for years. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1203498580.text_en: I tested the Bosch SMV6ZCX10E dishwasher, part of the 6 series, and here are my impressions: Design and construction: The SMV6ZCX10E is a fully integrated dishwasher with a minimalist and elegant design. The hidden control panel provides a uniform look in the kitchen. It is well built and the drawers for dishes and cutlery are sturdy and adjustable, offering flexibility in organizing the space.    Washing and drying performance: The machine excels at washing and drying. PerfectDry technology with Zeolith ensures completely dry dishes, including plastic ones, without water marks or stains. Even the fast programs are effective and do not sacrifice the quality of the wash.    Quietness: The noise level is very low (about 42 dB), which makes the machine almost imperceptible in operation. The light projection on the floor, which shows the remaining time, is a practical and intuitive function.    Capacity and flexibility: With a capacity of 14 sets, the SMV6ZCX10E is ideal for families of 3–4 people. The upper cutlery drawer frees up space in the lower basket, but care must be taken with large glasses, which can be difficult to place.    Technology and connectivity: Compatible with the Home Connect app, it allows you to start the car remotely, choose programs and monitor the remaining time, which adds extra comfort and control.    Pros: Excellent washing and drying performance Very quiet Smart functions and Home Connect connectivity Sleek and integrated design Cons: Large glasses can be difficult to place in the top drawer Price can be higher compared to other similar models Verdict: The Bosch SMV6ZCX10E is a top-notch, reliable, quiet and very efficient dishwasher. It is ideal for those looking for a durable and modern appliance that makes washing dishes completely hassle-free.

1208644761.text_en: Excellent dishwasher, washes well, convenient internal lighting, also convenient WiFi for remote control, with a nice timer displayed on the floor! Of course, initially I had a bit of trouble connecting and it connected, but it didn't start. I asked for a return, Mediaworld was ready to solve the problem but I canceled and the problem was practically solved after days. Of course, I also had a bit of trouble that it doesn't have sliding hinges but in the furniture shop they also solved the problem by making the door for that type of dishwasher, an excellent purchase between quality and convenience. Again thanks to Mediaworld always

1207594432.text_en: The built-in Bosch dishwasher is an absolute hit! From the first use you can see that this device was created with convenience, quality and everyday comfort in mind. The well-thought-out interior allows you to easily fit both large pots and delicate glasses, and you can also slide out the top shelf to add a tall glass. Flexible baskets and height adjustment are a huge convenience. In addition, modern programs, such as quick wash or economy mode, make the dishwasher perfectly adapt to my needs.   Energy-saving - the device uses very little water and electricity, and at the same time guarantees great results. The build quality is typical of Bosch - solid, modern and trustworthy.  This is a purchase I am very pleased with. If someone is looking for a reliable, quiet and effective built-in dishwasher, Bosch definitely deserves the highest rating. I recommend it with a clear conscience! I OWN two from this company, only the second one is smaller and also built-in with bottom backlight.

PROS: - very good drying of dishes, - low water and energy consumption, - menu in Polish, - connecting to the phone via the application and setting the dishwasher in the application, - good workmanship of the product, washing chamber made of stainless steel, - display of times until the end of the washing cycle on the floor, - etc... CONS;  NONE I also want to emphasize that this is the second dishwasher I have used. The first dishwasher was also BOSCH SMV53M00EU/16 (photo of the plate attached) and it served me for several years without any problems. Great equipment compared to the price, so it's worth buying. Well, in short, it is simply perfect and we recommend it with all ten 🤩😁

1210779742.text_en: It works quietly, perfectly washed dishes have many washing options.

1202766890.text_en: My opinion about the Bosch SMV8YCX02E dishwasher I have been using the Bosch SMV8YCX02E dishwasher for several weeks and I am really delighted with it. From the first use you can see that this is premium equipment - solidly made, with attention to detail and intuitive operation.    The biggest advantages that I appreciate the most: Very quiet operation - even in intensive mode, the noise level does not disturb everyday use in the kitchen.    Perfect drying results thanks to PerfectDry / Zeolith technology - dishes (including plastic elements) come out dry and ready to be put away in the cupboard, without the need to wipe them.    Flexible loading solutions - MaxFlexPro baskets, foldable elements and the Vario3 Pro drawer make it easy to place even large pots and unusual dishes.    The automatic door opening function (at the end of the cycle) works great - it reduces moisture and makes it easier to fit into the kitchen interior.    Control via the Home Connect application gives great comfort - I can start the dishwasher remotely, check consumption statistics, select additional programs and optimize cycles.    Well-designed control panel with TFT display - intuitive, clear and elegant.    Water savings (approximately 9.5 liters per cycle in the Eco program) and a solid energy class - you can see real benefits in your bills.    To sum up: Bosch SMV8YCX02E is a dishwasher that combines efficiency, modern functions and everyday comfort of use. I fully recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable, quiet and very well-equipped device.

1217326507.text_en: I am very pleased with this dishwasher. It is silent and does its job very well, the dishes come out clean and dry every time. Some even seem too complicated at first and it's not really clear what they're for, but I suspect they're part of the Bosch Series 8-specific improvements focused on flexibility. 1203379699.title_en: opinion after a month of use BoschSMV8YCX02E
1203379699.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion After about four weeks of daily use of this dishwasher, I can share a few impressions.    1. Quiet operation and washing efficiency The dishwasher works very quietly - you can turn it on even at night, it does not disturb household members. The dishes come out perfectly clean and dry, including plastic elements, which is a big advantage.    2. Large capacity and convenient loading. It holds a lot of dishes - it is enough for a family of 3-4 people. The adjustable upper basket and the third cutlery drawer are very practical and facilitate everyday use.    3. Remote control and smart functions The Home Connect application works flawlessly - it allows you not only to turn on the dishwasher from your phone, but also to schedule washing at times when electricity is cheaper (e.g. at night). Additionally, it allows you to view the exact parameters of each program, such as duration, temperature and water or energy consumption. This is a very convenient and modern solution.    4. TimeLight – brilliant feature!  A great addition is TimeLight, which indicates the time and progress of the program, and displays everything directly on the floor. Thanks to this, I always know how much time is left until the end of the cycle, without having to open the door.    5. Efficiency and savings Water and energy consumption is very low, and the Eco program runs for a long time, but is extremely economical. You can see real savings in your bills.    6. Appearance and build quality The dishwasher looks elegant, and the control panel is completely hidden. The built-in structure looks aesthetic and modern, and the installation was trouble-free.    🔍 Summary After a month of use, I am very pleased with the purchase. The Bosch SMV8YCX02E dishwasher is a modern, quiet and energy-saving equipment that really makes life easier. The smart and TimeLight functions are very impressive, and the washing results are excellent.  Rating: 5 - definitely recommend!
