1216986097.text_en: Opinion motivated by a promotion, I have been using Bosch dishwashers for over 25 years, this is my third dishwasher of this company, the series 8 model is a modern model with the function of controlling the application on the phone, with a better drying function (of course, the drying is better than in the previous model), it has more washing programs and better suited to the needs of washing and drying, visually without any major changes, why Bosch, because the previous dishwashers were unreliable, they just worked.

1180886054.text_en: I have a Bosch 8th series SMV8YCX02E dishwasher. The dishwasher has a rich selection of programs, although I most often use the Eco program, the variability of dish storage is at a high level (almost all racks can be folded) + the adjustable middle basket in 3 positions is priceless :-), the cutlery drawer saves a lot of space, the Timelight function is excellent - the projection of the remaining time on the floor, the dishwasher has a beautiful quiet operation, the possibility of Wi-Fi control and excellent drying with Zeolite. Overall, I am extremely satisfied with this product. The only negative for me is that the lower basket for dishes has racks for plates arranged from left to right, and not from back to front - so it might be great if there were 2 variants of the arrangement of the lower basket and the possibility of choosing when buying according to the individual preference of the buyer.

1211765036.title_en: Packaging not suitable for the product.
1211765036.text_en: Dishwasher purchased from Amazon and delivered by Poste Italiane. When I opened the package I saw that it was dented and deformed underneath the polystyrene. After checking that there was no functional damage, I decided not to return it, so as not to be left without a dishwasher for any longer.   Instructions not clear and intuitive: instead of videos, a few lines of explanation would have been more useful.

1219941686.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The Bosch SMV8YCX02E dishwasher is a great choice for people who value comfort, modern functions and perfectly clean dishes. The device works very quietly. Intuitive operation.    After the program ends, the dishes are perfectly dry and shiny. Functions such as automatic door opening, time projection on the floor or control via the Home Connect application make using the dishwasher exceptionally comfortable and modern. I recommend.

1219206519.text_en: SMV8YCX02E dishwasher #opinionmotivated by promotion After a long time comparing different dishwashers, I decided on the Bosch SMV8YCX02E model and after the first tests I see that it was the right choice. The device is very quiet, removes even tougher dirt, and the drying system works very well - better than I expected. I also like the intuitive operation and the ability to configure programs in the application. At the moment I am very satisfied. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1197333064.text_en: convinced for years by bosh quality, this dishwasher is perfect for our use, silent and efficient

1196712297.text_en: This dishwasher is very good, except for the assembly. The screw for the rear foot is plastic and wears easily.

1219143956.text_en: The BOSCH Serie 8 SMV8YCX02E dishwasher is premium equipment that really makes a difference in everyday use. Very quiet operation, great quality of workmanship and very good washing results even with heavily soiled dishes. A big plus for the Zeolith system - the dishes, including plastic containers, are actually dry after the program ends.    The Home Connect application works stably and allows you to conveniently control the dishwasher from your phone. The baskets are well thought out, easy to fit pots, pans and more dishes. Interior lighting and TimeLight make a very good impression.    The price is high, but you can see what you pay for - comfort of use and work culture are at a very high level. If someone is looking for a dishwasher that will last for years without any compromises, this model is definitely worth considering.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1182025533.text_en: Maximum satisfaction!  The Bosch SMV8YCX02E is the best dishwasher I have ever owned! The dishes are always perfectly clean and dry thanks to the EfficientDry technology. I really appreciate the quiet operation, I hardly hear it at night. Smart functions via Home Connect are a great bonus, I can control it remotely and receive notifications about the end of the cycle. The large capacity and flexible arrangement of the interior space facilitate everyday use. Overall, an excellent investment, I definitely recommend it!

1219671356.text_en: I chose the dishwasher because of the quality of workmanship. I was convinced by: adjustable height of drawers, metal interior, light inside, floor timer, aqua stop and high level of energy efficiency. The sound level class leaves room for improvement (it is not possible to read from the manual how much noise the night mode generates). I don't like being controlled by an application that requires logging in. The little cleaning kit is a nice addition. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1156571484.text_en: I own several Bosch appliances, including the dishwasher that makes my work easier!

1219956500.text_en: Bosch SMV8YCX02E is a dishwasher from a higher series that makes a very solid impression already at the stage of installation and first use. The plus points are the quality of workmanship, stable baskets, and the fact that the model comes from German production, which further strengthens the sense of durability and quality. The great advantages are functions such as: PerfectDry with Zeolith technology, automatic door opening EfficientDry and TimeLight showing the working time on the floor. I also chose this model because I have good previous experience with the reliability of Bosch dishwashers. Previous devices of this brand have worked without problems for years, which is why I consider SMV8YCX02E to be a reasonable choice for a person who is looking not only for many functions, but above all for durable and refined equipment for everyday use.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1209700447.text_en: I really like the cutlery drawer, they don't move when you move the drawer. I like to use the Speed ​​Perfect option, which shortens the program duration significantly. The automatic door opening option is also great and can be activated for each program. And of course the dishes are perfectly clean :) It could be a bit quieter and the Zeolith system - we thought that the plastic boxes would be 100% drip-free, but so far this is not the case.

1196840469.text_en: very conclusive first use, drying with the zeolith system is great

1215940498.text_en: We are very pleased with this dishwasher! First of all, it is great at cleaning even heavily soiled dishes - everything comes out clean and shiny, without the need to soak it first. A big advantage is silent washing. The device is very roomy and well-designed - we are most pleased with the cutlery drawer. This is super convenient. The programs are intuitive and easy to use. We definitely recommend it.   #opinionmotivated by promotion

1176524733.title_en: An exceptional product! Bosch does not disappoint
1176524733.text_en: I am extremely excited about this Bosch dishwasher with Zeolith technology. It's a real change in the daily routine! Dishes come out not only impeccably clean, but also completely dry, including glasses and plastic containers.   The Zeolith technology is really impressive and the low power consumption is a big plus. The machine runs very quietly, I usually use the Eco program overnight. In addition, the washing programs are varied and suitable for any type of dishes, and its modern design fits perfectly in my kitchen.  Another aspect I appreciate is the very well-thought-out interior organization – the baskets are adjustable, so I can load large dishes without problems. It is a premium product that is worth every penny. I recommend with great confidence!

1186693811.text_en: Our second Bosch dish. We are satisfied with the selection, the display on the floor about the duration of the cycle is great, control of the bowl via home conect, the third drawer for beštek increases the space in the lower basket, drying of plastic with zeolite technology, increased temperature for washing only in the lower basket are new things that are great. The dishes are well washed and the plastic dishes are super dried.  We hope that this dish will also work for 25 fodins, as its predecessor did.

1221087956.text_en: very quiet, dries well, convenient programs

1219701343.title_en: A quiet, roomy and very effective dishwasher
1219701343.text_en: I can safely recommend this Bosch dishwasher. The device operates very quietly and thoroughly washes even the most dirty dishes and pots. I really like the convenient arrangement of the baskets and the additional drawer, which makes it easy to arrange everything. A big plus is also the effective drying and intuitive programs. The dishwasher looks modern, is solidly made and is perfect for everyday use. I am very satisfied with the purchase. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1183939943.text_en: This is our second Bosch Serie 8 dishwasher, modernized, among others: with the Home Connect application, extra clean zone, Intelligent or Favorite programs and additional SpeedPerfect+ functions, a function that reminds you to clean the dishwasher. And what is important to us is a 10-year warranty against interior corrosion. Unfortunately, the baskets in the previous dishwasher corroded after 8 years, but the dishwasher itself still works flawlessly despite daily use.

1159758481.text_en: I recommend it because it's worth it

1217317978.title_en: Real premium class in my kitchen
1217317978.text_en: The purchase of the SMV8YCX02E model was a bull's-eye and a total quality leap! The dishwasher is incredibly quiet, and washing even heavily soiled dishes is no problem for it. The interior has been designed so wisely and flexibly that I can easily fit tall pots and lots of small items inside.    A great convenience is the bright illumination of the chamber, which makes it easier to arrange the dishes every day. I also really appreciate the time projector on the floor - the equipment is built-in, so I can immediately see how many minutes the cycle will end. The biggest advantage, however, is how the dishwasher dries. Thanks to the fact that the doors open by themselves at the end, everything is perfectly dry and ready to be put straight into the cabinets. Equipment worth every penny makes life easier at every step. I recommend it with a clear conscience!    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1208367745.text_en: I wonder how it is possible to receive a dishwasher of this high range (series 8) and immediately find myself with a defective lock (it does not open automatically at the end of the cycle) and I immediately had to open an assistance ticket. I can understand if it is used and it breaks it could be a defect but assembling it and it not working means that all the functioning and quality tests have not been carried out. I'd like to get some feedback from Bosch on this

1182945454.text_en: After 15 years we chose the excellent Bosch SVM8YCX02E dishwasher; German quality. Thanks to the possibility of controlling the dishwasher remotely, it is possible to turn on the dishwasher at any time. Lots of programs, the dishes are clean, the glasses are shiny and dry. Automatic door opening is also great. Overall, we are very satisfied with the dishwasher and recommend it.  + silent operation of the dishwasher + variability of baskets for storing dishes + low consumption, water saving (eco program) + interior lighting - none yet

1196635518.text_en: Impeccable cleaning and drying; we particularly appreciate the door opening at the end of the cycle which allows optimal drying of dishes, even plastic accessories (which was not the case with our previous LV); installation is easy thanks to the different QR codes present on the instructions linking to tutorial videos; the fact that it is connected is a plus for managing the device remotely in addition to the possible delayed start.

1180889428.text_en: We are very satisfied with the Bosch SMV8YCX02 dishwasher so far. It washes and dries perfectly. First class, no complaints. It's quiet, we know it's working, but it's just a quiet shuffling that doesn't disturb. The first few days it smelled from the factory, but from what I've read, it's normal. It has an excellently shaped upper basket for cutlery and knives. I appreciate the variability of the baskets. The woman likes indoor lighting. I like the application and the ability to set my own program. And surprisingly, we and (even the children) enjoy the projection of the end of the program with information on the floor. I thought that the classic light would be enough (originally we only had a similar one selected from the 6 series), but together with the automatic program that shortens or lengthens the wash as needed (the last time it reduced the wash time by 40 minutes, with a great result), this information becomes very welcome and pleasant. I feel like I got good value for my money.

1204193688.text_en: I am very satisfied with the BOSCH PerfectDry dishwasher. The equipment washes the dishes thoroughly, and the drying function works really well - the plates are shiny and the plastic containers are finally dry right after opening the dishwasher! It works very quietly, you can practically not hear it.  It's nice that it displays the time until the end of washing! It has many programs and intuitive controls. Perfect for a modern kitchen - definitely worth the price. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1208328639.text_en: I have had the washing machine for three weeks. It works great. The biggest change I notice compared to the previous washing machine is the perfectly dried dishes, especially plastic, just as it was written in its description. At least I have to clean the dishes. I haven't tried all the programs yet, but I'm definitely looking forward to exploring. The Home connect app works great and is connected to the washing machine all the time. So far, the pen has proven to be a great device, I hope it will stay that way.

1207560475.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion - Bosch Serie 8 I bought the Bosch Serie 8 dishwasher in a promotion and after a few weeks of use I can say one thing - it is top-shelf equipment. It works very quietly, which is of great importance when the kitchen is open to the living room. The automatic program selects the parameters perfectly, and the zeolite drying system makes even plastic containers dry and can be stored immediately.    The interior is really well thought out: adjustable baskets, a third drawer for cutlery and perfect use of space. The controls are simple, and the ability to operate via the app is a nice bonus - especially for everyday use.    To sum up: it was worth taking advantage of the promotion. The dishwasher washes thoroughly, dries very well and is exceptionally quiet. If someone is looking for premium equipment "that will last for years", the Bosch Series 8 definitely meets expectations.

1181785591.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The BOSCH SMV8YCX02E dishwasher is my second BOSCH 8 series dishwasher. The previous one worked for 10 years, unfortunately it stopped working.  The new dishwasher is not much different in functionality and construction from my old one.  In dishwasher B SMV8YCX02E, the best new features are HOME CONNECT, which allows you to remotely control and obtain information about the use of the dishwasher and water and electricity consumption. Thanks to it, I can always see what the dishwasher is doing when I am away from home and can be completely reassured. The dishwasher has a large display, the "AutoOpen dry" function, automatic opening of the door after drying, and several new programs that it downloads from the Internet.   It's a pity that the new dishwasher does not have blue backlighting, only white. Blue suited me better.   Overall, I am satisfied with the device.  I can recommend a great machine.

1203459122.text_en: Fantastic dishwasher! With a well-selected program, drying is really great. For me, the most important function is the automatic opening of the door after the end of the cycle - the dishes dry perfectly. Additionally, this dishwasher holds many more dishes than my previous one of another brand. I also really like the well-thought-out, ergonomic arrangement of baskets and space for various types of dishes - it is convenient to use.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1218815341.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The previous dishwasher served well for 10 years. I was very pleased with it. However, the new one proved how much technology has advanced. I am very satisfied with the capacity, number of programs and, above all, the quality of washing and drying. A great addition is the time display and the fact that it opens itself after the cycle is finished. Another great addition is the ability to adjust the cutlery drawer. I recommend

1219593762.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion A very good dishwasher - this is another Bosch in my home and once again confirms the high quality of this brand. The SMV8YCX02E model operates quietly and the washing results are excellent. The big advantage is the elegant interior lighting, wide possibilities of adjusting the baskets and the option of connecting to an application that makes it easier to control and monitor work. The dishwasher is functional, modern and comfortable in everyday use.

1176060652.text_en: the old Bosh dishwasher lasted 18 years, with one pump repair, the new one then stopped for 2 washes, totally turned off. We are waiting for the spare part, then we hope it will last like the old one, but it seems lighter, and we are talking about version 8, not the base. Let's hope so

1218425041.text_en: Great dishwasher. It can fit a lot of dishes. The cutlery drawer is a great thing that saves a lot of space. The dishes were washed very well, although in case of heavier dirt it is worth turning on the stronger pressure option. Zeolite technology keeps the dishes dry at the end of the program.   The eco program consumes little water and electricity and the dishes are clean.   The interior is modern, well-thought-out, very well designed.   I recommend!

1202149653.text_en: Very nice interior colors. Red elements, easily retractable baskets, many interesting amenities and, of course, a phone app that counts how much water and electricity we have used. It gives us knowledge of how many times we have turned it on and which program is profitable. Whether faster or slower. You can turn on the dishwasher from the couch or see on the phone that it's finished - my 15-year-old dishwasher didn't have that - I have fun with it #opinionmotivated by promotion

1213138751.title_en: Good machine - but expected better drying ability
1213138751.text_en: Nice machine. Expected better drying ability though, although it is better than the one we had before (maybe they sold it too well in the store). Slightly annoying time setting where it accelerates slowly and then in larger intervals. Reminds me of when you delete text on the phone, which I personally am not a fan of. So expect a machine you get set for approx. 03.08 instead of 03.00 if you don't want to get spat from hitting precisely.

1202932072.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion. I was not disappointed with the purchase of another dishwasher from the Bosch group. The previous Siemens 45 worked for 10 years and is still good, but as a result of changing the furniture, we bought a larger one, which was a very good choice. Now everything fits in without having to worry about arranging the dishes. A very useful third drawer for cutlery, you don't have to put it in the basket. Washing ok, saving water and electricity at a high level.

1159094926.text_en: My old, 14-year-old used Bosch-wasch-machine died of a chronic leak and could not be resuscitated, so I bought the highest and newest model of the 8 series, not knowing what to expect. The installation took a while, then registration, application and finally washing. Great appearance, nice backlight, quite simple control panel and very quiet operation - these are the main advantages, besides, it washes clearly more thoroughly than its predecessor

1206335048.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is the second Bosch dishwasher, the previous one has been serving us for 16 years, but it's time for a change.  The new one has great functions such as telephone control, interior lighting, basket adjustment, automatic door opening and many other amenities, but the most important thing is that it is energy-saving and very quiet. I hope that I will not be disappointed by the Bosch brand again and this one will also serve us for years.

1206957109.text_en: After 18 years of continuous service and no faults, thanks to the appliance bonus, I decided to replace the Bosch SHV55M43EU/18 with the new SMV8YCX02E (also top of the range), I continue to trust the Brand based on the fact that innovation and tradition are still present in the new product, I reserve the right to change my opinion should this relationship fail, let the era of the 8 series begin!

1207622794.text_en: The decision to purchase the SMV8YCX02E device from Bosch was carefully considered. I was looking for a device that would meet my expectations and this is exactly what I managed to purchase. The most important thing for me is that it washes and dries the dishes thoroughly. When using the previous dishwasher, I had to wipe the dishes after taking them out or open the door to dry them immediately after the end of the cycle. Here the door opens by itself. The device operates quietly, is very spacious, looks aesthetic and solid, and the interior is made of stainless steel. I really like the practical digital time display on the floor. An additional advantage is the lighting inside the dishwasher. The manufacturer declares that the equipment is energy-saving and uses little water. I trust Bosch devices. I think I won't be disappointed this time either. I recommend purchasing this dishwasher. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1160247770.text_en: The Bosch Series 8 dishwasher is a real gem among dishwashing devices. I am absolutely delighted with its performance and functionality. This is the third dishwasher from this company that I have. Another aspect that I really like is its energy efficiency. Bosch Series 8 uses a minimal amount of water and energy, which translates into savings on my operating costs and benefits the environment. It's really important to take care of our planet and this dishwasher helps me do that.  Dodatkowo, funkcje dodatkowe, takie jak opcja szybkiego programu czy możliwość opóźnienia uruchomienia, sprawiają, że korzystanie z tej zmywarki jest jeszcze bardziej wygodne i dostosowane do moich potrzeb.  To sum up, the Bosch Series 8 dishwasher is an absolute must-have for anyone who values ​​excellent quality, efficiency and care for the environment. I recommend her wholeheartedly!

1165186961.text_en: Smart dishwasher, the top of the category, extremely silent, washes dishes and pots even full of grease, put them in the dishwasher and they are like new again, energy class A++ so it consumes less than the others, you can control remotely via the app. dedicated with your smartphone, and the app. It also advises you which program to use based on what you put in the dishwasher, built in Germany. Highly recommended.

1193927648.text_en: High-end dishwasher. Washing and drying are perfect, also with the express 60° program. Different programs and settings for all needs. I appreciate the beautiful finish of the control panel which is entirely smooth, sensitive and with its large screen. I also like the fact that I can choose the volume (and be able to mute it) of the dishwasher beeps and ringtones. Very satisfied.

1209693722.text_en: A very practical cutlery drawer, I really like the fact that the cutlery does not move when the drawer is moved. In addition, a wide selection of programs and the option to activate automatic door opening for all programs. I also like to use the Speed ​​Perfect option, which significantly shortens the program time when I need it. And of course the dishes are perfectly clean :) #opinionmotivated by a promotion

1206469428.text_en: The SMV8YCX02E is an absolute revelation. Most important: PerfectDry with Zeolith works! I finally pull out the dry plastic. In addition, the dishwasher is so quiet that sometimes I check the TimeLight on the floor to see if it is working at all.    MaxFlex Pro baskets are extremely flexible, and control via Home Connect is the convenience of the 21st century. Energy class A and water saving – the full package.    I recommend this equipment to everyone!    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1183666983.title_en: First experience with a Bosch dishwasher
1183666983.text_en: We've only washed the dishes once so far, but compared to our last dishwasher, it's a big difference. Dishes beautifully washed, even black tea stains on the mug gone. The old dishwasher couldn't do that.  The only thing is that it could be even bigger for our large family, but we will certainly get used to it. I was also a bit put off by the noise at the beginning, but that will hopefully get better. The price is great, but the washing quality is great. So I recommend.

1181192846.text_en: I am completely satisfied with the dishwasher. It is very quiet, has a great drying function (Zeolith), I like that you can choose on the time indicator (on the floor) whether it will show how long it will take to finish or what time it will finish. It has a lot of additional functions and types of washing programs. It can also be connected to an application. The interior lighting is also great. It fits a lot of dishes :-) Personally, I am very excited about the dishwasher and recommend it to others :-)

1216506811.text_en: I am satisfied with the SMV8YCX02E series 8 dishwasher. It is quiet, comfortable to use and dries dishes perfectly after washing. This is my second purchase of a Bosch dishwasher, last year I bought the 6 series and its trouble-free operation prompted me to buy another one, this time from an even higher series - I like details, so the additional projector with a clock and lighting really appealed to me #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207613757.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion*I bought this dishwasher and I am very pleased with it:) The device works quietly, thoroughly washes even the most difficult dirt, and the programs are well selected for everyday use. I like the water saving function, dish drying function and the intuitive control panel. The dishwasher is solidly made and looks very modern in the kitchen. I definitely recommend purchasing this model.

1219773756.title_en: Great dishwasher at a good price
1219773756.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion Very good dishwasher. The key advantages are reliability (here I trust the brand, because this is the third Bosch dishwasher I have bought) and comfort of use. This model has some goodies, such as connection to Home Connect or interior lighting.  But there is also a disadvantage - the lack of a 1-hour program. Unfortunately, it is no longer available in new, higher-class devices, but it made a difference.

1219468858.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is one of the best models and worth every penny. First of all, it works very quietly, the dishes are washed very well, even the more dried ones. The PerfectDry function is great, everything is dry + the door is open. Very roomy, for a family of 4 extra people, it's nice that there are three baskets because that's what I cared about the most. The Mercedes among dishwashers. I wouldn't trade it for any other.

1219379168.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher works quietly and thoroughly removes even the toughest dirt. I really like the Timelight function that shows the time until the end of washing on the floor. Another big advantage is the ability to control via the Home Connect app and a practical cutlery drawer, which provides more space in the lower basket. The equipment is roomy, modern and very comfortable in everyday use.

1183202537.text_en: After the series 8 oven, it was the turn of this phenomenal dish!   Energy class A, quiet, many programs, home connect, places and more than enough and numerous other functionalities. A total novelty for me compared to the last dish is the upper drawer for cutlery instead of a basket. Those who lack a basket can also buy it additionally. All in all, my recommendations for this device and that it will serve us for years!

1216003039.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is our second BOSCH dishwasher. The first one has been in operation for 7 years and still works flawlessly. We bought a new one, ready for installation, and it is waiting to be used in the new kitchen. But I'm already very happy with the purchase. The dishwasher is very roomy and functional, it has adjustable baskets, a backlight inside, a clock on the floor and a self-opening door after the end of the cycle.  I heartily recommend it

1207438792.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion My previous dishwasher served me reliably for 18 years, so I hope that the Bosch Serie 8 SMV8YCX02E will be equally durable. It already impresses me with its quiet operation, energy efficiency and perfect drying of dishes. This is premium equipment that provides comfort and certainty that everyday duties will be performed quickly and effortlessly - I hope it will serve me for the next dozen or so years.

1211979644.text_en: The dishwasher has proven to be an extremely reliable and efficient device that thoroughly washes dishes with quiet and stable operation. The quality of production is at a high level, the consumption of water and energy is reasonable, and the programs are practical and adapted to everyday use. With only minimal complaints, it is an almost excellent device that fully justifies the trust and expectations of users for the series 8 product.

1206354339.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The Bosch SMV8YCX02E dishwasher turned out to be a really good choice. From the first start you can see that it is a modern and well-thought-out device. The interior is solid, the baskets can be positioned in various ways, and additional functions such as telephone control or automatic door opening after the cycle are completed are fantastic. What I like most is that the dishwasher works quietly and evenly, practically not disturbing the daily functioning of the home. The washing and drying results are very good - even with shorter programs, the dishes come out clean and dry.  Displaying the time on the floor is very practical, especially since the dishwasher is fully built-in.  So far, everything works flawlessly and I have the impression that this is a long-term purchase. If someone is looking for a modern, economical and easy-to-use dishwasher, this model is really worth considering.

1216196705.text_en: The dishwasher does the trick. I don't think it's much better than my previous Series 6 dishwasher, which died after 10 years. I'm giving it a chance because, as it turns out, the competition can do it even worse. On the plus side: time until the end of the cycle/hour of the end of the cycle is thrown on the floor - useful, many programs to choose from, even a quick one for 35 minutes, washes dishes well, the light inside is a nice addition, but no one loads and unloads the dishwasher in the dark. Zeolith works too. The things I need to get used to is the cutlery basket, which lowers the space on both baskets lower. Combining large plates at the bottom and tall cups or larger jars is a problem. If someone has such space, the XXL dishwasher gives the 5 cm taken up by the cutlery basket. Generally, I am satisfied and I recommend the dishwasher, but there was no wow factor from the old 6 series #opinionmotivated by promotion

1215448298.text_en: I am very pleased with the purchase. The dishwasher meets all my technical requirements. When it comes to cereals, the most important requirements were the drying of dishes and the solidity of workmanship. I haven't tested all the functions yet, but so far I'm very pleased with the purchase. It may not be the quietest variant on paper, but in reality it is not a very audible model.   #opinionmotivated by promotion

1221417299.title_en: It washes well and dries dishes very well
1221417299.text_en: After a few weeks of use, I can say that the dishwasher meets my expectations. The dishes are washed thoroughly even with a full load, and the drying is at a very high level (also in the case of plastic containers). A big advantage is the capacity and the ability to conveniently adjust the baskets. The device works quietly and does not disturb even in an open kitchen. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1183169521.text_en: I have been using the Bosch SMV8YCX02E dishwasher for almost a week now and I am extremely satisfied with it. From the first time I used it, I was surprised by its quiet operation - you can hardly hear it, which is a big advantage, especially in an open kitchen. The washing quality is excellent, even with normal programs, the dishes come out perfectly clean and dry, without streaks or water residues. I also appreciate the function of automatically opening the door after the end of the cycle. Another plus is the possibility of control via the Home Connect mobile application. It is great to have an overview of the washing status even remotely and to set the program according to current needs. The flexible internal arrangement of the baskets makes it possible to comfortably load even larger pots and pans, which I lacked in the previous dishwasher. Overall, I rate the Bosch SMV8YCX02E as an excellent investment. The combination of quiet operation, energy efficiency and modern functions makes this dishwasher an ideal helper for every household. 1215434060.text_en: The Bosch SMV8YCX02E dishwasher made a good impression on me from the very beginning in terms of workmanship - solid construction, aesthetic finish and a modern, integrated panel make the equipment look simply decent and fit into premium construction.     What convinced me the most was the combination of quiet operation (44 dB) and large capacity - as many as 14 place settings, which is a great result for this class of dishwashers. The parameters also look very good: energy class A, water consumption of approx. 9.5 l in the ECO cycle and PerfectDry technology with Zeolite, which ensures effective drying, also of plastic dishes.     Additionally, I really liked the Home Connect option - the ability to control and view work from your phone is a convenience that really makes a difference in everyday use.     Looking at the whole - the quality of workmanship, parameters, technologies and comfort of use - the dishwasher is really good. And considering the available prices, I assess the value for money as very good.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1180683874.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion A fantastic Bosch dishwasher – quality, economy and convenience!    The Bosch dishwasher is an absolutely great choice for anyone who values ​​quality, efficiency and modern technologies. After a few weeks of use, I can confidently say that this is one of the best household appliances in my home.    The biggest advantages: ✅ Quiet operation - The dishwasher is almost silent, which is a huge advantage, especially in an open kitchen.  ✅ Perfect washing - Dishes come out perfectly clean, even when dirty. AquaSensor technology allows the cycle to adapt to the degree of dirt.  ✅ Saving water and energy - Ecological programs use a minimum amount of water and electricity, yet wash effectively.  ✅ Convenient arrangement of baskets - Thoughtful arrangement of shelves and a cutlery drawer make it possible to accommodate a lot of dishes.  ✅ Intelligent functions - Thanks to the Home Connect system, I can control the dishwasher from my phone, and the SpeedPerfect+ mode shortens the washing time without losing quality.    To sum up - if someone is looking for a solid, energy-saving and very functional dishwasher, Bosch is the perfect choice! I highly recommend it.

1219997824.text_en: I have been using the Bosch SMV8YCX02E dishwasher for some time and I am really very satisfied with its performance. I was most impressed by its quiet operation - sometimes I even have to check if it is turned on. This is a huge advantage, especially in an open kitchen.    The dishwasher does a great job cleaning dishes, even heavily soiled pots and dried plates. I really like the PerfectDry function because after the program ends, everything is perfectly dry, even plastic containers, which previous dishwashers couldn't handle.    Another big advantage is the capacity and well-designed baskets. I can easily fit larger pots, and the additional cutlery drawer is very convenient and allows for better use of space. The operation is intuitive, and the ability to control it via the Home Connect application is a really useful solution.    I also appreciate the low water and electricity consumption, because it makes a difference in everyday use. The dishwasher looks modern and seems to be very solidly made.    In my opinion, this equipment is definitely worth the price. If someone is looking for a quiet, modern and effective dishwasher, I can definitely recommend this Bosch model

1217636284.text_en: I purchased this dishwasher to replace an SMV59T00EU/11 which did its job very well on an intensive basis (there are 4 of us in the house + lunches and dinners with relatives and friends) for 17 years!  This is why I came back to buy a Bosch dishwasher: for its high quality and reliability.  Furthermore, the local assistance service, which I have only turned to once in 17 years, proved to be punctual and competent.  I have good expectations from this new dishwasher, especially in terms of energy saving, aware of the fact that washing times have doubled compared to the old model I had.  However, there is the possibility of shortening the washing times when necessary (lunches with many place settings with the need to carry out multiple consecutive loads), under penalty of greater energy consumption.  There is nothing to say about the quality of the washing, except that the dishes are perfectly clean and dry; just follow the manual to choose the program and the related options based on the type of dishes and dirt.  I hope in at least 10 years to be able to reconfirm my trust in a Bosch dishwasher!

1208930665.text_en: The Bosch Serie 8 washer-dryer is equipment that definitely exceeded my expectations. From the first use, what attracts attention is solid workmanship and a modern, minimalist design that fits perfectly with various kitchen styles.    The device operates very quietly, even during intensive programs, which means that using it in an open kitchen does not disturb the peace and quiet of your home. Cleanliness and drying efficiency are at the highest level - dishes, including plastic ones, are perfectly dry, without the need for manual drying. The technologies used, such as intelligent sensors and optimized washing programs, make each cycle run efficiently and economically.    The control panel is intuitive and clear, and the multitude of programs allows you to adjust the cycle to the type of loading and degree of dirt. Water and energy consumption is low, which translates into savings in the long run.    To sum up, the Bosch Series 8 washer-dryer is an investment in comfort, efficiency and failure-free operation. The equipment works reliably, makes everyday duties easier and improves the standard of kitchen use. I can confidently recommend it to anyone looking for an efficient and quiet dishwasher with excellent drying results.

1203831991.text_en: When I started looking for a dishwasher, I searched through comments, groups, and asked my friends because my 2-year-old (from a competitor on H) couldn't do her homework. It washed 1/4 of the dishes for the entire load and pushed me to my limits. The dishwasher I needed had to have interior lighting, time display, opening the door after washing, and I chose Bosch 8 series, SMV8YCX02E. When the dishwasher arrived, I knew it was a good choice - installation was simple, the manual included QR codes with videos for individual steps, a wide range of height adjustments, and front assembly was trouble-free.   At the moment, washing is a higher level of cleanliness, although I realize that my needs are lower :) the dishes shine, the pots shine and I don't use rinse aid. The application is easy to use and pair. And, I am very pleased with the function of turning on the dishwasher from the application - the predecessor also had this function, but the difference is that previously I had to press the control button and only then I could turn on the dishwasher remotely. Here I can turn on the dishwasher even when I leave the house. So far, I'm delighted - the baskets move smoothly, the space can be adjusted, the cutlery on the shelf is washed, so I have no complaints.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1217811614.text_en: He washes the dishes squeaky, they sparkle and he is not a figure of style. Being the energy store A, it consumes half a kilowatt per eco cycle, i.e. 40 money, considering that the detergent costs about one leu per wash. The water consumes about 9 liters, as much as I use to wash a plate by hand. The eco program lasts about 5 hours and they probably cut the sound insulation to thermally insulate it to reach energy class A because a series 6 class B also with zeolith was much quieter, the eco program was shorter but the washing was only good, while at this it is exceptional. Although that series 6 also with zeolith dries the dishes every day, fortunately this really dries them well and has well thought-out baskets, you put the cups at an angle so that water does not remain on their bottoms, both baskets are almost flat to make room for pots and pans, the plate holder is modeled after flat or very deep plates, it projects the time at which it finishes directly opening the floor and also there it notifies you if it wants salt, rinse aid and I think it also errors, plus it shows you if it dissolves, clears or dries. The so-called emotion light are two LEDs k 6000 or 6500 degrees kelvin that you didn't know you were missing until you received them. I come back to the noise, the difference between this and that 40 db series 6 is that you didn't know if it was running because you couldn't hear anything, this one you can't say is making noise but you can hear it running, they must have lowered the temperature and increased the pressure of the water jets to get it class A. It doesn't bother me, it doesn't sound like a load of laundry being spun.

1202322217.title_en: An investment in comfort and time
1202322217.text_en: If we were to point to one item that dramatically changed the atmosphere of our home, we would choose the Bosch 8 Series SMV8YCX02E dishwasher without hesitation. It is no longer an ordinary household appliance - it is a quiet, extremely effective friend that relieves us of our duties every day, saving us valuable time.    The first thing that catches the eye (or rather... what doesn't catch the eye) is absolute silence. Thanks to Zeolith technology and incredibly low noise level (only 39 dB!), we often have to approach it to make sure it's working at all. This is a luxury, especially when the kitchen is the center of home life and we spend evenings at the table, undisturbed by any buzzing.    Cleaning effectiveness is its second advantage. The PerfectDry function is an absolute revolution! Not only do the dishes come out sterile, but they are also perfectly dry - including the plastic containers, which always collect water drops in other dishwashers. Bosch handled it perfectly. Stronger dirt, such as dried sauce or baked cheese, disappears without a trace thanks to the AquaSensor system, which optimizes water and energy consumption depending on the degree of dirt of the dishes.    We are also delighted with the comfort. HomeConnect is the icing on the cake. The ability to remotely start washing, check the cycle status or receive notification of the end of the program via your smartphone is not only a modern gadget, but also a real convenience. We often run the dishwasher when returning home to enjoy a clean kitchen.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1204213162.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The Bosch SMV8YCX02E dishwasher model I purchased is a bull's-eye! This device fully deserves to be called premium equipment, because from the first use it is clear that it combines the highest quality of workmanship and functionality. The capacity for 14 sets of dishes makes it easy to cope with the daily needs of a larger family, and thanks to the well-thought-out arrangement of Max Flex Pro baskets, loading is convenient and flexible, regardless of the shape or size of the dishes. The PerfectDry technology also deserves special recognition, thanks to which excellent drying results are noticeable. The dishwasher works exceptionally quietly, which makes it an ideal choice, among others, for kitchens open to the living room, as in my case. Another interesting option is the intelligent program, which automatically adjusts the washing and drying parameters to the degree of soiling of the dishes, thus ensuring energy and water savings with a relatively reasonable operating time. Another great convenience is the ability to control the dishwasher via the Home Connect application, which not only allows you to start the device remotely, but also monitor its operation and download additional programs (including one very fast one). To sum up, the Bosch SMV8YCX02E dishwasher is a combination of elegant design, advanced technology and practicality that make everyday washing simple, quiet and very effective. Therefore, it meets all expectations 100%. I definitely recommend the product to anyone who values ​​comfort, quality and reliability.

1204200908.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The Bosch Serie 8 SMV8YCX02E dishwasher model I purchased was a hit! This device fully deserves to be called premium equipment, because from the first use it is clear that it combines the highest quality of workmanship and functionality. 1204896086.text_en: BOSCH SMV8YCX02E/60 is a quiet, economical and extremely practical helper for the kitchen. After a few weeks of use, I rate it as an excellent choice.    I have been using the BOSCH SMV8YCX02E/60 built-in dishwasher for several weeks now and I am extremely satisfied with it. Already during installation, I appreciated the high-quality workmanship and well-thought-out design - it fit perfectly into the kitchen cabinet and looks elegant. The capacity for 14 sets of crockery is ideal for our household, and the Max Flex Pro system allows flexible arrangement of crockery, including the VarioDrawer cutlery drawer.    One of the biggest benefits is the PerfectDry technology with Zeolith drying - the dishes are really dry after the cycle, including plastic containers, which pleasantly surprised me. In addition, the EfficientDry function automatically opens the door a little after the end of the program, which improves drying and saves energy.    The washing machine is extremely quiet - with a noise level of only 44 dB, I can hardly hear it, which is a huge plus, especially in the evening. I also appreciate the energy class A, which guarantees low consumption of water and electricity - only 9.5 liters of water per cycle in the eco program.    Smart functions such as Home Connect and the possibility of control via mobile phone are practical - I can also set the program remotely, or download a new one. I also like the Favorite program feature that I can customize to my needs.    The AquaStop safety system gives me the assurance that even in the event of a malfunction, there will be no heating. Overall, it is a top-notch appliance that meets all my expectations - quiet operation, perfect washing, energy saving and modern functions. BOSCH did not disappoint again.    I recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable, powerful and intelligent dishwasher.

1217691121.text_en: It should be noted at the beginning of this review that this is my second dishwasher from BOSCH. The previous one lasted 18 years of use and was washed on average once every two days. Taking into account the trouble-free operation period, I consciously purchased a dishwasher from BOSCH again. I consciously purchased this type of dishwasher for several reasons, which I present here. The dishwasher is quiet (the previous one was also quiet), which was the main reason for my choice. Aspect No. 2 when choosing was the variety of washing programs and the fact of downloading additional thematic programs using the HOME CONNECT online control function. Preparing to start the dishwasher for the first time is also easier using the functionality of this application. PERFECTDRY is a technology that was not available in the previous device and I was skeptical about its use in the new device. It must be said that it works. The dishes are actually dried more thanks to the technology of using natural ZEOLITH. To make things not so different, I'm annoyed by the third cutlery drawer. Compared to the previously used one, the cost seemed easier and faster to load, and I could also take the basket out of the dishwasher and move it closer to the drawer to unload the cutlery. Perhaps I will get used to this solution over time, but the manufacturer could consider removing this drawer for the convenience of carrying cutlery. When it comes to the price of the product, for this type of dishwasher, I have the impression that electronic supermarkets have some sort of price collusion - I advise checking prices online. To confirm how well the equipment is designed and made, the manufacturer could provide a 5-year warranty period (I had this in my previous one). I can recommend the equipment, you will be satisfied. I'm already here. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1180962235.text_en: If you are looking for a quality and reliable dishwasher that will take care of your dishes with minimal effort, the Bosch Series 8 dishwasher is a great choice. This model offers great performance, innovative features and an elegant design that fits into any modern kitchen.    One of the biggest pluses of the Bosch Series 8 dishwasher is its quiet operation, which you will especially appreciate in households where silence and comfort are emphasized. The dishwasher is equipped with SilentDrive technology, which ensures that even at high performance it works almost noiselessly. So you can start it at any time without disturbing the peace of your family or roommates.    Another huge advantage is the flexible interior space. The VarioFlex and VarioDrawer systems allow you to easily adjust the height of the shelves and the layout of the interior space, ensuring enough space for all sizes of dishes. Even if you have larger pots or pans, there is no problem to place them.    In terms of cleaning performance, the Bosch Series 8 does not disappoint. With advanced technologies such as PrecisionWash and AquaSensor, it guarantees perfect washing of every piece of dishware without residue. The dishwasher is very efficient and uses only the necessary amount of water and energy, saving you money and the environment.    Another significant benefit is the Home Connect function, which allows you to control the dishwasher remotely using a mobile application. You can set it, check the washing status and even get a notification when the program is finished.    The design of the dishwasher is elegant and modern, which allows it to easily fit into any kitchen. In addition, thanks to high-quality materials and precise processing, the dishwasher has a long service life.    Overall, the Bosch Serie 8 is a dishwasher that offers an excellent combination of performance, efficiency and design. If you are looking for a dishwasher that will make your everyday life easier, I definitely recommend it.    After 20 washes, we are very satisfied and I can rate the product as a perfect helper in the kitchen.

1204069022.text_en: The previous SIEMENS dishwasher served us for 17 years!!! (it was also from a higher model, so I will compare it to it ;-). We have now decided on Bosch due to the very good opinions and specifications of the device. I am writing this review after a month of use to make it relatively reliable. In addition to the basic functions that we had so far, there are some that we immediately liked: automatically opening the door after the end of the program (but you have to remember to change it in the settings so that it opens with each program and, importantly, where I have not read about it anywhere, the "Speed Perfect +" function cannot be turned on because it does not open the door), a display that throws important information on the floor (washing stage and end time) we already had in the previous dishwasher, but not as a projector on the floor but on the door from the front (icons they remain the same :-).An additional advantage here is the multitude of functions in the settings, i.e. the ability to set the end-of-use sound volume, you can also set the end of washing time or the time at which a given program ends to be displayed. As for the application itself, I have a bit of mixed feelings because I don't know why I chose the "shortened 35 min" program. it displays and actually washes away for as long as 1:45 min!!!. After the service arrived, the gentleman stated that the application was older and that the Zeolite dishwasher was unfortunately not able to dry the dishes in such a short time, which is why the programs were getting longer. The "Eco 50" program lasted 5:10 minutes for me!!! I would say great. What else I noticed is that after the program ends and the door opens spontaneously, steam is not released in such large quantities as in the case of its predecessor. The overall rating is 4/5. Would I buy it again? I think "yes", although I do not exclude the possibility of comparing it with an E dishwasher... with the "ComfortLift" lower basket lifting function. #opinionmotivated by a promotion

1221856874.text_en: I am very satisfied with the purchase. The dishwasher is quiet, washes perfectly, the dishes shine :). I recommend the Bosch brand to everyone

1219308468.text_en: Very nice equipment.  The equipment works perfectly. Very nice. I recommend to buy. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1215795982.text_en: We bought a dishwasher because our old one was gone. We were limited in size, but we chose this one and it was a very good choice. Despite the fact that the dishwasher is smaller, it is very spacious inside, thanks to the adjustable baskets. For me, the biggest change for us was the washing pull-out basket for cutlery and various other cooking accessories. There are many washing programs to choose from, the dishes are dried thanks to the special Extra drying technology, there is no need to wipe the dishes anymore. When the dishwasher finishes the program, it opens a little. Another benefit is its noise level, you can't hear it at all. You can set your favorite program. We have been using the dishwasher for a short time, but it has already surprised us with its benefits.

1215736421.text_en: As an ordinary consumer, I rate the BOSCH SPI4EMS17E dishwasher positively. It also includes a drawer for cutlery, which frees up space in the lower basket. The height of the upper basket can be adjusted in up to three positions. The model supports Wi-Fi and the Home Connect application, through which you can control the appliance remotely. The door also opens automatically after the end of the cycle, which dries the dishes by natural air circulation. It is possible to shorten the washing time.  As for the negative things, I would here is the imperfect drying of the plastics, although the door opens automatically, a pity for the Zeolith technology. 1215840993.text_en: We are satisfied with the dishwasher.  At first I was a little disappointed because I thought it was not as "solidly built" as I imagined (the washing baskets seemed unstable). 1219716499.title_en: Satisfaction review for the BOSCH dishwasher
1219716499.text_en: The BOSCH dishwasher pleasantly surprised me. I especially appreciate the quiet operation, thanks to which we can turn it on even in the evening without disturbing the household. I also like the high-quality processing of the interior space and the practical layout of the baskets, which can fit a lot of dishes. Although the Eco program takes longer, the consumption of water and electricity is very low. The only minor drawback might be the higher price compared to cheaper brands, but I think the quality and reliability make up for it.    Overall, I would recommend the BOSCH washing machine to anyone looking for a reliable, quiet and powerful household appliance.

1211250776.text_en: This is our next dishwasher, but the first from BOSCH. We were convinced to choose the brand by the opinions of family and friends who have been using BOSCH dishwashers for years. 1215726241.text_en: Great satisfaction, spacious, variable, low consumption and noise. I appreciate the Wi-Fi connection with the expansion of basic programs, the possibility of downloading new programs. Comprehensive information about programs and consumption statistics. SATISFACTION.

1216594652.text_en: Our old Bosch SPS53E08 washing machine gave up after 13 years, it was used 1 to 3 times a day, so we absolutely did not hesitate to buy another Bosch. Nova has several new programs, but inside it is almost identical to the old one, the noise level is also the same. I appreciate the internal light, bottle holder, separate drawer for utensils. But it has one drawback: the bottom two drawers for plates have a lower light height compared to the old sink, which limits the washing of wide plates on the bottom drawer in combination with tall pots and glasses on the second drawer. In any case, this is today's trend for all sinks. Otherwise, complete satisfaction, size 45 cm is ideal for 1 to 4 people, compact, can wash a lot at once. And we believe that it will last a long time, like the old one.

1220220094.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher and I can say right from the start that I maintain a very good opinion of this company. After such a long experience with the previous equipment, I had high expectations, but Bosch did not disappoint me again. If someone is looking for a reliable dishwasher that will last for years, this brand is definitely worth considering. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207595769.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion My old dishwasher was over 20 years old and I decided to replace it with a new one. The salesperson in the store said that modern dishwashers are unlikely to last that long, unless it's Bosch.
