Despite its small size, it is quite roomy, thanks to the well-thought-out design of 3 loading baskets. For now, I am very pleased with it and I hope it will work trouble-free for as long as the previous one.

1220675088.text_en: We changed the dishwasher after eighteen years and it makes a big difference. The interior space is used much better, we especially appreciate the cutlery compartment. Thanks to multiple propellers, Qualine washes even dried dishes. Another plus is that the dishwasher is very quiet. We also like the controls very much. So far we are satisfied with the dishwasher.

1215977070.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is another BOSCH dishwasher in our family. This time I chose series 6 due to the large number of programs and aesthetics of workmanship. The equipment looks solid and well thought out, and operation is simple and intuitive.  The previous dishwasher of this brand served us for almost 15 years, which is a really great result for everyday use, so choosing another device was natural for me.  So far, the dishwasher is working very well, it works quietly and washes dishes effectively. I hope that this time it will be equipment that will last for many years.

1215976177.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is another BOSCH dishwasher in our family. This time I chose series 6 due to the large number of programs and aesthetics of workmanship. The equipment looks solid and well thought out, and operation is simple and intuitive. The previous dishwasher of this brand served us for almost 15 years, which is a really great result for everyday use, so choosing another device was natural for me. So far, the dishwasher is working very well, it works quietly and washes dishes effectively. I hope that this time it will be equipment that will last for many years.

1217396445.text_en: #opinionmotivated by a promotion AFTER 16 YEARS OF USE, THEY WERE REPLACED BY A NEWER MODEL. A PROVEN BRAND, A VERY GOOD PRODUCT, THE DISHWASHER MEETS ALL MY EXPECTATIONS

1212132109.text_en: It's still series 6, and the invoice says SPS6YMI14E. This model does not appear on the website. Washes the car flawlessly, but does not dry the dishes properly. I remove the wet dishes, although I have no error message. I called the service twice, wasting time. The troubleshooter said he would call on Monday and he didn't, he called on Tuesday, after wasting time calling the service and he said he would come on Friday morning, with a phone call before. I mean today. He didn't call. What does morning mean for the troubleshooter? And how many days should I be tied to the house to wait for him? With Seriac5, the machine dries the dishes well even with the 29-minute program. Now this program has no drying. I tried all the programs with drying and when I remove the dishes I have to wipe them. Embarrassing, I don't recommend paying that much money.

1221261785.text_en: We are extremely satisfied with the Bosch SPS6EMI21E dishwasher. We use it with two people and the capacity is absolutely sufficient for us - it holds all common dishes for the whole day without any problems.  A big plus is the quality of washing. The dishes are always beautifully clean and well dried, even with normal programs. I also appreciate the quiet operation, the dishwasher is really inconspicuous and does not disturb even during evening operation.  We were switching from a built-in dishwasher and were a little worried, but completely unnecessary - this free-standing one replaced it fully without any problems. In addition, it has a practical interior space and cookware fits well.  Overall, I rate it as a very good model - high-quality workmanship, reliable performance and a good ratio of price and useful value.  ✅ I recommend it to everyone who is looking for a smaller, but fully sufficient dishwasher for a household of 2-3 people.

1220433895.text_en: Excellent dishwasher, variable space for washing, good range of washing programs, saving water and electricity. I was pleasantly surprised by the independent opening of the door and lighting at the end of the wash cycle.

1216210602.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion*.I am very pleased with the purchase. The dishwasher washes thoroughly, even with a full load, and operates really quietly. A big plus is the automatic door opening function at the end of the program - the dishes are well dried. Overall, the equipment is worth the price, I recommend it.

1206691938.text_en: bosch is quality itself. The dishwasher cleans perfectly - no streaks, the dishes shine beautifully. We recommend Bosch dishwashers to everyone and we always receive positive feedback. The dishwasher is very intuitive - even for older people. A plus for energy efficiency.     #opinionmotivatedpromotion

1220270819.text_en: The dishwasher met all my expectations. Plenty of programs to choose from, dishes are clean and shiny. Well expandable space inside. For me, a big plus is enough space to store cutlery. As for the aesthetic side, the nice external appearance and shape match the kitchen.

1217412480.text_en: Very quiet, perfect for a smaller apartment, and packed with technology. You can also configure the drawers to suit the size of the dishes. It washes really well, the only minus is a different shade of the control panel and door - #opinionmotivated by a promotion

1217630834.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion. Very well-made equipment with a well-organized interior, controlled via a touch panel and an application. It looks good in the kitchen, useful washing programs that can be modified.

1218413013.text_en: The quality difference from the dishwasher compared to the competition was felt already at the store, we especially appreciate the design and attention to practical details. Compared to the old one, it stands out for its quiet operation and many individual modes and settings.

1219039364.text_en: The dishwasher meets my expectations. Cool control from the app. Possibility to add additional programs. It is roomy and can be easily adapted to various loads due to the foldable elements. I recommend

1217705289.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher works very well - it is quiet, washes dishes thoroughly and is easy to use. A big plus for solid workmanship and good drying. So far, without any reservations.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1217054315.text_en: Solid equipment at a decent price. It washes dishes elegantly - it does what is expected from such equipment. Fortunately, WIFi is an option - you can also operate it only from the keyboard.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1217336451.text_en: Quiet and compact dishwasher. Great quality, nice control from the application level. The only drawback, but only from my perspective, is a different shade of gray in the touch panel and the rest of the dishwasher

1219736565.text_en: Quieter, uses less electricity and water, pleasant interior lighting, can be started and controlled from the application. I hope it will last at least as long as its predecessor.

1206318589.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is my second dishwasher from this series, the previous one served me for almost nine years. For a small dishwasher, it is very spacious, cleans well and is very quiet.

1220167203.text_en: The dishwasher works super quietly and thoroughly. I am more than satisfied so far. I also find the app notifications about the rinsing process practical.

1219069471.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher is quiet and met my expectations. It is spacious and has cool programs. You can also control it from the application level. I recommend

1216916443.text_en: easy to set up, remote control, clear application and also the display, the design of the compartments is well done

1220164975.text_en: An excellent dishwasher for a smaller kitchen. It washes and polishes beautifully, it is spacious enough for its dimensions. I am satisfied.

1219489278.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion I am satisfied with the purchase. It washes dishes thoroughly, is quiet and economical

1219488648.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion Works as intended. The dishes are clean

1216989213.title_en: Great dishwasher - welcome to the family
1216989213.text_en: Having a dishwasher is something new in our house. What a pleasant and eye-pleasing novelty. The color - brushed steel matches the other appliances in the kitchen. Despite its dimensions, it is really shapely and fits under the countertop. Looks nice. The external display allows you to fully understand what your dishwasher is doing in real time. Inside, it's a very sensible device, not cluttered with unnecessary frills. Adjustable drawers. There is enough space for a family of 4. Well-organized shelves and the flexibility of this organization provide comfort for users. You don't have to wonder whether something will fit or not. Interior lighting helps a lot. The dishwasher can open itself after the program ends if you keep these settings in the application. A big advantage is that it opens after the dishes have cooled down, so no steam escapes from the dishwasher and there is no risk of burns or an increase in room humidity. The menu is very clear, even intuitive. Thanks to the option of managing the dishwasher via the application, you can change settings without wondering where the appropriate switch or regulator is. The application adds additional programs available on the display to the basic programs available from the application level. This is a very nice feature that allows you to upgrade your device without replacing it with a newer model. The assistant in the application helps, especially users with no experience (like us), to find out which program to choose. The instructions available in paper version are legible and transparent. This is a big plus. We were surprised by the very quiet operation. With a regular program you can't hear it, and with a silent program you won't notice it at all. We were convinced to this model by its energy class B and low water consumption. We try to reduce our carbon footprint.  We are also aware of rising water prices. We are counting on savings and balancing the dishwasher installments with savings on water and gas. Our cat also accepted the dishwasher without any problems. In fact, he doesn't notice it, and even though his food and water bowls are near the dishwasher, he still uses them without any worries. I recommend it to others wholeheartedly. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1202372988.title_en: The best dishwasher I've ever had!
1202372988.text_en: I bought a Bosch dishwasher and I am really very pleased! The device operates quietly, the washing results are fantastic, and the dishes come out perfectly clean, even with dried food remains. The control is intuitive, it is possible to configure and control it from the phone application. Additionally, the practical EfficientDry function allows the dishwasher door to automatically open during the drying phase, which speeds up the entire process. I definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a quiet and solid dishwasher. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1220005022.text_en: The dishwasher looks very good in person and seems to be solidly made. I wanted quiet operation, full integration with the structure and a practical interior, and this model met my expectations after assembly and first familiarization with the equipment. The baskets are conveniently arranged and operation is intuitive. I chose Bosch because of the good opinions about the durability and quality of this brand's equipment. I hope it will work equally well in everyday use. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1207471825.text_en: In a home where washing was always done by hand, the appearance of the dishwasher brings about a revolution comparable to the discovery of America. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1205161932.text_en: The best Bosh dishwashers in Mielec, it has been working for 6 years and the second one now I have bought a newer Bosh model #opinionmotivated by promotion

1216069144.text_en: I recommend it with a clear conscience. I have never had a better dishwasher and it meets my expectations completely

1216065643.text_en: The dishwasher fulfills its role, you can see that it is a decent piece of equipment at a good price, it is solid and adds that accent to the kitchen.

1219316413.text_en: I am very pleased with the Bosch dishwasher. The equipment operates quietly, washes dishes thoroughly and is very easy to use. Even with a full load, everything comes out clean and well dried.    The big advantages are practical programs and low water and electricity consumption. The dishwasher has well-designed baskets that can easily accommodate larger pots and pans. The automatic opening function at the end of the program is also very useful - the dishes are dried better. #opinion motivated by promotion*

1219152199.text_en: My family has been using Bosch appliances for years. This is another device that meets our requirements. The dishwasher runs smoothly and washes even very dirty dishes. It doesn't jam and there are no problems with it. I recommend it to anyone who is looking for years of failure-free devices and high-quality workmanship! #opinionmotivated by promotion

1218865375.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is one of the best dishwasher models that fits the IKEA modular kitchen and does not require any IKEA adapters, which is a much better solution than the dishwasher offered by IKEA with various adapters

1217386409.text_en: I have been using only Bosch dishwashers for years, and they have never let me down. New kitchen, new dishwasher, I chose the top model with Vario sliding hinges. Tested, works very well. I recommend. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1218786599.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher is solidly made and works quietly. The operation is simple, everything is clear and the programs are easy to understand. The dishes come out clean, without any streaks.  It works well in everyday use

1218967988.text_en: The dishwasher works as expected.  She is quiet and washes dishes well.  The post-drying function gives good results.  This is the second Bosch dishwasher I have, and I do not regret my choice.    I recommend #opinionmotivated by promotion

1210822094.text_en: I can feel that love has been put into the small details when using the machine. There are really many things that are really well thought out. And then everything just works like clockwork. Would at any time recommend a machine from Bosch.

1206707980.text_en: Despite its small width, it holds quite a lot. Dishes usually come out dry after the Eco program, and the baskets can be easily moved to accommodate different sets of pots and plates. Perfect for an apartment. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1217624041.text_en: The dishwasher is very nice. The cutlery drawer is beautiful, and the automatic opening of the door after washing to dry the dishes is also very good. I sincerely recommend it, this is another dishwasher from this company.

1217400429.text_en: I am very satisfied with the dishwasher. It works quietly and washes dishes well. A big plus is the variety of programs, so you can easily adjust the mode to your needs. I recommend.

1218501460.text_en: The dishwasher has smoothly operating sliding hinges, allowing for a perfectly even kitchen front, and is quiet, economical, top quality from Bosch

1217410939.text_en: Very nice dishwasher, I recommend it!

1175342156.title_en: A practical, connected and efficient dishwasher
1175342156.text_en: This dishwasher is extremely efficient: the dishes are systematically impeccable, whether in a short cycle or a long cycle. Although compact, the arrangements are partially modular, which gives it a very respectable capacity. Finally, the connected function is practical for downloading new programs or consulting usage statistics.  Only two points could be improved: 1) a "3 in 1" button to indicate that you are using all-in-one tablets would be simpler than having to manually modify the regenerating salt and rinse aid parameters.  2) in auto cycle, the solid tablets are not always completely used, which leaves traces of detergent on the dishes. Additional sensors could ensure that the tablet is completely consumed before starting the rinse.

1162726850.text_en: I have just installed this dishwasher and in the first washes I have verified that all the walls of the dishwasher remain with a lot of water, even the sprinklers, this water does not disappear and you have to dry the entire interior of the dishwasher by hand, which is frustrating.

1101701812.text_en: The dishwasher meets expectations 100% - quiet, easy to use, small, efficient. This is another Bosch dishwasher and we are happy with it

1097970407.title_en: How an amazing dishwasher saved Bartek yesterday
1097970407.text_en: One illegitimate morning, Bartek's dishwasher came to the 4th floor, and as luck would have it, Bartek had not one guest at home that same day, but his entire family, who unannounced his living room, and Bartek, a bit panicked, felt a lot of pressure, because what would he serve the second course, preceded by Brussels sprouts, and suddenly he discovered a big button on the Bosch dishwasher, - press me, my friend, and I will quickly remove the leftovers. Brussels sprouts - It so happened that Bartek trusted the robot, and thanks to this friendship, he calmed down the whole family in time. Bartek is me, and a practical person is my middle name, and as luck or bad luck would have it, I found support in my job :)

1125125555.text_en: Previously had a different dishwasher name xxx. I was happy with it for a long time until it broke.  Now the Bosch... more than satisfied.  What I particularly like - very good cleaning / connect function / especially that you can download additional cleaning programs. If you have problems or questions, you can read everything about it using the app or contact customer service. For this ☆☆☆☆☆ Facilities with the app It's child's play I could even start a wash cycle while I'm on the go or or.    So I can only recommend the device.     ☆☆☆☆☆1A HAPPY AGAIN ☆☆☆☆

1173510401.text_en: Great machine. We tried putting in both washed and unwashed dishes and it really washed them great. Considering that it is a small 45, it can be packed nicely.     It is not noisy, but it also has a mode where it works a little quieter.     Perhaps the only downside I would mention is that it should come with sliders for the front. If you buy ikea fronts, they are longer and require those sliders.     It is possible to connect it via the bosch application to the phone and start it from there, there is also an option to download various programs of the machine (eco, quick, etc.). Counts tablets and informs if gloss or salt is missing. Which is nice to have.     All in all, highly recommended!

1091772047.text_en: This is the second Bosch dishwasher, and between them I had a dishwasher from another brand, which was worse than even the older Bosch dishwasher. The current dishwasher is better in everything and I was VERY positively surprised by the phone control. After starting the appropriate program, I set the dishwasher to work, usually at night. After finishing work, it turns off automatically. During the day, I can see on my phone how much time is left until the end of work and even a notification about the end of work. I am happy that I can count the washing capsules because I know when to buy more.

1158309909.title_en: Bosch Serie 2 SPV2HKX42E - budget and classy
1158309909.text_en: This is another Bosch/Siemens in the household. The previous one lasted almost 14 years. The SPV2HKX42E dishwasher has very good parameters for reasonable money - it is worth it. This model is still for traditionalists (cutlery basket instead of a drawer), but I have never had any problems with it. The dishwasher washes and dries very well and is quiet compared to the previous one. We have five factory programs, but the application allows you to expand them with another one. The control from the app is intuitive and the first configuration of the dishwasher using this method is a plus compared to if someone preferred using the keys. I recommend Bosch

1104359208.title_en: Very good device - app has weaknesses
1104359208.text_en: The fully integrated dishwasher worker as desired. The adjustable basket is very good. I particularly liked the very good cleaning performance, even in eco mode. I would give 5 stars for that. 4 stars because I'm unfortunately not at all satisfied with the Home connect app. Once set up it should work without any glitches. However, the connection to the dishwasher was disconnected very often and I no longer use the app. The dishwasher can of course also be used without the smart character, so I can do without this feature with a star deduction :) (I have to empty the dishwasher myself afterwards anyway ;-))

1104126469.text_en: I read many opinions and articles before purchasing a dishwasher and that's why I decided on this model and brand. I was convinced by the opinions about the 12-year operation of the device. After purchase, I installed it myself, which was no problem. The instructions and template for the furniture front are simply perfect - clear and legible. The use itself is also very simple and is additionally helped by the home connect application, which allows you to remotely start the program and cancel, for example, drying. There is enough space inside for a family of 3 and we were positively surprised. We run the dishwasher once a day for a 4-hour Eco program and it cleans everything properly. I recommend it with a clear conscience.

1216882462.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is my second dishwasher after 14 years.  The Bosch dishwasher operates quietly, washes dishes very thoroughly and copes well with even dried dirt. The programs are intuitive, and the interior of the dishwasher is well-thought-out and spacious. The equipment is very solidly made. I can recommend it with clear conscience. I recommend

1147592842.text_en: I highly recommend the Bosch dishwasher. It is a reliable dishwasher that has many cleaning programs suitable for every type of dishes and level of dirt. Thanks to the Home Connect application, I am able to turn on the dishwasher when I am not at home, I am also informed about the number of tablets, and even thanks to it I can turn on the dishwasher for ultra-fast cleaning when there is a mess in the sink and guests are coming in 30 minutes. The dishwasher washes the dishes thoroughly and dries them to the last drop. I have already owned a few dishwashers of different brands, but I can honestly recommend this one. Despite the short period of use, I can say that it is the best dishwasher I have ever had.

1186445961.text_en: I am extremely pleased with her performance. Installation was simple and the user manual is clear and easy to follow.    The car has a modern design with an intuitive control panel and a well compartmentalized interior, spacious enough for a family of 3-4 people. The washing programs are varied – from quick 30-minute cycles to intensive programs, perfect for heavily soiled dishes.    A big plus is the low level of noise during operation – almost inaudible, which is ideal for apartments or open space kitchens. Dishes come out spotless, including glass or cutlery, without traces of water or detergent.    It consumes little water and energy, which is also reflected in the monthly bills. It also has smart functions, such as the scheduled start or the dirt sensor, which automatically adjusts the wash cycle.    Advantages: • Silent • Energy efficient • Washes flawlessly • Easy to use

1099231437.text_en: I have had the dishwasher installed for a month and I am very satisfied. Bosch replaced a 3-year-old device from Ma E and it was a very good decision. The current machine has much better designed baskets for dishes and washes more thoroughly. I think it's because of the double propeller. Very carefully crafted and the price is reasonable

1201294668.text_en: I bought this dishwasher because of the lack of space. It was a very good choice. My wife cooks almost daily and we use it as such. With the app, you can schedule the car to start at the desired time. Water and electricity consumption can also be viewed. It was the right choice for us.

1207058123.title_en: Quiet, roomy and sparkling clean! Bosch dishwasher is
1207058123.text_en: Since the Bosch dishwasher came to my home, washing dishes has become a pleasure! I'm impressed by how quiet it is - in fact, I often forget it's working at all, which is a huge plus in an open kitchen.    The washing programs are perfectly tailored to various needs. The ExtraDry function keeps even plastic containers dry, not just dripping wet. The interior is very roomy and flexible thanks to adjustable baskets and a convenient cutlery drawer, which allows you to wash a large number of dishes at once after a family dinner. The dishes always come out perfectly clean and streak-free.    I highly recommend this model to anyone who values ​​quality and time saving.    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1150406870.text_en: The product impresses in many ways.  The cleaning results are great, the machine is quiet and the smart functions are practical.    You can save the number of remaining tabs so that the device notifies you that the tabs will soon run out. If you want, you can connect everything to Alexa or similar devices and supplies will be ordered automatically.   Information is given about machine maintenance and when salt and rinse aid need to be refilled.  The water hardness can be adjusted using the HomeConnect app so that the machine saves salt or uses more salt.   You can set your own programs and start the machine conveniently via remote start (cell phone or Alexa, etc.).

1209944283.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion* Dishwasher worth recommending. Washes off beautifully. She is quiet.

1161597779.text_en: I am satisfied with both the ease of use and the operation of the dishwasher. It has enough programs, it is easy to find your favorite one and use it every day. Works great with the Home Connect app. Thanks to it, we can see how much time is left. In addition, we can set the volume of the sound notification to silent and receive information about the end of the program only on the phone. It has a basket (removable and freely adjustable) and a cutlery tray, which is something you won't find in models of other brands. It is a very roomy 45. I hope it will last for years.

1200093853.text_en: Since I bought this dishwasher, my daily life has completely changed. I don't waste time at the sink anymore, I don't have discussions about who washes the dishes anymore.

1092631258.text_en: From the first time I started using the dishwasher, I always washed it by hand - it is impossible to get the same result as using this dishwasher.

1141860470.text_en: Quiet, roomy. Uses little water. Purchased due to attachment to the brand and satisfaction with the previous device

1179845391.text_en: Very satisfied with my purchase. This dishwasher is perfect, the dishes always come out very clean and dry even without using the drying + program. Ease of use with the application, possibility of downloading washing programs and choosing the one best suited to our needs. For me, washing at 65 degrees in 1 hour is perfect, quick and very economical. The wash costs me 11 cents during off-peak hours because I program it to run during its time slots.   Very easy installation. Noise level, quite quiet. Perfect for every day.

1202550676.text_en: Its small size is its best virtue. Leaves the dishes impeccable. Easy use and many programs to choose from

1174670740.text_en: I really like the dishwasher, it is quiet and practical

1204814070.title_en: How to wash dishes, only use Bosch
1204814070.text_en: Bosch SPV2HKX42E is a dishwasher that seems to have built-in artificial intelligence - it understands my moods! When I'm tired, I wash quickly and quietly. When I have guests, it sparkles so much that everyone asks what kind of equipment it is. Even the glasses look as new as advertised. I don't know how I lived without this dishwasher before! Bosch SPV2HKX42E is my new family member - quiet, hard-working and never complains. He washes the plates so thoroughly that I'm ashamed to remember the days of washing them by hand. Now, instead of standing at the sink, I drink coffee and pretend that I did this perfect job.

1158779628.text_en: The Bosch SPV2HKX42E dishwasher is a real game changer in my kitchen. Thanks to the Home Connect application, I can easily manage the dishwasher from my smartphone, which makes everyday duties much easier. SpeedPerfect+ reduces cycle time by up to 75%, so you quickly get clean glasses and plates for parties. Although the dishwasher has an E energy label, its efficiency and features such as AquaStop leak protection make it an investment that pays off in the long run. Despite minor imperfections, such as slightly damp dishes after the end of the cycle, its advantages definitely outweigh it. I wholeheartedly recommend this model to anyone looking for an efficient and technologically advanced solution for their kitchen

1148840483.text_en: The dishwasher is nice and very spacious. Previously, I had a Siemens, but after 12 years the programmer broke down and it was not worth repairing.   It works very similarly to the previous one, but we'll see if it lasts as long.  A nice addition is the ability to connect to the phone from the application to monitor the operating status of the device.  When it comes to workmanship, the previous model seemed more solid (the new one lacks sheet metal covers on the sides of the dishwasher).  It's nice that it comes with a special hose to protect against flooding, because it used to not be included and you had to buy it yourself.

1103279737.text_en: Silent, washes well, the only drawback is that it leaves some moisture on the dishes, glassware... and especially inside the walls of the device at the end of the cycles

1135311275.text_en: After the old Bosch gave up the ghost after 11 years, a new purchase was necessary. The choice was between Series 2 and Series 6. Ultimately, the deciding question was whether I wanted a cutlery drawer or not. In all other features the two series are very similar. The app operation, the timelight and a short program were important to me. The Series 2 offers all of this at a reasonable price. Everything is fine with the cleaning result and the volume. Installation was of course no problem either.

1218258604.text_en: The ease of use of the device is impressive, as are the program selection and the washing results.  When installing, I would have liked a few words of explanation about the pictograms. In some places a little imagination (or experience?) is necessary.  A clear indication that there was significantly more and better information online than in the documents included with the device would have been very helpful. Unfortunately, you can only get there once you have registered.  That's why I deducted a star.

1107492960.text_en: The device is noisier than the Bosch that it replaced when it was 16 years old. It also does not have the default 30-minute program that the previous one had. And finally, the Wi-Fi connectivity is quite unfortunate, I highly doubt that there are many people capable of remotely managing the device (among the few that manage to configure it).

1159381387.text_en: I have been using Bosch dishwashers for many years and when equipment from another manufacturer refused to work in my new apartment, I knew there was only one choice. I encourage you to look at the comparison tool on the Bosch website because it is very convenient, the symbols can be deceptive, and when you compare three selected models, it is much easier to make a decision. It was my first time choosing a built-in dishwasher and I chose Series 2. Quite simple installation (and, above all, a well-prepared video with installation instructions). The dishwasher has only had a few cycles, but you can already see that it is comfortable to use. The only drawbacks are the lack of a diode indicating the end of the cycle - there is only information about operation. In general, I recommend it, I hope that the dishwasher will serve you for a long time and without failures :)

1137393471.text_en: After 7 years, the previous Bosch dishwasher refused to cooperate, so considering the operating time and excellent service, I decided to buy a product from the same company. And I have absolutely no regrets.  Neat, efficient, relatively quiet. I considered the option of connecting to the phone via Wi-Fi to be a whim... and today (after 2 weeks of use) thanks to it, I downloaded a shorter dishwashing program - so it is useful after all. A big plus is the shelf for knives and dividing the shelf for glasses into 2 parts. I hope it will last as long as the previous one.

1204189123.text_en: This BOSCH dishwasher met expectations.  Quiet during operation. It removes heavy dirt without leaving it shiny. The operation of the dishwasher is very intuitive and the programs are clearly described and well configured. I highly recommend it!    #opinionmotivated by promotion

1205228251.text_en: The dishwasher works great. It is quiet and very easy to use. The dishes always come out perfectly clean and dry. I definitely recommend buying it, it is solid and reliable equipment. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1159553185.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher from the silent series. The previous twin dishwasher has been operating for almost 15 years and its price was not related to the failure rate of the device. So far, I have been using the dishwasher for two weeks. It is quiet and easy to use. Perfect for a small family that does not produce too many dishes. In my opinion, this model is perfect for people who are looking for simple and effective solutions. I hope that this model will also stay with us for a long time.

1158627705.title_en: Supposedly Bosch, but a bit crap.
1158627705.text_en: The dishwasher worked flawlessly for 2 years and 3 months. Purchased in July 2021, but connected in October 2021. In February 2024, an aria of beeping and a disco started on the panel. Everything that could was flashing along with the rhythmic sound made by the dishwasher. The warranty no longer covered this circus, so I was forced to use an external service. What happened? Currently, it was enough to pour the water out of the bowl by tilting the dishwasher, but a few days ago the panel started flashing again, but the dishwasher still works. At least for now. Because if the problem persists, the bowl will probably need to be replaced because there is a high probability that it has become RUSTY and the AquaStop system turns on, which is why the panel goes crazy and, at some point, the dishwasher itself. 1218621498.text_en: The Bosch dishwasher is equipment that definitely stands out for its solid workmanship and modern design. At first glance you can see the high quality of materials and refined details, and the intuitive control panel makes operation very easy. A big advantage is the variety of washing programs - from Eco mode to intensive cycles that can cope even with heavily soiled dishes.    The interior is well designed, with practical baskets and additional solutions to facilitate the arrangement of dishes. The dishwasher operates relatively quietly, which is important in everyday use, especially in open kitchens.    To sum up - it is reliable and functional equipment that combines efficiency with comfort of use. An ideal choice for people who value quality and durability

1213966629.text_en: Hello, For about 20 years I was using a Bosh Integrated 8/9 cutlery. On paper it consumed 2 liters more, at an energy level, I don't know, what I do know is that it was simple and effective, 30º/60º/75º with programs from 30' to just over 1 hour, now, this other model forces you to spend between 90' and 4 hours to wash the same thing.  Does the dishwasher work? Yes Is it better than what I used? No On the other hand, the WiFi connection cannot work, it has been tested with different mobile phones, WiFis 5 and 2.4, WiFi shared from the mobile... nothing, it is unable to detect the network and the device.  Surely there are simpler ways to connect.   Comparatively not at all satisfied

1218725795.text_en: After 13 years, our old Bosch dishwasher left us. After a very good experience, I chose something new from Bosch. After a dilemma regarding the basket versus the cutlery drawer, the required light indication on the floor and the built-in 45 cm variant, I chose this one from a few possible types. The installation was simple, the first washing cycles confirmed that it washes well. I am satisfied with multiple programs, quiet running and I especially appreciate the automatic opening of the door after the program is finished. I was pleased with the simple height adjustment of the middle drawer so that larger pots can fit on the lower one. Overall, I'm satisfied, I believe that it will last at least as long as the previous one, I don't see any flaws at the moment, and all that remains is to finish the wooden door panel.

1218889111.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is my first Bosch dishwasher and I am very pleased with my choice.    The BOSCH SPV4EMX17E dishwasher effectively removes dirt, even from dishes that were more dirty. It works quietly, so it does not interfere with everyday functioning, and its operation is simple and convenient. Another big advantage is the variety of programs that allow you to choose the right mode for your current needs.    The device uses little water and energy, which is important when used regularly. I am very satisfied with this purchase and I can recommend this model to people who are looking for a functional and reliable dishwasher.

1214053267.text_en: It works very well, it's quiet

1221885810.text_en: We have been using it almost every day for a month since the purchase. It can really handle a lot, the upper shelf for cutlery and small parts saves a lot of space, so two pots can fit in addition to regular dishes. The height-adjustable middle part is easy to adjust and increases the variability of dish storage. I tried several programs and the dishes were always washed. After the previous dishwasher of another brand, it is a great relief not to worry about how the dishes are stacked and what program to use to keep the dishes clean. Even if it is left on at night, it does not disturb anyone with its operation, not even with the sound signal after washing the dishes. The appliance has significantly increased our quality of life.

1218380772.text_en: Dishwasher purchased over 3 weeks ago, well tested, used daily. Bosch has been maintaining a certain level of product quality for years. The previous dishwasher - also Bosch - was used for less than 20 years! Naturally, it's time to replace it with a newer model. The dishwasher is quiet, easy to install and use (also for seniors), and contains many useful functions. I think I can safely assume that it will last us much longer than the warranty period. This particular dishwasher model was selected after analyzing the current offer, post-purchase opinions, and reading reviews on popular YouTube channels specializing in household appliances. I recommend!  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1200296003.text_en: Installing the dishwasher is very simple in the instructions, and quick configuration on the phone allowed it to be done quickly. What can I say about the previous one? The third drawer has more space for cutlery. And better ergonomics in the lower drawers. Which is a big plus

1221064892.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion This is my first Bosch dishwasher and I am EXTREMELY happy with my choice. The BOSCH SPV4EMX17E dishwasher effectively removes dirt and grease from heavily soiled dishes. It works quietly, so it does not interfere with everyday functioning, and its operation is child's play and convenient. Another big advantage is the variety of programs that allow you to choose the right mode for your current needs. The device is very economical, it uses little water and energy, which is very important when used regularly. I am very satisfied with this purchase so far and I can recommend this model to people who are looking for a functional and reliable dishwasher.

1202701538.text_en: Our previous Bosch dishwasher worked for 13 years, so when I replaced it with a new one, I chose the same brand again. 1221612147.title_en: when there's a discount event = it's worth it
1221612147.text_en: The dishwasher has an excellent layout for cutlery and other dishes. This makes it possible to wash more dishes than other dishwashers with the same content. It has simple and intuitive controls. After washing is finished and the door opens automatically, no steam comes out. It was always steamy with the former washing machine. It is also a good idea that a signal light shines on the floor during the operation of the washing machine. I also appreciate the very well-crafted assembly description, including links to videos, where it is shown in an illustrative way how to proceed. It is processed at a level where basically everyone should be able to assemble it. The negative is that it is difficult to access the setting during assembly, as well as the actual setting of the door opening rate for the automatic opening mode. However, it feels like the washing machine is noisier than the one we had until now, although the previous one paradoxically had a 2dB higher noise level and seemed quieter to us. It was an unpleasant surprise for us that no manual was delivered either in Slovak or in Czech. The shipment contained manuals but only in various other languages. If the Slovak manual is not supplied by the seller directly, he should at least send it to an email and not for the buyer to search for it. It was equally incomprehensible that after removing the packaging, the entire dishwasher was damp to the point of being wet, as if fogged up, which raised unnecessary questions as to whether the metal parts could degrade over time.

1203499247.text_en: Initially, I was a bit reluctant to dream of a dishwasher, we are two pensioners who don't really dirty many dishes, we rarely have guests, so I didn't really see its usefulness. At this moment I can tell you that my wife is super excited about the way she washes the dishes and how useful she can be. It's almost like a family member. We declare ourselves very satisfied.

1209949565.text_en: I have been using it for several weeks and have no complaints. First of all - it's quiet, you can turn it on in the evening and you can't hear it at all.  The interior is well thought out, the dishes fit comfortably. Made in Europe, so I hope it will last a long time.  It's still too early for any disadvantages, but for now I recommend it.  #opinionmotivated by promotion

1199015452.text_en: Great equipment, worth the price. After several years of work by our previous Bosch, it was time for something new. As usual, we were not disappointed. Apart from the fact that the equipment works flawlessly, a nice option is the operation via applications. You can change settings, check the washing process and energy and water consumption. You can download several additional programs through the application. I downloaded the 30-minute wash at 45 degrees, the program I used most often in my old dishwasher :) I recommend it

1217803362.text_en: The Bosch Serie 4 dishwasher is a very good choice - it works quietly, washes dishes thoroughly and is easy to use. It has a well-designed interior and offers great value for money. I recommend! #opinionmotivated by promotion

1217331340.text_en: In general, we are satisfied with the dishwasher, but what we greatly miss is that there is no remaining washing time during operation on the floor (ours has the option of connecting to the application and of course there is that information, but it would certainly be quite useful and significant if, in addition to the operation indicator, there is also the remaining washing time). The dishes are not completely dry, which is what we were hoping for, considering the ExtraDry function, but it is possible that we did not turn it on or use it correctly. In addition to this, we like that through the app we can monitor when it is necessary to pour salt and shine liquid. We believe that the application is solid and easy to use, and there are several programs through it that are also explained, so we have no doubts about which program to use when.

However, if you think you can do this via Alexa or Google, you will be more than disappointed.

1203466524.title_en: A dishwasher that makes a difference

I especially appreciate the eco mode, which allows you to save water and energy without compromising the cleanliness of the dishes. Control via the application is a nice addition, but the biggest advantage is the intuitive interior - everything has its place. 1199797878.text_en: An impeccable machine, quality and professionalism, cleans absolutely everything flawlessly, silent, multiple programs, easy to use, application for use that helps you enormously, easy to install, in other words it is useful in a household! 1176679033.text_en: The car is extraordinary. The WiFi function is brilliant, from the application I can see what stage the washing is at and I can also start it remotely. I highly recommend it. #opinionmotivated by promotion

1164649325.text_en: Wash and dry very well! The glasses remain flawless, and the Home Connect application is very easy, intuitive! Such a dishwasher should not be missing from any kitchen!   Thank you Bosch! All my appliances are Bosch, exceptional quality!

1218309162.text_en: I deliberately chose a dishwasher with a width of 45cm because we have a two-person household. The cutlery drawer is very easy to fill and the machine cleans it perfectly. I can tilt the middle basket so that the water can flow out of the bottom of the cups. To have more space, I put the saucer fixture down so I can put more cups.   There is more space in the lower basket because of the cutlery drawer. I can expand this even further by folding in the device for plates. Bosch has built in a great device to place a glass the size of a wheat beer glass. A great solution for us. I don't need that many dishes and I can turn on the dishwasher every two days with little energy consumption. 1173162861.text_en: The dishwasher arrived carefully packed, which is a good sign as it shows that the manufacturer cares about the safety of the product during transport. All components were safely located and without any damage, which is certainly commendable.    Furthermore, the installation instructions are very detailed and clear, which is useful for anyone who decides to do it themselves. All essential parts of the process are clearly indicated through the steps, which eliminates the possibility of error.    The washing machine offers a number of interesting programs for different types of washing, but there is a small drawback - the absence of a shorter program, for example of 30 minutes. For users who need to quickly wash smaller quantities of dishes, this could be significant.    One of the biggest advantages of this washing machine is its extremely quiet working noise. Even when washing at night, it is almost imperceptible, which is ideal for households where noise can be a problem.    A particularly interesting feature is the ability to adjust the dosage of salt and shine via the app. This solution provides additional flexibility and allows users to adjust consumption according to their own needs, without the need for manual adjustments.    All in all, the washing machine leaves a great impression, with a few minor flaws. An excellent choice for anyone who appreciates quality, silence and technological innovation.

1219653819.text_en: This is my second Bosch dishwasher. The dishwasher was replaced after 24 years of intensive use in a family of four.   The SPV6EMX09E dishwasher far exceeded my expectations. It meets all the requirements of a high-end device. Great design and, most importantly, the bottom of the dishwasher is made of stainless steel (indestructible). It has three baskets that make it much easier to arrange the dishes. Particularly noteworthy is the automatic door opening function after the program is finished and remote control via the application. Additionally, it deserves to be recommended due to its low electricity and water consumption. After washing and drying, the dishes are really clean.

1209842343.text_en: After 13 years, it was time to change the dishwasher. After experience with a Bosch washing machine, we also chose this manufacturer. The device has been with us since the beginning of December and we like it very much. We chose a small model, 45 cm wide, intended for built-in use. A very convenient application for setting the washing program. What's cool is the start time suggestions, which try to suggest times when energy demand is lower. Quality of workmanship, large capacity, working mechanisms - no objections whatsoever. There is quite a problem with this capacity. We needed a small dishwasher for 3 people. But there is so much space in this model that we usually have to wait several days to fill it! The product is definitely worth recommending. The time to replace your refrigerator is approaching. I don't think I need to tell you what company it will be from :-)

1215884280.title_en: Excellent cleaning and silence, Bosch guarantee
1215884280.text_en: I purchased this Bosch Series 6 dishwasher (model SPV6EMX09E) and I am very satisfied with the performance. Cleaning is impeccable even with the eco cycles and the silence is surprising, you almost don't notice that it is in operation. The third basket for cutlery is very useful as it optimizes space and the automatic opening of the door at the end of the cycle (EfficientDry), which helps a lot with the drying of plastics. I give 4 stars instead of 5 only because the most complete programs are quite long, but the results justify the wait. A solid purchase that I recommend to those looking for reliability.

1217276317.text_en: #opinionmotivated by promotion The dishwasher has effective LED backlight and indicates the remaining washing time on the floor. It is very quiet and you can upload additional programs remotely. Surprisingly, even those that last less than an hour. The WiFi connection is very nice, you can turn on the dishwasher remotely.

I also appreciate the time projection on the floor and the practical cutlery drawer. At 45 cm wide, it is surprisingly spacious inside.    Pros: ✔ very quiet operation ✔ low water and energy consumption ✔ high-quality drying ✔ smart functions and easy operation ✔ good arrangement of baskets Cons: ✘ higher price ✘ longer washing time for some programs ✘ when using for the first time you need to get used to folding dishes Overall, an excellent dishwasher and I definitely recommend it for us 👍

The cutlery drawer, the ability to adjust the baskets, the tank lighting and the automatic opening of the door after the cycle are a great improvement in everyday duties in the kitchen!

A large selection of programs allows you to adjust the cycle to your current needs, and the drying function makes everything ready to be put away immediately after finishing work.  Particularly noteworthy is energy efficiency and intuitive operation - everything is simple and convenient in everyday use. Additionally, the ability to control it via the app is a great modern touch that really comes in handy.  I definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable and functional dishwasher! #opinionmotivated by promotion

We also like the practical layout of the interior and the ease of use. Although it is a narrower model, it can fit surprisingly many dishes. The time/progress indicator displayed on the floor and notifications in the app solved the most annoying inconvenience of the old dishwasher. Automatically opens the door after the program ends - I no longer have to get up in the middle of the night to silence the "bastard" - for me, this was a priority when choosing the device. "Consistency", i.e. something like the impression of using more delicate plastics and thinner, bendable stainless steel sheets - in the old one these things were coarse and impossible to destroy, in the new one they seem to be quite delicate. 1215508922.text_en: I chose the Bosch Serie 6 SPV6EMX09E dishwasher and I can say that I am very pleased so far - it arrived today and I can already feel the difference.    First of all, I really liked how quiet it is. It's barely audible when it's running, which is super important to me, especially in an apartment. From what I've seen, it's around 44 dB, so it's really ok on that side.    I also like how well thought out the interior is – the baskets are very flexible and I can easily organize the dishes, even when I have larger or different shaped items. The height adjustment system is a big plus, because I can adapt the space depending on what I'm washing.    Another thing that convinced me is the automatic drying function (the door opens at the end), which helps a lot - the dishes come out much drier without having to wipe them.    It also has quite a few programs, including automatic and fast, and the water consumption seems to me to be very good (under 9 liters per cycle), so it is also cost-effective.    All in all, for a 45cm machine, I find it very well balanced: compact, quiet and with premium features. At the moment I am very happy with the choice and I really recommend it
